Behind midfield early stages, shuffled back to the rear home turn, found disappointing little on straightening, never in the picture. (Jockey : not suited to the moderate tempo.)
From wide draw dropped back for cover, moved back up to midfield passing 900M, driven out 400M and finished off the race mildly, always held by leaders.
Close up behind leaders early stages, shuffled back to midfield rounding home turn, battled on one paced to 200M then steadily weakened.
Ridden along to take lead early stages, tracked the pace from 800M, battled on well and challenged for the lead again 150M, led 50M from home, held on from fast finishing 2nd.
Jumped well from gate 1, raced slightly better than midfield on the middle track, a bit closer in the middle stages, hard ridden 400M, showed limited response, weakened gradually final 150M.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced towards rear in the middle of the track, 3 lengths or so back, made very good progress final 400M to take 2nd.
Away with them, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader, 2 away from the stands' rail, short of room 400M, severely checked near 300M, weakened and eased thereafter.
Average to begin, positioned a length behind the leader on the stands' side, peaked and bumped 300M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the middle track, hard ridden approaching 400M, made some progress to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Began smartly, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead after passing 600M, hard ridden from 350M, showed very good response, kept on strongly to the line and scored.
Moderately away, raced behind midfield nearer to the middle track, 3 lengths back, showed limited response final 400M.
Began well, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the middle track, hard ridden after passing 400M, kept on well to take a place without threatening.
Bumped start, took the early lead, headed near 600M, hard ridden after passing 450M, showed limited response, weakened final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from gate 14, positioned a length behind the leader on the stands' rail, hard ridden from 400M, showed limited response, weakened inside final furlong.
Away with them, positioned a length behind the leader, nearer to the middle track, hard ridden after passing 400M but only showed limited response, weakened final 150M.
Bumped start, raced slightly better than midfield, 3 away form the stands' rail, peaked 400M, weakened final 300M.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced at rear, 4 lengths or so back, not enough room from 350M to 150M, made minor progress thereafter.
Raced prominently, wide and no cover how-ever, showed no kick in the straight.
Worked across with leader, sat 1/2L off, kept going but couldn't take ground off winner, finished 1-1/4L behind.
Hard ridden out of the machine, sat midfield, on rail at turns, emptied approaching 200M.
Sent forward to take rail and led, kept ticking and never looked likely to be caught.
Raced in one-out one-back position, continued one paced home.
Took back, raced towards the rear, wide and no cover, improved slightly only.
Eased and slotted to midfield, wide but with cover, was fairly one paced. (See Incident Re-port)
Hampered at start, settled behind midfield, on rail, raced greenly in straight, continued with-out threatening.
Niggled along, raced in box-seat, ran on well to take 3rd.
Began only fairly, at tail and on rail, closed off strongly from 150M until got awkward to heels late.
Eased then raced in worse than midfield, 2 wide, made ground and closed off fairly late.
Took back, raced at the tail, 2-3 wide, switched across heels at 450M, ran on fairly.
Stalked the leader early stages, shifted 2-wide outside race leader rounding home bend, held some chance early in straight but unable to sustain effort inside final 150 metres.
Soon led from a wide gate, obtained rails run over 1200 metres out and steadied up the pace, led until headed by winner over 100 metres out.
Settled in rear of midfield on the rail, gained to 5th some 3L back rounding home bend, in similar position entering straight, ran on without threatening.

Broke well from a wide gate settling just over 2L back 2-wide in joint 3rd, shifted back to clear 4th inside the 800 metres, angled out 3-wide to challenge passing the 600 metres, ran home under pressure but without threatening.
Began fairly, soon picked up to 3rd just over 2L back on the rail, saved ground on the rail rounding home bend, quickened under pressure to assert authority over 100 metres out.
Began moderately, travelled in last few, never seen with a chance.
Held up in midfield travelling keenly in the slow pace to the 700 metres, came under pressure to challenge entering home straight, fought on well without threatening.
Awkward when taken back, refused to settle in last few most of the way to the 700 metres, remained well behind turning in, ran home under pressure without threatening.
Very slowly away from the widest gate, settled well behind and waited with, finished off the race strongly down the centre of the straight, nearest at finish.
Restrained to race towards the rear, taken wide in straight to challenge, closed off well to go 2nd last stride, no chance with runaway winner.
Began awkwardly, took time to muster speed, gradually moved up to join leaders, fought on to mid-straight then gave way to pursuing rivals
Chased leaders, came under pressure nearing 500M, weakened rapidly on straightening.
Settled down midfield 3-wide, stayed on fairly turning for home, not reached contention.
Crossed to the fence 900M, tracked leaders going into the turn, kept on same pace from 400M, no extra final 150M.
Taken back to the rear, saved round on inside, 6Ls to make up 400M, failed to run on.
From widest draw caught 3-wide no cover outside leader, found no extra passing 400M, weakened away.
Obtained running in midfield along the 2-path, put in a mild bid from 400M, no chance with runaway winner, lost 3rd late. (Lame next day.)
Ended up racing at the rear 6Ls behind leaders, made good progress on straightening but unable to obtain clear running from 200M, not fully tested.
Held up behind midfield, no closer than 3-wide throughout the race, quickened well early straight to lead briefly inside 200M, soon brushed aside by winner, held 2nd until last stride.
Settled behind mid-division along rails, driven near 400M, switched back to inside and ran on strongly from 300M, led inside 150M, drew away for a dominant victory.
Began awkwardly, restrained and slotted into a 3-wide spot towards the rear, couldn't go on turning into straight, never dangerous.
Reserved in midfield along the fence, was about to make his challenge but got badly held up for clear running 300-200M, stayed on final stages to the line to take 5th.
Driven forward, crossed to the lead before home turn, hung out under pressure in straight, headed inside 200M, dropped away final stages.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide better than midfield, angled out 500M, closed off well to take 2nd.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, wider from 500M, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly thereafter.
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide on turn, no clear early in straight, cleared approaching 200M, finished off evenly.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide towards rear, wider turning in, made no impression in straight.
Out in line, sent forward to race prominently, allowed rival to cross near 750M, sat right behind the leader on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place.
Began awkwardly and bumped, travelled keenly in the early stages, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, very wide turning in, finished off evenly.
Away well, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover from 800M, moved closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased final 200M.
Average to begin, showed no early speed, raced at tail, 6 to 7 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, one-paced in the run home.
Taken back from gate 13, raced towards rear on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 300M, finished off very strongly to score.
Quickly away, took the lead easily, found rail near 750M, led by a length turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began awkwardly and unbalanced, raced in midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced at rear, 5 to 6 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, no clear running early in straight, cleared 250M, finished off evenly.
Jumped well from the widest draw, trapped very wide, a length or so back, 2 wide from 750M, 2nd on turn, weakened early in straight, eased final 150M.
Bumped shortly after start, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, very wide into straight, showed limited response early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened thereafter.
Began well, raced 3 wide better than midfield, no cover from 850M, 4 wide turning in, showed good response early in straight, hit the front 200M, peaked and headed 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, wider from 550M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Slowly away, recovered, raced 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, not enough room early in straight, cleared 150M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Stumbled on jumping and shifted out, raced 3 wide with cover slightly behind midfield, very wide turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, difficult to settle near 900M, 3 wide turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame.
Moderately away from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Jumped well, raced prominently on the outside, 2 wide from 850M, 1/2L back on turn, took the lead 300M, peaked and headed 200M, kept on evenly to 50M, weakened thereafter.
Bumped shortly after start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, one-paced final furlong.
Taken back from gate 13, raced at rear on the outside, 4 to 5 lengths back on turn, finished off strongly to be nearest on line, just missed frame.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out 550M, 2 to 3 wide turning in, no clear run early in straight, ran on evenly thereafter.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 250M, hit the front 100M, ran on strongly to the line and scored.
Taken back from gate 11, raced at rear, 6 to 7 lengths back, moved closer along the rail on turn, no clear run until 100M, not able to test properly.
Slightly slow out and crowded, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, dropped to midfield in the middle stages, 3 lengths back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from gate 8, raced at tail, detached in the middle stages, 7 lengths back on turn, made some headway in straight.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide in midfield early, dropped towards rear in the middle stages, 4 lengths or so back on turn, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly, just held.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, dropped towards rear in the middle stages, 4 lengths back on turn, one-paced in straight.
Moderately away, raced behind midfield, sent forward after passing 1100M, took the lead after entering the back straight, led by a length on turn, kept on well in straight, scored by a head.
Began well, took the lead, headed after entering the back straight, a length back on turn, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Moderately away, raced at rear, 6 lengths back, commenced move after entering the back straight, positioned 3 wide, 3 lengths back on turn, weakened early in straight.
Slow away, took rail at back, made ground 100M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Slow away, at back, 2 wide, progressed steadily 250M.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, ran on ok.
Slow away, hard ridden to hold the rail in midfield, made ground 200M.
Pushed forward, emptied 300M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.

Eased back, 2 wide, progressed steadily 300M to score.
Took rail and lead easily, hung on well until 50M overhauled.

Trapped 3-4 wide throughout at back, no dash.

At rear, 2 wide, swung widest on Straightening, made minor ground only.
At rear, along the rail, made ground strongly but held up for clear run in the last 50M.
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail, never a factor.
Sent forward but wide no cover, dropped off in the straight after 150M.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, kept on going and battled on to the line for 3rd.
Raced prominently, next to the leader after 550M, 2 wide, weakened after passing 100M.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, kept on going but just headed by the winner in the last 50M
At rear, 3 wide, did not improve in the straight.
At rear, 2 wide, made ground strongly and battled on to the line.
Raced in front of midfield, along the rail, saved ground but was only one paced.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, showed strong dash in the last 200M, just beaten by a short head.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, pretty one paced.
Steadied early stages to obtain cover, settled down midfield along the inside, picked up well under top weight, closed off final 200M willingly, led close home.

Ridden forward to join the leaders, shared the pace until taken one back inside the 700 metres, 2-wide rounding bend and into home straight, soon weakened.

Pressed forward from a wide gate sharing the lead 5-wide before shifting one back 3-wide 900 metres out, lost cover approaching home bend, swung wider entering straight and soon weakened out of contention.
Settled in last few, went very wide into straight, ran on well under pressure down the centre of the track to be nearest at finish.
Taken back to rear from the widest gate, came under pressure from the 800 metres, dropped out in straight.

Picked up quickly from moderate start to be over 2L back in 6th, became 3L back 700 metres out, commenced move 400 metres out and 4-wide into straight, ran on steadily under pressure.

Held up in midfield along the 3-path, wide into straight, closed off well in the straight despite laying out under pressure, nearest at the line. Promising debut.
From inside draw moved up to vie for the lead, hung on to the lead until 200M, no extra and weakened away.
Hard driven to find the lead, vied with rival on outside, came under pressure near 400M, raced tight 250M, soon beaten and steadily retreated.
Began fairly, settled down behind midfield, saved ground turning for home then closed off the race moderately. Held by first 3 late stages
Unable to lead from draw 12, caught racing wide no cover in midfield, gave ground on straightening. (Jockey: raced flat, its last run may have taken more out of the horse.)
Crowded for room at the start, shifted across runners for cover and raced in detached last, responded fairly in the run home and passed tiring rivals only. Never a threat.
Began fairly, ended up towards the rear, pushed along 500M, ran home fairly, never posed any threat to leaders.
From wide draw steadied early stages for cover, settled towards the rear 3-wide, gave limited response turning home, never troubled leaders.
Reserved in midfield but never far off the pace, into clear running 200M, charged home strongly to lead near line.

Moved forward, caught 3-wide no cover chasing leaders, fought hard to stay in contention early straight before fading away 150M.
Out with rest, positioned 2 wide, 5 lengths or so back, commenced move after passing 450M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Taken back from gate 11, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed some response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final 150M.
Clean jump, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Away well, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground to turn, angled out 400M, made good progress early in straight, short of room near 100M, ran on well to take a place without threatening.
Taken back from gate 7, bumped and unbalanced early, raced behind midfield on the outside, closer in the middle stages, very wide turning in, weakened and crowded early in straight, eased final 150M.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, wider into straight, made some progress early in straight, crowded near 150M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Away with them, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.

Taken back to race towards rear on the inside, 2 wide from 500M, 5 lengths back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Began smartly from gate 1, sat right behind the leader on rail, there to turn, showed limited response in straight, weakened final 50M.
Taken back from gate 10, bumped and unbalanced early, raced at rear on the outside, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home without threatening.

Bumped start and unbalanced, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, angled out 600M, very wide into straight, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, sent forward to race prominently on the inside, took the lead 900M, led by 2 lengths turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Jumped well from gate 1, raced slightly better than midfield on rail, saved ground throughout, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Jumped well, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, found rail near 850M, 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader in the middle stages, weakened early in straight.

Taken back from gate 10, raced at tail, 11 lengths back, still 9 lengths or so back on turn, showed some response early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted out on jumping and bumped, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, angled out approaching 400M, showed good response early in straight, no extra final 150M, finished 3rd.
Moderately away, raced prominently but 3 wide, 2 wide from 900M, peaked on turn, weakened from 500M, eased early in straight.
Average to begin, raced prominently but trapped 4 wide early, found a 3 wide spot after entering the back straight, 2 wide from 800M, unable to maintain position on turn, eased early in straight.
Slightly inconvenienced at start, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, 6 lengths back, commenced move 500M, finished off very strongly, won by 3-3/4L.

Eased to sit in midfield, 2 wide, lack room 400M, closed off well.

Slow away, at rear, 2-4 wide, lack room 4-2, unleashed strong finishing efforts 200M.

Raced next to the leader, 2 wide, found no extra approaching 200M.
Raced in worse than midfield, along the rail, only one paced.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, closed on strongly in the straight.
Raced in worse than midfield, 2 wide, held up for clear running in the last 200M.
At one-out one-back, kept on going to score by a neck.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, saved ground and ran on well, only weakened in the last 50M.
Sent forward and took lead, weakened after passing 100M.
Raced in midfield, wide no cover, lost ground in the Straight.
At rear, 2 wide, showed no progress.
Raced behind the leader, along the rail, near the 250M clipped heels but kept on going to the line. (Lame right front)
At rear, along the rail, made ground and showed strong dash in the last 100M.
Driven forward, crossed to the lead 1000M, joined by rivals top of straight, headed 300M, weakened away final 200M.

Bumped start, raced 2 wide towards rear, travelled keenly and shifted out after passing 800M, a bit closer on turn, made some progress in straight.
Began well from gate 10, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, same position on turn, angled out 450M, finished off well to take 2nd.

Taken back from gate 11, raced 3 wide with cover at rear, similar position on turn, angled out 500M, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.

Jumped well before slotted in behind midfield, wide but with cover, kept going but winner held ground.
Jumped awkwardly, settled in front of midfield 2 wide, hampered when bumped 450M, no kick and was eased down. (See Incident Report)
Checked after start, settled at rear along the rail, kept on without threatening.
Settled to race outside lead, continued spiritedly and held off challenge to win by a short-head.
Forward, sat in box-seat, run ended approaching 300M.

Urged early, settled behind midfield, on rail, wasn't in it. (See Incident Report)
Raced in midfield, 3 wide with cover, kept finding until found no extra for final 150M.
Eased back and raced towards the rear, 2 wide, saved ground and hit the line fairly.
Awkward start, rolled forward to be prominent, wide however, showed dashes before flattening in final 100M.
Eased back, at rear 3 wide but with cover, kept going but was no threat.
Took back, at rear 2 wide, never a factor.
Travelled in midfield, on rail, hampered when shifted away from rail at 450M, one paced thereafter. (See Incident Report)
Settled well back, dropped to last 1000 metres out, very wide rounding home bend and into straight, made no further impression.
Settled 3-wide with cover in last few from a wide gate, went wider turning into home straight, ran on quite well down the centre of the track, did best work late.
Settled in rear of midfield in 8th 3-wide, came under pressure rounding home bend, ran on under pressure to just get up on line.
Taken back from a wide gate, trailed the field most of the way to the 1000 metres, shifted out for a run early in straight, made no show.
Pressed forward to lead from a wide gate, restrained in front in back straight, led until headed into home straight, folded up quickly.

Pressed forward from a wide gate, circled the field round first bend, one back 3-wide without cover throughout back straight and home bend, fought on under pressure until finding on extra inside final 100 metres.

Broke well but taken back before first bend, improved to join the leader 1200 metres out, hit the front turning for home kicking over 2L clear inside the 200 metres, unable to sustain effort and caught close to home.
Broke well, soon taken over 3L back to 6th and then 7th 850 metres out, 8th rounding home bend, hampered after straightening until the 250 metres, made no further impression.
Well there, taken one back 2-wide rounding home bend, drifted 2L back to 5th passing the 800 metres, in similar position entering home straight and soon weakened under pressure.
Crowded at start, settled towards rear on the rail, saved ground turning for home, fought on steadily in straight but never threatening.
Began well, settled one back in 3rd on the rail becoming 5th early in back straight, re-gained to 3rd 800 metres out, fought on steadily without threatening.
Settled in last few, quickened well under pressure inside final 250 metres to just fail to get up on line.

Moderate start from a low draw, settled in midfield on the rail, some 3L back in 7th in back straight, gained slight closer coming onto home bend, inconvenienced on straightening, fought on steadily without threatening.
Reared at the start and lost several lengths, re-joined main group middle stages, driven inside 400M but made no impression.
From draw 1 settled in midfield along the inside, ran on same pace turning in, never able to challenge.
From draw 13 strode forward to take the lead near 1200M, set steady pace to straight, headed by winner 350M, battled on to the line, edged out to 4th close home.
Caught wide no cover in midfield, moved closer to the pace over the home turn, not able to quicken in straight, plodded home.
Settled behind midfield off the inside, responded fairly turning for home, never going the pace to challenge.
Held up behind mid-division, swung 3-wide home turn, driven and stayed on steadily over final 300M, got up for 3rd late without any threat to the runaway winner.
Never far off, travelled well in 5th spot, into clear 350M, responded well to go 2nd near 150M but couldn't get closer to the runaway winner.
Obtained running in midfield, launched a mild bid passing 400M, not reached leaders.
Crowded at the start, raced keenly after 1400M, move up to press leader, found no extra 250M, weakened away to finish last.
Taken back after the start, reserved near last, wide into straight, ran on without troubling leaders.
Restrained to race in midfield, over-raced early and middle stages, lacked response when driven after turning home, never dangerous.
Held up towards the rear, shifted out a number of horses to obtain running passing 350M, stayed on without threatening.
Tracked leader, quickened up swiftly passing 400M, kicked clear mid-straight, continued on strongly towards the finish and was never challenged.
Bumped on jumping, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Fast into stride, positioned a length or so back on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Commenced well, trapped very wide in midfield early, taken back from 1000M, raced towards rear on the outside in the middle stage, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in 2nd, same position on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Began well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, there to turn, made good progress in straight to take a place.

Taken back to race at rear, 6 to 7 lengths back, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, 2 wide from 500M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, made some progress thereafter, no threat to the first few.
Away well, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on very well in straight, easily scored.
Jumped with them, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, 4 wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began well from gate 1, sat right behind the leader on rail, there to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually final 150M.
Bumped on jumping, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, raced tight near 900M, similar position on turn, finished off evenly.
Taken back from gate 11, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, ran on evenly thereafter.
Began only fairly, raced at rear on the outside, 7 lengths back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Began only fairly from gate 1, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out 500M, made some progress early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, finished off evenly.
Fast into stride, raced prominently, 2 wide, a length back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, wider turning in, made good progress in straight, no threat to the first two.
Lifted front feet on jumping, raced 2 wide at rear, still well back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, finished off strongly to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.

Shifted out on jumping and made contact, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, slightly improved along the rail on turn, hard ridden 300M, hit the front 200M, kept on very well to the line, won comfortably.
Quickly into stride, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 100M.
Shifted out abruptly at start and bumped, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 500M, 8 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Moderately away, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed nothing in straight.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced in 3rd, 1 to 2 lengths back, 3 wide turning in, showed good response early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Bumped on jumping, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground to turn, angled out 400M, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M.
Bumped start, positioned 2 wide, 3 to 4 lengths back, similar position on turn, closed off well to take a place, always held.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight without threatening.
Jumped well from gate 1, took the lead easily, led by 3/4L, peaked and headed 450M, weakened early in straight, eased final furlong. (Roarer.)

Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, 7 to 8 lengths back, commenced move after passing 600M, very wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Moderately away, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, took the lead 450M, peaked and headed 150M, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped on jumping, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, hard ridden after turning in, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.

Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 9 lengths back, commenced move 700M, 2 to 3 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
Jumped with them, unable to slot in, trapped 3 wide with no cover, a length or so back, a bit closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out with rest, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide from 650M, commenced move after passing 400M, finished off very strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Away well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began fairly, raced 2 wide towards rear, commenced move after passing 750M, positioned 3 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back on turn, wider into straight, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Pushed to keep up in midfield, 2-3 wide, dashed well 250M.
Midfield, along the fence, unleashed strong finishing efforts 300M.
Pushed to take rail and lead, hung on until 150M overhauled.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, never competitive.
Eased at start, took rail, raced keenly, lack room 4-2, dashed strongly when clear.
Eased to obtain box seat, weakened 200M.
Midfield, 2 wide, emptied 300M.
Pressed forward, 2 wide, held ground in straight.
Eased at start, took cover at back, no dash.
Midfield, trapped 3 wide, pressed forward to sit outside the leader, weakened 100M.
At back, 2-3 wide, dashed well 200M.
Eased back, never a factor.
At rear, 2 wide, swung widest on Straightening, made some ground in the Straight only.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, made ground but lay in under pressure, closed off strongly to the line and scored by 3/4L.
Sent forward and took lead, weakened in the last 50M.
Raced in worse than midfield, 2 wide, pretty one paced.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, made ground steadily to line.
Raced prominently, 2 wide, kept on going for 3rd.
Raced behind the lead, along the rail, kept on going but just headed in the last 25M.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, lost ground in the Straight (Bled 1st time)
Raced in midfield, along the rail, was one paced. (See incident report)
At rear, along the rail, became unbalanced at 950M, made minor ground in the Straight.
Sent forward, along the rail after 600M, ran on well to the line.
At rear, along the rail, did not improve in the straight.

Raced prominently early before being crossed and racing 1,1 from the 1250m. Continued just behind the leading trio approaching the corner, battled away steadily in run to line before holding well beaten third.

Raced two pairs back on the rail for the majority. Moved away from the rail near the 400m mark when just under 3L from lead before weakening a few lengths in the straight & never proving a genuine threat.

Hampered & forced very wide when navigating the first bend before working hard to then improve to race at the leaders quarters from the 1100m. Moved up to share lead at 450m before weakening quickly in final 250m.

Raced prominently after start before being used up to improve to lead & then crossing to rail passing 1100m. Was joined in the lead at the 450m before weakening very badly in the straight to be long second last.
Raced in midfield away from rail throughout. Moved up strongly approaching corner, sprinted to lead approaching 200m mark before drawing away to win very easily.
Held narrow lead early before being headed & racing on leaders back from the 1100m. Came under heavy pressure before straightening & weakened out badly in the straight to be beaten 14L. Poor.

Raced in midfield before moving three wide without cover near half-way & improving to third position approaching the 600m. Assumed narrow lead on straightening before being passed by winner at 225m. Battled on ok to hold 4th.

Slightly slow to begin & raced towards the rear throughout. Shared last place when 4.5L from the lead on straightening before passing a few tiring rivals when running onto well beaten midfield finish.

Began awkwardly before being taken back to last. Continued at the tail, moved very wide when continuing rearward at 450m, only 4L behind on straightening before pulling up quickly in final 150m & finishing a distant last.
Steadied after start & taken back to race third last away from rail. Pushed along near the 400m when 3.5L form the lead before making steady late ground out wide to steal well beaten second on line.

Drifted back after start & raced worse than midfield along rail. Relegated to third last when steadying near 700m, shared last place on straightening before passing a few tiring rivals when running on fairly to midfield late.

Had a soft run in midfield along the rail throughout. Lost position when other horses improved after the 600m mark, stayed close to the inside when straightening near the rear before weakening poorly to be beaten over 11L.
Began well from gate 1, raced prominently on the inside, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Quickly into stride, sent forward to take the lead, 2 wide, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well but unable to hold off the first two final 50M.
Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, angled out 350M, finished off strongly to score.
Moderately away, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, finished off well to make frame, not quite able to challenge.
Jumped well, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, same position on turn, angled out 350M, finished off strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide at rear, 5 lengths or back, same margin back on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 200M, made some headway thereafter.
Bumped start, raced 3 wide better than midfield, no cover throughout, wider into straight, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Stumbled soon after start and bumped, raced at rear on the inside, 6 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide towards rear, commenced move after passing 500M, very wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed no response early in straight, weakened and eased final furlong.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back, a bit closer on turn, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Forward to lead, on rail, headed approaching 100M, continued one paced to the line.
Taken back, at rear and stayed 2 wide, swung widest, made ground but wasn't enough to feature in minor placings.
Stumbled at start, settled in behind midfield and on rail, ran on evenly in the straight.
Taken back, at tail and on rail, didn't threaten.
Slotted in to race in midfield, 2 wide, bumped at turn exit, kept going but winner stayed on.
Bumped start, settled in box-seat eventually, stayed on until weakened passing 150M.
Raced just in front of midfield, on rail, dashed home nicely from 150M out, won by a neck.
Rolled forward, sat one-out one-back, made no impression after crowded at 300M.
Slow to jump, in worse than midfield, 2 wide, no dash despite awkward to heels at 200M.
Rolled forward, box-seat until 1100M, out-side lead thereafter, run ended approaching 200M. (See Incident Report)

Moderate start, settled in midfield over 3L back in 6th on the rail, angled out for a clear run passing the 400 metres, responded well inside final 200 metres to take command over 50 metres out. (Blood in trachea)
Soon dropped well behind despite niggling along, saved ground turning for home, made no impression on the rail.
Dropped steadily to worse than midfield on the rail, dropped slightly further back when pace quickened past the 800 metres, commenced move under pressure approaching home straight, nearest at finish.

Lacked early pace and drifted over 2L back in 5th 3-wide into back straight, made swift headway past 900 metres to join the leaders, disputed lead 2-wide rounding home bend, unable to quicken under pressure in straight.
Pressed forward from a wide gate before settling one back into back straight, faded steadily under pressure inside final 400 metres.
Began fairly from a wide gate, travelling keenly when steadied past the 900 metres, went the widest turning into home straight, ran home one-paced down the centre of the track.
Ridden to lead, quickened up the pace to maintain narrow advantage when challenged from the 700 metres, went over 1L clear early in straight and flattered, swamped inside final 50 metres.

Ridden along before settling 2L back, drifted slightly further back to 3L 5th when pace quickened past the 700 metres, renewed effort 4-wide into home straight, one-paced when hampered 170 metres out.
Blew the start losing considerable ground, never a factor.
Crowded at start dropping to last few, saved ground on the inside turning for home, ran home one-paced.
Broke well but soon taken 2L back on the rail, left flat-footed in the quick pace around the bend, saved ground turning in, kept on without quickening in the run to the line.
Crossed to the fence 1300M, close up behind leaders always, tried hard and fought on steadily in the straight, not pace of winner final 100M, edged out to 3rd last stride.
Settled down midfield off the inside, came under pressure 450M, gave limited response on straightening, no threat 150M from home.

Sat behind midfield, held up rounding home turn and early straight before quickening up final 150M to be nearest at the line. (Jockey suspended for 6 days for failing to ride his mount out to the satisfaction of the Stewards)
From wide draw caught wide no cover until reaching to race outside leader 800M, came under pressure home turn, soon gave ground on straightening.
Strode forward to chase leaders along the 2-path, had every chance turning in, run ended 150M from home. (Jockey reminded to ride his mount out all the way to the end of the race.)
Held up towards the rear until 700M then moved up along the 3-path to be chasing leaders, found no extra passing 250M, weakened towards the line.
Began well, ended up in the lead, pressed by rival 800M, fought on early straight, headed near 100M then faded towards the line
Shifted across behind runners in early stages, raced as the back-marker until 700M then moved up to midfield, picked up strongly from 300M. led 100M out, drew clear at the line.
Raced in mid-division early and middle stages, got shuffled back home turn, ran on well passing 300M to claim 2nd close home without troubling the winner.
Began awkwardly, ended up near the rear 7Ls off the pace, last turning home, stayed on fairly final 300M. Never dangerous.
Chased the early pace before dropping back to settle ahead of midfield, put in a mild bid turning home, comfortably held by leaders over final 200M.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 350M, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Away well, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, same position on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place, not able to challenge.
Began well from a wide draw, raced prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, kept on well in straight to take 2nd.
Made contact at start, positioned 1 out 1 back, there to turn, angled out 350M, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Out in line, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off strongly to score.
Jumped well from the widest draw, raced 3 wide with no cover, a length or so back, similar position on turn, weakened gradually in straight when hard run took effect.
Crowded on jumping, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, angled out 350M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Taken back from gate 10, raced 2 wide towards rear, commenced move 400M, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Reared start and bumped, raced at tail, 10 lengths back, moved closer after passing 600M, very wide turning in, showed limited response in straight.
Bumped start and unbalanced, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L on turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first few final 50M.
Reared start and bumped, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Away with them, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out 400M, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Began fairly, raced in midfield, 2 away from the stands' rail, hard ridden after passing 400M, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, showed very good speed, took the lead easily, led by a length, ridden from 300M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Commenced well from gate 2, sent forward to race in 2nd, a length or so back, hard ridden 400M, kept on evenly to the line.
Began very awkwardly and bumped, showed no early speed, raced at tail, still 8 lengths behind the leader at 400M, finished off strongly to be nearest on line, just missed frame.
Bumped start, raced towards rear of midfield in the middle of the track, peaked 400M, weakened thereafter.
Jumped well from gate 1, tracked leaders, hard ridden 350M, peaked 150M, weakened gradually thereafter. (Roarer.)
Away well, raced towards rear on the stands' side, 5 lengths back at 400M, closed off well to take a place without threatening.
Bumped start, raced in midfield, 4 lengths behind the leader in the middle stages, hard ridden 400M, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Bumped start, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the stands' side, ridden 400M, only showed limited response, ran on evenly to the line.
Clean jump, raced in midfield, nearer to the middle track, peaked and dropped towards rear 450M, eased final 200M.
Began well, positioned a length behind the leader on the stands' side, hard ridden 400M, peaked on run 200M, weakened thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the stands' rail, ridden 400M, showed no response, weakened final furlong.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, soon dropped off 350M, rider concerned horse's actions after racing (in 2 consecutive races). Post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Pushed to take rail and lead, out of fuel 250M.
Very slow away, at back along the fence, lack room in straight, dashed strongly when clear.
Eased back, 2 wide, dashed well 200M.
Eased to sit in midfield, trapped 3 wide, held ground for 3rd.
Eased at start, took cover at rear, 2-4 wide, dashed well 200M.
Slow away, trapped 3 wide at back, moved forward 900M, drifted away 300M to score.
Eased to sit just off the leaders, 3 wide, dashed well 200M.
At rear, made ground and battled on to the line for 2nd.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, in the early part of the Straight was held up for clear running, made minor ground in the last 50M.
Rolled forward, 2 wide after 850M, weakened after passing 150M. (Blood in trachea)
Raced behind the lead, 2 wide, passing 400M raced tight, showed strong dash in the last 100M.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, kept on going and scored by a head.
Rolled forward and took lead after passing 850M, showed no turn on foot.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, made some ground but one paced after passing the 100M.
Sent forward, wide no cover, found nothing after passing the 200M. (See incident report)
Had nice run 1,1 for the majority. Was only about 2L form the lead on straightening before emptying mid-straight & weakening quickly in last furlong.
Began only fairly before making up some ground to race midfield between runners. Finished off fairly in the straight to hold non-threatening 4th.

Shifted behind runners from wide gate & settled near the rear. Entered last section 5.5L behind when continuing rearward before passing a few tiring rivals when running onto midfield but making up no relative headway.
Had a nice run on leaders back for the majority. Was just over 2L from the lead on straightening before emptying mid-straight & weakening quickly in last furlong.

Was trapped racing three wide without cover in midfield throughout. Moved slightly closer to lead approaching corner, entered last section only 1L behind before finishing well to hold second behind easy winner.

Crowded after start, drifting back to second last before making some ground along rail to worse than midfield. Shifted away from rail near 400m when 5L behind before passing a few rivals when running onto midfield.

Raced just worse than midfield three wide with cover in early stages before being forced 4 wide from the 750m. Continued wide around final bend, straightened 3.5L from the lead before finishing off only fairly to midfield.

Raced in midfield away from the rail before moving into three wide line with cover from the 800m. Entered last section only 2.5L behind before finishing off steadily down the outside to move to third in final 125m.

Racing worse than midfield before becoming keen when awkwardly placed near the 1000m mark. Entered last section 4.5L from the lead, was held up at various stages mid-straight before closing off ok last 150m.

Strode forward before assuming lead & eventually coming across to the rail when setting very slow early/mid sections. Raced clear in the straight & continued all the way to the line to win very easily.
Began ok but was restrained & drifted back for first 400m before racing third last, 3 wide with cover. Had only two runners behind on cornering before weakening in straight to be last. Bled.

Steadied from wide gate & drifted back to race at the tail. Continued last on cornering, shifted to be the widest runner when 7L behind before failing to make any real impact in straight & being well beaten.
Had soft run in midfield along the rail throughout. Ridden along on cornering when 3.5L from the lead before weakening out in the straight to be beaten 6L.

Pushed forward, raced third away from rail before moving closer to be at leaders flanks by the 650m. Hung outwards on cornering, entered last section under 1L from the lead before weakening in final furlong.
Lifted front feet on jumping and away tardily, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, one-paced in straight.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 5 lengths behind the leader on rail, angled out 550M, made good progress in straight to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, 4 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, kept on evenly early in straight, no clear run final 50M.
Shifted out at start and bumped, took the early lead, headed near 850M, 2nd on turn, showed limited response in straight, blocked final 50M.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide at rear, 6 to 7 lengths back on turn, made some progress early in straight, blocked final 100M.
Out in line, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, ran on evenly in straight, short of room final 50M. (Lost left hind plate at the entrance to the straight.)
Bumped start, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead near 850M, led by 3 lengths turning in, kicked clear early in straight, weakened 100M, headed 50M.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide better than midfield, wider from 500M, closed off well to take a place.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths or so back, carried wider after passing 550M, finished off very strongly to take 2nd.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score by a neck.
Bumped start, settled in midfield, 2 wide, fought on and hit the front 50M out and won by a neck.
Niggled early and settled to race prominently, on rail, continued on well to take 3rd.
Jumped okay, then eased to be at tail, 2 wide, swung wide into the straight, not a factor.
Settled towards the rear, 2 wide, saved ground steadily and hit the line well.
Worked forward steadily into the lead, stayed 2 wide, no extra from near 200M.
Taken back, shifted to rail before finally set-tled in behind midfield, kicked on in the straight until emptied at 150M.
Bumped start, then rubbed to be in front of midfield, 2 wide, weakened before final 100M.
Eased back, raced at the rear and on rail, showed dashes and made ground in the run home.
Travelled in worse than midfield, 2 wide, ran on without threatening.
Crowded at start, sat towards the rear, wide and no cover, saved ground and ran on fairly.
Raced slightly behind midfield, 2 wide, kept fighting to the line to finish 2nd.
Rolled forward, shared lead before coming back to sit 2nd, remained one off, one paced until emptied late.
Travelled in midfield, along the rail, slightly held at 200M, ran on fairly nonetheless.

Settled some 7L back in 6th on the rail, gained slightly closer rounding home bend, shifted 5-wide for a clear run approaching home straight, tight between runners early in straight, ran on well without threatening.
Settled some 6L back in 5th, gained closer to the pace rounding home bend and given reminders 4-wide on straightening, tight between runners 300 metres out, fought on steadily without threatening.
Tracked about 1L behind pacemaker, gained slightly closer rounding home bend, came to hit the front upon straightening, held on well to the line.
Began fairly, settled within 4L of pace in 4th, gained closer rounding home bend to be just behind the leaders turning in, fought on steadily without threatening.
Sluggish at start settling well behind, carried widest and last into straight, fought on steadily without quickening.
Made running setting a sedate pace in back straight, headed by eventual winner after home turn, kept on before swamped for a placing inside final 200 metres. (Blood in trachea)
Settled within 2L of pace in 3rd, folded up quickly inside final 450 metres.
From wide draw ridden at the rear, swung wide into straight, found disappointingly little on straightening, never involved. (Unacceptable Performance / Jockey : did not handle the top weight today.)
Soon led, pressed by rival from 1000M, kept on steadily turning in, headed by winner near 300M, stayed in contention for minor placings until no extra late stages.
Dropped back to the rear, saved ground on inside, ran on only fairly final 400M, never troubled leaders.
Settled 3-wide in mid-division, kept on same pace turning home, no extra 200M.
Unable to slot in from draw 10, chased leaders in a 3 wide spot without cover, battled on early straight, not pace of pursuing rivals over final 200M.
From wide draw steadied early stages for cover, held up behind mid-division, closed off strongly passing 300M, narrowly beaten.
From draw 1 raced handily behind leaders, quickened well up the inside to lead 300M out, kept to task late under top weight, holding off late challenge of 2nd and 3rd.
Crowded for room on jumping, settled ahead of midfield, held up for clear running early straight, battled on well over final 300M, got up for 4th near line.
Guided to a 3-wide spot in midfield with cover, driven along 500M, kept on well final 200M to be pressing winner late stages, just held.
In midfield early then restrained to race towards the rear before home turn, responded well on straightening, ran on to be nearest at the finish.
Chased leaders, not quickened on straightening, faded away mid-straight.
Soon taken across to the fence, sat in midfield, gave limited response turning in, never a threat to leaders.
From wide draw steadied early stages for cover, not clear run 400M, did best work late final 200M, nearest finish.
Away with them, moved up gradually to join leader 1000M, found less than expected when driven out 350M, outpaced over final 200M.
Jumped with them, positioned 2 wide, 3 lengths or so back, angled out 500M, made good progress early in straight, took the lead 200M, peaked and headed 125M, ran on evenly to take 2nd.
Began awkwardly and made contact, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 600M, closer turning in, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide, 4 lengths back, angled out after passing 550M, hard ridden 350M, showed very good response, hit the front 125M, kept on strongly to the line.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 8 lengths back, closer on turn, very wide into straight, finished off evenly. (Jockey dropped whip near 250M.)
Away well, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, 3 wide on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Mucus.)
Made contact at start, raced at rear on the inside, 8 lengths or so back, moved closer along the rail on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Crowded on jumping, raced towards rear on the outside, 7 lengths back, commenced move 550M, very wide turning in, finished off evenly.
Shifted out at start and made contact, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened 200M, eased final 100M.
Hampered start, raced behind midfield on the inside, 5 lengths back, closer on turn, finished off evenly.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Jumped well, raced 3 wide better than midfield, moved closer after entering the back straight, 2 wide from 1050M, 2nd on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Made contact at start, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, no clear run early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Away well, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began fairly, raced 2 wide, 6 lengths back, closer on turn, angled out early in straight, unable to obtain clear running until 200M, closed off well to take a place.
Began only fairly, sat right behind the leader on rail, easy run to turn, took the lead early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, ran on evenly to the line. (Rider dropped whip near 100M.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, made good progress early in straight, not clear run and forced to shift out near 200M, ran on well to the line, finished 2nd.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail early, moved closer along the rail after passing 1100M, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced prominently, 2 wide, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide, 4 lengths back, same margin back on turn, angled out 500M, finished off evenly.
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, peaked and headed early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Jumped with them, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Taken back form gate 10, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, only showed limited response in straight, never dangerous.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 3 wide with cover slightly behind midfield, there to turn, made good progress in straight to make frame, nearest on line.
Out with rest, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced 3 wide better than midfield, no cover throughout, ridden 350M, showed very good response, hit the front 150M, kept on well to score with plenty gas in tank.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, slightly improved along the rail on turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off well without threatening.
Moderately away, tracked leaders, 2 wide, there to turn, short of room early in straight, showed limited response thereafter.
Bumped start, raced at rear on the outside, very wide into straight, no clear running until 200M, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slightly slow out, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame.
Began well from gate 1, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, angled out 400M, closed off well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Away well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, travelled comfortably to turn, hit the front 200M, kept on strongly to the line.
Average to begin, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Shifted out at start and bumped, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L on turn, peaked and headed 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths back on turn, angled out 350M, showed limited response in straight, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, positioned 1 out 1 back, same position on turn, carried wider 400M, kept on evenly in straight to take a place.
Away well, taken back to race 2 wide towards rear, 5 lengths back on turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
Trapped wide in midfield early, pressed forward to sit outside the leader, weakened 200M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, ran on ok.
At rear, 2 wide, no progress.
Hard ridden forward to take rail and lead, overhauled 200M, ran on for 2nd.
Behind midfield, 2-4 wide, emptied 300M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
At rear, trapped 3 wide throughout, progressed steadily 250M.
Eased to sit in midfield along the fence, weakened 200M, heart irregularity noted after racing.
Pushed early, midfield, 2-3 wide, ran on fairly.
Box seat, kicked away 200M to score.
Eased at start, took cover at rear, made steady ground 250M.
Pushed early, in front of midfield, 2-3 wide, just held ground.
At back on the fence, progressed steadily 300M.
At rear, along the rail, never a factor.
Sent forward and took lead, wakened after passing 150M.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, swung wide but closed off strongly in the last 200M for 2nd.
Raced in worse than midfield, 2 wide, was inconvenienced near 150M but still closed off well in the Straight.
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail, lay in under pressure near 150M, one paced thereafter.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, pretty one paced.
At rear, 2 wide, showed strong dash in the 50M.
At rear, did not improve in the straight.
Raced behind the lead, along the rail, was bumped and checked near 250M, ran on well to the line for 4th.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, dropped off in the straight after 100M.
Raced in front of midfield, along the rail, bumped a runner and became unbalanced at the 300M but kept on going nicely to score by 2L.
Sent forward and raced next to the leader, weakened in the last 50M.
Nice run 1,1 for the majority. Closed well in the straight & moved to third in late stages.
Began awkwardly & consequently raced rearward. Well back throughout & failed to challenge in straight. Last.

Raced a touch wide early when prominent before improving to race at leaders quarters from the 1100m. Continued close to the lead most of the way until over-run in last 100m, not beaten far in midfield.
Shifted behind runners after start & raced rearward. Continued near the tail throughout & never threatened.
No early speed before racing just worse than midfield on the rail throughout. Moved away from the inside on straightening before closing strongly between runners to charge to lead in final stages.
Raced in midfield on the rail. Moved away from the inside on cornering, held up for room between runners near 200m mark before finishing only moderately in late stages. See report.
Lovely run on leaders back throughout. Stayed close to the inside & was not far from the lead all the way to the line.
Pushed forward to lead. Held lead until swamped at the 100m mark, wasn't beaten far on the line.
Steadied & raced at the tail throughout. Continued at the rear on bend, finished off only evenly in the straight & wasn't beaten far without passing many rivals in the last section.
Raced in midfield away from rail. Eased wider around bend before closing strongly down the outside in the concluding stages to charge to fast finishing second late.
Taken back from gate 10, raced at tail, 10 lengths or so back, still 8 to 9 lengths back on turn, made very good progress in straight to take a place, nearest on line.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, weakened early in straight, eased final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move 450M, very wide turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well in straight to hold off the challenger late.
Slowly away, raced behind midfield, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 2 wide better than midfield, commenced move 400M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Jumped well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, 2 lengths back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 250M.
Taken back to race 2 wide at rear, 8 lengths back, still 7 lengths back turning in, finished off very strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Clean jump, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, there to turn, kept on well in straight to make frame without threatening.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Bumped start, ridden forward before eased to find cover, settled behind midfield 2 wide, no dash in straight.
Urged along, settled to race outside lead after crossed at 900M, kept chasing and hit front in closing stages, won by a neck.
Hard ridden forward, took rail and led, stayed on but ran down by winner in the closing stages.
Bumped start then eased, settled at rear 2 wide, ran on without taking ground off others.
Shifted to rail and raced in midfield, shifted to centre track in straight, continued one paced.
Travelled in front of midfield, on rail, ran on fairly to the line to take 3rd.
Stumbled on jumping, recovered to take one-out one-back, continued on to the line one paced.
Went amiss near 1100M and disloged rider.
Slotted in to be in midfield, 2 wide, continued on evenly to the line.
Slow to jump then badly hampered 1100M, at rear throughout, never a factor.
Sent forward, settled in box-seat, kept on until found no extra for final 100M.
Bumped start and taken back, then hampered 1100M, raced keenly in worse than midfield along the rail, lost ground in straight.
Chased the leader, came under pressure approaching home turn, faded steadily in straight.
Settled well back from a wide gate, commenced move over 400 metres out and wide into straight, finished off the race well under pressure down the centre of the track.
Ridden along wide with cover in midfield, tight and lost ground 800 metres out, widest of all into home straight, soon faded.
Began fairly, settled towards the rear in 9th on the rail, kept on same pace without threatening in home straight.
Settled just worse than midfield in 8th, 3-wide rounding home bend and wider into straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
Quickly improved to within 3L of pace in 6th on the rail, steadied and lost position over 600 metres out, saved ground on the rail turning in, ran on well under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Settled within 3L of pace in 5th, slightly further back when pace quickened around home bend, hampered and lost position 100 metres out, tight run to the line.
Settled in last few from a wide gate, saved ground turning for home, fought on under pressure on the rail, ran out of room inside final 100 metres.
Began well from the one draw, settled some 2L off the pace on the rail, drifted over 3L back when pace quickened rounding home bend, kept on without quickening under pressure in straight.
Ridden to lead from a wide gate, obtained rails run passing the 800 metres, 2L clear into straight, just held off runners-up's late challenge.
Began well from gate 6, travelled prominently very wide without cover to straight, drifted in away from whip over 250 metre out, finished well late and just failed to get up on line.
Settled well behind from the widest gate, never seen with a chance.
Settled in 5th spot, never far off leaders in a slowly run race, crowded for room top of straight, fought hard final 200M trying to wrestle the lead from winner, just held.
Began awkwardly, moved up to track leader in a slowly run race, gained narrow lead turning home, failed to hold off first 2 inside 200M, no extra late and dropped to 5th.
Switched off to race at the rear, long way behind leader in a slow run race, failed to finish off when driven passing 400M. (Jockey : not suited by the moderate tempo.)
Dropped back to last entering first turn, 9-10Ls behind leader in a slow run race, gave limited response on straightening, never in the picture.
Chased leaders 2-wide in a slowly run race, travelled well into straight, quickened to lead inside 200M, was strongly challenged by runner up late but held on gamely.
Settled down midfield 4Ls off the pace, moved closer home turn, wide into straight, kept on steadily final 300M but not pace to challenge first 2.
Slow to begin, shifted across behind runners to race towards the rear, driven near 400M, finished off well to claim 3rd near line but not able to trouble first 2.
Crowded for room on jumping then taken across behind runners, reserved towards the rear in a slow run race, swung widest home, closed off well but left with too much to do.
Restrained to race behind mid-division 6Ls off the slow pace, switched wide near 450M, kept on without threatening in the run home, always held by leaders.
Chased leaders in a slowly run race, held up briefly passing 300M, lacked the needed response when clear, held ground to the line.
From wide draw positively ridden to find the lead, led slowly throughout the middle stages, soon headed turning home, weakened over final 200M.
Held up behind midfield, 6Ls behind leader in a slow run race, responded mildly turning for home, not reached leaders.
Jumped with them, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, same position on turn, closed off well to take 2nd.
Commenced well, sat right behind the leader on rail, same position on turn, kept on well early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Average to begin, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began fairly from a wide draw, unable to slot in, trapped 4 wide with no cover, 2 lengths or so back, no cover throughout, stumbled turning in, eased early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began fairly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 to 4 lengths back on turn, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began smartly from gate 1, showed good speed to take the lead, led by a length, challenged by rival turning in, peaked and headed near 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Out with rest, positioned 3 wide with no cover, 1-1/2L back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening.
Away well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, challenged the leader turning in, hit the front after passing 200M, ran on well to the line, won comfortably.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, there to turn, failed to close off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame left front leg next day.)
Inconvenienced at start, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, very wide into straight, made minor progress in the run home.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 9 lengths back, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Began well, positioned 3 wide, 3 lengths or so back, 2 wide from 850M, wider turning in, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just narrowly beaten.
Crowded start, sat right behind the leader on rail, same position on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, kept on well until approaching 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Jumped well, raced prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, inconvenienced near 350M, weakened final furlong.
Quickly away, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, 3 wide from 500M, hit the front 200M, kept on well to hold off the challengers late.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 50M.
Away well, raced 2 wide in midfield early, found rail 850M, angled out 500M, made some progress in straight.
Began well, positioned 2 wide slightly behind midfield, difficult to settle in the early stages, 3 to 4 lengths back on turn, finished off strongly to take a place, nearest on line.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced 2 wide at rear, still well back on turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the inside, 5 to 6 lengths back, saved ground throughout, made some progress in straight.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced in midfield on the outside, inconvenienced near 900M, no cover on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Bumped start, raced 3 wide with cover at rear, difficult to settle early, hampered 950M, 8 lengths back on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back, very wide into straight, made minor progress in the run home.
Began awkwardly, raced towards rear on the inside, 7 lengths back, 2 wide from 650M, same margin back turning in, made no progress in straight.
Hard ridden early but not muster, at back along the fence, made steady ground 300M.
Eased to sit in midfield along the fence, weakened 200M.
Never a factor.
Hard ridden early, trapped 3 wide in front of midfield, held ground in straight.
Settled 1 out 1 back, drifted away 200M to score with ease.
Hard ridden early, behind midfield, 2-4 wide, progressed steadily 300M.
Took rail and lead easily, raced very keen, dropped off quickly 200M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Hard ridden early, in front of midfield, 2 wide, held ground, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings, lame right fore day after racing.
Slow away, at rear, on the rails, lack turn of foot.
Eased back, throughout the race travelled very wide and without cover, ran on ok.
Pushed to obtain box seat, emptied 300M.
Midfield, 2 wide, made minor ground 200M.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, weakened after passing the 200M.
At rear, 2 wide, did not improve in the Straight.
Raced prominently, 2 wide after 800M, battled on to the line and just scored by a short head.
Raced in midfield initially, improved to race outside the lead after 800M, wide no cover, one paced after passing 100M.
Raced in behind midfield, wide no cover after 800M, made ground steadily and showed strong dash in the last 100M and scored for 2nd.
At rear, 2 wide, made minor ground after passing the 200M.
Sent forward, along the rail, stayed on but just weakened in the last 50M.
Raced prominently and 2 wide, dropped off in the Straight and finished last. (Lame left fore)
Settled behind midfield, wide but with cover after 800M, made minor ground in the Straight.
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail, pretty one paced.
Raced in front of midfield, along the rail, ran on fairly to the line.
At rear, along the rail, no progress.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, lay in throughout the straight.

Bumped at start before drifting back to race third last when three wide with cover. Shifted wider approaching the 500m mark, was second widest on cornering when over 4L behind before weakening poorly to be beaten over 8L.

Hampered at start before being left three wide without cover in midfield throughout. Forced 4 wide passing 500m, entered last section only 2L from lead before emptying at 300m & weakening out thereafter. (Blood in trachea).

Slow to begin before being shifted back to race at the tail. Continued rearward, 4.5L form the lead entering last section before racing tight between runners at the 200m before failing to finish off thereafter.

Crowded after start & drifted back to race worse than midfield between runners. Relegated to last on cornering when over 5L from lead, held up near the 350m before shifting wider & closing off well to midfield from the back.

Raced prominently, improved to lead passing the 1100m before being headed near the 900m & racing second thereafter. Continued second entering last section, battled on well to hold third behind easy winner.

Bumped at start before obtaining position in midfield between runners. Ridden along near 500m before shifting wider approaching bend. Straightened 4L behind before racing tight mid-straight & weakening sharply last furlong.

Didn't begin fast & drifted back to third last on rail. Stayed close to the inside on straightening when about 4L behind before making some late headway along the rail when passing a few when finishing midfield.
Raced wide early before improving position to take the lead near the 900m. Raced over a length clear entering the last section before pulling away in the straight to win very easily.

Held the early lead before being steadied & racing very keenly to be outside leader before steadying further & racing third away from the rail from the 900m. Was beaten soon after straightening & weakened badly in late stages.

Raced 1,1 early before a pair further back in midfield from 900m. Raced tight on straightening when attempting to shift out when 3.5L from lead. Raced tight & bumped when limited room near 200m before weakening thereafter.

Slow 1L at start before improving along the rail to race in midfield. Moved away from the rail at the 500m mark before closing off well in final stages to move to well held second inside the final 50m.

Shifted across to midfield but was left racing three wide with cover throughout. Eased 4 and 5 wide passing 500m mark, straightened about 3L behind & finished off evenly to midfield to be about same margin behind on line.

Steadied from wide gate & drifted back to race last. Shifted to be very wide passing the 500m mark, straightened 4.5L behind before making good late ground down the outside to be 4th. Rider questioned, see report.
Had a nice run along the rail just behind the leading pair throughout. Only 3L form the lead entering the final section before weakening very badly to be long last.
Stood flat-footed at start, refused to race.
Away with them, positioned 2 wide slightly better than midfield, moved closer after passing 700M, 3 wide turning in, took the lead 200M, peaked and headed 150M, ran on evenly to take 2nd.
Crowded on jumping, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider turning in, finished off evenly.
Taken back from gate 10, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Away well, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, moved a bit closer in the middle stages, took the lead 300M, peaked and headed 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began well, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear running in straight.
Clean jump, positioned on rail in midfield, 2 wide from 600M, kept on well early in straight, no clear run from 200M to 50M, made minor progress thereafter.
Taken back to race at rear on the inside, 2 wide turning in, one-paced in the run home.
Moderately away from the widest gate, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rivals turning in, peaked and headed 300M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with cover at rear, a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Fast into stride, raced in midfield on the outside, moved closer on turn, pressed leaders from 600M, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened thereafter.
Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, no clear run inside final furlong.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, moved closer on turn, carried wider from 600M, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began awkwardly, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move after passing 600M, showed very good response in straight, hit the front approaching 150M, kept on very well to the line.
Eased back, raced at the tail, 3 wide with cover and went wider at 600M, continued on well to take 3rd.
Settled in midfield, wide and no cover, ran on spiritedly but winner was better, finished 1-1/2L behind.
Went amiss near 650M.
Rolled forward, shared lead on rail, kept on until gradually weakened passing 100M.
Awkward start, raced in front of midfield 2 wide, dashed home strongly from 250M out, won by 1-1/2L.
Bumped start, sat in behind midfield, wide and no cover, didn't have turn of foot.
Jumped only fairly, loose one-off until taken wider at 600M, made ground and ran on fairly.
Stumbled on jumping, recovered to be on-pace, 2 wide, run ended passing 300M.
Took back, raced towards the rear, 2 wide, made no ground.
Settled in midfield, 2 wide, did not threaten.
Urged along then shifted across to rail and sat towards the rear, hampered at 600M, found nothing in the straight.
