Sent forward, shared lead 2 wide, kept kicking until found no more for final 100M.
Began well, soon took up running on the rail, gained 1L clear briefly at about the 1200 metres, unable to sustain effort and swamped inside final 250 metres.
Stumbled at start but soon came to join the leaders, taken 2L back to 3rd 1200 metres out, drifted out early in straight but fought on dourly to just get up on line.
Broke well but soon drifted back to last few, went very wide into home straight, found nothing under pressure.
Pressed forward from the widest gate to be up with the leaders, obtained 2-wide position just off the pace passing the 1200 metres, faded under pressure inside final 200 metres.
Settled within 4L of pace in 4th, 4-wide turning for home, ran on to hold every chance inside the 200 metres but unable to sustain effort 100 metres out.
Crowded at start, gradually recovered to worse than midfield in 7th on the rail, saved ground on the inside turning for home, did not have the best of runs in final 200 metres.
Settled just over 4L back in 5th on the rail, fought on steadily under pressure in straight without threatening.

Settled in rear of midfield just over 5L off the pace, 5-wide into home straight, shaken up upon straightening, quickened under pressure to hit the front over 100 metres out only to be pipped close to home.

Gradually taken back from a wide gate, trailed the field from the 1500 metres, came under pressure rounding home bend and went the widest from the 500 metres, found nothing in straight. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Settled well behind on the rail, snuck up on the rail turning for home, ran on under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Always in touch behind leaders in a steadily run race, travelled smoothly into straight, ridden out 350M, hit the line well and only just missed in a 3-way photo.
Chased leaders in a race run at moderate tempo, had every chance turning in, battled on to 100M then faded.
From wide draw shifted across behind runners, settled towards the rear 5Ls away, stayed on without troubling leaders over final 400M
Raced keenly, caught 3-wide no cover from 1200M, kept on same pace passing 400M, never troubled leaders.
Steadied to obtain cover early stages, raced at the rear 7Ls off the pace, made limited progress on straightening. Never dangerous. (Lame next day.)
Switched off to race at the rear, driven along 550M but failed to respond. Never involved.
Jumped on terms, moved up to track leader in a steadily run race, driven out 500M trying hard to stay in contention, outpaced by leaders final 150M.
Reserved behind midfield, 5Ls to make up turning in, held up briefly top of straight then closed off well to be nearest finish.
From wide draw steadied early stages to obtain cover in a rearward position, swung widest from 500M, ran on mildly, never looked like reaching leaders.
Held up in mid-division along the fence, switched out nearing 500M, took time to gather, did best work final 250M, got up to beat 2nd and 3rd final stride.
Settled down 3-wide behind midfield, wide into straight, couldn't go on passing 400M.
Restrained in mid-division, came under pressure 500M, didn't find much turning home, soon outpaced by rivals.
Led from 1200M, had uncontested lead, set steady pace to straight, fought on well under pressure, caught by first 2 last stride.
Began smartly from gate 13, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably on turn, kept on very well in straight, just unable to hold off the winner late.
Slightly hampered at start, raced 2 wide towards rear, 7 lengths back, angled out 500M, no daylight early in straight, peaked 200M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, 6 lengths back, a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Began well, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, same position on turn, angled out 450M, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Slightly hampered at start, raced 3 wide with cover, slightly behind midfield, carried wider 550M, kept on evenly in straight.
Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear on the inside, 8 lengths back, moved closer along the rail on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame without threatening.
Quickly away, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, there to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked on run 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider turning in, finished off evenly.

Bumped start, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, commenced move 600M, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.) (Roarer.) (Lost left front plate after the race.)

Shifted out at start and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside, crowded near 900M, saved ground on turn, angled out 500M, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 200M, checked 150M, eased thereafter.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 9 lengths back, a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, peaked early in straight, one-paced thereafter.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, moved closer along the rail on turn, finished off strongly to score.
Away well, raced better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths or so back, angled out 500M, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Out with rest, positioned 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, angled out 550M, made good progress in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Away with them, raced behind midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer in the middle stages, made very good progress in straight to take a place.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced 2 wide towards rear, there to turn, angled out 450M, one-paced in straight.
Average to begin, raced 3 wide behind midfield, wider turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Out in line, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M. (Bled.)
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, enjoyed the easy lead to turn, kicked clear early in straight, kept on well to the line and scored.
Began fairly, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, similar position on turn, shifted in 450M, made minor progress in straight.
Began well, positioned 2 wide, 3 lengths behind the leader, wider turning in, finished off evenly.
Stumbled start, positioned 2 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
Bumped start, raced at tail, 6 lengths back, slightly improved along the rail on turn, finished off very strongly to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Jumped with them, raced 4 wide towards rear, 7 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight.

Shifted in at start and bumped, trapped very wide behind midfield early, moved a bit closer after passing 900M, 3 lengths or so back in the middle stages, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
Began well, raced in midfield on the outside, 4 wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened and eased final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Blood in trachea.)
Began awkwardly from gate 12, unable to slot in, trapped very wide, 2 to 3 lengths back, no cover throughout, kept on well in straight to make frame without threatening.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, 2 wide from 650M, angled out 450M, made very good progress in straight to take 2nd.
Moderately away, raced prominently, 2 wide, bumped near 950M, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.

Jumped well, raced prominently but trapped very wide, bumped near 950M, found a 2 wide spot near 850M, 2 lengths or so back on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 150M, made minor progress thereafter.
Began smartly from gate 1, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, not enough room early in straight, cleared approaching 250M, finished off strongly to score.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide, 4 lengths back, same position on turn, unable to obtain clear running until approaching 100M, made good progress thereafter to take a place.
Bumped start, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, showed some response early in straight, peaked on run 150M, weakened gradually final 50M.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths or so back, 3 wide from 700M, very wide into straight, made some headway in the run home.
Bumped on jumping, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Began well from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, 4 to 5 lengths back, unable to obtain clear running until 150M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Began smartly from a wide draw, taken back to race at tail, 6 lengths or so back on turn, made some progress after passing 300M, no clear run approaching 50M, not ridden out late.
Eased back, 2-4 wide, progressed steadily 300M.
Eased at start, took rail at back, lack room in straight, made steady ground.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, ran on until 200M weakened.
Midfield, along the fence, blocked 4-2, made steady ground when clear.
At back, lack room 400M, progressed steadily to score.
Hard ridden to take rail and lead, out of fuel 250M.
Pressed forward, trapped 3 wide, weakened 300M.
Eased at start, took cover at rear, lack room in straight, progressed steadily.
Eased to sit in front of midfield, 2 wide, raced keenly, weakened 200M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Behind midfield, trapped 3-5 wide, made early move 600M, run ended 100M.
Never a factor, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Hard ridden early, in front of midfield, 2-3 wide, led 300M, overhauled 100M.
Pushed to obtain box seat, soon emptied 350M.
Trapped 3-4 wide behind midfield, blocked most straight, checked 200M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Raced prominently and at centre-track, continued on and finished well to score by 1-1/2L.
Raced in midfield initially, on centre-track, gave ground after passing 450M.
Sent forward and took lead, headed at the 100M and then was inconvenienced, weakened thereafter.
At rear, on centre-track, only one paced.
Raced prominently, on stand-side, weakened after passing 200M.
Ridden to be prominent, on stand-side, flattened passing 150M.
Raced in behind midfield, centre-track, eased down after passing 200M. Finished tailed out, must trial.
Raced in behind midfield, on centre-track, made minor ground only in the last 150M.
Raced in midfield initially, on stand-side, showed strong dash in the last 200M for 2nd.
At rear, along the outside rail initially, after 200M shifted to the centre-track, made some ground only thereafter.
At rear, stand-side, made ground and closed off strongly in the last 150M.
Raced in behind midfield, centre-track, made no ground throughout.
Raced in midfield, on centre-track, dropped off after passing 200M.
Raced in midfield, on centre-track, pretty one paced to the line.
Steadied & raced second last between runners. Shifted wider just prior to straightening, entered last section 4L from the lead & made no real headway, being beaten a similar margin on line.
Had a nice run on leaders back throughout. Was held up & steadied away from heels passing 400m mark before giving a few lengths in final 250m & not proving a threat.
Raced in midfield away from rail throughout. Eased three wide near the 550m mark, entered last section under 2L from the lead before giving some ground when weakening to midfield.

Steadied & drifted back race with only 3 behind. Eased wider approaching bend, dashed quickly passing 300m, looked the winner at 100m before just flattening out late. Held third, close behind & well clear of forth.
Pushed forward to lead. Headed in the lead soon after straightening before weakening poorly to be last.
Pushed forward & raced at leaders quarters. Took over the lead soon after straightening, held lead all the way until overtaken by winner inside final 50m.
Drifted back but was caught 3 wide at the rear. Improved position when continuing wide in middle stages, widest on straightening when about 3L behind before weakening in straight to be second last.

Missed the start be a couple of lengths & consequently raced last. Continued at the back, 4L from the lead entering last section before closing off well in the last furlong to be closest at the line when beaten 3.5L.

Steadied & shifted behind runners to the rail before making some ground to settle worse than midfield on the inside. Stayed close to the rail in the straight before passing a few rivals to move to well held 4th in late stages.
Had nice run in 1,1 throughout. Continued close at the 300m mark before failing to go with the first couple in final 250m. Ran well to be only 3L being in midfield first-up.
Raced in midfield on rail. Moved away from inside on straightening when under 2L from the lead, dashed between runners at 300m before making continual strong ground to steel lead inside final 50m.
Slowly away, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear running early in straight, cleared after passing 150M, showed limited response thereafter.
Began well, positioned 2 wide slightly better than midfield, angled out 500M, made some headway early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Away with them, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, 3 wide from 600M, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, angled out 500M, very wide turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
Began well from a wide draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 150M, kept on evenly to the line.
Began well, positioned on rail in midfield, angled out 500M, unable to obtain clear running early in straight, weakened and eased final 150M. (Lame left front leg next day.)
Began smartly from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, found rail 750M, led by a length turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 75M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Commenced well, sent forward to race prominently, found rail 900M, allowed rival to cross near 750M, 2 wide from 600M, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.

Made contact at start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 3 wide turning in, no clear running early in straight, cleared 300M, made good progress thereafter to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Taken back from gate 13, raced behind midfield on the outside, angled out 500M, finished off very strongly to score.
Jumped with them, raced better than midfield on the inside, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened 300M.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out after passing 500M, weakened early in straight.
Began awkwardly, raced at tail, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, commenced move approaching 500M, very wide into straight, finished off well to take 2nd.
Forward to lead, on rail, run ended at 250M.
Bumped start, then raced about midfield, wide but with cover, slightly hampered 250M, ran on fairly.
Travelled in front of midfield, wide but with cover, pressured 700M out, kicked clear from 150M, won with something in hand by 2L.
Rolled forward, sat outside lead until took cover near 1000M, rolled about in straight and gone approaching 200M.
Niggled along, prominent but wide early, improved after 1100M to sit outside lead, gradually weakened in the straight.
Took back, sat towards the rear, 2 wide, never a factor.
Eased back, raced towards the tail, 2 wide and wider at 600M, held ground only.
Bumped start, then slow to muster, sat behind midfield, 2 wide, made ground and ran on well to the line.
Took back, at tail 2 wide, 11L off along Back Straight, made no impression after straightening.
Raced in about midfield, 2 wide, some dashes but mainly one paced to the line.
Bumped start, settled in about midfield, on rail, wasn't in it.
Rolled along, took up position in box-seat, ran on to take 2nd but winner was too good.
Niggled along, front of midfield early, then worked forward slowly to be on pace, maintained wide and no cover, ran on until passing 200M.
Restrained in midfield, switched to challenge entering home straight, responded well inside the 300 metres to take command 150 meres out, won comfortably.
Soon join the leaders, took up running passing the 1100 metres, raced keenly in front rounding home bend, folded up quickly inside final 200 metres.
Very wide without cover in midfield early stages, taken back from the 1150 metres to be one from last rounding home bend, produced strong late run under pressure inside final 200 metres.
Settled well back, came under pressure approaching home straight, ran on under pressure.
Taken back to last few for rails run, gained closer to 10th over 5L back rounding home bend, fought on steadily in straight without threatening.
Settled just over 2L off the pace in 5th , awkward behind runners and drifted off the rail coming onto home bend, looked struggling under pressure approaching home turn, weakened in straight.
Ridden from towards rear passing the 1250 metres to forward of midfield in 7th about 3L off pace on the rail, saved ground turning in, folded up quickly inside final 200 metres.

Recovered steadily from moderate start to join the leaders, taken one back to joint 3rd coming onto home bend, angled out for a run entering straight, held every chance inside the 300 metres but quickly worn down 150 metres out.
Began well from a wide gate but soon taken back towards the rear, made steady progress to midfield 3-wide coming onto home bend, carried wider into straight, ran on to be nearest at finish.
Settled 3-wide without cover in forward of midfield, gained closer rounding home bend, fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Broke well but gradually taken back 4-wide without cover, became 11th some 6L off the pace 3-wide rounding home bend, improving steadily when baulked 100 metres out, fought on to the line.
Soon taken back from a wide gate, trailed the field most of the way to home straight, saved ground turning in, made steady headway under pressure along the rail until over 50 metres out.
Ridden forward to join the leaders, taken one-out-one-back coming onto home bend, bumped over 300 metres out, ran home one-paced without threatening.

Soon took up running out wide, attempted to shift back for cover approaching home bend, settled for 2-wide position outside leader, disputed lead on straightening but unable to sustain effort 200 metres out.
Held up towards the rear, 8Ls to make up 400M, found very little when asked. Never involved.
Began well, caught wide no cover chasing leaders, kept on same pace from 400M, out-dashed by rivals mid-straight.
Positively ridden, led passing 900M, set good pace middle stages, battled on well in straight, headed 150M, no extra close home and lost several places.
Shifted across behind runners early stages, reserved at the tail of the field 10Ls off the pace, made some minor progress in the straight without troubling leaders.
Shifted across behind runners early stages, waited with at the rear 3-wide, lay out under pressure in straight, stayed on mildly towards the line but was never dangerous.
Not hurried after the start, settled towards the rear 9Ls off the pace, pushed along 500M but didn't respond, soon behind.
Shifted out abruptly on jumping, restrained to race in 5th spot about 4Ls off the pace, kept on steadily turning home, always held by leaders.
Checked after the start, quickly recovered to a midfield position, picked up well passing 400M, led nearing 100M, continued on strongly to the line.
Settled behind midfield 7Ls off leader, tracked winner's path into straight, ran on well to the line but was always held by winner.
Up with early pace, tracked leader from home turn, tried hard in straight, briefly led 150M, outpaced by first 3 late stages.
Settled down midfield, 6Ls behind leader 400M, not quickened when asked. Never dangerous.
Held up behind midfield 7Ls off the pace, responded well from top of straight but held by winner over final 200M in the run home, took 3rd inside 50M.
From wide draw taken back for cover, at the rear 10Ls off the pace on settling, bustled along 500M, failed to finish off.
Began fairly, moved up to track leader, stayed in contention before run ended 150M, weakened towards the finish.
Bumped start, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide turning in, kept on well in straight to make frame without threatening.
Away with them, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, failed to close off in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, commenced move 600M, very wide turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
Clean jump, raced 3 wide behind midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (Lame left front leg.)
Bumped start, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 9 lengths back, commenced move 600M, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home, nearest on line.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 700M, wider turning in, made no progress in straight.

Jumped well from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside, took the lead approaching 900M, found rail 750M, led by a length on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed near 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the outside, wider turning in, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Began smartly, raced prominently, 2 wide, a length or so back on turn, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Began well from gate 1, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground to turn, 2 wide from 500M, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 50M.
Made contact at start, taken back to race 2 wide at rear, found rail near 800M, saved ground on turn, made minor progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, 2 wide from 500M, made good progress in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Commenced well from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground throughout, made minor progress in straight.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths back, 3 wide from 550M, one-paced in straight.
Bumped start, raced 3 wide slightly better than midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped start, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on rail, 2 wide on turn, made some progress in straight.
Shifted out at start and made contact, sent forward to take the lead, enjoyed the easy lead on turn, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 150M, headed 50M, just held 2nd.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, 7 lengths back, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home without threatening.
Began only fairly, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Bumped start, raced in 2nd, a length back on turn, peaked 300M, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back from gate 11, raced at rear, 7 lengths or so back, still 5 lengths or so back on turn, finished off very strongly to score.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 2 to 3 lengths back, similar position on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame, not able to challenge.
Began smartly from gate 13, raced better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths back on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Began well from a wide draw, taken back to race behind midfield on the outside, 4 lengths or so back, no cover on turn, made some progress in straight.
Taken back to race at rear on the outside, 6 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made no progress in straight.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, wider after passing 650M, 4 lengths or so back turning in, closed off well without threatening.

Raced second early before eventually being crossed & racing 1,1 from about the 850m. Moved up within a length of the lead at the 200m, couldn't go with the winner in late stages but boxed on ok for 4th.

Raced wide in midfield before improving position to third passing the 1000m and then at the leaders quarters by the 750m. Was still close to the lead at the 200m mark before emptying & weakening late.

Drifted back to race third last on the rail throughout. Moved away from the rail passing the 700m, shifted wider & into clear running on straightening when just over 3L behind before finishing only one paced to midfield.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Entered last section under 3L behind, dashed strongly between runners passing 200m mark before charging to lead inside final 100m to win strongly.

Raced wide in midfield before steadily improving position to be second from 1200m. Crossed & raced on leaders back from 950m. Stayed to the inside of the leader in straight, narrow lead 100m before over-run by winner late.

Raced prominent early before settling in midfield along rail. Stayed along rail in straight, within a length of lead at 300m, became badly unbalanced & lost momentum at 250m before recovering & still finishing well late.
Raced worse than midfield between runners throughout. Continued near the back, over 5L from the lead entering last section before weakening a further few lengths in the straight. Well beaten.

Raced wide with cover in midfield before being left three deep without cover from the 800m. Moved up to be just over a length from the lead entering the final section before emptying mid-straight & weakening in final 250m.

Missed the start by 3L before mustering to race worse than midfield when three wide with cover. Was ridden along passing 500m mark after being pushed wider before peaking on effort early in the straight & weakening to last.
Drifted back to race second last. Continued back & wide on cornering before finishing off only one paced & making no real headway into margin in run to line. Well beaten.
Drifted back to race at the tail. Was a clear last on turn before shifting to be very wide when over 6L behind before closing off strongly down the outside in final stages to be beaten only 2.5L.
Pushed forward to lead when racing wide on the track down back straight. Crossed over to rail when leading near 900m. Held lead until overcome in final 75m, held third.
Raced in midfield away from the rail throughout. Straightened about 3L from the lead but peaked on effort mid-straight & weakened poorly in final 250m to be second last, beaten 8L.
Made contact at start, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, slightly improved along the rail on turn, finished off evenly.
Moderately away, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L on turn, challenged by rival turning in, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Began awkwardly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 6 lengths or so back, 3 wide from 500M, made no progress in straight. (Roarer.)

Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 9 to 10 lengths back, moved closer along the rail on turn, made some progress early in straight, blocked near 150M, cleared 50M, made minor progress thereafter.
Began well from the widest draw, raced in 2nd, 1/2L back on turn, took the lead early in straight, peaked and headed 125M, ran on evenly to take 2nd.
Clean jump, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move 400M, finished off very strongly to score.
Bumped start, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Bumped start, raced towards rear, 8 lengths or so back, still 7 lengths back on turn, made no impression in straight. (Blood in trachea.)
Slightly slow out, raced in midfield on the inside, moved closer along the rail on turn, showed limited response early in straight, no extra final furlong.
Jumped well from gate 1, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, 2 wide after passing 800M, hard ridden from 500M, kept on evenly in straight to take a place.

Made contact at start, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, 3 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Blood in trachea.)
Jumped with them, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked on turn, emptied early in straight when hard run took toll.
Tried to sit midfield early, however trapped wide, moved forward 700M into the lead, hung on well until 50M overhauled.
Pushed early, midfield along the fence, lack room 4-2, made steady ground when clear.
Slow away, at rear, trapped 2-3 wide, made ground 200M.
Hard ridden early, at back, 2 wide, lack turn of foot.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, made steady ground 250M.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, emptied 250M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Slow away, trapped 3 wide throughout in midfield, no progress, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Hard ridden to secure box seat, closed off strongly to score.
Pushed to take rail and lead, held ground for 3rd.
Midfield, 2 wide, progressed steadily 300M.
Raced in behind midfield, 3 wide but with cover after 650M, pretty one paced.
Rolled forward, along the rail, weakened noticeably after 50M. (See incident report)
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, made ground and ran on strongly in the last 200M.
At rear, along the rail, showed minor dash only in the last 100M.
Raced in midfield, wide no cover, kept rolling and ran on fairly.
At rear and raced greenly, wide but with cover, swung widest on Straightening, showed some dash only.
At rear, 2 wide, closed off strongly in the Straight for 3rd.
At rear initially, at the 850M rolled forward and took lead after 600M, kept on going and scored by 1/2L.
Raced in front of midfield, along the rail, lost ground in Straight.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, closed of okay for 5th.
Sent forward initially, weakened after passing 400M, made no ground.
At one-out one-back after 550M, showed nothing in the Straight.
Raced third away from the rail throughout. Lay inwards & was near heels passing the 300m mark when continuing in third place before weakening a few lengths in the final 100m to be beaten 4.5L.

Crowded at start before shifting back behind runners to settle rearward. Shifted wider & bumped approaching the corner when about 6L from the lead before weakening further in the straight to be long third last.

Shifted behind runners after start before improving along the rail to race just worse than midfield along the rail. Entered last section about 5L behind & maintained that margin in the run to the line when finishing off ok.
Showed early speed to improve to the lead approaching the 800m before crossing to rail near the 650m. Continued in lead before passed by winner passing the 250m mark before weakening in late stages.

Began well but was allowed to drift back to race four wide without cover near the rear. Bumped & taken very wide around bend when continuing a long way from the lead before weakening out to long last.

Began well & held early lead before being headed & crossed & racing behind leader from the 650m. Straightened under a length form the lead, moved up to lead passing the 250m mark before drawing away to win very easily.

Began only fairly before mustering pace & racing 4th on the rail. Entered last section just under 3L from lead when staying along rail, closed well to second near 100m mark before holding third behind big margin winner.
Shifted back from outside gate to settle at the tail. Stayed along the inside entering last section when 6.5L from lead before finishing off only one paced in the straight to be midfield.
Raced in midfield between runners throughout. Straightened about 3L from the lead before closing off well to move to second place inside the final 50m. No match for easy winner but ran well enough.

Bumped at start before being shifted across behind runners to race near the tail. Continued last when 7L behind entering final section, shifted very wide on straightening before making good late ground to midfield.
Bumped at start before being caught racing three wide without cover in midfield throughout. Continued wide around bend before weakening out in straight to be long second last.

Ridden to take a trailing positon & consequently raced worse than midfield away from rail. Straightened just under 6L from the lead before emptying mid-straight & weakening in late stages. Declared a roarer post-race.
Moderately away, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, challenged the leader turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened thereafter.
Out with rest, raced in midfield on the outside, 2 to 3 lengths back on turn, made contact early in straight, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Away with them, raced towards rear on the outside, a bit closer in the middle stages, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to make frame, nearest on line.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide towards rear, 5 lengths back on turn, made good progress in straight without threatening.

Moderately away, trapped very wide in midfield early, moved closer in the middle stages but still 3 wide with no cover, a length or so back on turn, showed limited response early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Taken back from gate 9, raced behind midfield on the inside, difficult to settle in the middle stages, 2 wide turning in, unable to obtain clear run in straight, eased final 50M.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out after passing 400M, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, there to turn, showed good response early in straight, hit the front 100M, headed near 50M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Bumped on jumping, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out and made contact early in straight, finished off well to take 2nd.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 5 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, finished off very strongly to score, impressive debut.
Began smartly, opted to sit behind lead on the rail, soldiered on to the line, only caught by winner late.
Forward into lead on rail, led by 2-1/2L at 800M, gradually weakened after 150M.
Took back, at tail, 2 wide until shifted to rail prior to 600M turn, saved ground and ran on nicely.
Sat 4th along the rail, about 4L off however, crowded and lost ground at 500M, ran on till weakened near 150M.
Settled in worse than midfield, wide and only had cover from near 650M, closed off well to the line. (See Incident Report)
Race just behind midfield, on rail until commenced move near 450M, dashed on until flattened late.
Slotted in to race just behind midfield, 2 wide, crowded at 500M, made ground steadily.
Began only fairly then crowded at 1000M, settled midfield but wide, showed nothing.
Shifted across to rail early, at rear, kept kicking and closed off nicely to take 3rd.
Eased and raced at the rear, 2 wide, ran on steadily in the straight.
Sat 3rd in 2 wide position, was 5L off at 400M, gradually took ground off leaders, poked through late to win by a short-head.
Taken back, raced at the rear, 3 wide with cover, saved ground and hit the line fairly.
Jumped best to lead setting a slow pace in back straight, headed under pressure inside the 150 metres.

Settled in midfield in 6th some 4L back, commenced to travel freely when steadied 950 metres out, pulled forward to reach 5th over 3L back over 750 metres out, switched out for a run home turn, kept on steadily without quickening.
Crowded at start, trailed the field most of the way to home straight, ran into heels and steadied over 100 metres out, fought on well closing stages. (Jockey reprimanded.)
Began well from the widest gate, soon taken back to midfield in 5th over 3L back, unable to settle and lost position to 6th over 700 metres out, soon weakened in straight.

Settled well back from a wide gate, drifted further back to last briefly 700 metres out, commenced move circling the field from the 450 metres, widest runner in 8th turning for home, quickened well to lead 100 metres out, won readily.
Ridden positively before settling 1L back in 2nd 2-wide, came under strong pressure upon straightening but swamped inside final 150 metres.
Ridden along early, settled within 2L of pace in 3rd on the rail, quickening when caught on heels passing the 450 metres, renewed effort inside the 150 metres but found winner too strong.
Moderate start, settled in last few near the rail, saved ground turning for home, bumped and unbalanced over 100 metres out, fought on to the line.
Ridden along in worse than midfield after a moderate start, drifted slightly further back passing the 800m, produced good late impression under pressure inside final 100m. (Jockey warned.)

Ridden prominently, 3-wide without cover in joint 3rd early in back straight, taken back to clear 4th for cover just over 2L off the lead 800 metres out, commenced move and 3-wide into straight, unable to quicken to threaten.
Obtained a trailing spot behind leaders, loomed 250M out, responded well when asked, just held by winner final stages.
Unable to slot in from wide draw, raced in midfield, caught wide no cover from 600M, closed off well to be nearest at the line, just missed 3rd.
Settled 2-wide in midfield, driven along passing 400M but failed to respond, soon out of contention.
Began fairly, driven forward to lead near 800M setting good pace , continued on under pressure in straight, headed by first two 30M out. (Jockey fined for dropping whip near 150M.)
From wide draw taken back to last for cover, 6-7Ls to make up 400M, made limited progress to the line. Never a serious threat.
Chased leaders 2-wide, not quickened early straight when driven, kept on same pace to line, no threat from mid-straight.
Began fairly from draw 1, unable to obtain the lead as anticipated, 3Ls back in midfield, kept on same pace to the line, never dangerous.
Reserved towards the rear, picked up well from 250M, made good progress up the inside to gain the lead late stages.
Driven forward, prompted the pace on outside, fought on to maintain his position until 200M then weakened.
Caught wide on jumping from draw 11, reserved towards the rear, lost cover from 600M, failed to finish off on straightening. Made no impression on its seasonal reappearance.
Steadied from wide draw to obtain cover, held up behind midfield, stayed on final 300M without threatening leaders.
Given a waiting ride at the rear, made home turn awkwardly near 600M and lost ground, almost 8Ls off the pace at 400M, showed a mild late response to claim 5th without troubling first 4.
Began awkwardly, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner late.
Away with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, similar position on turn, very wide into straight, finished off well without threatening.
Jumped well from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside early, 2 wide after entering the back straight, commenced move 500M, very wide turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
Average to begin, raced at rear, 9 to 10 lengths back, still 8 lengths back on turn, made some progress in straight.
Began well, positioned on rail slightly better than midfield, 2 wide turning in, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the outside, angled out 400M, closed off well to take a place without threatening.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced towards rear, 8 lengths back, peaked 500M, eased final 400M. (Mucus.)
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out 400M, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide turning, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (Lame right hind leg next day morning.)
Slightly inconvenienced at start, taken back to race at rear on the inside, 9 lengths back, peaked on turn, one-paced to the line.
Clean jump, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, kept on evenly in straight.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, kept on evenly early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Began well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 wide from 600M, peaked turning in, weakened gradually in straight, checked near 100M.
Began only fairly, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made some progress to make frame.
Taken back from gate 9, raced towards rear on the inside, last turning in, no clear run early in straight, failed to make any progress thereafter.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, a bit closer on turn, angled out after passing 400M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, made no progress thereafter.
Moderately away, raced behind midfield on the outside, 6 lengths back, commenced move 500M, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Clean jump, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, challenged by rival turning in, kept on very well in straight, easily scored.
Away well, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, moved a bit closer on turn, no clear running early in straight, cleared approaching 150M, finished evenly.
Made contact at start, sat 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground to turn, angled out 350M, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Began smartly from gate 1, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, finished off well to take 2nd on line, no threat to the winner.
Bumped start, raced at rear, 8 lengths or so back, moved closer in the middle stages, very wide into straight, made minor progress in the run home.
Began awkwardly and made contact, positioned 2 wide, a length back, challenged the leader turning in, peaked early in straight, kept on evenly, missed 2nd on line.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the outside, there to turn, weakened gradually in straight.
Shifted in at start and made contact, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L on turn, kicked clear early in straight, kept on very well to the line and scored.
Began well from gate 1, raced prominently on the inside, 1/2L back on turn, finished off well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Jumped well, raced prominently but 3 wide, 3/4L back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Moderately away, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 lengths or so back, saved ground throughout, finished off evenly.
Taken back from gate 6, raced towards rear on the outside, 3 lengths or so back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Away well, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths back, there to turn, angled out early in straight, closed off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Inconvenienced at start, raced at rear on the inside, 5 lengths back on turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
Eased to sit just behind the leaders, 2 wide, made early move 600M, led 300M, overhauled 100M.
Slow away, at back along the fence, unleashed strong finishing efforts 250M.
Eased back, 2-4 wide, dashed well 250M.
Eased to obtain box seat, closed off well 200M.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, dashed well 200M.
Eased at start, took cover at rear, made early move 900M, emptied 300M.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, lack room 300M, just held ground.
Behind midfield, 2 wide, made early move 1000M into the lead, weakened 200M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Eased back, 2-3 wide, lack turn of foot.
In front of midfield, no progress in straight, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Pushed to take rail and lead, out of fuel 300M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Eased at start to take cover at back, lack room 5-3, dashed fairly, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Raced in behind midfield, wide no cover after 550M, made ground and closed off strongly for 4th.
Raced in front of midfield initially, dropped back after 450M, 2 wide, nothing in the Straight.
At rear, 2 wide, closed of strongly to be in a close finish with the winner.
Raced in midfield initially, pressed forward and took lead after 550M, weakened after passing 50M.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, did not feature in the Straight.
Raced prominently, 2 wide, just weakened in the last 25M.
At rear, 3 wide with cover after 600M, nothing in the Straight.
At rear, along the rail, showed strong dash in the last 100M for 3rd.
Sent forward, dropped off after 500M and eased down in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, along the rail initially, shifted out after passing the 900M, ran on nicely and held off late challenge to win by a neck.
Raced in behind midfield, wide no cover, pretty one paced.
Raced in midfield initially, sent forward after 800M, 2 wide, one paced only in the Straight.
Slow away & raced near the tail throughout. Was 5.5L from lead entering last section & failed to improve in straight. Second last nearly 8L behind on line.
Had a soft run on leaders back throughout. Was under 2L from the lead on straightening before weakening poorly in the straight to be well beaten.

Raced prominent to lead in first furlong before being crossed & racing in midfield away from rail. Entered last section under 3L behind, moved three wide soon after before finishing off only steadily to hold 4th, beaten 3.5L.

Drifted back after start & was left racing three wide no cover near the back. Moved slightly closer passing 700m, continued wide around final bend before giving a few lengths to be beaten 6.5L. Rider questioned, see report.

Pushed forward to race second away from the rail. Moved up to share lead entering the last section, joined quickly by winner soon after straightening, fought on ok to hold second in final stages but was no match for winner.

Ridden early before getting nice run 1,1 throughout. Straightened only 2L from lead but failed to challenge in straight & weakened out in last furlong to be well beaten in midfield. Travelled keenly & wouldn't relax – rider.

Drifted back after the start & raced at the rear throughout. Moved wide but with cover at the 650m, very wide on cornering when a long way from lead before passing a few but still finishing a fair way behind winner.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Stayed close to the rail on cornering when about 3L from the lead before weakening out in the straight to be beaten over 6L.

Raced just worse than midfield away from rail before moving three wide at 750m & improving around runners to third position near 600m. Dashed well to move to lead at 250m before drawing away in final furlong to win strongly.

Drifted back after the start & raced second last for the majority. Continued rearward entering last section when over 5L from the lead before closing off ok from the back to be midfield, beaten a similar margin on line.
Improved after the start assume the lead after 300m. Emptied soon after cornering & weakened badly in last furlong to be last.

Raced just worse than midfield on rail. Moved away from inside near the 800m, eased wider at the 400m when travelling strongly & 4L form the lead before closing off well in the final stages to well beaten third. Better.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced prominently on the inside, shared lead on turn, kept on well early in straight, headed 100M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Began smartly from a wide draw, raced prominently, 2 wide, shared lead on turn, kept on very well in straight, won by 3/4L.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at rear on the inside, 5 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, made some progress in straight.
Bumped start, raced at rear, 8 lengths back on turn, made minor progress early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths back on turn, finished off evenly.
Moderately away from the widest gate, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight when hard run took toll.
Crowded shortly after start, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, brushed the rail near 850M, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Away with them, raced 2 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, same position on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame.
Bumped and unbalanced shortly after start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 4 lengths back on turn, made no progress in straight.
Jumped well from gate 11, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, very wide into straight, made minor progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Bumped start, raced 3 wide with cover slightly behind midfield, very wide turning in, made good progress in the run home, no threat to the first few.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, easy run on turn, closed off well to take 2nd.
Bumped start, raced front of midfield, 2 wide, pretty one paced to the line.
Jumped only fairly, in worse than midfield, 2 wide, improved steadily to the line to take 3rd.
Rolled forward, took box-seat, kept finding to the line but was no threat to winner.
Niggled along early, settled towards the rear, wide with cover, saved no ground.
Bumped start, in worse than midfield, along the rail, failed to kick on from 150M out.
In midfield, wide and no cover, wasn't in it.
Asked early, settled outside lead 1L behind, faded passing 200M. (See Incident Report)
Raced at the tail, along the rail, dashed on a little late.
Urged along, just behind midfield early but wide, only found cover after taken to the rear, swung widest on exit, saved ground and hit the line fairly.
Travelled just in front of midfield, along the rail, ran on smartly to the line, won by 1L.
Forward, took rail and led, headed and faded at 200M. (See Incident Report)
Soon came to join the leaders, gradually shifted back from the 850 metres to one-out-one-back position, came under pressure in straight to hold place chance only to be pipped for 3rd late.
Shared early pace on the rail, gained half a length advantage from the 600 metres, joined by others again entering home straight, folded up quickly after straightening.
Crowded at start losing ground, towards the rear and travelled keenly most of the way, kept on same pace without making any serious impression in the run to the line.

Jumped best and ridden along to share early pace 3-wide, gradually taken back for cover from the 800 metres but in vain, in 5th about 2L off the pace rounding home bend, faded steadily under pressure after straightening.

Gradually taken back to rear of midfield in 8th from a wide gate travelling wide throughout, drifted further back to 10th 700 metres out, baulked for a run over 200 metres out, fought on steadily closing stages.

Bumped after starting from a wide gate, soon moved up to join the leaders 4-wide turning into back straight, ridden positively to dispute lead 2-wide from the 700 metres, found no extra inside final 120 metres.
Taken back from a wide gate and waited with, commenced move on the rail passing the 600 metres and saved ground turning in, fought on under pressure despite a difficult ride.
Hampered at the start, settled towards the rear in 10th on the rail, steady headway from 700M to be 2L 6th rounding home bend, tightened for a run 200M out, fought on steadily without threatening.

Drifted back before picking up swiftly on the rail to be 2L back in 5th into back straight, gained 4th 700M out and further closer in 3rd home bend, quickened well to take charge inside 200M, won comfortably.
With leaders early stages, gradually drifted back to midfield in back straight, widest runner turning for home after travelling wide most of the way, made no further impression.

Began well, gradually settled some 3L back in 6th, inconvenienced briefly rounding home bend and soon shaken up, went very wide into straight but quickened well under pressure inside final 150 metres to snatch 3rd late.
Taken back from the widest gate, remained well back and trailed the field rounding home bend, did not find much room inside final 200 metres and not able to be properly tested.
Travelled strongly when racing wide down the back straight early stages, improved from 900M to race outside leader but inclined to lay out, hung on to 200M then weakened away.
Taken back for cover, held up at the rear 7Ls off the pace in a slow run race, closed off final 400M fastest but left with too much to do.
Began awkwardly, held up towards the rear in a slow run race, responded well final 300M to claim 5th near line.
Settled midfield, 5th going into final turn, driven out 450M, put in a mild bid in the run home, just missed a minor placing.
Slowly away from draw 12, dropped back to race at the rear as opposed to obtaining a forward position, brought widest top of straight, ran on without troubling leaders.
Jumped on terms, settled down behind midfield, bustled along 500M, stayed on moderately to the line, finished just behind 2nd and 3rd in a blanket finish.
Not hurried, settled towards the rear 5-6Ls back, gave limited response on straightening, never involved.
Quickest away, restrained to sit behind leaders along the 2-path, fought on one paced in the straight, faded late and lost several places.
Always well placed behind leaders in a slow run race, tried hard on straightening but couldn't quite close the gap on winner, lost 2nd near line.
Reserved in midfield along the fence, took a while to get going on straightening, did best work final 200M to go 2nd close home.
Crossed to the lead passing 1000M, set steady pace in middle stages, continued on well when asked top of straight and comfortably held off pursuing rivals final 200M.
From wide draw shifted across behind runners, settled towards the rear along the inside, couldn't go on passing 300M. Never dangerous.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 400M, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame.
Taken back to race at tail, 9 lengths or so back, still 7 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home to be nearest on line.

Moderately away, raced better than midfield on the outside, moved closer after entering the back straight, 2nd on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped shortly after start, sent forward to take the lead, 2 wide, found rail near 1000M, led by 3/4L on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.

Clean jump, raced prominently on the inside before being crossed and checked near 1000M, 2 lengths back in the middle stages, angled out 450M, hit the front 100M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner late.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, moved a bit closer in the middle stages, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, failed to make any progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced 2 wide towards rear, 5 lengths or so back, 3 wide from 700M, same margin back on turn, very wide into straight, failed to make any progress in the run home.
Began fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, 6 lengths back, 2 wide from 700M, same margin back on turn, finished off very strongly to score by a head.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 to 4 lengths back on turn, made minor progress early in straight, no extra final 100M. (Lost right hind plate near 800M.)
Began smartly from gate 1, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, closed off well to take a place.
Began well from the widest draw, raced in midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 800M, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 lengths back, similar position on turn, finished off well to take a place.
Away with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 2 lengths or so back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Out in line, raced 3 wide slightly better than midfield, no cover on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Bumped start, positioned on rail in midfield, 3 lengths back, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 300M, ran on evenly to the line.
Inconvenienced at start, raced towards rear on the outside, 6 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made no progress in straight.
Bumped start, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, made minor progress thereafter.
Made contact at start, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on very well in straight to score.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, blocked after passing 200M, cleared 150M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced at rear on the outside, commenced move after passing 500M, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Began awkwardly and made contact, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, closed off well to take 2nd, always held.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, no clear run 300M, cleared after passing 200M, kept on evenly thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 4 lengths or so back, angled out 550M, same margin back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Began awkwardly and made contact, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, carried wider after passing 550M, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Eased back, 2 wide, lack room 4-2, dashed strongly when clear.
Eased at start, trapped 2-4 wide, dashed well 300M, run ended 100M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Very slow away, at back along the fence, blocked most straight, dashed well.
Slow away, pushed to obtain a midfield spot on the rails, raced keenly, lack room in straight, just held ground.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, blocked most straight, dashed strongly.
Pushed to take rail and lead, hung on well until last few strides overhauled.
Pushed forward, trapped 3 wide, held ground in straight.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, blocked whole straight, not tested.
Eased to sit just off the leaders, 2 wide, just held ground.
Hard ridden early but not muster, midfield, 2 wide, blocked most straight, dashed well.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, 2-4 wide, unleashed strong finishing efforts 300M.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, emptied 200M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Raced behind the lead, along the rail, weakened after passing 150M.
At rear, 2 wide, showed strong dash in the last 150M.
Taken back and raced in worse than midfield, 3 wide but with cover, no progress in the Straight.
Raced prominently, 2 wide, nothing in the Straight. (Roarer)
Settled in midfield, 2 wide, near the 300M held up for clear running, after that made ground steadily and finished okay for 4th.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, found no extra approaching 150M.
Sent forward, along the rail, kept on going to win the race.
Slow to begin and raced at rear, along the rail, did not improve in the straight.
Sent forward and took lead, 2 wide, emptied after passing 250M.
Settled to race in midfield, 2 wide, ran on strongly in the straight.
At rear, 2 wide, made ground and ran on to the line.
Raced in midfield, wide no cover, lost ground in the Straight.

Had a nice run in midfield between runners, eased wider on cornering, dashed up to lead at 250m, held lead without bursting away, got tired in final stages & just had enough in the tank to hold out late closer.
Race din midfield but was trapped racing three deep without cover for the majority. Continued to finish off steadily & wasn't beaten far in midfield.
Didn't begin fast but improved position under hard riding to dash between runners and take the lead near the 950m. Headed soon after straightening & weakened out badly to be last. Lame post-race.
Steadied & taken back to second last away from rail. Moved very wide when about 6L behind on straightening before flying home in the final stages to fall be a SHD behind on line.
Raced in midfield before being checked away from heels near the 850m. Entered last section just under 4L from the lead before finishing off steadily to be beaten under 2L in midfield.
Held early lead before being headed & racing on leaders back from 900m. Moved over the heel dos two leaders just before straightening, peaked on effort mid-straight, not beaten far in midfield.
Had a nice run in midfield away from rail throughout. Under 2L form the lead on straightening but finished off only very one paced & held similar margin on line. Close behind.

Pushed forward form wide gat, raced three wide outside leaders before two wide from the 900m. Moved to narrow outright lead entering last section, joined passing the 300m before weakening out in last furlong.
Drifted back to last after the start. Continue at the back nearly 7L behind on straightening before making up very good late ground to move to third late beaten only a neck on line.
Steadied & then drifted back after start before improving position to midfield along the rail in middle stages. Shifted outwards at the 350m mark before closing off steadily to hold 4th.

Steadied from outside gate & got back to 4th last away from rail. Ridden along before straightening, entered last section 5.5L from lead before finishing off one paced when hanging inwards in straight. Not ridden out late.
Raced in midfield along rail throughout. Continued to be only just over a length form the lead at the 200m mark before being over-run in late stages when giving ground.
Had no speed & drifted back to third last along rail. Was hard ridden from the 600m, entered last section over 6L from the lead & made no headway. Well beaten.

Was ridden along after start to hold position in midfield away from rail. Raced slightly wide but with cover in middle stages, shifted to be widest runner on straightening before finishing off only one paced without threatening.
Taken back from gate 1, raced towards rear in the middle of the track, 3 to 4 lengths back, made good progress final 400M without threatening.
Average to begin, positioned a length behind the leader on the stands' side, crowded 400M, weakened thereafter. (Blood in trachea.)
Bumped start, raced prominently, hard ridden from 250M, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter.
Bumped start and unbalanced, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well in the middle stages, hard ridden approaching 300M, kept on well but unable to hold off the first two close home.
Commenced well, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader, 2 away from the stands' rail, hard ridden from 300M, finished off strongly to score by a narrow margin.
Out with rest, raced towards rear, 2 away from the stands' rail, made good progress final 400M without threatening. (Lost left front plate on jumping.)
Slightly hampered shortly after start, positioned a length behind the leader, 3 away from the stands' rail, cleared 300M, finished off evenly.

Began awkwardly and bumped, positioned 2 to 3 lengths behind the leader, nearer to the middle track, hard ridden after passing 400M, finished off strongly, led close home but unable to hold off the winner on line.
Away well, positioned a length behind the leader, nearer to the middle track, hard ridden 350M, finished off well without threatening.
Shifted out at start, positioned a length behind the leader on the stands' rail, hard ridden from 350M, kept on evenly to the line.
Jumped well, positioned a length behind the leader, 2 away from the stands' rail, bumped 400M, peaked 300M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the middle track, hard ridden 400M, only showed limited response, ran on evenly thereafter.
Slightly slow out, raced towards rear on the stands' rail, hard ridden after passing 400M, finished off evenly.
Sent forward to take lead, on rail, led all the way to win by 1-1/4L.
Rolled forward, assumed box-seat when entering back straight, kept pushing but took no ground off the winner, finished 2nd 1-1/4L behind.
Raced just behind midfield, 2 wide, made nice ground and continued on nicely to the line.
Jumped awkward, worked forward to sit outside lead, faded gradually in the straight.
Took back, raced at the rear, on rail, did not improve.
Settled to race in about midfield, along the rail, showed dashes early before finishing one-paced.
Settled to race one-out one-back, no kick and run ended at 200M. (Blood in trachea and see Incident Report)
Jumped only fairly, took back to be at rear, 2 wide, saved no ground.
Slotted into midfield, 2 wide, pressured 650M out, wasn't in it.
Niggled along, box-seat early but slotted a pair back at 1200M, showed dashes before flattening.
Raced in worse than midfield, 2 wide, improved slightly then closed off late.
At rear, wide and no cover from 1000M, never a factor.
Travelled in about midfield, wide until 1000M, keen in the middle stages, was one paced only.
Began only fairly, sat towards the rear and on rail, didn't make ground.

Began well from a wide gate, gradually taken back to midfield closer to rails coming onto home bend, travelled keenly in the slow pace, fought on well inside final 300 metres to hold every chance and narrowly miss a placing.

Moderate start from a wide gate and soon dropped well behind, pulled forward in the slow pace 4-wide without cover rounding home bend, one of the widest turning in , unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Began awkwardly, travelled keenly one back in 3rd on the rail, in similar box-seat position into home straight, baulked for a run most of the way to the line, not tested.
Ridden forward to join the leaders, disputed lead most of the way until swamped for a placing final strides.
Broke well from the one draw to hold slender lead and set a slow pace, fought on under pressure in straight but swamped for a placing final strides.
Settled one-out-one-back, held every chance early in straight but unable to sustain effort inside final 150 metres.

Soon dropped well behind, pulled forward in the slow pace on home bend, checked off heels at about the 800 metres dropping to last few, baulked for a run in straight until quickening well between runners inside final 100 metres.
Settled just better than midfield in 5th within 3L of the slow pace, saved ground on the rail rounding home bend but could find no clear run the length of the straight, not tested.
Soon dropped towards rear, travelled wide and keenly in the slow pace rounding home bend, fought on steadily under pressure down the centre of the straight.
Broke well from the widest gate, gradually taken back to rear of midfield but remained wide without cover throughout, gained slightly closer to 2L 5th into straight, ran on to be nearest at finish.
Settled well behind, last and widest runner into straight, switched in for a run passing the 250 metres, ran on strongly to prevail by a narrow margin. (Tactic in home straight questioned)
Caught wide early, strode forward to chase leader passing 1100M, found disappointingly little when placed under pressure 600M, out of contention 250M. (Jockey unable to offer any explanation.)
Taken back from wide draw, settled at the rear 8Ls off the pace, driven wide home turn, failed to run on.
Stumbled at the start, held up behind midfield along the fence, kept on same pace turning home, never troubled leaders final 300M.
Restrained to race behind midfield, failed to respond when driven out nearing 450M, never involved.

Not far off from leaders early stages, left racing 3-wide without cover from 900M, moved up to chase leaders home turn, produced a sustained effort from 400M to reel in the long-time leader close home.
Went forward to take early lead, tracked leader from 1100M, under pressure 500M, battled on to hold 3rd until 150M then faded away final stages.
Reserved towards the rear, 6Ls to make up 400M, stayed on moderately to claim a non-threatening 3rd, well behind first 2.
Lost ground at the start, caught 4-wide no cover in midfield, bustled along 600M but failed to quicken, never able to challenge.
Became fractious as the start was effected, slowly away, settled towards the rear on inside, couldn't go on passing 400M, never reached contention.
From draw 1 settled in midfield along the fence, responded fairly turning in, never able to challenge first 2, briefly went 3rd 150M, edged out to 5th late.
Dropped back to a rearward spot, raced 3-wide throughout, driven 600m out but made no real progress. Never in the picture.
Chased leaders early stages, travelled keenly, under pressure prior to home turn, soon gave ground and finished tailed out. (Jockey unable to offer explanation for the performance.)
Began fairly, moved up to take the lead passing 1200M, set good pace to straight, continued on strongly from 400M only to be caught by winner close home. Well clear from rest.
Held up behind midfield 3-wide, 5Ls off the pace halfway, put in a mild bid leaving home turn, got up for distant 4th late.

Stumbled on jumping, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, moved a bit closer in the middle stages, carried wider after passing 700M, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home to take 3rd.
Out in line, trapped wide in midfield early, sent forward after passing 1200M, raced in 2nd in the middle stages, no cover throughout, kept on very well in straight to take a place.
Stumbled at start and bumped, raced 2 wide in midfield early, 3 wide from 1050M, moved closer on turn, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly thereafter.

Taken back from the widest draw, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 1000M, 2 to 3 lengths back on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 300M, finished off strongly to score.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide better than midfield early, travelled keenly near 1100M, 3 wide from 700M, wider turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Away with them, chased leader, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross near 800M, 2 lengths back turning in, kept on evenly early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear running early in straight, ran on evenly thereafter.
Taken back from gate 10, raced at rear on the outside, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, finished off well to be nearest on line.
Quickly into stride, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L, kept on well until final 100M, peaked and headed 50M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, 4 to 5 lengths back on turn, taken wide in straight and made some progress.
Taken back from gate 8, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, made no progress thereafter.
Made contact shortly after start, raced prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, hit the front 250M, peaked and headed 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Away with them, positioned 3 wide with cover, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, angled out 500M, peaked early in straight, inconvenienced near 300M, weakened thereafter.
Began very awkwardly and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside, 4 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, made minor progress early in straight, no clear run near 200M, weakened final 100M.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, similar position on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened thereafter.
Moderately away, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed 250M, weakened final 100M.
Slowly away, raced at rear on the inside, 6 lengths or so back, a bit closer on turn, angled out after passing 550M, made good progress in straight to take 2nd.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced at rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, finished off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Made contact shortly after start, raced towards rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back, very wide turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths back, there to turn, made minor progress in straight.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced in midfield on the inside, moved closer along the rail on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Jumped well, raced prominently but 3 wide, a length back on turn, kept on evenly early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Began well from the widest draw, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, 3 lengths back, same position on turn, angled out 500M, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Away with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Jumped with them, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 11, raced at tail, 7 lengths back on turn, made good progress early in straight, no clear run final 50M.
Average to begin, raced 3 wide behind midfield, moved a bit closer in the middle stages, finished off well to take a place.
Moderately away, sent forward to take the lead, briefly headed after passing 500M, retook the lead early in straight, kept on well to the line, won by a narrow margin.
Slightly slow out, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 100M, made minor progress thereafter.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, closed off well without threatening.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off evenly.
Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 2 lengths back on turn, finished off evenly.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, 5 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, made good progress in straight to make frame.
Average to begin, trapped wide in midfield early, moved a bit closer after passing 700M, 3 wide with no cover on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Away well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, took the lead near 500M, headed early in straight, kept on well to the line, always held.
Eased back, 2-3 wide, ran on ok.
Eased at start, took cover at rear, made early move around the field in 4 wide from 700M, run ended 250M.
Settled one off one back, closed off strongly 300M to score.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, ran on until 100M weakened.
Pushed to take rail and lead, out of fuel 250M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Midfield along the fence, lack room 4-2, dashed well.
Eased back, 2-3 wide, raced keenly, just held ground.
Box seat, held ground for 3rd.
Slow away, at rear, lack room 4-2, dashed strongly when clear.
At rear, along the rail, never a factor. (See incident report)
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail, pretty one paced.
Sent forward, along the rail, weakened after 150M.
Raced detached and at rear, did not feature.
Sent forward, 2 wide, kept up and stayed on well to the line.
Raced in front of midfield, wide no cover, eased down after passing 200M. (See incident report)
Raced in midfield, along the rail, only one paced.
Raced behind the leader, along the rail, ran on gamely but couldn't hold off the winner.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, made ground and close off strongly for 3rd.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, in the straight made ground and closed off strongly to score.
At rear, 2 wide, showed no turn on foot after 100M.
Raced in behind midfield, 3 wide but with cover, made some ground in the Straight only.

Raced three wide no cover on speed before improving to be outside the leader, 2 wide from the 550m. Moved to narrow lead at 250m, continued to hold narrow advantage all the way to line to win by a nose.
Began fast to lead. Headed by winner near the 250m mark & weakened out in last furlong to be well beaten.
Raced in midfield along the rail. Moved off the rail on straightening but finished off only one paced in the straight, not beaten far but was second last.
Raced three wide with cover when just worse than midfield before being left without cover from the 500m. Forced very wide on cornering before failing to finish off. Last.
Raced in midfield away from the rail. Eased wider passing 400m, wide in straight, closed off well in late stages to be beaten just over 1L.
Raced on the leaders back throughout. Stayed close the rail in the straight, awkward near 150m before closing well to be beaten under a length.
Drifted back to rail near the rear throughout. Stayed close to the inside in the straight, closed off steadily to only be beaten 2L in midfield.
Steadied at first bend & taken back to the tail. Was a clear last on straightening before closing off strongly in final 100m before being hampered for room & not ridden out when closing off late.
Raced second at the leaders quarters before being crossed & racing 1,1 from the 550m mark. Closed well all the way to the line & was only beaten half a length.
Drifted back to race third last away from rail. Got clear running on straightening when continuing rearward before closing off very strongly to miss my only a nose on the line.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, moved a bit closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, raced prominently on the inside early, allowed rival to cross near 650M, sat right behind the leader on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, very wide into straight, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
