Shifted in abruptly at start and made contact, raced prominently on the outside, led by 1/2L on turn, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final furlong.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move approaching 400M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Jumped well from the widest draw, raced 3 wide better than midfield, no cover after passing 600M, moved closer on turn, hit the front 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 75M.
Clean jump, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, closed off well to take a place.
Moderately away, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, found rail near 600M, travelled well on turn, hit the front 300M, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 150M.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced at rear on the inside, 8 lengths back on turn, made very good progress in straight.
Bumped start, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off evenly.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made minor progress.
Inconvenienced at start, raced 2 wide at rear, 7 lengths back, similar position on turn, passed some tired runners in straight.
Rolled forward, took box-seat, kicked on ear-ly before weakening late, just held onto 2nd.
Worked forward, settled one-out one-back, improved from 800M, stayed on until about 150M.
In midfield, 2 wide, never a factor.
Asked early, took rail and led, weakened about 150M out.
Niggled along, shared lead 2 wide, showed nothing. (See Incident Report)
Raced in worse than midfield, along the rail, never threaten.
Travelled in behind midfield, 2 wide, great run to chase down leader, ran home strongly to win by 1/2L.
Jumped awkward, took back, made 600M turn 2 wide, improved and ran on fairly.
Raced towards the rear initially, drifted out to improve at 800M, continued one paced.
Travelled in midfield, along the rail, saved no ground. (See Incident Report)
Took back, towards rear initially, worked forward to be midfield, wide throughout how-ever, found nothing.
Raced towards the rear, wide but with cover, made ground and closed off gamely to take 3rd.

Well there early, settled about 3L off the pace in 3rd, became closer in 4th when pace slackened 800 meters out, held every chance early in straight but unable to sustain effort inside final 100 metres.

Pressed forward from widest gate before settling wide in 7th in rear of midfield, raced keenly in the slow pace early in back straight, commenced move home bend and wide into straight, nearest at finish.
Settled in last, niggled along in back straight, tailed-off turning for home.
Lacked pace and dropped towards rear despite niggled along, fought on under pressure in straight without threatening.

Close up on the rail early, drifted back to midfield passing the winning post the first time, became 5th 1200M out and further closer to pace 900M out, went wide turning for home, one-paced in straight.
Ridden early before settling wide in last few, travelled one from last after first bend, saved ground on the inside turning into home straight, unable to quicken under pressure.
Settled in midfield on the rail, angled out for a run entering home straight, finished off the race well inside final 100 metres.
Travelled freely in first few, obtained one back position in 2nd rounding first bend, became 3rd when pace slackened 800 metres out, soon faded after straightening.

Ridden forward from wide gate before settling back in midfield in 6th, got closer to 3L off the pace 900M, commenced move 400M and wide into straight, hit the front 150M to win readily despite hampered 250M out.
Took up running 3-wide passing the winning post the first time, obtained rails run in front rounding first bend, led until headed and folded up quickly inside final 250 metres.

Niggled along early to be 4th on the rail, switched off rails 1200M out and made headway 3-wide in back straight to reach 2nd 800M out, came under pressure rounding home bend and weakened in straight.
Settled towards rear, wide under pressure rounding home bend and widest runner into straight, made up some late ground.
From draw 1 obtained a midfield spot along the fence, kept on evenly turning for home but never finding the pace to challenge leaders.
Slow to begin from draw 10, shifted across behind runners, 4-5Ls off the pace home turn, finished off well to go 3rd close home.
Jumped well but soon shuffled back to a position behind midfield, couldn't muster the pace to challenge on straightening, never dangerous.
Raced keenly early stages when pace was low, caught wide no cover before improving to race outsider the lead after 800M, fought on steadily in the straight, lost 3rd late stages.
Guided to a 2-wide spot in midfield 3-4Ls back, driven nearing 400M, ran home fairly, always held by leaders.
Held up behind mid-division, caught 3-wide no cover from 800M, brought wide home, stayed on without threatening leaders.
Up with early pace, tracked leaders entering back straight, fought on to 200M then weakened rapidly to finish last.
Away well, always close up behind leaders, picked up pace passing 300M down the outside, led near 100M winning in fine style.
Driven along and crossed to the lead near 800M, continued on well turning in, caught by winner 100M out, held on for 2nd.
Bumped by rival at the start, taken back to race in the rear, responded fairly when driven out top of straight, never a threat to leaders.
Shifted in at start and made contact, trapped very wide, a length or so back, weakened after passing 1000M, soon pulled up. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the inside, peaked 400M, weakened early in straight.
Began smartly from gate 1, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Inconvenienced at start, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on strongly in straight, easily scored.
Moderately away, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, same position on turn, kept on well early straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Taken back from gate 11, raced at tail, 8 lengths back, a bit closer on turn but still the last into straight, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Hampered start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, moved a bit closer after passing 450M, very wide turning in, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, race 2 wide in midfield, commenced move approaching 450M, 3 to 4 wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from gate 9, raced behind midfield on the inside, 6 lengths back, 2 wide turning in, one-paced in straight.
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, 2 lengths back, there to turn, kept on well in straight to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Taken back from gate 10, raced 2 wide at rear, 7 lengths back, closer on turn, very wide into straight, made very good progress in the run home, nearest on line.
Taken back to race at tail, 5 to 6 lengths back in the middle stages, 3 lengths back on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off strongly to take a place, nearest finish.
Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the outside, carried wider 500M, made no progress in straight.
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, challenged by rival from 600M, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out 500M, made good progress early in straight, peaked on run 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Moderately away, raced in 2nd, travelled comfortably in the middle stages, challenged the leader 600M, took the lead early in straight, headed 200M, kept on well to take 2nd.
Moderately away, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 wide turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened final 50M.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground to turn, angled out approaching 500M, hard ridden 350M, hit the front 200M, kept on very well to the line and scored.
Pushed early, failed to muster, trapped 3-4 wide behind midfield, no progress, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
At rear, along the fence, lack room in straight, made steady ground.
Slow away, at rear, 2 wide, ran on fairly.
Eased to sit in midfield, progressed steadily 400M.
Pushed to take rail and lead, weakened 200M.
Eased to sit behind the front runners, ran on well to the line.
Hard ridden early, trapped 3-4 wide in midfield, made ground 400M, run ended 150M.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 3-4 wide, dropped off 450M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
At rear, trapped 3-4 wide, made ground 300M.
Slow away, took rail at rear, progressed steadily in straight, lack room 200M.
Eased to sit in front of midfield along the rails, lack room 400M, progressed steadily when clear.
Slow away, at rear, no progress.
Behind midfield, on the fence, blocked most straight, closed off strongly when clear.
Hard ridden to cross in front and obtain box seat, out of fuel 200M.
Raced behind the lead, along the rail, unable to obtain clear running until the last 150M, showed strong dash thereafter for 3rd.
Settled to race in midfield, 2 wide after 850M, ran on strongly in the straight.
Raced in front of midfield, 2 wide, stayed on but weakened after passing the 50M. (See incident report)
Raced in midfield, along the rail, showed strong dash in the last 200M to win by 3/4L.
At rear, along the rail, improved steadily to the line.
Sent forward and raced next to the lead, 2 wide, lost ground in the last 75M.
At rear, 2 wide, only one paced in the Straight.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, weakened after passing the 50M.
Pushed forward from gate 12, raced second at the leaders hind-quarters in middle stages. Moved to lead soon after straightening, dashed clear to win very easily. Impressive.
Pushed forward to lead. Joined by winner approaching the 300m mark before weakening out quickly in last furlong.
Raced three wide with cover in midfield for the majority. Moved to second place passing 250m mark, battled away ok but was caught for a minor placing late. Improved run.

Was trapped racing 4 wide in midfield but with cover before being left in that position but without cover from about the 800m. Continued wide around bend, straightened under 4L behind but weakened out after wide passage.

Raced just worse than midfield along the rail throughout. Was 4 lengths from the lead on straightening, moved away from rail soon after but failed to challenge & weakened in late stages to be well beaten.
Had a nice run 1,1 for the majority. Peaked on effort near the 200m, gave a length or two to be well beaten in midfield.

Drifted back & raced third last away from the rail. Steadied away from heels near 850m. Continued rearward on straightening, shifted ground near 200m before closing strongly to move to well beaten second in final stages.

Commenced awkwardly & bumped and consequently got back near the rear after start. Steadied at 950m & taken back to clear last. Straightened 5.5L from lead, stayed along rail before finishing ok to midfield in final stages.
Didn't begin fast but mustered speed to improve along the rail & race just behind the leading trio along the rail. Finished off fairly when racing greenly to be in midfield, 2L behind second.
Improved after the start to race in midfield between runners. Shifted outwards at 350m when about 3L behind before finishing off only fairly in final furlong. Well beaten in midfield.

Bumped after the start & drifted back towards the rear. Hung outwards & lost ground around the 800m bend before losing further ground & relegated to last near 600m. Weakened further in straight to finish a long last.
Raced three wide with cover in midfield before being steadied & drifting slightly further back near the 700m. Straightened about 5L from the lead before weakening to be long third last.

Caught 4 wide in midfield after start before improving position & racing three wide no cover outside leaders from 800m. Continued wide on bend, couldn't sprint with winner passing 300m, fought on well, caught for 2nd late.
Shifted out on jumping, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 150M, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Commenced well, tracked leaders but 3 wide early, 2 wide on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, 2 wide, bumped near 1000M, headed 850M, found rail near 800M, 1/2L back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.

Bumped start, raced prominently on the inside early, allowed rival to cross near 800M, sat right behind the leader on turn, not enough room early in straight, cleared 250M, peaked on run 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Jumped well, raced better than midfield on the outside, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Away with them, raced 3 wide with cover, 3 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, no clear running early in straight, cleared 200M, made good progress thereafter to be nearest on line.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Made contact at start, unable to slot in, trapped very wide slightly behind midfield, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, failed to close off in straight. (Bled.)
Crowded on jumping, raced at tail, 5 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Began well, positioned 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 2 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, finished off very strongly to score.

Shifted out abruptly at start, unable to slot in, trapped very wide, a length or so back, bumped 1000M, took the lead 850M, led by 1/2L on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide at rear, 3 wide from 600M, very wide into straight, one-paced in the run home.
Taken back from gate 11, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made some headway in straight.
Travelled in front of midfield, 2 wide, was one paced and weakened.
Eased back, raced at the rear, remained away from the rail, switched across heels 300M, closed off okay thereafter.
Sat just front of midfield, on rail, weakened near 250M. (See Incident Report)
Jumped awkward, rolled forward to sit outside lead, gave ground in straight. (See Incident Report)
Eased to find cover, in worse than midfield, 2 wide, no daylight until 250M, ran home fairly.
Rolled forward, took box-seat, kept up till about 150M only.
In midfield, remained one off the rail, slightly held near 400M, kicked on until flattened in final furlong.
Slotted into midfield, wide but with cover, kicked away 250M out, ran home a comfortable winner.
Sat just behind midfield, 3 wide with cover, ran on okay.
Bumped start, in midfield, wide and no cover from 1100M, run ended on straightening. (See Incident Report)
Bumped start, forward to take rail and led, emptied near 250M.
Couldn't muster, found cover at rear but wide, made ground and closed off nicely, just no match to winner.
In worse than midfield, wide but with cover, never a factor.
Hard ridden early, was prominent but wide and no cover, flattened passing 150M.
Broke well to share early pace, shifted one back to 3rd passing the 1000 metres, weakened under pressure after straightening.
Began well but soon taken back, some 4L back in 5th rounding home bend, found nothing under pressure in straight.
Settled some 3L back in 4th on the rails, found nothing under pressure in home straight.
Jumped fairly but soon recovered along the rails to join the leaders, took up running 800 metres out, kicked 2L clear over 200 metes out and flattered, caught close to home.
Soon taken back from a wide gate, trailed the field from rounding home bend and widest runner turning into straight, made no further impression.
Settled slightly worse than midfield, soon came to challenge under pressure after straightening, unable to sustain effort and lost placing inside final 120 metres.
Settled in midfield on the rails, came to challenge after straightening, fought on under pressure inside final 250 metres to be nearest at finish.
Settled in last few from a wide gate, never seen with a chance.
Behind midfield in joint 9th on the rails, saved ground on the inside turning for home, ran on well inside final 250 metres to claim victory close to home.
Lost ground at the start settling in last few, obtained a clear run over 200 metres out, finished off the race well.

Soon ridden to lead, obtained 2-wide position coming onto home bend and headed inside the 800 metres, came under pressure from a similar position into straight, folded up quickly inside final 200 metres.

Jumped awkwardly from the widest gate, wide with leaders early before taken back from the 1050 metres, some 4L back in 6th coming onto home bend, remained wide turning in, fought on until finding no extra inside the 100 metres.
Settled behind midfield in joint 9th, switched out for a run entering home straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
Shifted across behind runners, held up at the back about 10s off the pace, niggled along from 800M, widest into straight, found less than expected, ran on to claim non-threatening 3rd.
Tracked leaders on inside, fought well passing 500M on the rain affected ground, no match for winner over final 250M but kept on steadily to hold 2nd spot comfortably.
Strode forward, moved up to the lead near 1200M, steadied the pace middle stages, headed inside 350M, soon faded out of contention.
Held up behind midfield, 7-8Ls back on settling, under pressure 600M out but failed to quicken, ran home only fairly, never a threat to leaders.
Caught wide early stages, 3rd on settling chasing leaders, came under pressure 600M, soon gave ground and finished tailed out. (Unacceptable Performance.)
Taken back from wide draw, reserved near the rear 10Ls back, moved up well on inside rounding home turn, soon quickened to lead passing 350M, kicked clear and maintained a strong gallop to the line.
Chased leaders early stages, went amiss at 850M and was retired from the race. (Left hind fetlock injury.)
Settled behind mid-division, 6Ls off the pace halfway, wide into straight, stayed on without threatening.
Led early stages before taking a trailing spot behind leader from 1200M, no extra passing 300M, weakened towards the line.
Held up towards the rear, shuffled back to last making the turn for home, gave limited response on straightening, never threatened.
Clean jump, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, showed good response early in straight, hit the front 200M, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Fast into stride, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Began well, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, there to turn, angled out after passing 450M, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Away well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, moved a bit closer on turn, no clear running early in straight, cleared 300M, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Began awkwardly, raced at rear on the inside, 7 lengths back, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, cleared 200M, only showed limited response, eased final 50M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, trapped very wide in midfield, moved closer on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place.
Inconvenienced at start, raced at rear on the outside, carried wider 550M, bumped and unbalanced 500M, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, similar position on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening.
Slightly slow out, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4 lengths back, same position on turn, failed to make any progress in straight, eased final 150M.
Bumped the inside gate on jumping, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some headway in straight.
Slowly away, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 550M, bumped 500M, very wide turning in, made some progress in straight.
Shifted out at start, sent forward to take the lead, found rail approaching 900M, led by 1/2L on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, made no progress in straight.

Began smartly, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, easy run on turn, not enough room early in straight, squeezed through gap inside final furlong, hit the front 100M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Bumped start, raced 3 wide with cover, 4 lengths or so back, crowded near 900M, same margin back on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, 5 lengths back on turn, made some headway early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 7 lengths back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the outside, 7 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, weakened early in straight.
Shifted out at start and made contact, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, shared lead on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, kept on same pace to the line.
Bumped on jumping, sent forward to take the lead, shared the lead with rival on turn, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened 300M, eased final furlong.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter.

Bumped on jumping, raced towards rear on the outside, commenced move after passing 550M, made very good progress in straight, took the lead approaching 100M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
Lifted front feet on jumping, positioned a length behind the leader, travelled well to turn, ridden after passing 300M, challenged the leader 200M, peaked 100M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Moderately away from gate 12, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, 2 wide on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened final 100M.
Moderately away, positioned on rail slightly better than midfield, saved ground on turn, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Jumped with them, raced 2 to 3 wide towards rear, found rail near 650M, 7 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Inconvenienced at start, raced at tail, 8 lengths or so back, moved closer on turn, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Jumped well, raced better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths or so back, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Taken back from gate 8, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Began well, trapped 3 wide, a length or so back, 2 wide after passing 1500M, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight. (Bled.) (See Racing Incidents.)
Quickly into stride, sent forward to take the lead, headed near 850M, peaked on turn, weakened gradually in straight.
Average to begin, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, 9 lengths back on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 8 lengths back on turn, finished off strongly to take a place.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield early, commenced move after entering the back straight, took the lead 850M, led by 5 lengths on turn, kept on very well in straight, easily scored.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, 6 lengths back turning in, one-paced in the run home.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the outside, 9 lengths back on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame.
Jumped well, raced 3 wide in mid-division, no cover for the majority of the race, 6 lengths back on turn, made minor progress early in straight, no extra final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slightly slow out, raced in midfield on the inside, 7 lengths back on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Moderately away, positioned 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 6 lengths back turning in, closed off well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, never improved.
Eased to sit just off the leaders, 2 wide, emptied 400M.
Eased to sit in midfield, 2-3 wide, progressed steadily 300M to score.
Pushed early but not muster, at back on the rails, made early move 700M, ran on well for 2nd.
Slow away, at back, no dash, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Pushed to take rail and lead, ran on until 100M weakened.
Eased to sit in front of midfield, on the fence, made ground 200M.
Eased at start, 2-3 wide, ran on ok, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
At back, 2 wide, made ground 200M.
At rear from a wide barrier, 3 wide but with cover, one paced only.
At rear, 2 wide, swung widest on Straightening, showed strong dash in the Straight and finished 3rd.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, only one paced.
At rear, along the rail, made minor ground in the Straight.
Settled in midfield, wide no cover, kept on going to scored by a neck.
At rear, 2 wide, did not feature in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, only weakened in the last 50M.
Raced behind the leader after 1050M, along the rail, stayed on but only headed in the last 30M.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail after 1050M, weakened only in the last 50M.
Raced in midfield, 3 wide but with cover, ran on strongly in the last 50M.
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail, not competitive.
Raced in front of midfield, 2 wide, lost ground in the Straight. Unacceptable performance. Must trial (See incident report)
Had a nice run 1,1 throughout. Peaked on effort mid-straight, raced tight between runners near 100m mark before weakening out in final stages to be second last.

Trapped racing three wide without cover just behind the leading pair. Continued not far behind mid-straight before being hampered & losing rightful running at the 100m mark but looked beaten at that stage.
Had a nice run on leaders back throughout. Weakened out in the straight & was last.

Hampered at start before racing worse than midfield along rail. Moved away from the rail passing 400m, wider on straightening, shifted back inwards mid-straight before racing in restricted room until inside final 75m.
Pushed forward to lead. Raced over a length clear soon after straightening, held lead until caught by fast finishing winner in final stages.
Raced just worse than midfield away from rail. Ridden along passing 600m, wider on bend before closing strongly in the final furlong to steal advantage away from the leader in final stages.

Had a nice run in midfield away from rail throughout. Eased wider on cornering, closed off steadily in the straight before shifting in near the 100 mark when moving to 4th place in later stages. Rider suspended – see report.
Crowded & lost ground at start before improving along rail to race in midfield. Stayed close to the rail in the straight & finished off evenly to midfield without threatening.

Ridden forward from outside gate to improve & race outside lead for the majority. Continued in second but dropped over a length from the lead entering last section before weakening a couple of lengths in final stages.

Bumped & badly hampered at start before racing rearward away from the rail. Shifted very wide approaching bend, bumped on straightening when continuing at the back before finishing off only moderately down the outside.

Threw head at the start & lost a length, raced last early before third last along rail from 500m. Shifted wider & bumped on straightening before making significant late ground down the outside to snare third late.

Steadied & shifted rearwards after start before being relegated to last near 700m when continuing to be restrained. Stayed close to rail on straightening, shifted out mid-straight before closing evenly under no riding late.
Jumped well, raced 3 wide behind midfield, bumped near 600M, commenced move 400M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score.

Taken back from a wide draw, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, showed good response in straight, hit the front near 125M, kept on well but unable to hold off the first two late.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced prominently on the inside, shared lead on turn, bumped early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Jumped well, raced prominently, 2 wide, shared lead on turn, bumped 300M, peaked 200M, weakened thereafter.
Bumped start, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved round on turn, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Taken back to race towards rear on the inside, 4 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, finished off strongly to make frame, nearest on line.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, made contact near 600M, 4 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Clean jump, raced in mid-division on the outside, gradually dropped position in the middle stages, 6 lengths back turning in, passed a few beaten rivals in straight.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, there to turn, angled out 350M, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line. (Lost right front plate in the middle stages.)
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced in midfield on the outside, there to turn, angled out early in straight, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a neck.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear, 6 lengths back on turn, made some progress in straight.

Jumped well from gate 11, trapped very wide, a length or so back, moved a bit closer 650M, raced 3 wide outside leaders on turn, kept on well early in straight, hit the front 200M, peaked and headed 125M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began awkwardly, sat in front of midfield, on rail, ran on well for 3rd.
Jumped well before easing into midfield, wide with cover, never in it.
Settled in midfield, along the rail, ran on fair-ly to the line.
Raced in advance of midfield, 2 wide, ran on okay until flattened near 100M.
Niggled along, prominent but trapped wide, emptied passing 200M.
Raced towards the rear, on rail, kept going until weakened in the last 100M.
Hard ridden, settled in midfield only, 2 wide, was one paced.
Jumped awkward, at rear, 3 wide at turns, hampered 150M, wasn't picking up anyway.
Jumped well, shared lead before easing to be in box-seat, switched to centre track in straight, kicked on to finish 2nd.
Slow to jump, at tail and made turns 2 wide, improved steadily on the outside.
Sent forward, assumed lead outright by 600M turn, continued on nicely to win by 3/4L.
Awkward start, in worse than midfield, 2 wide, didn't improve.

Recovered quickly from moderate start, gradually shifted back to 5th some 4L back passing the 900 metres, renewed pressure home bend and wide into straight, fought on under pressure but found no extra inside final 50 metres.
Settled worse than midfield, dropped further back passing the 600 metres, fought on nicely in straight without threatening. (Lame)
Close up early, carried over 4L back to 6th passing the 900 metres, drifted over 6L back when pace quickened onto home bend, forced to switch in for a run inside 250 metres, fought on steadily.
Soon dropped to tail-end, commenced move rounding home bend, switched out widest entering home straight, ran on well down stands side to be nearest at finish.
Amongst leaders early, gradually settled one back in 3rd inside the 900 metres, drifted some 3L back when pace quickened rounding home bend, hit the front briefly over 200 metres out but soon headed.
Ridden from a wide gate to be up with the pace, disputed lead 2-wide from the 850 metres, quickened with race leader coming onto home bend, dropped away quickly inside final 200 metres.
Crowded at start, settled well behind, saved ground turning for home but made no impression in straight.
Began well from the one draw, gradually taken back off the pace settling over 3L back in 4th, saved ground turning in for home, quickened well to hit the front over 150 metres out to win readily.
Moderate start from the widest gate settling wide without cover towards rear, swung very wide into straight, ran on under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Settled mainly in midfield, came under pressure rounding home bend, fought on steadily down the centre of the straight without threatening.
Broke well but soon dropped behind midfield on the rail, fought on nicely without threatening.
Hard ridden from moderate start to take up running 1000 metres out and obtained rails run shortly after, quickened up the pace coming onto home bend, found no extra inside final 300 metres.
Stumbled at the start, from draw 11 raced wide no cover chasing the leaders, came under pressure 500M, soon gave ground.
Never far off the pace, 5th on settling, swung to center of track leaving home turn, stayed in contention for a minor placing until no extra late stages.
Restrained to race at the rear, 7Ls off the pace on settling, made limited progress on straightening, always held by leaders.
Began only fairly from draw 1, recovered to track leader on inside, not quickened when pushed along 450M, no threat 200M from home, dropped away.
From draw 12 drifted back to race at the rear 6-7Ls behind leader, waited with on inside, finished off strongly passing 300M, got up near 50M to score his 6th win in the season.
Shifted across behind runners for cover, settled towards the rear, raced keenly middle stages, closed off well passing 400M, just held by first 2 late.
Obtained outright lead passing 1400M, kept on well when placed under pressure early straight, caught by winner near 50M, held on for 2nd.
Jumped on terms, settled down midfield along the fence, driven near 400M, stayed on moderately to line, held by first 3 at the finish
Settled towards the rear 5-6Ls off the pace, swung wide into straight, stayed on fairly to line, never a threat to leaders.
Obtained a 3-wide spot in midfield, struggled to keep up home turn, already beaten turning into straight.
Restrained in midfield 2-wide, travelled keenly in middle stages, failed to respond passing 300M, never reached contention. (Blood in trachea.)
Tracked leader on outside, bustled along 600m to keep up with the pace, no extra 250M, weakened away.

Jumped well from the widest draw, raced 2 wide better than midfield, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, no clear run and inconvenienced near 150M, weakened thereafter.
Moderately away from gate 11, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, found rail near 550m, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, 2 wide after passing 500M, finished off very strongly to score.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced in midfield on the outside early, dropped towards rear after passing 1000M, 8 lengths back on turn, one-paced in the run home.
Slowly away, raced at rear, 8 lengths or so back, moved a bit closer on turn, made very good progress in straight to take a place.
Moderately away, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 125M, weakened thereafter.
Taken back to race 2 wide towards rear, there to turn, passed some tired runners in straight.
Began awkwardly, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved round on turn, showed some response early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened final 100M.
Taken back from gate 9, raced 3 wide behind midfield, there to turn, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, carried wider after passing 500M, closed off well to take 2nd.
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, 5 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, taken wide in straight and finished off well to make frame.
Taken back to race slightly behind midfield on the inside, angled out approaching 600M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, closed off well to make frame.
Away with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider after passing 700M, very wide turning in, made some headway in straight.

Inconvenienced at start, raced better than midfield on the outside early, sent forward on the 1st turn, took the lead 1550M, led by 2Ls in the middle stages, challenged turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from gate 13, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out 600M, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, one-paced in the run home.
Jumped with them, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, angled out approaching 600M, 4 wide turning in, showed good response early in straight, peaked on run 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Began well, raced 2 wide, 2 to 3 lengths back, moved closer on turn, showed good response early in straight, took the lead 300M, headed 250M, kept on well to take a place.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 11 lengths back, moved closer along the rail on turn, finished off evenly.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide towards rear, wider turning in, inconvenienced 500M, made some progress in straight.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground to turn, showed limited response early in straight, peaked 250M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the early lead, headed 1550M, 2nd in the middle stages, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Moderately away from the widest draw, raced at rear, 9 lengths or so back, closer on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Clean jump, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move after passing 700M, very wide into straight, took the lead 250M, headed 150M, kept on well to the line, just beaten by a head.
Average to begin, positioned on rail in midfield, angled out approaching 600M, showed very good response after turning in, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 4 wide throughout, no progress, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Slow away, hard ridden to obtain a midfield position in midfield, 3 wide, progressed steadily 300M for 2nd.
Slow away, at back, blocked most straight, made steady ground, sustained right front tendon injury on the day after racing.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, closed off strongly to score.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, emptied 300M, on heels 150M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Never a factor, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Pushed to secure box seat, blocked most straight, made steady ground.
Hard ridden early but not muster, 3-4 wide at back, progressed steadily 300M.
At back, 3 wide, made ground 200M.
Very slow away, detached at rear, dashed strongly 200M.
Hard ridden to take rail and lead, out of fuel 250M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Hard ridden early, midfield, 2 wide, lack room 300M, made ground, attempted to savage another runner in straight.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, showed strong dash in the last 150M and finished 4th.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, lay out in the Straight, weakened in the last 200M. (See incident report)
Sent forward, wide no cover, kept on going in the early part of the Straight but one paced in the last 50M.
Raced in behind midfield, 3 wide but with cover, pretty one paced.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, made ground and closed of well to the line.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, made ground and kept on going to score.
Sent forward, 2 wide, gave ground after passing 250M.
Settled in behind the lead, along the rail, weakened in the last 100M.
At rear, 3 wide but with cover, swung widest on Straightening, made minor ground only thereafter.
At rear, along the rail, did not featured.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, battled on to the line to take 2nd.
At rear and detached in the early stages, nothing in the Straight.
Raced second, away from rail throughout. Moved up to be only a neck behind entering the final section, continued close all the way & was beaten under a length in a very bunched finish.
Had nice run 1,1 throughout. Moved up to be within a neck of the lead entering the final section & closed off steadily all the way to line to be beaten under a length in a very bunched finish.
Raced in midfield on rail throughout. Moved off the rail approaching the final corner, straightened about 4L from the lead, had limited room between runners in the final 150m & wasn't tested late.
Raced on leaders back. Stayed close to rail on straightening when only 1L from lead, closed well all the way to line & was only beaten a neck in third.

Slow to begin but mustered speed & raced just worse than midfield along the rail. Moved off the rail passing 700m, shifted to be the widest passing the 400m mark before finishing steadily to the line.

Steadied at start & shifted back to race third last. Continued rearward on straightening when 5.5L from lead before shifting inwards mid-straight & closing well to be only 1.5L behind on line in very bunched finish.

Trapped racing three wide without cover in midfield after the start. Got some cover near the 650m, forced wider on straightening when just under 3L behind before closing well all the way to line to be beaten under a length.

Raced in midfield between runners throughout. Eased wider on straightening, entered last section under 3L from the lead, emptied at 250m mark & weakened out. Rider questioned, mucus in trachea post-race. See report.
Pushed forward to lead, set very slow sections in first half, straightened with a 1L advantage, looked challenged at the furlong mark but dug deep to hold off unlucky second in a very bunched finish.

Raced worse than midfield away from rail. Eased wider passing 600m, wider again on straightening, entered last section just under 4L behind before closing off well all the way to line to get within half a length on line.

Raced in midfield away from rail. Moved three wide without cover at the 650m, forced 4 wide on straightening when under a length from the lead, weakened in final stages but not beaten far despite second last.

Drifted back to race rearward. Moved three wide near 600m, only had one runner behind entering final section, finished off steadily in the run to the line to be beaten under 2L in a very bunched finish.

Raced in midfield on rail. Straightened just over a length from the lead. Held up for clear running for the majority of the straight before diving through between runners in final stages to miss by a narrow margin.

Steadied & got back to last. Continued last, over 6L from the lead on straightening before shifting outwards & closing off well from the back to be beaten about a length in midfield in very bunched finish.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths back on turn, finished off evenly.

Began well from gate 1, raced prominently on the inside, took the lead 700M, challenged by rival after passing 500M, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Began fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, showed no early speed, raced at tail, 9 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Crowded on jumping, raced towards rear on the outside, 6 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, 3 wide, headed near 700M, weakened on turn, eased early in straight.
Moderately away, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 400M, closed off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced prominently, 2 wide, challenged the leader turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked 125M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly and made contact, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, made good progress in straight to take 2nd.
Began well, raced 2 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened and eased inside final furlong.
Average to begin, raced 3 wide, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, finished off very strongly to score.
Crowded after start, recovered to sit outside lead, stayed on until 200M only.
Slotted into behind midfield, wide but with cover, swung wide into the straight, never threaten.
Settled in one-out one-back position, one paced before kicking home late.
Bumped shortly after start, took to rail and be in behind midfield, never a factor.
Travelled in about midfield, along the rail, dashed on until emptied passing 300M.
Took back, raced at the rear and on rail, improved slightly in run home.
Took back, at tail and was detached, 9L off at turn exit, made nice ground and ran home strongly. (See Incident Report)
Missed start badly, took no active part, must trial. (See Incident Report)
Ridden forward, prominent but wide throughout, gave ground from on straightening.
Raced in front of midfield, wide but with cover, ran on only one paced.
Travelled in midfield, 2 wide, kept going in straight to take 2nd but was no match.
Asked out of the barriers and led on the rail, ran home pretty much unchallenged to win by 2L.
Crowded after start, in worse than midfield, 2 wide, dashed on early before flattening late.
Forward, was prominent but wide throughout, weakened on entering the straight.
Settled 3-wide with cover in midfield, lost cover from over 1100 metres out, gained closer approaching home straight, fought on steadily without quickening.
Taken back steadily from a wide gate for cover, settled just worse than midfield 3-wide in 9th, switched wider turning for home, ran on under pressure inside final 200 metres, did best work late.
Taken back to last from the widest gate and waited with, ran on well between runners inside final 350 metres to be nearest at finish.
Niggled along in midfield, awkwardly placed behind runners coming onto home bend, baulked for a run in rear of midfield early in home straight until over 200 metres out, finished off the race well.
Inconvenienced at start, settled towards the rear, tight between runners early in straight, ran on steadily to the line.
Close up early, niggled at at about 1200 metres, over 3L back in 5th rounding home bend, kept on same pace without threatening in straight.

Broke well from the one draw, settled 2 back in 4th on the rail, some 3L off the pace in 4th rounding home bend, renewed effort entering straight, fought on under pressure to just get up in the bobbing of heads.

Moved forward from a wide gate, 3-wide in 3rd before gaining cover about 1000 metres out, hung in different ride early in straight, ran on under pressure to hold every chance only to be pipped at post.
Bumped at start, settled in midfield on the rails, weakened under pressure after straightening.
Ridden forward to dispute lead after the first 200 metres, refused to settle alongside race leader between 1150 and 800 metres, dropped out of contention under pressure inside final 400 metres.
Failed to muster and travelled well behind from a wide gate, wide in last few most of the way before dropping to last into straight.

Ridden to lead from a wide gate, obtained rails run over 1200 metres out, maintained narrow advantage in the attempt to make all, travelled greenly shifting ground and a difficult ride in home straight, headed inside 50 metres.
Ridden early before settling for rear position on the rail, in similar position entering home straight, fought on well between runners inside final 300 metres.

Slightly slow out, gradually recovered along the rails to just worse than midfield, gained further closer making home turn, folded up quickly inside final 200 metres. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Showed customary early speed to lead, travelled comfortably to 300M, responded well when asked, always doing enough late stages to hold on.
Moved forward to be one-out-one-back behind eventual winner, held by that rival from 400M, lost 2nd 75M out, held on well for 3rd.
From draw 1 went forward chasing leader, held ground early straight before fading away over final 200M.
Gradually taken back to a rearward spot, caught 4-wide throughout the race, failed to pick up on straightening, never involved.
Began only fairly, caught wide no cover chasing leaders, weakened passing 400M, soon out of contention.
Not hurried after the start, settled at the rear early stages before moving up to race behind midfield, kept on only fairly on straightening, never dangerous.
Unable to slot in from draw 13, caught 4-wide no cover in midfield, tried hard on straightening, kept on steadily to take 4th. (Jockey and Trained questioned re riding tactics.)
From wide draw dropped back to the rear, no closer than 3-wide throughout, driven along 400M, ran home moderately and never reached leaders.
Tracked leaders, raced keenly passing 1500M, not quickened when driven inside 400M, battled on same pace to line.
Given a waiting ride near the rear, 4-5Ls off the pace on settling, made limited progress passing 400M, never likely.
Held up 3-wide mid-division, couldn't go on passing 400M, soon left behind.
Reserved behind mid-division, finished off final 400M fastest but couldn't quite get to the winner.
Reserved in midfield off the fence, not quickened when driven out early straight, never near enough to challenge.
Taken across behind runners, held up near last 4-5Ls off the pace, responded only fairly early straight, no extra 200M out.
Average to begin, positioned on rail slightly better than midfield, saved ground to turn, unable to obtain clear running early in straight, cleared near 150M, closed off well to make frame.
Jumped well from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L on turn, peaked and headed 300M, weakened thereafter.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, 1/2L back on turn, hit the front 300M, peaked and headed 150M, weakened gradually final 100M, finished 3rd.
Shifted in at start and made contact, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths back, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Bumped and unbalanced shortly after start, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress early in straight, not clear run inside final furlong.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 8 lengths back, slightly improved on turn, very wide into straight, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Bumped shortly after start, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths back on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Slightly slow out and crowded, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths or so back on turn, made minor progress early in straight, not enough room final 100M.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed some response early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide towards rear, 3 wide from 650M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 250M, finished off strongly to be nearest on line.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, there to turn, weakened early in straight. (Bled.)
Shifted out at start, raced 3 wide better than midfield, no cover throughout, moved closer on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Moderately away from a wide draw, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, same position on turn, finished off well to take 2nd.
Commenced well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, 1/2L back on turn, took the lead early in straight, kept on well but still headed final 100M, lost 2nd close home.
Bumped start, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground to turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 150M, one-paced thereafter.
Began awkwardly and bumped, positioned on rail in midfield, angled out 550M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, made no progress thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home without threatening.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 2 wide better than midfield, angled out 500M, challenged the leader early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from gate 11, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared near 150M, made no progress thereafter.
Jumped well from the widest draw, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover on turn, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly thereafter.
Began awkwardly, raced 2 wide towards rear, wider turning in, made no progress in straight.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, wider turning in, showed good response early in straight, peaked on run near 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Shifted out on jumping and made contact, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
Taken back from gate 13, raced at tail, 9 lengths back, closer on turn but still the last into straight, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Slightly inconvenienced at start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L on turn, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final 300M.

Out in line, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out after passing 550M, switched towards outside for clear run 300M, showed very good response, hit the front 100M, kept on strongly to the line, easily scored.
Bumped start, positioned on rail slightly better than midfield, 2 wide turning in, unable to obtain clear running until approaching final 100M, made some progress thereafter.
Taken back from gate 8, raced 2 wide towards rear, 4 lengths back on turn, made no progress in straight.
Slowly away, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground throughout, kept on well early in straight, peaked on run 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Crowded on jumping, raced at rear on the outside, moved a little bit closer after entering the back straight, very wide turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
Crowded on jumping, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, 2 wide after passing 900M, same margin back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away, raced in midfield on the outside, 2 lengths or so back on turn, outpaced by the first two early in straight, kept on evenly for modest 3rd.
Clean jump, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, 3/4L back, same position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.
Jumped well from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well in straight to hold off the challenger late.
Average to begin, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, easy run to turn, finished off strongly, just beaten by a nose. (Jockey dropped whip 25M.)
Slow away, midfield along the fence, no progress.
Hard ridden to take rail and lead, weakened 250M.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, blocked most straight, ran on ok.
Eased at start, 2-4 wide, made steady ground 300M.
Failed to muster, behind midfield, 2-3 wide, no progress.
Box seat, weakened 200M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Pushed forward, 2 wide, no dash.
Hard ridden early, midfield, 2-3 wide, progressed steadily 300M.
Trapped 3 wide in front of midfield, made steady ground 400M to score.
Pressed forward, sat 2 wide, emptied 350M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Very slow away, took rail at back, lack room 4-2, made ground when clear.
Eased back, 2 wide, progressed steadily 300M.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, pretty one paced. (See incident report)
At rear, along the rail, made no ground in the Straight.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, eased down after passing 150M. (See incident report)
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, made ground strongly and finished 3rd.
Sent forward and raced next to the leader, along the rail, kept on going but weakened in the last 50M.
At rear, 2 wide, swung widest on Straightening, made ground and win by a short-head.
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail, closed off well to the line.
Sent forward, 2 wide, flattened passing 150M.
Raced in behind the lead, along the rail, battled on to the line to take 2nd.
Raced midfield away from rail. Moved three wide with cover near 700m, 4 wide approaching the corner, dashed well to move to lead near 200m & continued on to win by just over a length.
Raced on leaders for the majority. Stayed along the rail on straightening, was finishing only one paced until peaking on effort & weakening in last 100m.
Was trapped racing three wide without cover outside the leaders throughout. Was beaten before straightening & then weakened badly in the straight to be long last.
Steadied, taken back to second last after start. Shifted away from the inside entering the final section, held up near the 250m, shifted outwards further at 150m before finishing off steadily late.
Raced midfield away from rail. Finished off steadily in the straight to be beaten only 2L.
Had a nice run 1,1 throughout. Did little in the straight & weakened out to be second last.
Crowded & lost ground at the start & raced near the rear. Forced wide passing the 400m mark, was the widest runner on straightening before finishing off steadily down the outside to midfield.
Pushed forward to race outside the lead. Continued not far behind before being over-run in final 150m, not beaten far in midfield.

Crowded & lost a length at start before racing third last away from rail. Moved into three wide line near 600m, was very wide around the home bend before closing strongly down the outside to move to second in late stages.
Steadied & taken back to the rear. Stayed close to the rail on straightening when a clear last, made some late ground between runners in the final 150m to not be beaten far in midfield on line.
Pushed forward to lead. Headed by winner nearing the 200m mark before weakening out poorly in last furlong to be third last.

Crowded at start before improving to race in midfield away from rail. Moved away from inside on straightening, dashed well between runner son straightening, bumped mid-straight before closing off well to third late.
Slightly slow out, raced at rear on the outside, 8 lengths back, there to turn, made no impression in straight.
Average to begin, showed no early speed, raced at tail, 11 lengths back, still well back on turn, made good progress early in straight, not enough room final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Clean jump, sent forward to take the lead, enjoyed the easy lead to turn, kept on well in straight and scored.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced towards rear on the inside, 9 lengths back on turn, made reasonable progress in straight.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide, 7 lengths back, same margin back on turn, very wide into straight, showed limited response early in straight, eased final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 4 lengths back, angled out 350M, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Began well from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground throughout, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching 200M, finished off well to take a place without threatening.
Out with rest, raced slightly behind the midfield on outer, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, 3 lengths back on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Moderately away, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased inside final furlong.
Settled to race in box-seat, no turn of foot and emptied in the latter stages.
Bumped start, sat behind midfield, wide but with cover, ran home nicely to take 2nd.
Settled in midfield, along the rail, wasn't in it.
Raced in about midfield, 2 deep, widest on exit, stayed on only one paced.
Bumped start, sat one-out one-back, found nothing in straight. (See Incident Report)
Sent forward, took rail and led, maintained advantage to the line and won by 1-1/4L.
Sat just in front of midfield, wide and no cover, continued on fairly to the line.
In worse than midfield, 2 wide, raced keenly from 900M, did not threaten.
Jumped only fairly, towards the rear, on rail, never a factor.
Bumped start and took back, at tail and on rail, closed off okay late.
Asked along, settled outside lead, stayed on until about 150M only.
Began well from the one draw settling a few lengths off the pace in 5th on the rail, came under pressure to challenge inside the 400 metres, fought on steadily without threatening.
Move forward from a wide gate to chase the lead, travelled alongside race leader throughout far side and around home bend, folded up quickly under pressure inside final 200 metres.
Settled in midfield, steadied behind runner and lost position 900 metres out,4L back in 10th rounding home bend, ran on gamely under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Settled one back mainly in 3rd on the rail, stalked race leader into straight, hit the front under pressure inside the 150 metres, won readily.

Settled in better than midfield in 5th or 6th, closer to lead briefly when pace slackened early in back straight, commenced move 4-wide home bend going wider into straight, fought on nicely without threatening.

Ridden forward steadily from a wide gate, travelled not far off the slow pace in 3rd or 4th, came under pressure when 5th 3-wide within 2L of pace on home bend, weakened under pressure after straightening.
Settled in rear, became last 750 metres out, came under pressure rounding home bend and saved ground turning in, kept on same pace.
Settled at the back, made swift progress against the slow tempo from the 800 metres, reached the leaders 4-wide coming onto home bend, unable to sustain effort inside final 200 metes.

Taken back towards rear, restrained in similar position early in back straight in the slow tempo, switched 4-wide for a run rounding home bend, widest of all turning in, fought on steadily without threatening.
Settled towards rear on the rail, held up in the slow tempo most of the way to the top of home bend, saved ground turning for home, one-paced on the rail.
Quickly switched in for rails run after start, travelled keenly in the slow tempo in 7th in back straight, about 3L back when pace quickened around home bend, kept on under pressure in straight.
Took up running from the widest gate, set a slow tempo until quickened up the pace from approaching the Rock, came under pressure to resist challenge 500 metres out but headed inside the 150 metres.
Caught wide from draw 10 until shifting in to race behind leaders 850M, failed to quicken on straightening, soon weakened to finish last.
Reserved in midfield along the 2-path, taken wide 400M to challenge, ran on strongly under pressure, went head to head with eventual winner from 200M, just held at the line.
Began awkwardly, raced keenly early stages, led nearing 800M, came under pressure early straight then weakened 200M from home.
Switched off to last from wide draw, 6Ls to make up 400M, badly held up for clear running until 200M, closed off nicely to go 5th near line.
Began well from draw 1, soon restrained to a position ahead of midfield, had no clear running early straight, ran on without threat final 150M.
From wide draw taken across behind runners, settled towards the rear along inside, held up for clear running until near 200M, responded well and was just beaten in a close finish.
Jumped on terms, caught wide no cover until shifting in to race outside the lead near 600M, no extra 250M, weakened towards the line.
Chased leaders 2-wide, travelled well into straight, challenged for lead inside 300M before flattening near 150M.
Held up towards the rear 5Ls back, responded only fairly passing 300M, never reach contention.
Pressed along to take early lead, tracked leaders along the fence from 850M, badly held up by a weakening rival turning home and was not able to be tested in the straight.

Settled down midfield along the inside, had difficulty obtaining clear running rounding home turn, quickened well passing 250M, went head to head with rival from mid-straight, just prevailed at the line.
Taken back to race near the rear, swung wide into straight, ran on well from off the pace but was always held by first 3 towards the finish.
Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 4 lengths back on turn, finished off evenly.
Began awkwardly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, similar position on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, still well back on turn, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length on turn, kicked clear early in straight, kept on strongly to the line, easily scored.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, 5 lengths back, same margin back on turn, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Awkward leaving stalls, raced at rear throughout, never in contention.
Lifted front feet on jumping, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, a length back on turn, outpaced by the winner early in straight, kept on evenly to the line.
Jumped well from gate 10, raced 3 wide better than midfield early, got cover after passing 650M, found rail near 550M, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began well from gate 1, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Moderately away, raced towards rear on the outside, 10 lengths back on turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Taken back from gate 9, raced towards rear on the inside, 8 lengths back, saved ground on turn, made some headway in straight.
Taken back to race at tail, 6 to 7 lengths back, moved closer on turn, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on very well to the line and scored.
Began only fairly and bumped, raced in midfield, 3 lengths back, slightly improved on turn, took the lead 300M, peaked and headed 150M, kept on evenly to the line.
Began well from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened thereafter.
Clean jump, raced prominently but 3 wide, 2 wide approaching 800M, unable to maintain position from 700M, eased final 600M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced prominently, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross near 800M, 3 wide on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.

Bumped start and unbalanced, raced towards rear, 5 lengths back, moved closer along the rail on turn, angled out 450M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, made good progress thereafter to take 2nd on line.
At back, unleashed strong finishing efforts 300M.
At back, 2 wide, no progress, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
At back, along the fence, on heels early, dashed well 300M.
Pushed to take rail and lead, made all.
Pushed to secure box seat, held ground in straight.
Settled just off the leader, 2 wide, just held ground in straight.
Raced in midfield, wide no cover, closed off okay in the Straight.
Sent forward and raced next to the leader, 2 wide, one paced after passing 100M.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, nothing in the Straight.
At rear, along the rail, made some ground in the Straight. (See incident report)
At rear, along the rail, made no ground in the Straight.
At rear, 2 wide, out of contention after passing the 200M. Finished tailed out, must trial.
At rear, 3 wide but with cover, never involved. Finished tailed out, must trial.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, closed off strongly to the line in the last 150M to take 3rd.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, only one paced in the Straight.
Sent forward from a wide barrier and took lead, along the rail, kept on going to score.
Raced in front of midfield, 2 wide, weakened passing the 150M.
Raced prominently and behind the leader, along the rail, battled on to the line and beaten by a short-head.
Settled in behind midfield, 2 wide, did not feature.
Steadied after the start, raced a touch wide before moving two wide when negotiating bend near 800m. Closed off well in straight & was caught for 4th on the line. Beaten under 2L.
Raced third away from rail before getting cover and 1,1 position from 600m mark. Emptied out mid-straight & weakened to last. (Lame next-day).

Steadied after the start & taken back to the rear. Continued near the back on straightening when just under 5L from the lead, momentarily held up passing 250m mark before closing off ok between runners in final 100m.

Got back after the start to race worse than midfield between runners. Relegated to last when around 5L from lead entering the last section before making up a few lengths in late stages to be only beaten about 2L in midfield.
Raced in midfield on rail. Shifted off rail on straightening, closed off strongly in final furlong to fall only a nose short on line.

Steadied after start & raced in midfield away from rail. Steadied near 800m & drifted slightly further back, eased three wide near 500m was awkwardly placed behind heels near 400m mark before doing little in the final 300m.

Drifted back after the start but was left racing three wide without cover worse than midfield. Continued wide around bend, straightened 3L behind before closing off ok in the run to the line to be beaten only 2L.
Raced worse than midfield on rail. Stayed close to the rail on straightening before shifting away from rail at 275m mark & closing off well to be third beaten only a length.

Ridden forward after start & improved to lead before crossing to rail near 900m. Joined & headed in lead early in straight, crowded by winner passing 250m mark before finishing off only moderately in late stages.

Raced 4th on the rail in early stages before improving to race on leaders back from the 650m. Moved over the heels of the leading pair passing 400m mark before peaking on effort at 150m & being over-run late.

Began awkwardly & then drifted back to race second last. Shifted to be the widest runner on straightening when 4.5L from the lead before making good late ground down the outside in concluding stages to only be beaten 1.5L.

Pushed forward, crossed & raced leaders back early before moving off rail & racing outside leader from 650m. Moved to lead at soon after straightening, raced over a length clear near 200m, just held off late challenger to win by a nose.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths back, angled out 500M, made some headway in straight.
Crowded on jumping, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Began fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, 6 lengths back, saved ground on turn, made no progress in straight.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, 4 lengths back, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, made some headway final 200M, no threat to the first few.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 lengths back, angled out 500M, made some headway in straight to make frame.
Jumped well, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, 2 wide from 500M, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Began well, positioned 2 wide, 5 lengths back, there to turn, one-paced in the run home.
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, wider turning in, closed off well to take 2nd, just beaten by a head.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear, 8 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made some progress in straight.
Moderately away from gate 11, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, travelled keenly after passing 950M, same position on turn, finished off well to score by a head.
Away with them, positioned on rail, slightly better than midfield, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Began smartly from the widest draw, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two final 50M.
Bumped start, sat front of midfield on centre track, found nothing.
Awkward start, in midfield 1 off the outside rail, lost ground 250M out.
Forward to take outside rail, led, kept on and just hung onto 2nd.
Bumped start, raced towards the rear on stand side, wasn't a factor.
In behind midfield, on standside, did not threaten.
Settled midfield, on centre track, drifted out under pressure, continued on okay.
Raced handy, on standside, dropped off from approaching 200M.
Raced towards the rear, on centre track, dashed on, steadied 125M, then ran on one paced.
Travelled in about midfield, on outside rail, closed off well to the line to win by 1-3/4L.
Forward, part of lead, 2-3 off the outside rail, gradually weakened near 200M.
Fractious in gates, raced towards the rear, 1-2 off the outside rail, no kick.
Crowded start, at rear on centre track, never ran on. (Mucus in trachea)
Raced in advance of midfield, on standside, ran home okay, just missed 2nd late.
Fractious and then crowded at start, at rear along the outside rail, ran home steadily.
Began well, travelled keenly in forward of midfield, gave ground steadily after straightening.
Began well settling within 2L of pace on the rail, closer up in 3rd rounding home bend, hit the front under pressure over 200 metres out, won readily.
Travelled 3-wide without cover in forward of midfield, gave ground gradually after straightening.
Taken well back from a wide gate, ridden along intermittently from the 1300 metres until coming onto home bend, failed to quicken under pressure behind runners the length of the straight.
Gradually taken back from a wide gate, raced keenly in 11th 3-wide until home turn, one of the widest turning in, ran on to be nearest at finish and narrowly miss a placing.
Settled well behind on the rail and waited with, baulked for a run in straight until switched back to the rail inside the 200 metres, finished off the race well.
Settled just worse than midfield after moderate start, baulked behind runners the length of home straight, never tested.
Settled 3-wide with cover just worse than midfield, switched out for a run 500 metres out, made only modest impression under pressure in straight.
Settled in last few on the rail, saved ground turning for home, obtained a run inside the 200 metres, ran on well late to be nearest at finish.
Travelled keenly in one-out-one back position, came to challenge after straightening holding some chance over 200 metres out, outsprinted by winner shortly afterward.
Broke well to lead from a wide gate, obtained rails run over 1100 metres out setting a steady pace to home straight, headed under pressure 250 metres out and swamped for a placing late.
Began fairly but soon picked up along the rail to forward of midfield, saved ground turning for home, kept on in straight until folding up quickly inside final 200 metres.
Began well from the widest gate, travelled 4 wide without cover while shifting backward gradually to midfield 1000 metres out, went wider turning for home, fought on steadily under pressure.
Crowded at start, improved from the 1350 metres to travel alongside race leader rounding home bend, faded steadily under pressure from a similar position into straight.
Came away slow, recovered to race in midfield along the rail, battled on same pace early straight before weakening from 150M.
Chased leaders in 5th, kept on same pace turning for home, never threatened.
Chased leaders in a 3-wide position without cover, fought hard in straight, no match for first 2 over final 200M, held on to 3rd comfortably.
Switched off to race near the rear, 5Ls to make up top of straight, held up 300M-200M before producing a mild late bid, never threatened first 3.
From wide draw steadied early stages to obtain cover, settled last 7Ls off the pace, failed to finish off when driven from 450M.
Began only fairly, restrained to race in midfield, applied pressure 550M, kept on moderately for 4th, always held by first 3.
Raced 3-wide in midfield, travelled keenly near 1300M, bustled along 500M, lacked further response passing 300M.
Dropped back for cover, settled down towards the rear 5-6Ls back, stayed on without threatening leaders in the straight.
Soon led, set slow pace early stages before quickening up tempo from 800M, continued on well in the straight, caught by winner near 100M.
Shifted across behind runners after the start, 5Ls back towards the rear on inside, ran on fairly over final 400M, never dangerous.
Moved up to track leader on outside, found no extra passing 300M, weakened to last.
Tracked the pace on inside, loomed 300M, responded strongly and quickened past the race favorite near 100M to score.
Began awkwardly, raced prominently on the inside, shared lead on turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the challengers final 25M.
Crowded start, raced at tail, 5 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, finished off well without threatening.
Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out approaching 450M, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M.
Slightly inconvenienced at start, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide into straight, made very good progress in the run home, just narrowly beaten.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide from 800M, 3 lengths back turning in, finished off well to take a place, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced at rear on the inside, slightly improved along the rail on turn, made very good progress in straight to score.
Commenced well, raced 3 wide, 1-1/2L back, 2 wide from 800M, same margin back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began awkwardly, positioned on rail in midfield, wider from 600M, finished off evenly.
Crowded start, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 550M, made minor progress in straight.
