Began smartly from the widest draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight, not quite able to challenge.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide from 600M, one-paced in straight.
Jumped with them, sent forward to take the lead, shared the lead with rival on turn, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from gate 11, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out after passing 550M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off strongly to be nearest on line.
Jumped with them, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 500M, made minor progress in straight.
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to race in 2nd, a length back on turn, hard ridden after passing 350M, hit the front 200M, peaked and headed 100M, kept on evenly thereafter.
Clean jump, raced 3 wide slightly behind midfield, moved a bit closer after 800M, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Jumped well, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 900M, 3 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter.
Began well, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, 2 wide from 800M, 2 lengths back on turn, peaked 300M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, commenced move 650M, very wide turning in, made some progress in straight.
Began well, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked on run 300M, weakened thereafter.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 300M, closed off well to take 2nd.
Slightly slow out, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 450M, cleared approaching 300M, finished off strongly to score.
Began fairly, positioned 2 wide, 3 lengths back, there to turn, made good progress early in straight, peaked on run 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began well from the widest draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 6 lengths back on turn, failed to close off in straight.

Made contact shortly after start, trapped 3 wide behind midfield early, sent forward after passing 1450M, took the lead after entering the back straight, 2 wide in the middle stages, headed 350M, kept on well to the line, finished 3rd.
Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide, 6 to 7 lengths back, very wide turning in, made no impression in straight.
Began well from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, angled out 450M, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, positioned 2 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, there to turn, showed some response early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Taken back from gate 10, raced at tail throughout, never a factor.
Out in line, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off very strongly to score. (Dead-heat.)
Away well, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, inconvenienced near 350M, finished off evenly.
Moderately away from gate 11, raced at rear on the outside, commenced move 650M, very wide turning in, finished off very strongly to gain a dead heat victory.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out after passing 350M, made good progress in straight to make frame.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, headed near 950M, 2nd on turn, retook the lead early in straight, peaked and headed 50M, weakened thereafter.
Clean jump, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 wide from 450M, showed limited response early in straight, hampered near 200M, one-paced thereafter.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, just held ground.
Hard ridden early but not muster, at rear, 2 wide, never improved, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Midfield along the fence, just held ground in straight.
Eased at start, 2 wide, made ground 200M.
Box seat, closed off strongly 300M to score.
Midfield, 2 wide, made ground 250M.
Eased back, trapped 4 wide throughout, no progress.
Hard ridden to take rail and lead, overhauled 150M.
Eased back, 2 wide, raced keenly, lack room 4-2, ran on fairly.
Slow away, at back, on the rails, progressed steadily 300M.
Midfield, trapped 3 wide throughout, no dash, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
At rear, along the rail, saved ground but only one paced in the Straight.
Settled in behind the lead, 2 wide, failed to make any progress in the run home.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, saved ground and showed some dash in the early part of the Straight.
Raced behind the lead, along the rail, continued on to the line for 2nd.
Raced in midfield, 3 wide no cover, did not feature. (Blood in trachea)
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, made minor ground in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, along the rail after 550M, made ground steadily to the line.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, dropped off in the last 75M.
At rear, 3 wide but with cover, failed to close off in Straight.
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail, showed minor dash in the last 100M.
Sent forward, along the rail, kept on going to the line and won by a neck margin.
At rear, 2 wide, made ground only in the last 50M.
Crowded after start before being steadied & taken back to second last. Was seven lengths from the lead on straightening before giving a further few lengths to be beaten 10L.

Had nice run in fifth when racing in the clear. Ridden along passing 500m, moved wider at the 400m, sprinted strongly at the 175m before striking lead at 100m & drawing away late. Improved by blinkers first time.
Raced third on the rail throughout. Dashed through to take lead near 200m mark before being passed quickly by winner at the 100m. Finished well clear of third.
Pushed forward to race outside the leader. Peaked on effort at the 200m mark & weakened out thereafter.

Steadied after start & taken back to clear last in early & middle stages. Stayed close to the rail on straightening when continuing last before passing a few rivals when running onto well beaten midfield position on line.

Raced in midfield away from rail. Drifted slightly further back passing the 500m as the field split into two groups. Was wide around bend when about 6L behind before weakening out poorly to long last.
Steadied at start & taken back to last early before racing third last on rail from the 750m. Was 6L from the lead just prior to straightening but gave further ground & was well beaten third last.
Pushed forward to lead. Held lead until joined near the 200m, gave a length or two in late stages to hold well beaten 4th on line.
Raced in midfield on rail. Drifted further back from lead as field split into two approaching the final corner, gave a few lengths relative to lead in the straight & was well beaten.

Pushed forward from gate 9 before getting position 1,1 after first bend. Eased three wide just prior to straightening, moved to third near 100m & finished off ok to hold that place on line but was no match for first two.
Away well, raced prominently but 3 wide, 2 wide from 800M, 2nd on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Taken back from gate 10, raced at rear, 6 lengths back on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Began awkwardly and hampered, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Began only fairly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, made some progress in straight.
Began well, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, made minor progress in straight.
Commenced well, taken back to race 2 wide at rear, 5 lengths back on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Shifted in at start, raced in midfield on the outside early, dropped to rear in the middle stages, 4 lengths or so back on turn, made minor progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, tracked leaders, 2 wide, found rail near 800M, sat right behind the leader on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Shifted in at start, showed very good speed, took the lead easily, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on very well in straight to hold off the challengers.
Hampered start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame, not quite able to challenge.
Began well from the widest draw, raced 3 wide, 1-1/2L back, no cover throughout, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a neck.
Clean jump, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, moved a bit closer on turn, made no progress in straight.
Hard ridden early, took rail and led, looked likely until ran down by winner late, settled for 2nd.
Raced close to the rear, 2 wide, improved steadily in the straight.
Niggled along, eventually outside lead by 800M, stayed on okay before flattening late.
Bumped start, taken to rail and raced in behind midfield, was pretty one paced.
Bumped start then taken back, at tail and made turns along the rail, ran on without threatening.
In midfield, 2 wide, found nothing. (See Incident Report)
Raced one-out one-back, chased leaders down on centre track and closed off strongly to win by 3/4L.
Bumped start, eased to race towards the rear, wide but with cover, swung widest and wasn't a bad run home.
Jumped only fairly, quickly taken to rail and improved to midfield, run home was fairly even.
In about midfield, wide but with cover, didn't save ground in the straight.
Jumped well before settling in box-seat, continued on to the line to take 3rd.
Sat just front of midfield, wide however, showed no turn of foot.

Broke well, took up running narrowly coming onto first bend setting a slow tempo, quickened up the pace from approaching the Rock but headed by eventual winner 500 metres out, found no extra upon straightening.
Settled in rear on the rail from a wide gate, came under pressure when dropped to last 600 metres out, weakened further after straightening.
Settled towards rear in 9th from the widest gate, commenced move inside the 600 metres making headway 4-wide rounding home bend, one-paced under pressure in straight.

Soon taken back to midfield, travelled keenly in the slow tempo rounding first bend, drifted back towards rear when pace quickened inside the 800 metres, 3rd last into straight, kept on steadily without quickening.

Quickly recovered from moderate start to prominent position, shifted over 2L back in 5th approaching back straight, failed to quicken with pace rounding home bend, produced good late impression closing stages.

Began well from the one draw, travelled keenly over 3L back in 6th in the slow tempo, quickened with the pace rounding home bend, switched in for a run shortly after straightening, produced good late impression.
Settled at the back from a wide gate, trailed the field to the 600 metres, widest of all into home straight, made no further impression.
Began well from the middle draw and soon came to join the leader, taken one-out-one-back for cover early in back straight, came under pressure and went wide turning for home, kept on at the one pace.
Restrained well behind and travelled wide without cover, made rapid progress from the 750 metres to take up running 500 metres out, gained some 2L clear into straight, just held on to the line.

Settled in rear of midfield, carried backward to last few at about 600 metres out, renewed effort making final turn and saved ground hugging the rail, ran on well under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Held up one back in 3rd on the rail in the slow tempo, baulked behind race leader rounding home bend, gradually faded under pressure
Driven forward from a wide gate travelling wide without cover in early stages, came forward to dispute lead inside the 1000 metres, soon weakened after straightening.
Not hurried after the start, taken across behind runners, settled near last 6Ls off the pace, found nothing turning into straight. No impression leaders.
Badly crowded for room on jumping, travelled ahead of midfield, caught 4-wide no cover on settling, kept on without threat turning into straight.
From wide draw taken back to last after the start, always at rear, never going the pace to challenge.
From draw 12 dropped back to near last, switched to 4-wide making the home turn, stayed on without threat, passing beaten horses only.
Pressed along early, chased leaders in a 3 wide spot without cover, struggled to keep up 550M, soon out of contention.
Urged along to take up a midfield spot, 4th turning into straight, kept on one paced to the line, always held.
Taken back from wide draw, settled 3-wide towards the rear, didn't respond to riding from 400M, plodded home.
Quickly into stride, led uncontested, commenced to quicken top of straight and soon clear from pursuers, well in control going into final 100M.
From draw 1 asked to take up a trailing position behind leaders, 3rd at 400M, tried hard but couldn't close the gap on first 2 in the run home.
Dropped back to a position towards the rear, driven along 400M, failed to pick up speed. Never involved.
Caught wide early before slotting into a position behind midfield just before home turn, had difficulty obtaining clear running early straight, ran on mildly over final 200M, no threat to leaders.
Began awkwardly, soon recovered to track leader (the eventual winner), no match for that rival from 300M, held on for 2nd well.

Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well in the middle stages, shared the lead with rival on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened and eased thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)

Bumped shortly after start, raced better than midfield on the outside early, moved closer after entering the back straight, shared lead on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Away with them, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide on turn, closed off well to take 2nd.
Taken back from gate 11, raced 2 wide towards rear, commenced move after passing 500M, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 700M, commenced move after passing 600M, very wide into straight, made no progress in the run home.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, angled out 400M, made some progress early in straight, short of room near 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Shifted out at start and bumped, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off evenly.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, commenced move 450M, finished off strongly to score.
Bumped start, positioned on rail slightly better than midfield, saved ground on turn, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 50M.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, commenced move 500M, very wide into straight, made good progress in straight to take a place.
Bumped start, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on rail, same margin back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, same position on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Moderately away, raced towards rear, 2 wide, 3 lengths back on turn, one-paced in straight.
Clean jump, raced in midfield on the outside, same position on turn, showed good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear running in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back to race at rear on the inside, 3 lengths back on turn, finished off strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Eased back, trapped 3-4 wide, made early move 600M, run ended 100M.
Hard ridden forward, checked badly 600M, no progress, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Pushed early, midfield, bumped 600M, lack room 400M, just held ground.
At back along the fence, on heels 600M, lack room 4-2, no progress when clear, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Slow away, at back, trapped 4 wide throughout, moved forward 600M, weakened 300M.
Hard ridden to obtain box seat, on heels 600M, lack room 4-2, just held ground.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, closed off strongly, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Slow away, at rear, 2-4 wide, dashed well 300M.
At back, 2 wide, checked early and 600M, dashed well 300M.
Eased to sit in midfield, however trapped wide, moved into the lead 900M, ran on well to score.
Slow away, never competitive.
At rear, trapped 3-4 wide, unleashed strong finishing efforts 300M.
Slow away, at back, 2 wide, lack room 4-2, dashed well when clear.
Midfield, trapped 3 wide, emptied 350M, bled from both nostrils noted after racing.
Sent forward, on stand-side, one paced after passing the 200M.
Raced in front of midfield, on stand-side until passing the 350M, only one paced to the line.
Raced in midfield, on centre-track, showed strong dash in the last 100M and finished 3rd.
Raced in midfield, on stand-side, showed nothing throughout the race.
Sent forward and shared lead, on stand-side, weakened after passing 200M.
Settled in front of midfield, on centre-track, battled on to the line in final two strides and scored by a neck.
Raced in behind midfield, on centre-track, made ground and closed off okay for 4th.
Raced prominently, on stand-side, kept on nicely to the line.
At rear, on centre-track, pretty one paced.
Raced in midfield, on centre-track, pretty one paced.
At rear, on centre-track, did not improve throughout.
At rear, on centre-track, showed some dash in the last 200M.

Raced third away from the rail after shifting across at 1500m (rider suspended) & racing handy thereafter. Straightened 3 lengths from the lead & only maintained that deficit when holding midfield finish.

Came across from second widest gate, raced forward of midfield before being hampered near the 1400m. Eased wider on straightening when 4L behind but failed to improve & weakened to beat only a few home.

Raced rearward hampered passing the 1300m mark before racing worse than midfield. Checked away from heels near the 600m mark, entered last section 6L behind before being badly held up in final 175m mark & was not tested.
Steadied at start & taken last. Was 8L behind on straightening, made up some ground relative to leaders but was still third last, beaten just over 4L.

Didn't begin fast, shifted behind runners to the rail before making ground to midfield. Stayed along rail on straightening when about 5L behind, held up near 100m before closing off strongly into second last 100m.
Didn't begin fast but mustered speed to settle in midfield along rail. Entered last section about 3L behind before failing to improve & weakening slightly to be only 9th.
Raced in midfield before being hampered near the 1200m mark & racing 2 wide thereafter. Was ridden along near the 600m mark before weakening out to last in the straight.
Raced on leaders back early before a pair further back from the 1000m. Straightened 2L from the lead & held that deficit all the way to the line where he was 4th.

Raced near the tail throughout. Ridden long from 550m to get into race, entered last section 8L from lead before making up significant late ground down the outside to be beaten about a length into third.

Raced handy early before being checked near 1400m & racing in midfield before coming under hard ridding near half-way. Entered last section 6L behind before making good late ground to be beaten about 2L in midfield.

Raced wide no cover in midfield early before improving quickly to take lead passing the 1000m mark. Held a length advantage on straightening before joined & headed by the winner near the 200m & weakened out late.

Steadied & taken back after the start before settling 4th last away from rail. Was 8L from lead entering the last section before shifting outwards near 150m to get clear running & closing off steadily from a long way back.
Pushed forward to lead before being headed passing the 1000m mark & racing second. Straightened just over a length from the lead, moved up to take lead at the 200m & continued on well to win.
Shifted behind runners to race near the tail throughout. Was over 9L from the lead entering last section, made up some ground relative to leaders but still only beaten three runners home.
Jumped well from the widest draw, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move 550M, took the lead 200M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Made contact shortly after start, raced prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, weakened early in straight, eased final 150M.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 500M, made no progress in straight.
Made contact shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the outside, commenced move 550M, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Shifted in at start and bumped, sat right behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Bumped start, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching 200M, made no progress thereafter.
Bumped shortly after start, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out 550M, no daylight early in straight, cleared approaching 200M, finished off well to take 2nd.
Out in line, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, angled out approaching 450M, showed good response early in straight, peaked on run 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Began only fairly and bumped, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened final 100M.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, wider from 550M, kept on evenly in straight.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Average to begin, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 500M, finished off very strongly to take a place, nearest on line.
Began fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out 500M, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped only fairly, at rear and shifted away from rail passing 800M, ran on without saving ground.
Jumped awkward, recovered to be in box-seat, held up early before lost ground in the straight.
Bumped start, sat one-out one-back, raced keenly, no daylight till near 300M, only minor dashes before weakened.
Slotted in behind midfield, 2-3 wide all way, made ground in straight, continued on fairly.
Took back, at rear and 2-3 wide, ran on but no dash.
Sent forward, settled outside lead, kicked clear passing 250M, continued on to win easily by 2-1/2L.
Travelled in midfield, 3 wide but with cover, lay in early in straight, continued on well to finish 2nd.
Sent forward, led along the rail, emptied and headed near 200M.
Ridden from the start, trapped wide but prominent, weakened near 300M. (See Incident Report)
Bumped start and lost ground, in behind midfield only, on rail, not competitive.
Bumped shortly after start, settled midfield 2 wide, not cleared until 150M, ran on okay before awkward to heels again late.
Bumped start, then raced towards the rear, on rail, held up early, closed off well once cleared.
Broke well from the widest gate, soon taken back towards rear in 8th, made no impression in straight.
Vied for lead from a wide gate, obtained rails run in front over 900 metres out, led until headed by eventual winner over 200 metres out.
Jumped awkwardly settling in rear on the rail in 9th, did not find much room after straightening until over 200 metres out, quickened well to snatch 2nd final stride.
Slightly slow out settling at the back, trailed the field to the 400 metres, ran on under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Settled just over 2L back in 5th, in similar position turning into straight, did not find much room early on, fought on under pressure without threatening.
Began quickly to be up with the pace, taken one back 2-wide inside the 1000 metres, renewed effort shortly straightening and soon led 300 metres out, fought on under pressure to the line.
Ridden forward early before settling one back on the rail , weakened under pressure inside final 300 metres.
Settled in 6th on the rail just over 3L back, grained slightly closer rounding home bend and baulked for a run early in straight, unable to sustain effort inside final 100 metres.
Niggled at early before settling in 7th over 4L back, shifted out to challenge entering home straight, ran on steadily under pressure but pipped for 2nd late.
Niggled along 3-wide without cover in 4th just over 2L back, remained similar rounding home bend and into straight, kept on under pressure until finding no extra inside final 100 metres.
From draw 14 shifted across behind runners, reserved near the rear along the 3-path, wide into straight, finished off strongly to get up near 100M, won going away.
Guided to a midfield spot along the fence, shifted out to middle of track from 450M for clear running, closed off one paced and never threatened.
Settled just ahead of midfield, never far off from leaders, responded well top of straight to be challenging for the lead 200M, not pace of first 2 over final 150M.
Began awkwardly, up with early pace, 3rd at 600M, had some difficulty obtaining clear running early straight, found little when driven out final 200M.
Slow to muster speed despite ridden along early, caught 3-wide chasing leaders, left with no cover from 600M, challenged for the lead from top of straight before run ended 150M from home.
Taken across behind runners and settled 5Ls back towards the rear, angled out into clear 350M, quickened well to lead inside 200M, caught by winner near 100M.
From wide draw dropped back to race near the rear, 6Ls to make up top of straight, put in a mild bid from 400M to claim a moderate 4th.
Raced keenly behind the speed, failed to quicken on straightening and quickly swamped by rivals 300M. (Jockey: not relaxed in middle stages, made abnormal breathing noise in the straight.)
From draw 9 went forward to chase leaders, caught 3-wide no cover until 600M then vied for the lead on outside, led from 400M to 200M, no extra late stages.
Taken back from wide draw, settled down at the rear 7Ls off the pace, ran on fairly over final 400M passing beaten horses only. Never dangerous.
Began fairly, raced in midfield along the 2-path, lacked instant acceleration turning into straight, stayed on steadily final 200M to go 5th late.
Slotted into a 3-wide spot in midfield, came under pressure 700M and failed to respond to riding, weakened top of straight, eased over final 200M. (Unacceptable Performance.)
Dropped back to race behind midfield, 5Ls to make up leaving the turn, stayed on without threat to leaders.
Positively ridden out the gate, vied for the lead on inside, swamped by rivals passing 300M, weakened to last.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, there to turn, finished off well to take 2nd, always held.
Began smartly, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked on run 300M, weakened thereafter.
Began well, sat right behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, kept on evenly in straight.
Moderately away, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made some progress early in straight, no extra and eased final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from a wide draw, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Slowly away, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, 6 lengths back, same margin back on turn, passed some tired runners in straight.
Began fairly, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, wider turning in, weakened early in straight, eased final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length on turn, kept on very well in straight to hold off the challenger.
Taken back from gate 9, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on the inside, angled out 550M, finished off evenly.

Out in line, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, 3 lengths back on turn, weakened early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lost left hind plate in the early stages.)
Moderately away from gate 12, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, made minor progress in the run home.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 500M, no clear running in straight, not able to test properly.
Bumped start, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased inside final furlong.
Away with them, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, there to turn, angled out early in straight, kept on evenly to 100M, weakened and eased thereafter.
Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the outside, angled out after passing 550M, finished off well to take 2nd.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide better than midfield, steadied off heels near 900M, 2 lengths or so back on turn, no clear running early in straight, cleared approaching 200M, finished off evenly.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, wider from 500M, made minor progress in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back on turn, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home, nearest on line.
Bumped start, raced prominently on the outside, took the lead 750M, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Taken back from gate 11, raced 2 wide towards rear, commenced move after passing 550M, very wide turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, not enough room in straight, unable to test properly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, headed near 750M, 2nd on turn, retook the lead 300M, kept on well but unable to hold off the first two final 50M.
Bumped start and unbalanced, sent forward to take the lead, 2 wide on turn, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths back on turn, one-paced in straight.
Began fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, not enough room early in straight, cleared approaching 100M, finished off evenly.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, checked near 550M, hung out badly on turn, 10 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide slightly behind midfield, no cover for the majority of the race, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home to take a place.
Jumped with them, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Began awkwardly, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 350M, finished off evenly.
Shifted out at start and bumped, positioned 2 wide, 1-1/2L back, there to turn, finished off well to take 2nd.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move after passing 400M, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Fast into stride, raced prominently on the inside, travelled comfortably to turn, took the lead early in straight, kept on well to the line and scored.
Jumped well from the widest draw, taken back to race at rear on the outside, carried wider 500M, well back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Moderately away, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, very wide turning in, closed off well to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Hard ridden to take rail and lead, weakened 200M.
At back, took rail, progressed steadily 300M to score.
Eased to sit in midfield, 2 wide, ran on well for 3rd.
Midfield, progressed steadily 400M.
Slow away, at rear, took rail, no dash.
Slow away, at back 2 wide, made ground around the field in 5 wide from 600M, no progress, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
At back, 2-3 wide, ran on ok in straight.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 3 wide, dropped off 600M, substantial mucus in trachea noted on post-race scoping.
Slow away, pressed forward, 2-3 wide, dropped off 600M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Eased to sit in midfield, trapped 3-4 wide, emptied 500M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Eased to obtain box seat, weakened 250M
Eased back, 2 wide, progressed steadily 250M.
Rolled forward from a wide barrier, 2 wide after 1000M, kept on going to the line and finished 3rd.
At one-out one-back, made some ground but one paced after passing the 50M.
Raced in midfield, 3 wide but with cover after 600M, ran on fairly and finished 4th.
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail, saved ground, closed off nicely and win by 2L.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, lost ground in the Straight.
At rear initially, improved after 800M and raced in front of midfield, wide no cover after 600M, nothing in the Straight.
Settled in behind midfield, 3 wide but with cover, only one paced in the Straight.
At rear, 2 wide, swung widest on Straightening, made minor ground in the Straight only.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, saved ground and ran on well to the finish to take 2nd.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, pretty one paced.
Raced just worse than midfield between runners. Made up a length or two in the straight when passing a few tiring rivals in late stages to finish midfield.
Slow to begin losing 1L & consequently raced second last away from rail. Shifted to be the widest runner on straightening but made no headway & was third last beaten just under 6L.
Obtained lead easily after start. Held lead until passed quickly by winner inside the final 100m before being caught for second in final stride.
Had a soft run in midfield on rail. Moved into clear running before closing off well to be 4th but only a neck behind second on line.
Not fast away, raced third last along the rail. Stayed close to the inside in the straight, made up a length or two when running on from the back but was never a likely winner.

Steadied & taken back at first bend but was caught racing tree wide with cover worse than midfield. Moved 4 wide nearing 400m, wide on straightening before running on steadily down the outside to midfield.
Raced three deep with cover in midfield throughout. Was green on straightening but weakened out badly in final 300m to be a long last. Not a promising debut.

Pushed forward to race outside the leader. Dropped off the leader just prior to straightening when awkward before weakening out badly in the straight. Steadied out of race by rider in last furlong but looked beaten anyway.
Was trapped racing three deep without cover in midfield throughout. Couldn't challenge in final stages after a wide passage & was no threat in midfield.
Had a nice run 1,1 throughout. Wider on straightening before closing off strongly to steal second place narrowly in final few strides.
Raced on leaders back. Got clear running on straightening, dashed quickly to lead at 75m mark & ran away in late stage to win easily.
Restrained after start & taken back to a clear last after start. Was a clear last on cornering before making up a length to be beaten about 5L after being a long way behind the whole race.
Slightly slow out, raced at rear on the inside, 7 lengths back on turn, showed some response early in straight, not enough room 200M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Made contact start, raced 2 wide at rear, 6 lengths or so back on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared near 100M, made some progress thereafter.
Began well, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off evenly.
Moderately away from the widest draw, sent forward to take the lead, enjoyed the easy lead to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed near 100M, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from gate 11, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, finished off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths back on turn, made some progress in straight, not enough room near 150M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, wider after passing 400M, made some headway early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced in 2nd, 2 lengths back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased final 100M. (Lost right front plate after the race.)
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off very strongly to score.
Inconvenienced at start, raced towards rear on the outside, commenced move 400M, very wide turning in, finished off very strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a neck.
Shifted out at start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 lengths back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Forward to take rail and led, kept finding to the line, won by 1-1/4L.
Jumped well, settled front of midfield, 2 wide, bumped 500M, no turn of foot.
Rolled forward, took box-seat with ease, kept on well to the line to finish 2nd, 1-1/4L behind.
Travelled in midfield, along the rail, contin-ued on evenly.
Asked but only settled behind midfield, shifted out 3 wide prior 600M turn, saved ground in straight and finished off nicely.
Bumped start, settled towards the rear, 3 wide at turns, wasn't in it.
In midfield initially, prominent by 600M turn, very wide however, run ended near 200M.
Forward and in lead until after first turn, one-out one-back thereafter, only one paced.
Asked from start, worked forward gradually, outside lead by 600M, one paced and was awkward to heels late.
Began only fairly, in worse than midfield, attempted to stay away from rail, closed off well in straight.
Eased and found cover, in midfield but wide, took ground off leaders, ran on well to take 3rd.
Bumped start, then taken back, at rear and on rail, wasn't a factor.
Ridden forward to share early pace, obtained rails run in 2nd inside race leader 850 metres out, became 2L back when pace quickened home bend, folded up quickly inside final 200 metres.

Driven forward from wide draw to vie for lead, hit the front rounding first bend at the 1000 metres, gained closer to rail 2-wide 850 metres out, kicked 2L clear home bend and flattered in straight, headed 150 metres out.
Broke well settling just off the pace, steadied further to over 3L back in 4th on the rail, baulked behind runners inside the 400 metres, kept on well to the line.
Settled in midfield on the rail, shifted wide for a run entering home straight, ran on under pressure but never threatening.
Settled mainly in midfield, commenced move entering home straight, quickened well to lead inside the 200 metres, won comfortably.
Crowded after moderate start, travelled towards rear in 8th, shifted out for a run entering home straight, ran on and did best work late.
Ridden forward to be up with the pace, taken over 2L back in 3rd passing the 900 metres, remained similar home bend, came to challenge under pressure entering straight, unable to quicken to threaten.
Stumble at start dropping to tail-end, detached further despite ridden along in back straight, forced to steady 550 metres out, saved ground turning for home, fought on steadily.
Gradually settled just worse than midfield, 3-wide home bend and wider into straight, one-paced.
Taken back from wide draw travelling mainly one from last in back straight, forced to steady 550 metres out, commenced move from approaching home turn and widest into straight, ran on steadily.
Slotted into a 2-wide spot in midfield, picked up well top of straight, launched a strong challenge final 150M, got up for 2nd last stride.
Driven to the lead from draw 10, led uncontested, fought hard throughout the straight, hung on to the lead until closing stages, lost 2nd last stride.
Slow to begin, held up near last on inside, ran on well over final 300M, held by first few in a close finish.
Chased leader on outsider, kept on mildly early straight before fading over final 100M. (Mucus.)
Not hurried after the jump, settled towards the rear 6Ls off the pace, failed to respond on straightening, never dangerous.
Went forward as anticipated, tracked leader from 800M, kept on well turning home and put in a sustained effort, just missed out on a minor placing in a blanket finish.
Jumped on terms, held up in midfield never far off the pace, held ground early straight before weakening away final 200M.
Settled towards the rear from draw 9, caught wide no cover from 900M, gave limited response when driven out 500M, never reach contention.
From wide draw taken back to last, wide into straight, finished off strongly to claim 6th beaten only 1L.
Began well, soon restrained to race behind midfield, driven out 450M, stayed on without threatening leaders.
Held up towards the rear, settled 5Ls off the pace along the inside, responded strongly passing 250M, got up close home.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, challenged by rival from 400M, kept on well in straight, just unable to hold off the winner on line.
Bumped start, raced at tail, 7 to 8 lengths back, saved ground on turn, made no impression in straight.
Jumped well, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, showed good response early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move 450M, made minor progress in straight.
Began well from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began awkwardly, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 400M, made minor progress in straight.
Slowly away, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide behind midfield, moved a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, made no progress in the run home.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, similar position on turn, finished off well to take a place.
Clean jump, positioned 2 wide, a length behind the leader, challenged the leader turning in, kept on very well in straight, led final stride.
Slightly slow out, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, closed off well to make frame, not quite able to challenge.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider turning in, made no impression in straight.
Away with them, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 2 to 3 lengths back, similar position on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching 100M, finished off evenly.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, very wide into straight, one-paced in the run home.
Quickly into stride, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Began well, positioned 1 out 1 back, 3 wide from 600M, kept on evenly in straight.
Began well from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide on turn, angled out 500M, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just narrowly beaten.
Moderately away from gate 1, sat right behind the leader on rail, same position on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 250M, finished off strongly to score.
Bumped start, taken back to race at rear, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, made some headway early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two late.

At rear, along the rail, bumped at 350M when held up and then made ground steadily to the line.

At rear, along the rail, saved ground and showed some dash in the Straight.
Raced prominently, 2 wide, lay out under pressure in the Straight, never dangerous.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, pretty one paced.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, finished off strongly to take 2nd, always held.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, checked at 350M and one paced thereafter.
At rear, 2 wide, did not feature.
Sent forward and raced next to the leader, 2 wide, weakened after passing the 100M.
At rear, 2 wide, failed to make any progress in the run home.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, kept on going to the line and won for 3/4L.
Sent forward and took lead, lost ground in the Straight.
At rear, 2 wide, made ground steadily to the line.
Raced in midfield between runners throughout. Was 4L behind entering final section but made no headway in the charge to the line & was well beaten in midfield.
Got nice position 1,1 throughout. Weakened a length in the final 150m but wasn't beaten far in midfield.

Was crowded at the start & despite being ridden failed to muster speed & settled third last away from rail. Was relegated to second last near the 700m before only maintaining deficit in the straight to be beaten 5L on line.
Raced three wide with cover in midfield for the majority. Eased 4 wide without cover from the 650m, moved up to be within 2L at the furlong marker before finishing evenly in concluding stages.
Pushed forward to lead. Headed by the runner-up passing the 250m mark before battling on well to only be beaten 1.5L.
Had no speed after start & got back to last. Continued rearward, nearly 6L behind on straightening before shifting to be widest runner & then making significant late ground down the outside.
Was trapped racing 4 wide without cover in midfield throughout. Straightened just over 4L from lead but weakened out to long last after covering significant extra ground in the run.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Was just under 4L from the lead on straightening, stayed along the rail in straight but weakened slightly & was never a threat when finishing 10th.

Steadied & taken back to race second last. Moved wider to improve approaching the 600m mark, was the widest runner on straightening when 4.5L from the lead before closing strongly to strike lead in final 50m & win narrowly.
Dipped badly at the start & lost ground before mustering to race on the leaders back. Weakened a length in the final 150m but wasn't beaten far in midfield.

Drifted back to race worse than midfield when between runners. Ridden along at 550m mark, straightened over 4L from the lead before closing off well in the concluding stages to move to fast finishing third in late.

Raced worse than midfield along the rail early stages before moving away from the rail near the 700m. Was just under 5L from lead on straightening but weakened out poorly in the straight & was second last beaten 9L.
Pushed forward to race outside the leader. Moved up to take the lead passing the 250m mark, joined by winner at 50m mark but fought on well all the way to the line to be narrow second.
Trapped racing three wide without cover in midfield. Peaked on effort passing the 300m mark & weakened out to be beaten over 5L.
Began awkwardly, taken back to race at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off evenly.
Jumped well, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, wider on turn, finished off evenly.
Made contact at start, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, one-paced in straight. (Mucus.)
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide on turn, no clear running early in straight, cleared 250M, made some progress thereafter.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide from 850M, commenced move 600M, closed off well to take a place, always held.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out 800M, 3 wide turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared 250M, finished off strongly to score.

Away with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, commenced move 750M, very wide turning in, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 100M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner late.
Bumped start, raced at tail, 10 lengths or so back, moved a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, made no impression in the run home.
Commenced well from the widest draw, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 2 lengths back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Out with rest, unable to slot in, trapped 3 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, no cover throughout, similar position on turn, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away well, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame, not quite able to challenge.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed near 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Eased back, at rear 2 wide and keen, lay in early in straight, showed nothing. (Lame right hind and left front)
Dislodged rider at start, did not involve. (See Incident Report)
Settled in just about midfield, 2 wide, slight crowded top of the straight, was one paced nonetheless.
Taken back, raced at the rear, 3 wide but with cover, improved without threatening.
Raced in front of midfield, along the rail, ran on fairly well to take 3rd.
Jumped only fairly, settled in midfield along the rail, closing of well until shifted out abruptly and checked close to the line. To trial due to manner.
Jumped well and attempted for cover prominently, saddle shifted and travelled keenly at 1100M, outside lead before dropped out in straight. (See Incident Report)
Bumped start, settled in behind midfield, 2 wide, saved ground and closed off fairly.
Shifted across to the back, raced on rail, improved steadily in the straight.
Raced in worse than midfield, along the rail, showed dashes and ran on okay.
Niggled along, sat one-off one-back, one paced and weakened late.
In worse than midfield, 3 wide and no cover from 900M, chased down leader and hit the line strongly to win by 3/4L.
Sent forward to take rail, led on terms with a runner, kicked on in straight until headed by winner in last 20M. (See Incident Report)
Bumped start, sat in front of midfield, 2 wide, kept finding to the line.

Soon dropped to rear despite ridden along, detached from the main body of the field in 9th some 5L off the pace, saved ground on the rail turning for home, weakened out of contention inside final 350 metres. (Blood in trachea)

Began from a wide barrier, travelled wide with leaders in early stages, gained 2-wide position alongside race leader rounding home bend and shared pace into straight, weakened inside final 250 metres.

Soon taken back to last after good start, trailed the field over 6L back, improved to join the main body of the field rounding home bend and one of the widest into straight, produced good late impression inside final 200 metres.
Settled mainly one back in 3rd on the rail, in similar position into straight and weakened under pressure.
Settled off the pace after moderate start, travelling in 7th within 3L of pace rounding home bend, made moderate progress under pressure without threatening in straight while hanging in late.

Began awkwardly from the widest barrier, ridden amongst the leaders before quickly taken back for cover in 2.5L 7th despite 4-wide, pulled slightly closer when keen rounding home bend 3-wide, ran home one-paced.

Quickly recovered from moderate start, settled 4L off the pace in 8th coming onto home bend, shifted wide for a run into straight, ran on to be nearest at finish despite hanging in. (Tactic questioned)

Soon came to join the leaders from moderate start, shifted one-out-one-back coming onto home bend, baulked for a run early in straight until the 300 metres, hit the front over 200 metres out for a commanding victory.
oon took up running, joined rounding home bend, unable to sustain effort and headed over 200 metres out.
Travelled 6-wide amongst the leaders after beginning from a wide barrier, shifted one back 3-wide without cover coming onto home bend, soon weakened after straightening. (Tactic questioned)
Soon crossed to the lead, took them along at good pace, pressed by rival 900M, kept on well on straightening, went down narrowly after an epic duel final 200M.
Went forward from draw 12, caught wide no cover until reaching to race outside leader 1400M, under heavy pressure 500M, soon weakened. Finished tailed out.
Urged along to chase leaders, 3Ls off the pace on settling in 5th or 6th spot, came under pressure 600M, had difficulty obtaining clear running early straight, made no impression final 250M.
Taken across to race 3-wide in midfield, without cover most of back straight, crept closer to the pace from 900M, struggled to hold its position top of straight, weakened passing 300M.
From draw 1 obtained a midfield spot along the inside, shifted out from fence 550M, kept on same pace under pressure, never going the pace to challenge.
From draw 14 shifted across behind runners, raced in last 9Ls off the good pace, swung wide for home, gave limited response only, never involved.
Chased leaders early, raced keenly passing 1600M then restrained to sit ahead of midfield, swung wide from 500M, moved up to challenge leader mid-straight, fought hard to gain upper hand close home.
From wide draw shifted across behind runners, held up towards the rear 7Ls off the pace, saved ground on inside, moved up to 4th 300M, kept on one paced thereon.
Given a patient ride, held up near last 8Ls behind leader, moved closer along the 3-path from 1000M, wide into straight, stayed on fairly to the line, never threatened.
Restrained to race in midfield about 5Ls off the good pace, came under pressure from 700M, failed to go on after straightening.
Began only fairly, settled towards the rear early stages, crept closer along the 3-path passing halfway, wide into straight, kept on mildly over final 400M, never reach leaders.
Held up behind midfield early stages, shuffled back to a rearward position passing halfway, 6Ls to make up 400M, ran past beaten rivals only. Never near to challenge.
Tracked leaders in a fast run race, going well turning into straight, moved up to challenge for the lead inside 400M, outstayed by first 2 over final 200M but held on for 3rd comfortably.
Failed to muster speed, ended up further back then hoped, raced keenly from 1200M then moved up to race outside leader along the 3-path, weakened quickly passing 400M, finished tailed out.

Shifted in at start and bumped, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, wider from 550M, bumped near 400M, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 100M, kept on well but unable to hold off the first two late.
Taken back form a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out after passing 550M, very wide turning in, finished off very strongly to score.

Shifted out at start and bumped, sent forward to take the lead, found rail near 700M, travelled comfortably on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed approaching 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared approaching 300M, made no progress thereafter.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide at rear, angled out 550M, very wide turning in, made no impression in straight. (Blood in trachea.)
Taken back to race towards rear on the inside, wider after passing 550M, 5 lengths back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight, eased final 150M.

Stumbled on jumping, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, angled out 550M, bumped and unbalanced 350M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped on jumping, positioned 2 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to 100M, weakened and eased thereafter.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out after passing 550M, very wide into straight, finished off strongly, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the outside, angled out approaching 500M, bumped early in straight, crowded 300M, made little progress thereafter.
Began well, raced better than midfield on the inside, easy run on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, commenced move 500M, bumped and unbalanced 350M, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Bumped on jumping, raced prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross near 700M, sat right behind the leader on turn, finished off evenly.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Clean jump, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Began awkwardly, raced prominently on the outside, showed some response early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 2 wide at rear, 5 to 6 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to take a place, nearest on line.
Lifted front feet on jumping, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong, eased final 100M.
Slightly slow out, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out after passing 550M, finished off very strongly to score.
Bumped the inside of its gate on jumping and began awkwardly, raced 2 wide, 4 lengths or so back, there to turn, failed to close off in straight.
Taken back from gate 11, raced behind midfield on the outside, 4 to 5 lengths back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Jumped with them, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Began smartly, positioned on rail in midfield, 2 lengths back turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began well, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, closed off well to take 2nd.
Bumped start, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Began awkwardly, positioned 3 wide, 2 lengths or so back, made some progress early in straight, not enough room near 125M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Began well from gate 1, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, similar position on turn, kept on well in straight without threatening.
Slowly away, raced at rear, 6 to 7 lengths back on turn, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Jumped with them, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made very good progress in straight to take a place, nearest on line.
Commenced well, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, angled out 850M, 5 lengths or so back on turn, showed some response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Taken back from gate 10, raced 2 wide towards rear, commenced move 550M, taken wide in straight and made good progress to make frame.
Began well, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, unable to maintain position from 700M, eased final 400M.
Away well, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out 900M, 3 lengths back turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened thereafter.
Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on evenly in straight.

Began well, raced 2 wide in midfield, sent forward after passing 900M, positioned 3 wide, a length or so back in the middle stages, closed off well to take 2nd, nearest on line. (Lost left hind plate near 950M.)

Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, headed near 700M, a length back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (Lost left front plate in the early stages.) (See Racing Incidents.)

Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, sent forward after entering the back straight, took the lead approaching 700M, led by a length on turn, kept on well in straight to hold off the challengers late.

Began well from a wide draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 900M, weakened from 600M, eased 400M. (Lost left front plate after the race.) (See Racing Incidents.)
Hard ridden forward, sat outside the leader, just held ground in straight.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, no progress.
Midfield, along the fence, lack room 4-2 and checked, progressed steadily when clear.
Midfield, 2 wide, progressed steadily 300M.
Eased back, never a factor.
Eased back, took rail, made ground 300M.
Box seat, just held ground in straight.
Midfield, 2 wide, weakened 300M.
Eased back, 2 wide, no dash.
Pushed to take rail and lead, kicked away 300M to score.
Settled one out one back, just held ground in straight.
Eased at start, took rail, blocked most straight, ran on ok, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Sent forward and took lead, flattened in the last 100M.
At rear, 2 wide, saved ground but held up until passing 100M, showed some dash thereafter.
At rear, along the rail, made minor ground only in the last 50M.
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail, closed off strongly in the last 200M and caught the leader in the last 50M.
Sent forward, 2 wide, lost ground in the Straight.
Raced in front of midfield, wide no cover, pretty one paced.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, nothing in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, showed strong dash in the Straight, battled on to the line for 2nd.
Race in front of midfield, 2 wide, only showed dash after passing 100M. (See incident report)
Raced behind the lead, along the rail after 550M, lost ground in the Straight.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, showed some dash and closed off okay for 3rd.

Pushed forward to lead soon after start. Was challenged in the lead & raced keenly until drawing a half-length clear at the 900m. Was joined & headed on straightening before weakening out quickly in final 100m (see report).

Got back after first bend to race worse than midfield away from rail. Moved to midfield after the 600m bend, shifted very wide on straightening before making up significant late ground down the outside to move to third late.

Raced 4th away from the rail early before losing position passing the 800m mark & racing midfield between runners thereafter. Entered last section 4L from the lead, finished off steadily to hold midfield finish.
Obtained position in midfield on rail after start. Moved closer to the lead approaching the corner, shifted outwards passing 200m mark when close behind before closing off to second in final 75m.

Began fast before racing third on the rail behind two leaders who held significant advantage early. Continued third, a length behind leading pair at 400m, dashed to lead at 150m & continued on to win softly.

Shared lead after first bend before steadying & racing at leader's flanks from 850m when leading pair went well clear of remainder. Took lead early in straight, joined by winner 125m, fought on ok late stages. See report.

Shifted behind runners after start & raced at tail. Continued last when 9.5L from the lead entering the final section before shifting to be the widest runner in the straight & making late ground to halve deficit on the line.

Didn't begin fast, steadied away from heels after start & raced rearward . Was steadied away from heels & lost ground noticeably passing the 550m mark before failing to challenge in straight. Second last.
Raced in midfield away from rail early before removing three wide without cover from the 750m. Was ridden along before straightening, made no headway in the straight & was beaten over 4L.

Steadied at start, raced second last away from rail. Shifted back towards the rail entering last section when 6L behind before making significant late ground along the rail to be under 2L behind in 4th.

Crowded at start before shifting to rail & racing worse than midfield. Became unbalanced & lost ground at the 600m bend & was relegated to third last as a consequence. Weakened further in straight to be long last.

Raced in midfield along rail early before moving away from rail passing 650m when improving position. Straightened under 3L from the lead, finished off only moderately in last furlong & was beaten just over 3L in midfield.

Began awkwardly, raced towards rear on the outside early, moved closer after entering the back straight, 2-3Ls back in the middle stages, very wide into straight, finished off well to take a place without threatening.
Began smartly from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground to turn, peaked early in straight, steadied off heels 125M, weakened final 100M.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide towards rear, 3 wide from 850M, very wide turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
Began smartly from gate 10, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, hard ridden after passing 350M, kept on very well in straight and scored.
Out in line, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 400M, made good progress in straight to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced at tail early, 7 lengths back, sent forward after passing 950M, 2nd in the middle stages, peaked 400M, weakened early in straight, eased final 100M.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 3 wide on turn, very wide into straight, made minor progress in the run home.
Moderately away, raced at rear on the inside, 5 lengths back, 2 wide after passing 900M, same margin back on turn, made little progress in straight.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, there to turn, weakened gradually in straight, eased final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact at start, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, closed off well to take 2nd.
One-out one-back initially, left with no cover prior to 600M turn, no turn of foot and weakened.
Lost ground at start, settled towards the rear, 2 wide, saved ground and ran on okay.
Just behind midfield, 2 wide before making turns 3 wide with cover, not a factor.
Took back, at tail and on rail, improved slightly in the straight.
Travelled in midfield, along the rail, ran on steadily to the line, finished 2nd.
Eased back, at tail 2 wide, did not close off.
Raced just in front of midfield, on rail, closed off nicely to the line, won by 3/4L.
Urged out of the barriers, sat in about midfield, 2 wide, fairly one paced in the straight.
Sent forward after hampered at start, took and led by 600M, kept on until emptied for final 100M.
Asked but only settled in midfield, wide and no cover, continued on well to the line for 3rd.
Slow out, sat towards the rear on the rail, always pressured, wasn't in it.
Urged along and took rail, led until crossed prior to 600M, weakened passing 150M. (See Incident Report)
Settled about 3L off the pace in 5th, gave ground steadily from rounding home bend, dropped out of contention 200 metres out.

Bumped and lost ground at start, niggled along towards the rear, gained slightly closer towards midfield in back straight, saved ground on the rail turning for home, fought on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Broke well from the one gate sharing early pace, held rails run inside race leaders most of the way to home straight, kept on under pressure before finding no extra inside final 50 metres.
Stumbled at start losing ground but quickly recovered to better than midfield in 6th on the rail, saved ground turning for home, fought on under pressure to hit the front over 120 metres out
Well there early but quickly taken back to 7th in mid-division, left flat-footed rounding home bend dropping towards the rear into straight, tightened about 120 metres out but fought on to the line

Began moderately but soon came to share early pace, taken one back to 4th early in back straight, became 2L back coming onto home bend, wide turning for home, kept on until the 100 metres. (Questioned for disappointing performance.)
Settled well behind from a wide gate, steadied on the rail 800 metres out and soon detached. (Jockey said horse not handled the going.)
Driven forward from a wide gate to lead, joined before headed shortly after passing the 700 metres, soon weakened out of contention from 3rd into straight.

Sluggish at start, held up in rear of midfield mainly in 7th, commenced move 3-wide rounding home bend, widest of all into straight when bumped over 300 metres out, fought on well to be nearest at finish.

Driven forward after moderate start from a wide barrier to be up with the pace 4-wide, improved to take up running 700 metres out and raced one off the rail on home bend, swamped inside final 120 metres. (Tactic questioned.)
Settled towards rear, one of the widest into home straight, finished off the race well down the centre of the track.
Soon taken back to rear from a wide barrier, travelled keenly 1000 metres out, saved ground turning for home, one-paced under pressure.
Away slowly, bustled along early stages to obtain a 3-wide spot in midfield, made no real progress on straightening, never threatened.
Began only fairly, settled behind midfield 4Ls off the pace, closed off strongly to go 2nd close home, nearest finish.
Tracked leaders along the 2-path, fought hard on straightening but always held by winner, lost 2nd close home. Went clear from remainders.
Taken back to last from wide draw, 7Ls off the pace on settling, made no impression from 400M. Never in the picture.
From wide draw steadied to obtain cover shortly after the start, settled 3-wide towards the rear, headway on outside from 600M, stayed on for distant 4th.
Crossed to the lead 950M, soon headed turning into straight, weakened rapidly to finish last.
Tracked leaders on inside, found little under pressure top of straight, emptied passing 250M, weakened away.
Went forward, settled one-out-one-back, soon quickened to the lead on straightening, lay in under pressure, held on well from pursuing rivals late stages.
Began awkwardly, unable to slot in, caught wide no cover chasing leaders, battled on same pace in the straight, never able to challenge leaders.
Failed to muster speed despite ridden along, ended up towards the rear, attempted a run on inside early straight but held up 200M-100M, lost every chance.
Lost ground at the start, ended up towards the rear 6Ls off the pace, failed to quicken in straight, ran past beaten rivals only.
Began well from draw 1, restrained to race in midfield along the fence, kept on same pace turning home, never reach contention.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, a length or so back on turn, angled out 350M, showed limited response early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened final 50M.

Moderately away from a wide draw, raced 3 wide behind midfield, moved a bit closer after entering the back straight, 2 lengths back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased final furlong.
Moderately away, positioned a length behind the leader, challenged the leader from 500M, kept on well in straight to take a place.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide, 3 lengths back, dropped towards rear after passing 600M, showed no response early in straight, eased final furlong.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out 400M, made very good progress in straight to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Away well, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival from 500M, kept on well until approaching 50M, headed and weakened thereafter. (Rider dropped whip 200m.)
Out with rest, raced 2 wide at rear, 3 wide after passing 700M, very wide turning in, bumped near 300M, passed some tired runners in straight.
Average to begin, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on rail, same margin back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, 7 to 8 lengths back, there to turn, made some progress early in straight, weakened inside final 100M.
Began well, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider from 500M, very wide turning in, bumped near 300M, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away from the widest draw, raced 3 wide in midfield, 2 wide from 850M, 3 lengths back on turn, kept on evenly early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Average to begin, raced towards rear on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 750M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Jumped well, raced at rear on the stands' side, 4 to 5 lengths back, only passed 2 tired runners final 400M.
Bumped on jumping, raced in 3rd, 1 to 2 lengths back, hard ridden after passing 350M, finished off evenly to take a place.
Jumped with them, positioned a length behind he leader early, unable to maintain position from 600M, weakened thereafter.
Bumped on jumping, raced prominently on the stands' rail, outpaced 500M, weakened thereafter.
Away with them, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably in the middle stages, kept on strongly to the line, easily scored.
Jumped well from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader, hard ridden approaching 350M, stayed on evenly to hold 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Out with rest, raced at rear, 3 to 4 lengths back, hard ridden approaching 300M, kept on evenly to the line.
Hard ridden to take rail and lead, soon emptied 350M, was found to be a "roarer" after racing.
Eased back, 2 wide, no progress.
Behind midfield, never improved, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Pushed early, trapped 4 wide in midfield, progressed steadily 400M.
Pushed forward, just held ground in straight.
Eased to sit in midfield, 2-3 wide, blocked most straight, made ground when clear.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 3 wide, made steady ground 400M.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, blocked 4-2, made ground when clear.
Eased at start, took rail, lack room 4-2, ran on fairly.
Eased back, trapped 3-4 wide, progressed steadily 300M.
At rear, trapped 3 wide, made ground 250M.
Hard ridden forward along the fence, held up most straight, not properly tested.
Slow away, at rear, 2 wide, blocked most straight, closed off strongly to score.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, led 350M, overhauled 100M.
Sent forward and took lead, kept on going to the line and won by a neck.
At rear, along the rail, made some ground only in the Straight.
Raced behind the leader, along the rail, closed off strongly and battled on to the line for 2nd.
At rear, 2 wide, no progress.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, pretty one paced to the line. (See incident report)
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, ran on well to the line for 4th.
Raced prominently, 2 wide, continued on well and battled on for 3rd.

Steadied & taken back to last. Shifted to be the widest runner entering final section when still last & over 5L from lead before passing a few tiring rivals when running onto non-threatening midfield finish in late stages.

Steadied at start & shifted down to rail before settling worse than midfield. Relegated to second last near the 1000m when continuing along rail. Straightened 4L from the lead but made no headway & was second last on line.
Was trapped racing three wide without cover just behind the lead throughout. Moved up to take narrow lead at the 300m mark before weakening out in final 100m after tough trip throughout.
Raced in midfield between runners throughout. Shifted wider on straightening when only 2L from the lead before peaking on effort at 200m & weakening thereafter.
Pushed forward to lead. Headed early in the straight before weakening out to last.

Raced in midfield away from the rail throughout. Moved into three wide line with cover near the 1000m mark. Moved wider approaching the corner, straightened only 2.5L from the lead before peaking on effort at 250m.
Pushed forward from outside gate before shifting to be two wide outside the leader near the 1600m. Continued close at the 200m mark before weakening out in the concluding stages.
Had a soft run in midfield on rail. Shifted away from the rail near 500m, moved up to lead passing the 150m mark before dashing away strongly in final stages to win by easy 2L.

Had a nice run on the leaders back throughout. Moved away from the rail passing 400m mark, continued just behind the leaders until being slightly hampered at 150m mark before moving into second inside final 75m.

Worse than midfield early before improving position to race three wide with cover in midfield in middle stages. Continued to improve, only 1L from lead on straightening before finishing off one paced in last furlong.
Had a nice run 1,1 for the majority. Eased three wide just prior to straightening, moved up to share lead at 250m before passed quickly by winner at 150m, swamped for a minor placing in final stages.

Shifted down to rail soon after start, raced in midfield before drifting further back & being relegated to third last at 600m. Stayed along the rail in the straight & managed to pass a few tiring rivals when running on late.
teadied & taken back to second last. Shifted wider passing the 600m, straightened just under 4L from the lead before making steady late ground down the outside to just miss second on line.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, 3 lengths back, same position on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place without posing any threat to the first two.
