Taken back from gate 8, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Quickly into stride, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well in straight to hold off the challenger late.
Slightly inconvenienced at start, raced in midfield on the outside, 4 lengths or so back on turn, one-paced in the run home.
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the outside, 5 lengths back turning in, made no progress in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, 5 lengths back, same margin back on turn, very wide into straight, closed off well to make frame without threatening.
Began well from gate 1, sat right behind the leader on rail, angled out after passing 550M, finished off well to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Clean jump, raced prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Taken back from gate 9, raced 2 wide towards rear, 5 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight without threatening.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide better than midfield, wider from 550M, peaked early in straight, kept on evenly to the line.
Forward and settled one-out one-back, one paced before weakened in the latter stages.
Bumped start, sent forward and sat outside lead, kicked on until flattened late.
Urged forward, prominent but was wide, run ended passing 300M.
Travelled in front of midfield, along the rail, stayed on okay to the line.
Bumped start, then was eased back, wide but with cover, showed nothing.
Raced in about midfield, 2 wide, closed off fairly well to take 3rd.
Settled in behind midfield, along the rail, held up early in the straight, closed off fairly once cleared.
Raced just in front of midfield, 2 wide, bumped near 400M, one paced before weakened. (See Incident Report)
Jumped awkward, in worse than midfield, 2 wide, held ground only.
Bumped start, raced in midfield, wide but with cover, made ground steadily, ran on to win by 1-1/4L.
Hampered at start, at rear along the rail, continued to improve and ran home after switching across heels at 200M.
Awkward start, then taken back to be at rear, wide with cover, stumbled near 900M, ran home steadily in the straight.
Urged along, slotted in front of midfield, 3 wide with cover, bumped 400M, was pretty one paced.
Forward, took rail and led, maintained lead until headed passing 50M, hung on to finish 2nd.

Began well from a wide barrier, taken two back to 5th over 1200 metres out but remained 3-wide with cover, in similar position rounding home bend, produced moderate late impression without threatening. (Tactic questioned)
Attempted to make all, unable to sustain effort and headed under pressure 150 metres out.
Began well from a wide barrirer, travelled close up and wide without cover, kept on same pace under pressure.
Settled in rear of the small field, 3-wide rounding home bend and widest into straight, made no impression. (Blood in trachea)
Broke well from the one draw, settled one back in 3rd and then 4th on the rail, obtained clear run passing the 300 metres and quickened well to lead 150 metres out.
Broke well, held up in 2-wide in 2nd just inside race leader, became 1L back in 3rd coming onto home bend, came to challenge entering straight but unable to sustain effort inside final 150 metres.

Slightly slow out, recovered steadily along the rail to just over 3L back in 7th, snuck up on rail entering home straight, did not find much room early on but fought on steadily inside final 200 metres to be nearest at finish.
Hampered at start, travelled well behind and keenly early stages, fought on steadily under pressure in straight without threatening.
Moderate start, gradually recovered to 6th within 3L of pace, keen and inconvenienced inside the 900 metres, tight between runners early in straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
Obtained a midfield spot along the fence, switched out 550M, ran on steadily final 350M, well held by first 2 final 100M, held on for 3rd in a photo finish.
In touch, never far off the pace in 5th spot, progressed from top of straight to hit the lead 250M out, caught by fast finishing winner nearing 100M, held on well for 2nd.

Positively ridden, crossed to the lead 1200M, pressed by rival middle stages, swamped inside 300M and weakened rapidly to finish last. (Jockey : reluctant to stride out in the straight / Lame LF leg.)
Settled 2-wide in midfield, held up for clear running top of straight, put in a mild bid final 300M, just missed 3rd in a 3-way photo.
Taken back to race near the rear, 3-wide over home turn, kept on fairly in straight, never a threat to leaders.
Settled down 3-wide in midfield, left racing without cover passing 800M, responded well early straight to challenge for the lead, run ended 150M form home, lost several places late.
Switched off to race towards the rear, 8Ls off the pace middle stages, held up for clear running passing 300M, ran on mildly towards the line, always held by leaders.
Held up behind mid-division, 6Ls off the pace on settling, stayed on moderately from 400M, just missed 3rd in a 3-way photo.
Moved forward from draw 1, tracked leaders along the fence, battled on same pace turning home, outsprinted by rivals mid-straight.

Driven forward from draw 13, tracked leaders going into home turn, briefly threatened early straight before giving ground 200M. (Jockey : Not able to finish off due to the amount of work early stages / Blood in trachea.)
Crowded for room after the jump, ended up behind midfield along the fence, unable to obtain clear running from top of straight to 200M and also over final 100M, not properly tested.
From wide draw steadied to obtain cover, crossed to race 3-wide behind midfield, quickened up strongly from 350M, led nearing 100M, won going away.
Began fairly, gradually moved forward, caught wide no cover from 1200M before reaching the front 800M, no extra passing 300M, dropped out rapidly.
Dropped back to race at the rear, 6Ls to make up 400M, stayed on only fairly, never reach contention.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide with cover slightly better than midfield, crowded near 900M, 2 lengths or so back turning in, kept on evenly in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths or so back, wider from 550M, made some progress in straight.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced in midfield on inner, saved ground to turn, not enough room early in straight, cleared after passing 250M, finished off evenly.
Began smartly from a wide draw, raced 4 wide, 3 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly thereafter.
Away well, raced 2 wide, 4 lengths back, wider turning in, finished off evenly.
Began well from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, bumped early in straight, finished off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide better than midfield, angled out 500M, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M. (Mucus.)
Taken back from gate 13, raced at rear on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked on run 200M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Clean jump, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, travelled well throughout, kept on strongly in straight, won by 2 lengths.
Began only fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, 6 lengths back, angled out 550M, 4 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide with cover slightly behind midfield, similar position on turn, very wide into straight, failed to close off in straight.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, bumped early in straight, peaked 300M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began very awkwardly and made contact, raced at tail, 8 lengths or so back, closer on turn, very wide into straight, passed a few tired runners in the run home.
Moderately away, raced 3 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, a bit closer turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Commenced well, sat right behind the leader on rail, there to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 10, raced behind midfield on the inside, 4 lengths or so back, there to turn, made good progress in straight to take a place.
Lifted front feet on jumping and away tardily, raced at rear on the inside, travelled keenly near 1000M, angled out 850M, 4 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight.
Shifted out at start, raced 3 wide in midfield, no cover after 1200M, moved bit closer from 900M, 1-1/2L back on turn, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Slightly inconvenienced at start, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, same position on turn, finished off strongly to score.
Away with them, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off evenly.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide from 850M, moved a bit closer on turn, made some progress in straight.
Moderately away, positioned 2 wide, 3 lengths back, similar position on turn, finished off evenly.
Jumped with them, positioned 1 out 1 back, there to turn, kept on evenly early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 6 lengths or so back, commenced move approaching 500M, failed to make any progress in straight. (Mucus.)
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the outside, sent forward after passing 1200M, took the lead near 1000M, weakened after passing 650M, headed 600M, eased final 400M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Clean jump, raced in 2nd, challenged the leader turning in, kept on well in straight to take a place, always held.
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
Average to begin, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, headed near 1000M, retook the lead approaching 600M, challenged by rival turning in, kept on very well in straight, won by 3/4L.
Began well from gate 1, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader, commenced move 600M, kept on evenly in straight.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced at tail, 8 to 9 lengths back, closer on turn but still 6 lengths behind, made very good progress in straight to make frame, nearest on line.
Taken back from gate 9, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out 450M, 6 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Began only fairly, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, angled out 500M, 3 lengths back turning in, closed off strongly to take 2nd.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide behind midfield, weakened from 600M, eased early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.) (Mucus.)
Hard ridden to obtain box seat, just held ground in straight.
Eased back, took rail, progressed steadily 300M.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, lack room 4-2, made ground when clear.
Midfield, trapped 3 wide throughout, held ground in straight.
Eased to sit in midfield, 2 wide, progressed steadily 300M.
Took rail and lead, out of fuel 200M.
Eased back, 2 wide, no progress.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, dropped off 500M.
Eased to sit in midfield along the fence, blocked 4-2, made steady ground when clear.
Eased at start, 2-4 wide, no dash.
At back, trapped 3-4 wide throughout, no progress, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Eased to sit in front of midfield, 2-3 wide, led 350M, overhauled 50M.
Eased back, never competitive.
Raced in front of midfield, 2 wide, did not improve in the Straight.
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail, rounding home turn held up for clear running and then closed off strongly for 3rd.
Sent forward and took lead, 2 wide, stayed on well for 2nd.
At rear, along the rail, saved ground and closed off well in the Straight.
Raced behind the lead, along the rail, kept on going to the line and won impressively by 1-1/2L.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, swung wide on Straightening, made minor ground only.
Raced in front of midfield, 2 wide, lost ground in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, did not improve in the Straight.
Sent forward and shared lead, wide no cover, weakened in the last 150M.
Raced in midfield, 3 wide but with cover, only one paced in the Straight.
At rear, 2 wide, swung widest on Straightening, showed strong dash but only finished 5th.
Raced in behind midfield, 3 wide with cover, nothing in the Straight.
Was slow to begin & raced second last throughout. Moved wider on the track approaching 500m, straightened over 6L from the lead before weakening out further to be long third last.

Began awkwardly before racing in midfield, three wide without cover. Forced wider just before straightening, closed well to take the lead near the 100m mark & had enough in hand to hold off unlucky second.

Raced just forward of midfield before moving down to rail at first bend. Eased over the heels of leading pair on straightening when 2L behind before peaking in final 100m & weakening a length or two late.
Pushed forward to lead. Held the lead until joined by winner near the 100m mark, narrowly held third on the line & was only beaten 1.5L on line.

Dipped at start, improved after first 300m to race in midfield between runners. Was badly held up for a run from on straightening until getting clear with 100m left & flying home to fast finishing second. Should have won.

Drifted back after the start & raced third last in the clear. Shifted wider on the track approaching the corner, entered last section just under 4L from the lead & could only hold that deficit in the run to the line.
Raced in midfield, two wide when between runners throughout. Hung outwards on straightening when only 2L from the lead before peaking on effort at the 200m mark & weakening late.
Pushed forward to race outside the leader. Was a length from the lead soon after straightening before weakening out quickly in last furlong.
Trapped racing 4 wide without cover in midfield throughout. Was beaten off on straightening & weakened out to be long second last after very wide passage throughout.
Raced 4 wide with cover when worse than midfield in first half. Became intractable & ran off the track near the 500m mark & effectively took no part in the race thereafter.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Stayed along the rail on straightening when just under 3L from the lead, closed off well all the way to the line to only be beaten 1.5L.

Very slow to begin, conceding a huge start. Hard ridden down the back straight to get closer to remainder of field. 9L from the lead entering last section before making significant late ground down to be beaten 2L on line.
Bumped shortly after start, raced prominently on the outside, 3/4L back on turn, challenged the leader early in straight, peaked 150M, soon weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 450M, showed good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Taken back from gate 8, raced at rear on the outside, 4 to 5 lengths back on turn, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Slightly slow out and bumped, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, showed good response early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Bumped start, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 400M, finished off evenly.
Bumped shortly after start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L, travelled well to turn, challenged by rivals early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from gate 9, raced behind midfield on the outside, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, very wide into straight, finished off well to make frame without threatening.
Began well from gate 1, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear running until near 150M, closed off well to take a place.
Shifted out on jumping and bumped, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground to turn, unable to obtain clear running until near 100M, made minor progress thereafter.
Travelled in one-out one-back position, ran on spiritedly to finish 2nd, finished a neck behind.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, made no progress in the straight.
Bumped start, sat behind midfield, along the rail, one paced but kicked on late.
Raced at the tail, keen and made 700M turn awkwardly, 2-3 wide most way, closed off not bad in a interrupted run home.
No speed, then raced at the rear, wide with cover, found nothing, finished at the tail.
Bumped start, in midfield, wide and no cover, in touch until weakened inside final 200M. (Bled from both nostrils)
Bumped start, forward to lead, 2 wide, stayed on until weakened approaching 200M. (See Incident Report)
Bumped start, raced close to the rear, 2 wide before shifted wide at 600M, found nothing.
In front of midfield, wide and no cover, emptied half way down the straight.
Rolled forward, on rail, sat about 1L behind and inside the lead, continued to run home, won by a neck.
Began only fairly, no speed, at rear and left very wide at turns, improved steadily in the straight.
Eased back, at rear, wide but with cover, saved ground in the straight.
Pressed forward from a wide barrier, settled wide in midfield coming onto first bend, gave ground rapidly from approaching home turn, finished tailed-off. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Soon took up running on the rail despite dipped at the start, led the field until swamped inside final 200 metres.
Settled one back in 2L 4th on the rail, unable to sustain effort inside final 200 metres.

Settled wide in forward of midfield in 6th from a wide barrier, gained slightly closer to 5th inside the 1000 metres, 4-wide under pressure into straight, hit the front over 200 metres out and just defied late challenges.
Slowly away from a wide barrier and quickly taken across to the rail in last few, saved ground turning into home straight, baulked for a run early on and kept on steadily to the line.
Gradually settled in last few, 3-wide rounding home bend dropping well behind into straight, made no further impression.
Settled in midfield on the rail, saved ground turning in, baulked for a run early in straight, quickened well inside final 250 metres but unable to sustain effort late.

Moderate start, soon dropped to last few despite ridden along, improved steadily towards midfield turning into back straight, in similar position in 9th into home straight, ran on under pressure to be nearest at finish.

Began well from a middle barrier, wide in first few before moving forward steadily in back straight to reach 2nd 1000 metres out, remained in similar position until folded up quickly inside final 200 metres.
Settled wide in well back after beginning from the widest gate, ran past well-beaten horses under pressure in the run to the line. (Mucus)
Settled well behind from a wide barrier, kept on between runners after turning into home straight, produced good late impression closing stages.
Settled 3-wide behind midfield, gained slightly closer passing the 1000 metres, soon came to challenge after straightening, fought on well to just fail to get up on line,

Pressed forward from a middle barrier, restrained in 2nd outside the leader turning into back straight, became 3rd in similar position 1000 metres out, shifted 3-wide home bend, ran on under pressure to just fail to get up.
Close up early, shuffled over 2L back to 5th turning into back straight, became 6th some 3L back passing the 1000 metres, fought on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Not hurried early stages, reserved towards the rear on inside, 4Ls to make up 400M, put in a mild bid on straightening, not reach first 3.
Tracked leaders on inside, continued on mildly passing 400M, always held by first 2.
Caught 3-wide without cover when chasing the pace, soon took over top of the straight, strongly challenged by a rival over final 200M, just held on.
Pressed forward to be sharing the lead on inside, found little under pressure 400M, soon headed and weakened to last.
Slowly into stride, settled towards the rear, responded fairly passing 300M, never going the pace to challenge leaders, held up for clear running late stages.
From draw 10 dropped back to race towards the rear of midfield along the 3-path, stayed on without threatening in the straight. No impression on leaders.
Went forward and disputed lead on outside, outpaced inside 300M, gradually weakened.
Settled down in midfield along the fence, shifted out 400M to challenge, closed off moderately without threatening first 3.
Jumped on terms, restrained to race in midfield along the 2-path, not quickened when driven out 400M, never threatened.
Held up 3-wide in midfield, moved up swiftly to challenge early straight, tried hard to wrestle the lead from leader late stages, just held.
Always in touch tracking leaders, kept on evenly turning home, not going the pace to challenge first 3 final 200M, held on for 4th just.
Taken back from wide draw, settled at the back 6Ls off the pace, couldn't go on passing 400M, never in the picture.
Fast into stride, raced prominently but 4 wide early, inconvenienced 800M, 2Ls back turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back, wide into straight, made good progress in the run home to be nearest on line.
Taken back from gate 13, raced towards rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, finished off evenly.
Moderately away, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L on turn, peaked early in straight, headed approaching 250M, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Made contact at start, raced 3 wide with cover, 4 lengths or so back, there to turn, made some progress in straight.
Out with rest, positioned 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths or so back, same position on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off strongly to score.
Began well, tracked leaders but 3 wide, 2 wide from 750M, hard ridden from 400M, only showed limited response, weakened final 200M. (Roarer.)
Jumped well from gate 11, unable to slot in, trapped very wide, a length or so back, 2 wide from 600M, challenged the leader early in straight, peaked 250M, weakened thereafter.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made some headway in straight.

Jumped with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield early, found rail near 750M, saved ground on turn, hard ridden after passing 350M, hit the front 250M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner on line.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from gate 10, raced 2 wide at rear, 5 to 6 lengths back on turn, made good progress in straight to take 3rd.
Bumped on jumping, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Settled in front of midfield, 3 wide, ran on fairly in straight, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Eased back, trapped 4-5 wide throughout, ran on ok in straight.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, blocked most straight, made good ground when clear.
Eased at start, took cover at rear, progressed steadily 350M.
Pressed forward, sat 2 wide, emptied 400M.
Hard ridden forward, sat outside the leader, ran on well for 2nd.
Hard ridden to obtain box seat, out of fuel 300M.
Trapped 3 wide in midfield, no progress.
Eased at start, took rail at back, lack room 400M, progressed steadily to score.
Hard ridden early, behind midfield, 2-4 wide, progressed steadily 350M, run ended 100M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Pushed early, midfield along the fence, blocked most straight, ran on fairly when clear, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Slow away, at back, 2 wide, lack room 4-2, made ground when clear.
Hard ridden to take rail and lead, hung on well until 150M overhauled.
At back, 3-4 wide, lack room 4-2, made steady ground when clear.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, ran on well to the finish to take 2nd.
Sent forward, along the rail, flattened passing 150M.
Sent forward and raced behind the lead, along the rail, kept on going and won by 1-1/2L.
Slow to begin and at rear, along the rail, made no ground in the Straight.
Raced in front of midfield, 2 wide, pretty one paced.
Raced in midfield, wide no cover, lost ground in the Straight.
At rear, 2 wide, made minor ground and one paced after passing the 100M.
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail, closed off well to the line and finished 3rd.
Sent forward and raced next to the lead, 2 wide, ran on fairly but bumped at 300M, headed near 150M.

Reared at start & lost ground before being hampered near the 1350m when making up ground along the rail. Continued racing third last in the middle stages before weakening out poorly in straight to be long last. (Must trial).
Began very fast to lead early before racing outside the leader from the 1200m. Peaked on effort shortly after straightening before weakening out in the final 300m to be beaten about 7L.
Had a nice run on the leaders back for the majority. Moved over the leaders heels at the 300m mark before closing well to be 1.5L behind on line.

Had a nice run in midfield on the rail throughout. Raced tight on straightening when attempting to shift outwards. Was awkwardly placed near the 250m when making ground before closing well to hold third beaten only a length.
Didn't begin fast but mustered speed to lead. Was joined & headed passing the 300m mark before weakening out in the final 150m.
Raced a touch wide without cover in midfield before getting some cover from the 850m. Entered just over 2L from the lead before finishing off only one paced to the line.
Raced just worse than midfield away from the rail throughout. Entered last section just under 3L from the lead before closing well down the outside to be beaten under 2L on line.

Obtained a nice position 1,1 after the start. Moved up to take the lead passing the 300m mark, hung outwards under pressure in the final 150m before being joined & headed by the winner inside final 75m.

Shifted across behind runners after start & raced at tail. Shifted wide but with cover passing 700m to improve position. Shifted widest runner on straightening when 4L from the lead before holding deficit all the way to line.
Shifted behind runners after start before being hampered near 1300m. Shifted wide at 800m to improve, straightened only 1.5L behind before closing strongly down the outside to take lead in final 75m.
Average to begin, positioned on rail in midfield early, 2 wide from 800M, 1 to 2 lengths back on turn, finished off well to take 2nd without posing any threat to the winner.
Slightly slow out, raced towards rear on the inside, 4 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Began well from gate 13, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover on turn, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, 6 lengths back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Taken back from gate 10, raced 3 wide with cover at rear, 5 lengths or so back, 2 wide approaching 800M, same margin back on turn, one-paced in straight.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, 3 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Jumped well, raced in 2nd, a length back on turn, peaked early in straight, kept on evenly to 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.

Commenced well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, difficult to settle after passing 900M, sat right behind the leader on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4 lengths back, 3 wide on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Began smartly from the widest draw, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on strongly in straight, easily scored, impressive debut.
Raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Raced in midfield, trapped wide however, but with cover, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped start, sat front of midfield, wide and no cover, showed no kick. (Blood in trachea and lame right front)
Niggled along, took rail and led, headed by winner passing 100M, kept going and hung on for 2nd.
In worse than midfield, wide but with cover, didn't settle, run ended near 300M. (See Incident Report)
Jumped well, followed leader across, sat outside and about 2L off, stayed on until flattened near 150M.
Took it back, at rear 2 wide, improved steadily, caught leader passing 100M, kept on going to win by 1-1/4L.
Began only fairly and crowded, recovered in midfield, along the rail, raced keenly, held up until 300M, one paced nonetheless.
Niggled along, sat behind lead, about 2L off along the rail, crowded and weakened approaching 200M.
Travelled in front of midfield, 2 wide, ran on okay once found daylight near 250M.
Taken back, at rear 3 wide but with cover, saved ground and closed off nicely for 3rd.
Taken back and to the rail, in worse than midfield, held up but showed good finishing effort once cleared near 200M.
Asked along, settled behind midfield, 2 wide, held ground in the straight.
Settled towards the rear in 7L 7th, switched out for a run on straightening, quickened well under pressure inside final 350 metres to assert authority close to home.
Taken back to last of the small field from the widest barrier over 8L off the pace, trailed the field into home straight, produced good late impression inside final 200 metres, never nearer.
Broke well before taken back to 5th over 4L back, carried wider entering home straight, ran on steadily under pressure but without threatening
Taken well back to 8th from a wide barrier, finished off the race well inside final 200 metres, never nearer.
Settled over 3L back in 4th, switched out for a run 500 metres out and 4-wide into straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
Slowly away, quickly recovered to 5L 6th in midfield, snuck up rounding home bend to within 3L of pace turning in, fought on steadily until unable to sustain effort inside final 50 metres.

Broke well to share early pace, taken some 2L back to 3rd passing the 1000 metres, came to tackle leaders after straightening gaining narrow advantage inside the 150 metres, only to be worn down 50 metres out.

Broke well from the one draw sharing early pace before settling for 2nd just behind race leader, switched out to challenge upon straightening and hit the front over 350 metres out, headed under pressure inside the 150 metres.
Vied for lead from off the rail, obtained rails run in front 800 metres out, led the field until headed over 350 metres out and folded up quickly.
Crossed to the lead 950M, took them along slowly, battled on well from top of straight, headed near 200M, not pace of first 2 final stages, held on for 3rd just.
Began awkwardly, shifted across behind runners, held up towards the rear on the fence, brought to outside 400M, closed off well but too much to make up.
Settled down 3-wide in mid-division, responded well when driven out 500M, hit the front 200M out, was strongly challenged by rival late, caught last stride.
From wide draw restrained to race in last, raced ungenerously 1400M, 7Ls to make up top of straight, failed to make any real progress.
Held up 2-wide in midfield, 4Ls behind leader in a slowly run race, into clear 400M, chased leader strongly final 200M, got up last stride.
From draw 1 moved up to race behind leaders early stages, shuffled back to midfield 700M, failed to run on passing 400M, never threatened.
Up with early pace, tracked leader 2-wide from 1000M, challenged for the lead early straight, run ended passing 150M, weakened towards the line.
Caught 3-wide no cover chasing leaders, came under heavy pressure 500M, fought hard to stay with leaders until no extra 200M, weakened to last. (Jockey unable to explain for the disappointing run.)
Taken back from wide barrier, settled near last along the 3-path, made limited progress on straightening, never involved.
Crowded for room on jumping, ended up towards the rear 3-wide, stayed on steadily over final 400M, always held by leaders.
Reserved in midfield along the fence, 4Ls off the slow pace on settling, responded mildly under pressure 400M, just missed 3rd in a photo finish.
Held up in a 2-wide spot ahead of midfield, pressed along 500M but not going the pace to challenge leaders, no threat from mid-straight.
Took early lead, tracked leader along the inside from 900M in a slowly run race, battled on one paced in straight, faded over final 200M.
Dropped back to race towards the rear, 5Ls behind leader rounding home turn, ran on fairly final 400M, not reach leaders.

Began well from gate 1, positioned 1-2Ls behind the leader on rail, 2 wide 900M, same margin back on turn, hard ridden after passing 350M, showed very good response, hit the front 250M, kept on strongly to the line, won by 2 lengths.
Began fairly, raced 2 wide towards rear, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, taken wide in straight and passed some tired runners.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made good progress without threatening.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, hampered 300M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Clean jump, raced prominently on the outside, a length back on turn, showed no response early in straight, eased final 200M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Average to begin, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside early, 2 wide after passing 1100M, angled out 500M, finished off well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner. (Lame left hind leg next day morning.)
Began awkwardly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider from 600M, made some headway in straight.
Away well, tracked leaders, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 lengths back on turn, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Began awkwardly, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 250M, weakened final 150M.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, found rail near 850M, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off well to take a place.
Taken back from a tricky draw, raced at tail, 9 to 10 lengths back, moved closer on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame, nearest finish.
Away well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, 3/4L back on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place.
Moderately away, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Jumped well, raced better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 650M, hard ridden 400M, hit the front 150M, kept on well to hold off the challengers.
Commenced well, raced behind midfield on the outside, dropped towards rear 600M, eased early in straight.
Began well, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out after passing 550M, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Taken back from gate 11, raced towards rear on the outside, 2 wide from 800M, 4 lengths back turning in, taken wide in straight and finished off strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Began only fairly, raced at tail, 5 lengths back on turn, taken wide in straight and made good progress to be nearest on line, useful debut.

Moderately away from gate 1, sent forward to race prominently on the inside, took the lead near 900M, led by 3/4L on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out after passing 500M, made no impression in straight.
Taken back from gate 10, raced 2 wide behind midfield, found rail near 700M, 3 lengths back turning in, closed off well to make frame.
Moderately away, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Commenced well, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, kept on well in straight to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Taken back to race towards rear on the outside, 4 lengths back on turn, made no progress in straight.
Quickly into stride, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on strongly in straight, easily scored.
Taken back to race at tail, 5 lengths back on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Began fairly from gate 1, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths back on turn, finished off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Eased back, took rail, never improved.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, made early move 900M, weakened 300M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Hard ridden to keep up midfield, progressed steadily 300M to score.
Pushed early, trapped 3 wide in midfield throughout, held ground in straight.
In front, 2 wide, emptied 300M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Behind midfield, 2-3 wide, lack room 300M, dashed well when clear.
Box seat, ran on well for 2nd.
At back, 2-3 wide, progressed steadily 300M.
Slow away, at rear, 3-4 wide, dashed well 250M.
Took rail and lead, emptied 250m.
Slow to begin and at rear, wide no cover, lost ground after 500M and finished tailed out. Must trial.
Began very awkwardly and at rear, along the rail, made no impression in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, battled on nicely but just beaten by the winner a short head.
Sent forward and took lead, kept on going but headed in the last 35M.
Sent forward and raced next to the leader, 2 wide, only emptied in the last 50M.
Sat in midfield, 2 wide, pretty one paced.
Raced in worse than midfield, along the rail, did not feature.
At rear, 2 wide, made no ground in the Straight.
Settled in behind the leader, had difficulty obtaining clear running in the early part of the Straight, only one paced thereafter.
At rear, 2 wide, swung wide on Straightening, made ground and ran on strongly.
At one-out one-back, showed strong dash and battled on to the line and scored by a short head.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, did not improve in the Straight.
Pushed forward to lead. Continued to hold lead until over-run in final 50m, held on for 4th place & was only beaten about 1L.

A touch wide early before improving to race outside the leader for the majority. Continued a small margin from the lead all the way to line before over-run by first two in final few strides, close behind.

Drifted back & raced second last on rail. Stayed close to the rail on straightening, shifted outwards near 200m before closing off strongly between runners in final stages to move to narrow second in last few strides.

Lost ground after shifting outwards at start before being ridden to improve position but was left racing three wide without cover in midfield throughout. Came under hard ridding 600m before weakening to last. (See report).
Drifted back & raced at the tail. Entered last section 3.5L from the lead & pretty much held that deficit all the way to line when finishing off close to the rail late.
Raced on leaders back for the majority. Moved over heels on straightening, closed strongly to strike lead at the 50m mark & win by an extending half-length.
Raced third last away from the rail. Move closer to lead after 600m bend, only 2L from the lead entering the final section before weakening a length in late stages.
Jumped well from the widest draw, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, finished off evenly.
Began well, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, kept on evenly to the line.
Began awkwardly and bumped, recovered to race in midfield on the inside, 2 lengths or so back, 2 wide from 350M, finished off evenly.
Began well from gate 1, raced prominently on the inside, took the lead after passing 550M, led by 1/2L on turn, kept on well in straight, just able to hold off the challenger late.
Away well, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, 2 wide, headed 550M, 1/2L back on turn, peaked early in straight, kept on evenly to 100M, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from gate 11, raced at tail, 8 lengths back on turn, showed some response in straight.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide towards rear, 5 lengths back on turn, no clear run in straight, eased final 50M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths back in the middle stages, made some progress early in straight, blocked near 150M, cleared after passing 100M, closed off well without threatening.
Shifted in at start and bumped, positioned 2 wide in midfield, commenced move after passing 400M, very wide turning in, made very good progress in straight to take a place, nearest on line.
Average to begin, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, same position on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame, not quite able to challenge.
Made contact at start, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, crowded near 400M, finished off very strongly to take 2nd, just narrowly beaten.
In midfield, 2 wide, keen in the middle stages, was only one paced.
Urged early, slotted in midfield after trapped wide, behind midfield 2 wide, no kick in straight.
Sat behind midfield, on rail, closed off nicely in straight to win by 1L.
Niggled along, in lead until about 800M, box-seat by 600M turn, faded gradually.
Stride forward, but wide early and only sat midfield, asked to take rail and assumed lead by 600M turn, emptied passing 200M.
Sat in box seat, slotted back to about midfield before 600M turn, ran on okay to the line.
Raced at the tail, along the rail, closed off well once shifted to clear running at 250M.
Eased back, at rear 2 wide, commenced move after 500M, entered straight wide, improved slightly only.
Forward, on terms until crossed near 600M, remained 1L off and outside lead, ran on but was no match to winner.
Broke well but taken back off the pace, settled over 4L back in 5th before dropping further back to 6th in fast tempo onto home bend, produced good late impression inside final 100 metres.

Ridden between runners in first few briefly, dropped to midfield turning into back straight, further back in same running order 650 metres out, saved ground turning for home, fought on steadily under pressure.
Given reminders in midfield early, held similar position on the rail to the 400 metres, ran on steadily to assert authority close to home
Broke well from a middle barrier, travelled wide without cover in first few before further aloof in fast tempo in back straight, found nothing under pressure from similar position into home straight.

Recovered quickly from moderate start, settled one and then two back early in back straight, over 5L off the speed around home bend, commenced move entering straight, hit the front 200 metres out only to be headed shortly after.

Ridden positively from a wide barrier before settling in 2nd behind the fast pace-maker, over 4L back on the rail in latter part of back straight and around home bend, unable to sustain effort after straightening.

Soon took up running from a middle barrier, ran over 3L clear in fast pace while travelling keenly in back straight, maintained a similar margin turning for home, tiring noticeably when headed 200 metres out.
Settled just worse than midfield, dropped to last few in fast tempo in back straight despite reminders, further aloof after straightening.
Ridden along wide in 8th just worse than midfield, made no serious impression in the run to the line.
Soon detached and never seen with a chance.

Jumped awkwardly from the widest gate losing ground, improved steadily around the 1000 metres to reach the rear of strung-out field, quickened well under pressure inside final 150 metres but tightened 50 metres out.
Travelled wide in last few, went wider into home straight, ran on under pressure without threatening.
Positively ridden, settled outside the lead, couldn't go on passing 300M, weakened towards the finish.
Crossed to the lead nearing 1000M, led steadily, kept on well early straight, caught 100M out, swamped by rivals late stages.
From wide draw shifted across behind runners, settled near last 6Ls off the pace, swung wide into straight, stayed on fairly final 300M. No threat.
Jumped on terms, had to be niggled along to hold a position behind midfield, swung widest for home, finished off strongly under light weight, led 100M out, won going away.
Began well, from draw 1, tracked leaders on inside, responded well to pressure in straight but no match for winner's pace final 150M, went 2nd 50M out.
Caught racing wide without cover from draw 12, moved up to join leaders on outside before the home turn, couldn't keep up nearing 400M, gave ground in the straight.
Towards the rear early, moved up to a midfield position before home turn, swung wide into straight, ran on moderately to take 3rd close home, no threat to runaway winner.
Slow to begin, held up in midfield along the fence, shifted out 400M to challenge but responded only fairly. Never threatened.
Began fairly, settled towards the rear 5Ls off the pace, wide into straight, made some progress but never likely.
Restrained in a 3-wide spot chasing leaders, driven along nearing 400M, kept on steadily towards the finish for a non-threatening 4th.
Taken back from wide draw, raced as the back marker 6Ls off the pace, saved ground on inside, ran on moderately final 300M but never a serious threat.
Jumped well, restrained to race in the group chasing the pace, lay out making the home turn, awkwardly placed behind rival after 300M, had no clear run until concluding stages. Not properly tested.
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the outside, no cover from 700M, moved a bit closer after passing 550M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Clean jump, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, hard ridden 300M, headed 200M, kept on well to the line, finished 2nd.
Taken back to race 3 wide with cover at rear, moved closer after passing 500M, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening.
Slightly inconvenienced at start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear, 2 wide, commenced move 400M, very wide turning in, made some headway in straight.
Moderately away from a wide draw, taken back to race at rear on the outside, no cover throughout, a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, one-paced in the run home.
Jumped well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, easy run to turn, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 200M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Began well from a tricky gate, raced better than midfield on the outside, moved closer after entering the back straight, 2nd on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Commenced well, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, 3 wide turning in, closed off well to take a place without threatening the first two.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4 lengths back, same margin back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, finished off evenly. (Lost right front plate near 1000M.)
Taken back from gate 1, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on the stands' side, hard ridden from 350M, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Shifted in at start and bumped, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader, 3 away from the stands' rail, peaked 500M, weakened gradually final 300M.
Jumped with them, raced slightly behind midfield, 5 lengths back at 400M, finished off evenly.
Average to begin, raced slightly behind midfield, nearer to the middle track, made some progress after passing 400M, peaked 200M, weakened thereafter.
Moderately away, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Began well, raced better than midfield on the stands' side, hard ridden 350M, showed limited response, ran on evenly to the line.
Began very awkwardly, raced at rear on the stands' side, ran on evenly final 400M.
Bumped leaving stalls, raced better than midfield, 2 lengths or so back at 400M, hard ridden 350M, only showed limited response, weakened gradually final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.) (Mucus.)

Away well, positioned right behind the leader on the stands' side, commenced move 400M, hit the front approaching 150M, kept on well to the line, just able to hold off the challenger late. (See Racing Incidents.)
Lifted front feet on jumping and away tardily, always outpaced in rear.
Began well from gate 2, raced in midfield, nearer to the middle track, kept on evenly final 400M.
Quickly into stride, took the lead easily, led by a length, hard ridden 300M, peaked and headed approaching 150M, ran on evenly to take a place.
Eased to rear for cover, 2 wide, blocked most straight, not properly tested.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide weakened 250M.
At rear, trapped 3-4 wide, lack dah, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
At back, 2 wide, blocked in straight, ran on ok.
Midfield along the fence, ran on fairly, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Eased back, trapped 3 wide, on heels early, progressed steadily 300M.
Eased to sit in midfield, trapped 3 wide, no progress.
Eased to sit in front of midfield, 2 wide, just held ground.
Took rail and lead, made all.
Eased back, took rail, lack room 400M, made steady ground when clear.
Pressed forward, took rail, lack room 4-2, ran on well for 2nd.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, just held ground in straight.
Raced in front of midfield, wide no cover, failed to make any progress in the run home. (See incident report)
At rear, along the rail, checked at 250M and then made no ground thereafter.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, pretty one paced.
Very slow to begin and at rear, swung widest on Straightening, made ground and showed strong dash to the line.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, only one paced in the Straight.
Sent forward, along the rail, stayed on for 4th.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail after 800M, continued on to the line for 2nd.
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail, saved ground and closed off well to the line.
At rear, 2 wide, swung wide on Straightening, made significant ground and closed off strongly in the last 150M.
Raced in front of midfield, 2 wide, did not feature.
Settled in behind midfield, 2 wide, raced tight after 300M, one paced only in the Straight.
Sent forward and raced prominently, 2 wide, failed to close off in Straight.
Had a nice run in midfield away from the rail. Eased 4 wide passing 500m mark, straightened only 1.5L from lead, moved up to lead passing 200m, held off late challengers to win.

Raced on speed, between runners when about a length from the lead in early & middle stages. Moved up to narrow lead passing 400m mark, continued to hold lead until joined passing 200m, over-run late, only beaten 1L on line.

Drifted back after start to race worse than midfield between runners. Shifted to be the widest runner on straightening 4.5L behind before passing few tiring rivals in late stages without making much headway into margin.

Steadied after start & got back to race third last away from rail early. Relegated to second last at half-way, and then last before cornering. Entered last section 4.5L from the lead & could only maintain that deficit to the line.

Raced on the leaders back throughout the early & middle stages. Moved away from the rail soon after entering last section when under 2L from the lead before weakening out quickly in final 250m to be long second last.

Was trapped racing three wide without cover just behind the lead throughout. Was only 1L from the lead on straightening before peaking on run mid-straight & weakening a length or so late after wide passage throughout.
Raced midfield on rail, badly held up from 400m until shifting outwards approaching 250m mark before flying home in final furlong to charge to fast finishing second on line. Unlucky.

Drifted back to race at the tail. Stayed close to the rail on straightening when about 4L behind before shifting away from the rail at 250m mark & then closing steadily all the way to line to be only about a length behind.
Pushed forward to lead. Was headed in the lead soon after straightening & weakened out poorly in straight to be well beaten. (Roarer post-race)

Steadied after start & shifted across from wide gate, raced worse than midfield when wide & without cover. Continued wide around bend before hanging out badly & giving significant ground in straight. (Must trial, see report).

Raced worse than midfield away from the rail throughout. Moved three wide with cover passing 700m, came under hard riding before straightening before finishing off one paced down the outside to be beaten 3L in midfield.
Raced in midfield along the rail in early & middle stages. Moved away from the rail at the 500m mark, entered last section about 2L behind & held that deficit all the way to line.

Raced in midfield in the clear in middle stages. Eased wider on straightening, entered last section 2.5L from the lead before closing well all the way to the line to be beaten under a length in third.

Missed the start by over 5L before shifting down to the rail & settling second last. Moved away from the rail passing 700m, close to heels on straightening when 3.5L behind before doing little in final furlong, beaten 5L.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, angled out 500M, failed to make any progress in straight.
Moderately away, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, found rail approaching 900M, led by 1/2L on turn, kept on very well in straight and scored.
Jumped with them, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter.
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, closed off well to take 2nd. (Blood in trachea.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide at rear, very wide turning in, one-paced in straight.
Out in line, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, similar position on turn, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move approaching 500M, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Began smartly, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, 1/2L back on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out 500M, finished off evenly.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside, 6 lengths back, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began awkwardly, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, angled out after passing 550M, passed some tired runners in straight.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Travelled in front of midfield, 2 wide, continued on well to the line to take 3rd.
Travelled in just behind midfield, 2 wide, saved ground and ran on fairly well to the line.
Raced toward the tail, 2 wide, held ground only.
Jumped okay, slotted into midfield, 2 wide, continued one paced to the line.
Sent forward, sat about 1-1/2L off and outside lead, kept kicking to the line, won by 1/2L.
Took back, at tail and remained one-off, swung wide on exit, no kick.
Eased then shifted to rail, in worse than midfield, on rail, held ground until around 200M.
Settled in about midfield, trapped wide and no cover however, ran on nicely to finish 2nd.
In worse than midfield, wide but with cover, found nothing in the straight. (Heart irregularity)
Eased back, raced towards the tail, wide but with cover, made minor inroad only.
Forward, sat in box-seat, held up early in the straight, closed off okay once into clear running.
Niggled along after start, sat front of midfield, on rail, ran on okay to the finish.
Allowed forward, took rail and led, stayed on until weakened near 150M.
Sat midfield, along the rail, one paced and lost ground from near 200M.
Soon took up running from the outside barrier hugging the stands rails and setting a sound pace, hung on well.

Began fairly from a low draw settling some 2L back in 5th 3 off the stands rails without cover, commenced move half-way out to be joint 1L 3rd onto course proper, fought on under pressure without seriously threatening.
Began from a low gate near the centre of the track, travelled without cover in 6th some 2L back, gave ground noticeably coming onto course proper.

Jumped fairly, gradually settled some 2L back in joint 5th 2 off the stands rails, gradually shifted in for a clear run near the centre of the track inside the 400 metres, ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.

Soon taken across to stands rails after moderate start, snuck up between runners from 4L 8th to joint 3rd on heels of race leader over half-way out, came to challenge under pressure inside the 400 metres but well held.
Began well from a high draw near the stands rails, dropped back gradually to the rear of field, never seen with a chance.
Began well, gradually settled some 1L back in 4th on the stands rails, in similar position when came under pressure 400 metres out, kept on steadily without threatening.
Began fairly settling just off the pace in 2nd 2 off the stands rails, folded up quickly inside final 200 metres.
Jumped awkwardly, settled about 1L back in 3rd 3 off the stands rails without cover, came under pressure from half-way out, faded steadily in closing stages.

Moved up to race outside the lead, travelled only fairly, couldn't keep up 500M, soon weakened and eased. (Jockey : Even at 1000M did not feel the horse was travelling well enough to finish the race off.)
Settled towards the rear 6-Ls off the fast pace, saved ground on inside, responded fairly on straightening, restricted room 300M, not reached leaders.
Vigorously ridden to obtain a position ahead of midfield, came under heavy pressure 550M, gave ground quickly turning for home, finished tailed out. (Irregular Heart Rhythm.)
Chased leaders on inside, found nothing when driven out 450M, weakened and soon out of contention.

Made some early use to obtain a forward position, obtained cover from 1300M tracking leaders, came under pressure rounding the turn, couldn't go on from 400M. (Jockey : not able to finish off the race due to early fast tempo.)
Settled near the rear 5-6Ls off the good pace, stayed on moderately over final 300M, nearest finish.
Led nearing 1600M, set fast pace middle stages, hung on to lead until 250M, no extra final stages
Restrained behind midfield in a fast run race, picked up well to be chasing leaders early straight, tried hard but was held final 150M.
Held up behind midfield 4-5Ls behind leader, into clear running 350M, picked up well to lead nearing 50M, ridden out to hold rivals at bay.

Unable to slot in, caught wide no cover chasing leaders from 1000M, challenged for lead mid-straight, not pace of first 2 final stages. (Jockey : travelled in a more forward position than anticipated / Mucus.)
Switched off to last, 8-9Ls behind leader in middle stages, made good headway on wide outside from 600M, briefly led mid-straight, run ended 100M, edged out to 4th late.
From draw 12 held up 3-wide behind midfield in a fast run race, wide into straight, kept on steadily in the run home, awkwardly placed 50M out and not able to be fully tested.
Reserved to race near the rear, waited with until reaching top of straight, finished off strongly down outside and got up for 2nd close home, nearest finish.
From draw 1 settled ahead of midfield 3Ls off the pace, not quickened when asked 400M out, soon outpaced by rivals.
Moderately away from the widest draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, carried wider 500M, finished off strongly to score.
Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the inside, right behind the leader on turn, unable to obtain clear running until final 50M, finished off evenly.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Away well, sent forward to take the lead, shared the lead with rival on turn, showed limited response early in straight, headed approaching 200M, weakened thereafter.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, finished off evenly.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly thereafter.
Taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, checked near 700M, saved ground on turn, no clear run in straight, not able to be properly tested.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside, a length back on turn, kept on evenly in straight to take a place.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced prominently on the inside, shared lead on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed approaching 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced at rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, one-paced in the run home.
Taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, crowded near 700M, 4 lengths back on turn, angled out 500M, made minor progress in straight.
Away with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 500M, finished off well to take 2nd, always just held by winner.
Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L on turn, kept on very well in straight, just able to hold off the challengers.
Taken back from gate 13, raced 2 wide at rear, 5 lengths back, angled out 600M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to be nearest on line.
Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear on the inside, angled out approaching 500M, very wide turning in, made little progress in straight.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide in midfield, travelled keenly 1000M, angled out and bumped near 900M, 2 to 3 lengths back on turn, made minor progress in straight, eased final 50M.
Began fairly, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, no cover on turn, kept on well in straight without threatening the first few.

Average to begin, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, 2 wide from 850M, wider after passing 500M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, finished off well to be nearest on line.
Away with them, raced in midfield on the outside, bumped near 900M, moved a bit closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Moderately away, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide towards rear, inconvenienced near 900M, 3 wide on turn, made very good progress in straight to take a place, nearest on line.
Jumped well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, same position on turn, peaked early in straight, kept on evenly to the line.
Began well from gate 1, raced prominently on the inside, sat right behind the leader after 900M, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 250M.
Slightly Inconvenienced at start, raced at rear on the outside, steadied off heels near 900M, a bit closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Away with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 1 to 2 lengths back, there to turn, finished off strongly to be nearest on line, just held.
Slowly away, raced 2 wide behind midfield, very wide turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Jumped well from the widest draw, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, 6 lengths back on turn, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead 700M, led by 1/4L on turn, peaked early in straight, headed near 250M, weakened thereafter.
Jumped well, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, one-paced in the run home.
Began awkwardly, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, angled out approaching 350M, finished off very strongly, won by a narrow margin.
Bumped start, raced towards rear, 6 lengths back on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Bumped start, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside, 2nd on turn, took the lead 250M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner late.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, same position on turn, weakened early in straight.
Began only fairly from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress in straight.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, kept on well in straight to take a place, always held.
Commenced well, raced prominently on the inside, sat right behind the leader in the middle stages, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter.
Eased to obtain box seat, weak 100.
Hard ridden to hold the rail in midfield, ran on fairly, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, no dash.
At rear, never competitive.
Slow away, at back, 2-4 wide, progressed steadily 300M.
Midfield, made ground 200M.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, ran on well for 2nd.
Pushed to take rail and lead, made all.
At back along the fence, ran on ok.
Hard ridden early, trapped 3 wide in midfield, held ground in straight.
Hard ridden early, midfield 2 wide, progressed steadily 300M.
Eased at start, 2 wide, no dash.
Sent forward, along the rail, weakened after passing 100M.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, swung wide on Straightening, made ground and closed off well to the line.
Raced in front of midfield, 2 wide, in the Straight lay in and made minor ground only.
At rear, 2 wide, swung widest on Straightening, showed some dash only.
At rear, along the rail, showed strong dash in the last 100M and finished 4th.
Raced in midfield initially, sent forward after 500M, wide no cover, kept on going and closed off strongly to score.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, did not featured.
Worse than midfield, along the rail, remained one paced in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, did not improve in the Straight.
Sent forward, along the rail, flattened after 200M and lost ground in the Straight.
Raced prominently, 2 wide, kept on going but headed in the last 75M.
At rear, along the rail, saved ground and made minor ground in the Straight.

Had a soft run in midfield along the rail throughout. Moved away from the rail on straightening, looked beaten early in the straight before being blocked from the 150m mark until after 100m but was not likely to threaten.
Pushed forward to lead. Dashed well on straightening to hold nice advantage at 300m mark before being passed quickly by winner at 125m & weakening slightly in final stages.
Steadied after start & raced at the tail throughout. Was last on straightening before making good late ground in final 100m when closing off steadily between runners.
Had a lovely run 1,1 throughout. Eased three wide on straightening, peaked on run near the 200m mark before weakening out in last furlong.

Drifted back to race worse than midfield before being relegated to third last near 650m mark. Shifted wider on straightening before making good late ground down the outside to move to fast finishing second in final stages.

Shifted across behind runners and races second last for the majority. Shifted back inwards on straightening when continuing near the rear before dashing strongly to strike lead at 125m before drawing away to win easily.
Pushed forward to race outside the leader. Dropped off the leader who kicked well on straightening before emptying out approaching the furlong pole & weakening out quickly in late stages.
Raced in midfield away from the rail throughout. Eased three wide before cornering, wide on straightening before finishing off steadily in the late stages to hold midfield position on line.

Raced third last on rail in early stages before improving slightly along the rail after 600m mark. Stayed close to the inside on straightening before finishing off steadily along the rail to be in midfield on the line.
Had a nice run in midfield away from the rail throughout. Hung inwards in the straight, proved difficult to ride passing the 100m mark & continued to hang inwards in the final stages. No threat.

Was trapped racing three wide without cover in midfield for the majority. Drifted further back after half-way, was forced very wide on straightening before closing off well down the outside to move to third in final stages.
Had a nice run on the leaders back throughout. Emptied out mid-straight before weakening out pretty poorly in last furlong to be last across the line.
Out with rest, raced prominently, 2 wide, took the lead after passing 600M, headed 350M, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Bumped shortly after start, sent forward to take the lead, 3 wide, headed near 600M, weakened 400M, eased final furlong. (Bled.)
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, angled out 350M, finished off well to take a place.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 lengths or so back, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, trapped very wide in midfield, similar position on turn, made no impression in straight.
Out in line, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, easy run on turn, closed off well to take 2nd, always held.
Taken back from gate 10, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, 4 lengths or so back on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Moderately away, raced 3 wide in midfield, dropped position near 350M, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, slightly improved along the rail on turn, took the lead 350M, kept on very well in straight, won by 1-1/4L.
Away well, raced prominently on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked 350M, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect.
Taken back from gate 11, raced at tail, 6 lengths back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Raced in front of midfield, along the rail, continued on one paced to the line. (Whip dropped)
Settled to race in box-seat, closed off fairly to the line to finish 2nd, 1-1/4L behind.
Taken back after start, at tail and remained one off, shifted out to improve near 700M, made no impression.
Awkward to heels on jumping, then shifted to rail, sat behind midfield, directed across heels passing 250M, found nothing nonetheless.
Rolled forward, led along the rail, gave ground in the straight.
Jumped only fairly, in midfield along the rail, no kick and eased down near 150M.
Eased and sat in behind midfield, 2 wide, saved ground and ran on okay.
Travelled in about midfield, 2 wide, stayed on and improved position slightly in the straight.
Took back, raced towards the rear, along the rail, never looked likely throughout. (See Incident Report)
Eased back, raced towards the tail, 2 wide, saved ground without threatening.
Slotted in to race front of midfield, 2 wide, continued on to the line to take 3rd.
Followed and sat leader, about 1L off, kicked away on straightening, ran on to win by 1-1/4L
Settled in last few, baulked for a run upon straightening, switched in for a clear run 200 metres out, ran on well under pressure.
Settled at the back after inconvenienced at the start, came under pressure rounding home bend, only ran past well-beaten horses late.
Pressed forward from middle draw, with leaders 3-wide without cover rounding stables bend, obtained position just outside race leader over 800 metres out, weakened under pressure after straightening.
Settled one-out-one-back in 3rd, became over 2L back in 5th 700 metres out, switched off the rail for a run turning into home straight, quickened under pressure inside the 150 metres.

Travelled 3-wide in midfield from a wide gate, gained 2-wide position slightly further back into back straight, commenced move home bend and made short-lived effort down the inside of straight, no extra closing stages.
Soon dropped to last few, remained in similar position into straight, found nothing.
Began fairly from the one draw, gained narrow lead at the 1200-metre bend, led until headed by eventual winner over 200 metres out, swamped for a place late.

Pressed forward from the widest gate travelling 4-wide onto first bend, 3-wide in 2L 5th onto back straight gaining steadily to joint 3rd 700 metres out, sustained progress to hit the front over 150 metres out, hung on well.

Taken well back from a wide gate, commenced move 3-wide at the 800 metres reaching 4L 8th briefly over 600 metres out, widest of all turning for home, ran on well under pressure down the centre of the straight.

Began awkwardly losing ground, settled within 4L of pace in midfield in 7th on the rail, commenced move rounding home bend and obtained clear run upon straightening, fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Pressed forward from a wide gate before travelling in 6th over 2.5L back, commenced move out wide rounding home bend and remained very wide into straight, ran on to be nearest at finish.
Soon taken one back on the rail to 4th, became 3rd in similar one back position passing the 800 metres, came under pressure rounding home bend but faded steadily after straightening.
From draw 12 caught wide no cover chasing leaders, responded well top of straight and challenged for lead 150M out, just held in a blanket finish.
Held up in midfield along the 2-path, put in a mild bid after turning for home, stayed on without troubling leaders.
Dropped back, commenced to race keenly when being steadied for cover, raced at the rear on settling, not mustered the speed to challenge in straight, never involved.
From wide draw steadied early stages to obtain cover, held up at the rear 5-6Ls off the pace, closed off steadily over final 300M but not able to challenge first 4.
Driven to the lead, joined by rival passing 900M, couldn't sustain run and headed 250M out, weakened away.
Positively ridden, moved up to race outside leader, hit the lead 250M, fought on when pressed by rivals final 100M, just denied.
From draw 1 obtained a midfield spot along the inside, picked up pace 250M, fought hard to the line, just held by top 3 in a close finish.
Took early lead before obtaining a trailing position behind leaders, moved up to challenge for lead 300M, run ended 150M, swamped by leaders late stages.
Chased the pace, kept on same speed from 350M, well held by leaders over final 200M.
Restrained after the start, travelled keenly after being steadied to obtain cover 1000M, couldn't go on in the straight. (BLED.)
Niggled along after the start, settled towards the rear along the fence, quickened up well down the inside final 250M, just prevailed in a close finish.
Caught 3-wide behind midfield, wide into straight, stayed on well under pressure, nearest finish.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, 5 lengths back, no clear run in straight, just kept on evenly.
Jumped well, taken back to race 3 wide with cover at rear, 5 lengths or so back on turn, made little progress in straight.
Crowded start, sent forward to take the early lead, headed near 750M, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide behind midfield, similar position on turn, closed off well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.

Shifted out at start, trapped wide in midfield early, sent forward after entering the back straight, took the lead 750M, found rail 550M, led by 1/2L on turn, kept on very well in straight, won by 1-3/4L.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, there to turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 3 wide slightly better than midfield, no cover after passing 700M, 2 lengths or so back on turn, made some progress in straight to take a place.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, 3 lengths or so back on turn, made minor progress in straight. (Jockey concerned with action before the race.)
Crowded start, raced prominently on the outside, 2nd on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned on rail slightly behind midfield, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, eased final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 450M, finished off well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Began awkwardly, sent forward to take the lead, shared the lead with rival on turn, peaked and headed 250M, stayed on evenly to take a place.
Taken back from gate 13, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some headway in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, angled out approaching 450M, no daylight early in straight, made minor progress thereafter.
Quickly into stride, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, wider turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Made contact at start, raced at rear throughout, never a factor. (Bled.)
Shifted in at start and bumped, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, 3 wide on turn, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.
