Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, a bit closer on turn, no clear run early in straight, found some daylight near 300M but only showed limited response, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped start, unable to slot in, raced 3 wide with no cover, 3/4L back, there to turn, hard ridden 350M, hit the front 250M, kept on very well to the line, won by 2-1/2L.
Away well, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, angled out 500M, made some progress in straight.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 450M, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 200M but failed to make any progress.
Jumped well from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
Bumped start, positioned a length behind the leader on the inside, same position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Began awkwardly and shifted out, raced prominently, 2 wide, shared lead on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Midfield, trapped 3 wide, dashed strongly 300M to score.
Midfield along the fence, never improved.
Hard ridden to keep up in front of midfield, 2 wide, lack room 4-2, just held ground.
Hard ridden to take rail and lead, hung on well until 100M overhauled.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 3 wide, ran on well for 3rd.
Slow away, at back, 3 wide, never competitive, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Slow away, trapped 3-4 wide, never a factor.
At back, 3 wide, ran on ok.
Hard ridden early but not muster, at rear, 2 wide, dashed well 200M.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, out of fuel 150M.
Very slow away, at rear, on the rails, little dash 250M.
Hard ridden early but not muster, behind midfield, 2 wide, little dash 250M.
At one-out one-back, battled on to the line just beaten by a short head.
Raced in front of midfield, along the rail, pretty one paced.
At rear, along the rail, did not improve in the Straight.
At rear, along the rail, made minor ground only. (Roarer)
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, made ground and closed off strongly to the line.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, swung wide on Straightening, made ground steadily to the line.
Raced prominently, 2 wide, weakened in the last 100M.
Sent forward and raced next to the leader, stayed on but just weakened in the last 25M.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, nothing in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, wide no cover, lost ground in the Straight.
Forward and took lead, kept on going to the line and won by a short head.
At rear, 2 wide, swung widest on Straightening, made ground well to the line in the last 100M.
Settled in behind midfield, along the rail, held up until the last 250M, ran on only fairly thereafter.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Straightened just under 6L from the lead before closing off well in final furlong to move to third place in final 50m.
Had a nice run in third along rail. Straightened 3L from the lead before closing strongly to strike the lead near the 150m mark & drawing clear to win by just over a length.

Didn't have the early speed of others & drifted back to race worse than midfield. Had only 3 runners behind on straightening when 8L from lead before passing a few tiring rivals when making steady headway to midfield.
Had no early speed & was shifted behind runners to the rail & settle third last along the rail. Was over 8L behind on straightening & never really got into the race. Third last & never likely.

Drifted back after the start & raced just worse than midfield away from rail after being slightly wide early. Was over 6L behind on straightening before closing off well in the concluding stages to move to 4th late.
Raced 4th away from rail but hung outwards badly around the bend before veering off the track just after half-way & losing all competitive chance. Genuine excuse. (Must trial).
Steadied after the start & raced worse than midfield along the rail. Entered last section 7L from the lead before closing off steadily in concluding stages to halve margin on the line.

Raced second, about 3L behind leader near half-way. Straightened about 2L from the lead, moved up to take lead near the 250m mark before being over-powered by winner near the 150m. Held 2nd, clear of third on line.
Raced in midfield away from the rail throughout. Was just over 5L from the lead on straightening & failed to make any headway & was passed by a number of rivals when weakening to finish ninth.

Obtained lead easily after start. Held 3L advantage over second in middle stages, straightened with a 2L advantage before being headed by the runner-up near the 250m mark & weakening out in final 150m.

Drifted back after start & shifted across from outside gate to race second last. Ridden along approaching 500m, straightened 9.5L behind, shifted inwards 200m before being closest on line but being too far back to challenge.
Reared at start & lost ground before racing at tail. Was over 11L behind on straightening & never improved. Long last.
Very slow to begin, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Taken back from gate 11, raced 3 wide with cover at rear, very wide turning in, finished off evenly.
Moderately away from a wide draw, trapped wide behind midfield, moved closer after passing 1200M, 2 lengths or so back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Bumped on jumping, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, made little progress in straight.
Bumped start, raced 3 wide behind midfield, wider turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Slightly slow out and hampered, raced 2 wide at rear, 6 lengths back on turn, made little progress in straight.
Out in line, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, closed off well to take 2nd, always held.
Jumped with them, took the early lead, headed near 1400M, sat right behind the leader on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 550M, finished off well to take a place without threatening.
Began well from the widest draw, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, led after passing 1400M, travelled comfortably in the middle stages, kept on very well in straight, won by 1-1/4L.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening the first few.

Began well from a wide draw, raced keenly early, positioned 3 wide better than midfield, 2 wide from 1050M, moved a bit closer on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked near 200M, weakened gradually final 150M.
Away well, raced in midfield on the outside, similar position on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Travelled in midfield, along the rail, took inside run on straightening, closed off fairly to the line.
Allowed to stride forward gradually, sat prominently but wide, dropped off in the straight.
Bumped start, raced towards the rear, 2 wide before taken to rail at 700M, showed early dashes then weakened near 200M.
Slow out, in midfield 2-3 wide, run ended soon after disappointed for running at 250M.
Bumped start, in worse than midfield, wide but with cover, kicked on early then flattened.
Raced in front of midfield, 2 wide initially, shifted wider after 700m, battled on gamely but couldn't take ground off winner.
Sat in front of midfield, along the rail, took off near 250M, stayed on to the line to win by 1-1/4L.
Taken back, at the tail, wide but with cover, made some inroad in the straight.
Urged along, only settled midfield and very wide, wasn't in contention in the straight. (See Incident Report)
Rolled forward, settled to race outside the lead, kept on only one paced.
Sent forward, took rail and led, weakened and headed approaching 250M.
Broke well from a high draw holding 1L advantage most of the way until the 250 metres, unable to sustain effort and headed inside the 100 metres
Travelled prominently in 4th after moderate start, gave ground steadily coming onto course proper, found nothing under pressure. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Well there and up with race leaders briefly 700 metres out, weakened steadily from approaching the course proper.
Settled just off the pace on stands rail in 6th, commenced move coming onto course proper and hit the front under pressure from tiring race leader inside the 150 metres.
Broke well, settled just over 2L back in 7th near the centre of the track, weakened steadily inside final 200 metres.
Soon taken across to stands side in rear of the field, given reminders half-way out, made moderate progress from 250 metres out but unable to sustain effort inside final 50 metres.
Stumbled at start, settled not far off race leaders until approaching the course proper, weakened under pressure.
Well there and up with race leaders briefly 700 metres out, came under pressure inside the 300 metres but soon weakened.
Soon dropped to last despite niggling along, ran on quite well past well-beaten horses inside the 150 metres.
Moderate start, settled over 3L back in 8th on stands rail, commenced run inside the 400 metres, fought on well under pressure to narrowly miss 2nd.
Chased leaders on settling, held up early straight, kept on mildly under pressure before crowded for room 100M.
From draw 1 went forward to chase leaders, fought on under pressure from 400M but never going the pace to challenge first few.
Restrained in a midfield position, raced keenly 1200M, switched wide 500M, fought on one paced to line, not able to challenge leaders final 200M.
Settled down in midfield 3-wide, moved up round the outside to join leaders near 450M, went 2nd mid-straight, held by winner from 150M, edged out to 3rd late.
Dropped back to a rearward position entering first turn, 7Ls off the pace in middle stages, wide from home turn, gave very limited response, never threatened.
Soon taken across to the fence, settled behind midfield, failed to quicken on straightening, soon out of contention.
Unable to slot in from draw 14, caught very wide early stages, had no cover until 1000M, chased leaders going into home turn, no extra 200M and weakened away.
Held up towards the rear, driven along 600M and came wide into straight, couldn't go on passing 300M.
Stumbled badly at the start, ridden forward but unable to cross, left wide no cover from 1400M, couldn't sustain run early straight, checked 250M and weakened to last. (Laceration to LF leg.)
Shifted across behind runners, raced near the rear in early and middle stages, had no clear run 300M before finishing off well final 200M, got for 2nd late. (blood in trachea.)
Caught wide going into first turn before moving up to join leader on outside, kept on well early straight, outpaced 200M out and faded towards the line.
Taken across behind runners, restrained to race at the rear 7Ls off the pace, swung wide from 600M, stayed on without threatening over final 300M.
Positively ridden, crossed to the fence 1300M, joined by rivals in the lead from 1000M, responded to take lead again 250M, held on well from pursuing rivals close home.
Jumped well from the widest draw, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on very well in straight and scored.
Began awkwardly and stumbled, raced prominently on the outside, travelled well on turn, peaked 250M, weakened gradually final 150M.
Average to begin, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Out with rest, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover on turn, finished off well to take a place.
Stumbled badly on jumping, raced 2 wide better than midfield, similar position on turn, showed no response early in straight, weakened and eased thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 10, raced at rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off evenly.
Slightly slow out and crowded, raced at tail, 5 lengths back turning in, no clear run in straight, eased late.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide towards rear, 3 wide on turn, showed some response early in straight, peaked approaching 150M, weakened thereafter.
Hampered start, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, 4 wide on turn, kept on well in straight without threatening the first few.
Away with them, positioned 2 wide, 3 lengths or so back, there to turn, closed off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on outside, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter. (Blood in trachea.)
Taken back from gate 9, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed good response early in straight, blocked near 200M, cleared 100M but blocked again after passing 50M.
Began well from gate 13, raced prominently on the outside, a length back on turn, showed some response early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Jumped well, tracked leaders, 2 wide, a length back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M.
Lifted front feet on jumping and away tardily, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, kept on well in straight without threatening.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, found rail near 900M, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, found daylight near 250M, finished off well to take a place.
Clean jump, raced 3 wide in midfield early, 2 wide from 900M, angled out 600M, 2 lengths or so back turning in, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced towards rear, 5 to 6 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made some progress in straight.
Reared abruptly as stalls opened and became stuck in stall, took no part. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed approaching 150M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 600M, taken wide in straight and finished off strongly to score.
Out with rest, raced behind midfield on the outside, 4 lengths back on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Clean jump, took the early lead, allowed rival to cross near 1250M, sat right behind the leader in the middle stages, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, commenced move 400M, wide into straight, finished off strongly to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Began fairly from a wide draw, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, moved closer after passing 1100M, 2nd in the middle stages, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight.

Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 1000M, commenced move after passing 650M, took the lead near 400M, peaked and headed 250M, ran on evenly, lost 2nd close home.
Began awkwardly, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final 200M.
Began only fairly, raced at rear, 7 lengths or so back, 5 lengths back on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 100M, weakened thereafter.
Began well from a wide draw, raced 2 wide in midfield, carried wider 450M, peaked early in straight, kept on evenly to the line.
Away well, raced 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, angled out 450M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Average to begin, raced towards rear of midfield on the inside, angled out 450M, very wide into straight, hit the front 250M, kept on strongly to the line, won by 2 lengths.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide towards rear, commenced move approaching 450M, very wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, slightly hampered near 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Moderately away, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Pushed to take rail and lead, out of fuel 200M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Eased at start, took rail at back, ran on fairly.
Eased at start, took cover at rear, 2 wide, made ground 250M.
Box seat, just held ground in straight.
At back, 2 wide, progressed steadily 250M.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, never competitive.
Eased to sit in midfield, 2 wide, no dash.
Hard ridden to hold the rail in midfield, made steady ground 300M to score.
Hard ridden early, trapped 3 wide in midfield, moved forward 900M, emptied 300M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Eased at start, 2 wide, lack room 4-2, progressed steadily when clear.
Pushed early, midfield 2 wide, hung out round the home bend, no progress.
Pressed forward, sat 2 wide, led 300M, overhauled 100M.
At rear, 2 wide, did not feature.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, pretty one paced.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, only one paced in the Straight.
Sent forward and took lead, kept on going to the line and won by a neck.
At rear, along the rail, made no ground in the Straight.
At rear, 2 wide, failed to make any progress.
Sent forward, 2 wide, kept on going but only weakened in the last 50M.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, swung widest on Straightening, battled on to the line and finished 3rd.
At one-out one-back, made minor ground in the Straight.
Raced behind the leader, along the rail, lay out near the 250M, and then made ground finished off well for 2nd.

Raced just worse than midfield away from rail. Moved wider on the track approaching the 400m mark, dashed strongly to charge to lead near the 100m mark before continuing on strongly to win with extra in hand.

Drifted back to the tail after the start. Continued at the rail on cornering before shifting to be the widest runner in straight & closing very strongly down the outside to charge to fast finishing second late.

Had a nice run in midfield along rail before improving to race on leaders back from 450m. Stayed along rail on straightening, moved up to share lead at 150m before over-powered by late closers in final stages.
Had a nice run in midfield away from rail. Moved closer to the lead passing 400m mark, dashed up to momentarily share the lead near 200m before getting tired & weakening a few lengths late.

Had a nice run 1,1 in early stages before a pair further back from 600m. Moved wider on track passing 500m, shunted very wide on straightening before finishing off only steadily to the line to be beaten just over 2L.
Raced three wide without cover when sharing the lead early before crossing to race 2 wide & outside the leader from the 650m. Peaked on run at the 200m mark & weakened out quickly in last furlong.

Bumped heavily at start, raced three deep without cover early before getting 2 wide from 800m when worse than midfield. Held up for clear running near 100m but was never going to play a part in the finish.
Steadied at first bend & taken back towards rear. Shifted wider on straightening before closing well down the outside to move to third in concluding stages.
Pushed forward to share the lead in a line of 3 when holding the rail. Peaked on effort 200m & weakened out sharply in concluding stages to be second last.
Drifted back to race rearward throughout. Stayed close to the rail in the straight, made up a length or so when running onto midfield but was never likely.
Shared the lead when racing in the middle of a line of three at the front before being crossed & racing 1,1 from the 650m. Weakened out badly in the straight to be long last.

Had a soft run in midfield along rail. Flattened out on effort approaching the 200m mark before being quite badly held up between 200m and 100m. May have been closer but likely to have still finished in second half.
Jumped well from the widest draw, raced prominently on the outside, took the lead 600M, headed early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Slightly slow out and hampered, raced at rear, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, not enough room early in straight, cleared 150M, closed off well to take a place.
Away well, raced prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross 600M, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on turn, hit the front 200M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 500M, finished off well to take 2nd. (Lame right front leg next day morning.)
Began well, raced towards rear, 3 to 4 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, made some progress early in straight, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Began only fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Shifted out at start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, moved a bit closer on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.

Bumped start, sent forward to take the early lead, headed near 600M, 2nd on turn, retook the lead early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 100M. (Minor lacerations to the right hock.)
Bumped start, raced in midfield on outer, 2-1/2L back on turn, finished off evenly.
Crowded start, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Jumped well form a wide draw, unable to slot in, raced 3 wide, a length or so back, similar position on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame, not quite able to challenge.
Raced in worse than midfield, along the rail, checked 400M when couldn't improve, ran on slightly thereafter.
In midfield, 2 wide, slotted back when others im-proved along back straight, made ground and closed off strongly to win by 1/2L.
Bumped start, forward to lead on rail, crossed after 800M, gave ground 600M out and finished tailed out. Must trial.
Taken back and at tail, commenced move to be more forward upon entering back straight, left with no cover near 800M, ran on before began weakening late.
In worse than midfield, 2 wide, shifted out to improve near 1100M, led on rail from 800M, stayed on but not enough to hold off winner.
Settled in one-out one-back position, began asking pri-or to 600M turn, showed nothing and gave ground in the straight.
Taken back, raced towards the tail, 2 wide, ran on but didn't save ground.
In box-seat initially, slotted one back along the back straight when others improved, closed off okay on cen-tre track.
In midfield initially, on rail, slotted back slightly along the back straight, showed no kick in the straight.
Began positively but stuck wide, worked forward to sit outside lead gradually, asked from 600M out and finished tailed out. Must trial.
Jumped well, slotted into midfield eventually, 2 wide, ran on one paced to the line.
Began well from a wide gate, travelled keenly most of the way in back straight, some 3L back in 4th rounding home bend, kept on well to the line.
Broke well, soon settled one back in 3rd travelling keenly far side, came under pressure rounding home bend holding every chance early in straight, swamped inside final 50 metres.
Travelled wide without cover in rear of midfield, lost position passing the 900 metres, ran on steadily down the centre of the straight to be nearest at finish.
Broke well, with leaders on the rail, gained 1L advantage 800 metres out, led until overhauled inside final 50 metres.
Moderate start, travelled over 2L back on the rail, drifted further back in 5th over 3L back, saved ground turning for home, fought on under pressure to just get up on line.
Slow out and soon ridden, settled towards the rear on the rail, back under pressure rounding home bend, kept on well without threatening.
Ridden forward to share the pace, shifted one back to 2nd 800 metres out, unable to sustain effort inside final 150 metres. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Slowly away, travelled at the back and keenly passing the 800 metres, remained in rear into straight, never nearer.
Settled well behind from the widest gate, trailed the field into straight, made no impression.

Bumped at start settling towards the rear, travelled keenly in 6th in back straight, came under pressure rounding home bend and wide into straight, quickened well to hit the front 50 metres out only to be collared close to home.
Not hurried early stages, settled towards the rear 6Ls off leader, made his move 500M and challenged for the lead early straight, led 150M, edged away late stages.
Crossed to the lead nearing 1300M, led at a sedate pace, came under siege 300M, soon no extra and weakened.
From wide draw shifted across behind runners, towards the rear always, driven wide into straight but not going the pace to challenge. (Jockey fined for weighing in 3lb over.)
Restrained to race in a position ahead of midfield, held up for clear running inside 400M, had every chance afterwards, held by first 2 in the run home.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, settled at the rear 8Ls off leader, gave limited response on straightening, never reached contention.
Tracked leaders in a slowly run race, fought on same pace early straight before fading away over final 200M.

Went forward to join leader on outside, would not relax racing keenly, hit front inside 300M, kept on well to the line only to be outfought by winner final 150M. (Jockey: would be better suited being able to be ridden with cover)
Held up in midfield 5Ls off the pace early stages, ran on moderately from 350M, nearest finish.
Reserved towards the rear 7Ls off the pace, switched away from fence 500M, stayed on without serious threat.
Chased the pace along the 2-path, battled on one paced from 300M, always held by leaders.
Settled down behind midfield, came under pressure 600M, failed to respond, soon beaten.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 550M, 2 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two close home.
Began awkwardly and bumped, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight without threatening.
Out with rest, raced behind midfield on the outside, commenced move approaching 500M, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to score by a neck.
Shifted out at start, taken back to race at tail, 8 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, still 5 lengths behind at 400M, made good progress in straight without threatening the first few.
Jumped with them, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, hard ridden 400M, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Shifted in at start and made contact, raced 2 wide in midfield, moved closer on turn, very wide into straight, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, commenced move 450M, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just narrowly beaten.
Bumped start, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, finished off well to make frame without threatening.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide at rear, 4 lengths back turning in, bumped 300M, only showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Crowded on jumping, raced towards rear on the inside, 2 wide turning in, bumped 300M, no clear run thereafter, eased final 100M.
Jumped well from gate 13, tracked leaders on the outside early, found a 2 wide spot near 800M, 5 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (Bled.)
Crowded start, raced in midfield on the outside, 6 lengths back turning in, finished off well to take a place without threatening.
Jumped well, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, took the lead 1050M, headed 800M, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight.
Jumped with them, raced prominently, 2 wide, took the lead 750M, enjoyed the easy lead on turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 150M.
Taken back from gate 12, raced 2 wide at rear, hampered by rival 550M, 10 lengths back turning in, passed some beaten rivals in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the inside, hampered by rival 550M, 9 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, 7 lengths back on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Began well from gate 1, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, easy run on turn, hard ridden after passing 300M, hit the front 150M, kept on strongly to the line, won by 3-1/4L.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, made contact 550M, made some headway in straight to make frame. (Lost left hind plate.)
Average to begin, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, 9 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Jumped well, took the early lead, headed 1050M, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight, eased final 100M.
Slowly away, raced behind midfield on the inside, inconvenienced near 550M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Crowded start, raced at tail, 9 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Eased back, 2-4 wide, dashed well 250M.
At back, 2 wide, dashed well 250M, bled from both nostrils noted after racing.
Pushed early, trapped 3 wide in midfield, never improved, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, emptied 200M.
In front of midfield, along the fence, made ground 300M.
Eased at start, trapped 3-5 wide, never competitive, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings
Hard ridden forward, trapped 3 wide, weakened 200M.
Box seat, just held ground.
Eased back, 2 wide, made ground 200M.
Took lead easily, made all.
Eased at start, 3-4 wide at rear, no progress, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings
Midfield, 2 wide, dropped off 400M.
Eased at start, took rail at back, ran on ok.
At rear, along the rail, made minor ground only. (See incident report)
Raced prominently, 2 wide, weakened after passing 300M.
At rear, 2 wide, one paced only.
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail, saved ground and showed strong dash in the last 300M.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, made minor ground and battled on to the line for 4th.
At rear, 2 wide, made ground and closed off strongly to the line for 2nd.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, swung wide on Straightening, made ground strongly until the last 150M.
Sent forward and took lead after 900M, weakened noticeably after passing the 200M.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, pretty one paced.
Raced in midfield, wide no cover, did not improve in the Straight.
Raced behind the lead after 900M, along the rail, weakened passing 50M.

Steadied at start, over-raced passing 1200m before being left wide & without cover in midfield from the 800m. Continued to cover additional ground around bend before emptying out passing 300m & weakening out sharply late.
Had a nice run on leaders back throughout. Moved up to share lead at the 300m mark when racing between runners before weakening a couple of lengths in the last 150m.

Raced wide early before improving position to race outside the leader from the 800m. Asked for full effort on straightening but emptied out quickly passing 350m mark before weakening to be well beaten.
Raced in midfield between runners throughout. Entered last section just under 3L from the lead before closing strongly down the outside to be beaten under 1L on the line.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Stayed closer to the inside in the straight before closing off steadily to midfield without threatening.
Had a nice run in midfield along rail. Moved away from rail before straightening, dashed up to share lead passing 300m mark before digging deep in concluding stages to hold off challengers.

Drifted back to race third last early before moving slightly closer along rail mid-race. Held up for a run from passing the 400m until passing the 250m before shifting outwards & closing strongly to be beaten only a head.
Pushed forward to lead. Joined & headed near the 300m mark before weakening out in the final furlong.

Raced on speed early before getting nice position 1,1 from near the 800m. Moved up to share the lead passing the 300m mark, continued close all the way to line & was beaten only half-length into third.

Steadied & restrained back to race near the tail after start. Relegated to third last when 3 wide with cover around first bend, was the widest runner on straightening when over 5L behind before weakening badly to long last.

Slow to begin before being tightened & checked near the 1200m mark & racing a clear last thereafter. Was over 5L from the lead on straightening before doing best work in the final stages when running onto midfield.
Raced three wide with cover in midfield throughout. Was ridden along before cornering, straightened 4L from the lead before weakening out to be beaten over 9L.
Drifted back & was relegated to second last after 400m. Was relegated to last approaching corner before making some late headway in the final furlong when passing a few tiring rivals.
Settled just worse than midfield between runners. Steadied passing 750m, entered final section 3.5L behind before closing off well in concluding stages to be beaten just over 1L on the line.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide in midfield, travelled keenly for some distance after passing 700M, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, finished off strongly to score.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the early lead, headed near 1000M, 2nd on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Moderately away, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, made some progress thereafter.
Began well, raced better than midfield on the inside, angled out 550M, made good progress early in straight, peaked on run 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, hard ridden from 500M, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide towards rear, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place, nearest on line.
Jumped well from gate 10, raced 2 wide better than midfield, carried wider from 550M, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Away well, taken back to race 2 wide at rear, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, only showed limited response in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away, raced at rear throughout, never a factor. (Mucus.)

Began well from gate 1, raced prominently on the inside, took the lead after passing 1000M, led by a length on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed near 150M, ran on evenly thereafter. (Rider dropped whip 250M.)
Taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, 5 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame.
Raced towards the rear, 2 wide, shifted out 350M to find daylight, closed off strongly to take 3rd.
Taken back, at rear and 2 wide, bumped at 350M, improved slightly without threatening.
Forward to take rail, led, emptied and headed at 350M.
Jumped best, slotted into midfield, stayed 2 wide, kept finding to the line, won nicely by 1-1/4L.
Slotted in behind midfield, left wide and no cover from near 800M, raced flat in the straight and emptied late.
Slow out, raced at the tail along the rail, hampered at 350M, improved and ran on okay.
Brushed at start, settled in midfield, along the rail, held near 300M, continued home fairly thereafter.
Rolled forward, sat in front of midfield, 2 wide, dashed on early but emptied once entered last 150M.
In worse than midfield, on rail, got going until held slightly passing 300M, ran home nicely once cleared.
Settled to race in box-seat, battled on spiritedly to the line to hold off late challenges for 2nd.
Inconvenienced at start, settled wide in last few to straight, produced good late finish inside final 200 metres.
Began awkwardly from a wide gate losing ground, remained wide in last few most of the way, ran home one-paced down the centre of the straight.
Ridden but slow to muster, travelled wide in rear of midfield behind runners in back straight, remained similar when coming under pressure onto home turn, soon weakened.
Steadied at start and dropped to tail-end despite ridden along, trailed the field to home straight, ran on under pressure inside final 250 metres.
Soon dropped to the rear, never seen with a chance.
Began well to lead from a wide barrier, obtained rails run passing the 900 metres, fought on well to defy runner-up's challenge closing stages.
Niggled along in 2nd, held up behind race leader rounding home bend, switched out for a run 300 metres out, ran home one-paced.

Moderate start, soon recovered to within 3L of pace in joint 4th on the rail, baulked behind runners rounding home bend but saved ground turning in, found nothing in straight. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Settled in rear of midfield in 8th, hampered 700 metres out, baulked for a run in straight until the 150 metres, produced good impression late.
Settled just worse than midfield on the rail, inconvenienced rounding home bend, saved ground turning in, made no show in the run to the line.
Niggled along some 2L back in 4th, one-out-one-back rounding home bend, kept on steadily without quickening.

Broke well from the widest gate but soon taken back, wide without cover in midfield before making rapid progress onto home bend, joined the leaders but remained without cover 700 metres out, folded up quickly after straightening.
Ridden along wide in first few, gained 2nd outside leader coming onto home bend, held every chance after straightening but unable to sustain effort inside final 100 metres.
Broke well before settling wide in midfield, travelled keenly 900 metres out gaining slightly closer rounding home bend, kept on steadily in straight without quickening.
Never far off the pace, tracked leader going into home turn, loomed top of straight, quickened up to lead near 200M, pulled away to win with authority.
Settled near the rear on inside, driven along 500M, couldn't muster the speed to challenge leaders, never threatened.
In midfield early stages, dropped towards the rear 700M, wide into straight, ran home fairly, no threat to leaders from 200M.
Began fairly, moved up to race one-out-one-back, struggled to hold its position 450M out, dropped out of contention quickly.
Chased leaders 2-wide, moved up passing 600M to challenge, short-lived effort 400M out, soon weakened.
Restrained to a rearward position, 5Ls behind leader on settling, responded mildly passing 400M, never a threat to winner, just missed 3rd at the finish.
Settled last of 8, 6Ls off the pace middle stages, wide from 700M, stayed on moderately to the line. No threat to winner.
Soon crossed to the lead, led fast early stages, driven out 400M, couldn't fend off Golden Sixty mid-straight, faded late stages just held on for 2nd.
Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide towards rear, 3 wide from 1000M, moved closer on turn, kept on well in straight without threatening.

Moderately away from a wide draw, raced better than midfield on the outside early, took the lead 1350M, headed 1200M, 2nd on turn, challenge the leader early in straight, hit the front 300M, headed 200M, weakened final 50M.
Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide turning in, kept on well in straight to make frame without threatening.

Moderately away, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, short of room early in straight, cleared 300M, finished off well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner. (Lame right hind leg next day morning.)
Made contact shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, kept on well to 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Made contact shortly after start, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 550M, closed off well to take a place.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, headed 1350M, retook the lead 1200M, challenged by rival from 550M, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final 100M.
Moderately away, raced at tail, 6 to 7 lengths back, commenced move after passing 700M, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight.

Made contact at start, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move approaching 600M, 4 wide turning in, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 200M, ran on very well to the line, won by 2 lengths.
Made contact at start, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider after passing 550M, unable to obtain clear running until approaching 150M, finished off well without threatening the first few.
Taken back to race at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed some response early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually final 150M.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths back turning in, not enough room early in straight, cleared near 150M, finished off evenly.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced prominently on the inside, took the lead 700M, led by a length turning in, kept on very well in straight to hold off the challengers late.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Jumped with them, raced prominently, 3 wide, wider from 500M, peaked early in straight, kept on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, unable to slot in, trapped very wide, a length or so back, hard ridden 500M, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)

Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 5 lengths back turning in, no clear run early in straight, shifted in approaching 300M to obtain clear running, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just held. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with cover at rear, 5 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, made some progress in straight.
Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide better than midfield, angled out 500M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, headed near 700M, 2nd on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Away well, positioned 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, not enough room early in straight, cleared 250M, finished off well to take a place, just held.
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, closed off well to make frame, not quite able to challenge.
Began only fairly, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 100M, squeezed out and snatched up near 50M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Drifted back after the start & raced near the tail along the fence. Straightened 4.5L from the lead before finishing off steadily to be beaten virtually the same margin on the line.

Had a nice run on the leaders back for the majority. Dashed between runners passing 350m mark, moved to narrow lead at 250m before being over-run by fast closers in final 150m. Held third but over 2L behind.

Raced just worse than midfield, three wide with cover for the majority. Straightened over 4L from the lead before finishing very powerfully down the outside to sweep to the lead at the 100m & continue to win impressively.

Raced prominently after start, held lead fleetingly near 1000m mark before being crossed & racing 1,1 from the 650m. Continued close behind at the 300m before emptying at the 250m & weakening out sharply in final stages

Shared the lead in early stages, headed momentarily passing the 800m mark before regaining & sharing lead from 600m. Joined & past in the lead at the 300m mark before tiring out in last furlong to be well beaten.

Pushed forward from outside gate, raced wide until improving position to take narrow lead near 800m before sharing lead from 600m when racing 2 wide. Continued close to the lead right up until final 150m before over-run.

No speed at start & drifted back to worse than midfield. Improved position when afforded clear running up the rail in middle stages, shifted outwards at 400m when 3.5L behind before making up a length when finishing off ok.

Steadied & taken back to race third last away from rail. Continued well back, nearly 6L behind entering last section before finishing very strongly down the outside to move to fast finishing second in final 50m.
Got back after the start to race worse than midfield between runners. Entered last section 5L behind but could not improve in the dash to the line & was well beaten into third last.

Steadied from the second widest gate & taken back to race at the tail. Was a clear last on straightening when nearly 6L from the lead before closing nearer to the inside to nearly halve beaten margin on line.

Began fast, led momentarily before getting nice position 1,1 from the 850m. Shuffled a pair further back from 700m, straightened just under 3L from the lead before finishing off well to be beaten the same margin on line.
Obtained good position in midfield away from the rail. Entered last section just under 4L from the lead before offering no more in final furlong & being beaten 4.5L into midfield on line.

Caught racing three deep with cover in midfield before being left without cover near 700m. Hung outwards & lost ground near the 600m, straightened over 5L behind but was already under pressure before weakening to long last.
Began smartly, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, challenged the leader turning in, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line, won by 3/4L.

Bumped start, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, showed limited response early in straight, not enough room 200M, made no progress thereafter. (Lame left hind and right front legs next day.)
Clean jump, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, closed off well to take 2nd.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off well to take a place.
Began well, raced 2 wide towards rear, 3 lengths or so back, there to turn, made minor progress in straight.
Moderately away, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, challenged by rival turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly, raced at tail, 4 to 5 lengths back on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame.
Eased at start, took rail, progressed steadily 250M.
At back, 2 wide, made steady ground 300M.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, no progress, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Eased to rear, 2 wide, lack room in straight, made steady ground.
Hard ridden to secure box seat, weakened 100M.
Eased back, trapped 3-4 wide, made ground 200M.
Hard ridden early, trapped 3-4 wide in midfield, dropped off 400M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
At back, along the fence, progressed steadily 300M to score.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, out of fuel 250M.
Pushed to take rail and lead, hung on well until 50M overhauled.
Hard ridden early, trapped 3 wide, weakened 400M, substantial mucus in trachea after racing.
At rear, trapped 3-4 wide, no dash, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, ran on well to the finish line to take 2nd.
At rear, 2 wide initially, after the 700M 3 wide no cover when ridden aggressively, showed strong dash and won impressively by 1-1/2L.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, made no ground in the Straight.
Raced next to the leader, 2 wide, kept on going but only headed in the last 60M.
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail, only one paced in the Straight. (Mucus in trachea)
Settled in behind the lead, did not improve in the Straight.
Settled in midfield, along the rail, showed minor dash in the Straight.
At rear, 2 wide, after 700M wide but with cover, made ground and closed off strongly for 3rd.
Sent forward, along the rail, emptied after passing the 100M.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, only one paced in the Straight.
At one-out one-back, flattened passing 75M. (See incident report)
At rear, along the rail, swung widest on Straightening and made minor ground.

Raced just worse than midfield away from rail before easing three wide with cover down back straight. Moved wider at 450m, entered last section 5.5L behind, straightened the widest runner before failing to really finish off.
Had a nice run 1,1 for the majority. Was hard ridden before cornering before weakening out poorly in the straight to be well beaten.

Steadied at start & shifted back to race second last. Entered last section over 6L from the lead before closing strongly between runners in the final furlong before closing to fast finishing third inside final 50m.
Trapped racing three wide without cover in midfield for the majority. Was beaten on straightening & weakened out to long last.
Pushed forward to lead before crossing to rail near 1300m. Gave a strong kick in the lead after straightening & continued on well to win.
Raced 4 wide leaving straight first time before improving position & racing outside the leader from the 1000m. Was under hard ridding before straightening & weakened out badly in straight.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Entered last section about 3L behind, stayed on rail on straightening, and moved over winners heels at 200m, closed well in final stages.
Raced in midfield along the rail in early & middle stages. Moved off rail near 450m mark before closing off well between runners in final stages to be beaten under 2L.
Slow 1L at start & raced at tail. Was 7L from the lead entering last section before halving deficit in the run to the line when running on to midfield.

Steadied after start before racing in midfield between runners throughout. Eased wider sharply at 400m mark when just under 4L from lead before finishing off steadily to midfield & was only beaten 2L in midfield.

Steadied on jumping & shifted behind runners to race third last on rail. Entered last section 5.5L behind, stayed along rail in straight before closing strongly in concluding stages to be only beaten about a length on line.
Raced outside lead early before steadying & shifting to the rail & racing on leaders back thereafter. Peaked on run mid-straight & weakened in last furlong to be beaten about 4L.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Moderately away, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Shifted out on jumping and made contact, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 6 lengths back on turn, finished off evenly.
Began smartly, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, a length back on turn, kept on well in straight to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Began well from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, enjoyed the easy lead on turn, kept on strongly in straight to score.
Average to begin, raced 3 wide slightly better than midfield, no cover from 850M, 5 lengths back on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Moderately away from the widest draw, raced in midfield on the outside, lost place halfway, 7 lengths back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly and slightly crowded, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 7 lengths back on turn, made very good progress in straight to take a place.
Made contact at start, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, same position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Taken back from gate 11, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the outside, 8 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to be nearest on line.
Away with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 lengths back turning in, kept on well in straight to make frame without threatening.
Forward to lead on rail, maintained position all the way to the line, won by 1/2L.
Jumped well, then sat front of midfield, 2 wide, lost ground in the straight.
Taken back and shifted to rail, was only one paced to the line.
Bumped start and lost ground, recovered in midfield on rail, showed no turn of foot in the straight.
In worse than midfield, 2 wide, never in it.
Hampered at start then raced at the rear, 3 wide at turns, showed nothing.
Urged forward, settled to race outside leader, kicked on until weakened prior final 100M.
Bumped start, settled in midfield, 2 wide until shifted to rail near 600M turn, closed off fairly to the line.
Hard ridden early from wide draw, slotted into one-out one-back near 800M, stayed on until flattened inside 100M.
Sat in about midfield, wide however, emptied passing 150M.
Jumped nicely, settled to race in box-seat, ran on nicely to the line to take 2nd.
Taken back and raced at the tail, 2 wide at turns, made minor ground towards the end.
Began well settling one-out-one-back, drifted slightly further back to 5th 700 metres out, came under pressure rounding home bend, gained upper hand inside final 50 metres.
Broke well, soon taken 2L back to 5th on the rail, became slightly closer in joint 3rd 700 metres out, hit the front narrowly under pressure after straightening but swamped close to home.
Taken back from a wide barrier and trailed the field to straight, came under pressure rounding home bend, produced good late finish in the run to the line.
Taken back from the widest gate, niggled along well behind, made no impression from wide into straight.
Settled in midfield 2-wide, behind runners upon straightening, ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Broke well and pressed on to lead on the rail, made running until finding no extra inside final 200 metres.
Ridden forward from a wide gate to vie for lead, settled for 2nd 2-wide passing the 900 metres, unable to sustain effort from 2nd into straight.
Settled just behind midfield in 8th over 4L back, commenced move 3-wide rounding home bend going wider into straight, ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Rushed forward to 3rd wide without cover, in similar position in 4th rounding home bend, faded into straight.
Ridden in midfield in 7th on the rail, gained slightly closer to 6th rounding home bend, fought on dourly under pressure to just fail to peg back the winner.
Jumped awkwardly losing ground, quickly recovered to 9th towards the rear, hampered on the rail at the 550 metres, saved ground turning for home, responded well briefly inside the 150 metres.
Held up in midfield on inside, waited with until 300M, ran on moderately to the line, always held by leaders.
Not hurried after the start, switched off to race at the rear, nearly 10Ls to make up at 400M, stayed on fairly to the line, no threat to leaders.
Steadied to obtain cover after the start, reserved towards the rear 8Ls off the pace early stages, stayed on well over final 400M to take 4th near line.
Chased leaders, came under serious pressure 600M, couldn't go on turning home, soon out of contention. (Jockey : better suited when ridden more conservatively than it was tonight.)

Dropped back from wide draw, held up towards the rear 8-9Ls off the pace, under pressure 700M but failed to respond to urging, never in the picture. (Jockey : didn't travel as strongly as it had before.)
From wide draw steadied to obtain cover early stages, reserved towards the rear, still 8Ls away 400M, put in a mild bid in straight, not reached leaders.
Settled down in midfield along the 2-path, ran home one paced from 400M, never likely.
Crossed to the lead before first turn, allowed uncontested lead early and middle stages, joined by rival 400M, fought hard in the straight, gave in passing 200M, lost 2nd close home.
Began awkwardly, taken across to race behind midfield along the inside, bustled along home turn but couldn't muster the speed to challenge.
Driven forward to be tracking leader passing 1400M, vied for lead from 350M, gained upper hand nearing 200M, kept on well to the line holding off late challenge of 2nd.
Never far off from leaders, settled down in 3rd entering back straight, pushed along 500M, did best work late to be nearest at the finish.
Average to begin, tracked leaders on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening. (Lost right front plate in the middle stages.)
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced at rear, 5 lengths or so back, very wide turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide in midfield early, found rail near 600M, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L on turn, kept on very well in straight but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Moderately away from gate 11, raced 3 wide in midfield, 2 wide on turn, taken wide in straight and finished off strongly to be nearest on line.
Began well from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Away with them, raced 2 wide towards rear, 4 lengths or so back, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Away well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, inconvenienced near 250M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Out with rest, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made very good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, finished off strongly to score.
Jumped well from the widest draw, trapped wide with no cover, 1 to 2 lengths back, similar position on turn, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect.
Slowly away, raced at rear, 5 lengths or so back, hard ridden after passing 350M, finished off very strongly, won by 1-3/4L.
Bumped start, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Bumped start, tracked leaders on the stands' side, hard ridden approaching 400M, only showed limited response, ran on evenly to the line.
Began fairly, raced in midfield, 2 away from the stands' rail, hard ridden approaching 400M, peaked 300M, weakened final furlong.
Away well, raced in midfield, nearer to the middle track, hard ridden 350M, showed limited response, weakened final furlong.
Moderately away, raced in 2nd on the stands' rail, 2 lengths back at 400M, kept on evenly to the line.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, enjoyed the easy lead in the middle stages, hard ridden approaching 200M, only showed limited response, headed 50M, finished 2nd.
Hard ridden to keep up in front of midfield, made ground 200M.
Shared lead, hung out 175M and bumped the 2nd placegetter, ran on well to score.
In front of midfield, ran on fairly, rider dropped whip 300M.
Pushed forward, out of fuel 150M.
Shared lead, ran on well until 50M overhauled.
Eased back, never improved.
Eased at start, no dash.
Pushed forward, ran on well until 100M emptied.
At rear, made some ground 200M.
Never better than midfield, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Slow away, made steady ground 250M, blocked and checked 50M.
Eased to sit just off the leaders, made steady ground 300M, bumped 175M, ran on for 2nd.
Slow away and checked, progressed steadily 300M.
Eased back, progressed steadily 250M, blocked and checked 50M.
Settled to race next to the leader, 2 wide, lay in near the 300M and then was bumped, showed some dash in the Straight and finished 2nd.
Settled in behind the lead, along the rail, saved ground and closed off strongly in the last 200M to win by 2L.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, stayed on but headed in the last 200M.
Raced at rear, 2 wide, showed nothing in the Straight.
At rear, along the rail after 1750M, did not feature.
Obtained easy lead. Continued in lead until being joined by winner at 150m, tried very hard in final stages but was just overcome in late stages to be beaten only a neck on line. Well clear of third.

Drifted back after the start to race second last away from the rail. Bumped near the 500m, straightened 3.5L from the lead before weakening out to be beaten 7.5L into midfield in a race where they finished well spread out.

Had a nice run in midfield between runners throughout. Moved up under little ridding at 250m, moved to lead at 150m before overcoming gallant runner up in final stages to win by a neck. First two well clear of third.
Raced outside leader. Peaked at 200m before weakening in final stages but did hold well beaten third on line.
Didn't begin fast, raced worse than midfield along rail in middle stages. Moved away from the rail on straightening when 4L behind before weakening out to be beaten over 10L.
Had a nice run on the leaders back throughout. Straightened only 2.5L from the lead before weakening very poorly in the straight to be long second last.
Steadied after start & taken back to clear last. Was just under 6L from the lead on straightening before passing a few tiring runners when running onto well beaten 4th.
Was trapped racing three wide without cover in midfield throughout. Straightened only a length from the lead before emptying out at 250m mark & weakening out quickly in concluding stages.

Hard ridden in early & middle stages to hold position when three wide with cover in midfield. Continued wide around bend, bumped at the 500m & taken widest, was 4L behind on straightening before weakening badly to long last.
Away well, raced 3 wide better than midfield, carried wider from 600M, kept on well in straight to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, angled out 600M, made some headway in straight to make fame.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 550M, very wide turning in, made no impression in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, 4 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, made some progress in the run home.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide in midfield, a bit closer turning in, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Average to begin, positioned 1 out 1 back, 3 wide from 600M, hit the front 400M, kept on very well in straight, easily scored.
Began well from gate 1, raced prominently on the inside, shared lead from 700M, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Commenced well, took the lead, shared the lead with rival from 700M, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final furlong.

Jumped well from a wide draw, unable to slot in, trapped very wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong. (Blood in trachea.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, 6 lengths back turning in, very wide into straight, passed some tired rivals in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)

Slightly slow out and crowded, recovered to race 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, cleared 300M but only showed limited response, weakened gradually final 100M.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
In midfield, on rail, not competitive.
Travelled in about midfield, 2 wide, ran on okay until flattened for final 150M.
Forward, sat one-out one-back, weakened half way down the Home Straight. (See Incident Report)
Taken back, at tail, 2-3 wide, found nothing.
Jumped ok, then shifted across for cover, sat worse than midfield, showed minor dashes early before finishing one-paced.
Hampered at start, taken back in worse than midfield, on rail, showed nothing.
Rolled forward, led until 800M, sat along the rail all way, ran home impressively and won by 2-1/4L.
Asked to be prominent, trapped wide however, kept kicking to finish 2nd but was no match to winner.
Niggled along before easing to slot across to midfield, wide but with cover, ran home okay. (See Incident Report)
Asked along, shared lead initially, took it outright at 800M, stayed 2 wide, emptied passing 200M. (Mucus in trachea and roarer)
Shifted across after start, sat towards the rear, 2 wide, ran on fairly only to the line.
Jumped only fairly, then asked to be front of midfield, on rail, run ended near 200M.
Settled in front of midfield, 2 wide, closed off fairly to the line for 3rd.
Bumped start and lost ground, at rear 3 wide with cover, wasn't in it.
Settled in midfield on the rail, saved ground turning in, found no extra in straight.
Towards rear most of the way, made no impression in straight. (Questioned for disappointing performance) (Blood in trachea)
Began moderately from a wide barrier, ridden forward to dispute lead, gained narrow advantage shortly after straightening and soon drew clear. (Tactic questioned)
Inconvenienced at start but soon well there, settled one-out-one-back within 2L of pace and 3-wide entering home straight, one-paced in straight.
Moderate start, soon recovered to midfield, drifted back towards the rear in 8th approaching home bend, went very wide into home straight, made no further impression.
Broke well from a wide barrier, steadily taken back to rear of field while racing wide, carried very wide into home straight, ran on under pressure down the centre of the track.
Broke well from the one draw, settled mainly one back in 3rd on the rail, came under pressure rounding home bend and saved ground turning in, ran home one-paced.
Well there briefly, soon dropped to midfield, kept on steadily without threatening.
Jumped fairly and soon dropped to well behind, saved ground turning for home, made no further impression. (Questioned for disappointing performance)

Slowly away, well back and checked behind runners when pace slackened inside the 1200 metres, trailed the field round home bend before pushing wide into straight, went past beaten runners closing stages.
Ridden forward to lead, held about half a length advantage most of the way to the 500 metres, headed into straight and folded up quickly.
Travelled keenly with the leaders early, gradually drifted back to midfield, travelled wide without cover rounding home bend, one-paced under pressure in straight.
Restrained towards the rear early stages, moved closer to midfield passing 1400M, wide on the turn, stayed on fairly for a non-threatening 4th.
Began fairly, raced in midfield on inside, one paced when driven 500M, soon beaten on straightening.
Held up behind midfield early and middle stages, shuffled back to near the rear before entering home turn, found little in the run home. Never threatened.
Led passing 1700M, led at good pace until halfway, kicked away 350M, kept on well to the line always maintaining a clear lead.
Shifted across behind runners, raced as the back marker 8Ls off the pace, made limited progress on straightening. Never a threat.
Driven forward to be tracking leader, struggled to hold his position 600M, soon dropped to last, finished tailed out. (Unacceptable Performance.)
Reserved near last, switched wide going into home turn, ran home only fairly.
Chased leaders early stages before dropping back to a midfield position entering back straight, responded fairly turning home, never a threat to leaders.
Unable to slot in, raced wide in midfield, lost cover from 1000M, moved closer to leaders nearing home turn, not pace to challenge leaders early straight, no extra 200M.
Settled down behind midfield, saved ground on inside, held up for clear running early straight before staying on well to finish a clear 2nd. Not reach winner.
Began awkwardly, tracked leader on inside, driven along 500M but not going the pace to challenge winner, kept on steadily to finish a remote 3rd.
Slow to muster speed, caught wide no cover from 1600M then strode forward to race outside leader, fought on same pace earl straight, faded final 100M.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced prominently on the inside, took the lead 950M, led by 3/4L turning in, peaked and headed near 300M, weakened final furlong. (Roarer.) (Blood and mucus in trachea.)
Jumped well from the widest draw, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover after passing 900M, very wide turning in, finished off well to take 2nd, always just held.
Began well, tracked leaders on the outside, 3 wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away well, raced 2 wide in midfield, wider from 600M, closed off well to take a place, just held.
Bumped on jumping, sent forward to take the lead, 2 wide, headed 950M, 3/4L back turning in, weakened early in straight.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, very wide turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.

Inconvenienced at start, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, wider from 600M, no daylight early in straight, cleared 300M, made some headway but blocked again near 75M, ran on evenly to the line.
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced towards rear on the inside, moved a bit closer on turn, angled out 600M, finished off evenly.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced 3 wide slightly better than midfield, wider turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide better than midfield, found rail near 800M, saved ground on turn, hit the front approaching 300M, kept on very well to hold off the challengers.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide towards rear, 7 lengths back on turn, emptied early in straight, eased thereafter. (Irregular heart rhythm.)
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 lengths or so back on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame without threatening.
Taken back from gate 13, raced at tail, 10 lengths back, moved closer along the rail on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked on run 200M, weakened and eased thereafter.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced at rear on the outside, commenced move 600M, very wide turning in, passed some tired rivals in straight.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, angled out 550M, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Shifted in shortly after start, raced 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, carried wider after passing 550M, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Stumbled badly at start and lost ground, raced towards rear on the inside early, dropped to last at 800M, well back on turn, eased early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L on turn, peaked and headed 250M, weakened gradually final 150M.
Jumped well from gate 10, raced prominently on the outside, 1/2L back on turn, hit the front 250M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Jumped well from gate 11, taken back to race slightly behind midfield on the outside, commenced move 550M, 4 lengths or so back turning in, made some progress in straight.
Began fairly, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, weakened early in straight.
Taken back from gate 9, raced 2 wide towards rear, 8 lengths back on turn, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Out in line, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths back on turn, finished off well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Slowly away, raced at tail early, gradually improved after passing 800M, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Hampered shortly after start, raced at rear on the inside, 6 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made minor progress in straight.

Raced on leaders back. Stayed along rail in straight, was about a length behind passing the 300m mark but couldn't go with impressive winner in late stages. Held second & was clear of third. Ran well.

Raced 4 wide without cover for first half before getting some cover when three wide from the 700m. Came under hard ridding before straightening before weakening out to be beaten over 10L in midfield in strung-out finish.
Raced in midfield along rail. Straightened just over 3L from the lead, improved to third place near the 250m mark before finishing off ok in the final stages to hold well beaten third on the line.
Showed speed to lead easily. Moved away from the rail when continuing in the lead in on straightening before racing clear inside final furlong to win very impressively.

Raced in midfield between runners throughout. Shifted outwards approaching the 500m mark, straightened just over 3L from the lead before weakening to be beaten a big margin in midfield in a strung-out finish.

Trapped racing three wide after start before improving position & racing wide & without cover outside the leaders throughout. Straightened under 2L from the lead before weakening out badly in the straight.

Hard ridden after the start to improve position when wide before racing at the leaders quarters from the 900m. Was beaten soon after straightening before weakening out very badly in 250m to be long second last.

Began awkwardly & then had no speed & raced at the tail. Shifted very wide passing 600m when continuing at the rear, steadied from heels at 500m, very wide on straightening before being well beaten in midfield.

Had a nice run 1,1 throughout. Steadied away from heels & threw head near the 900m. Shifted over heels at the 400m when under 3L from the lead before weakening out to be beaten 8L into midfield on line.

Raced three wide in midfield before hanging out around bend & then being forced very wide passing the 500m. Straightened with only 3 runners behind before making some late headway out wide on the track to move to 4th late.
Began awkwardly & consequently got back to second last after the start. Continued rearward on straightening before finding very little in the straight & weakening to be beaten over 14L.
Missed the start by a length & raced towards the rear along the inside. Continued near the tail on straightening before weakening out very poorly to be a very long last.
Began awkwardly and made contact, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, 2 wide on turn, headed near 400M, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Shifted out at start and made contact, sent forward to race prominently on the inside, there to turn, took the lead near 400M, peaked and headed 250M, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 450M, finished off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, slightly improved along the rail on turn, 2 wide from 350M, no clear run early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Bumped shortly after start, raced towards rear on the outside, 4 lengths or so back turning in, closed off well to take a place.
Away with them, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, commenced move 550M, very wide into straight, showed very good response early in straight, hit the front 200M, kept on strongly to the line.
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, 3/4L back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, peaked on run 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some headway early in straight, blocked near 200M, made no impression thereafter.

Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, moved closer after passing 700M, 2 wide on turn, took the lead near 250M, peaked and headed 200M, weakened gradually final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor. (Irregular heart rhythm.)
Away well, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, no clear run until passing 150M, made good progress thereafter to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Midfield along the rails, made steady ground 300M to score.
Hard ridden to obtain box seat, weakened 300M.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, emptied 300M, was found to be a "roarer" after racing.
Pushed to take rail and lead, ran on well until 100M weakened.
Eased to sit in midfield, 2 wide, made ground 200M.
Eased back, trapped 3 wide, progressed steadily 250M.
Pushed forward, trapped 3 wide, out of fuel 100M.
Slow away, soon obtained a spot in front of midfield, 3 wide, made ground 300M, led 200M, overhauled 50M.
At back, 2 wide, ran on fairly, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Eased to sit in midfield, trapped 3 wide, no dash.
At back, along the fence, progressed steadily 300M for 2nd.
Very slow away, then raced greenly and hung out badly at the bends, never competitive.
Raced in behind midfield, 3 wide but with cover, eased down in the Straight. (Roarer)
Sent forward and took lead, kept on going to the line and won by 1-1/4L.
Raced in front of midfield, wide no cover, weakened after passing the 250M.
At rear, 2 wide, swung widest on Straightening, made ground and closed off strongly in the last 150M.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, made some ground in the early part of the Straight but weakened after passing 200M.
Raced behind the leader, along the rail, stayed on but never a threat to the winner.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, made ground steadily to the line.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, did not improve in the Straight.
At rear, along the rail, showed strong dash in the last 200M.
Raced in front of midfield, 2 wide, pretty one paced.
Raced next to the leader, 2 wide, weakened after passing the 200M.
At rear, 3 wide but with cover, one paced only.
At rear, along the rail, made minor ground only.
At rear, along the rail, made no ground in the Straight.

Didn't have early speed of others & drifted back to third last. Moved three wide passing 800m before being forced 4 wide with cover soon after, was very wide on straightening when 3.5L behind before emptying 300m & weakening.

Hampered & lost a length at start & raced at the tail. Moved away from the rail on straightening when over 3L behind before making strong late ground between runners in the final furlong to close to fast finishing third.

Steadied after 150m & taken back to worse than midfield before improving after first bend when racing 4 wide without cover. Continued to improve position approaching corner, straightened only 1L from lead before weakening.
