Hard ridden from second widest gate to lead. Joined & headed passing the 175m mark before giving a length or so late.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Steadied near the 600m when field bunched, stayed along the rail in the straight & finished off well to be beaten just over a length into 4th.

Not fast away but improved to midfield when wide before being left without cover from 850m. Continued to improve position around the bend to share lead from 500m. Weakened a few lengths late after wide run but ran ok.

Ridden forward from gate 12, was wide early before improving positon to race at the leaders quarters from the 900m. Hung outwards on straightening before emptying at the 300m mark & weakening out quickly thereafter. Last.
Began well before being crossed & racing on the leaders back from near the 1000m mark. Moved off the rail on straightening when 1.5L from the lead before weakening to be beaten 4.5L on line.

Raced in midfield, staying away from rail after first bend. Shuffled slightly further back when field bunched near 650m, shifted wider on straightening when 3L behind before closing strongly to strike lead in final 25m & win.

Began well but drifted back after first 150m & settled worse than midfield. Forced into three wide line but with cover from 800m. Raced tight & lost position passing 600m, straightened 5L behind before weakening out further.

Didn't begin fast, raced worse than midfield on rail. Moved between runners & raced tight 700m, shifted wider on cornering when 3L behind, steadied away from heels when no clear run 300m before weakening poorly thereafter.

Raced in midfield away from rail, threw head near 850m & shifted into 3 wide line but with cover soon after. Shifted wider sharply passing 550m, straightened only 1.5L behind, dashed to lead at 175m before collared late.
Began fast & had the lead momentarily after start before racing 1,1 after first bend. Entered last section under 2L behind before finishing off only steadily to midfield.
Steadied after the start & taken back to share last place. Shifted very wide passing the 550m, was the widest runner on straightening before failing to really run on & was well beaten on the line.
Moderately away, raced in midfield on the outside, peaked on turn, emptied early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from the widest draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked 400M, weakened early in straight, eased final furlong. (Blood in trachea.)
Away with them, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, a bit closer on turn, finished off very strongly to score.

Shifted out on jumping and bumped, raced 2 wide at rear, 5 lengths back, found rail 650M, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, made good progress early in straight, blocked 200M, cleared near 100M, finished off evenly.
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rivals from 500M, peaked and headed near 250M, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out with rest, raced 2 wide better than midfield, angled out 400M, showed good response in straight, led narrowly near 100M, headed shortly thereafter, kept on well to take 2nd.
Jumped with them, raced prominently, 2 wide, challenged the leader 500M, peaked 250M, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, 4 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
Stumbled leaving stalls, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move 550M, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Bumped start, raced prominently, 3 wide throughout, took the lead early in straight, peaked and headed near 100M, ran on evenly to take a place.
Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly final furlong.
Began fairly from gate 1, raced at rear on the inside, angled out after passing 500M, 7 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight. (Mucus.)
Wide on track early, found cover in front of midfield but wide, showed extra inside final 200M and went on to win by 1-1/4L.
Niggled at, sat prominently, wide and most-ly without cover, weakened near 200M.
Took position just behind midfield, 2 wide, ran on nicely in the straight to take 3rd.
Slow out, at tail, entered 700M turn 3 wide, saved ground and closed off nicely.
Shifted across, raced in worse than mid-field, wide but with cover, found little be-fore crowded at 150M. (Lame right front)
Slow out, in worse than midfield, on rail, dashed early but found no more near 200M.
Hard ridden, sat outside lead, about 1L off, emptied near 200M.
Bumped start, then was allowed forward to lead on rail, ran on okay despite caught late by first few.
Slotted into midfield, wide but with cover, ran on okay to the line.
Raced towards the rear as usual, 2 wide, was not competitive in the straight.
Settled to race in midfield, 2 wide, kept finding and got past others late to finish 2nd.
Jumped best before taking position in mid-field, on rail, showed nothing and finished tailed out.
Began only fairly and raced near the rear, wide with cover, improved slightly in the straight.
Worked across gradually, sat box-seat, about 2L off, stayed on until flattened for final 100M.
Settled in midfield on the rail, tightened passing the 1400 metres, travelled over 3L back in 5th in back straight, commenced move approaching home straight, fought on but hung in a difficult ride.
Driven forward from a wide barrier to vie for lead, eventually obtained a length's advantage on the rail 1200 metres out and steadied pace, led until swamped inside final 300 metres.
Settled just worse than midfield after moderate start, commenced move entering home straight, fought on steadily without threatening.

Soon dropped well behind from the widest barrier despite ridden along, given reminders in 10th from the 800 metres, snuck up on the inside entering straight reaching 2L 4th briefly inside the 200 metres.

Close up early, gradually taken back off the pace in 3rd and becoming 4th passing the 1000 metres, made headway 3-wide around home bend and hit the front over 300 metres out, hung on well under pressure.
Settled in midfield, tightened briefly 1400 metres out but remained in midfield until making headway approaching home straight, unable to quicken further despite given strong reminders.
Broke well but soon taken back, travelled 3-wide with cover in midfield down back straight, made headway 4-wide rounding home bend and wider into straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
Vied for lead from a wide barrier, settled one back on the rail entering back straight, remained similar until baulked behind runners after home turn, folded up quickly.

Broke well, settling in 4th before hampered and lost position 1400M out, wide without cover in back straight before making steady headway to join leader from 800M out, unable to peg back the winner inside final 250M.
Settled at the back from a wide barrier, tailed-off approaching back straight on stables bend, commenced move from the 500 metres but unable to quicken under pressure.
Held up wide in last few, became last into straight, found nothing. (Bled)
Went forward, disputed lead from 800M, quickened away top of straight to establish a huge lead, kept on well to the line under top weight, never challenged.
Began fairly, soon recovered to race in midfield, found less than expected when asked top of straight, not reach leaders.
Jumped well, chased leaders on inside, came under pressure 500M, kept on only fairly early straight, eased 200M when racing tight inside a rival.
Dropped back from wide draw, raced on outside of rear pair, plenty to do top of straight but failed to make any progress.
Went forward to be sharing the lead on outside, couldn't keep up with pace 450M, no extra over final 200M.
Reserved in mid-division, responded fairly passing 400M, no threat to leaders from 200M.
Began fairly from draw 1, soon ended up in the rear, 7Ls to make up 400M, never going the pace to challenge.
Taken back to race in a 3-wide spot towards the rear, driven wide into straight, stayed on moderately to go 4th near line.
Settled towards the rear, failed to run on passing 400M, never threatened.
Raced 3-wide in midfield, about 5Ls to make up on runaway winner early straight, closed off well but not enough to trouble the winner.
Chased leaders, in 3rd place turning for home, kept on evenly under pressure, not pace to challenge leaders over final 200M.
Tracked the pace, caught 3-wide no cover for majority of the race, kept on steadily from top of straight but never able to challenge winner.
Away well, raced prominently on the inside, travelled comfortably to turn, took the lead early in straight, headed 200M, stayed on well to take 2nd.
Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Started very slowly, raced at tail, 8 lengths or so back, still 6 lengths behind at 400M, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.

Moderately away from the widest draw, sent forward to take the lead, very wide on the first turn, 2 wide after entering the back straight, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Commenced well, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 600M, showed good response early in straight, peaked 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Made contact shortly after start, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover in the middle stages, hard ridden from 400M, finished off well to take a place.
Began well from gate 1, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 500M, wider turning in, made some progress in straight to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider turning in, finished off evenly.
Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide in midfield, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began only fairly, raced towards rear on the outside, 5 to 6 lengths back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Average to begin, raced towards rear on the inside, moved closer along the rail on turn, kept to inside after straightening, hit the front 200M, ran on very well to the line and scored.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 lengths or so back, saved ground throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M. (Bled.)
Jumped with them, raced prominently on the inside, took the lead after passing 1000M, led by 1/2L on turn, hard ridden 250M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Shifted in at start and bumped, taken back to race at tail, 6 lengths back turning in, made very good progress in straight to take a place, nearest on line.
Fast into stride, took the early lead, headed shortly after passing 1000M, 2nd on turn, hard ridden 350M, only showed limited response, weakened final 100M.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
Away well, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader, 2 wide, same position on turn, closed off well to take 2nd.
Taken back to race towards rear on the inside, 6 lengths back turning in, weakened quickly early in straight, eased final 300M. (Bled.)
Lifted front feet on jumping and bumped, raced 2 wide towards rear, wider turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening.
Hard ridden early, in front of midfield, closed off strongly 400M to score.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, 2-4 wide, made steady ground 400M for 2nd.
At rear, trapped 3 wide, lack room 400M, progressed steadily when clear.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, weakened 150M.
At back, trapped 3-5 wide, progressed steadily 300M.
Pushed to take rail and lead, weakened 250M.
Slow away, at rear, made ground 200M.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, led 350M, weakened 100M.
Hard ridden forward, 2 wide, emptied 300M, was found to be a "roarer" after racing.
Midfield, on the fence, checked early, dropped off 500M, was found to be a "roarer" after racing.
Pushed forward, took rail, faded quickly 400M.
At back, along the fence, lack room 4-2, made steady ground when clear.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, no dash.
Slow away, at back, 2-4 wide, made ground 300M.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, weakened after passing 100M.
Initially try to take cover in midfield, however wide no cover after 800M, weakened after 125M.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, weakened and eased down in the Straight. Finished tailed out. Must trial. (See incident report)
At rear, along the rail, closed off strongly in the last 150M, battled on to the line and just beaten by a short-head.
At rear, 3 wide but with cover after 800M, improved steadily in the Straight.
Sent forward and raced next to the leader, 2 wide, kept on going and battled on to the line and just won by a short-head.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, was one paced.
Began fairly and at rear, 2 wide, made good ground in the last 150M and finished 3rd.
Ridden forward from outside gate to lead. Crossed to rail at 950m, travelled very strongly approaching corner, dashed clear to win by over 3L in very impressive fashion.

Was trapped racing three wide without cover in midfield in early & middle stages. Pushed 4 wide near 650m & bumped when taken five wide near the 500m. Widest runner on straightening when 4L behind before weakening out.
Raced third on the rail for the majority. Stayed along rail in straight, moved to second place near 350m mark, continued on well to hold second place but was no match for impressive winner.
Had a nice run 4th in the clear in early & middle stages. Entered last section 3L from the lead before finishing off only one paced to midfield without threatening.

Raced in midfield along rail early. Moved away from rail & raced tight near 650m, shifted three wide to get clear running just before straightening when 3L behind before finishing off steadily to hold well beaten 4th.

Drifted back after the start, raced third last on rail early before improving along the inside to be in midfield by half-way. Entered last section 3.5L behind before weakening a few lengths to be well beaten in midfield.

Showed speed after the start, raced second before being crossed by winner at 950m. Moved up to leaders quarters near the 500m, straightened only 1.5L from lead before emptying at 350m & weakening out sharply to be long last.
Steadied after start & taken back to last. Continued at the rear on straightening when about 6L behind, held up passing 400m, failed to finish off in final 300m & was well beaten.

Was trapped racing three wide without cover in midfield, raced tight between runners at 600m mark, bumped at the 500m when forced 4 wide, bumped again at 400m when 4.5L behind before weakening to be long second last.

Raced worse than midfield, three wide with cover. Was relegated to second last on straightening, shifted to be the widest runner at 400m mark when 6L behind before closing off well down the outside to steel third late.
Crowded after start & lost ground & raced second last. Hard ridden prior to straightening, entered last section 5.5L behind before making no ground & being well beaten.

Not much early speed & was ridden along to race just worse than midfield between runners. Ridden along at 500m, bumped at the 400m when 4.5L behind before finishing off only one paced, well beaten in midfield.
Began fairly, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, closed off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.

Jumped well, raced behind midfield on the outside, bumped and unbalanced near 1350M, moved a bit closer after passing 1150M, no cover on turn, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear on the inside, there to turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
Began well from gate 1, positioned 2 to 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, unable to obtain clear running until 100M, finished off evenly.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, wider turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, made no progress thereafter.

Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail early, 9 lengths back, a bit closer after passing 1100M, raced 3 wide with cover at rear in the middle stages, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Reared as stalls opened, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, challenged by rival turning in, headed early in straight, ran on evenly to 200M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, challenged the leader turning in, took the lead after passing 400M, peaked and headed 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide turning in, made no impression in straight.
Began only fairly, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, short of room early in straight, cleared 250M, finished off evenly.
Away with them, raced in midfield on the outside, shifted out abruptly and bumped 1350M, closer in the middle stages, a length or so back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M.

Taken back to race towards rear on the outside early, moved closer after passing 1150M, positioned 3 wide in midfield on turn, not enough room early in straight, checked 300M, made good progress thereafter to be nearest on line.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide from 900M, commenced move after passing 650M, very wide turning in, finished off strongly to score.
Bumped start, raced towards the rear, wide but with cover, made nice ground to finish 2nd, 2-3/4L behind.
Eased back, at tail, wide but with cover, wasn't a factor.
Jumped well, eased to race one-out one-back, showed minor dashes before flattening.
Crowded start, recovered in midfield, on rail, no dash and gave ground passing 200M.
Sat just behind midfield, 2 wide, ran home well with a better set of gears, finished 2-3/4L in front of the closest.
Crowded start, in worse than midfield, on rail from 900M turn, closed off not bad once cleared at 100M after being held up.
Hard ridden forward to take rail and lead, kept kicking until weakened and caught after 150M.
Bumped start, ridden but trapped wide, allowed for-ward to sit outside lead, run ended 250M.
Crowded start then taken back, at tail and on rail, showed nothing.
Raced towards the rear, 2 wide, held ground without threatening.
Ridden along out of the barriers, only sat at rear, wide and no cover, made ground steadily in the straight.
Niggled along, settled to race box-seat, one paced then emptied inside final 100M.
Gained narrow running from a middle barrier gradually shifting closer to stands rails, came under pressure to hold place in 2nd coming onto course proper, unable to peg back first two close to home.

Slightly slow out and checked shortly after, settled in rear of the field some 3L back early stages, travelled keenly behind runners from 600 metres out, responded well inside final 200 metres to snatch victory on the line.
Jumped awkwardly settling just off the pace, gained slightly closer to join the leaders onto course proper, unable to sustain effort close to home.
Settled not far off the pace, lost position coming onto course proper, fought on steadily down the centre of the track without threatening.
Jumped well to share the pace alongside stands rails, hit the front under pressure inside the 400 metres, unable to sustain effort and swamped 100 metres out.
Settled some 2L off the pace near the centre of the track, came under pressure inside the final 300 metres, fought on steadily without threatening.

Settled some 2L off the pace on stands rails in 7th, baulked behind runners after coming onto course proper until obtained a clear run on stands rails inside final 150 metres, quickened well only to be pipped at post.
Pressed forward from the one gate to join the leaders, lost position inside the 250 metres but kept on steadily to the line.
Soon dropped to the last, trailed the field most of the way in the centre of the track, never nearer.
Jumped awkwardly bumping others, settled some 2L off the pace most of the way until giving ground over 250 metres out.
Settled towards the rear 5Ls off the pace, tight for room passing 400M, stayed on fairly towards the finish, never threatened.
Up with early pace before obtaining a trailing spot behind leaders, responded fairly on straightening, weakened away 200M.
Dropped back for cover, held up in the rear 6Ls off the pace middle stages, swung wide for home, made some progress early straight but run ended 200M from home.
Raced behind midfield along the 3-path, wide no cover after 900M, quickened up well early straight to challenge leader but couldn't sustain effort, flattened 150M out.
Steadied early stages to obtain cover, reserved in the rear 6Ls off the pace, switched wide 500M, closed off strongly from 300M, just held. Clear from remainders.
Never far off the pace, close up 2Ls behind leader 400M, couldn't sustain run, soon out of contention. (Jockey dropped whip 100M.)
Held up behind midfield along the inside, waited with until 400M, gave limited response only, not reach leaders.
Went forward from wide draw, shared lead on outside entering home turn, no extra passing 300M, weakened to last. (Lame next day.)
In touch in midfield along the 2-path, quickened up smoothly to lead 300M out, kept on well closing stages to fend off a late challenge.
Moved up to dispute the lead on inside, couldn't shake off rivals early straight, headed 300M, kept on for a non-dangerous 4th.
Shifted in at start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 2 lengths in the middle stages, peaked and headed 300M, weakened thereafter.
Crowded on jumping, raced 3 wide with cover at rear, 7 lengths back turning in, one-paced in straight.
Slightly slow out, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 500M, very wide into straight, made very good progress in the run home, nearest on line.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, hard ridden after passing 400M, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 200M, ran on evenly thereafter.

Jumped well from the widest draw, took the early lead, headed approaching 1150M, raced better than midfield on rail in the middle stages, angled out 500M, made good progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened 100M.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Crowded start, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out 500M, showed very good response in straight, took the lead after passing 150M, kept on very well to the line.
Away well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, angled out 500M, made very good progress early in straight, peaked on run 150M, weakened gradually final 50M, just held 3rd.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 500M, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Crowded on jumping, raced better than midfield on the outside, 2 to 3 lengths back on turn, weakened early in straight.
Shifted out at start, raced behind midfield on the outside, angled out 550M, very wide turning in, finished off strongly to take 2nd, always just held.
Began only fairly, raced 2 wide at rear, angled out 500M, made some headway in straight.
Shifted out at start and bumped, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 lengths back, closer on turn, hit the front 300M, peaked and headed approaching 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Away with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 6 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made some headway in straight.
Slightly hampered at start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, angled out 500M, closed off well to take 2nd, just beaten by a neck.
Jumped well from gate 11, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 75M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Began well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted in at start, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, failed to make any progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away well, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress in straight.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 450M, kept on well in straight to take a place.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at rear on the outside, 9 lengths back, still well back on turn, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Slightly slow out and inconvenienced, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move after passing 550M, very wide turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
Began only fairly, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, kept on well in straight, led narrowly 50M, headed by the first few shortly thereafter, finished 4th.
Began well from a wide draw, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, dropped to 3rd after entering the back straight, sat right behind the leader from 600M, weakened early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield early, 3 wide from 1200M, wider after passing 800M, commenced move 550M, hit the front 200M, kept on well to the line.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, unable to maintain position from 600M, 5 lengths back on turn, weakened gradually in straight.
Bumped shortly after start, raced in midfield on the outside, 4 lengths back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Began well from gate 9, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear early, sent forward after passing 1150M, 2nd in the middle stages, 1/2L back turning in, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly thereafter.

Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 7 lengths back, made forward move after passing 1100M, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside in the middle stages, weakened gradually in straight.
Began awkwardly, raced behind midfield on the outside early, moved a bit closer after passing 1900M, 2 lengths or so back in the middle stages, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back to race towards rear on the inside, 2 wide from 1200M, 3 wide from 600M, commenced move 500M, very wide into straight, made some headway in the run home.
Out in line, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 700M, 2 lengths back turning in, finished off strongly, just beaten by a neck.
Bumped shortly after start, raced better than midfield on the inside, dropped to midfield after entering the back straight, peaked on turn, weakened final 400M.
Hard ridden to take rail and lead, out of fuel 200M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Slow away, at back, 2 wide, no dash.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, progressed steadily 300M to score.
Box seat, raced keenly, led 250M, overhauled 50M.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, weakened 350M.
Eased to rear, 2-3 wide, no progress.
At back along the fence, ran on fairly in straight.
Pushed early, midfield along the fence, made ground 250M.
Pushed early, in front of midfield, 2-3 wide, made steady ground 300M.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 3 wide, dropped off 500M.
At rear, 2 wide, made minor ground only in the Straight.
Sent forward and raced next to the leader, 2 wide after 850M, weakened after passing 200M.
Stayed in midfield, 2 wide, kept on going to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Raced in midfield, wide no cover, nothing in the Straight.
Settled in behind midfield, wide no cover, did not improve in the Straight. (See incident report)
Raced behind the lead, along the rail, showed good kick after the 300M and won impressively by 5L.
At one-out one-back, ran on fairly to the line.
At rear, along the rail, made no impression. (Bled)
Slow to begin and at rear, along the rail, made some ground and ran on reasonably.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, saved ground and ran on nicely to the line.
Sent forward and took lead after 850M, along the rail, lost ground in the Straight.

Pushed forward, raced half a length from the lead when three wide at the 800m mark before to improving & shifting down to rail when sharing lead from 650m. Continued to share lead until passed by winner at 150m, held third.
Bumped heavily at the start before being steadied & taken back towards the tail. Continued last approaching the corner & weakened out further in the straight to be a long last.
Raced in midfield before being left three deep & without cover from about the 650m mark. Straightened only a couple of lengths from lead before being beaten just over 5L into midfield.

Began fast, led soon after start before being headed & then racing on leaders back once being crossed near 650m. Moved over the heels of leaders on straightening, dashed quickly to take lead 150m, drew away to win easily.
Shifted outwards, bumped heavily & hampered at the start before racing three wide with cover when worse than midfield. Was 3.5L behind approaching the corner before weakening out to be third last.
Raced in midfield between runners throughout. Drifted further back prior to straightening, entered last section just under 4L from lead before weakening to be second last, over 9L behind.

Bumped at start, raced prominently before being crossed & racing 1,1 from the 650m. Moved up to within a length of the lead on cornering before emptying quickly & weakening out to be over 8L behind. Track may not have suited.

Drifted back after the start & shifted from widest gate to race at the tail. Moved wider near 500m & began improving three wide, was the widest runner on straightening before passing a few runners when running onto midfield.

Pushed forward & assumed narrow lead when racing 4 wide down the back straight before shifting across near the 650m to share lead thereafter. Continued to share lead until joined by winner nearing 150m, held 4th on line.

Bumped heavily & badly crowded at start & consequently raced worse than midfield after start. Was relegated to second last approaching corner before closing off steadily to midfield but was not likely after getting back.

Missed the start by half-length before settling worse than midfield on rail. Continued in second half straightening, stayed along inside before finishing off steadily to midfield. Acceptable debut given track condition.

Didn't begin fast but mustered speed to race in midfield on rail. Moved away from the rail approaching the corner, eased wider on straightening before closing well to second place in final 50m. No match winner.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 7 lengths back on turn, made some headway early in straight, not enough room near 150M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, angled out 350M, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on strongly to the line, won by 3-3/4L.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Away well, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rivals turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 150M.
Began well from the widest draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, dropped to tail 400M, 7 lengths back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
Began very awkwardly, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, not enough room approaching 150M, cleared 50M, finished off evenly.
Began smartly, tracked leaders on the outside, challenged the leader turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Crowded at start, raced slightly behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, angled out 350M, made minor progress in straight.
Taken back from gate 10, raced 2 wide towards rear, moved a bit closer on turn, angled out 350M, made some headway in straight.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
Slightly slow out, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Jumped well, in lead and on rail until crossed near 600M, away from rail at 500M, only one paced.
Just behind midfield, along the rail, dashed nicely in the straight, continued on to win by 2L.
Forward, sat one-out one-back, pressured from 700M out, showed nothing and faded near 150M. (See Incident Report)
Niggled along, sat front of midfield, wide but with cover, saved ground and ran home nicely for 2nd.
Hampered at start, taken back to race at the rear, wide but with cover, made slight ground. (Blood in trachea and roarer)
Took cover and sat in about midfield, wide however, closed off fairly in the straight.
Lost ground at start, at tail as a consequence, held rail on turns, dashed home well from 200M out.
Urged forward, finally took rail and led approaching 600M, weakened near 200M.
In box-seat, slotted back near 700M, away from rail prior to 600M turn, on terms with lead at exit, kicked on until no extra late.
Jumped only fairly, sat towards the rear, on rail, showed nothing in the straight.
Eased to be in worse than midfield, wide but with cover, wasn't a factor.
Raced just in front of midfield, on rail, one paced and found no more inside final 150M.
Broke well from the one draw, steadied pace in front onto back straight, headed 750 metres out and swamped for a placing inside final 50 metres.

Jostled at the start, settled two back in 5th or 6th 2-wide, hampered when pace slackened 950 metres out before making swift headway from the 800 metres to prominent position 3-wide, found no extra in home straight.

Taken back across to the rail from a wide gate settling in worse than midfield, gained closer in slackened pace into back straight, carried backward at the 700 metres but snuck back up on the rail making home turn, fought on steadily.
Settled in rear on the rail, saved ground hugging the rail turning in, fought on steadily without quickening.

Broke well from a middle barrier settling in midfield, commenced move 900 metres out making swift headway to lead on the rail 700 metres out, kicked 2L clear under pressure early in straight and hang on well.
Began well settling one-out-one-back, became 2L back in 4th early in back straight, came under pressure to hold place from the 700 metres but soon weakened into home straight.

Pressed forward to vie for lead from the wideset gate, disputed lead around first bend before shifting one back to 2nd into back straight, remained close up until after straightening for home, faded under pressure.
Taken back from a wide gate, dropped to last 600 metres out, given reminders rounding home bend and wide into straight, went past well-beaten horses down the centre of the track.
Broke well from a middle barrier settling just worse than midfield and 3-wide most of the way, fought on well down the centre of the track from a similar position into home straight.
Settling one back on the rail before shuffled two back when pace slackened inside the 800 metres, switched off rail for a run after straightening, ran on steadily without threatening. (Lame)
Crowded at start settling in forward of midfield on the rail, pulled closer when pace slackened early in back straight, carried backward 700 metres out, found nothing in home straight. (Mucus)
Settled at the back, commenced move 600 metres out, circled the field 5-wide around home bend and wider into straight, fought on steadily down the centre of the track.
From wide draw caught racing 3-wide towards the rear, 6Ls to make up 400M, finished off well under top weight, no match for winner final 100M.
Steadied early stages to obtain a position closer to the rail, near last turning in, closed off well but no clear running over final 50M, not properly tested.
Began well, dropped back to race 3-wide in midfield, fought on well under pressure in straight, outsprinted by first 2 late stages.
Settled down in midfield along the inside, pushed along 500M but never going the pace to challenge, faded 150M out.
Caught wide no cover chasing leaders, made the turn after 1000M awkwardly, gave ground passing 500M, dropped away.
Hard driven early stages to obtain a trailing position behind leader, had every chance turning home, held 2nd until 80M when swamped by pursuing rivals.
Failed to muster speed, raced at the rear 7-8Ls off the pace, ran on strongly down outside over final 250M, led nearing 50M, won going away.
Jumped well, soon restrained to race behind midfield, held up for clear running home turn and early straight, responded only fairly over final 200M, never threatened.
From draw 1 quickly moved to a clear lead, raced keenly middle stages, kept on well until no extra 100M, swamped by rivals close home.
Steadied to obtain cover form wide draw, raced behind midfield, in 8th spot 400M, stayed on without threatening.
Held up in midfield early stages, moved closer home turn, found disappointingly little when asked passing 400M. (Jockey : never comfortable on tonight's track.)
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 100M, kept on well to the line.
Began very awkwardly, recovered, took the lead approaching 1000M, led by 3/4L on turn, peaked early in straight, headed 200M, weakened gradually final 150M.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 400M, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 1, took the early lead, headed approaching 1000M, sat right behind the leader in the middle stages, hit the front 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 100M.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, similar position on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening the first two.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 6 lengths or so back on turn, very wide into straight, made no impression in the run home.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off well to make frame without threatening.
Bumped start, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Shifted out at start, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, emptied early in straight, eased final furlong.
Moderately away from a tricky draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover after passing 800M, 1-1/2L back on turn, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect.
Away with them, raced 3 wide with cover at rear, 5 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Commenced well, raced prominently, 2 wide, 3/4L back on turn, showed limited response early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, weakened gradually in straight.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide better than midfield early, 2 wide from 800M, 4 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter.
Moderately away from gate 1, sat right behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to take 2nd without threatening.
Taken back from gate 10, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out after passing 500M, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear throughout, never a factor. (Bled.) (Roarer.)
Began well, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead 950M, travelled well to turn, ridden after passing 300M, showed very good response, ran on strongly to the line.
Taken back from gate 9, raced behind midfield on the outside, 6 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight to make frame.
Away well, sent forward to take the early lead, headed near 950M, 2nd on turn, angled towards the stands' rail after passing 450M, kept on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, hard ridden approaching 500M, weakened early in straight, eased final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly and bumped, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed some response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Away with them, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, 5 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, found rail near 500M, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, weakened 250M.
Took rail and lead easily, hung on until 250M overhauled.
Midfield, 2 wide, progressed steadily 300M to score.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, raced keenly, out of fuel 150M.
Hard ridden early, behind midfield, progressed steadily 300M.
Midfield along the fence, just held ground in straight.
Slow away, at rear, ran on fairly.
Pushed to secure box seat, never improved.
Never a factor, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Raced behind the lead, along the rail, stayed on but headed in the last 75M.
Raced in midfield, wide no cover, made ground steadily and battled on to the line, just beaten by a neck.
At rear, along the rail, made minor ground only.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, swung wide on Straightening, battled on to the line and won by a neck margin.
Forward and raced next to the leader, 2 wide, weakened passing 50M.
At rear, 3 wide but with cover, swung to the outside rail on Straightening, closed off strongly in the last 100M.
At rear, 2 wide, pretty one paced.

Pushed forward to lead. Shifted away from the rail passing the 500m, straightened in the center of track, headed by the winner at 250m, hung outwards when tying hard in late stages, only beaten a neck into third.

Steadied from gate 12 & taken back to share last place when racing on the rail. Continued at the rear on straightening before passing a few tiring rivals when running onto well beaten midfield finish from the back.

Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Drifted slightly further back approaching corner, entered last section 3.5L behind, was the only runner to stay along inside rail in straight but could make no relative headway.

Began awkwardly & unbalanced before being trapped racing 4 wide without cover throughout when just worse than midfield. Forced very wide on straightening before failing to run on in the straight. Beaten about 10L.

Raced on leaders back for the majority. Steadied from leaders heels approaching 700m, had clear running entering last section when only 1L from the lead before finishing well in final stages to only be beaten 1.5L on line.
Began well but was steadied from gate 10 and taken back to share last place when away from the rail. Virtually last on straightening & weakened out poorly to be beaten over 11L.
Shifted across behind runners before racing three wide with cover when worse than midfield. Entered last section 3L from lead, passed a few rivals when running onto 5th place beaten a similar margin.

Crowded at start before racing third last on rail. Was bumped heavily when attempting to improve between runners at 500m, entered last section about 3L from the lead & finished off only one paced to midfield.

Raced three deep in midfield before being left wide & without cover after the 900m mark. Shifted out to be near the outside rail after straightening before closing well all the way to line to finish only a neck behind.
Raced in midfield between runners. Straightened only 2.5L from the lead before emptying mid-straight & weakening out quickly in final stages.
Pushed forward & raced outside the leader. Came out to the center of the track in the straight but emptied on run near the 300m & weakened out quickly in last furlong.
Drifted back after the start to race worse than midfield between runners. Was bumped heavily near the 500m, entered last section with only two runners behind & failed to run on & was well beaten.
Had a nice run 1,1. Eased three wide near the 550m, shifted out towards the outside rail soon after straightening, dug deep in late stages to hold off challengers & win by a neck.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Stayed nearer to the rail on straightening when only 2.5L from the lead before weakening very badly in last 150m to be beaten over 11L.
Shifted out on jumping, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, commenced move 500M, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Inconvenienced at start, raced towards rear on the outside, 4 to 5 lengths back, there to turn, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted out at start, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, finished off strongly to score by a head.

Jumped with them, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, took the lead near 950M, challenged by rivals turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two late, just narrowly beaten.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Away well, took the early lead, headed 950M, 2nd on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame, always held.
Away well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide after passing 600M, inconvenienced near 350M, kept on evenly in straight.
Crowded on jumping, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, moved closer after passing 600M, 4 wide turning in, finished off well to take 2nd, just narrowly beaten.
Bumped start, raced at rear on the inside, checked near 700M, 6 lengths back on turn, weakened early in straight.
Began well form the widest draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, improved on turn, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home, just missed frame. (See Racing Incidents.)
Inconvenienced at start, raced at rear on the outside, 7 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced behind midfield on the inside, checked near 700M, saved ground on turn, made some progress in straight.
Niggled along, sat box-seat, dashed home well to win by 1L and with something in hand.
Eased to be worse than midfield, 2 wide, found noth-ing on the outside track.
Jumped only fairly, at rear, 2 wide, swung widest to outside rail, closed off nicely to take 3rd.
Sat front of midfield, wide and no cover, lost ground in the straight. (Blood in trachea)
Jumped awkward, settled in about midfield, on rail, closed off okay on the inner part of the track.
Began smartly, trapped wide then slotted into mid-field, wide but with cover, continued nicely on outside track, finished 1L behind the winner.
Urged forward to sit outside lead, found no kick on centre track, run ended near 250M. (See Incident Re-port)
Settled to race one-out one-back, one paced and raced greenly on centre track.
In front of midfield, 3 wide until slotted in 2 wide at 700M, gave ground from 500M out.
Sent forward, took rail and led with relatively ease, chose centre track, ran on until about 250M only.
Slow out, raced at the tail, 2 wide, swung to the fa-vored outside track on exiting, held ground only.
Raced just front of midfield, along the rail, one paced on the inner track, began empting late.
Travelled keenly 3-wide in midfield, lost position rounding home bend, went very wide into straight, kept on steadily near stands rails of the wet track.
Led off the rail early, ceded advantage 1000 metres out, inconvenienced becoming one-out-one-back rounding home bend, fought on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Ridden forward to join the leaders, shifted one back approaching home bend 1000 metres out, weakened under pressure on home bend.
Broke well and up with the leaders early stages, shifted 2L back to 6th passing the 900 metres and 7th on home bend, tight between runners early in straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
Settled in midfield near the rail, carried backward inside the 1100 metres out travelling towards the rear on home bend, weakened under pressure in straight.
Began well from a wide gate, hit the front briefly 1100 metres out, ceded advantage on the rail coming onto home bend, stuck to the inside rail of the wet track in home straight, soon weakened.

Inconvenienced at start and soon dropped well behind, trailed the field most of the way to the 500 metres, saved ground entering home straight, unable to sustain effort on the inside of the wet track inside final 150 metres.
Settled behind midfield on the rail, switched near the centre of the wet track on straightening, found nothing. (Bled)
Ridden forward to join the leaders, shifted one back to 3rd coming onto home bend, switched to the centre of the wet track entering straight, kept on steadily without quickening.
Settled in last few travelling 3-wide with cover, went very wide into straight travelling near stands side of the wet track, soon weakened.
Settled not far off the pace in 6th or 7th on the rail, saved ground on the inside turning for home, switched to the centre of the wet track on straightening, soon found no extra.
Settled just worse than midfield, inconvenienced and lost position 900 metres out shuffling further back rounding home bend, one-paced in straight.
Settled well behind from a wide gate and waited with, shifted near the outside of the track for a clear run after straightening, ran on well to hit the front under pressure 200 metres out.
Pressed forward from the widest gate, obtained lead 2-wide 900 metres out, switched to the centre of the wet track entering straight, weakened under pressure over 200 metres out.
Settled down in midfield 2-wide, held up for clear running rounding home turn and early straight, closed off well from 250M, awkwardly placed late.
Moved up to track leader, caught wide no cover during the race, battled on well towards the line, nearest finish.
Obtained a trailing position behind leader, challenged for the lead 400M, led 250M out, joined by eventual winner late stages, fought hard just failed.
From wide draw shifted across behind runners early stages, last entering home turn, swung widest home, stayed on without threat final 300M, always held by leaders.
Reserved in mid-division, gave good response when driven out 350M, quickened to challenge for the lead 150M, got up close home.
Driven to lead from wide draw, led evenly, joined by rivals from 400M, fought on to 300M then weakened rapidly to finish 2nd last.
Unable to slot in from wide draw, caught wide no cover chasing leaders, found little when asked top of straight, soon gave ground to finish at the rear of the field. (Lame next day.)
Towards the rear 3-wide, closed off moderately over final 350M to be nearest at the line. Just missed 3rd.
Lost ground at the start, settled towards the rear on inside, moved up to 3rd early straight, fought on at same pace to line, out of contention 150M.
Chased leaders, driven out 400M but couldn't muster the speed to challenge, faded over final 200M.
Took up midfield position along the 3-path, wide into straight, finished off only one-paced. Never able to challenge. (Jockey : circumstances of the race didn't suit.)
Commenced well, raced prominently, 3 wide, found a 2 wide spot near 950M, commenced move after passing 650M, showed some response early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened final 150M.
Began awkwardly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, closed off well to take a place without threatening.
Taken back from gate 10, raced at tail, 5 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
Shifted in at start and bumped, sent forward to race prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross near 850M, sat right behind the leader on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside, shared lead from 550M, led by 1/2L early in straight, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 150M, finished 2nd.

Away with them, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead near 1050M, found rail 850M, shared the lead with rivals 550M, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide on turn, showed limited response early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened final 100M.
Average to begin, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, no cover after 900M, very wide turning in, weakened early in straight, eased final furlong.
Began only fairly, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide on turn, peaked on run 300M, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, very wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Began well from gate 12, raced towards rear on the outside, commenced move 600M, very wide turning in, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 150M, ran on very well to the line.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, same position on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Began awkwardly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Hampered start, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Veered sharply left exiting gates and nearly unseated rider, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 550M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Taken back from gate 11, raced 2 wide at rear, angled out after passing 550M, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Hampered start, raced in midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer on turn, angled out early in straight, kept on evenly in straight.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide from 550M, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased final 150M.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide better than midfield, similar position on turn, angled out early in straight, closed off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, moved closer on turn, angled towards stands' rail early in straight, kept on steadily to the line.
Moderately away, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L on turn, angled towards stands' rail early in straight, ran on well but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
Hampered start, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, angled towards stands' rail early in straight, finished off strongly to score.
Moderately away from gate 9, sent forward to take the lead, headed 700M, 2nd on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Taken back from gate 11, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 500M, hard ridden after passing 400M, finished very strongly to score.
Shifted in at start and bumped, tracked leader, 3 wide, 2 wide from 1050M, 2 lengths back on turn, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 100M.

Moderately away from gate 12, raced better than midfield on the outside, sent forward after passing 800M, took the lead 700M, led by a length on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out 500M, 6 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Crowded on jumping, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths back, same margin back on turn, failed to close off in straight. (Blood in trachea.)
Began smartly from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened quickly thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off well to take a place without threatening.
Taken back to race at tail, 7 lengths or so back, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, made very good progress in straight to take 2nd.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide in midfield, wider from 500M, very wide turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide better than midfield, wider turning in, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Away with them, raced 2 wide at rear, commenced move 550M, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, ran on well for 3rd, checked 200M.
Midfield, 2 wide, made ground 300M for 2nd.
Eased at start, 2 wide at rear, progressed steadily 250M.
Pushed to hold the rail in midfield, no progress.
Eased back, took rail, made ground 250M.
Took rail and lead, emptied 200M.
Midfield, 2 wide, progressed steadily 300M to score.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, weakened 150M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Eased at start, never a factor.
Pushed to secure box seat, out of fuel 100M.
Very slow away, never competitive.
Eased back, 2 wide, ran on fairly.
Raced in front of midfield, along the rail, ran on fairly in the Straight.
Raced prominently, along the rail, failed to make any progress in the run home. (See incident report)
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail, saved ground and showed good kick in the last 150M and finished off strongly to take 2nd.
At rear, along the rail, closed off strongly in the Straight and won by 1/2L.
Rolled forward from a wide barrier, took lead after 950M, weakened in the last 100M.
At rear, along the rail, closed off only fairly to the line.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, swung wide on Straightening, showed little dash in the last 100M.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, swung widest on Straightening, only one paced.
Sent forward and raced prominently, 2 wide, failed to close off in straight.
Settled in midfield, 2 wide, only one paced in the Straight.
At rear, 2 wide, swung widest on Straightening, made minor ground only.
At one-out one-back after 1000M, showed some dash in the early part of the Straight but just weakened in the last 50M.
Clipped heels & stumbled at first bend before getting nice run 1,1 throughout. Straightened only a length behind and pretty much maintained that deficit all the way to line when holding 4th place.

Shifted across to the rail after the start & raced in midfield throughout. Was 4L behind on straightening but could make no headway & was passed by a few rivals to finish a non-threatening 9th. (Irregular heart rhythm).

Steadied after start & raced second last early before improving between runners to be just worse than midfield from 900m. Eased into clear running after straightening before making strong late ground to be only 1.5L behind.

Raced wide in midfield early before being hampered & taken very wide approaching the 900m before steadying back to second last. Relegated to last near 600m, moved 4 wide 400m, was the widest in straight but failed to run on.

Slow 1L at start, raced rearward before being crowded & losing momentum near the 850m. Continued near the tail on straightening before passing one or two tiring rivals without providing a genuine threat. (See report).
Pushed forward & raced outside the leader. Assumed narrow lead mid-straight & dug deep in late stages to narrowly hold off challenger in final stages to win.
Began only fairly & had no early speed & raced near the tail throughout. Failed to improve at any stage & was last.

Raced in midfield between runners before being badly checked at the first corner & losing ground. Raced three wide at the back thereafter before becoming keen & checking off heels at 700m. Unable to get into race thereafter.

Raced wide early, taken even wider around first bend before ultimately settling three deep without cover in midfield. Continued wide around bend before finishing off ok down the outside to only be beaten 3L into midfield.

Crowded & steadied between runners before being checked & losing ground at the first bend. Rebalanced & continued in midfield away from rail, eased wider on straightening before closing strongly to third, beaten under 1L.
Raced on leaders back. Bumped the running rail & became unbalanced passing the 900m. Stayed close to the rail in straight, closed strongly in final stages but fell a short head behind on line.
Showed early speed to lead. Joined & headed by winner at the 175m before battling on fairly to only be beaten 2L into midfield.

Began smartly, raced 3 wide better than midfield early, sent forward after passing 1000M, took the lead 900M, led by a length on turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 150M.
Shifted out at start and bumped, taken back to race at tail, 6 lengths back, commenced move after passing 600M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Bumped start, raced prominently but trapped very wide early, 2 wide from 700M, 2nd on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Away well, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, allowed rivals to cross near 800M, 2 lengths or so back on turn, finished off evenly.
Began well, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, dropped towards rear 800M, 3 lengths back turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted out at start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Began only fairly, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, there to turn, made minor progress in straight.
Inconvenienced at start, raced towards rear on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 600M, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, moved closer after passing 650M, 1 to 2 lengths back on turn, finished off well to take a place.

Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, closed off well to make frame without threatening the first few.

Jumped with them, sent forward to take the early lead, headed 900M, allowed the leader to cross 700M, sat right behind the leader on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened thereafter.
Began awkwardly and stumbled on jumping, raced at rear on the inside, 5 lengths back on turn, one-paced in the run home.
Jumped best, slotted into midfield, 2 wide, took run on inner rail in straight, ran on well to the line to take 3rd.
Settled in one-out one-back position, about 2-1/2L off at 600M, took time to gather early but found extra to finish off well inside final 100M.
Bumped start, wide early and shifted to rail near 700M, midfield all way, produced nice dash home to win again by 1/2L.
Travelled in worse than midfield, along the rail, con-tinued on the line.
Taken back, at rear 2 wide, held rounding Home Turn, made some improvement in the straight.
Forward, sat outside lead, run ended passing 200M.
Began only fairly, raced towards the rear, on rail, improved steadily in the straight.
Niggled early, allowed forward gradually and into lead, took rail near 700M, continued on nicely to fin-ish 2nd, 1/2L behind.
Bumped start, took cover in just behind midfield, but wide, failed to close off in the straight. (See Incident Report)
Awkward away, in worse than midfield, 2 wide, made no impression in the straight.
Taken back, at tail, wide but with cover, made ground steadily and closed off well late despite lay in at 50M.
Raced in the box-seat, 1-1/4L at exit, kept going to the line, only the others were better.
Steadied shortly after start travelling keenly and wide in last few, commenced move rounding home bend and went wider into straight, never nearer despite tightened 50 metres out.
Settled one back in 4th on the rail, switched off heels for a run over 200 metres out, fought on steadily without threatening.
Recovered quickly from poor start, travelled keenly within 2L of pace in 4th, became 5th onto home bend, fought on steadily without quickening under pressure.
Taken back from the widest gate, trailed the field before gaining closer inside the 750 metres, saved ground on the rail turning in, ran on steadily.

Pressed forward after moderate start from a wide gate, travelled 4-wide in 2nd before gaining closer to rail alongside race leader 850 metres out, hit the front briefly inside the 200 metres only to be headed over 50 metres out.
Crowded at start, travelled keenly in rear of the field, gradually shuffled back to rear onto home bend, made up good ground down the centre of the straight to be nearest at finish.

Settled just off the pace after unbalanced at start, became 6th in rear of midfield before shuffled back to 8th onto home bend, fought on well to be nearest at finish despite tight between runners early in straight.

Soon dropped well behind and wide without cover early in back straight, shifted further back for cover 700 metres out, made short-lived effort 4-wide rounding home bend, fought nothing after straightening.
Began well before taken back to midfield in 5th 3-wide without cover, made short-lived effort around home bend from the 550 metres to be close-up 4th entering straight, soon weakened.

Slightly slow out, ridden along just worse than midfield in 7th, awkwardly placed behind runners when tempo slackened inside the 650 metres, saved ground turning for home and snuck up on the rail to prevail in final few strides.

Ridden forward from a wide gate to lead 1100 metres out, obtained rails run 800 metres out and held narrow advantage until headed over 200 metres out, fought on dourly but unable to defy winner's late charge.
Held up in midfield along the inside, 6Ls off the pace middle stages, kept on steadily final 300M but always held by leaders.
Always prominent, chased leader 2-wide from 1200M, moved up 450M vying for the lead, fought hard but not finishing pace of first 2 final 150M.
Held up 2-wide in midfield, lay out after 1300M, came under serious pressure 500M, soon gave ground and out of contention.
From draw 1 took up a prominent position tracking the pace, loomed behind leaders 400M, quickened up well to lead mid-straight, edged clear towards the line.
Slow to begin, settled down towards the rear, bustled along 600M but didn't respond to urging, never going the pace to challenge.
In 5th place chasing leaders, 4Ls off the pace entering final turn, took time to muster on straightening, did best work late to be nearest at the line.

From wide draw shifted across to race near the rear, made home turn awkwardly before finding disappointingly little in the straight. (Jockey : didn't travel as comfortably as it had for him in the past.)
Began well and led early stages, tracked leader from 1200M, every chance on straightening, stayed on well to take 2nd final stages.
Went forward, crossed to the lead 1200M, joined by rival 450M, vied for the lead until passing 200M, grudgingly gave way late stages.
Fractious in stalls, stumbled badly at the start, ended up towards the rear and racing keenly early stages, couldn't muster the speed to challenge turning for home, never threatened.
Began awkwardly and was then shifted across behind runners to obtain cover, raced at the tail throughout, ran past beaten horses only on straightening, never reach leaders.
From draw 8 unable to slot in, caught racing wide no cover behind midfield from 1200M, couldn't finish off on straightening.
Out with rest, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, very wide into straight, made some progress in the run home.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide towards rear, 5 lengths or so back, 3 wide from 700M, same margin back on turn, very wide into straight, passed some tired rivals in the run home.

Shifted out at start and bumped, raced better than midfield on the outside, found a 2 wide spot near 600M, commenced move 400M, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Clean jump, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, took the lead 950M, headed 450M, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide behind midfield, similar position on turn, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, angled out 400M, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 2 wide at rear, commenced move after passing 500M, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight.

Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, difficult to settle in the early and middle stages, 6 lengths back turning in, slightly hampered near 250M, made very good progress final 200M to take a place.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, found rail near 650M, saved ground on turn, finished off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Jumped well, raced better than midfield on the inside, easy run to turn, hard ridden 250M, hit the front 200M, kept on strongly to the line, easily scored.
Away with them, took the early lead, headed near 950M, travelled well to turn, retook the lead 450M, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 100M.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, angled out 600M, hard ridden after passing 400M, showed very good response, hit the front 50M, kept on well to the line.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced towards rear, 5 lengths or so back, slightly inconvenienced 550M, made no impression in straight.
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length on turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
Average to begin, raced in 2nd, a length behind the leader, same position on turn, peaked early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.
Bumped start, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, found cover 650M, same margin back on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back to race at tail, 5 lengths or so back, moved closer along the rail on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Box seat, lack room 400M, ran on well for 2nd.
At rear along the fence, no dash, substantial blood in trachea after racing.
Eased to sit in midfield, on the fence, lack room 400M, progressed steadily when clear.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, held ground for 3rd.
Never a factor.
At back, 2 wide, lack room 4-2, made ground when clear, substantial mucus in trachea after racing.
Hard ridden early, trapped 3 wide in midfield, no progress.
Eased back, raced ungenerously, never competitive.
Eased to sit in midfield, trapped 3 wide, raced greenly, made ground 250M.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, closed off strongly 400M to score.
Hard ridden to hold the rail and lead, emptied 400M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
At rear, trapped 3 wide, no progress, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Eased back, along the rails, lack room 4-2, ran on fairly.
Raced in front of midfield, on stand-side, flattened after passing 150M.
Slow to begin and at rear, along the outside rail after 800M, made minor ground only.
At rear, on centre-track, showed strong dash in the last 150M and finished well.
Sent forward and along the outside rail, continued on and finished well to score by 1-1/2L.
Behind midfield, centre-track, made no ground throughout.
At rear, stand-side, made ground and closed off strongly in the last 150M.
Raced prominently, on centre-track, only one paced to line.
Rolled forward, on centre-track, stayed on but only weakened in the last 50M.
At rear, centre-track, did not feature. (See incident report)
Settled in midfield, on centre-track, only one paced.
Midfield, on centre-track, weakened after passing 200M.
At rear, on centre-track, raced greenly in the early stages, showed nothing when asked.
Bumped start and raced in front of midfield, on stand-side, dropped off after passing 200M. (See incident report)
Raced in behind midfield, on stand-side, showed strong dash in the last 200M for 2nd.

Raced wide early before improving position to get up outside the leader near the 950m. Moved to narrow lead approaching the 300m, headed near the 150m mark before fighting on well to hold third only 1.5L behind.

Had no early speed but improved position along the rail to race in midfield after the first 300m. Stayed close to the rail in straight before closing off steadily all the way to the line to be 4th. Improved effort.
Raced outside the leader early before racing 1,1 from the 900m. Continued to be close behind at the 200m mark before giving a length or so in concluding stages.

Drifted back and shared second last place when racing three wide with cover in a line of three near the back. Continued wide around the bend, entered last section just under 6L behind before failing to make any headway.

Drifted back after the start & shared second last place when racing between runners in a line of three near the back. Steadied away from heels near the 700m, straightened 6L from the lead before only holding that margin to line.

Raced 4 wide without cover in midfield before improving position to race three wide without cover outside the leaders from the 700m. Peaked on run at the 250m before weakening out sharply in final stages after wide passage.

Crowded at the start & consequently raced near the tail along the inside for the majority. Shifted outwards on straightening when about 4L behind before passing a few rivals late but making no relative headway into margin.
Raced on the leaders back. Shifted outwards passing 350m mark, moved up to take the lead fleetingly near the 150m before being passed by fast closing winner. Held second.

Bumped at the start & then drifted back to race at the tail. Continued a clear last on straightening when just under 8L from the lead before making up a few lengths in late stages when running home along the inside to midfield.

Raced in midfield between runners throughout. Was chopped out for clear running near the 325m before again having to be checked away from heels inside the final 125m. Closed again steadily in final stages but had genuine excuse.
Steadied at start & settled just worse than midfield when three deep with cover. Shifted to be the widest runner on cornering, sprinted strongly mid-straight to close to lead at 100m & win well.

Was trapped racing three wide without cover in midfield before getting come cover from the 700m. Continued wide around bend, straightened only 2.5L from lead before emptying out near 200m & weakening late.
Pushed forward to lead. Joined & headed near approaching the 300m before weakening out to be beaten 7L.
Raced in midfield between runners throughout. Was ridden along before straightening, entered last section 5L behind before weakening poorly to long last.
Began smartly, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover on turn, commenced move after passing 550M, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Bumped start, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead near 750M, led by 1/2L on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Bumped shortly after start, raced towards rear on the inside, lost touch from 500M, finished last.
Bumped shortly after start, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on rail, same margin back on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Began awkwardly, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Shifted in at start and bumped, sent forward to take the lead, headed 750M, 2nd on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually final 50M.
Out with rest, raced 3 wide with cover slightly behind midfield, wider into straight, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Began only fairly, raced at tail, 7 lengths back, moved a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, made very good progress in the run home to take a place.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 500M, finished off strongly to score.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, a bit closer in the middle stages, taken wide in straight and finished off strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Taken back from gate 13, raced behind midfield on the outside, 4-1/2L back, same margin back on turn, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home without threatening.
Away with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, angled out 500M, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed some response early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Took back and at tail, 2-3 wide, almost last and widest at exit, hit front at 200M, con-tinued on impressively to win by 1-3/4L.
Forward to take rail and led, pressured from 600M, finished tailed out. Not com-petitive, must trial.
Rolled forward, sat outside lead, slotted back near 1000M when crossed, stayed on nicely to finish 2nd. (Lost left hind plate)
Slow out, raced towards the rear, made the bends 2 wide, no match to first few but did run on satisfactorily.
Urged along in first 100M, slotted into midfield, 2 wide, shifted out and faced breeze from 800M, stayed on until gradu-ally weakened near 200M.
Eased then sat towards the rear, 2 wide, shifted out to go around the field at 750M, held spot until near 250M only.
In midfield early, trapped wide until im-proved outside lead near 1000M, kept going until found no extra near 200M.
Niggled out of the barriers, elected to take box-seat, no kick and eased down near 250M.
Elected to position in about midfield, 2 wide, moved near 700M, no kick in straight. (See Incident Report)
Settled in midfield, away from rail near 700M, ran on okay to the line to take 3rd.
Began well to hold narrow lead setting a moderate tempo, dropped away abruptly shortly after straightening.

Broke well from a wide gate but soon taken back to rear of midfield 4-wide with cover, travelled awkwardly and lost position 800 metres out, went widest in rear into straight, made no further impression.
Pressed forward from a wide gate before settling one back 3-wide without cover in 4th, folded up quickly over 450 metres out.
Settled in last few to straight, kept on steadily without quickening.
