Began fairly, gradually picked up to 2L 4th along the rail, tracked the leader into straight, gained upper hand under pressure over 100 metres out.

Began awkwardly and crowded losing ground, recovered steadily to rear of midfield, travelled keenly briefly 1200 metres out, saved ground turning for home, switched out for a run 300 metres out, fought on steadily.
Settled in midfield on the rail, switched out for a run upon straightening, unable to quicken to threaten under pressure.
Settled not far off the pace alongside eventual winner, just over 2L back in 5th rounding home bend, came under pressure and hit the front briefly over 150 metres out, headed close to home.
Taken back for rails run from the widest gate travelling towards the rear, snuck up on the rail to within 2L of leaders early in straight, unable to sustain effort inside final 200 metres.
Soon taken back to 3-wide with cover in midfield, shuffled further back to 9th onto home bend, hung in under pressure after wide into straight, produced good late impression inside final 200 metres.

Pushed forward from a wide gate to dispute lead early stages, shifted half a length back rounding home bend, hit the front under pressure early in straight, headed when found no extra inside the 200 metres.
Taken back to last from a wide gate, trailed the field to the 700 metres, saved ground turning for home, fought on steadily under pressure in the run to the line.
Settled wide in last few dropping to last rounding home bend, went wide into straight when baulked behind runners until the 300 metres, kept on to the line.

Began well from a wide gate, gradually shifted back to 3L off the pace onto home bend but remained wide without cover throughout back straight, 3-wide in joint 7th rounding home bend, one-paced under pressure in straight.
Held up behind midfield, failed to quicken on straightening, never able to challenge.
Raced in mid-division along the 2-path, fought on same pace early straight, faded over final 200M.
Settled near last, driven along near 500M but didn't respond to riding, never involved.
Soon moved up to 2nd spot tracking leader in a slowly run race, challenged for the lead early straight, fought hard to gain upper hand 100M, held on well from 2nd and 3rd late.
Dropped back to last, nearly 10Ls off the pace middle stages, shaken up 550M, stayed on passing beaten horses only. Never reach contention.
Restrained to race behind midfield, 4Ls to make up 400M, ran on fairly, never a threat to leaders. (Blood in trachea.)
Quickly away, led slowly and uncontested, strongly challenged by rivals passing 200M, fought hard to maintain the lead, grudgingly gave way late stages.
Settled down in 4th ahead of mid-division, driven from 400M to chase eventual winner, kept on well over final 200M, nearest finish.
Took up running in midfield along the fence, tried hard chasing leaders passing 400M but was always held towards the finish.
From draw 1 went forward to track leader in a slowly run race, stayed on under pressure final 400M to go 3rd just before line.
Out with rest, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide, 4 lengths or so back, hampered near 950M, same margin back turning in, finished off strongly to score by a neck.
Shifted out on jumping and bumped, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner late.
Began well, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some headway in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Away well, raced better than midfield on the inside, easy run to turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Jumped well from gate 11, raced behind midfield on the outside, no cover after 900M, moved a bit closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the outside, 4 lengths to 5 lengths back on turn, made some headway in straight without threatening.
Began well from a wide draw, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, 2 wide on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly thereafter.
Slightly slow out, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths back, same margin back turning in, made very good progress in straight to make frame, nearest on line.
Slowly away, raced at tail, 7 lengths back, same margin back turning in, made some progress early in straight, blocked approaching 50M, not ridden out late.
Commenced well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, a length back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
Quickly into stride, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L on turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide from 900M, closer on turn, hard ridden after passing 350M, finished off strongly to score.
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, 1/2L back on turn, peaked 400M, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from gate 9, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off strongly to take a place, nearest on line.
Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear on the inside, 4 lengths back turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching 200M, finished off evenly.
Out with them, raced behind midfield on the outside, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, closed off well to make frame without threatening the first few.

Made contact at start, positioned 5 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, angle out 450M, no clear run early in straight, cleared near 200M, failed to make any progress thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact at start, raced in midfield on the outside, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, angled out after passing 550M, very wide turning in, one-paced in the run home.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 250M but only showed limited response, weakened inside final furlong.
Hampered start, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, one-paced inside final furlong.
Moderately away, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.

Shifted behind runners from wide gate & raced at tail. Checked away from heels passing the 1200m before moving wider with cover. Passed a few rivals when finishing off steadily down the outside but race wasn't run to suit.

Raced wide in midfield before being left without cover form the 900m mark. Continued to cover additional ground around bend, straightened just over a length from the lead before weakening a few lengths to midfield.

Raced in midfield between runners throughout. Drifted further back passing half-way, entered last section just over 3L from the lead before finishing off one paced in the run to the line & was well beaten into midfield.

Raced outside the leader early before being crossed & racing 1,1 from the 900m. Was under a length from the lead at the 400m before peaking at the 100m mark & weakening quickly in late stages to be beaten just under 5L.

Was trapped racing four wide without cover in midfield throughout. Continued to be very wide around the bend, forced even wider on cornering, relegated to last on straightening before weakening to long second last.

Shifted across behind runners from gate 13 before making some ground along the rail to race in midfield in middle stages. Continued along the inside on straightening when 2L form the lead before finishing steadily to fifth.

Drifted back to race near the tail when three wide with cover. Moved into 4 wide line but with cover down the back straight. Forced very wide passing 600m, was the widest on straightening but weakened poorly to long last.

Raced worse than midfield, three wide with cover for the majority. Raced keenly in early & middle stages when continuing in second half. Ridden along from 600m, forced wider on straightening before weakening in final 300m.
Raced on the leaders back throughout. Stayed along the rail & had clear running on straightening when under 1L from the lead before weakening in last furlong to be well beaten.

Raced worse than midfield before being relegated to second last when racing between runners from 1300m. Continued rearward on straightening, entered last section only 3.5L from the lead before closing off strongly to third.

Was trapped racing three wide without cover after the start before improving position & racing outside the leader from the 900m. Emptied out nearing the 300m mark before weakening out to be well beaten.

Steadied & shifted behind runners & then down to the rail near 1650m. Raced third last along inside in middle stages. Dashed strongly between runners at 300m before charging to lead at 150m & pulling away impressively late.

Had a nice run 1,1 before shuffled a pair further back form the 900m. Had a clear run on straightening when only 1L from lead, moved up to take lead near 200m but couldn't repel impressive winner in final 150m.
Pushed forward to lead. Continued to hold narrow advantage before being joined & headed by the runner up nearing the furlong pole before weakening to well beaten 4th in concluding stages.
Began awkwardly and made contact, raced at tail, 7 lengths or so back, peaked on turn, weakened gradually in straight.
Began awkwardly and bumped, soon recovered and led, challenged by rival from 450M, peaked and headed 200M, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, same position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased final 100M.
Taken back to race towards rear on the inside, hard ridden after passing 450M, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to take a place.
Began well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, there to turn, angled out 350M, closed off well to take 2nd, just beaten by a neck.
Clean jump, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, challenged the leader from 450M, took the lead near 200M, kept on well to the line.
Made contact shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer in the middle stages, 2 to 3 lengths back on turn, finished off evenly.
Average to begin, raced in midfield, 3 lengths back on turn, made some progress in straight to make frame without threatening.
Midfield, trapped 3 wide throughout, weakened 400M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings, lame left hind leg day after racing.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, closed off well to score.
Hard ridden to obtain box seat, emptied 250M.
Eased back, 2-3 wide, progressed steadily 250M.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, dropped off 400M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings but was found to be a "roarer".
Midfield, 2 wide, lack turn of foot in straight, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Slow away, 2 wide, made ground 200M.
Eased at start, 2 wide, no progress, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Hard ridden to hold the rail in midfield, ran on ok in straight.
Eased at start, took cover at rear, 2 wide, progressed steadily 300M.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, no dash.
Took rail and lead easily, hung on well until 150M overhauled, ran on for 2nd.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, kept on and weakened in the last 50M.
At rear, 2 wide, nothing in the Straight. (See incident report)
Raced prominently, 2 wide after 1050M, kept on going and battled on to the line for 2nd.
At rear, along the rail, one paced after passing 50M.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, saved ground and closed off well to the line.
Raced prominently, 2 wide after 1000M, battled on to the line and just scored by a short head.
At rear, 2 wide, only one paced.

Pushed forward, shifted inwards near winning post first time before improving to lead & crossing to rail near 1200m. Was headed soon after straightening before weakening out badly in final 250m to be long last. Poor.

Drifted back & raced near the tail. Mover closer to lead passing 500m, shifted away from the rail approaching the corner, shifted wider on straightening before closing strongly down the outside to be beaten only half-length.

Began only fairly & drifted back to third last on rail. Moved away from the rail down back straight, entered last section 4L from lead, was the widest runner on straightening before finishing off only one paced.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Was about 3L behind on straightening before closing well between runners passing the 200m & getting within a neck on the line.
Was trapped racing three wide without cover in midfield throughout. Was a beaten horse before straightening before weakening to be over 10L behind.
Had a nice run 1,1 from just after the 1200m mark. Moved up to take the lead at the 150m before holding off late closer to win by a neck.

Crowded & hampered at winning post first time before racing in midfield away from rail. Moved three wide to improve position near 500m, was 4 wide on straightening before giving a length or two to midfield in run to line.

Steadied after the start & taken back to race with only a few runners behind. Was ridden along from the 500m mark, was effectively last on straightening before weakening a further few lengths to be well beaten.

Pushed forward but raced very wide leaving the straight first time before improving to race outside the leader from the 1100m. Was asked for full effort prior to straightening before weakening out in the straight.

Began awkwardly, was taken inwards at winning post before getting good run on leaders back from the 1200m. Travelled well approaching corner before failing to run on in the straight & holding fourth. Below expectation.
Steadied after the start & raced at the tail. Was 7L from the lead entering last section, stayed along the rail in straight before making up a few lengths when passing a few tiring rivals late.
Taken back from gate 10, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no impression in straight.
Jumped well, raced better than midfield on the outside, a bit closer on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Began smartly from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, angled out 400M, finished off strongly to score by a head.
Jumped well, unable to slot in, trapped wide in midfield, found cover near 700M, 2 to 3 lengths back on turn, one-paced in straight.
Away well, took the early lead, headed 1000M, 2nd in the middle stages, retook the lead 400M, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner late.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, similar position on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Lifted front feet on jumping and crowded, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 2-1/2L back, there to turn, made minor progress in straight.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 6 lengths back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no progress in straight.
Moderately away, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L, headed 400M, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, 6 lengths back, very wide into straight, failed to make any progress in the run home.
Began awkwardly and stumbled, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide on turn, made some headway early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Urged along, lead outright on rail from about 1000M, kept on nicely but couldn't match the winner's effort.
Settled to race in midfield, along the rail, continued okay to the line.
Took back, at rear, along the rail, unbalanced when struck rail at Home Turn, improved slightly in the straight. (See Incident Report)
Raced behind midfield, wide and had no cover, never a factor.
Bumped start, sat behind midfield, 2 wide, travelled keenly, asked from 550M out, found nothing and was eased down in the straight. (See Incident Report)
Bumped start, allowed forward and sat box-seat for most way, ran on until gradually faded passing 200M.
Eased back, at the tail, 2 wide, swung widest on enter-ing the straight, saved ground and closed off okay.
Shifted across to rail, in worse than midfield, showed minor dashes early, ran on without threatening.
Asked along out of the barriers, settled one-out one-back, found nothing. (Bled from both nostrils)
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, commenced move after 600M, closed off nicely, won by 1-1/2L.
Sent forward, took rail and led until crossed near 1000M, shifted to outside lead thereafter, continued one paced to the line to take 3rd.
Ridden to lead before first bend, held advantage on the rail before drifting wide into straight, hung in under pressure inside the 200 metres and headed by eventual winner 100 metres out.
Towards rear most of the way, kept on steadily without quickening.
Ridden along from a wide gate, settled one back 3-wide without cover, wider into straight, ran on steadily without threatening.
Settled in midfield, gained steadily closer to 5th in back straight just over 2L back, failed to quicken under pressure from similar position into straight.
Hard ridden early stages before settling in midfield on the rail, baulked behind runners on home bend when pace slackened, ran home one-paced.
Soon taken back from a wide gate, never in contention.
Settled wide without cover in midfield, commenced move on the outside rounding home bend and the widest into straight, kept on same pace without quickening.
Well placed in coveted one back position on the rail, stuck to the rail turning for home, hit the front under pressure 100 metres out.

Crowded at start and failed to muster despite given reminders and soon dropped to one from last on the rail, ridden along in back straight gaining slightly closer onto home bend, baulked and soon dropped out.
Jumped best settling 2-wide outside the leader in 2nd, drifted wide into straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
Crowded at start, settled 3-wide in last few throughout, made modest progress in straight but never threatening.
Soon driven along to be racing outside leader, fought hard to maintain its position early straight, no extra final 100M.
Positively ridden, led from 1000M, continued on well from 300M, caught by the race favourite close home.
Jumped well from inside draw, restrained to race ahead of midfield, outpaced by leaders passing 300M, soon no threat.
Began only fairly, shifted across behind runners to obtain a position closer to the rail, settled behind midfield, failed to respond on straightening, soon out of contention.
Chased leaders in a position ahead of midfield, kept on steadily over final 300M but never going the pace to challenge first 2.
Shifted across behind runners, settled towards the rear 7-8Ls off the pace, wide into straight then closed off mildly over final 300M, not reach leaders.
Always prominent, travelled well behind leaders turning in, responded strongly final 200M to lead close home.
Tracked leaders on inside, ran on steadily turning for home, held by first 2 over final 100M.
From wide draw dropped back to race near the rear, 5-6Ls to make up 400M, never going the pace to challenge.
From wide draw taken back to race in last, plenty to do top of straight, closed off fastest to be nearest at the finish.
Held up in midfield, came under pressure 600M out, lay in under pressure on straightening, failed to pick up pace.
Began well, dropped back to race behind midfield 6Ls off the pace, swung wide for home, stayed on without threat.
Bumped shortly after start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L on turn, peaked early in straight, headed 200M, weakened final 50M.
Made contact at start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, one-paced in straight.
Slightly slow out and checked, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, not enough room near 250M, only showed limited response thereafter.
Began well, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move 400M, made minor progress in straight.
Jumped well from gate 10, raced prominently, 2 wide, same position on turn, hit the front 200M, peaked and headed 100M, stayed on evenly to take a place.
Away well from gate 1, sat right behind the leader on rail, easy run to turn, finished off evenly.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, very wide into straight, one-paced in the run home.

Shifted in at the start and bumped, raced behind midfield on the outside, no cover after passing 600M, moved closer on turn, finished off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner, useful debut.
Bumped shortly after start, raced at tail, 6 lengths back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Bumped shortly after start, positioned 1 out 1 back, there to turn, finished off very strongly to score, won by 2 lengths.
Away well, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, angled out after passing 550M, finished off very strongly to score.
Began well, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, there to turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 200M, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact at start, raced at rear, 7 lengths back turning in, made little progress early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Began well, raced prominently, 2 wide, peaked on turn, weakened final 400M.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on rail, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, kept on same pace inside final furlong.
Jumped well from the widest draw, raced better than midfield but trapped very wide, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced at rear on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail in the middle stages, angled out 550M, made some progress in straight.
Began well from gate 13, raced 3 wide with cover slightly better than midfield, 4 wide turning in, finished off evenly.
Shifted out at start and made contact, positioned 3 wide, a length or so back, moved closer on turn, took the lead early in straight, peaked and headed final 100M, lost 2nd close home.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced 2 wide towards rear, 3 wide from 800M, 7 lengths back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
Quickly into stride, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival turning in, peaked early in straight, headed 300M, weakened thereafter.
Away with them, raced 2 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, dropped towards rear after passing 1000M, 6 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight.

Shifted out at start, raced behind midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 800M, hard ridden 500M, very wide turning in, finished off well to take 2nd. (Rider dropped whip near 250M.)
Eased back early, trapped 3-4 wide, moved forward, emptied 300M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, led 350M, overhauled 100M.
At rear, raced 3-4 wide, ran on fairly, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Hard ridden to take rail and lead, out of fuel 200M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Never a factor.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, weakened 400M.
At back, along the fence, never improved, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
At rear, took cover, lack room 4-2, little dash.
Midfield, 2-3 wide, dashed well 300M.
Pushed to sit in front of midfield, took rail, lack room 4-2, dashed well when clear.
Eased back early but trapped wide, moved forward 1600M into the lead, weakened 250M.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, lack room 4-2, little dash.
Midfield along the fence, blocked most straight, dashed well for 3rd.
At back, checked early, lack room 400M, dashed well for 2nd.
Sent forward and raced next to the lead, 2 wide, emptied after passing 100M.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, made ground steadily to the line and just beaten by 1/2L.
At one-out one-back, 2 wide, showed strong dash in the early part of the Straight, ran on fairly to the line, only weakened in the last 50M.
At rear, along the rail, did not improve.
At rear, 2 wide, swung wide on Straightening, only one paced to the line.
Raced prominently, lost ground and found nothing in the last 250M.
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail, made some ground in the Straight.
Raced in midfield initially, sent forward and took lead after 1250M, weakened after 150M.
Settled in midfield, 2 wide, closed off strongly to the line and scored by 1/2L.
At rear, 2 wide, made no ground in the Straight.

Saddle shifted backwards after start & consequently lost ground when failing to stretch out despite being hard ridden. Rejoined the field at 650m before closing off ok to be only 3.5L behind. Ran ok considering, see report.

Steadied when wide early before getting good position in midfield away from the rail. Was ridden along passing 700m, came under pressure passing 600m mark before weakening out poorly in straight to be long last.
Was trapped racing three deep without cover in midfield throughout. Straightened only 2L from the lead and effectively held that deficit all the way to the line to finish 4th.
Raced second along the rail before improving to share the lead from the 600m. Joined & passed by winner near 300m mark before weakening in last furlong.

Had no speed despite being hard ridden at start & drifted back to race 4th last away from rail. Forced very wide approaching corner, straightened in last place when over 6L behind before weakening badly to long second last.

Raced just worse than midfield before being crowded & losing ground near 650m when racing along rail. Was 4L from the lead on straightening before closing off strongly in concluding stages to steal second in final stride.
Had a nice run 1,1 for the majority. Forced four wide by the winner near the 500m before closing off well all the way to the line before being caught for second in final stride. (Mucus post-race).
Had a nice run in midfield between runners throughout. Entered last section just under 3L from the lead before weakening a length or so to be beaten just under 4L in midfield.
Raced in midfield along the rail for the majority. Straightened just over 2L from the lead but failed to improve & was pretty plain when weakening to be beaten 5L on line.

Had a nice run 4th along the rail for the majority. Moved away from the rail just before straightening, moved up to take lead approaching 300m mark before continuing on well to score by over a length on the line.

Steadied from gate 12 & taken back to race third last along rail. Moved away from inside near 700m, shifted outwards to be second widest on cornering before making no headway & being beaten 6L when third last.

Raced in midfield between runners early before drifting a length further back near the 800m. Was ridden along before straightening, entered last section 4L behind before failing to improve & being beaten similar margin.

Pushed forward to lead but was unable to cross to rail & worked hard when leading away from rail. Was joined & shared lead from the 600m, passed by winner near 300m mark before weakening a few lengths in last furlong.

Badly crowded, stumbled & lost ground at start & raced a long second last. Was last 6 lengths from the lead on straightening before shifting outwards & closing strongly down the outside to be only beaten 2L.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide, 2 to 3 lengths back, 3 wide from 900M, moved a bit closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the outside, commenced move 550M, finished off well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, peaked early in straight, headed 250M, weakened final furlong.
Moderately away from gate 12, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, failed to make any progress in straight.
Moderately away from gate 10, raced 2 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, dropped to midfield 700M, angled out 500M, made no impression in straight.

Slowly away, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 200M, ran on evenly thereafter. (Heat stress.) (Lame right front leg next day morning.)
Slowly away, raced at tail, 7 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home without threatening.
Commenced well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, moved closer along the rail on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place.
Out with rest, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 800M, commenced move 500M, finished off evenly.
Away with them, raced 2 wide towards rear, 3 wide after passing 900M, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame, no threat to the first few. (Rider dropped whip near 1000M.)
Began fairly, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made no progress in straight.
Jumped well, position right behind the leader, 2 wide after passing 600M, hit the front 250M, kept on very well to the line.
Moderately away from the widest draw, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, weakened from 600M, eased final 250M.
Began well, raced 2 wide behind midfield, inconvenienced near 900M, dropped to last 650M, 7 lengths back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
Rolled forward gradually, settled one-out one-back, ran on one paced to the line.
Crowded start, recovered to be in midfield, on rail, made ground and closed off nicely.
Taken back, at rear and on rail, never a factor.
Slotted in behind midfield, 2 wide, improved slightly in the straight only.
Shifted across after the jump, in worse than midfield, on rail, showed signs of dashes before held behind traffic over final 200M.
Hard ridden forward, shared lead, took rail finally near 700M, in touch until emptied passing 200M.
Travelled in front of midfield, 2 wide, closed off very nicely in the straight, won by a nose.
Niggled along, on-pace early but wide, shifted 2 wide outside lead near 600M, no kick and gradually weak-ened after 200M.
Urged early, sat front of midfield, on rail, finally found daylight passing 100M, closed off well thereaf-ter to take 3rd.
Hard ridden, on-pace but trapped wide, no cover, emptied passing 250M.
Eased then raced towards the rear, 2 wide, showed nothing.
Bumped start, in about midfield, 2 wide, kicked slightly and then flattened prior to 150M.
Raced prominently, wide but with cover, kept finding to the line, only caught by winner on the line, beaten by a nose.
Asked out of the barriers, part of lead until took box-seat near 700M, held all way in the straight and not at all tested.
Settled well behind from the widest gate, never in contention.
Settled behind midfield in 6th some 7L back early, became closer to pace in slow tempo coming onto home bend, came within 3L of pace turning in, kept on same pace under pressure.
Settled over 6L back in 5th early stages, gained ground around home bend to within 2L of pace briefly into straight, ran home one-paced.
Settled in rear from a wide gate, shifted widest into home straight, ran on to be nearest at finish.
Jumped fairly from the one draw, soon took up running setting a steady pace in back straight, led until headed under pressure shortly after straightening.

Settled just better than midfield in 4th some 5L back early stages, travelled awkwardly when 3rd in slow tempo 950 metres out and around home bend, quickened well in straight to take command over 150 metres out.

Soon taken back from a wide gate, travelled keenly towards rear in 7th on the rail, snuck up to within 2L of leader turning in, switched out for a run 200 metres out and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Tracked leader, commenced move rounding home bend and hit the front briefly shortly after straightening, swamped by eventual winner inside the 200 metres.

Began well from a wide gate, settled some 4L back in 3rd early, travelled keenly before drifting backward to 2.5L 4th onto home bend, 4-wide into straight and fought on steadily under pressure to reach 3rd late.
Chased leaders early stages before dropping back to a midfield position entering home turn, responded well under top weight from 350M, did best work late, just held.
Settled down behind mid-division, caught wide no cover from 800M, couldn't pick up speed in the straight, never able to challenge.
Soon in front, had uncontested lead and setting good pace middle stages, continued on well turning home, headed near 150M, held on for 3rd late.
Held up towards the rear, pushed along 450M but not quickened, never a threat to leaders.
From widest draw eased to race at the rear, no closer than 3 wide throughout, had plenty to do turning in, ran home fastest. (Jockey stated that due to wide draw the horse was ridden more quietly.)
Up with early pace before settling in 3rd about 3Ls off leader, driven and stayed on steadily over final 400M, not going the pace to challenge first 2.
Dropped back to race near the rear, 8Ls to make up turning for home, stayed on without reaching leaders.
Always prominent, moved up to track leader entering home turn, quickened to take lead 150M, held on well from runner up late stages.
Began fairly, soon ridden along to sit in midfield, raced keenly from 1000M, found disappointingly little turning home, eased mid-straight. (Irregular Heart Rhythm.)
From wide draw eased back to race at the back of the field, gave limited response on straightening, never reach contention.
Restrained to race behind midfield 5-6Ls behind leader, couldn't muster the speed to challenge passing 400M. Never involved.
Average to begin, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, similar position on turn, finished off evenly.
Slightly slow out and hampered, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Slowly away, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, unbalanced near 1050M, 7 lengths back on turn, taken wide in straight and made minor progress.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, 5 to 6 lengths back on turn, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off well to take 2nd.
Jumped with them, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, a length back on turn, finished off strongly to score.
Bumped on jumping, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, 1/4L back turning in, peaked early in straight, kept on evenly to 100M, weakened gradually thereafter. (Mucus.)
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out after passing 500M, finished off evenly.
Bumped on jumping, raced behind midfield on the outside, there to turn, failed to close off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 13, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, similar position on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Bumped on jumping, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, finished 3rd. (Lost left front plate 1000M.)
Shifted out at start, raced prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross near 950M, sat right behind the leader on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Away with them, raced better than midfield on the outside early, took the lead 900M, led by a length turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two final 100M.
Taken back from gate 13, unable to slot in, raced in midfield on the outside, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.
Away well, took the early lead, headed 900M, positioned a length behind the leader on turn, kept on very well in straight, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Shifted out at start and made contact, positioned 2 wide, 1-1/2L back, same position on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame, always held.
Began well, raced 3 wide with cover better than midfield, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Hampered start, raced 2 wide towards rear, similar position on turn, unable to obtain clear running early in straight, cleared after passing 200M, made minor progress thereafter.

Moderately away from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, 4 lengths or so back on turn, very wide into straight, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Commenced well, positioned 2-1/2L behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, made some progress thereafter.
Jumped well from gate 12, raced better than midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 850M, a length back turning in, finished off strongly to score. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, raced 2 wide, 3 lengths back, same margin back on turn, finished off evenly.
Crowded on jumping, raced at rear throughout, never a factor. (Roarer.)
Began only fairly, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, ran on evenly thereafter.
Moderately away, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, there to turn, made no progress in straight.
Moderately away, raced behind midfield on the outside, 5 lengths back on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually final 50M, finished 3rd.
Out with rest, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Average to begin, raced keenly in midfield, 2 wide, 2 to 3 lengths back on turn, finished off evenly.
Jumped with them, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back from gate 10, raced 2 wide at rear, 6 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made no progress in straight.
Began well from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 100M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Bumped start, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 350M, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Eased back, 2 wide, no dash.
At back, 3 wide, progressed steadily 200M.
Hard ridden early, in front of midfield, 2 wide, just held ground.
Midfield along the fence, lack room 4-2 and checked, made ground when clear.
Hard ridden to obtain box seat, weakened 150M.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, ran on well for 2nd.
Hard ridden to take rail and lead, out of fuel 150M.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 3 wide, ran on ok.
Never a factor.
Eased to rear, trapped 3-4 wide, made steady ground 200M.
Hard ridden to hold the rail in midfield, progressed steadily 300M to score.
Eased to sit in midfield, trapped 3 wide, no turn of foot.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, made ground and closed off strongly for 4th.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail after 950M, just weakened in the last 100M. (See incident report)
Sent forward and raced behind the leader after 950M, kept on going to the line and won by 1L.
Raced in front of midfield, 2 wide, closed of strongly to the line and finished 2nd.
At rear, along the rail, saved ground and made minor ground to the line.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, saved ground and showed strong dash in the last 100M for 3rd.
At rear, 2 wide after 1000M, nothing in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, did not improve in the Straight.
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail, pretty one paced.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, only one paced to the line.
Raced worse than midfield away from rail. Was under pressure near the 400m when over 6L from the lead before weakening out poorly in the straight to be long last.
Had a soft run in midfield along the rail throughout. Entered last section only 3L from the lead before weakening a length in the straight to be no threat finishing 4L behind.

Ridden forward after start before crossing to rail when leading near 850m. Gave a nice kick on straightening, held lead until being joined by winner at 100m mark before battling well to only be beaten half length.

Crowded on jumping before being steadied around first bend & racing third last. Moved wider at 400m when 7.5L from the lead before making up a few lengths late when running into midfield from a long way back.
Drifted back after start to race worse than midfield along rail. Closed off well in the straight to move to 4th place inside final 50m. (Roarer).

Steadied after the start & shifted back from widest gate to race second last. Continued well back on straightening before closing off well along the rail in the straight to be beaten 3L after coming from a long way back.
Had a perfect run 1,1 throughout. Eased wider on straightening, only about 3L behind on straightening before weakening poorly to be second last. (Substantial blood in trachea post-race).
Crowded after the start before shifting to rail behind runners & making ground to midfield. Stayed close to the rail in straight before making good ground in late stages to only be 1L behind on line.
Pushed forward before racing second away from the rail throughout. Came under hard ridding before straightening before weakening out in final furlong to be beaten over 4L. (See report).
Had a nice run on leaders back for the majority. Moved up to share lead near 100m & was just too tough in late stages to win by half length.
Drifted back after the first corner & raced at the tail. Was a clear last on cornering when around 9L behind & was too far back to be involved.
Raced in midfield away from rail throughout. Entered last section 4.5L behind before finishing off only one paced to be beaten about 3L in midfield on line.
Moderately away, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival turning in, peaked early in straight, headed 200M, weakened final 100M.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 2 to 3 lengths back, there to turn, closed off well to take 2nd.
Average to begin, taken back to race 2 wide at rear, 6 lengths or so back, commenced move after passing 450M, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home, no threat to the first few.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at rear on the inside, 7 lengths back, same margin back on turn, blocked near 300M, cleared 200M, made some progress thereafter.
Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, similar position on turn, one-paced in the run home.
Lifted front feet on jumping and away tardily, positioned 5 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Began smartly, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 350M, finished off strongly to score.

Taken back from the widest draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 850M, 2 lengths or so back on turn, very wide into straight, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide, 5 lengths back, there to turn, made no progress in straight.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, 3 lengths or so back, same position on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off well to take a place.
Commenced well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, challenged the leader turning in, took the lead 200M, peaked and headed 75M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Made contact shortly after start, unable to slot in, trapped 3 wide, a length or so back, similar position on turn, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect.
Raced towards the rear, along the rail, kept finding to push winner all the way to the line, finished a neck behind.
Worked forward gradually, in lead until crossed to race in box-seat near 1000M, gave ground in the straight. (See Incident Report)
Niggled along, raced outside the lead until crossed after 700M, run ended passing 200M.
Attempted to find cover early but trapped wide, allowed forward to sit outside lead by 700M, kept going and held on to win by a neck.
Settled to race in midfield, along the rail, only one paced in the straight.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, swung wide into the straight, didn't make ground
Raced at the rear, on rail initially but shifted 2 wide along the Back Straight, took inside run prior to entrance, saved ground.
Sent forward to take rail and led, kept kicking until emptied and headed near 100M.
Slotted in to race in midfield, 2 wide, one paced initially but closed off okay late.
Ridden along to hold slender advantage 2-wide, remained similar into straight when soon drew clear under reminders, won unchallenged.
Vied for lead on the rail, travelled just inside race leader and eventual winner most of the way to straight, kept on steadily under pressure and lost placing late.
Began well from a wide gate settling some 3L back mostly in 7th, in similar position entering home straight, found nothing under pressure.
Niggled along in last few, commenced move 3-wide rounding home bend, baulked for a run early in straight, produced good late impression under pressure inside final 100 metres.
Soon detached and ridden along, saved ground turning for home, made up good late ground without threatening inside final 150 metres.
Travelled 3-wide without cover mostly one back in 5th to straight, reached 2nd under pressure after straightening only to be pipped for 2nd late.
Taken back from the widest gate, remained well behind to home turn, saved ground turning in, ran on to be nearest at finish.
Jumped fairly, settled within 3L of pace mostly in 8th on the rail, came under pressure entering home straight, found nothing.
Soon picked up to within striking distance in 4th or 5th, still up there on straightening but folded up quickly under pressure over 150 metres out.

Ridden positively from a wide gate before travelling wide without cover some 3L off the pace in 8th, gained to 6th coming onto home bend and took the widest route into straight, ran on steadily to snatch 2nd on the line.
With leaders 3-wide without cover, weakened steadily on straightening.
Ridden along in first few early, gradually drifted behind midfield inside the 800 metres, did not find much room early in straight and steadied again inside final 100 metres. (Lame next day)
Niggled along after the start to obtain a position ahead of midfield, hampered 400M by rival, lay out under pressure early straight, stayed on fairly towards the line.
Driven forward to be up with the early pace, vied for lead from 600M, led turning in, couldn't fend off winner 150M, lost 2nd close home.
Reserved behind midfield, finished off well final 300M, got up for 2nd late without reaching the winner.
Slow to begin, settled at the rear, made limited progress over final 300M, never reach leaders.
Hard driven, emerged as leader passing 1000M, taken on by rival 600M, outpaced passing 300M, weakened rapidly.
Always prominent, continued to chase leader after turning for home, run ended 150M out, no extra late stages.
Jumped well, chased leaders on inside, couldn't keep up passing 200M, faded towards the finish.
Dropped back to race towards the rear, came under pressure 550M, soon gave ground weakened to last.
Began only fairly, settled at the rear 7-8Ls off the pace, failed to respond turning home, never involved.
From widest draw caught racing 3-wide behind midfield, no cover from 600M, ran on mildly turning for home, not reach leaders.
Settled down in midfield, driven along 500M but not going the pace to challenge leaders on straightening, never dangerous.
Settled on inside ahead of midfield, shifted out to challenge 400M, closed off strongly led 150M out, won going away.

Bumped on jumping, taken back to race at rear, 7 lengths back, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, made some progress early in straight, no clear run near 150M, cleared 50M, finished off evenly.
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 700M, dropped to last on turn, 5 lengths or so back, showed limited response early in straight, weakened and eased final furlong.
Bumped start, taken back to race at tail, commenced move into midfield after passing 850M, a bit closer on turn, finished off strongly to score by a head.
Began well from gate 1, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, kept on evenly in straight.
Bumped start, took the lead, led by 1/2L, shared the lead with rivals from 500M, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 100M.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off strongly to take a place, nearest on line.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 3 to 4 lengths back on turn, finished off evenly.

Began awkwardly and bumped, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths back, moved a bit closer after passing 750M, 3 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, failed to make any progress in the run home.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced 2 wide better than midfield, commenced move 650M, shared lead on turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner late, just narrowly beaten.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, angled out 350M, closed off well to make frame, nearest finish.
Hard ridden early, midfield, trapped 3-4 wide, progressed steadily 400M, 50M dropped right rein.
Hard ridden forward, dropped off quickly 350M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Eased at start, took cover at rear, 2 wide, lack room 400M, ran on fairly.
Hard ridden early, midfield along the fence, no progress.
Pushed early, behind midfield, on heels 950M, lack room 400M, made steady ground when clear.
Hard ridden early, in front of midfield, 2 wide, weakened 150M.
Hard ridden to take rail and lead, out of fuel 200M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings
At rear, trapped 3-4 wide, no dash.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, weakened 100M.
Hard ridden early, midfield, 2 wide, lack room 4-2, progressed steadily when clear.
Eased back, 2 wide, progressed steadily 300M.
At back, never competitive.
Pushed forward, box seat, emptied 350M.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, checked 950M, progressed steadily 300M.
At rear, 2 wide, swung wide on Straightening, remained one paced to the line.
At one-out one-back, weakened after passing 200M.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, swung wide on Straightening and made ground steadily to the line.
Raced prominently, wide no cover, nothing in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, dropped off after passing 200M. (Mucus in trachea and roarer)
At rear, along the rail, made ground steadily to the line.
Raced in front of midfield, 2 wide, kept on going but headed by the winner in the last 75M.
Raced behind the lead, along the rail, kept on going but emptied in the last 100M.
At rear, along the rail, remain one paced to the line.
Raced in midfield, 3 wide but with cover, made ground and finished well to score impressively by 2L.
Raced prominently and shared lead, 2 wide, stayed on but headed in the last 75M.
At rear, 2 wide, made no ground throughout.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, weakened in the last 150M.

Raced in midfield after start before being forced wider passing 900m when pace slowed. Improved position passing 700m, 4 wide on straightening when only 1L behind before finishing steadily to be in a bunch beaten under 2L.

Drifted back to last after the start before racing very keenly & being checked away from heels when racing between runners near the 1000m. Was 8L behind on straightening before weakening badly to long last. (Lame next day).

Drifted back to worse than midfield after the start when racing between runners. Continued 5.5L from the lead on straightening before making late ground in final furlong to be in a bunch under 2L behind.
Raced on leaders back. Weakened out in last section to be beaten over 6L.

Raced four wide without cover in midfield in early stages before getting some cover passing 700m. Continued wide on straightening when about 5L from the lead before peaking on run soon after straightening & weakening late.

Raced towards the rear after start before racing very keenly when being steadied. Shared last place from the 950m when continuing keenly. Was 9L behind entering last section before weakening further to be long second last.

Raced three wide with cover in midfield before racing just worse than midfield after pace slowed passing 900m. Was the widest runner on straightening when just under 6L behind before making up a few lengths late.
Steadied from outside gate & taken back to the tail. Continued near the back on straightening before weakening poorly to be long third last. (Lame next day).

Raced wide without cover in midfield before improving position when pace slowed to race three wide outside leaders from 800m. Only a neck behind at 400m, battling on well, only over-run late & beaten under 2L.

Raced 1,1 but was very keen when pace slowed near the 900m. Continued to be keen & was checked off heels 825m, was wider on straightening when just over 3L behind before closing well to be in a bunch beaten under 2L.

Raced in midfield between runners & was keen when pace slower passing 900m. Eased into clear running on straightening when under 3L from the lead before closing off well all the way to be beaten under a length into third.

Slow 1L at start before shifting behind runners to the rail. Made ground along inside to midfield before being checked away from heels at 850m. Came under hard riding & lost position before straightening before weakening out.
Pushed forward to lead. Set modest fractions when leading in front, engaged in two horse battle for the entire final 400m before holding narrow advantage on line.
Pushed forward to race outside the leader. Moved up to share lead on straightening, engaged in two horse battle all the way to line but couldn't quite get to leader, beaten only a short head.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, 2 wide, shared the lead with rival on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 100M.
Moderately away, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, 3 wide turning in, showed good response in straight, took the lead 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner 100M.
Began well from the widest draw, trapped very wide in midfield, dropped towards rear on turn, very wide into straight, one-paced in the run home.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, 3 lengths back on turn, made minor progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Crowded start, raced 3 wide in midfield, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, finished off strongly to score.

Jumped with them, trapped wide towards rear, no cover throughout, 4 to 5 lengths back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame left front leg next day morning.)
Commenced well, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 3 wide turning in, one-paced in straight. (Lame right front leg next day morning.)
Out in line, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, awkwardly placed near 800M, 4 lengths back turning in, closed off well to take a place without threatening.
Began fairly, raced at tail, 5 lengths or so back, wide into straight, made good progress in the run home to make frame.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced prominently on the inside, shared lead on turn, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Taken back from gate 11, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress response early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened thereafter. (Roarer.)
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced 4 wide with cover towards rear, 6 lengths back turning in, made no progress in straight.
Travelled in front of midfield, 2 wide, one paced before out of steam inside final 150M.
Crowded at start, at rear and on rail, never a factor.
Raced at the tail, 2 wide, not competitive.
Raced towards the rear, on rail, closed to strongly to win after getting clear running near 200M.
Asked along, sat front of midfield, on rail, checked when unbalanced at 700M, run ended and eased down at 300M.
Trapped wide in about midfield initially, allowed forward to sit outside lead, one paced home.
Forward, settled to race in box-seat, found no kick in the straight.
Lost ground at start, in midfield, on rail, severely hampered at 700M, ran on fairly to take 3rd.
Jumped awkward, in behind midfield, 2 wide until hampered and taken wider after 700M, only one paced in the straight. (See Incident Report)
In behind midfield, 3 wide with cover, taken wider after 700M, wasn't in it.
Bumped start, then forward to lead, ran on until found no extra at 100M.
Slotted into midfield, 3 wide with cover, ran on until emptied late.
Jumped well but trapped wide and no cover in front of midfield, ran on after a tough run, only caught by the winner in the last strides.

Began well to lead from the widest gate gradually shifting across to obtain rails run coming onto home bend, led until joined after straightening, fought on dourly but swamped by the winner over 100 metres out.
Began well from a wide gate, soon taken back to rear of midfield 3-wide without cover, gained slightly closer onto home bend, ran on in straight and did best work late.
Settled in last few travelling 3-wide with cover to straight, improving when hung in from whip and straightened 300 metres out, ran on steadily to the line without threatening.
Close up 3-wide without cover from a wide gate, shifted to one-out-one-back position rounding home bend, unable to sustain effort inside final 150 metres.
Crowded at start settling well back, trailed the field to straight, hung in under pressure and a difficult ride.
Settled in midfield in 5th, became 7th in a similar positon on the rail rounding home bend, saved ground straightening for home, fought on nicely without threatening.
Settled towards the rear on the rail, dropped to last under pressure after straightening but made some late impression closing stages.

Soon picked up to 4th on the rail just over 2L back, shared 3rd in a similar position rounding home bend, shifted out for a run on straightening, quickened well under pressure to hit the front over 100 metres out.
Soon picked up to 2nd, travelled keenly 2-wide rounding home bend, joined the leader into straight, unable to sustain effort inside final 100 metres.
Settled in last few, travelled keenly around home bend, did not find much room early in straight, faded inside final 200 metres.
Held up behind midfield, came under pressure 600M out, found disappointingly little in the run home, never reach contention. (Lame next day.)
Lost ground at the start, always at the rear, never going the pace to challenge.
Chased leader, moved up to vie for the lead midway, led nearing 300M, continued on strongly to the line holding rivals at bay.
Positioned in midfield 3Ls off the pace, tried hard passing 400M but couldn't reach first 3.
Always towards the rear, couldn't go on passing 400M, never a factor.
Settled ahead of midfield, driven along to chase leaders halfway, kept on one paced, always held by leaders.
In touch chasing leaders, driven along 400M, weakened rapidly 150M. (Jockey : gave ground noticeably late stages it may have been galloped on. Vet : minor abrasions to both hind legs.)
Soon led, took them along at good pace, joined by eventual winner halfway, headed nearing 300M, faded late losing several places near line.
Towards the rear 5-6Ls off the good pace, responded fairly from 400M, made no impression on leaders.
Settled near last, came under pressure halfway but didn't respond to riding. Never involved.
Began only fairly, reserved near last 6-7Ls off the good pace, stayed on over final 400M but no serious threat to leaders.
Tracked leader along the stands' rail in a fast run race, kept on well over final 400M, held by first 2 late stages.
In touch behind leaders in a fast run race, made good headway passing 300M, held by winner closing stages.
Settled in midfield along the stands' side, kept on mildly passing 400M, not reach leaders.
Commenced well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off well to take 2nd.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 3 wide from 850M, closer on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M. (Blood in trachea.)
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the outside, slightly improved on turn, very wide into straight, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Jumped well from gate 13, raced prominently on the outside, pressed leader turning in, kept on well in straight to take a place, lost 2nd close home. (See Racing Incidents.)

Shifted out at start and bumped, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out after passing 600M, 3 lengths back turning in, unable to obtain clear running early in straight, cleared 100M, made some progress thereafter.
Began well, raced better than midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 600M, hit the front 300M, kept on well to the line, won by a neck.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide into straight, made some headway in the run home.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Began smartly, took the early lead, headed 950M, 2nd on turn, retook the lead 450M, peaked and headed 300M, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Began awkwardly, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 850M, a bit closer on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Moderately away, raced prominently on the inside, took the lead 950M, travelled well on turn, headed 450M, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, similar position on turn, finished off evenly.
Began well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, peaked 500M, weakened final 400M.
Made contact at start, raced better than midfield on the inside, angled out 450M, showed good response early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Taken back to race towards rear on the inside, saved ground to turn, hit the front near 250M, kept on strongly to the line.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide from 500M, very wide into straight, showed limited response in straight.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4 lengths back on turn, showed no response early in straight, weakened and eased final furlong.
Average to begin, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, travelled well to turn, peaked early in straight, headed 250M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Lifted front feet on jumping and away tardily, raced at tail, 8 lengths back, a bit closer in the middle stages but still the last, passed some tired runners in straight.
Moderately away, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out 400M, finished off well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 3 wide early, took rail and lead after 900M, out of fuel 300M.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, weakened 200M.
Eased back, 2 wide, made steady ground 200M.
Slow away, behind midfield, raced keenly, lack room 4-2, made ground when clear.
Hard ridden to hold the rail in midfield, blocked 4-2, made steady ground when clear.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, dropped whip 300M, lack room until 200M, closed off strongly to score.
Slow away, never competitive.
Pushed to keep up in midfield, trapped 3-4 wide throughout, emptied 300M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, emptied 400M.
Eased at start, took cover at rear, progressed steadily 500M around the field in 4 wide, run ended 100M.
In front of midfield, 2-3 wide, moved forward 500M, weakened 200M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Pushed to secure box seat, ran on well for 2nd.
At rear, along the rail, one paced after passing 50M.
Raced prominently, 2 wide, battled on to the line for 2nd.
Raced behind the leader, along the rail, held up from 175M until 50M, finished off only fairly.
At rear, 2 wide, nothing in the Straight.
Sent forward and took lead, kept on going and battled on to the line and just scored by a short head.
At one-out one-back, only one paced.
Settled in worse than midfield, along the rail, showed strong dash and finished 3rd.
Raced on leaders back, moved over leaders heels soon after straightening, dashed up to share lead at 100m, tried hard but couldn't get past the leader, just beaten.

Raced worse than midfield between runners. Moved wider on the track passing the 500m mark when continuing near the tail, finished off one paced down the outside to be only 3.5L behind but was never a real threat.
Pushed forward to lead. Headed by winner at 250m, battled on well, still third at 100m mark before weakening in final 50m to be beaten 2L on line.

Steadied & taken back to race at the tail. Continued a clear last before shifting very wide passing the 450m mark, was extremely wide on cornering when a long way back & never got into race in straight.
Raced midfield on rail, held up momentarily on straightening before shifting over heels at the 300m & closing strongly in final furlong to move to third inside final 50m.
Raced in midfield away from the rail throughout. Was hard ridden near the 500m mark before closing off steadily all the way to the line to be only beaten 2L. Better.
Raced outside leader, moved to lead at the 250m, joined by challenger at the 100m but dug deep in concluding stages to win narrowly.

Got back & raced second last away from rail after start. Moved into the three wide line but with cover down back straight. Shifted wider passing 500m, second widest on straightening before weakening to last.
Didn't begin fast, was shifted to the rail & raced in midfield. Stayed along the rail on straightening before finishing off only steadily nearer to the inside to be beaten 3L into midfield.

Steadied after the start but was trapped racing three wide no cover for the majority. Was 4L behind just before straightening before going little in the straight & being beaten a similar margin onto ninth.
Didn't begin fast before making up some ground to race 1,1. Bumped on straightening before emptying out & weakening in final furlong to be well beaten.

Slow 1L at start before racing third last along the rail in middle stages. Relegated to second last near half-way, shifted outwards after straightening before making strong late ground in final stages to be beaten under 1L.
Began smartly, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, angled out 350M, finished off strongly to score.
Away well, raced prominently on the outside, took the lead 950M, led by a length on turn, peaked early in straight, headed 200M, weakened thereafter.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, very wide turning in, finished off well to make frame without threatening.
Made contact at start, raced 3 wide slightly behind midfield, moved a bit closer in the middle stages, very wide into straight, finished off well to be nearest on line without threatening.
Jumped with them, raced in 2nd, a length behind the leader on turn, hit the front 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Began well, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, found rail 500M, made good progress early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to take a place.
Slightly slow out, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
Jumped with them, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross 750M, a length behind the leader on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear, 8 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, passed some tired runners in straight.
Made contact at start, raced at rear on the inside, still well back on turn, made no progress in straight.
Commenced well, taken back to race 2 wide towards rear, 7 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made some progress early in straight, blocked final 100M, eased thereafter.
Niggled along, settled for box-seat, did not run on in the straight. (See Incident Report)
Shifted across, in midfield but trapped wide, no cover, was one paced only.
Raced in behind midfield, 3 wide with cover, improved slightly in straight.
Worked forward, sat one-out one-back, kicked away at 150M, ran on comfortably to win by 2-3/4L.
Ridden forward, sat outside lead, pressured 600M out, not competitive.
In about midfield, 2-3 wide, bumped near 200M, found nothing anyway.
Lost ground at start, at tail, 3 wide entering 600M turn, saved no ground in the straight. (See Incidet Report)
Sent forward, took rail and led, remained only one paced to the line.
Settled to race in midfield, and on rail, closed off evenly to take 3rd.
Bumped start, in worse than midfield, along the rail, made ground and came out in front in a line for 2nd.
Taken back, at rear 2 wide, ran on fairly to the line.
Soon took up running after moderate start holding slender lead on the rail to home straight, folded up quickly after straightening. (Lame)
Settled towards the rear on the rail, awkwardly placed when switched back inside for a run entering straight, switched off the rail over 200 metres out and ran on without threatening.
Never better than midfield, 3-wide going up the Rock and around home bend, unable to sustain effort in straight.

Broke well to lead early, gradually shifted back off the pace turning into back straight, shuffled 2.5L back to 6th before losing further ground for 8th 700 metres out, made no impression in home straight.
Broke well settling just off the pace on the rail in joint 3rd, soon came to challenge upon straightening and hit the front inside the 200 metres, kept on well under pressure to the line.
Taken back from a wide gate, travelled towards the rear in 9th, commenced move rounding home bend and the widest into straight, ran home one-paced.
Slightly slow out and crowded settling in rear, saved ground turning in, unable to sustain effort inside final 150 metres.
Well there, came to dispute lead from the 900 metres, hit the front briefly on straightening but headed by the winner inside the 200 metres.
Soon dropped to last, trailed the field to the 150 metres, went past well-beaten horses.
Ridden up to one-out-one-back position, came under pressure entering home straight, kept on steadily without threatening. (Lame)

Broke well from the one gate, gradually settled in worse than midfield on the rail, renewed effort inside the 700 metres reaching within 2L of pace into straight, kept on steadily without threatening.
Began moderately from a wide gate, improved steadily 3-wide without cover to joint 3rd early in back straight, similar position rounding home but carried wider into straight, soon weakened
Settled in midfield 4Ls off the pace, held up home turn and early straight, closed off strongly from 250M, got past long time leader last stride.
Soon led, drew 2Ls clear turning in, kept on well to the line only to be caught by winner last stride.
Chased leaders, fought on same pace turning for home, no extra 150M from home. (Blood in trachea.)
Held up behind mid-division, pressed along 500M, stayed on mildly over final 300M without threatening first 3.
Failed to muster speed despite ridden along early stages, raced wide no cover in midfield, ran on steadily turning home, not reach leaders.
Jumped on terms, settled down ahead of midfield, gave brief response early straight, steadied 150M, no extra late stages.
Chased leader on outside, came under pressure home turn, soon weakened on straightening, eased towards the line.
From wide draw taken across behind runners, reserved towards the rear 7Ls off leader, closed off fastest in the straight to claim 3rd close home, nearest finish.
Not hurried after the start, ended up at the rear over 8Ls off the pace, found little when asked top of the straight. Never dangerous.
Always prominent, travelled keenly passing 900M, every chance turning home, run ended 200M out, weakened towards the line.
Settled near last 7Ls behind leader, made no impression in the straight. Never involved.
Began fairly, ended up racing behind midfield further back than intended, driven 300M out, responded only fairly.
Began well, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well, taken back to race behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, made minor progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover on turn, very wide into straight, finished off strongly, just beaten by a narrow margin.

Average to begin, sent forward to race prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross near 800M, sat 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, not enough room early in straight, cleared 200M, made some progress thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide slightly better than midfield, 2 wide from 550M, 5 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
Bumped on jumping, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress early in straight, not clear run near 150M, cleared 100M, finished off strongly to score by a head.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight, led narrowly 50M, headed close home.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually thereafter, headed final 50M.
Taken back from gate 11, raced at rear, 9 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to make frame, nearest on line.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced 2 wide towards rear, similar position on turn, angled out 350M, made some progress early in straight, blocked final 50M.
Bumped start, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the middle of the track, hard ridden after passing 400M, showed limited response, weakened final furlong.
Average to begin, raced prominently, hard ridden after passing 400M, kept on same pace to the line.
Moderately away, raced in midfield on the stands' side, a length back, finished off evenly.
Jumped well, raced prominently on the stands' rail, hard ridden from 400M but only showed limited response, weakened inside final furlong.
Average to begin, sent forward to take the lead, hard ridden after passing 300M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Stumbled on jumping, raced towards rear on the stands' side, hard ridden after passing 300M, showed limited response, weakened final 100M.
Bumped start, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader, 2 away from the stands' rail, hard ridden 300M, only showed limited response, weakened gradually final 50M.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced prominently, 1/2L back, hard ridden approaching 300M, finished off well to score by a neck.
Began fairly, raced in midfield, nearer to the middle track, hard ridden 300M, finished off evenly.
Settled in front, weakened 150M.
At back, ran on ok.
In front of midfield, weakened 400M.
Midfield, ran on fairly in straight.
Trapped wide in midfield, emptied 400M.
Pushed to sit in midfield, just held ground.
At rear, blocked most straight, made steady ground.
At back, lack room 400M, made steady ground when clear.
Eased back to rear, trapped wide, progressed steadily 250M.
Never a factor.
Never rear, never improved.
Hard ridden forward to take rail and lead, dropped off 300M, substantial blood in trachea noted after racing.
At back, progressed steadily 300M.
Settled just off the leader, closed off strongly 300M to score.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, pretty one paced. (See incident report)
Raced in midfield, along the rail, only one paced in the Straight.
Sent forward, wide no cover, lost ground in the Straight.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, kept on going but headed in the last 75M.
Raced in behind midfield, wide but with cover, made some ground and ran on fairly.
Taken back and raced at rear, wide but with cover, nothing in the Straight.
Sent forward, wide no cover, did not feature. Finished tailed out. Must trial.
Sent forward and raced next to the leader, 2 wide, only one paced in the Straight.
Raced behind midfield, 2 wide, showed minor dash in the Straight only.
At rear, 2 wide, swung wide on Straightening, made ground strongly in the early part of the Straight but then weakened in the last 50M.
At rear, along the rail, saved ground and battled on to the line to take 2nd .
Settled behind the leader after 900M, along the rail, made ground steadily and closed off okay to the line.
Bumped at start before racing in midfield between runners. Moved into clear running passing 350m before closing off ok to be in a three way go for second.

Bumped soon after the start before racing in midfield between runners in early & middle stages. Ridden along approaching the 400m mark when 5L from the lead before weakening out quickly in last furlong to be long last.
Didn't have the early speed of others & drifted back to third last after start. Entered last section 6L from the lead before weakening out to finish a long second last.
Raced just behind the lead in early stages before coming under pressure soon after passing half-way. Weakened out quickly in final furlong & was beaten 8.5L.

Drifted back after the start & raced at the tail when close to the center of the track. Came under hard ridding at half-way, was a clear last at 400m before passing only tiring rivals when finishing well beaten in midfield.
Was 1L slow to begin at start & was then outpaced before shifting across to the stand side when racing at the rear. Was doing best work in late stages when closing to midfield from a long way back.
Raced in midfield along stand side rail throughout. Was under 3L from the lead entering last section before weakening out to be 4.25L behind on line.
Showed speed to lead. Increased advantage in final furlong & went on to win by easy 2L.
Raced on leaders back for majority. Couldn't go with winner in final 100m but battled on well to narrowly hold second.
