Showed speed to race second, about a length behind at half-way. Fought on well in late stages and was in a three way go for second & was only beaten 2L.
Not bustled after start & raced in midfield without cover when near to the center of the track. Was 6L from the lead entering last section and made no headway in concluding stages.

Not bustled at start & raced in midfield in early & middle stages. Asked for full effort entering last section when 5L behind before closing off well in late stages to be just over 3L behind in midfield. Acceptable debut.

Drifted back to be third last after the start before continuing in second half throughout. Was over 6L behind entering last section before doing best work in closing stages and halve deficit in final stages.
Raced worse than midfield nearer to the stand side rail. Was over 5L behind entering the final section & made no real heady-way.

Raced prominently early before drifting slightly further back to race in midfield between runners. Held up behind heels near the 350m, got clear passing the 300m before weakening a few lengths to be well beaten in midfield.

Bumped heavily & became unbalanced at start & consequently raced rearward before improving slightly to race worse than midfield along the rail. Continued rearward on straightening before weakening out be beaten over 10L.

Raced in midfield early before drifting slightly further back & shifting down to rail near 800m. Shifted away from the rail on straightening, closed to second at the 150m before charging late to get within a neck on the line.

Bumped heavily, unbalanced & lost ground at the start before racing third last between runners. Continued near the rear on straightening before weakening badly in the straight to be long last. (Blood in trachea post-race).
Raced in midfield, three wide with cover throughout. Shifted wider on straightening when 2.5L behind before weakening a length or so in final stages to be beaten just under 4L into fifth.

Pushed forward but worked hard when racing three wide outside lead before improving to lead & crossing to be two wide from 800m. Joined & shared the lead on straightening before emptying at the 250m & weakening thereafter.

Worked very hard early when racing 4 wide without cover outside the leaders. Continued to be wide & without cover around bend, straightened just over 1L from the lead before weakening out to be beaten 10L.

Raced in midfield along the rail before improving onto leaders back from the 600m. Shifted over the heels of the leading pair on straightening when only 1L behind before closing to lead at 250m & holding off late challenger.

Drifted back to race second last when three wide with cover. Eased wider on cornering, straightened over 4L behind before finishing off the strongest when making good late ground down the outside, beaten only half-length.
Raced prominent to the lead before getting positon 1,1 from the 800m. Was ridden along before straightening before weakening poorly in the last 300m to be well beaten.

Steadied after first 150m & raced three deep with cover when just worse than midfield. Eased wider on straightening when just over 3L behind before making good ground down the outside to be beaten only 1.5L into forth.

Raced wide in midfield, hampered when taken in near 1100m before being left four wide without cover from the 850m. Lost ground when racing wide around bend, straightened 6L behind before weakening badly to long second last.
Drifted back to race at the tail after the start. Shifted wider on straightening when around 6L behind before passing a few.

Raced prominent to the lead before ultimately racing second at the leaders quarters when holding the rail. Improved to share the lead just prior to straightening, joined & headed by winner at 250m, gave a few lengths late.
Taken back, raced at the rear, 2 wide, showed minor dashes and flattened near 150M.
Worked forward gradually, took rail and led, kicked away from 250M, ran on to win by 2-1/2L.
Jumped only fairly, sat just behind midfield, on rail, showed nothing in the straight.
Raced in about midfield, along the rail, one paced in the straight before emptying.
Shifted across early to the rail, remained towards the rear, fairly one paced despite no clear running early.
Jumped well, failed to find cover in front of midfield, wide all way, run ended near 250M.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, ran on okay to the line to take 3rd.
Taken back, at rear 3 wide on track but with cover, never a factor.
Travelled towards the rear, wide but with cover, swung widest, made good ground to finish 2nd.
Urged early, only managed just behind midfield, wide but with cover, showed no kick.
Settled to race in about midfield, 2 wide, ran on okay until about 150M, detached from first few thereafter.
Jumped well, trapped wide on track early, allowed forward and settled outside lead by 700M, tough trip and finished tailed out. (Must trial)
Went forward, sat in box-seat, run ended passing 300M.
Niggled along, settled one-out one-back, ran on until emptied near 100M.
Broke well from wide gate and soon taken back, very wide without cover round home bend when given reminders, yielded ground under pressure.
Moderate start, ridden forward to midfield onto home bend, baulked early in straight, produced good late impression.
Prominent 3-wide without cover, folded up inside the 200 metres.
Slightly slow out, settled towards rear in 8th, ran on without threatening.
Took up running after the first 100 metres, ridden clear in straight, won confidently.
Vied for lead from wide gate, travelled just outside race leader round home bend, no extra inside the 200 metres.
Tracked leader on the rail, fought on without threatening.
Taken back from wide gate, saved ground turning for home, kept on steadily.
Prominent early stages, became 5th onto home bend, lost further ground into straight.
Settled in midfield in 6th, 4 wide rounding home bend, kept on one pace under pressure.
Taken back from the widest gate, inconvenienced 650 metres out, very wide into straight, made no positive
Steadied early stages to obtain cover, 7Ls back in last in a slowly run race, failed to quicken turning for home, never involved. (Lame RF leg.)
Reserved in midfield along the 2-path, pace slow, kept on same pace turning home, never able to challenge.
Restrained near the rear in a slow run race, 4Ls to make up 400M, tried hard in the run home but too much to make up on leaders.
Settled down in mid-division, couldn't go on passing 400M, never dangerous.
Tracked leader in a slowly run race, challenged strongly passing 200M, went head to head with rival, just prevailed at the line.

Always in touch, quickened up well to challenge early straight, run ended 150M, soon no danger to first 2. (Jockey : not disappointing as the horse had risen sharply in ratings and having first start in Class 2.)
Track leaders in a slowly run race, soon outpaced by leaders early straight, plodded home.
Share lead early stages before emerging as the clear leader 900M, set slow pace throughout, responded well in straight and vied for lead with eventual winner from 200M. Just missed.
Steadied early stages to obtain cover, held up near last in a slow run race, stayed on fairly from 400M, not reach leaders.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide in midfield, bumped and unbalanced near 700M, 4 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight to make frame.
Average to begin, tracked leaders, 2 wide, travelled well on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back to race at tail, 7 to 8 lengths back on turn, finished off very strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Taken back from gate 12, raced towards rear on the outside, found rail near 700M, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, no clear run in straight, kept on evenly to the line.
Began well from gate 1, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead approaching 800M, travelled comfortably on turn, kept on very well in straight to score.
Began only fairly, raced towards rear of midfield, 6 lengths back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Made contact on jumping, trapped very wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, slightly taken back after 1000M, hampered and dropped towards rear near 700M, well back on turn, failed to close off in straight.

Commenced well, unable to slot in, trapped 4 wide, a length or so back, severely checked and dropped towards rear near 700M, ridden 550M, showed no response, eased inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began smartly, raced 3 wide slightly better than midfield, hampered and lost place 700M, 6 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside, slightly taken back after passing 750M, 5 lengths back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Slightly slow out and bumped, positioned 2 to 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Made contact on jumping, sent forward to take the early lead, headed near 800M, positioned 3 wide better than midfield on turn, finished off evenly.

Taken back from wide draw, reserved in last 9Ls behind, difficult to settle middle stages, had no clear run early straight before finishing off nicely to claim 4th in a blanket finish for minor placings.
Went forward as expected, crossed to the lead before home turn, headed by winner250M, held 2nd until very late stages, swamped by rivals a few strides from the line.
Raced keenly in midfield, had every chance from 400M but never going the pace to challenge leaders.
Shifted across behind runners after the start, held up towards the rear, stayed on final 400M without troubling leaders.
Raced in midfield, came under pressure 700M, soon beaten top of straight and eased.
Soon crossed to the fence from draw 9, settled down midfield, fought on same pace from 400M, not reach leaders.
Restrained to race behind midfield, proved difficult to settle middle stages, hard driven turning home but gave limited response, never threatened.
From wide draw moved up to chase leaders, caught wide no cover, quickened up strongly to lead 250M out, drew well clear to win comfortably.
Chased leader, couldn't go on turning home, soon beaten and weakened away.
In touch behind leaders, switched away from fence 500M, closed off moderately to take 3rd without troubling the winner.
Always prominent chasing leader 2-wide, battled on early straight and held on 3rd until 150M, swamped by rivals late.
Began awkwardly, always near the rear, gave no response when urged along from 500M. Never in the picture.
Crossed to a 2-wide position behind midfield, stayed on passing 400M, did best work final 200M to take 2nd close home. No threat to runaway winner.
Held up near last, wide into straight, failed to pick up pace, never able to challenge.

Ridden forward after start before racing second away from the rail. Continued handy, 1.5L from the lead entering last section before peaking on effort at the 250m mark & weakening a length or two late.

Ridden forward from outside gate to lead before crossing over to rail near 950m. Gave a strong kick on straightening to hold 1.5L advantage at 400m mark before only being over-run in last 75m. Close behind in bunched finish.

Raced just forward of midfield but was left racing three deep without cover throughout. Was just over 3L from the lead on straightening, closed well all the way to line & was only beaten 1.5L despite being checked late.
Raced in midfield between runners throughout. Straightened just over 4L from the lead before peaking on effort at the 300m mark & weakening to last.
Shifted behind runners after the start & raced third last away from the rail. Shifted wider on straightening when 6L from the lead before failing to challenge in the straight & finishing second last.
Had a nice run in third on the rail for the majority. Straightened 2L from the lead, moved up to share the lead at the 100m mark before holding onto second in late stages.

Got back & raced at the tail. Was a clear last on straightening when 7L behind before closing off very strongly along the rail in the final stages before being badly checked in late stages when still only beaten 2L.

Bumped at the start before improving along the rail in middle stages to midfield. Improved into tight running between the leaders near the 200m mark before dashing to narrow lead near 75m mark & winning by 0.75L.
Was trapped racing four wide without cover in midfield throughout. Straightened 3L from the lead before closing off strongly all the way to the line before moving to third place in the final 30m.

Shifted behind runners before racing wide with cover near the tail. Moved wider & improved position passing the 600m, straightened 4L behind before finishing off steadily down the outside to not be beaten far despite 9th.

Raced three wide with cover in midfield throughout. Was held up momentarily on straightening when 4.5L from the lead before closing off strongly in the final stages to just miss third when beaten 1L on line.

Began fairly & raced worse than midfield away from the rail. Shifted back towards the inside on straightening when over 5L behind before being badly held up until inside final 100m & then closing well late to be close behind.
Commenced well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, shared lead on turn, hard ridden 300M, showed very good response, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner late.
Began well from gate 1, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, 2 wide turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off strongly to take a place, nearest on line.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, short of room early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off very strongly to score by a neck.
Bumped shortly after start, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, shared the lead with rival on turn, headed early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 9 lengths or so back, a bit closer on turn but still the last, very wide into straight, passed some tired rivals in straight.
Began awkwardly, positioned 4 to 5 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Made contact shortly after start, raced in midfield on the outside, moved closer after passing 1200M, 3/4L back on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.

Taken back from gate 11, raced towards rear on the inside, 2 wide after entering the back straight, angled out 500M, failed to make any progress in straight. (Lame right front leg.) (Lame left hind leg next day morning.)
Crowded on jumping, raced towards rear on the outside, commenced move 650M, very wide turning in, passed some tired horses in straight. (Roarer.)
Out with rest, raced towards rear of midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, peaked 300M, weakened thereafter.
Jumped with them, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, short of room early in straight, weakened final furlong.

Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield early, 3 wide after entering the back straight, moved a bit closer after passing 1200M, 2 lengths back on turn, finished off well to make frame.
Began smartly, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
In front of midfield, dashed well 300M, run ended 100M.
Failed to muster, at rear, dashed well 200M.
Midfield, no turn of foot in straight.
Pushed forward along the fence, just held ground in straight.
Eased to sit in midfield, 2-3 wide, dashed well 250M.
Eased at start, never a factor.
Very slow away, never competitive, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Hard ridden to take rail and lead, out of fuel 250M.
Eased back, trapped 3 wide, never competitive, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Pushed to secure box seat, kicked away 300M to score.
At back, 2 wide, no dash.
Midfield 2-3 wide, dashed well for 2nd.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, emptied 250M.
Eased back, never improved, substantial blood in trachea after racing and was reported to have bled from both nostrils.
Raced in midfield, wide but with cover, did not feature.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, weakened in the last 50M.
Sent forward and shared lead, 2 wide, weakened after passing 150M.
Raced in front of midfield, wide no cover, stayed on but only one paced in the Straight.
Raced behind the leader, along the rail, kept on going but headed by the winner in the last 50M.
At rear, 2 wide, nothing in the Straight and did not threaten.
Taken back and raced in behind midfield, difficult to settle behind the back Straight, 3 wide but with cover, swung wide on Straightening and made ground and finished 2nd. (See incident report)
At one-out one-back after 900M, showed strong dash and kept on going to the line, won by 1/2L.
At rear, along the rail, remained one paced to the line.
Raced in midfield, along the rail after 900M, nothing in the straight.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, made minor ground in the Straight.
Began only fairly and at rear, along the rail, pretty one paced.
At rear, 2 wide, ran on only fairly to the line.
Raced in midfield, wide no cover, did not feature.
Raced three wide with cover in midfield throughout. Straightened only about 1.5L from the lead before emptying near 250m mark & giving a few lengths late.

Steadied soon after the start & taken back to race worse than midfield away from the rail. Was second last, over 4L behind on straightening, passed a couple in late stages but was still beaten 6L on line.

Raced rearward after start before moving into three wide line with cover & improving to midfield passing 900m. Shifted 4 wide approaching 500m before finishing off only one paced to be 4L behind on line.

Steadied from widest gate & taken back to race rearward. Moved three wide passing 700m to improve position, was the widest runner on straightening when about 4L behind before making late ground down the outside to third.
Pushed forward, led when racing wide before crossing to rail near 1000m. Was headed on straightening, weakened very poorly to be long last.
Pushed forward before racing on leaders back from the 1000m. Just behind on straightening before weakening out poorly in the straight to be long second last.
Raced in midfield between runners throughout. Entered last section under 3L from the lead before finishing off pretty moderately in last furlong to be well beaten.

Steadied after the start & taken back to race at the tail. Shifted wider approaching the corner, was still last & 5L behind entering final section before making late ground in concluding stages to steal well beaten 4th late.

Raced 1,1 but was keen when racing between runners in middle stages. Shifted wider on straightening, dashed well to move to second passing the 300m but couldn't get to winner in final stages. Clear of third.
Raced in midfield but was left racing three wide without cover before sliding forward to be wide & outside the leaders from the 700m. Moved to the lead at 350m before continuing on to win well.

Had a soft run in midfield along the rail throughout. Moved off the rail on straightening when only about 2.5L from the lead, stayed closer to the inside before weakening a few lengths in the final furlong
Pushed forward, raced prominently before being crossed by leader at 1000m & racing second away from the rail. Weakened pretty poorly in final 250m & was well beaten.
Didn't begin fast, raced worse than midfield along the rail. Relegated to second last near the 600m, stayed close to the inside on straightening when 4L behind before weakening to be beaten 8.5L.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Moved off the rail prior to cornering, entered last section 3L from the lead before failing to finish off & was well beaten.
Away well, took the lead, led by 3/4L, challenged turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 250M, weakened final 150M.
Away well, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 500M, unable to obtain clear run until 100M, finished off strongly to take a place.
Bumped start, tracked leaders on the outside, challenged the leader turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide towards rear, commenced move after passing 700M, 4 wide into straight, hit the front 250M, kept on well to hold off the challengers.
Slowly away, soon recovered to race slightly better than midfield on the inside, wider from 500M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, 3 wide turning in, showed good response early in straight, peaked on run 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Taken back from gate 9, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Taken back from gate 10, raced towards rear on the inside, wider turning in, no clear run early in straight, found some daylight 150M, closed off well without threatening.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross 950M, sat right behind the leader on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened 200M, eased final 100M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 8 lengths or so back, commenced move after passing 700M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to take a place, nearest on line.
Raced in midfield, shifted away from rail near 700M, closed off strongly but not quite enough to run down the winner.
Jumped ok, in midfield initially but wide, steadied to find cover then raced at the rear,, ran home without threatening.
Forward, took rail and led, maintained lead to the line, and held on to win by a neck.
Jumped nicely, took box-seat, was one paced and found no extra inside final 100M.
Lost ground at start and sat behind midfield, very wide and keen, ran on until 250M only.
Settled to race in midfield, 2 wide, found a little extra inside 100M, closed off fairly.
Raced in front of midfield, wide and no cover however, was one paced and then weakened.
Jumped ok, trapped very wide in about midfield, wasn't a factor.
Settled in midfield, wide but with cover, didn't close off in the straight. (See Incident Report)
Sat forward from wide draw, sat outside lead, stayed on and weakened gradually from 150M.
Slightly slow away, in worse than mid-field, on rail, never looked likely.
Sat one-out one-back until shifted wider near 700M, gradually emptied after 250M.
Eased then raced towards the rear, 2 wide, did not feature.
Crowded start and then raced in worse than midfield, wide but with cover and keen, was one paced in the straight.
Travelled keenly in one back position on the rail just behind race leader, tight between runners when given reminders early in straight, faded steadily shortly passing the 200 metres.
Travelled keenly in one-back position 3-wide without cover, hung in under pressure and a difficult ride in home straight. (Tactic questioned)
Began fairly and soon detached, given reminders entering home straight and responded well inside final 300 metres to score an emphatic win close to home.

Began fairly from a wide gate, settled in7th about 4L off the pace, commenced move rounding home bend, baulked for a run in straight until after the 300 metres, ran on well only to find the winner too strong at the finish.

Began well from the widest gate sharing early lead near the centre of the back straight, held slender advantage rounding home bend and driven over 1L clear after straightening, tiring when swamped inside final 50 metres.
Settled in 6th on the rail some 3L off the pace, commenced move 3-wide on top of home bend, turned home to hold some chance early in straight but could only produce moderate response under pressure.
Ridden to lead from a wide gate, gradually obtained rails run coming onto home bend but then narrowly headed, soon weakened under pressure upon straightening.
Began awkwardly losing ground, travelled one-out-one-back in coveted position to straight, soon weakened under pressure.

Quickly recovered to 8th some 6L off the pace after moderate start, commenced move 4-wide from 650M on home bend, ran on under pressure in straight to reach 2nd briefly 200M out, made no further impression.
Held up 2-wide in midfield, always travelled well, quickened up smoothly from 350M, soon led and continued on strongly to the line. Never in danger.
Went forward from wide draw, shared lead passing 1000M, emerged as sole leader 550M, caught by rivals near 300M then weakened. (Jockey fined for weighing in 3lbs over.)
Settled down midfield, fought on same speed turning for home, never going the pace to challenge.
Towards the rear always, 7Ls to make up 400M, made no progress in the straight, never involved. (Blood in trachea.)
Held up 3-wide behind midfield, failed to run on turning home, no extra 200M, eased towards the line. (Unacceptable Performance.)
Went forward, shared lead from 1000M, struggled to keep up 600M out, weakened away to finish distant last. (Unacceptable Performance.)
Dropped back after the start, held up near last 6Ls off the pace, directed outwards for clear running early straight, stayed on without threatening first 2.
Restrained on jumping from draw 13, settled in the rear 8Ls off leaders middle stages, closed off well final 400M without threatening first 2.
Chased leaders on inside, came under serious pressure 600M, soon gave ground passing 350M, weakened rapidly. (Unacceptable Performance.)
Chased leaders along the 3-path, wide no cover from 900M, made good response early straight, hit the font briefly 300M out, run ended mid-straight and dropped out of contention.
Slotted into a 3-wide spot in midfield, had every chance in the straight, ran on mildly, not pace of leaders final 200M.
Restrained behind mid-division, travelled keenly, driven and stayed on fairly over final 400M, not reach leaders.
Guided to race along the fence behind mid-division, ran on well passing 350M, tried hard to close the gap on winner but was comfortably held. Went clear from rest.
Chased leaders 2-wide, battled on one paced turning into straight, lacked further response passing 250M, faded towards the line.
Clean jump, raced prominently on the outside, travelled well to turn, ridden 300M, hit the front approaching 200M, kept on very well to the line.

Shifted out at start and bumped, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 200M, weakened gradually final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 13, raced at rear throughout, never competitive.
Jumped with them, unable to slot in, raced 3 wide, a length or so back, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 550M, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching 200M, made minor progress thereafter.
Crowded start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 550M, made good progress in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two. (Rider dropped whip near 250M.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, weakened final furlong. (Lost right front plate on jumping.)
Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, no extra final furlong.
Began well from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began only fairly from gate 12, raced towards rear on the outside, 4 to 5 lengths back on turn, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Jumped well from gate 10, raced in midfield on the outside, similar position on turn, hard ridden after passing 350M, closed off well to take 2nd.
Out in line, raced 3 wide slightly behind midfield, 4 lengths or so back, very wide turning in, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect.
Slowly away, raced at tail, 9 to 10 lengths back, moved closer on turn but still the last, very wide into straight, made no progress in the run home.
Commenced well, raced in midfield on the outside, moved closer after passing 700M, 4 wide turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually final 50M.
Began awkwardly and bumped, tracked leaders, 2 wide, wider turning in, finished off evenly.
Taken back from gate 13, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run in straight, not able to be properly tested.
Commenced well, raced prominently on the inside, took the lead 1100M, led by 3/4L, challenged by rival turning in, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, wider from 650M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, failed to make any progress thereafter.
Taken back from gate 9, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out 650M, failed to close off in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, angled out 600M, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, took the early lead, headed 1100M, 2nd on turn, retook the lead early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually thereafter, finished 3rd.

Away with them, sat right behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, continued to lay in and proved difficult to ride in straight, peaked 150M, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away with them, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, finished off well to make frame without threatening the first few.
Began only fairly from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, finished off well to take 2nd.
Out with rest, raced behind midfield on the outside, 6 lengths or so back, bumped near 600M, very wide turning in, finished off strongly to score.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail in the early stages, positioned behind midfield on the outside in the middle stages, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, similar position on turn, not enough room early in straight, cleared 150M, only showed limited response, ran on evenly to the line.
Began awkwardly from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, closed off well to take a place.
Bumped start, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, same position on turn, showed good response early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened final 50M.
Shifted in at start and made contact, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, peaked and headed 200M, weakened thereafter.
Average to begin, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, finished off well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Made contact at start, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, allowed rival to cross near 900M, 2-1/2L back on turn, peaked early in straight, one-paced thereafter.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at rear, 5 lengths or so back on turn, very wide into straight, passed some tired rivals in the run home.

Commenced well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 wide on turn, peaked early in straight, kept on evenly to 50M, weakened thereafter. (Had a continuous displacement of the soft palate.) (Rider dropped whip near 200M.)
Fast into stride, raced better than midfield on the inside, easy run to turn, hit the front 200M, kept on strongly to the line.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide towards rear, there to turn, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening.
Jumped with them, raced towards rear on the outside early, moved a bit closer after entering the back straight, 4 wide on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, ran on well for 2nd.
Pushed early, at back, trapped 3 wide, no progress.
Eased at start, took rail at back, made steady ground 200M.
Slow away, at back, 2 wide, ran on fairly in straight.
Midfield, 2 wide, no progress, heart irregularity noted after racing.
Eased at start, took rail, on heels early, lack turn of foot.
Eased at start, raced 3 wide throughout at rear, ran on fairly.
Box seat, no dash.
Eased to sit in midfield along the fence, progressed steadily 250M.
Took rail and lead easily, made all.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 3 wide, emptied 200M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Pushed early, in front of midfield, 2 wide, progressed steadily 300M.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail after 500M, nothing in the Straight.
Sent forward and raced next to the leader, along the rail, kept on going to the line and scored by 1-1/4L.
Settled in midfield, 2 wide after 550M, pretty one paced in the Straight.
Settled in front of midfield, 2 wide, made ground steadily to the ground and finished 3rd.
Settled in midfield, wide no cover, lost ground in the Straight.
Taken back from wide barrier and at rear, 2 wide, made some ground only in the last 50M.
At rear, along the rail, did not improve in the Straight.
Raced in front of midfield, along the rail, kept on going but never a threat to the winner.
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail, checked around 480M and then weakened in the Straight.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, only one paced in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, 3 wide but with cover, swung wide and made minor ground to the line.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, only one paced.
Pushed forward to lead. Joined & headed by winner nearing 150m, caught for a minor placing in late stages, only beaten a length on line. (Lame next day).

Steadied after the start & taken back to share last place. Shifted wider on the track passing the 400m when over 5L behind before making late ground down the outside to halve that margin when running onto midfield.

Steadied & momentarily awkwardly placed in first 100m before racing just worse than midfield along the rail. Stayed along the rail on straightening but failed to improve & was beaten just over 4L when third last.
Nice run 1,1 throughout. Eased three wide just before straightening, moved to the lead at 150m & had enough in hand to win by half-length.
Raced on the leaders back throughout. Stayed close to the rail on straightening, held 2L deficit all the way to the line.
Had a soft run in midfield along the rail throughout. Moved off the rail on cornering, shifted outwards further at 250m before closing well to move to second inside the final 25m.
Raced in midfield away from the rail for the majority. Shifted out into clear running on straightening before closing well down the outside to be beaten under 1L into third.

Ridden forward from gate 11 but was caught wide before improving position approaching the 800m to be three deep outside leaders. Began losing ground from the 500m & weakened to distant last. Rider concerned with action.
Pushed forward & raced outside the leader. Continued in second place on straightening when about a length behind before emptying out near the 250m mark & weakening thereafter.

Steadied at start but was left racing wide & without cover when worse than midfield. Improved to midfield after the 600m, was very wide on cornering when about 3L from the lead before finishing off only one paced to line.
Got back after the start & raced third last away from rail. Continued with only two rivals behind on cornering before making late ground between runners to be beaten just over 2L.

Began awkwardly, shared last place before becoming reluctant near 600m, shifting outwards & severely checked, losing significant ground. Was over 7L last at the 400m & couldn't recover after the incident.
Began well from a wide draw, unable to slot in, raced in midfield on the outside, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began well from gate 1, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, closed off well to make frame, not quite able to challenge.
Jumped with them, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L on turn, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 50M.
Taken back from a tricky gate, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Began fairly from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, 4 to 5 lengths back, hard ridden after passing 500M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score by a neck.
Made contact at start, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, very wide turning in, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 150M, one-paced thereafter.

Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, travelled keenly for some distance after 1100M, dropped towards rear of midfield 700M, angled out 400M, made very good progress in straight to take a place, nearest finish.

Away well, raced 3 wide, a length or so back, moved a bit closer after entering the back straight, 2 wide from 700M, 1/2L back on turn, took the lead 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner late.
Jumped well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, dropped to midfield in the middle stages, weakened gradually in straight.
Began fairly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, dropped to rear 600M, last turning in, weakened early in straight.
Jumped with them, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M.

Began awkwardly and made contact, raced at tail early, 7 lengths back, sent forward after 1050M, positioned 3 wide, a length or so back in the middle stages, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped start, then eased and sat in worse than mid-field, checked at 600M, made ground in straight, closed off nicely to take 3rd.
Shifted across to rail, at rear, found nothing in the straight.
Went forward, sat one-out one-back, stayed on well to the line.
Rolled forward, sat outside the lead, no response and lost ground from on straightening.
Bumped start, took back to be at rear, wide but with cover, hampered at 200M, found nothing nonetheless.
Slightly slow away, settled midfield, on rail, ran on until emptied late.
Bumped start, recovered to share lead but wide, no cover, dropped out from rounding Home Turn, not competitive.
Forward and led from inside draw, kept on nicely, on-ly caught by winner towards late, finished 1/2L be-hind.
Bumped start, recovered to sit in box-seat, kept going until impeded passing 100M.
Crowded at start, then took back, at tail 2 wide, swung widest, swooped home nicely to win by 1/2L.
Slotted into midfield, 2 wide, showed minor dashes before weakening in the straight.
Hard ridden early, trapped wide then found cover in midfield, wide however, checked 250M, showed noth-ing thereafter.
Travelled in 8th in rear of midfield, went one of the widest into home straight, ran on steadily down the centre of the track without threatening first three.

Broke well from a wide gate, ridden along before settling for 6th some 3L back 3-wide without cover, gained slightly closer to 5th rounding home bend, fought on under pressure to just fail to get up on line.
Crowded at start losing ground, travelled at the back to straight, saved ground turning in, ran on to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield in 7th on the rail, carried slightly backward inside the 600 metres, saved ground turning in, fought on well under pressure to hold place chance inside final 200 metres.
Crowded at start losing ground, soon recovered towards last few, switched to the widest entering home straight, ran on to be nearest at finish.
Crowded at start, always in last few, never seen with a chance. (Questioned for disappointing performance).
Gradually settled in last few from a wide gate, saved ground turning for home, fought on steadily without threatening. (Tactic questioned).
Wide with the leaders early, shifted back for cover just over 2L back in 5th inside the 850 metres, saved ground turning in, weakened inside the 100 metres.
Settled just off the pace on the rail within striking distance, angled out to challenge turning into straight, hit the front 200 metres out, just held off runner-up's late challenge.
Soon took up running holding slender advantage to straight, weakened under pressure inside final 200 metres.
With the leader early, dropped to one-out-one-back position passing the 850 metres, yielded ground on straightening.
Niggled along in first few before traveling keenly, pulled forward to join the leader 850 metres out, hit the front entering straight but unable to sustain effort 200 metres out.
Tracked leader on outside, raced keenly passing 1100M, kept on moderately under top weight passing 400M, not able to close the gap on winner.
Restrained to race towards the rear along the fence, held up for clear running rounding home turn, stayed on mildly over final 300M without threatening leaders.
Settled behind mid-division, 6-7Ls behind leader rounding home turn, never going the pace to challenge. (Roarer.)
In mid-division, bumped by rival and taken to a 3-wide spot from 1000M, failed to quicken in the straight, never involved.
Dropped back to obtain cover at the rear, over 10Ls off the pace early stages, made his move 500M swinging wide for home, stayed on to go 4th 50M out, not reach top 3.
Held up towards the rear 8Ls off the pace, moved to a 3-wide spot halfway, stayed on without threatening leaders.
From draw 12 soon crossed to the lead, led at even tempo, kicked on well passing 300M and was always holding off the pursuing rivals.
Soon crossed to the fence, settled down in midfield 5Ls off the pace, ridden and kept on same pace over final 400M.
Switched off to race at the rear, 8-9Ls off the pace middle stages, stayed on past beaten horses only in the straight, never a factor.
Always prominent tracking leader, unbalanced 1200M when race leader steadied the tempo, outpaced by first 3 turning home, no extra final 200M. (Cut to LH leg.)
From draw 1 obtained a midfield position early stages, taken to a 2-wide spot from 1000M, didn't respond to riding and weakened from 300M.
Settled in 4th place, always in touch, driven out 400M, went 2nd mid-straight, not reach winner, run ended close home and edged out to 3rd late.

Away well, raced prominently, 3 wide, 2 wide after entering the back straight, allowed rival to cross 700M, 2 lengths back on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened thereafter.(See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, 7 lengths back, commenced move approaching 400M, very wide into straight, made some progress in the run home.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide in midfield, found rail near 700M, saved ground on turn, finished off strongly to score.
Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 2-1/2L back, commenced move 400M, finished off well to take a place.
Bumped start, raced prominently on the inside, there to turn, hit the front early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, kept on evenly to make frame.
Taken back from gate 8, raced towards rear on the inside, 7 lengths back, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Bumped start, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner late.
Taken back from gate 11, raced at tail, 9 lengths back, still well back on turn, made some progress in straight.
Began well, raced 3 wide in midfield, found a 2 wide spot near 700M, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Began fairly from the widest draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/4L on turn, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
Began fairly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, peaked on turn, weakened gradually in straight.
Began well from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside, a length back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
Bumped shortly after start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to take a place, nearest finish.
Bumped start, raced better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths back on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame, not quite able to challenge.
Commenced well, raced prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, hard ridden 400M, showed very good response, took the lead 50M, won by 3/4L.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Crowded on jumping, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out 550M, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, one-paced in straight.

Taken back from a wide gate, raced at rear on the outside, 7 lengths back, same margin back on turn, very wide into straight, hard ridden from 350M, slightly hampered 200M, made some progress thereafter.
Moderately away from the widest draw, raced in midfield on the outside, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, easy run to turn, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Shifted out at start, positioned 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, showed some response early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 11, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 550M, passed some tired runners in straight.
Bumped shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the outside, similar position on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Hard ridden to hold the rail in midfield, on heels 800M, dashed well 400M.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, ran on ok, lack room 100M.
Slow away, at back, trapped 2-4 wide, dashed well 300M.
Eased to sit in midfield, 2 wide, lack room 4-2 and checked, ran on ok.
Eased back, trapped 3 wide, ran on ok, on heels 50M.
Hard ridden forward, took box seat, weakened 250M, substantial blood in trachea after racing.
Hard ridden to take rail and lead, drifted away 300M to score with ease.
Midfield, 2 wide, on heels 800M, just held ground and lay in under pressure in straight.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 3 wide, emptied 350M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Bumped start, at back, 2 wide, lack room 4-2, dashed well when clear.
Very slow away, never a factor.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, out of fuel 250M.
Eased back, took rail, lack room 400M, dashed well when clear.
At rear, along the rail, swung wide on Straightening and showed strong dash in the last 100M.
At rear, along the rail, did not featured.
At one-out one-back, flattened after 300M and lost ground in the Straight.
Raced in behind midfield, approaching 800M bumped a runner, in the Straight lost ground.
At rear, along the rail, pretty one paced.
Sent forward and raced next to the leader, 2 wide, lost ground in the Straight.
Raced behind the leader, along the rail, showed strong dash and won impressively by 3-3/4L. (Lame right front on the morning after racing)
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, weakened in the last 200M and finished 4th.
At rear, 2 wide, nothing in the Straight.
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail after 850M, swung wide on Straightening and closed off well to the line.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, only one paced in the Straight.
Settled in midfield, along the rail, made minor ground in the early of the Straight but weakened after passing 150M.
Settled in midfield, along the rail, remained one paced in the Straight.
At rear, 2 wide, swung widest on Straightening but showed some dash only.
Had a nice position in midfield away from the rail. Eased three wide passing 600m, entered last section 2L from lead before pretty much holding that deficit all the way to line.

Began a length slow before steadying near the 900m & racing 4th last on rail. Continued near the tail on straightening when 5L behind, didn't have the clearest run mid-straight before closing well in late stages.
Had a nice run 1,1 throughout. Moved up to take lead near 250m before going on to win by 0.75L.

Raced midfield along the rail. Moved away from the inside near the 500m mark, shifted wider entering last section when over 3L behind before closing strongly in final stages to move to second inside final 75m.

Drifted back to third last when racing three wide with cover. Continued in second half when 5L form the lead on straightening before failing to make any headway in final section & being beaten same margin on line.
Pushed forward, led when racing wide before crossing to rail near the 900m. Headed by the winner near 250m mark before weakening a couple of lengths in the final stages.

Had no early speed & raced at the tail & then second last along rail from the 800m. Stayed close to the inside on straightening when over 5L behind before passing a few tiring rivals but still being well beaten.

Shifted behind runners & raced second last before being relegated to last nearing the 850m. Shifted to be the widest runner on straightening when 6L from the lead before making no real headway in the straight.
Raced in midfield between runners for the majority. Eased wider on straightening, closed well in final furlong to move to third in late stages.
Raced on the leaders back for the majority. Was badly held up from on straightening until near the 100m mark before hitting the line well in late stages. Unlucky.
Pushed forward but was forced to race three wide without cover outside the leaders. Stopped badly in straight & was long last.

Drifted back to race worse than midfield along rail. Continued in second half, just under 4L from the lead entering last section before closing off well between runners in final stages to steal 4th late.

Raced just worse than midfield but was trapped racing three wide throughout. Forced four wide just prior to straightening when about 4L form the lead before weakening in final 300m to be well beaten second last.

Raced prominent before being crossed by leader near 900m then racing between runners in a line of three at the front. Raced tight with rival runner near 300m mark before emptying near 200m & weakening quickly in last furlong.
Bumped on jumping, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress in straight.

Shifted in at start and bumped, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, showed good response in straight, led narrowly 100M, peaked and headed 50M, dropped to 4th close home.
Began awkwardly and shifted out, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Away well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide approaching 600M, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.

Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, 8 lengths or so back, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 250M, made very good progress to take a place, nearest finish.
Began awkwardly, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, finished off strongly to score.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at rear on the outside, bumped near 1200M, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Slightly slow out, raced in midfield on the outside, slightly improved on turn, wide into straight, peaked on run 300M, weakened inside final furlong.
Fast into stride, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened final 50M.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made some headway in straight.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 3 wide on turn, commenced move after passing 550M, very wide into straight, closed off well without threatening.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide at rear, bumped near 1200M, a bit closer on turn, finished off strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 700M, wider turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Sat just in front of midfield, wide but with cover, dropped off passing 300M. (See Incident Report)
Raced in one-out one-back position, ran home pretty one paced.
Forward, shared lead along the rail, one paced and weakened in last 100M.
In worse than midfield, wide with cover, not competitive in the straight.
Taken back, in worse than midfield, 2 wide at turns, ran home steadily without threatening.
Eased then raced towards the rear, wide with cover, found noth-ing.
Bumped start, sat in front of midfield, 2 wide, held until 200M in the straight, ran on nicely once cleared to take 3rd.
Settled to race in box-seat, kept on battling to the line to pro-duce a good 2nd placed finish.
Urged early, prominent, wide and no cover however, one paced and emptied late.
Forward, shared lead 2 wide, ran on until emptied passing 200M. (See Incident Report)
In behind midfield, 2 wide, didn't handle turn well, showed nothing in its first race start.
Bumped start, then taken back, at rear and on rail at turns, re-mained on the inside in the straight, held from 200M to 100M, closed off well thereafter to the line.
Began only fairly, recovered to sit in front of midfield, on rail, held early then finished off strongly to win by 1/2L.
Eased and shifted across to rail, just behind midfield, raced keenly, no dash in the straight.

Moderate start, settled in rear of midfield on the rail travelling keenly at times in back straight, went 3-wide rounding home bend and wider into straight, responded well inside final 250 metres to just fail to get up on line.
Always well behind and never seen with a chance.
Settled 2L back 2-wide in joint 3rd, switched wider for a run into straight, unable to quicken to challenge.
Settled two back on the rail in joint 3rd, saved round turning for home, did not find much room until the 100 metres.
Slow out and soon dropped to last few, never seen with a chance.
Broke well, settled in midfield in 6th on the rail, came to challenge entering straight, hit the front briefly 200 metres out, renewed effort to re-gain upper hand close to home.
Settled in last few on the rail, gained slightly closer 1000 metres out, kept on same pace until inconvenienced 150 metres out.
Pressed forward from a wide gate, settled just off the pace in 2nd on stables bend, held some chance under pressure early in straight, unable to sustain effort inside final 200 metres.
Travelled mainly in worse than midfield, shifted wide for a run into straight, finished off the race well inside final 200 metres.
Settled in last few, lost position over half-way out, fought on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Settled some 4L back in 5th 2-wide, unable to quicken under pressure in straight.
Pressed forward from a wide gate, obtained lead on the rail at the 1600 metres on top of stables bend, led until finding no extra 150 metres out.
Up with early pace before taken back to track leaders, chased on well under top weight passing 350M, got up for 2nd 50M from home, just held by winner.
Chased leaders on inside, driven and kept on same pace from 400M, always held by leaders.
Close up behind leaders early stages before settling down ahead of midfield, came under serious pressure home turn, weakened out of contention 400M.
Settled down behind midfield, held up badly from 500M and got shuffled back to last, finished off strongly final 200M to go 4th near line. Too much to do.
Guided to the fence after the start, settled towards the rear, driven along 500M but never going the pace to challenge.
Soon led after jumping from draw 1, pressed by rival from 700M, gave way passing 350M, no extra final 150M.
Began awkwardly, raced ungenerously and hung out early stages before eventually settled down in midfield, weakened turning home. (Jockey : didn't finish off due to racing manners.)
Always prominent, caught wide no cover from 1300M, responded well to take lead 300M out, caught by first 2 late stages.
Held up in mid-division along the fence, travelled well turning into straight, made his bid on inside, did best work final 200M surging to the front close home.
Soon shifted across behind runners, reserved at the rear 6-7Ls off the pace, ran past beaten horses in the straight, never reach leaders.
Restrained to race towards the rear, switched wide from 500M, stayed on mildly without troubling leaders.
Hard driven out the gate, settled just off leader, moved up 600M to vie for the lead, couldn't finish off as well as rivals from 300M, faded close home.
Dropped back to the rear from draw 13, wide no cover from 800M, moved closer home turn, swung wide into straight, couldn't pick up.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide at rear, angled out 450M, made some headway in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 4 to 5 lengths back on turn, one-paced in straight.
Jumped well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off well to take 2nd.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L on turn, peaked early in straight, headed 250M, weakened final 150M.
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, travelled well to turn, angled out early in straight, finished off strongly to score.
Jumped well from gate 11, raced 3 wide and without cover throughout, 2 lengths or so back, wider turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, made minor progress early in straight, no extra final 200M.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced behind midfield on the outside, angled out 550M, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening.
Jumped well, positioned 2 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, 3 wide turning in, showed some response early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened final 50M.
Bumped on jumping, raced prominently on the outside, 1/2L back on turn, hit the front 250M, peaked and headed 100M, stayed on evenly to take 3rd.
Crowded on jumping, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Crowded on jumping, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made very good progress in straight to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Taken back to race 2 wide towards rear, angled out 500M, made no progress in straight.
Jumped well from gate 13, raced prominently on the outside, there to turn, hit the front 350M, kept on very well to the line, won comfortably.
Began smartly from the widest draw, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, 3 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Shifted out on jumping and made contact, taken back to race 2 wide at rear, 7 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, still 8 to 9 lengths back on turn, passed some tired rivals in straight.
Began smartly, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, carried wider 550M, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide better than midfield early, found rail near 950M, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.

Began well from gate 1, raced prominently on the inside early, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader in the middle stages, 2 wide turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Moderately away, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 500M, very wide into straight, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, found rail near 850M, led by 1/4L turning in, peaked and headed 350M, weakened final 250M.
Moderately away, raced in midfield on rail, 2 wide from 500M, finished off well to take a place without threatening.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 500M, made minor progress in straight.
Moderately away, raced at rear on the outside, 5 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, a bit closer in the middle stages, very wide turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Moderately away from the widest draw, took the early lead, headed 900M, dropped to midfield in the middle stages, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began awkwardly, raced better than midfield on the inside, dropped towards rear 700M, 4 lengths back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M.
Slowly away, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, one-paced in the run home.
Began well from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, 2 wide from 700M, wider after passing 400M, finished off evenly.

Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the outside, sent forward after passing 850M, led briefly from 650M, headed 550M, 1/2L back turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter.
Jumped with them, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, moved closer after passing 800M, 2nd on turn, hit the front 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
Crowded start, raced 2 wide in midfield, moved a bit closer after passing 700M, a length or so back on turn, angled out 350M, kept on well in straight to take a place, not quite able to challenge.
Began well, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 700M, 4 lengths back on turn, finished off strongly to score.
Taken back from gate 10, raced at rear throughout, never a threat.
Clean jump, raced prominently on the outside, led 900M, headed 650M, retook the lead 550M, peaked and headed 250M, weakened final furlong. (Roarer.)
Pushed forward, sat outside the leader, ran on well for 2nd.
Eased at start, 2-3 wide, raced keenly, dashed well 200M.
Slow away, pushed to sit in midfield, 2-3 wide, dashed well 300M to score.
At back, took rail, on heels 400M, no progress.
Eased to sit off the leaders, 2 wide, just held ground in straight.
Slow away, behind midfield along the fence, lack room in straight, just held ground, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Eased at start, never improved, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Hard ridden to obtain box seat, weakened 200M.
Pushed to take rail and lead, overhauled 150M.
Eased back, trapped 2-4 wide, never competitive.
Eased at start, 2 wide, ran on ok in straight.
Sent forward and raced next to the leader, 2 wide, showed no response in the Straight.
Sent forward and took lead, kept on going the line and just headed by the winner in the last 25M.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, ran on only fairly to the line.
At rear, along the rail, did not feature.
Midfield, 2 wide, saved ground and closed off strongly, continued well for 3rd.
Worse than midfield, wide no cover, swung widest on Straightening, pretty one paced.
In front of midfield, 2 wide after 500M, stepped up at 200M and caught leader in the last 25M, scored by 1/2L.
Sent forward, along the rail after 600M, lost ground in the Straight. (See incident report)
Worse than midfield, along the rail, never a danger.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, made ground steadily to the line.
Taken back and raced greenly in the early stages, nothing in the Straight.
Settled in midfield, 2 wide, remained one paced to the line.
Raced in midfield away from the rail throughout. Eased three wide before cornering, was finishing off one paced before weakening a length in last 50m. No threat.

No early speed & raced third last before improving slightly along the rail in middle stages. Was finishing off only one paced when racing between rivals before being checked in final stages but was no factor at that point.
Raced third before being crossed & getting cover when racing 1,1 from the 650m. Gave a length in the run to the line & was beaten just under 3L.

Got back to race third last away from the rail after the start. Continued rearward on cornering before being badly held up when having no clear running for entirety of final furlong. Not tested & genuine excuse.

Out-sped at start before shifting across behind runners to race at the tail. Stayed close to the rail on straightening, began closing well before awkwardly placed near heels at 125m before shifting out & finishing ok late.

Began fairly, raced wide around first bend before being steadied & racing very keenly when caught three deep without cover in midfield. Forced very wide on cornering, finished off fairly late, will be better for experience.
Raced in midfield away from the rail throughout. Closed off steadily between runners in final furlong to be in a big bunch that were all beaten around 2L on line.

Steadied from widest gate & shifted back to race at the tail. Shifted to be the widest runner on straightening when continuing near the rear before making strong late ground down the outside to charge to fast finishing second.
Raced midfield along the rail throughout. Stayed along the rail in straight & finished off well to hold third in a big bunch of runners behind the first two.
Raced wide before continuing to improve to eventually get up to race outside the leader from the 750m. Peaked near the 200m mark & weakened out quickly in last furlong to be last.
Began very fast to lead. Held lead all the way & raced clear to win by a length on line.

Raced just behind the speed when two wide before shifting down to the rail & racing on leaders back from the 700m. Moved to second at the 200m mark before finishing off steadily to be 4th in a big bunch just behind on line.
Fast into stride, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, same position on turn, closed off well to take 2nd.
Shifted in at start and bumped, trapped wide in midfield early, sent forward after passing 1300M, raced 2 wide in 2nd from 1200M, there to turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Began only fairly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 6 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, made very good progress in the run home to be nearest on line.
Bumped start, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made no progress in straight.
Shifted out at start and bumped, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Moderately away from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two final 50M.
Began smartly from gate 1, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, taken wide in straight and finished off strongly to score.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
Began awkwardly, raced towards rear on the inside, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made some progress in the run home.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Taken back to race at tail, 8 lengths or so back on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 200M, made some progress thereafter.
Worked forward, led on rail from near 700M, kept on nicely in a close finish to take 3rd.
Asked out of the barriers, shifted across to sit in worse than midfield, 2 wide, no dash in the straight.
Bumped start, in midfield and on rail, lost ground when checked at 600M, closed off well in a close battle to take 2nd.
Bumped start, sat in front of midfield, 2 wide, laid in near 600M, swung wide into the straight, ran on pretty one paced.
Niggled along, raced prominently, no turn of foot and run end-ed half way down the straight.
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail, dashed nicely inside final 150M, hit the line first to win by 1/2L.
Hampered at start, at rear 2 wide, not competitive yet.
Bumped start, then shifted to rail, sat towards the rear, ran home fairly.
Forward, settled to race in box-seat, closed off well to the line, just missed out on minor placings in a close finish.
Bumped start then sat midfield, 2 wide, showed nothing in the straight.
Taken back, at tail along the rail, ran home without threatening.
Raced in front of midfield, along the rail, ran home one paced only.
Settled in midfield, dropped slightly backward behind midfield in 8th 900 metres out, came under pressure when wide into home straight, ran home one-paced.
Settled in last few from a wide gate, commenced progress under reminders rounding home bend hugging the rail, fought on steadily in straight without threatening.
Pressed forward from a wide gate settling some 2L back in 4th, yielded ground quickly from approaching home straight.
Jumped fairly, travelled keenly mainly towards rear 3-wide with cover in back straight, gave up cover for a run over 700 metres out but soon found nothing.
Broke well from a middle draw settling some 4L back in 5th and becoming 6th into back straight, gave ground steadily inside final 400 metres.
Settled in midfield on the rail, gained slightly closer to 3L 5th early in back straight, held place chance early in home straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Settled well back, commenced move rounding home bend switching wide for a run into straight, ran on under pressure down the centre of the track to be nearest at finish.
Well there on the rail, took up running approaching the 1200 metres holding 1L advantage most of the way to home straight, driven clear after straightening, won cozily.
Settled just off the pace on the rail travelling keenly behind the leader in back straight, came under pressure rounding home bend, one-paced in straight.

Slightly slow out settling in last few on the rail, gained slightly closer to 7th in midfield rounding 1000-metre bend, commenced move rounding home bend and ran on under pressure to reach 2nd 50 metres out.
Slowly away settling well back, came under pressure into straight, ran home at the one pace.
Driven forward from a wide gate to dispute lead briefly on stables bend, chased the leader in back straight and in similar position into home straight, soon weakened.
Bustled along after the start, tracked leader from 800M, lacked further response from 250M, lost several places close home.
From wide draw shifted across behind runners, held up near last, not quickened passing 300M making no impression on his Hong Kong debut.
Began awkwardly, soon recovered and led from 850M, kept on soundly turning home, headed by the fast finishing winner near 150M, held on well for 2nd.
Taken back to the rear from draw 11, had plenty to do 10Ls off the pace at 400M, stayed on without reaching leaders.
Settled down 2-wide in midfield, driven out 500M, stayed on moderately to finish a non-threatening 5th.
Obtained running in midfield along the fence, had every chance turning home, stayed on to go 3rd inside 100M, no impression on the runaway winner.
Chased leaders along the 2-path, battled on in the straight but never going the pace to challenge leaders. (Lame RF next day.)
Jumped on terms, moved up from 800M to track leader, ran on strongly to lead nearing 150M, won careering away.
Restrained to a position behind midfield with cover, raced further back than intended, 7Ls to make up 400M, finished off well to claim 4th near line.
Restrained to race behind midfield, ran home one paced, never dangerous.
Began well from draw 1, eased passing 900M to sit behind leaders, driven along near 400M, kept on same pace until no extra 150M.
Dropped back to race towards the rear, couldn't pick up pace in the straight, never involved.
Away well, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, raced tight and carried wider 550M, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Began well, raced in midfield on the outside, dropped towards rear on turn, 5 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight.
Bumped start, raced at rear on the outside, found rail near 750M, 2 wide turning in, finished off strongly to score.
Taken back from gate 8, raced at rear, 6 lengths or so back, made no progress in straight.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, closed off well to take 2nd.
Bumped start, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, dropped towards rear on turn, 5 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight.
Bumped start, raced prominently on the outside, 1/4L back on turn, took the lead early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, weakened quickly final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Roarer.)
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.

Commenced well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 650M, raced tight and angled out 550M, hard ridden 400M, hit the front 150M, kept on well but unable to hold off the first two late.
Average to begin, raced at rear on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, finished off evenly.
Crowded on jumping, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
Shifted out at start and bumped, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/4L turning in, narrowly headed early in straight, kept on well to the line.
Never a factor.
Very slow away, at back, no dash, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Midfield, soon weakened 400M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Midfield, dashed well 300M for 3rd.
Pushed forward, just held ground in straight.
At rear, ran on fairly in straight.
Took rail and lead, weakened 150M.
Hard ridden forward, no progress in straight.
Slow away, at rear, dashed well 300M.
Midfield, trapped wide, emptied 500M.
Behind midfield, trapped wide, dashed well 300M to score with ease.
Pressed forward, ran on well for 2nd.
Raced next to the leader, 2 wide, kept on going to the line and finished 2nd, never a threat to the winner.
Settled in midfield, 2 wide, remained one paced to the line.
Settled in behind the leader, along the rail, weakened after passing the 150M.
At rear, along the rail, nothing in the Straight.
At rear, 2 wide, made ground and closed off well in the Straight.
At rear, 2 wide, only one paced in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, pretty one paced.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, kept on going to score comfortably by 6L.
At one-out one-back after 950M, stayed on well to the line.

Raced just worse than midfield between runners for the majority. Ridden along 500m, shifted outwards on straightening when 5L behind before continuing to shift out to stand rail & closing strongly for second in final stages.

Had a nice run on leaders back for the majority. Stayed along the rail on straightening, entered last section about 3L from the lead as leader kicked away but emptied early in straight & weakened badly to be long way behind.
Was trapped racing three deep when worse than midfield but did have cover from the 1000m mark. Was the widest runner on straighten when about 6L behind before weakening poorly to be beaten over 11L.
Raced three deep with cover in midfield throughout. Eased wider on straightening, entered last section 5L behind before weakening very poorly to be distant last.
Began well, pushed forward but was trapped wide just forward of midfield throughout. Straightened about 3L from the lead before holding that deficit all the way to the line where he held third.

Didn't begin fast but mustered speed to improve & share lead from 1100m before improving to outright lead near 950m. Kicked strongly mid-straight before continuing strongly all the way to line to win by over 2L.
Raced 1,1 for the majority. Moved to second entering last section before emptying mid-straight & weakening out quickly on the testing ground to be 7L behind in midfield.
Ridden forward to share lead from the 1250m before racing outside leader from 950m. Hung outwards on cornering before weakening to be beaten over 10L in midfield in very strung out finish.
Had no early speed & raced last. Was second last on straightening when 7.5L from the lead before passing only a few tiring rivals but being beaten over 10L.

Raced in midfield along the rail in early & middle stages. Moved away from the inside just before straightening, was only 4L behind entering last section before weakening badly to be a long third last.

Drifted back after start, raced worse than midfield before moving down to rail near 900m. Stayed along the inside on cornering when 5.5L behind, shifted out near 350m before finishing one paced to well beaten into midfield.

Steadied from outside gate & raced second last away from rail before third last from 950m. Straightened just under 6L behind, hampered & crowded near the 350m before closing off one paced to be well beaten in midfield.
Raced in midfield between runners throughout. Finished off steadily when holding deficit for the entirety of the straight.

Shifted behind runners down to rail when third last early before being relegated to last near the 750m. Was a clear last & over 10L from lead entering last section before weakening to be beaten over 22L. Poor again.
Average to begin, positioned a length behind the leader, 2 away from the stands' side, a bit closer in the middle stages, pressed leader 200M, always just held.
Commenced well, raced prominently, 3 away from the stands' rail, hard ridden from 400M, showed limited response, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Began well from gate 14, raced behind midfield on the stands' rail, made some headway final 400M, no threat to the first few.
Away with them, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader, nearer to the middle track, only showed limited response after passing 400M, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Began fairly, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the middle track, peaked 450M, weakened thereafter.
Jumped with them, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader, 3 away from the stands' rail, kept on well final 400M to take a place, not quite able to challenge.
Crowded start, sent forward to take the lead on the stands' rail, headed 450M, peaked 300M, weakened and eased final furlong. (Blood in trachea.)
Began awkwardly, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the stands' side, kept on evenly final 400M to make frame, no threat to the first few.
