Began well from gate 1, positioned 2-1/2L behind the leader in the middle of the track, hard ridden 300M, only showed limited response, weakened final furlong.
Lifted front feet on jumping and away tardily, recovered and raced in midfield on the middle track, hard ridden 400M, weakened and eased final furlong.
Began awkwardly, raced at rear on the stands' rail, 6 lengths back at 400M, closed off well without threatening.
Jumped with them, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Fast into stride, sent forward to race prominently on the stands' side, took the lead 450M, kept on well to the line, won by 1/2L.
Hard ridden, remained detached early again, caught up near 700M, angled out in straight, ran home steadily. Must trial.
Taken back, at rear, wide with cover, eased down when found nothing.
Jumped well, shifted across to be in midfield, wide and no cov-er, found nothing before eased down.
Forward, sat outside lead, kept on going to the line to win by 2-1/4L on a yielding track.
Niggled along, settled to race in box-seat, kept on okay until began to empty passing 200M.
Travelled at the rear, along the rail, ran on without threatening.
Eased back to race at the rear, wide but with cover, swung wid-est into the straight, made nice ground to finish 2nd.
Raced towards the rear, wide but with cover, found no kick in the straight. (See Incident Report)
Sent forward to take rail and led, headed passing 350M and dropped off gradually.
Bumped start, in about midfield, wide with cover, showed nothing before being eased.
Ridden forward, raced prominently but wide no cover, ran home pretty one paced.
Bumped start, in midfield along the rail, pressured 700M out, finished tailed off.
Jumped well, raced in one-out one-back position, made run home on centre track, ran on fairly to take 3rd.
Jumped awkward and lost ground, recovered to be around mid-field, 2 wide, showed nothing and was eased.
Ridden along at the back after moderate start, trailed the field most of the way and never seen with a chance.
Soon dropped to the rear along the rail, never seen with a chance.
Settled just off the pace in 5th from a wide gate, switched wide to challenge entering straight, dropped away quickly under pressure inside final 250 metres.
Broke well and ridden along early before settling one back in 3rd to straight, soon weakened.
Soon came to dispute the lead from a wide gate, hit the front briefly after straightening but overhauled 250 metres out.
Niggled along in 7th just worse than midfield, soon came to challenge down the centre of home straight and hit the front about 250 metres out, held on well under pressure.
Driven forward to lead from the one gate, held narrow advantage until headed into straight, folded up quickly under pressure. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Pressed forward from a wide gate before settling some 2L back in 4th, kept on steadily in straight without quickening.
Niggled along in 6th in midfield just over 4L off the pace, angled out for a run after straightening over 350 metres out but never look like reaching the winner.
Ridden along in rear after moderate start, gained slightly to 8th onto home bend, went widest into straight and fought on steadily down the centre of the track.
Strode forward, obtained a trailing position behind leaders from 850M, kept to inside on straightening, ran home steadily under top weight for 3rd, not pace of winner over final 200M.
Chased leaders along the 3-path, brought wide on straightening, finished off strongly down outside of straight, led 200M out, won careering away.
Went forward to be disputing the lead with rivals, soon no extra turning for home, weakened rapidly to finish last.
Caught wide no cover outside the lead, responded mildly passing 400M, fought on to take 2nd close home but well beaten by the winner.
Disputed for the lead 2-wide, took narrow lead from 400M, headed mid-straight, faded towards the line.
Up with early pace, sat back to track leaders from 900M, lacked further response from 300M, plodded home (Roarer).
Began awkwardly, recovered to race in midfield, driven along 600M but failed to run on, soon beaten on straightening.
From draw 11 crossed to a 3-wide spot in midfield, driven out 500M, lay out under pressure and proved difficult to ride, not reached leaders.
Began fairly, held up towards the rear on the inside, not quickened turning into straight, never involved. (Jockey reported his mount didn't handle the track's conditions)
Settled down in midfield along the fence, niggled along 500M out, kept on one paced to the line, never dangerous.
Jumped on terms, dropped back to race towards the rear, widest turning home, never going the pace to challenge.
Outpaced early stages, ended up in last 7Ls off the pace, made some progress when brought wide into straight, got up for 5th close home.

Taken back from gate 13, raced behind midfield on the outside, angled towards stands' side entering straight, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner on line.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Moderately away, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, weakened from 500M, eased final furlong.
Moderately away from a wide draw, positioned 3 wide with no cover, a length or so back, similar position on turn, kept on well early in straight, no extra final furlong.
Jumped well from gate 12, raced better than midfield, 4 wide throughout, wider turning in, showed some response early in straight, peaked 250M, weakened final 200M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 8 lengths back, a bit closer on turn, commenced move after passing 600M, very wide turning in, closed off well to make frame without threatening.
Taken back from gate 8, raced towards rear, 5 to 6 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, emptied early in straight.
Bumped on jumping, positioned 2 to 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, failed to close off in straight.

Commenced well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed good response early in straight, took the lead 250M, peaked and headed 200M, ran on evenly to take a place.
Lifted front feet on jumping and away tardily, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, finished off strongly to score by a narrow margin.
Bumped on jumping, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept to inside after straightening, peaked and headed 250M, weakened thereafter.
Jumped well, raced prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, weakened early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, angled out 500M, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 200M, one-paced thereafter.
Shifted out at start, took the early lead, headed near 950M, challenged the leader 600M, kept on well early in straight, peaked 250M, weakened gradually final 150M.
Moderately away, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, 2 wide on turn, angled out 550M, very wide turning in, made some headway in straight.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Hampered start, raced 3 to 4 wide towards rear, 2 wide on turn, angled out 550M, slightly hampered early in straight, one-paced in the run home.
Jumped with them, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, raced solo on inside after straightening, showed some response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Away well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, wider turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Began awkwardly and bumped, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rivals 600M, peaked and headed 300M, kept on evenly to take a place.
Jumped well, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out 550M, 6 lengths back turning in, made minor progress early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Taken back to race at tail, commenced move 550M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Began fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, moved a bit closer on turn, angled out 600M, showed some response early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened thereafter.
Hampered start, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, hampered near 450M, very wide into straight, made some progress in the run home to make frame.

Average to begin, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, challenged the leader 600M, ridden and angled towards stands' side 450M, took the lead 300M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner late.
Commenced well, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out 400M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the outside, moved closer after passing 600M, very wide turning in, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, 3/4L back on turn, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide into straight, failed to make any progress in the run home.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the inside, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, finished off evenly.
Bumped on jumping, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened thereafter.
Began awkwardly, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, weakened early in straight.
Bumped shortly after start, raced at tail, 6 lengths or so back on turn, taken wide in straight and finished off strongly to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Jumped well, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Shifted in and bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide in midfield, dropped towards rear 500M, 4 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Began smartly from gate 1, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Slightly slow out, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Eased back, held up in straight and checked, not properly tested.
Hard ridden forward, weakened 300M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Settled in front, just held ground in straight.
At rear, took rail, dashed well 250M.
At back, no progress, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Hard ridden early, trapped wide in midfield, dropped off 600M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Behind midfield, never improved.
Failed to muster, at rear, lack room 4-2, dashed well when clear.
Took rail and lead easily, drifted away 300M to score.
Eased to sit in midfield along the fence, dashed well 300M.
Pushed forward, raced keenly, emptied 300M.
Sent forward from a wide barrier, along the rail after 1000M, kept on going and scored impressively by 2L.
At rear and difficult to settled, made minor ground only.
Kept rolling and raced prominently, 2 wide, stayed on and ran on fairly to the line.
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail until 550M, swung widest on Straightening, made minor ground in the Straight.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, did not feature.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, pretty one paced.
Raced prominently, 2 wide, lost ground in the Straight and did not threaten.
At rear, along the rail, only one paced to the line.
At rear, along the rail, swung wide on Straightening and close off strongly to the line in the last 50M.
Raced behind the leader, along the rail, stayed on but never a threat to the winner.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, stayed on but only one paced in the Straight.
Lost ground on jumping & raced last early before racing third last along the rail from the 600m. Stayed along the rail in the straight & made up a length or so when holding fifth place.
Raced three wide with cover in midfield before being forced 4 & 5 wide passing the 500m. Was very wide on straightening when about 4L behind before weakening further to be well beaten.
Pushed forward but was caught racing three deep no cover when outside the leaders. Began losing ground from passing the 500m mark before weakening badly in the straight to be beaten 11L.
Began fast but couldn't cross & raced between runners in a line of three at the front. Shared lead from on straightening all the way until over-run by winner in final 25m, narrowly beaten.
Had a nice run just behind the leading trio when away from the rail. Was only 2L from the lead on cornering but did little in the straight & was pretty plain when weakening to be beaten 5L.

Held the advantage of the rail after the start & improved through to take lead from the 750m. Continued to battle for the lead all the way until over-run by closing winner in final 25m, only beaten a neck into third on line.
Raced just worse than midfield away from rail. Cornered about 3.5L from the lead before closing off well in run to the line to only be beaten 1.5L. Clear of 5th.

Drifted back after the start & was soon enough racing at the tail from the 700m. Continued rearward & hung outwards around the bend & consequently lost further ground. Did little in straight & was long second last.

Steadied from outside gate & raced at the tail when three wide with cover. Was taken outwards by hanging rival around bend & lost significant ground. Did nothing in the straight & finished a long last.

Raced in midfield along rail, made headway approaching the corner, entered last section only 1.75L from the lead when third, moved over the heels of leading pair on straightening, moved up to steal lead in final 25m.
Taken back from gate 11, raced 3 wide behind midfield early, 2 wide from 700M, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Began well, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Began fairly, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, 1/2L back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight without threatening. (Roarer.)
Out with rest, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, finished off well to take 2nd.
Jumped well from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L on turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two final 50M.
Taken back to race at tail, 7 lengths or so back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide turning in, finished off strongly to score.
Began smartly, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back from gate 9, raced towards rear on the outside, hard ridden 400M, showed no response, emptied early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.) (Swollen right front leg next day morning.)
Moderately away from a wide draw, unable to slot in, trapped wide, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, peeked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter. (Mucus.) (Roarer.)
Jumped only fairly, sat towards the rear, on rail, ran home fairly.
Niggled along, settled midfield, 2 wide, ran home nicely to take 3rd.
Bumped start, forward to race prominently, dropped off at 150M.
Travelled in behind midfield, along the rail, crowded at 250M, continued well to the line thereafter.
Urged along, slotted into front of midfield, 2 wide, ran on until weakened inside final 100M.
Steadied after start, raced towards the rear, 2 wide, closest at the finish despite never had a clear run in the straight.
Taken back, at rear, wide and no cover, saved ground and closed off okay.
Taken back, at rear, 2 wide, showed nothing.
Settled to race in midfield, along the rail, closed off well to take 2nd in a close finish for the minor placings.
Sent forward, led and took rail near 550M, maintained position to the line, won by 1-1/4L.
Jumped nicely, settled front of midfield, made turns 2 wide, continued on one paced.
Rolled forward, prominent until crossed to take box-seat at 550M, weakened badly passing 200M.

Settled at the back from a wide gate, trailed the field before circling them inside the 750 metres to reach within 3L of pace in midfield 3-wide, carried the widest into straight and ran home one-paced.

Settled in rear from the widest gate, became last in similar position 700 metres out, commenced move 3-wide rounding home bend and wider into straight, fought on well down the centre of the track to be nearest at finish.

Jumped awkwardly from a wide gate, pressed forward to join the leaders onto first bend, obtained rails run in front passing the 1100 metres, led the field in steady tempo until finding no extra into straight.
Restrained in last few on the rail, became last inside the 550 metres when angled out for a run on top of home bend, one of the widest turning for home, responded well inside final 120 metres.

Settled in midfield on the rail, drifted slightly further back to 9th over 600 metres out, snuck up on the rail entering home straight and baulked between the 250 and 200 metres, fought on under pressure.

Niggled along from a wide gate, travelled 3-wide without cover around stables bend before settling in 1L 2nd 2-wide into back straight, kept on same pace under pressure until finding no extra inside final 80 metres.
Gradually taken back from the one draw to travel just off the pace, steadied and dropped over 2L back to 5th onto back straight, responded well to take charge over 100 metres out, won readily.

With leaders early, restrained over 2L back in 4th rounding first bend, commenced move in 5th inside the 500 metres, baulked briefly 400 metres out, kept on one pace without quickening under pressure in straight.

Broke well to lead 3-wide from a middle gate, ceded advantage for 1L 3rd rounding stables bend, snucked back up on the rail to hold every chance early in straight, unable to sustain effort inside final 100 metres.
Jumped awkwardly from a wide draw losing ground, soon taken across towards the rear in 9th 2-wide, commenced move rounding home bend saving ground on home turn, ran home one-paced.
Settled in midfield, came to challenge under pressure rounding home bend when steadied for a stride 400 metres out, went wide into straight, kept on steadily without making any serious impression.

Travelled wide without cover in rear of midfield, made steady headway from the 600 metres to share the lead 4-wide into straight, hit the front narrowly upon straightening only to be overhauled inside final 150 metres.
Unable to slot in from draw 11, caught racing 3-wide behind midfield, lay out home turn and early straight, failed to close off.
Began only fairly, restrained to race in last, 9Ls to make up 400M, shifted out 300M for clear running, ran past beaten horses only.
In 4th place on settling, saved ground on inside, fought on one paced turning home, never able to challenge first 2.
In 3rd place never far off from leader, kept on same pace turning home, lost 3rd inside 100M.
Failed to muster speed despite ridden along, held up behind midfield, stayed on mildly over final 300M, got up for 3rd late but never dangerous to first 2.
Settled down in midfield, 3-wide without cover, battled on fairly in the straight, never a threat to first 2.
Shifted across behind runners to obtain cover in a rearward position, found less than expected when driven out 400M, never dangerous. (Intermittent displacement of the soft palate.)
From draw 12 went forward as expected, tracked leader in a fast run race, tried on inside 300M but couldn't quite peg back the winner. Finished well clear from remainders.
Up with early pace before dropping back to race in midfield, came under pressure prior to 500M, didn't finish off in the straight.
Quickly into stride, led them along at good pace, kicked clear passing 300M, kept on strongly to the line, eased off late when well in control.
From wide draw taken across behind runners, held up near last along the inside, ran on fairly passing 400M, never threatened.
Jumped on terms, dropped back towards the rear, driven out 400M, never going the pace to challenge. (Lame next day.)
Bumped start, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, similar position on turn, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame right front leg.)
Moderately away, raced in midfield on the outside, 4 lengths back turning in, one-paced in straight.
Jumped well from the widest draw, raced prominently on the outside, dropped to midfield on turn, one-paced in the run home.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, closed off well to make frame, nearest finish.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, a bit closer on turn, finished off well to take a place, nearest on line.
Moderately away from gate 11, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, showed no response early in straight, weakened thereafter. (Roarer.)
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, 2 lengths back on turn, kept on well early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Bumped shortly after start, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made good progress, no clear run final 50M.
Taken back from gate 10, raced 2 wide at rear, 6 lengths back on turn, made good progress in straight without threatening. (Blood in trachea.)
Jumped well, raced 3 wide with no cover, a length or so back, 2 lengths back turning in, kept on well in straight without threatening.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, led by 2 lengths on turn, kept on well in straight to hold off the challengers.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the inside, 4 lengths back, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Began awkwardly, raced prominently, 2 wide, shared lead after passing 600M, narrowly headed 250M, kept on well, regained the lead 100M, won by a narrow margin.

Began well, raced prominently, slightly taken back 1000M, positioned 2W, a length or so back in the middle stages, 3W from 550M, hard ridden after turning in, led narrowly 250M, kept on well but still headed 100M, just narrowly beaten.
Began well from gate 1, raced prominently on the inside, took the lead 1000M, shared the lead with rival from 600M, headed early in straight, kept on evenly to the line.
Began only fairly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, commenced move 600M, showed good response early in straight, peaked on run 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Taken back to race at rear on the inside, angled out 550M, showed some response early in straight, peaked 200M, one-paced thereafter.
Taken back to race towards rear on the outside, very wide into straight, made some progress in the run home.
Average to begin, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, same position on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 250M, finished off strongly to be nearest on line.
Pushed early, settled behind the leaders, closed off well for 2nd.
Hard ridden forward, weakened 150M.
Behind midfield, progressed steadily 400M to score.
Slow away, at back, made steady ground 200M.
Hard ridden forward, emptied 400M.
Pushed forward to lead, weakened 250M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
At back, never improved, was found that horse to be a "roarer" after racing.
Pushed to hold a midfield spot, progressed steadily 300M.
At rear, progressed steadily 200M.
Pushed forward, box seat, blocked most straight, not properly tested.
Never a factor.
At back, no dash, heart irregularity, bled from both nostrils noted after racing.
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail, made ground steadily to the line and just beaten by a neck.
At rear, 2 wide, made no ground in the Straight.
Settled in midfield, along the rail, pretty one paced after passing the 100M. (Heart irregularity)
At rear, 2 wide after 800M, nothing in the Straight.
Sent forward, 2 wide, stayed on but headed in the last 50M.
Raced in behind midfield, wide no cover after passing the 800M, nothing in the Straight.
Settled in behind the leader, along the rail, lost ground in the Straight.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, weakened in the last 50M.
Settled in midfield, 2 wide, closed off strongly and battled on to the line and won by a neck margin.
At one-out one-back, weakened after passing 50M.
At rear, 3 wide but with cover, swung widest on Straightening, made minor ground only in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, bumped at the 350M and the one paced to the line.

Had a soft run in fourth along the rail. Moved over the leaders heels entering the last section when only a length from the lead, moved to narrow lead near 275m mark before passed by winner 125m. Held second.

Steadied & taken back to race a clear last. Shifted wider 550m, was the widest runner on straightening when about 4L from the lead before passing a few tiring runners when running on down the outside to midfield.

Was trapped racing three wide without cover when worse than midfield in early & middle stages. Continued wide on cornering, straightened just over 2L from lead before finishing off one paced to midfield in the final stages.

Raced in midfield between runners before ridden along 600m & drifting slightly further back approaching the corner. Didn't have much room near 300m, was closing off well before again crowded at 150m before moving to 4th late.

Raced in midfield away from the rail throughout. Entered final section only 2.5L from the lead, was held up for clear running near 350m & had to be restrained to get clear & lost ground before not doing much in final 250m.
Drifted back to race second last away from the rail. Shifted wider at 650m to move slightly closer, forced very wide from 500m, finished off only one paced in the final section & was beaten 7.5L.

Raced midfield along the rail throughout. Was steadied off heels on straightening before momentarily having no clear run passing the 300m mark before closing off along the inside in last 150m to move to third late.

Pushed forward to lead but raced keenly for first 600m. Continued in lead & held 1L advantage of nearest rival entering final section, joined & headed near the 275m before weakening out quickly in last furlong. Race too far.
Drifted back after start, raced worse than midfield away from rail. Eased wider on straightening, entered last section 3.5L from lead, dashed to lead at 125m before continuing on to win by 2L.

Drifted back after the start to race third last along the rail. Continued rearward on straightening, entered last section 3.5L behind, made some ground between runners mid-straight before weakening in final furlong.

Slow to begin before making up some ground along the rail to race in midfield. Stayed along the rail on straightening when only 3L from the lead before being held up from 250m to 150m before weakening further in late stages.
Pushed forward, raced second about a length from the lead for the majority. Continued only a length behind on straightening but emptied soon after & weakened out badly in final 350m to be long last.

Had a nice run 1,1 for the majority. Eased three wide passing 550m mark, straightened 2L from the lead, dashed well at 300m mark to nearly share lead at 225m before peaking at 125m & giving a few lengths late.

Raced three wide without cover when only a length or so from the lead throughout the middle stages. Straightened only 1.5L from the lead before wide passage took its toll, weakening badly in final 300m to be long second last.
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/2L turning in, ridden after passing 300M, peaked and headed 100M, weakened final 50M.

Quickly into stride, raced better than midfield on the outside, found rail near 750M, saved ground on turn, showed good response in straight, hit the front 100M, unable to hold off the winner final 25M.
Began fairly from gate 1, raced in midfield on rail, 2 wide from 500M, kept on evenly to 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide better than midfield, similar position on turn, finished off evenly.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 10 lengths back, closer on turn but still 6 lengths behind, made some progress early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Away with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, awkwardly placed 750M, wider from 500M, made minor progress in straight.
Taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 150M, made good progress thereafter.
Bumped on jumping, raced behind midfield on the outside, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, finished off strongly to score.
Moderately away, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed good response early in straight, no extra final 200M.
Began smartly from gate 12, raced prominently on the outside, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Taken back from gate 8, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths back, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a neck.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at rear on the inside, 2 wide from 550M, made no impression in straight.
Forward, sat one-out one-back, continued well to the line to take 3rd.
Bumped start, forward to lead, on rail initially then shifted 2 wide, weakened approaching 250M. (See Incident Report)
Travelled in front of midfield, 2 wide, kept driving to the line, came home to finish 2nd.
Bumped start, raced at the rear, 2 wide, improved slightly only in the straight. (See Incident Report)
In behind midfield, wide but with cover, showed nothing in the straight.
Awkward start and lost ground, at rear and on rail, not competitive.
Bumped start, taken back thereafter, at rear and on rail, showed dashes and continued home well.
Bumped start, in midfield and on rail, slightly keen, ran home okay.
Bumped start then failed to muster, in midfield 2 wide, pretty one paced and emptied late.
Bumped start then took box seat, raced keenly, run ended passing 300M.
Bumped start, box-seat early, then improved to share lead, kicked on until weakened late.
Began only fairly, in worse than midfield, 2 wide, awkward to heels at 250M, no real kick in the straight.
Sent forward, prominent but wide and no cover, ran home strongly to win well by 3/4L.
Bumped start, in midfield, wide with cover, finished tailed out, must trial.
With leaders early, shifted back shortly after becoming some 3L 5th rounding home bend, in similar position into straight and baulked for a run until the 250 metres, kept on without quickening.
Settled towards the rear, inconvenienced and switched in after straightening, ran home one-paced.
Settled well back, baulked behind runners early in straight, made some impression inside final 250 metres.
Gradually settled in midfield on the rail after beginning from the one draw, angled out for a run upon straightening, ran on under pressure but never looked like reaching the winner.
Crowded at start, soon recovered towards the rear on the rail, saved ground turning into straight, kept on well.
Taken back from a wide gate, unable to obtain cover 3-wide in midfield most of the way, gained steadily closer around home bend to 3L 6th into straight, soon weakened.

Joined the leaders from a wide gate, restrained to 1L 3rd coming out of back straight but soon lost cover, improved steadily to travel alongside race leader around home bend, weakened under pressure inside final 300 metres.
Broke well from a wide gate, obtained rails run coming out of back straight, ridden clear after turning in for home, hung on well under pressure.
Held narrow advantage on the rail, inconvenienced when crossed by eventual winner 900 metres out dropping to 1.5L 3rd, chased him into straight but unable to draw level throughout.
Settled well back from a wide gate, switched to the widest entering home, hung in and a difficult ride until the 300 metres, ran on to narrowly miss 4th placing.

Close up early before settling within 3L of pace in 6th, made steady headway to reach 4th on top of home bend, fought nothing under pressure after straightening. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Close up early from the widest gate, taken sharply back to last few after the first 100 metres, commenced move 3-wide rounding home bend and wider into straight, ran on without threatening.
Restrained to last few early, allowed to gain closer 3-wide rounding home bend, looked tiring in straight.
Midfield to the 400 metres, soon weakened.
Slow to begin, raced towards the rear on inside, shifted out for clear running 300M, got going final 200M under top weight, held by winner towards the finish.
Chased leaders early stages, came under serious pressure 600M, soon gave ground and finished tailed out. (Unacceptable Performance.)
Restrained to settle towards the rear, gave limited response turning home, no extra passing 200M, never threatened.
Up with the good early pace, run ended and no extra from 300M, weakened rapidly.
From draw 12 settled 3-wide in midfield, ran home one paced in the straight, no threat from 200M.
Settled down in midfield along inside, unable to obtain clear running in the straight, not properly tested. (Jockey questioned re his riding, explanation reported.)
Vied for lead 3-wide, battled on steadily early straight, faded passing 150M.
Failed to muster speed, settled down in midfield, under pressure 600M, didn't respond to riding. (Jockey expressed concern regarding the action of his horse on arrival at the start.)
Switched off to last on jumping from draw 11, 6Ls to make up 400M, closed off final 400M fastest, nearest finish.
Driven forward to be vying for lead on inside, travelled well passing 450M establishing a clear lead early straight, caught near 150M, dropped to 4th near 50M.
Chased leaders in a fast run race, kept on steadily from 400M, outsprinted by first few from mid-straight.
Crowded for room at the start, settled down near last, swung wide for home, quickened up strongly to take lead near 150M, kept on well late to hold off 2nd and 3rd.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 3 wide at rear, 6 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, one-paced in the run home.
Began fairly, tracked leaders, 2 wide, there to turn, hit the front approaching 250M, kept on well to hold off the challengers.
Taken back from gate 12, raced towards rear on the outside, 5 lengths back on turn, finished off very strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, finished off well to take a place, always held.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Began only fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress in straight.
Began well from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, dropped towards rear on turn, finished off evenly.
Jumped well, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, there to turn, showed good response early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at rear, 6 lengths or so back on turn, very wide into straight, made minor progress in the run home.
Began fairly, positioned a length behind the leader on the inside, same position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong. (Roarer.)
Out with rest, raced better than midfield on the outside early, taken back 1000M, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield in the middle stages, made minor progress in straight.
Moderately away, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, peaked early in straight, headed 250M, weakened final furlong.
Slowly away, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Moderately away, raced better than midfield on the inside, easy run on turn, hit the front approaching 200M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Began smartly, raced prominently, 2 wide, took the lead 1000M, found rail near 800M, led by a length turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 150M.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the early lead, headed 1000M, 2nd on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened 300M, eased final furlong.
Bumped start, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Shifted out at start and bumped, positioned 2 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, angled out 500M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, angled out 500M, very wide turning in, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, raced better than midfield on the outside, angled out approaching 500M, finished off well to take a place without threatening.
Taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide behind midfield, bumped 700M, a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the inside, 5 lengths back turning in, made some progress early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Bumped start and unbalanced, positioned on rail in midfield, angled out 500M, closed off well to take 2nd, always just held.
Rear abruptly as stalls opened and got front leg stuck in adjacent stall, left at start. (Laceration to the left front heel.)
Taken back from gate 10, raced 2 wide behind midfield, bumped 700M, wider turning in, showed limited response early in straight, hampered 200M, eased thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away well, raced 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Moderately away, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, there to turn, made minor progress in straight.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the outside, 4 lengths back on turn, taken wide in straight and finished off strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on the inside, 3 lengths back on turn, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Jumped well from the widest draw, taken back to race at rear, found rail 600M, saved ground on turn, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 100M. (Lost right hind plate near 400M.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide at rear, 5 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to take a place, nearest on line.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 3 wide at rear, awkwardly placed near 700M, 6 lengths back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Bumped shortly after start, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Bumped shortly after start, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Shifted out at start and bumped, hard ridden to race better than midfield on the outside, closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Quickly into stride, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 75M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, finished off strongly to score.
Behind midfield along the fence, unleashed strong finishing efforts 300M.
Eased at start, took rails at rear, little dash 200M.
Pressed forward, 2 wide, emptied 300M.
Eased at start, 2-3 wide, dashed strongly 200M.
Eased back, 2-3 wide, dashed well 250M.
Pushed to take rail and lead, ran on until 100M weakened.
At back, along the fence, ran on fairly.
Pushed forward, 2 wide, weakened 200M.
At back, made early move 900M, led 600M, overhauled 150M.
Settled in box seat, closed off strongly 300M to score.
At back, 2-3 wide, little dash 200M, post-race vet exam did not show any significant findings.
Pushed early, midfield, moved forward 600M, just held ground in straight.
Sent forward, 2 wide, weakened and headed by the winner in the last 100M.
Raced behind the leader, along the rail, saved ground but only one paced to the line.
Settled in behind midfield, 3 wide but with cover, showed minor dash in the Straight.
At one-out one-back after 600M, one paced after 150M.
Sent forward and took lead, flattened passing 75M.
Raced in midfield, after the 550M 3 wide no cover, showed strong dash and won by a neck.
At rear, along the rail, made no ground in the Straight.
Settled in midfield, along the rail, closed off only fairly in the last 100M.
Settled in front of midfield, wide no cover, lost ground in the Straight.
Bumped start and at rear, 2 wide, made minor ground in the Straight.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, ran on well to the finish line to take 2nd.
At rear, along the rail, did not feature.

Showed speed to lead early before being headed near the 900m mark & racing leaders back from 650m. Stayed along the rail in straight but gave a couple of lengths in last furlong & was no threat in midfield.

Ridden forward to be prominent after start, ultimately racing third but without cover from the 650m. Moved up to be half-length behind at 500m, moved to lead at 225m, passed by winner near 100m mark, caught for second late.

Was trapped racing three wide in midfield & was left without cover from the 700m. Was wide on straightening before closing off well to move to second in the final few strides. Ran ok but was no match for impressive winner.

Slow to begin before making up some ground along the rail to race worse than midfield. Was checked away from heels near 450m, entered last section 4L behind, stayed along the rail in straight but weakened to be well beaten.

Steadied at the first bend & raced just worse than midfield away from rail. Was awkwardly placed & unable to be ridden out properly from the 200m until inside the final 50m & had a genuine excuse (see report).

Had a soft run in midfield along the rail. Bumped & unbalanced away from heels near 450m, raced tight & bumped with rival near 200m, before again being hampered in final stages & not able to be fully ridden out (see report).
Had a nice run in midfield away from the rail throughout. Was under 2L from the lead entering the final section, finished off steadily all the way to the line & was only 1.5L behind second. (Roarer).

Bumped heavily at start & lost ground before sharing last place when racing away from rail. Over 5L behind entering last section before passing only a few tiring rivals when running onto midfield down the outside late.

Steadied from outside gate & taken back to share last place when racing along the rail. Continued at the tail & over 5L from the lead entering last section before doing nothing in the straight & being beaten over 8L on line.

Bumped heavily at start before being ridden forward, racing three wide outside the lead before improving to lead near 850m. Was joined & headed just before the 200m mark before weakening out to be beaten 6.5L (galloped on).

Slow away, shifted down to rail & made some ground to race 4th last. Moved away from rail near 500m, was the widest on cornering before sprinting quickly to dash to lead nearing 100m & continuing on to win by impressive 2L.

Ridden hard at start but still couldn't go the early speed & settled third last away from the rail. Forced 4 wide without cover entering last section when 4.5L from lead, wide on straightening before weakening to last.
Commenced well, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Slowly away, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, closed off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, commenced move 550M, very wide into straight, finished off well to take 2nd, always held.
Lifted front feet on jumping, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, 2 length or so back, a bit closer on turn, showed good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line.
Bumped start, raced at tail, 8 lengths back, hard ridden from 600M, showed no response, eased early in straight.
Began well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide towards rear 7 lengths back, commenced move after passing 550M, 4 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 400M, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Clean jump, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Began well from gate 1, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, same position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide on turn, very wide into straight, one-paced in the run home.
Sent forward, sat outside lead, kept going, no match to winner, just hung on for 2nd.
Sent forward, took rail and led, maintained 1L margin in the straight, ran on to win.
In worse than midfield, 2 wide, showed nothing in the straight.
Ridden forward, settled one-out one-back, weakened approaching 200M. (See Incident Report)
Crowded at start, recovered to be just front of midfield, on rail, closed of well to the line, just missed out on 2nd.
Slotted into midfield, 2 wide, held ground only in the straight.
Jumped ok but trapped wide in front of midfield, wide no cover, no kick and emptied towards late.
Rolled forward, sat in box-seat, kicked on until emptied for final 100M. (Lame left front)
Raced just in front of midfield, 2 wide, kept on one paced to the line.
Taken back, raced towards the rear, wide but with cover, saved ground and ran home fairly.
Travelled just behind midfield, on rail, improved steadily in the run home.
Awkward start, at rear and on rail, made ground in the straight.
Gradually settled in midfield after beginning from the widest gate, commenced move 450 metres out and produced good late impression inside final 100 metres.
Never better than midfield, very wide rounding home bend and into straight, ran home one-paced.

Amongst the leaders early before shifting back for cover passing winning post the first time, stalked the leader in 3rd on the rail from over 800 metres out, came to challenge entering straight but soon found nothing.
Wide in last few early, made headway to midfield without cover coming onto back straight, made short-lived rapid progress rounding home bend, soon weakened in straight.
Settled well behind and waited with, commenced move inside final 400 metres saving ground on the turn, ran on under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Settled in last few, went very wide and the widest into straight, kept on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Amongst the leaders after beginning from the one gate, gained cover in 2nd passing the 1200 metres, shifted one off the rail passing the 800 metres, unable to sustain effort over 400 metres out.
With leaders before hitting the front passing winning post the first time, obtained rails run shortly after and led the field to the 250 metres when found no extra.
Gradually settled one-out-one-back, became 2L back in 4th coming onto back straight, commenced move 3-wide around the bend, gained upper hand over 50 metres out.
Settled well behind, slightly closer rounding home bend, came under pressure inside the 400 metres going wide into straight, ran home one-paced in a tight run to the line.

Closer up early before shifting back to midfield in 4L 6th, slightly closer in 5th in back straight, saved ground when coming under pressure around final turn, held every chance only to be outlasted close to home.
Never better than midfield on the rail, saved ground turning for home, one-paced. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Went forward vying for the lead early stages, emerged as sole leader from 600M, responded well early straight, caught near 100M and edged out to 4th late.
Restrained in midfield, caught wide no cover from 800M, made forward move 500M out, fought on steadily to 100M then faded.
Settled towards the rear, navigated through the traffic early straight, closed off strongly from 200M, won cosily.
From draw 12 unable to slot in, raced in midfield, wide no cover from 800M, responded fairly early straight before being crowded for room 150M. No impression on leaders.
Dropped back to the rear, 7Ls to make up 400M, failed to respond, ran past beaten horses only.
Began fairly from draw 1, settled down towards the rear, ran on only fairly from top of straight, never dangerous to leaders.
Up with early pace, tracked leaders on settling, driven along 550M, kept on mildly for 3rd, not pace of winner final 150M.
Went forward vying for the lead early stages, tracked leader entering home turn, had no extra left passing 300M, weakened to last.
Restrained behind midfield along the fence, responded well turning in and challenged for the lead 150M, not finishing pace of winner late stages.
Held up in midfield, checked 1000M and raced keenly 900M, swung wide for home, kept on one paced before fading final 150M.
Chased leaders along the inside, travelled strongly home turn, clipped heels 400M and stumbled, eased.
From wide draw shifted across behind runners, held up near last 5-6Ls behind leader, brought wide for home and stayed on well towards the line.
Moderately away, raced prominently, 2 wide, took the lead 1100M, found rail approaching 800M, led by a length on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 75M, weakened thereafter.
Began well, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 500M, bumped early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually thereafter. (Mucus.)
Average to begin, positioned 5 lengths behind the leader on the inside, 4 lengths back on turn, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 100M.

Moderately away, raced better than midfield on the outside, moved closer after passing 1300M, raced in 2nd after entering the back straight, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened and eased final 100M.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 8 lengths or so back, commenced move 600M, very wide into straight, closed off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Commenced well from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, 2 wide from 800M, carried wider 500M, switched towards outside entering straight, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just held.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide in midfield, wider on turn, hampered near 400M, weakened early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide from 800M, checked near 400M, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, commenced move 600M, 1 to 2 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Away well, took the early lead, headed 1100M, allowed rival to cross 800M, unable to maintain position from 550M, bumped early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Began well, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, commenced move after passing 500M, finished off strongly to score.
Taken back from gate 11, raced towards rear on the inside, 2 wide on turn, made some progress in straight.
Slowly away, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, made good progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced 2 wide, 5 lengths or so back, angled out 550M, very wide into straight, made good progress in straight to make frame.

Away with them, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, made the turn after 800M awkwardly and lost ground when continuing to race very wide, weakened 600M, emptied early in straight. (Lame right front leg next day morning.)
Bumped start, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the outside, 4 lengths back on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final 150M.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4 lengths or so back, made minor progress in straight. (Lame right front leg next day morning.)
Began well from gate 1, raced prominently on the inside, led by a length turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed near 200M, weakened final 150M.
Commenced well, positioned 2 wide, 1-1/2L back, same position on turn, hit the front approaching 200M, kept on very well to the line.
Moderately away, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead near 800M, headed 500M, a length back turning in, weakened early in straight.
Slow to begin, raced at rear on the outside, 6 to 7 lengths back on turn, made some headway in straight.
Jumped well, raced prominently but trapped wide, a length back on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened final 100M.
Jumped with them, positioned 2 wide, 2-1/2L back, there to turn, closed off well to take 2nd.
Bumped start and unbalanced, taken back to race at rear on the inside, 5 lengths or so back on turn, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Shifted out on jumping and bumped, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place.
At rear, ran on fairly.
Eased to rear, dashed well 250M.
At back, dashed well 300M to score.
Pressed forward, weakened 250M.
Midfield, just held ground.
Pressed forward, ran on well for 2nd.
Took rail and lead, weak 200M.
At back, little dash 200M.
Midfield, no progress.
Pressed forward, just held ground.
Never a factor.
Eased to sit in midfield, no dash.
At back, little dash 200M.
Behind midfield, lack room in straight, dashed well when clear.
Raced behind the leader after 800M, along the rail, weakened in the last 50M.
Settled in front of midfield, travelled keenly in the middle stages, lost ground in the straight.
At rear, along the rail, did not feature.
At rear, 2 wide, pretty one paced.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, showed some dash in the last 150M and battled on to the line.
At rear, along the rail, saved ground but ran on only fairly to the line.
Sent forward and raced next to the leader, 2 wide, gave ground in the last 100M.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, found nothing.
At rear, 2 wide, swung wide on straightening, improved and hit the line strongly in the last 100M.
Settled in front of midfield after 800M, wide no cover, made minor ground in the straight.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, had difficulty to obtain clear run and not tested out in the straight.
Raced in midfield, 3 wide but with cover, never a factor.
At rear, 2 wide, swung widest on straightening, closed off strongly and finished 3rd, never a threat to the winner.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, lost ground in the straight.

Was trapped racing wide outside the lead before working very hard to improve to the lead near the 650m. Raced clear of nearest rival at the 300m mark before being joined by runner-up near the 150m, battled well to hold third.
Refused to jump on terms & missed the start by huge margin. Just followed them around but was never in the race after start.

Steadied & taken back towards the rear when racing along the rail. Stayed nearer the inside entering last section when 5.5L behind, was crowded & held up momentarily near 300m before never running on in final 250m.

Drifted back to race just worse than midfield between runners. Ridden along from 500m, entered last section 4.5L behind before finishing off only one paced when between runners to finish well beaten in midfield.

Showed early speed to lead before being joined at 950m. Shared lead before being headed & crossed passing the 750m mark & racing third thereafter. Entered last section under 2L from lead before emptying & weakening quickly.

Began ok before improving to lead near 950m. Headed in the lead near 700m, crossed & raced on leaders back from 600m. Entered last section just over 1L from lead, peaked on effort passing 300m & weakened quickly late (lame).

Was wide early after others showed more speed before steadying & taken back to race worse than midfield when three deep without cover. Continued wide around bend, straightened 4.5L behind, and finished evenly to midfield.
Was steadied after the start & taken back to last (minus detached runner). Was nearly 7L from the lead on cornering, never ran on & was well beaten.

Drifted back to race rearward when away from the rail. Shifted out to be the widest runner on straightening when over 5L behind before finishing very strongly down the outside in final stages to charge to lead in final 25m.

Drifted back after start & raced worse than midfield along the rail. Moved off the rail just prior to cornering, entered last section around 5L behind, hung inwards back down to rail at 300m before making steady ground late.
Raced in midfield away from the rail throughout. Eased wider on straightening when 3L from the lead before closing off steadily all the way to line to be 4th.

Raced in midfield along the rail. Stayed along rail on straightening when 4.5L from lead, had clear running until momentarily crowded nearing 300m mark before weakening very badly in final 250m to be long second last.
Had a nice run just behind the leading bunch when away from the rail. Moved up under no riding at 250m, dashed to lead 150m before being headed by fast closing winner inside final 25m. Held second.

Improved along rail after start to race on leaders back before shuffled a pair further back after 600m. Was under 3L form the lead on straightening, emptied out near 300m & weakened poorly in late stages.
Moderately away, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, 3 lengths back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
Away with them, sent forward to take the lead, shared the lead with rivals on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, commenced move 650M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 3 wide behind midfield, weakened from 600M, eased early in straight. (Irregular heart rhythm.)
Commenced well, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 500M, closed off well to take a place, not quite able to challenge.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, improved on turn, very wide into straight, hit the front 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner on line.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, hard ridden 550M, failed to close off in straight.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside, shared lead on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Began well, raced behind midfield on the outside, sent forward after passing 750M, 1/2L back turning in, showed good response early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Slightly slow out, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, no clear run near 200M, cleared 100M, finished off evenly.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide, 1-1/2L back, 3 wide turning in, kept on well in straight to make frame without threatening.
Began only fairly, raced at tail, 6 lengths or so back, commenced move 600M, very wide turning in, made some headway in straight.
Taken back from gate 8, positioned 5 lengths behind the leader on the inside, same margin back on turn, made some progress early in straight, in traffic near 200M, cleared 100M, finished off evenly.
Forward, led along the rail, slightly keen, weakened and headed near 200M.
Sent forward, sat in box-seat, about 2L off leader, worked home nicely, won by 1/2L.
Travelled in midfield, 2 wide, kept on nicely, finished 2nd, 1/2L behind.
Raced in front of midfield, 2 wide, was fairly one paced.
Awkward start, raced at tail, 2 wide, improved position slightly in the straight.
Hampered at start, at rear along the rail, ran on without threatening.
Steadied after start, sat behind midfield, wide and no cover, ran on and hit the line strongly to take 3rd.
Jumped only fairly, sat in worse than midfield, on rail, made ground and closed off to the line.
Rolled forward, raced prominently, no kick but kept on going to the finish.
In worse than midfield, 2 wide, found nothing in the straight.
Sat just behind midfield, on rail, no dash and was eased down over final 100M.
Raced in front of midfield, along the rail, closed off well to the line.
Settled about midfield, along the rail, showed dashes, ran home okay.
Just behind midfield, found 2 wide position at first turn, not competitive.
Soon dropped towards rear, awkwardly placed behind runners early on home bend, saved ground turning in, kept on same pace under pressure.
Jumped awkwardly, soon taken back to rear from a wide gate racing ungenerously, gained closer rounding home bend, ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Settled towards the rear in 10th, gained closer to 9th coming onto home bend, snuck up further to within 2L of pace into straight and lead over 300 metres out, soon drew clear.
Soon picked up to prominent position within 2L of pace, switched out passing the 600 metres for a wide run into straight, ran home one-paced.
Moderate start, travelled in midfield in 9th and awkward behind runners when keen 900 metres out, rounded the home bend 4-wide and wider into straight, found nothing under pressure.
Soon taken back to wide in last few, dropped to last 500 metres out, tailed off early in straight.
With leaders and wide without cover, gained cover behind race leader rounding home bend, folded up quickly after straightening.
Travelled just better than midfield in 6th within 3L of pace, in similar position rounding home bend, found nothing in straight.
Soon taken back from a wide gate trailing the field from the 1100 metres, commenced move rounding home bend and switched to the widest into straight, ran on under pressure but never threatening.
Well there settling one back in joint 3rd 3-wide, came forward to hit the front 800 metres out, led until finding no extra upon straightening.
Ridden to lead, headed passing the 800 metres, saved ground and re-gained lead entering home straight, folded up quickly inside final 300 metres.
Settled in better than midfield on the rail in 3L 7th, in similar position rounding home bend, found nothing under pressure in the run to the line.
Began well from the widest gate before settling wide in midfield, made headway while shifting wider rounding final bend, found nothing under pressure after straightening.
Picked up steadily after moderate start, travelled mainly one back on the rail to straight, angled out for a run entering straight but soon weakened.
Began only fairly, restrained towards the rear, driven along 550M, never going the pace to challenge.
Settled behind midfield, failed to respond turning for home, never threatened.
Restrained behind mid-division, fought on same pace turning into straight, never a threat to leaders.
Held up in rear, struggled to keep up 600M out, soon beaten.
Obtained a 2-wide spot in midfield, swung wide for home, stayed on without troubling first two.
Taken across behind runners, settled towards the rear, ran on fairly final 400M, not reach leaders.
Crossed to the lead 1300M, set slow pace until 800M, headed 400M out, no extra and weakened towards the line.
Held up in midfield along the inside, moved out from fence 600M, ran home one paced.
In 4th place never far off from leader, responded strongly when asked final 250M, joined leader from 100M, gained upper hand late.
Chased leaders in 3rd, raced keenly after 1000M, fought on well early straight, outpaced by first 2 final 150M.
Tracked the pace, quickly took over 400M out, kept on well to the line, joined by final 100M, just missed.
Shifted in at start and bumped, positioned 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide from 700M, 2 lengths back turning in, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just narrowly beaten.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced prominently on the outside, there to turn, challenged the leader and bumped early in straight, peaked on run 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Slow to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 550M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame right hind leg next day morning.)
Out with rest, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Began smartly from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, challenged and bumped early in straight, kept on very well to hold off the challengers.
Jumped well, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, 2 wide 450M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, one-paced thereafter.
Bumped start, raced better than midfield on the outside, a bit closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Average to begin, held up in rear, 5 lengths or so back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Slowly away, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no progress in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, 2 wide from 650M, a bit closer on turn, made very good progress in straight to make frame, nearest on line.
Taken back from gate 9, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Bumped start, positioned right behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, kept on evenly in straight.
Taken back form gate 12, raced at rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back on turn, made no impression in straight.

Began well from the widest draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, moved closer after passing 900M, 2nd on turn, hard ridden 250M but only showed limited response, kept on evenly to the line.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly, raced at rear on the inside, 5-1/2L back, saved ground on turn, made no impression in straight.
Began awkwardly and made contact, raced 2 wide behind midfield, found rail 650M, 3 lengths or so back on turn, made some progress in straight.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide at rear, 5-1/2L back, angled out approaching 500M, finished off evenly.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, peaked 300M, weakened gradually final 150M.
Taken back from gate 11, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Made contact at start, tracked leaders, 2 wide, similar position on turn, peaked 300M, weakened and eased final furlong.
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on very well in straight, easily scored.
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the outside, similar position on turn, closed off well to take 2nd.
Jumped well, positioned 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 wide from 550M, made good progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 3 wide at rear, 6 lengths or so back, very wide into straight, made some headway in the run home.

Raced wide with cover early before being left without cover from 850m. Continued wide around bend, straightened only 1.5L from lead, fought on bravely until emptying 225m & weakening quickly in late stages after wide passage.
Pushed forward to take up normal role as leader. Was joined & headed by the third at the 275m mark before emptying at the 200m & weakening out quickly thereafter.

Was trapped racing very wide & without cover in midfield throughout. Continued to cover additional ground around bend when about 3L behind before coming under pressure at 400m & weakening to long second last (see report).

Had a nice run in midfield between runners throughout. Straightened just over 3L from lead, dashed between runners 200m when moving to second, moved to lead 125m before continuing on to win (trainer questioned, see report).

Steadied from wide gate & taken back to share last place when racing very wide but with cover. Continued to be 4 wide around bend, was wide on straightening when 5L behind before only passing a few tiring rivals, well beaten.

Missed the start 2L & raced towards the tail when coursing along the rail. Continued along the rail, was tightened for room on straightening, clipped heels & lost ground before making some late progress near the inside late.
Had a nice run on the leaders back for the majority. Was under pressure on straightening & weakened out quickly in final 250m to be long last.

Steadied at the start & taken back towards the rail before making some ground along the inside to midfield. Stayed along the rail on straightening, entered last section 4.5L behind but weakened in last 250m to be well beaten.

Raced wide with cover when worse than midfield before being shuffled further back from 1000m mark. Shifted wider & into clear running on cornering when over 4L behind before passing tiring rivals when running onto midfield.

Raced wide in midfield early before being allowed to improve & race outside the leader from the 900m. Moved to the lead at the 275m & continued in front until being passed by winner at the 125m, held third 2L behind.

Steadied from wide gate & taken back to share last place when racing away off rail. Shifted very wide just before cornering, was the widest runner when 6L behind entering last section before making late ground from well back.

Raced in midfield between runners before being shuffled further back from 800m. Was over 4L from the lead entering last section before closing strongly between runners near 250m & moving too fast finishing second final 25m.

Ridden forward after start to race outside the leader before being crossed & racing 1,1 form the 850m. Was only 2.5L form the lead entering the final section but was beaten at the 300m mark & weakened last furlong.

Raced just worse than midfield when coursing three wide but with cover throughout. Moved slightly closer to lead around the bend, entered last section just under 3L behind before finishing one paced until weakening last 75m.
Slow to begin, raced 2 wide at rear, 6 lengths or so back on turn, failed to make any progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)

Jumped well from the widest draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, moved closer after passing 1200M, found rail near 800M, 2 lengths back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M.
Taken back from gate 10, raced at rear on the outside, very wide into straight, made minor progress in the run home.
Slightly inconvenienced at start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide turning in, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, wider 600M, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a neck.
Began awkwardly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, moved a bit closer on turn, angled out 500M, not enough room early in straight, cleared after passing 150M, finished off strongly to score.

Jumped with them, raced better than midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 650M, 4 wide turning in, made good progress early in straight, hit the front 150M, unable to hold off the first two late.
Shifted in at start and made contact, sent forward to race in 2nd, same position on turn, hard ridden early in straight but only showed limited response, one-paced final furlong.
Fast into stride, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed near 150M, weakened final 100M.
Out with rest, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, made no progress in straight.
Taken back from gate 13, positioned slightly behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, finished off well to make frame without threatening.
Began awkwardly, raced at rear on the inside, 6 lengths back on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Began fairly, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out 500M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.
Chased leader 2-wide, every chance turning for home but couldn't find extra to challenge leader, lost 3rd concluding stages.
Had a tough trip, caught racing wide without cover in midfield, found no extra from 250M, weakened rapidly towards the line.
Bumped after the start and lost ground, settled behind midfield along the fence, ran on fairly over final 400M, never able to challenge.
Restrained in mid-division, never not going the pace to challenge turning for home, no extra final 100M.
Held up towards the rear, failed to pick up passing 400M, never involved.
Eased back passing 1100M to race behind midfield, ran on well final 200M to take 4th close home.
Led early stages, tracked leader from 950M, chased hard passing 300M but was always held by winner towards the finish.
Jumped on terms from draw 1, raced keenly behind leaders, couldn't muster the speed to challenge on straightening, kept on same pace to the finish.
From wide draw crossed to the lead before home turn, gave good response when asked nearing 300M, kept on well from 200M to hold rivals at bay.
Dropped back to last from wide draw, 7Ls away home turn, swung wide into straight but found nothing in the finish.
Took a while to muster speed, moved up gradually to track leaders entering the bend, fought on one paced in the straight, no threat to leaders mid-straight.
From wide draw settled down in midfield along the 3-path, stayed on steadily passing 300, not beaten far at the finish.
Dropped back, settled near last turning for home, held up early straight before running on strongly to take 3rd, nearest finish.
In midfield along the fence, crowded for room 550M and soon off the bridle, couldn't finish the race off after turning home.
At rear, along the rail, made ground strongly in the last 150M, never a threat to the winner.
Settled in midfield, 2 wide, only one paced to the line.
Raced next to the leader, 2 wide, lost ground in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, weakened in the Straight and finished last.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, not competitive in the Straight.
Settled in behind the leader, along the rail, weakened after passing 100M.
Settled in midfield, 2 wide, made minor ground in the Straight.
At one-out one-back, stayed on and scored for 3rd.
At rear, 3 wide but with cover, made some ground in the last 75M. (Displaying signs of heat stress)
Sent forward and took lead, kept on going and won impressively by 3-1/4L.
Settled in midfield, 2 wide, remain one paced.
Raced in behind midfield, wide no cover until 700M, never a factor. (See incident report)
At rear, along the rail, did not feature.
Raced in behind midfield, along the rail, pretty one paced.

Had no early speed & raced at the tail. Moved wider on the track approaching the 750m when horses checked in front. Bumped & forced very wide from 550m, was 4.5L behind on straightening when the widest but failed to run on.

Raced in midfield along the rail before being checked & losing ground near the 800m. Recovered to improve to 4th place along the rail on straightening before weakening in final 250m to be well beaten (Bled).

Raced just worse than midfield between runners in early stages before being steadied near the 600m & being shuffled back to the tail. Bumped on cornering when 4.5L from the lead before passing a couple when running onto 5th.

Raced worse than midfield along the rail before getting badly checked & losing ground near the 800m. Effectively shared last place on straightening before closing off ok in final stages & ran ok considering interference.

Had no early speed & shared last place. Was hampered by checked horse near 750m & held up on straightening before again having no clear run mid-straight. Shifted inwards at 200m before closing strongly to just miss second.
Showed dazzling early speed to lead. Continued in front until being passed by winner at 225m before weakening quickly in final stages to be beaten over 7L.

Was trapped wide before drifting back to race worse than midfield before being left deep & without cover from the 800m. Was 4L from the lead on straightening but did little in the last section & weakened to be beaten 8L.
Showed customary early speed but couldn't get to lead & raced second. Couldn't sprint with impressive winner passing 250m but closed off well to hold well beaten second.
Raced in midfield between runners before being crowded near the 800m. Was only 3.5L from the lead entering last section before weakening to long last.

Was wide in midfield early before coming across near 800m (rider suspended) & racing third away from rail. Sprinted very powerfully passing the 250m, drew away in final furlong despite hanging down to rail & won easily.
Began fairly, raced in midfield, 2 away from the stands' rail, peaked 300M, weakened thereafter.
Jumped well from gate 14, tracked leader on the stands' rail, peaked 300M, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, raced towards rear on the stands' side, hard ridden 400M, showed no response, weakened thereafter.
Slowly away, raced towards rear, nearer to the middle track, one-paced final 400M.
Began awkwardly, raced at rear, 7 lengths back in the middle stages, made some headway final 400M.
Bumped start, raced at rear on the stands' side, 8 lengths back at 400M, hard ridden 300M, passed some tired runners thereafter.
Commenced well, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader, nearer to the middle of the track, hard ridden 300M, finished off strongly to score by a narrow margin.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader, nearer to the middle track, kept on evenly final 400M.
Quickly into stride, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, hard ridden approaching 300M, peaked and headed 150M, kept on evenly to take a place.
Began awkwardly, raced at rear on the stands' rail, made no progress final 400M.
Shifted in at start and bumped, positioned a length behind the leader on the stands' side, hard ridden 250M, hit the front 150M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner on line.
Moderately away, positioned a length behind the leader, nearer to the middle track, hard ridden 400M, only showed limited response, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Moderately away, raced behind midfield, nearer to the middle track, weakened gradually final 300M.
Average to begin, raced in midfield, nearer to the middle track, passed some tired runners final 400M to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Jumped smart and then was taken back, wide but with cover, swung widest, made slight ground.
Forward, led on rail, run ended approaching 300M.
Niggled along, prominent but was trapped wide and had no cover, no kick and weakened late.
