Travelled in one-out one-back position, one paced and emptied at 150M.
Sat just front of midfield, 3 wide with cover, showed nice dashes in run home, finished 2nd and a neck behind.
About midfield, wide but with cover, not competitive.
Bumped start and then eased, sat at the rear, wide with cover, ran on fairly late.
Forward and was prominent, 3 wide no cover, took lead near 200M until caught by first two late.
Bumped start, recovered in midfield, on rail, closed off strongly from about 200M, continued on to win by a neck.
Niggled along, sat box seat, raced very keenly, stayed on until 200M. (See Incident Report)
In worse than midfield, 3 wide with cover, made steady ground and hit the line fairly.
Bumped start, settled slightly behind midfield, 2 wide, just held ground.
Eased back and taken to rail, towards the rear, nice dash from 200M, continued on to the line.
Sent forward, shared lead 2 wide, one paced and ran out of steam for last 100M.
Soon picked up to 5th just over 3L back after moderate start, angled out to challenge on straightening but ran home one-paced.
Ridden early before settling 1L back 2-wide, held some chance in a similar position into straight, plugged on well for 2nd spot.
Settled in midfield on the rail to straight, ran home one-paced.
Settled in forward of midfield in 5L 6th in back straight, came under pressure after straightening but failed to quicken to challenge.
Began moderately, soon joined last few, made up some ground early in straight.
Broke well from a wide gate, gradually taken back to just worse than midfield in 9th, produced good late impression in the run to the line.
Never better than midfield travelling wide without cover throughout.
Attempted to make all only to be overhauled by the winner over 150 metres out and lose a placing late.
Niggled along before settling in 4th just over 2L back, commenced move from a similar position into straight, hit the front over 150 metres out for an impressive victory.
Held up in rear, inconvenienced passing the 1000 metres, made up good late ground along the rail in home straight.
Soon dropped to last few despite ridden along from a wide gate, fought on steadily under pressure.
Settled just off the pace in 3rd on the rail, did not find much room after straightening until after the 200 metres, unable to quicken to threaten late.
Began very awkwardly losing considerable ground, trailed the field throughout and never seen with a chance. (Lame)
Restrained in midfield, raced keenly after 1200M when obtaining cover behind a rival, raced wide throughout, made no impression in the straight.
Tracked leader early stages, moved up to race outside the lead when pace slackened from 1200M, quickened up well to lead 250M out, but run ended 100M and swamped by rivals late.
Dropped back, proved difficult to settle after 1200M, improved to join the leader after racing wide from 1000M, stayed prominent until 200M, no extra late stages. (Cut to left hock.)
Began fairly then was slow to muster speed early stages, raced behind midfield 5Ls off the pace, stayed on well towards the line, just held at the finish.
Began fairly then shifted across behind runners in early stages, remained near last going into straight, stayed on fairly over final 400M, no threat to leaders.
Settled down in mid-division along the fence, moved out to challenge 400M and briefly threatened, outpaced by rivals final 150M.
In midfield but never far off leaders in a slow run race, hit the line well from 300M, led 100M from home, held on towards the line.
Steadied early stages to obtain cover, settled towards the rear along inside, failed to make up ground in the straight. (Jockey : not suited by the slow tempo in middle stages.)
Strode forward to the lead, set slow pace 1200M-700M, headed top of straight, weakened rapidly final 150M.
Chased leaders early and middle stages, fought on steadily turning home, not finishing pace of first few final 150M.
Settled 3-wide in midfield, pushed along 550M, lay in and proved difficult to ride, did best work late but was awkwardly placed final 50M , not ridden out to the line.
Held up towards the rear, driven along 600M, gave limited response only, never reached contention.
From wide draw switched off to race at the back, swung wide from 700M, failed to make progress in straight. Never involved.
Tracked leaders in a slow run race, produced a sustained effort from 300M, held by first 2 close home.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, 4 lengths or so back, very wide turning in, bumped near 400M, failed to close off in straight.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4-1/2L back, carried wider after passing 600M, not enough room early in straight, made minor progress thereafter.
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L, peaked early in straight, headed 250M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Average to begin, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on rail, angled out after passing 600M, bumped near 400M, made minor progress in straight.
Bumped start, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 450M, finished off strongly to score.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, same position on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place, not quite able to challenge. (Mucus.)
Commenced well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, hit the front 250M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 100M.
Away well, raced 2 wide in midfield, wider turning in, made no progress in straight.
Taken back to race at rear on the inside, saved ground throughout, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made no impression in straight.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out 550M, finished off evenly.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out approaching 550M, hard ridden 250M, finished off strongly to score by a neck.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, similar position on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, finished off evenly.
Out with rest, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, finished off evenly.
Jumped with them, sat right behind the leader on the inside, saved ground throughout, unable to obtain clear running in straight.
Taken back from gate 11, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back on turn, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Slightly inconvenienced at start, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out 550M, bumped early in straight, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Inconvenienced at start, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 500M, bumped early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened thereafter.
Away with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider turning in, made no impression in straight.
Shifted out on jumping and made contact, sent forward to race in 2nd, 3/4L back, same margin back on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.

Moderately away, positioned on rail in midfield, a bit closer in the middle stages, saved ground throughout, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, hit the front 100M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner late.
Bumped on jumping, raced at rear on the inside, 8 lengths back on turn, showed no response in straight, eased final 150M.
Fast into stride, raced prominently on the outside, there to turn, kept on well in straight to take a place, always held.
Bumped start, raced at tail, 6 lengths back on turn, made little progress in straight.
Moderately away, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Slow to begin, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths or so back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
Commenced well, tracked leaders on the inside, saved ground throughout, kept on well in straight to take a place, just beaten by a neck.
Bumped on jumping, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length on turn, kept on well in straight to hold off the challengers.
Began fairly from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Slowly away, raced at rear on the inside, 5 lengths back on turn, angled out after passing 350M, made good progress in straight to make frame, nearest on line.
Moderate start settling at the back, saved ground turning for home, finished off strongly to just fail to get up on line. (Blood in trachea)

Pressed forward from the widest gate to lead, obtained rails run shortly after straightening on the far side, led until headed just inside the 500 metres, kept on in 2nd on the rail until swamped inside final 150 metres.

Ridden hard early for prominent position, came to join the leaders 3-wide without cover in back straight, hit the front just inside the 500 metres and led briefly before headed shortly after straightening.
Close up early, gradually settled in 5th over 3L back in back straight, came under pressure rounding final bend, kept on steadily under pressure without threatening.

Moderate start, gradually recovered to 4th just over 2L back into back straight, commenced move on final bend swinging very wide into straight, hit the front 200 metres out and just held on to the line.
Travelled wide without cover throughout and never better than midfield, hung wider turning for home, no further impression.
Always wide well behind, never seen with a chance. (Lame next day)

Broke well to lead early, ceded advantage for 3rd behind pace turning into back straight, angled out 3-wide into home straight to hold every chance, unable to draw level throughout and lost placing final strides.
Settled just worse than midfield in 7th on the rail, angled out to challenge making final turn, finished off strongly down the centre of the track despite hanging in early on, did best work late.
Taken back from a wide gate, trailed the field most of the way, turned home on the rail, ran on well under pressure for a nice seasonal debut.
At rear, wide but with cover, nothing in the Straight.
Raced in behind midfield, wide no cover, did not feature.
Behind the lead after 700M, along the rail, showed strong dash and won impressively by 2-1/4L.
At rear, along the rail after 600M, only one paced to the line.
Raced in midfield after 500M, along the rail, showed minor dash in the last 100M.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, one paced after passing the 100M.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, pretty one paced.
Raced next to the leader, 2 wide, pretty one paced.
At rear, 2 wide, made minor ground in the Straight.
At one-out one-back, ran on fairly and finished 2nd.
Hung in at start & bumped before racing in midfield away from the rail. Made no headway in the straight & was well beaten in midfield.

Began only fairly before being badly crowded & checked & consequently raced near the tail. Shifted outwards on straightening when continuing at the back before passing a few when running onto midfield.

Outpaced after start & drifted back to be third last of the main field when racing wide. Forced wider by the winner approaching the corner before doing nothing in the straight & weakening to long last.

Not much early speed & raced worse than midfield along the rail early before improving to midfield passing 650m. Stayed along the rail on straightening before closing off well between runners to move to second near 75m.

Bumped very heavily, crowded badly & checked after the start before tailing out after the start. Was a long way behind the remainder of the field throughout & was never involved. Reluctant to stride out – rider.
Had a soft run on the leaders back throughout. Came under hard riding entering last section when just over 2L from the lead before weakening badly in final 250m.

Steadied at start & taken back to race last of the main field. Stayed close to the inside on straightening when continuing at the rear before finishing off only steadily & passing only tiring runners when finishing midfield.
Obtained a good position 1,1 throughout. Was only 2.5L from the lead on straightening before emptying early in the straight & weakening out.

Was trapped racing three wide without cover in midfield throughout. Was three lengths from the lead on straightening, passed quickly by the winner at the 175m before finishing steadily to well beaten 4th.

Raced in midfield before drifting further back in middle stages. Shifted wider entering the final section when around 6L behind, sprinted very quickly passing the 250m, struck the lead at 100m before going on to win easily.
Pushed forward to race outside the leader. Moved up to share lead near the 125m mark before being passed quickly by fast finishing winner. Battled on for well beaten third.
Showed speed after the start to lead. Headed passing the 150m mark before weakening quickly in final stages to be well beaten.
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the outside, 4 to 5 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, one-paced in the run home.

Made contact at start, raced prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross approaching 600M, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, checked near 150M, eased final 100M. (Roarer.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Away with them, raced towards rear on the inside, 2 wide turning in, no clear run early in straight, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Crowded on jumping, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, carried wider and bumped 550M, closed off well to make frame, not quite able to challenge.
Shifted out at start and made contact, positioned slightly behind midfield on the inside, angled out and bumped 550M, finished off well to take 2nd.
Commenced well, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, moved a bit closer on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place, always held.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, moved closer on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Slowly away, raced 2 wide at rear, 4 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Out in line, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed approaching 50M, weakened thereafter.
Crowded on jumping, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, showed some response early in straight, no clear run near 150M, weakened gradually final 50M.
In about midfield initially, on rail, lost ground when checked near 900M, no dash in the straight.
Sent forward, took rail and led, caught when gradually weakened near 100M.
Rolled forward, sat in box-seat, ran home well, just in time to take 2nd.
In midfield, 2 wide initially, shifted to rail prior to 600M turn, ran home nicely inside 200M, won by 1-1/2L.
Bumped start, in worse than midfield, on rail, hampered after 900M, did not threaten. (See Incident Report)
Eased then in worse than midfield, 3 wide when hampered near 900M, improved slightly in straight
Taken back, at rear, made the turns on rail, improved slightly only.
Forward, settled outside lead near 900M, gave ground from turn exit.
Raced in about midfield, 2 wide until shifted 3 wide passing 600M, was one paced.
Taken back, at rear, taken 3 wide at 900M, swung widest, made ground and continued on fairly.
Awkward start, ridden to recover ground, midfield on rail, pulled up after 900M. (Heart irregularity and bled)
Niggled along, sat one-out one-back position, under pressure 400M out and then gave ground.
Ridden along early for a prominent position 3-wide without cover, came under pressure rounding home bend but soon dropped out tamely after straightening.
Broke well, settled just off the pace on the rail stalking race leader, angled out for a run entering straight and hit the front over 150 metres out only to be collared close to home.

Settled in last few, switched out 3-wide approaching the Rock, came to challenge rounding home bend going widest into straight, quickened well down the centre of the track to hit the front inside final 50 metres.
Broke well but soon settled in midfield on the rail some 4L back, kept on steadily early in straight before finding no extra closing stages.
Trailed the field most of the way, ran past well-beaten horses in the run to the line.
Settled within 3L of pace in 5th, commenced move under pressure rounding home bend inside final 450 metres, fought on steadily without threatening in straight.
Missed the start, settled in last few on the rail, saved ground turning for home, produced good late impression inside final 150 metres.
Slow out, travelled wide in last few most of the way, made no impression. (Tactic questioned)
Pressed forward to lead from a wide gate, obtained rails run coming onto stables bend, held narrow lead until headed over 150 metres out, folded up quickly.
Travelled alongside race leader most of the way, drew level briefly after home turn but lost position when being straightened, gradually weakened.
Settled just worse than midfield in 8th, did not find much room early in straight, obtained clear run over 150 metres out and ran on under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Travelled wide without cover in midfield after beginning from a wide gate, one of the widest coming onto home turn, dropped out tamely after straightening
Chased leaders along the inside, bustled along home turn, not able to obtain clear running until late stages, not properly tested.
Held up behind midfield, swung wide for home, stayed on without threatening first few.
Began fairly, settled towards the rear of the main group, not going the pace to challenge in straight, never dangerous.
Soon led, kept on well from top of straight, caught 100M, weakened rapidly towards the finish.
Obtained a forward position racing outside leader, came under heavy pressure 400M then gave ground abruptly early straight to finish tailed off. (Unacceptable Performance.)
Chased the pace, loomed up behind leader 300M, gave mild response, not pace of winner final 100M, lost 2nd near line.
Began awkwardly, shifted across behind runners to obtain cover, 2nd last turning for home, ran on well down outsider to take 2nd near line.
Reserved 2-wide in midfield, into clear passing 300M, quickened up smoothly to take lead near 100M, well in control late stages.
Chased leaders, switched to 3-wide home turn, stayed in contention early straight but run ended 150M from home.
Soon ridden along after the start, settled in midfield along the fence, held up for clear running until 200M, kept on without threatening late stages.
Dropped back, became detached from the field passing 1000M, urged along middle stages but couldn't get back into contention. Never involved on his Hong Kong debut.
Never far off from leaders, raced wide no cover from 700M, kept on steadily to the line.

Stumbled at start, raced prominently on the outside, 3/4L back on turn, hard ridden from 250M, hit the front approaching 100M, kept on well to hold off the challenger. (Lost right front plate on jumping.)
Crowded on jumping, held up in rear, 7 lengths back on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Shifted in at start and made contact, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Away well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, peaked on turn, weakened gradually in straight.
Made contact at start, raced behind midfield on the outside, 3 lengths back on turn, made good progress in straight to take a place.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, angled out 550M, 3 wide turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Out with rest, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead 800M, led by 3/4L on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed approaching 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Stumbled at start, raced towards rear on the outside, 5 lengths back turning in, finished off very strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.

Was ridden to be more prominent after the start but was trapped racing three wide without cover in midfield throughout. Came under pressure on cornering, was slightly awkward passing 200m before giving ground in late stages.

Steadied & taken back to race at the tail along the inside. Slightly improved position around the bend when continuing along inside. Closed off well between runners passing 300m, moved to well beaten third in final furlong.
Shared the lead momentarily after the start before steadying at 1050m & racing in midfield away from the rail. Bumped on straightening when not far behind before peaking at 250m mark & weakening out.
Midfield early, improved to race 4th on the rail from 900m. Eased into clear running on straightening, dashed strongly to lead at 275m, drew away to win easily.

Was ridden forward & improved position along the rail to work to the outright lead from the 1000m. Was challenged & headed in the lead near the 850m, was ridden along on straightening before doing little in final 300m.

Was trapped racing very wide & without cover in midfield before drifting slightly further back after first bend. Taken very wide by rival runner near 500m before finishing off only one paced down the outside.

Steadied from wide gate after the start & taken back to race three wide with cover at the tail. Continued back & wide around bend, was the widest runner on straightening but weakened further to be long second last.

Ridden forward to challenge for lead before steadying & racing outside leader from the 1000m. Got cover from the 900m & raced third thereafter. Moved to the lead fleetingly near 300m before weakening out quickly in last 100m.

Slow to begin losing a length before being ridden along to improve & race between rivals in midfield. Shifted out sharply at 500m, closed off well before hanging in & bumping at 225m, closed to well beaten second in final 75m.

Steadied at start & taken behind runners before racing rearward along the rail. Moved slightly closer around the bend to be just worse than midfield. Closed off steadily between runners in final 300m to well beaten fourth.

Raced wide when just behind the leaders before improving quickly after the 950m to dash to lead when racing away from rail. Continued in lead until being headed passing 300m mark & weakening quickly last furlong.

Began slightly awkwardly & lost a length before mustering & getting position in midfield along rail. Moved off the rail around bend, eased wider on straightening before finishing off one paced in final furlong.

Jumped ok before steading & drifting back to worse than midfield when wide with cover. Continued to lose position around bend before being relegated to last near 500m. Weakened further to very long last.
Began awkwardly & raced at the tail. Was hard ridden on straightening when continuing a long way from the lead & was never really involved.
Sent forward and took lead, 2 wide, kept on going to the line and won.
Behind the lead, 2 wide after 600M, stayed on but headed by the 2nd placegetter in the last 100M.
Raced in midfield, wide but with cover, ran on well to line for 4th.
Sent forward and shared lead, along the rail, did not feature.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, only one paced to the line.
Slow to begin and lost ground, along the rail, nothing in the Straight.
Behind the lead, wide no cover, ran on strongly in the straight.
At rear, along the rail, showed minor dash only in the Straight.
Shifted across behind runners & raced second last away from rail. Was just under 8L from the lead on straightening & could make no headway into that deficit in the straight & was well beaten.

Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Shifted outwards & raced close to heels when attempting to get clear running on straightening, made continual steady ground to steal well beaten third in final stride.
Pushed forward, raced second before being crossed & racing on leaders back from 900m. Moved up to share lead at 150m, was too strong for rivals in concluding stages & went on to win well.
Raced just worse than midfield when three wide but with cover. Was ridden along from the 500m, forced to be the widest runner on cornering before weakening poorly in straight to be long second last.

Ridden forward after start before racing third away from the rail. Entered last section just under 3L from lead, lay outwards under pressure near 350m before weakening badly thereafter. Reluctant to stretch out - rider.
Raced in midfield away from the rail. Eased wider just prior to straightening, entered last section 5.5L from the lead before doing little in the straight & being beaten 6.5L.
Raced three deep in midfield before being left wide & without cover from the 1000m. Was 5L from the lead on straightening before weakening out poorly to be long last.
Raced in midfield away from the rail. Eased into clear running on straightening when 3.5L behind, peaked on effort mid-straight & gave a few lengths to be beaten 5.5L.

Raced just worse than midfield between runners. Was close to heels & steadied near 750m, was again steadied on straightening when attempting to shift out before holding 6L deficit all the way to line.

Outpaced after the start & was hard ridden when racing second last along rail. Checked away from heels near 700m when pace slowed. Stayed close to the rail on straightening when 5.5L behind, passed a couple in late stages.

Began awkwardly & lost a length before racing just worse than midfield along the rail. Moved away from the rail passing the 500m, was just under 5L from the lead on straightening, before weakening in final furlong.

Shifted back after start & raced at the tail. Continued a clear last throughout before shifting to be the widest runner on straightening when 9L from the lead before making significant late ground from a long way back.
Had a soft run when racing forth along the rail. Moved off the rail on straightening before closing off steadily in last section, only caught for third in final stride.
Showed early speed to lead when racing deep before crossing down to rail near the 900m. Joined by the winner approaching the 100m mark, battled on bravely to hold second, and beaten just under 2L.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, angled out 500M, finished off evenly.
Jumped well from gate 13, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, short of room and lost place near 400M, made no impression thereafter.
Shifted in at start and made contact, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out 600M, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on well, in command and eased close home.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide better than midfield, commenced move 550M, took the lead 300M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 150M.
Hampered start, raced at tail, 10 lengths back, closer on turn but still the last, passed some tired rivals in straight.
Taken back from a tricky gate, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out approaching 500M, made good progress in straight to take a place.
Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length on turn, headed early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Away well, taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, wider after passing 650M, very wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Moderately away, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Moderately away, raced in 2nd, a length or so back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, wider turning in, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, commenced move 550M, 3 wide turning in, took the lead early in straight, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final 100M.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off evenly.
Out with rest, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
Trapped wide, no cover in about midfield, gradually improved 700M out, was one paced before weakening.
Niggled along, 1-1/2L off leader, 2 wide, faded gradually in the straight.
Jumped slow, recovered in midfield, on rail, ran on without threatening.
Niggled along, in box-seat, continued on to the line to finish 2nd.
Sent forward, took rail and led, ran on all the way to the line to win by 1-1/4L.
Taken back, at rear and 2 wide, made ground and ran home steadily.
Sat worse than midfield, 2 wide, hampered near 600M, no kick and then weakened. (See Incident Report)
Bumped start, in front of midfield, 2 wide, run ended near 300M.
In worse than midfield, 3 wide but with cover, not competitive.
Jumped only fairly, in front of midfield, on rail, held up early but showed nothing anyway.
Taken back, at tail and on rail, made ground and ran on okay to take 3rd.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, was one paced and emptied late.
Raced close to the rear, on rail, improved and continued on fairly.
Settled in rear of midfield on the rail, shuffled backward behind runners rounding home bend, baulked for a run after straightening, made steady progress without threatening inside final 300 metres.
Taken back from the widest gate, circled the field 4-wide rounding home bend reaching 2L 4th into straight, unable to sustain effort and folded up quickly.
Pressed forward to lead from a wide gate, obtained rails run coming onto home bend, held narrow advantage most of the way until overhauled inside final 50 metres.
Broke well to be up with the pace, lost position steadily from approaching home bend to be some 3L back in 5th, found nothing after straightening.
Inconvenienced at start settling well back, 3-wide in last rounding home bend, found nothing under pressure in straight.

Moderate start, settled towards the rear on the rail, saved ground sneaking up to within 2L of pace into straight, baulked for a run before obtained clear passage over 100 metres out, got up under pressure close to home.
Travelled mainly 3-wide in last few, dropped out of contention upon straightening.
Never far off, became some 3L back in 4th approaching home bend, re-gained to 2L 3rd rounding home bend, held every chance under pressure after straightening but unable to draw level throughout.
Always thereabouts, held every chance closing stages but found winner too good.
Niggled along early stages to hold a position behind midfield, ran on mildly turning into straight, couldn't trouble first 2 and only managed a remote 3rd.
Settled in midfield 2-wide, gave good response when driven out 400M, quickened to lead near 100M, won going away.
Chased leader, travelled only fairly in middle stages, not able to quicken early straight, weakened noticeably over the final stages. (Jockey : his horse may not have appreciated the sealed track.)
Moved up to track leader, lay out home turn, held 3rd place until 150M, no extra close home. (Bled.)
Held up at the back racing 3-wide throughout, swung widest home, gave limited response passing beaten horses only.
Slightly slow away, held up near last, wide into straight, responded fairly from top of straight, failed to trouble leaders.
Crowded for room on jumping, recovered to race in midfield, failed to pick up speed on straightening, never dangerous.
Away well enough, chased leaders along the 2-path, moved up to challenge 400M, led 250M out, kept on well but not finishing pace of winner final stages. Clear from remainders.
Held up towards the rear, caught wide no cover from 700M, found no extra in straight, soon out of contention and finished tailed out. (Unacceptable Performance.)
Dropped back to race towards the rear, kept on fairly turning home, never going the pace to challenge leaders.
From draw 12 went forward to lead, headed 300M out, weakened rapidly towards the line.
Not hurried early stages, reserved at the back 6Ls off the pace, stayed on final 300M without threat to first few.
Away well, raced prominently on the stands' side, took the lead 350M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 150M, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Slightly slow out, raced towards rear on the stands' side, a bit closer in the middle stages, finished off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Made contact at start, positioned a length behind the leader on the middle track, peaked 400M, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Commenced well, positioned a length behind the leader on the stands' rail, closer in the middle stages, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Began only fairly, raced better than midfield, nearer to the middle track, outpaced 500M, weakened final 400M.
Away with them, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead 500M, peaked and headed 350M, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted in at start and made contact, sent forward to take the lead on the middle track, headed near 500M, hard ridden from 400M, kept on well until approaching 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Began fairly, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader, 2 away from the stands' rail, same margin back in the middle stages, hard ridden 300M, showed limited response, weakened final 150M.
Jumped with them, raced at tail, 6 lengths back at 400M, closed off well without threatening the first few.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide at rear, 7 lengths or so back, commenced move 550M, very wide into straight, finished off well to be nearest on line.
Jumped with them, positioned 2 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, 3 wide turning in, no clear run until 100M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, challenged the leader turning in, kept on well early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rivals turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two late.
Began smartly from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 550M, kept on evenly in straight, no clear run near 100M.
Jumped with them, hampered shortly after start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, wider from 550M, finished off very strongly to score.
Commenced well, tracked leaders, 3 wide throughout, challenged the leader turning in, kept on evenly in straight, hampered near 50M.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 wide from 800M, closer on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced at tail, 9 lengths back, closer on turn, very wide turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter.
Moderately away, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run until 75M, closed off well to take 2nd.
Slow to begin, positioned a length behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began awkwardly, taken back to race towards rear on the inside, angled out after passing 550M, finished off evenly.
Began only fairy, raced at tail, 6 lengths back, a bit closer on turn but still the last, made minor progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Crowded on jumping, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 lengths or so back, angled out 500M, very wide into straight, failed to make any progress in the run home.
Shifted in at start and made contact, positioned 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, taken back to race 2 wide at rear, commenced move 450M, very wide turning in, one-paced in the run home.
Jumped well from gate 9, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L on turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the challengers final 50M.
Taken back from gate 7, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off strongly to score.
Began well from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, 2 wide from 500M, kept on evenly in straight.
Made contact at start, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, easy run to turn, closed off well to take a place, just beaten by a neck.
Began well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, same position on turn, finished off strongly, just beaten by a head.
Went forward and dictated a slow pace, responded well when driven out from 300M, held on just.
Shifted across behind runners, 4-5Ls off the pace middle stages, swung wide for home, ran on fairly towards the line.
In midfield, driven along 500M, stayed on mildly final 300M, not reach leaders.
Tracked leaders in a slowly run race, tried hard in the straight but always held by winner towards the finish.
Tracked leader in a slow run race, kept up the chase on leader early straight, faded passing 150M.
Began only fairly, held up towards the rear in a slowly run race, stayed on down inside over final 300M, just missed 3rd.
Settled down midfield in 5th, 3Ls off leader in a slowly run race, angled out 300M to challenge, stayed on and did best towards finish, just missed.
Steadied early stages, held up at last in a slow run race, came under serious pressure 500M, failed to pick up pace. (Jockey fined for using whip when the horse was out of contention.)
At rear, along the rail, nothing in the Straight.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail after 600M, weakened in the last 100M.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, pretty one paced.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, remained one paced to the line.
At rear, along the rail, showed no turn on foot.
Began only fairly and raced in midfield, along the rail, saved ground and battled on to the line and finished 2nd.
Settled behind the lead, along the rail, kept on going and battled on to the line to win the race.
Sent forward, 2 wide, flattened after passing the 200M.
Taken back from outside gate to race at the tail. Continued near the rear throughout before passing a few when finishing off fairly from a long way back.

Steadied at start & taken back to race just worse than midfield between horses. Obtained clear running on straightening before closing steadily between rivals passing 200m & stealing well beaten third in final strides.

Raced prominent early, checked passing WP first time before racing 1,1 leaving the straight. Shuffled a pair further back passing 700m, hard ridden from 600m before weakening badly in straight to be a long last (see report).

Pushed forward to lead early before being headed by the winner at the 700m mark & sharing second place, 2L from the lead thereafter. Peaked on effort early in straight & weakened out quickly last furlong.

Lost ground at start before improving to race in midfield. Commenced sweeping move passing the 800m to strike lead 700m & put multiple 2L lead on rivals. Cornered well clear & maintained margin all the way to line to score.
Was trapped three wide with cover when worse than midfield. Continued to cover extra ground around bend, shifted to be second widest on cornering before passing a couple when running onto midfield.

Trapped racing wide without cover in midfield in early & middle stages. Got cover momentarily passing 800m before again left without cover near 650 before coming under pressure. Was beaten on straightening & weakened badly.
Raced in midfield along the rail. Stayed close to the inside on straightening before passing a few when running onto well beaten 4th late.
Had no early speed & was ridden along early to hold position sharing last place along the rail. Did little in the straight & was beaten over 8L.
Pushed forward to race outside the leader early. Passed by the winner at 700m & shared second d place, 2L behind thereafter. Weakened out in last 250m & was no factor.

Shifted behind runners after start & raced second last away from rail. Moved wider on the track to improve near 550m, forced very wide on cornering before passing a few tiring rivals when running onto 7th.

Raced on leaders back in early stages before being shuffled a pair further back from 700m. Travelled strongly approaching corner, shifted out on straightening, closed well to second at 175m but couldn't get to winner.
Moderately away, raced behind midfield on the outside, 4 lengths back on turn, finished off evenly.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Hampered start, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on strongly in straight, won by a neck.
Began only fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, 5 lengths back turning in, made little progress in straight.
Shifted out abruptly at start, raced in midfield on the inside, 4 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame, nearest on line.
Bumped start, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Slowly away, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Clean jump, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2-1/2L back, same position on turn, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, commenced move approaching 400M, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home, nearest on line.
Bumped start, in midfield 2 wide, ran on okay to the line.
Forward to lead on rail, keen midway, emptied near 200M.
Crowded start, consequently at rear, on rail, did not threaten.
Bumped start, towards the rear, on rail, hit the line strongly for a close finish.
In worse than midfield, 2 wide, dashed home strongly, sneaked past in a tight contest and finished 2nd. (See Incident Report and blood found in trachea)
Niggled along, sat just front of midfield, on rail, ran home well for a close finish for the minor placings.
Taken back, at rear 2 wide, made ground.
Sat front of midfield, 2 wide, kicked on early but out of steam for final 100M.
Forward, sat close to 3L behind leader, on rail, kept finding, held on to win by a neck.
Broke well driven along one back in 3rd, gained 2nd 2-wide about 650 metres out, dropped away quickly after straightening.
Settled in last few, baulked for a run until the 150 metres when switched out for good late impression. (Tactic questioned)
Up with the pace despite moderate start, settled just over 2L back in 5th or 6th, saved ground turning for home, kept on same pace without threatening. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Taken across to the rail at the back from a wide gate, trailed the field to the 500 metres and saved ground turning for home, angled out for a run over 200 metres out, ran on to be nearest at finish.
Prominent early before shuffled back to one from last making first turn, commenced move home bend to be the widest into straight, fought on steadily down the centre of the track without threatening.
Well there, dropped to 1L 2nd at about 800 metres becoming 3rd 600 metres out, soon weakened in straight.
Well there very wide, hit the front passing the 800 metres, unable to sustain effort inside the final 200 metres and swamped under pressure.
Well there, restrained 2L back turning into back straight, quickened to hold every chance early in home straight but unable to sustain effort inside final 100 metres.
Pressed forward from the widest gate for a wide run, travelled just worse than midfield before circling the field from 500 metres out, ran on dourly to hit the front over 150 metres out.
Driven early to be racing outside the pace, wide no cover until 700M, held 2nd spot until nearing 100M, swamped late stages.
Settled down midfield, ran on one paced down the inside from 300M, well held by rivals towards the finish.
Pressed early after an awkward start, obtained running ahead of midfield, raced keenly, fought on steadily final 300M for 3rd.
Bustled along after the start, tracked leaders into straight, kept on but not going the pace to challenge, out-finished over final 150M.
Obtained a 2-wide spot ahead of midfield, stayed on mildly from 300M, held by first few towards the line. (Jockey suspended for failing to ride his horse out to the end of the race.)
Jumped well, chased leaders on inside, switched lane 300M, stayed on well to go 2nd close home.
Dropped back from wide draw, held up towards the rear, stayed on fairly down outside of track, never a serious threat.
Eased back to race near the rear, came under heavy pressure passing 500M, failed to make ground on rivals.
Reserved in midfield along the 2-path, swung wide for home, picked up well to lead inside 100M, won readily.
Taken back from draw 12, always at rear, struggled to keep up 600M, never involved.
Moved up to share lead on inside, fought on well turning for home, headed passing 100M, lost several places near line.
Not hurried early stages, settled down in 10th about 5Ls off the pace, shifted across the track to continue forward passing 300M, stayed on to claim 4th just in time.
Moderately away, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross near 800M, 2 to 3 lengths back on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 wide from 950M, 3 lengths back turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
Shifted out at start, raced at rear on the inside, slightly improved on turn, 2 wide turning in, one-paced in the run home.
Slightly slow out, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 900M, hard ridden from 450M but showed no response, finished last.
Moderately away, raced better than midfield on the inside, dropped to midfield halfway, 4 lengths back turning in, closed off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at rear on the outside, found rail 600M, 6 lengths back turning in, one-paced in straight.
Quickly away and led, headed near 850M, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the outside, dropped to rear in the middle stages, 8 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight.

Bumped on jumping, raced in midfield on the outside, commenced move 1000M, took the lead approaching 850M, led by 2 lengths turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner late.
Settled just worse than midfield in 9th on the rail, given reminders approaching home turn, soon weakened after straightening.
Taken back from the widest gate, remained well behind into home straight, went wide home turn, went past well-beaten horses.
Trailed the field most of the way, given strong reminders rounding home bend and the widest into straight, found nothing.

Pressed forward from a wide gate, gradually settled one-out-one-back before drifting back to 5th some 3L back inside the 1100 metres, hit the front under pressure entering straight, swamped for placing late.
Wide in forward of midfield early, made headway 3-wide without cover from the 1300 metres to reach 2nd 800 metres out, yielded ground gradually from approaching home turn.
Well there on the rail, settled just over 2L back in 4th, came under pressure rounding home bend, ran home one-paced.
Prominent early, inconvenienced and lost position to midfield coming onto back straight, kept on under pressure in home straight before faded inside final 200 metres.
Ridden forward from moderate start to join the leader coming onto back straight, unable to sustain effort and folded up quickly inside final 800 metres.
Soon took up running, hung on well under pressure.
In rear throughout and never seen with a chance.
Always in last few and never seen with a chance.
Settled in midfield, came under pressure rounding the field on home bend, fought on well to reach 2nd late but never threatening,
Settled in forward of midfield in 7th or 6th on the rail, fought on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Settled towards the rear in 10th off the rail, given reminders approaching the final turn, fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, weakened in the last 150M.
Sent forward and took lead, kept on going to score rather comfortably by 2L.
Raced behind the leader, along the rail, remained one paced to the line.
Raced next to the leader, 2 wide, stayed on and finished 2nd.
At rear, 2 wide, made ground steadily to the line.
At rear, along the rail, pretty one paced.
Raced outside the lead early before getting nice positon 1,1 from about the 900m. Moved up to second place near the 200m mark before just peaking in late stages.
Steadied shortly after the start & taken back to race three wide with cover near the tail. Had only two rivals behind on straightening when about 6L behind before making no headway.

Raced a touch wide early before improving position to race outside the leader from the 900m. Straightened just under a length from the lead before peaking passing 250m mark & weakening a few lengths to midfield.
Drifted back after the start & raced second last along the rail early. Stayed along the inside on straightening when about 5L from the lead but made no headway & was beaten a similar margin on line.
Had a nice run on the leaders back for the majority. Couldn't go with the leader in the final furlong but fought on well to hold third.
Raced in midfield away from the rail throughout. Entered last section just under 3L form the lead before closing off well & moving into second near the 100m.

Didn't begin fast, steadied & taken behind runners to race rearward. Steadied away from heels 750m when slightly keen, straightened second last, 6L behind, had clear running but made no headway (Rider questioned, see report).

Was left racing three deep without cover from 900m when just worse than midfield. Moved slightly closer around bend before straightening just under 4L from the lead before finishing off steadily to be beaten a similar margin.
Obtained lead soon after start. Was just under a length clear on straightening & continued on all the way to win by 2L.

Raced in midfield between runners throughout. Drifted further back around bend, was 4.5L from lead when momentarily held up on straightening before getting clear & making up a length or so late when running onto midfield.
Began only fairly & shifted back to the tail. Shifted to be the widest on straightening but made no impression and was last.
Got back after start before making some ground along the rail to race in midfield. Was 3L from lead on straightening before finishing off only one paced.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide towards rear, found rail approaching 850M, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear running until 150M, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a neck.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out 500M, finished off strongly to score.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths or so back, angled out 500M, failed to make any progress in straight.
Out with rest, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the outside, 4 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Began awkwardly and made contact, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, weakened final 150M.
Taken back to race at rear on the outside, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Away with them, positioned 1 out 1 back, same position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, checked near 200M, kept on evenly thereafter.
Shifted in at start and bumped, taken back to race at tail, 8 lengths back, commenced move after passing 600M, very wide turning in, finished off evenly.
Shifted out at start and bumped, positioned a length behind the leader on the inside, easy run to turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching 200M, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 wide from 500M, showed very good response early in straight, hit the front 150M, peaked and headed 75M, ran on evenly to the line.

Jumped with them, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, challenged the leader turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter. (Lame right front leg next day morning.)
Forward, sat behind the leaders, 3 off the outside rail, raced tight for last 100M, ran on nonetheless. (See Incident Report)
Settled to race prominently, on centre track, continued one paced home.
Jumped awkward, at rear on centre track, made ground steadily to the line.
Slightly slow away, checked when trying to recover ground, at rear 2 off, improving then missed run 250M, kept kicking to the line to take 2nd. (See Incident Report)
Forward to lead, 2 off outside rail, run ended passing 300M.
About midfield, 2 off the outside rail initially before taking run inside, ran home without threatening. (Blood in trachea)
In worse than midfield, on outside rail, dashed home late only.
Third line behind the leader, 2-3 off the outside rail, was fairly one paced.
Bumped start, in midfield about 4 off the outside rail, continued on nicely and held on to win by a neck. (See Incident Report)
Bumped start, just behind midfield on centre track, not competitive.
At rear, on centre track, good dashes before turning one paced late.
Bumped start, prominent on centre track, emptied approaching 200M.
At rear, about 4 off the outside rail, made ground and closed off fairly.
Niggled along, on outside rail behind the leaders, lugged out over final 150M, stayed on for 3rd. (See Incident Report)
Pressed forward to share the lead from a wide gate, eased slightly backward coming onto home bend, renewed effort to take the lead into straight, hung on well under pressure.

Crowded at start losing ground, detached from the main body of the field despite niggled along in back straight, saved ground turning for home and briefly baulked 300 metres out, produced good late run inside final 200 metres.
Soon picked up to prominent 4th along the rail after moderate start, trailed race leader rounding home bend and into straight, failed to quicken to draw level throughout final stretch.
Niggled along in first few, gradually shifted back to 5th over 3L back passing the 900 metres, kept on steadily under pressure in home straight.
Taken back from the widest gate, inconvenienced passing the 700 metres, remained wide without cover towards the rear to straight, made up good ground near the centre of the track, did best work late.
Well back, awkward 3-wide on top of home bend, widest runner into home straight, fought on under pressure.
Began fairly, soon improved to prominent one-out-one-back position, dropped back to 2L 4th rounding home bend, fought on steadily under pressure without threatening In straight.
Soon dropped towards the rear on the rail, angled out for a run entering home straight, produced some late impression closing stages.
Pressed forward from a poor gate to take up running just over 900 metres out, held lead to the 400 metres and weakened. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Settled in rear of midfield in 8th, lost position behind runners rounding home bend dropping to near last into straight, fought on well past beaten horses, did best work late.
Soon dropped to 6th over 4L back near midfield despite ridden along early, kept on under pressure in straight before folding up quickly inside final 150 metres.
Soon taken back to midfield from a wide gate, found nothing under pressure after straightening.
Settled behind mid-division, shifted out to 3-wde home turn, gave good response under top weight in straight, led passing 150M, continued on well to hold off 2nd and 3rd at the line.
Moved up to chase leaders, wide no cover from 1100M, stayed in contention until 200M, no extra and weakened to last.
From draw 14 slotted into a 3-wide spot towards the rear, got going passing 300M, closed off the race reasonably well.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, ended up in last spot, bustled along 650M, failed to make ground on leaders in the straight.
Eased back after the jump, held up near last 6Ls off the pace, ran on only fairly final 400M, never dangerous.
Crowded for room on jumping, raced in midfield along inside, didn't find much when driven out in straight, weakened over final 200M.
Settled down midfield, had difficulty obtaining clear running early straight, checked 250M and lost momentum, out of contention thereafter. Inconclusive run.
Reserved towards the rear 6Ls off the pace, finished off strongly final 300M, nearest finish. (Jockey reported his mount lay in under pressure 100M.)
Never far off from leaders, 5th making the turn for home, ran on mildly passing 400M, well held by leaders final stages.
Held up 3-wide in midfield, driven out passing 500M, gave mild response early straight, outpaced from 200M.
Soon led under 10lb claiming rider, took them along at even pace, headed near 250M, faded towards the finish.
From draw 1 ridden forward to track leader, kept on steadily turning home, out-finished by rivals over final 200M.
Dropped back from draw 12 and taken across to the fence, settled behind midfield, made good progress from 350M, pushed winner to the line.
Sent forward on jumping from wide draw, prompted the pace on outside, vied for lead early straight, lead nearing 200M but soon headed by first three. Held on for 4th just.
Taken back from gate 13, raced in midfield on the outside, inconvenienced near 450M, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Commenced well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length on turn, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final 150M.
Began awkwardly, raced towards rear on the outside, 6 lengths back on turn, inconvenienced 450M, very wide into straight, made some progress in the run home.
Moderately away from gate 10, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, a length back on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Shifted in at start and made contact, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, made good progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide, 5 lengths or so back, there to turn, not enough room early in straight, cleared near 300M, closed off well to make frame without threatening.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening, no clear run near 250M, made good progress thereafter to take 2nd.
Away well from the widest draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, peaked 450M, weakened early in straight, eased final 100M.
Crowded on jumping, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground to turn, angled out 450M, hit the front 300M, peaked and headed 150M, weakened final 100M.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, there to turn, made some progress in straight.
Slowly away, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, showed limited response thereafter.
Away well, raced 3 wide in midfield, shifted out abruptly and made contact near 450M, very wide into straight, made no impression in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Crowded on jumping, raced slightly behind midfield, 3 lengths or so back on turn, finished off strongly to score.
Commenced well, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Moderately away from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from gate 12, raced at tail, 6 lengths or so back, still last turning in, made some progress in straight.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced at rear on the inside, 5-1/2L back, saved ground on turn, made some progress in straight.
Bumped start and unbalanced, positioned 2 wide, 4 lengths or so back, there to turn, made some headway in straight.
Commenced well, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside early, found rail near 750M, 3 lengths back turning in, hard ridden approaching 300M, finished off strongly to score.

Made contact shortly after start, unable to slot in, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back, very wide into straight, closed off well to take a place without threatening the first two.
Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, angled out after passing 500M, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Moderately away, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, 3/4L back turning in, hit the front 300M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner late.

Made contact shortly after start, took the early lead, slightly taken back near 1000M, raced better than midfield on the outside in the middle stages, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped on jumping, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M.
Average to begin, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground to turn, angled out approaching 450M, finished off evenly.
Jumped with them, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, travelled keenly near 1000M, 5 lengths back on turn, made little progress in straight.
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, bumped near 200M, weakened and eased thereafter.

Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, 2 wide after passing 550M, 4 lengths back turning in, made some progress early in straight, bumped near 200M, no further impression thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide from 850M, 2 to 3 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, finished off well without threatening the first few.
Moderately away, positioned 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 2 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, closed off well to take a place.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail early, sent forward after passing 1000M, shared lead on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened quickly thereafter.
Away well, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, weakened early in straight, eased final furlong.
Slowly away, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made some progress in straight.
Commenced well, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, hard ridden 300M, hit the front 125M, kept on well to the line.

Fast into stride, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, challenged by rival from 700M, shared lead on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 125M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Moderately away from gate 10, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Began well from gate 1, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide from 850M, a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Out in line, taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, saved ground to turn, made some progress early in straight, crowded near 200M, ran on evenly thereafter.

Pushed forward after the start & raced third before moving to second near the 1000m mark. Came under hard riding approaching the corner when the leader kicked clear before weakening very badly in straight to long last.

Bumped at start & then shifted back to race second last. Was relegated to last near 700m, stayed along the inside on cornering before shifting outwards at 100m & closing off steadily in late stages but never threatening.

Strode forward from the outside gate to work to the lead. Increased the tempo from the 500m & straightened with a 2L advantage before continuing on all the way to win by half length from fast finishing second.
Had a nice run 1,1 for the majority. Eased three wide passing the 600m mark before emptying out pretty early in the straight & weakening poorly in final stages.

Got back to third last after the start. Was relegated to second last passing the 700m, shifted wider on corner, had no clear run on straightening before working home well between runs in final 200m to steal third in last 25m.
Raced in midfield away from the rail throughout. Was hard ridden from 700m to improve, was the second widest on cornering but did little in the straight & weakened to second last.

Raced just worse than midfield, along the rail early before moving off the rail approaching the 800m. Eased wider & into clear running on straightening before making up a length when closing off to well beaten 4th.
Raced on the leaders back for the majority. Dropped 2L from the lead passing the 500m when leader increased tempo. Weakened a few lengths in last furlong & was no threat in midfield.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Stayed close to the inside on straightening, moved to second at the 200m before closing strongly late to fall only a half-length short.

Had no speed & was a clear last soon after start. Moved wider & hard ridden to improve from 700m. Bumped & forced wider passing 600m, forced very wide on cornering before finishing off one paced down the outside to midfield.
Sent forward, 2 wide after 850M, made minor ground only in the Straight.
Raced behind the lead, along the rail, made some ground but headed by the winner in the last 50M.
At rear, along the rail, saved ground but only one paced in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, saved ground and showed some dash in the early part of the Straight, one paced after passing 150M.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, showed strong dash and kept on going to score.
Sent forward and shared lead, 2 wide, was emptied passing 100M.
At rear, 2 wide, swung widest on Straightening, closed off strongly in the last 150M.
Raced in front of midfield, 2 wide, only one paced to the line.
Settled in midfield position, 2 wide, swung wide on Straightening, continued on well finished 1L behind
Rolled forward and took lead, 2 wide, weakened in the Straight and finished tailed out.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, shifted out and pushed forward after 700M, nothing in the Straight. (See incident report)
Raced in midfield but was trapped racing wide throughout. Was the widest runner on cornering when about 3.5L from the lead before weakening to long second last.
Had a nice run on leaders back. Finished off only moderately & was beaten about 3L in midfield.
Steadied, shared last place when racing along rail. Moved outwards on straightening, held up until near the 200m before making some late headway down the outside to be closer than in recent runs.
Was trapped racing three wide without cover in midfield. Improved slightly closer to lead around bend before wide passage took its toll & weakened to be well beaten.
Niggled along at first bend to hold position in midfield between runners. Travelled strongly approaching the corner before closing strongly in the final 150m to move to second in the last 25m.
Had a nice run 1,1. Eased wider on straightening, finished steadily all the way to line to only be beaten a length.
Pushed forward & raced outside the leader. Travelled keenly when racing on speed. Peaked on run mid-straight & weakened out late under little riding (See report).
Bumped at start before being steadied & racing worse than midfield away from the rail. Shifted wider after straightening before passing a few rivals when running onto midfield to only be beaten 2.5L.
Raced in midfield along rail. Weakened a further few lengths to be beaten 5L on line.
Had no speed after start & raced at the tail. Dropped off the remainder off the field before straightening before tailing out to distant last. (Irregular heart rhythm, must trial).

Got back after the start to race third last on rail. Shifted into clear running on straightening before making impressive late headway between runners to strike the lead inside the final 50m & win by half length.
Pushed forward to lead. Continued in front until being passed by first two in final 50m. Held third.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, 7 lengths or so back, found rail 600M, same margin back on turn, made some headway in straight.
Began well, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move 450M, very wide turning in, peaked 200M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Taken back from gate 10, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 150M, made some headway thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 9, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths or so back, there to turn, made no impression in straight.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, 2-1/2L back, saved ground on turn, finished off very strongly to score by a head.
Away well, sat right behind the leader on rail, 2 wide after passing 400M, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Began only fairly and bumped, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, finished off strongly to be nearest on line.
Shifted out at start, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter.
Jumped well from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length on turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner late.
Jumped well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, carried wider 400M, 3 wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Moderately away from gate 11, raced better than midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Hampered at start, in midfield along the rail, continued fairly to the line.
Bumped start, at rear throughout, never a factor.
Taken back, sat towards the rear and wide no cover, failed to make an impression.
Crowded start, raced in box-seat, one paced and flattened late.
Bumped start, raced towards the rear, 2 wide, improved in straight, closed off nicely to take 2nd.
Sent forward, took rail and led, maintained advantage home to win by 1/2L.
Bumped start, slotted in one-out one-back, no dash and weakened late.
Jumped awkward, near tail and on rail, never in it.
In behind midfield, 2 wide, improved slightly only.
Forward, settled to race outside lead, kept on one paced home.
Travelled 3-wide without cover in forward of midfield, gained closer to 4th within 2L of pace at the Rock, soon weakened under pressure after straightening.
Broke well from wide gate, soon taken back, commenced move 600 metres out, circled field home bend, widest into straight, finished off race well.
Ridden along in rear of midfield in 7th, steadied and lost some ground 850 metres out, very wide into straight, ran on under pressure despite hanging in.
Soon taken back from the widest gate, detached until home straight, made up good ground to be nearest at finish.
Settled in rear, inconvenienced at around 550 metres and after straightening just inside the 300 metres, ran on under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Ridden forward to take up running, obtained rails run passing the 800 metres, led until headed into straight, dropped out under pressure.
Broke well, settled in 4th about 2L off the pace, became 5th in similar position passing the 700 metres, ran on to be nearest at finish despite tightened 150 metres out.

Crowded at start losing ground, travelled keenly in midfield on the rail, carried backward a couple of lengths at about 600 metres dropping to last few, saved ground final bend, weakened noticeably inside final 200 metres.
Shared lead on rails, taken one back to 2nd in back straight, became 3rd in similar position coming onto home bend, one-paced before fading inside final 50 metres.

Always well there, gradually settled just over 1L back in 3rd early in back straight, moved back up to 2nd about 700 metres out, hit the front into straight and drew 2L clear about 100 metres out, hung on well.
Settled down behind midfield, switched to 3-wide 800M, awkwardly placed 300M, failed to run on thereafter.
Lacked early pace, soon in last place, switched to 3-wide back straight, swung widest for home, stayed on without threatening leaders.
From draw 10 made early use to find the lead, set fast pace, caught 250M, faded late stages. (Jockey was told he should have made more effort to steady the tempo after 1200M.)
Reserved behind midfield 5Ls off the pace, had a ground saving trip on inside, made mild progress final 300M but no threat to first two.
Went forward, tracked runaway leader, not going the pace to challenge passing 400M, soon dropped out of contention.
Held up in mid-division, saved ground along the inside, fought on one paced in the straight, no threat from 200M.
Caught wide no cover chasing leaders, wide into straight before quickly dropping out of contention
Shifted across behind runners to find cover after the start, held up near last early stages, took closer order 600M, quickened up strongly to lead 150M, won going away.
Crossed to the fence 1600M, tracked leader in 3rd spot, responded well 300M and challenged for the lead, outpaced by winner final 150M. Well clear from rest.
Slotted into a midfield spot along the 2-path, responded fairly when driven out 400M, no extra mid-straight.
Towards the rear early stages, shuffled back to last 700M, ran on fairly turning in, never threatened.
Moderately away from a wide draw, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader, a bit closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M, eased final furlong.
Quickly into stride, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, angled out 500M, hit the front 250M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 75M, finished 2nd.
Jumped well from a wide draw, took the early lead, headed near 1300M, 2nd on turn, peaked and weakened early in straight, hampered 250M, soon eased.
Began very awkwardly, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 500M, passed some tired runners in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Lifted front feet on jumping and away tardily, raced at tail, 10 lengths or so back, closer on turn but the last into straight, made no impression in the run home.
Inconvenienced at start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, commenced move 500M, hampered approaching 400M, kept on well in straight to make frame without threatening the first few.
Taken back to race 2 wide towards rear, hard ridden from 550M, passed some tired runners in straight.
Commenced well, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead near 1300M, led by a length in the middle stages, peaked and headed 250M, weakened thereafter.
Shifted in on jumping and made contact, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground throughout, kept to inside after straightening and finished off strongly to score.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move 500M, made good progress early in straight, peaked on run 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Began well from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out 550M, no daylight early in straight, cleared 150M, finished off well to take a place, always held.
In touch, fought on steadily over final 400M, comfortably held by first few towards the line.
Lost ground when crowded for room at start, settled behind midfield, failed to pick up passing 400M, never threatened.
Reserved in midfield, had difficulty obtaining run passing 400M, switched to center of track and finished off well to get up for 2nd close home.
Never far off the pace, came under pressure 500M out, couldn't go on, no extra final stages.
From draw 1 sent forward, took them along at good pace, held on to the lead until 150M before losing 2nd spot last stride.
Close up behind pace setter, gave limited response when driven out 400M, fought on same pace before weakening late.
Obtained running along stand's rail, never far off from the pace, gave mild response passing 400M but never going to the pace to challenge first three.
Away slowly, recovered to race in midfield, accelerated quickly passing 400M, led near 150M, won comfortably on debut.
Held up towards the rear along the stand's rail, stayed on fairly from 400M, steadied 150M but never looked threatening.
Jumped on terms, raced towards the rear, struggled to keep up halfway, soon beaten.
Held up towards the rear, kept on fairly passing midway, never going the pace to challenge.
Bustled along after the start, lacked early pace, always towards the rear, left behind 500M out.
At rear, along the rail, swung wide on Straightening, remained one paced to the line.
At rear, along the rail, saved ground and continued on to the line.
Sent forward, 2 wide, weakened after passing the 200M.
At rear, 2 wide, nothing in the Straight.
Settled in behind the lead, along the rail, keep on going to the line and scored by 1-1/4L.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide after 800M, emptied after passing 300M.
Sent forward, 2 wide after 700M, did not feature
Raced in midfield, along the rail, only made minor ground in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, only one paced in the Straight.
Settled in midfield, 2 wide, swung wide on Straightening and made strong dash to the line.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, pretty one paced in the Straight. (Mucus in trachea)

Raced just worse than midfield away from the rail before improving to midfield around bend. Eased wider & away from heels near the 600m, was the widest runner on straightening before failing to run on, beaten over 4L.

Ridden forward to lead early before being headed at 1000m & racing second. Improved to leader's quarters near 700m. Moved up to take lead soon after straightening, continued narrow lead until 200m, over-run late.
Had a nice run in midfield away from the rail. Entered last section just under 2L from the lead, moved up to strike the lead passing the 200m, hung inwards late but did enough to win narrowly.
Shifted back from second widest gate & raced rearward. Never improved.

Had a nice run 1,1 throughout. Bumped by the runner-up on straightening when under 1L from the lead, moved up to close to lead at 300m mark, caught for third in final 25m & was beaten under 2L on line.
