Began awkwardly before getting nice run in midfield along the rail throughout. Entered last section only 2L behind before shifting in at the 350m & finishing off steadily to be beaten similar margin on line.

Had a nice run on leaders back throughout. Bumped on straightening when attempting to shift over heels when 1L behind, shifted into space between runners passing 400m, shared lead 200m, fell a head short on line.
Shifted across behind runners & raced rearward throughout. Was a long way behind when third last on cornering & failed to improve in straight.

Ridden forward from outside gate to improve to the lead at the 1000m mark before racing 2L clear nearing the 800m. Was headed in the lead soon after straightening before giving a few lengths in final stages, 4.5L behind.

Crowded soon after the start & raced worse than midfield along the rail. Moved away from the rail near the 600m, shifted out further on straightening, made up some late ground when passing a couple without threatening.
Raced wide until being steadied & drifting right back to last from near the 800m mark. Weakened badly in straight to be very long last.

Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Moved off the rail just prior to straightening, entered last section 3L from the lead before closing off well in the final stages to move to third in final 25m.

Was crowded on jumping before racing between runners in a group near the rear. Raced keenly & checked away from heels near 1100m & again near the 650m. Was 5L behind on straightening & only maintained that margin to line.
Raced in midfield away from the rail throughout. Eased wider on straightening when around 3L from the lead before weakening a few lengths in the final furlong.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 550M, finished off evenly.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, carried wider turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from gate 9, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no progress in straight.
Started very slowly, raced at rear on the inside, 9 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight.

Bumped start, raced prominently on the outside early, slightly taken back 1400M, positioned 2 wide better than midfield in the middle stages, very wide into straight, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, still well back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Began well from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well in straight to hold off the challengers.

Bumped start and unbalanced, trapped 3 wide in midfield early, 2 wide from 1000M, 4 lengths back on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.) (Roarer.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear of midfield, 6 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place, always held.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, kept on evenly in straight.
Began awkwardly, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, 8 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
Raced in worse than midfield, 2 wide, saved ground and continued to close off fairly.
Forward, settled to race outside lead, kicked away 350M, ran on to win by 3/4L.
Jumped okay, opted for box-seat, no kick in the straight. (Blood in trachea)
Raced close to the rear, on rail, held early in the straight, showed dashes before emptied.
Slotted into midfield from wide draw, 2 wide, was fairly one paced.
Slow out, last on the rail, dashed home strongly to finish 3/4L behind the winner in 2nd.
Slightly crowded at start, resumed to lead on rail, weakened on straightening.
Crowded start, in midfield along the rail, no daylight until last 100M, not properly tested.
In worse than midfield, wide but with cover, not competitive.
Sat in front of midfield, wide and no cover, continued one paced to the line.
Broke well to share the pace, niggled at coming onto course proper become given reminders from 300 metres out, failed to quicken to threaten.
Dipped at start losing ground, soon recovered to within 2L off the pace, came under pressure over 300 metres out and found nothing.
Moderate start, gained closer from over 2L back to 5th behind the leaders coming onto the course proper, fought on steadily down the centre of the track but without threatening.
With leaders early before drifting back to last of the compact field over 500 metres out, commenced move passing the 300 metres and hit the front under pressure 100 metres out.
Broke well to share early pace along stands rails, drifted some 2L back before coming under pressure onto course proper, kept on same pace without threatening.

Travelled in rear of the compact field down the centre of the straight course, gained closer to within 1L of pace inside the 600 metres, hit the front over 150 metres out and continued to hang out, caught 100 metres out.
Began awkwardly, well there early stages, hit the front narrowly coming onto course proper, unable to sustain effort and headed inside final 200 metres
Travelled well in mid-division, obtained clear running 350M, closed off strongly under top weight to lead 100M out. Comfortably.
From wide draw steadied to obtain cover in a rearward spot, swung wide for home, failed to run on over final 400M.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, ended up racing at the back, closed off fastest in the straight, just missed 2nd.
Driven forward under 10lb claimer, crossed to the lead before home turn, kept on well on straightening, headed 100M, held on for 2nd just.
Chased leaders, held 2nd spot early straight, stayed in contention until 200M, faded towards the line.
Travelled satisfactorily behind leader, driven top of straight but not going the pace to challenge, faded 150M from home. (Jockey unable to explain for the disappointing run.)
In midfield, 4-wide no cover making home turn, failed to go on passing 300M, weakened away.
From draw 7 went forward, unable to slot in, caught wide no cover outside leader, no extra 300M, finished tailed out. (Lame LF leg.)
From draw 10 taken across to a 2-wide spot in midfield, angled out 500M for clear running, stayed on well to take 4th.
Never far off from leaders, checked inside 400M, unable to quicken after. (Jockey : lost momentum when steadied passing 400M, didn't finish the race off.)
Began awkwardly, travelled keenly when steadied after 1100M for cover, saved ground on inside, closed off mildly passing 400M. Not reach leaders.
Jumped well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, easy run to turn, kept on well in straight to take 2nd, always held.
Taken back to race at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, made some headway thereafter, no threat to the first few.
Brushed on jumping, raced in midfield on the outside, similar position on turn, one-paced in the run home.
Away with them, raced behind midfield on the outside, 4 lengths or so back, there to turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
Jumped well from the widest draw, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, 3/4L back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide towards rear, 4 to 5 lengths back on turn, closed off well without threatening.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the inside, a bit closer in the middle stages, no daylight early in straight, cleared 100M, finished off evenly.

Out with rest, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield early, dropped to midfield in the middle stages, 2 to 3 lengths back on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared approaching 150M, finished off evenly.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on very well in straight to hold off the challengers.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, one-paced in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with cover at rear, there to turn, made no impression in straight.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, carried wider after passing 650M, 4 wide turning in, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6-1/2L back turning in, one-paced in straight.
Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the outside, closer on turn, hit the front 250M, kept on very well to the line and scored.
Jumped with them, in touch, 2 lengths back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length in the middle stages, challenged by rival 500M, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 9, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths or so back on turn, made very good progress in straight to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 2 wide at rear, 7 to 8 lengths back on turn, taken wide in straight and made some progress final 200M.
Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress early in straight, blocked final 50M.
Began awkwardly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, failed to make any progress thereafter.
Began smartly, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed good response early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Began well from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, 2 wide on turn, not enough room early in straight, cleared 300M, finished off well to take a place without threatening.
Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to race in 2nd, challenged the leader 500M, took brief lead 300M, peaked and headed 200M, weakened thereafter.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, commenced move after passing 550M, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M. (Mucus.)
Began only fairly, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, angled out 450M, showed limited responses early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide at rear, commenced move 400M, very wide into straight, finished off well without threatening.
Slightly slow out, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, blocked near 200M, made good progress final 150M to take 2nd.
Began well from gate 1, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, there to turn, finished off strongly to score. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 2 lengths or so back turning in, finished off evenly.
Jumped with them, taken back to race at rear on the outside, moved closer after passing 700M, 1 to 2 lengths back on turn, finished off well to take a place.
Moderately away, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/2L on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually final 50M.
Began well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.

Ridden forward from a wide gate to be up with the pace, obtained rails run passing the 850 metres before settling just behind race leader, held every chance in home straight but unable to draw level throughout.
Driven forward from the widest gate to vie for lead, obtained rails run in front passing the 800 metres, led until narrowly headed upon straightening, kept on under pressure but lost placing late.
Amongst early leaders, taken over 2L back to 4th in back straight, weakened out of contention after home turn.
Settled well behind from a wide gate, commenced move rounding home bend, ran on under pressure in straight.
Moderate start, travelled strongly in 5th on the rail just over 2L off the pace, saved ground turning for home, kept on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Settled in midfield in 7th about 4L off the pace, awkwardly placed behind runner rounding home bend, obtained clear passage over 200 metres out and quickened well to snatch victory near the line.

Ridden along 3-wide among early leaders, crossed by faster runners and clipped heels inside the 1000 metres drifting back to 3L 6th, remained wide without cover into straight, ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.

Improved quickly from moderate start to prominent 2nd about 1L back, came to challenge rounding home bend and hit the front narrowly upon straightening, worn down by fast-finishing winner close to home.
Crowded at start losing ground, soon recovered to 9th towards the rear, commenced move 3 wide rounding home bend going wider into straight, ran on steadily under pressure.
Settled well behind, saved ground on the inside turning for home, one-paced in the run to the line. (Mucus)
Gradually settled just worse than midfield 8th on the rail, saved ground turning for home, unable to quicken under pressure.
Travelled wide in last few, came under pressure rounding home bend and went the widest into straight, found nothing under pressure.
Sent forward and raced behind the leader, along the rail, kept on going to the line.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, only one paced in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, found no extra approaching 150M.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, weakened after passing the 150M.
At rear, 3 wide no cover, eased down in the Straight. Performance unacceptable, must trial. (See incident report)
At rear, along the rail, swung widest on Straightening, made ground steadily and finished okay for 4th.
At rear, 2 wide, nothing in the Straight.
Settled to race in midfield, along the rail, battled on to the line with the winner and just beaten by a neck.
At rear, along the rail, continued on to the line and won by a neck.
Began awkwardly before being taken back behind runners & racing at the rail. Continued last on cornering but made no headway & was second last.

Shifted behind runners to the rail soon after start & raced just worse than midfield along the inside. Was hard ridden passing 600m, moved off rail soon after, shifted wider for clear running 200m before closing ok in late stages.

Raced 1,1 after the first bend but shuffled a pair further back after 700m. Moved into three wide line approaching the 600m, was hard ridden before straightening before boxing on well all the way to the line to be beaten under 3L.

Raced in midfield between runners early before moving into three wide line with cover passing 800m. Was forced wider passing the 600m before losing position around the 500m bend. Finished off only one paced & was never a threat.

Steadied at start & taken back to race second last along the rail. Shared last place from 600m, was awkwardly placed on heels just before straightening, shifted back down to rail at 200m, but couldn't make any further headway.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Continued along the inside on straightening but did nothing & weakened to last.
Raced third last away from rail. Eased wider on straightening, dashed strongly between runners at 150m before charging to lead in final 50m to win drawing away.

Improved position after the start, worked hard before racing at leaders quarters from 900m. Got some cover near 650m but came under pressure soon after. Looked beaten on straightening but finished off one paced to be beaten 3.5L.

Trapped racing wide in midfield before being left without cover & then working very hard to improve & race outside the leader from 650m. Moved up to narrow lead near 175m before over-run by fast closer, brave to hold second.
Raced outside lead early before getting trail on leaders back from the 950m. Shifted over the heels of the leader passing the 250m before closing off steadily to narrowly miss second.
Pushed forward to lead. Headed near 175m before weakening a few lengths in late stages.

Raced rearward early before continually improving in middle stages when covering additional ground. Left without cover from 650m, improved to be third, 1L behind at the 500m before battling on bravely in final stages.
Moderately away from the widest draw, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked 200M, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Shifted out at start, raced 2 wide, 3 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, finished off evenly.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame, nearest on line.
Taken back from gate 8, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5-1/2L back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Bumped start, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Began smartly from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, easy run to turn, kept on well in straight to take a place.
Jumped well, positioned 2 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, commenced move 400M, showed good response in straight, hit the front 150M, ran on well to hold off the challengers late.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 350M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a head.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/4L on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Began only fairly and hampered, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress early in straight, no extra final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground to turn, unable to obtain clear run early in straight, cleared near 100M, finished off evenly.
Began fairly only, in box-seat, under pressure 600M, fairly one paced in straight and eased down late.
Slow out, raced close to the rear 2 wide, lay in in the straight, continued on fairly.
Forward, took rail and led until crossed at about 800M, faded gradually from near 200M.
Raced behind midfield, 2 wide, closed off fairly to the line to take 3rd.
Taken back, at rear and on rail, improved slightly.
Jumped slow, about 2L off lead 2 wide, led outright prior to 600M, emptied passing 200M. (See Incident Report)
Sat in front of midfield, 2 wide, continued on well to the line to win by 1L.
Travelled in midfield, along the rail, kept battling to the line to finish 2nd, 1L behind.
Jumped only fairly, close to the rear, on rail, no progress.

Broke well before settling some 2L back in 4th or 5th in back straight, saved ground on the inside turning for home, tight behind runners early in straight, made no further impression inside final 100 metres.
Hampered before taken back from the widest gate and waited with, commenced move rounding home bend and sustained progress in straight, ran on but found winner too strong.
Ridden forward from a wide gate, held prominent 3rd and then 4th very wide without cover down back straight, remained 3-wide without cover rounding home bend, made no impression after straightening.
Pressed forward to travel 2-wide in 2nd just off the pace, became 3rd in similar position over 750 metres out, hit the front under pressure after straightening but soon caught inside the 200 metres.
Unbalanced before ridden early stages, settled in rear of midfield in 6th in back straight, held similar position turning for home, quickened well to hit the front 200 metres out, won readily.
Settled in rear from a wide gate, niggled at rounding home bend, dropped to last while widest into straight, made no further impression. (Irregular heart rhythm)
Jumped best from the one draw to lead setting a sound pace, narrowly headed passing the 600 metres, weakened under pressure upon straightening
Ridden along 3-wide in midfield in 5th, made swift headway between runners from the 850 metres to take up running 600 metres out, led until headed over 250 metres out and weakened.
Crowded at start losing ground, travelledover 3L back in 7th on the rail, saved ground hugging the rail turning for home, forced to check 250 metres out, never recovered.
Dropped back to race in mid-division, ran on moderately down inside, held by first three towards the line.
Jumped on terms, chased leaders 2-wide, had every chance turning home, always held by leaders, flatten out final 150M.
Fractious in stalls, slowly away from draw 12, taken across to the rail racing towards the rear, ran on mildly entering straight, no clear run final 100M, not properly tested.
Driven forward, found the lead nearing 900M, set good pace to straight, headed 200M out, swamped by rivals late stages.
Crossed to race 3-wide in midfield, shuffled back to near last turning home, soon beaten and eased. (Jockey: unable to obtain a forward position due to circumstances of the race.)
Dropped back to race towards the rear, ended up last turning for home, did best work final 200M making late gains on leaders.
Taken to a 3-wide spot ahead of midfield, lost cover 700M then lay out home turn, soon beaten turning home. (Jockey : intended to ride forward but unable to do so due to fast tempo.)
Up with pace, caught 3-wide no cover until 600M, fought on well to wrestle the lead mid-straight, couldn't hold off first two over final 50M.
Never far off from the pace, settled 2-wide in midfield, finished off well final 200M to take 2nd close home.
Restrained after the start, settled at the rear 7Ls off the pace, held up for clear running early straight, severely checked near 150M. not properly tested.
Not hurried after the start, settled well behind midfield, ran on strongly from 300M, led nearing 50M.
Began well from draw 1, chased leaders on inside, tried hard to stay in contention passing 400M but found no extra mid-straight, weakened rapidly.
Jumped well from gate 1, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (Lost right front plate.)
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L, peaked and headed 200M, soon weakened.
Made contact on jumping, raced in midfield on the outside, moved closer after passing 600M, wide into straight, closed off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the outside, a bit closer on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly, raced at rear on the inside throughout, never a factor.

Shifted in on jumping and made contact, positioned 3 wide with cover towards rear, moved closer after passing 800M, raced 3 wide in midfield on turn, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Began fairly, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (Mucus.) (Lame right front leg next day.)
Made contact at start, positioned a length behind the leader on the inside, 2 wide on turn, hit the front 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the first two final 50M.
Crowded on jumping, raced 2 wide towards rear, there to turn, passed some tired runners in straight.
Taken back from gate 11, raced at rear on the outside, moved a bit closer on turn, taken wide in straight and finished off well to make frame, nearest on line.
Commenced well, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 150M, weakened final 100M.
Began awkwardly and made contact, raced at rear on the inside, still well back on turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
Made contact shortly after start, sent forward to take the lead, 2 wide, peaked and headed near 500M, weakened final 400M.
Made contact shortly after start, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight.
Bumped start, raced at rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back, very wide turning in, made no impression in straight.

Jumped with them, positioned 2 wide, 4 to 5 lengths back, found rail approaching 650M, a bit closer on turn, made good progress early in straight, no clear run and snatched up near 200M, made good progress thereafter to take 2nd.
Out with rest, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, 2 wide from 550M, wider turning in, made good progress early in straight, peaked 150M, kept on evenly to the line.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, very wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.

Began smartly from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, moved closer along the rail on turn, angled out 450M, showed good response in straight, hit the front 200M, kept on strongly to the line, won very comfortably.
Jumped well from gate 10, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, a length back in the middle stages, peaked 450M, weakened early in straight.
Made contact shortly after start, raced prominently on the inside, took the lead 500M, peaked and headed 200M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Ridden forward from second widest gate & came across to lead. Gave a nice kick on straightening, continued in lead until passed by fast closing winner in final 50m. Shared second on line.
Virtually shared last place after start before losing ground from the 850m & being pulled out of race at half-way. Failed to finish in the straight.
Began well but drifted back in early stages & raced just worse than midfield between runners. Stayed along the rail in the straight but did nothing, weakening to be the last horse to finish.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Stayed along the inside on straightening when about 3L behind before weakening in final stages to be beaten over 4L.

Steadied & taken back at start, raced in a line of 3 at the tail early before improving after first bend to be worse than midfield. Was 6L from behind on straightening before halving that deficit when running onto midfield.
Showed speed early before being headed & racing second away from the rail. Continued only a length from the lead on straightening before weakening out quickly in final stages.

Raced very wide in midfield early before improving position to race three deep without cover outside the leaders from the 650m. Was only 2L behind on straightening before giving a length late to finishing fifth.
Raced just forward of midfield, three wide with cover for the majority. Eased wider just prior to straightening, closed well all the way to share second prize on the line & was only beaten 1.25L.

Outpaced soon after the start & was ridden along to hold position between runners along rail. Was a clear last of the main field on corner when over 8L behind before making a huge amount of late ground down the outside late.
Raced in midfield between runners throughout. Cornered 3.5L from the lead but weakened out to be second last.
Raced just worse than midfield away from the rail. Moved to midfield around bend, made continual ground to strike lead in final 50m to win.
Raced worse than midfield along the rail throughout. Moved off the rail on straightening when over 6L from the lead, finished off only one paced & was no threat.
Settled in midfield, along the rail, lay in under pressure and only one paced to the line.
Sent forward and took lead, 2 wide, weakened in the last 100M.
Midfield, 2 wide, remained one paced to the line.
At rear, 2 wide, did not feature.
At rear, 2 wide, showed strong dash in the last 200M.
Raced in midfield, wide no cover, kept on going to win the race impressively by 2-1/4L.
Sent forward and raced next to the leader, along the rail, kept on going but one paced after passing the 50M.

Hard ridden early but drifted back to race forth from last away from the rail. Shifted 5 wide passing the 600m mark, was about 5L behind on straightening before closing well down the outside to second.
Strode forward & raced second away from the rail. Was ridden along before straightening but dug deep to still be not far behind at 150m mark before weakening in last 100m.

Raced in midfield between runners before drifting slightly further back passing the 600m. Shifted into clear running on cornering before closing strongly down the outside to strike lead passing 100m & going on to win well.
Pushed forward & had an uncontested lead. Gave a nice kick entering last section, continue din lead until passed at the 100m by fast closing winner. Held third.

Jumped from second widest gate before being steadied & taken rearward. Raced keenly passing 1100m when continuing to be steadied. Improved between runners passing 500m, straightened 5L behind but did nothing in straight.

Steadied after the start & shifted behind runners to the rail before improving along the inside to improve to midfield from the 900m mark. Moved off the rail prior to straightening but did little in dash to line.

Crowded after start & lost ground before improving to race in midfield away from the rail. Entered last section about 4L from the lead before finishing off steadily to the line without making any real impact into margin.
Had no early speed & drifted back to race third last along the rail. Was hard ridden before cornering, stayed along the inside on straightening but did nothing in the last 400m & was beaten 6L.

Drifted back to worse than midfield but was left racing wide & without cover in middle stages. Continued to cover additional ground around bend, was beaten & began losing ground form the 550m, tailed out to long last.
Had a nice run 1,1 for the majority. Entered last section only 2L from the lead, gave a few lengths in final stages when finishing off only one paced to be fifth.

Improved along the rail after the start before racing on the leaders back from about the 800m. Had clear running when continuing in third after straightening before weakening out quickly in last furlong.

Raced wide in midfield before steadying & shifting across approaching the 800m mark & racing three deep. Eased wider on cornering, entered last section only 2L from the lead but peaked in final 150m & weakened late.

Ridden at start but was soon steadied & drifted right back to race second last. Moved wider passing 650m, forced very wide passing 550m, extremely wide on straightening when 7L behind & never improved from that position.
Didn't begin fast but mustered to race in midfield along the rail. Moved off the rail just after straightening when 2.25L from the lead & held that deficit all the way to the line.
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Taken back from gate 12, raced towards rear on the outside, 2 wide on turn, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Began awkwardly and crowded, raced at rear, 8 lengths or so back, still well back on turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
Average to begin, raced 3 wide with cover slightly better than midfield, bumped 550M, weakened early in straight.
Made contact at start, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the outside, no cover throughout, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact at start, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, stayed on evenly to take a place.
Moderate break, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, a bit closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 200M.
Out with rest, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Began fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, kept on evenly final 200M.

Began fairly from the widest draw, raced in midfield on the outside, bumped 550M, very wide turning in, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 100M, kept on very well, won comfortably, impressive debut.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back from gate 13, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, finished off evenly. (Lost left hind plate near 1000M.)
Began fairly, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, one-paced final furlong.
Awkward start, sat in front of midfield, 2 wide, ran home very nicely, just couldn't hold off winner and finished 1/2L behind.
Jumped only fairly, in worse than midfield, on rail, dashed on until about 200M only.
Bumped start, outside lead until crossed near 800M, was fairly one paced in the straight.
Taken back, at rear and on rail, finished tailed out. Not competitive, must trial.
Forward to lead, remained on rail, run ended approaching 300M.
Settled to race in midfield, wide and lost cover near 800M, no dash but then closed of fairly late to take 3rd. (See Incident Report)
Stumbled at start, raced close to the rear, 2 wide, showed dashes and ran home okay.
Taken back, raced towards the rear, very wide making Home Turn, no progress in the straight.
Bumped start, urged along until settled to race in box-seat, awkward to heels at 300M, found nothing thereafter when asked.
Eased after start, raced in worse than midfield, wide but with cover, no turn of foot.
Urged along, prominent but wide until sat outside lead at 800M, faded in straight and finished tailed out. Must trial.
Bumped start, settled in midfield, along the rail, quickened initially but then flattened late. (See Incident Report)
Crowded at start, sat just about midfield, 2 wide, ran home handsomely to win by 1/2L.
Taken back from the widest gate, gained closer while 4-wide rounding home bend, ran home one-paced.
Attempted to make all, held over 1L advantage after straightening but unable to sustain effort and caught inside final 70 metres.
Soon taken back for rails run at the back, trailed the field and switched to be one of the widest into straight, ran home steadily under pressure down the centre of the track.
Settled in last few on the rail, saved ground turning in, kept on well to the line.
Tracked the leader on the rail, came under pressure to challenge after straightening and gained upper hand close to home.
Pressed forward from a wide gate travelling wide without cover in prominent position, close up in 3rd rounding home bend and into straight, kept on steadily without threatening.
Began fairly, travelled strongly in 2nd just outside race leader, came under pressure after straightening holding every chance inside final 100 metres only to be denied narrowly.
Slightly slow out, soon recovered to prominent position in 3rd, shifted slightly back to 2L 5th coming onto home bend, went 4-wide into straight for a run but had nothing to give.

Quickly taken back for rails run in midfield, about 3L back in 7th rounding home bend, switched back to the rail for a run 350 metres out, ran on steadily but unable to sustain effort inside final 100 metres.
Travelled in midfield, drifted 3 wide at about the 700 metres on top of home bend, ran home steadily.
Settled towards the rear, baulked for a run early in straight, obtained clear passage 300 metres out and ran on under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Midfield early before dropping towards the rear, keen and wide rounding home bend, made no strong impression in the run to the line.
Broke well, soon taken back to 6th just over 2L off the pace and wide without cover, soon weakened from a similar position into straight.
Jumped on terms, drifted back to race behind midfield, driven out 400M but gave limited response, no extra 200M from home.
Sent forward, in 2nd spot until taking outright lead inside 600M, kept on well early straight, headed near 200M, faded towards the line.
Hampered at the start, unable to slot in, caught wide no cover throughout, moved closer to leaders home turn, fought on same pace until no extra 200M.
Held up behind midfield, driven out 400M, stayed on mildly, not able to trouble leaders.
From draw 12 driven along to go forward, led from 1000M, commenced to give ground 500M, weakened rapidly turning home.
Chased leader on inside, challenged for the lead 300M, had a brief tussle with eventual winner inside 200M, held closing stages.
Taken across behind runners, held up in last 6-7Ls off the pace, closed off strongly final 400M to take 3rd near line.
Drifted back to near last passing 900M, awkwardly placed 400M, ran on from off the pace but not reaching leaders. (Blood in trachea.)
Settled towards the rear, saved ground on inside, failed to muster the speed to challenge turning for home, never dangerous.
Settled down ahead of midfield, kept on mildly turning for home, never going the pace to challenge first two.
Began awkwardly, failed to muster speed, drifted back to a 3-wide spot near last, swung home widest, couldn't go on final 300M.
Away quickly from draw 11, travelled strongly in 3rd, moved up to take the lead 200M out, kept on well and was always holding off the runner up towards the line.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, angled out 500M, made no impression in straight.
Began only fairly, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Bumped start, raced at rear on the outside, 7 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Shifted out at start, raced keenly, in touch on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, easy run to turn, hard ridden 300M, hit the front 200M, kept on strongly to the line.
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the outside, same position on turn, closed off well to make frame, not quite able to challenge.
Out with rest, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, dropped to 3rd on turn, closed off well without threatening the winner. (Blood in trachea.)
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide towards rear, 5 lengths back on turn, angled out 450M, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Away well, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, finished off well to take a place, no threat to the winner.
Began fairly, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, bumped 500M, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly thereafter. (Mucus.)
Away with them, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, very wide into straight, made no progress in straight.
Shifted out on jumping and made contact, raced behind midfield on the inside, bumped near 500M, made some headway early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Commenced well, sent forward to take the lead, enjoyed the easy lead to turn, hard ridden approaching 300M, peaked and headed 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Hampered start, raced at rear on the inside, hard ridden after passing 550M but only showed limited response, no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame both front legs next day.)
Away with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M, eased final furlong.
Out with rest, raced at rear on the inside, 2 to 3 wide from 800M, made contact near 500M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, made no progress thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Away well, raced in midfield on the outside, there to turn, made minor progress in straight.
Moderately away, positioned slightly behind midfield on the inside, raced tight near 1100M, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 300M, finished off evenly.
Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide on turn, unable to obtain clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, made some progress thereafter.
Average to begin, raced at rear on the outside, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to take a place, nearest on line.
Began well from gate 12, raced prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross near 850M, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began well from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, closed off well without threatening.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back, a bit closer on turn, made some progress in straight.
Commenced well, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, finished off very strongly, led close home.
Jumped well from the widest draw, raced prominently on the outside, a length back on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame, always held.
Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well in straight, just unable to hold off the winner close home.
Began fairly, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, no cover on turn, peaked 400M, weakened thereafter, eased final furlong.
Away with them, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run in straight.
Shifted out on jumping and made contact, raced prominently, 2 wide, slightly taken back near 600M, a length back on turn, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a nose.
Began fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Slightly slow out, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear running in straight.
Taken back from gate 10, raced 2 wide at rear, commenced move after passing 400M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to take a place, nearest on line.
Clean jump, raced prominently on the inside, there to turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first few final 50M.
Began well from the widest draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, showed some response in straight.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a neck in the middle stages, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened gradually close home. (Roarer.)
Made contact at start, raced 3 wide better than midfield, no cover on turn, closed off well but not quite able to challenge.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 6 to 7 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, showed some response in straight.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider turning in, made some progress early in straight, crowded 50M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, 2 lengths or so back on turn, finished off strongly to score, won by a nose.
Bustled along after the start, settled ahead of midfield, stayed on moderately under top weight, not beaten far by place-getters but no threat to runaway winner.
In a 3-wide spot chasing leaders, lay out after 500M, fought on same pace until no extra 200M.
Slow to begin, recovered to race in midfield, battled on same pace throughout the straight, never dangerous.
Reserved behind midfield, held up from early straight to near 200M, closed off well to claim 3rd near line, just missed 2nd spot.
Crowded for room at the start, taken across to a rearward spot rather than pursue a forward position, swung wide for home, ran on fairly and was never dangerous.
Driven forward from draw 11, caught wide no cover chasing leaders, fought on steadily in the straight, no match for winner, held on for 2nd at the line.
Drifted back to a rearward position, failed to run on when placed under pressure from 400M.
Up with early pace before emerging as leader passing 800M, headed by the fast finishing winner 200M out, faded closing stages, lost 3rd near line.
Dropped back to race at the rear, gave limited response after turning for home, never going the pace to challenge.
Began well from draw 1, tracked leaders, unable to quicken passing 400M, kept on same pace to the line. (Blood in trachea.)
Settled behind midfield, swung wide for home, stayed on without threatening leaders, inconvenienced 100M.
Pushed forward to sit outside leader, quickened up strongly nearing 200M, ran away to score.
At rear, along the rail, made ground strongly in the last 100M.
Settled in midfield, along the rail, made minor ground in the last 50M.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, found nothing in the last 100M. (Mucus in trachea and roarer)
At one-out one-back, 2 wide, pretty one paced.
At rear, along the rail, remained one paced to the line.
Raced in behind midfield, 2 wide, made minor ground only in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, swung wide on Straightening and close off strongly to the line in the last 100M.
Settled in behind the lead, along the rail, kept on going and won impressively by 2-1/4L.
Rolled forward and shared lead, 2 wide, nothing in the Straight.
Raced in midfield in the clear in the small field. Eased wider prior to straightening, dashed well passing 250m & looked only threat to leader, dug deep in final stages to score narrowly.
Raced at the tail of the small field. Eased wider around bend, made late ground to close to non-threatening third.
Had a nice run on leaders back for the majority. Moved over the heels of the leader just before straightening, peaked on run at the furlong mark & weakened a couple of lengths late.
Pushed forward to get uncontested lead. Travelled well on straightening, looked winner early in straight, challenged last 100m, tried hard but fell only a nose short.
Steadied after start & raced second last along rail. Moved off rail passing 400m, steadied & shifted back inwards just prior to straightening before finishing off only one paced to hold 4th.

Pushed forward, raced second away from rail but raced mostly at the leaders quarters. Came under pressure passing 600m, began yielding ground before straightening & weakened to be beaten 6L last. See report & riders comments.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, bumped early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.) (Blood in trachea.)

Made contact at start, raced better than midfield on the outside early, sent forward after passing 1300M, 2nd in the middle stages, challenged the leader on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.

Jumped with them, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out after passing 350M, bumped early in straight, hit the front 200M, kept on well to the line, won by 1-1/4L. (Mildly distressed post-race.)
Shifted out at start and bumped, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, 2 wide from 750M, same margin back on turn, finished off evenly.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, 8 lengths or so back, still 7 lengths back turning in, very wide into straight, passed some tired rivals in the run home.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, 8 lengths back, moved closer on turn, wide into straight, made minor progress in the run home.
Slightly slow out, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out 400M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off well to take a place, nearest finish.
Crowded on jumping, raced 2 wide behind midfield, commenced move 450M, very wide into straight, closed off well to make frame without threatening.
Average to begin, positioned in midfield on the outside, 4 lengths back, commenced move approaching 500M, closed off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Fast into stride, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival on turn, peaked and headed 200M, weakened thereafter.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, no clear run early in straight, cleared 100M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 10, raced 2 wide towards rear, hard ridden after passing 500M, very wide turning in, made some headway in straight.
Hard ridden forward, settled to race outside lead at 800M, kicked on until about 150M only.
Urged forward to lead from barrier one, weakened and headed near 200M.
Raced in one-out one-back position, swung wider entering into the straight, ran on okay to the line.
Bumped start, then settled in midfield, on rail, kept finding to the line to finish 2nd, but no match to winner.
Hampered after start, then asked but settled in behind midfield only, 2 wide, improved and hit the line fairly.
Taken back, at rear and 2 to 3 wide, saved minor ground in the straight.
Raced in about midfield, 3 wide but with cover, closed off steadily until crowded late.
Bumped start, sat worse than midfield, 2 wide, dashed home strongly from 150M, continued on to win nicely by an impressive 3L.
Eased back, raced at the rear along the rail, held from 200M to 150M, kept on thereafter.
Eased back, shifted to rail to be worse than midfield, continued one paced in the straight.
In box-seat, checked at 250M after getting run along the rail, run ended from thereon.
Prominent, left wide and no cover from about 800M, run ended near 200M

Pressed forward from a wide gate, travelled keenly outside race leader around first bend and early in back straight, remained in similar position into home straight, held every chance over 100 metres out but soon overhauled.
Settled at the back, commenced move rounding home bend swinging widest into home straight, ran on strongly down the centre of the track to be nearest at finish.
Jumped fairly, soon up with the pace and took up running on the rail passing the winning post the first time setting a slow pace, unable to sustain effort and swamped inside final 50 metres.
Began well from the one draw but soon taken back to just behind midfield in 7th, remained similar into straight hugging inside rail, ran on steadily under pressure without threatening,
Settled towards the rear from the widest gate, commenced move entering home straight swinging wide for a run, responded well under pressure inside final 200 metres to prevail near the line.
Began well from a wideish gate, obtained rails run in 3rd making first turn at the 1200 metres, snuck up the rail on final turn, held every chance until the 100 metres when found no extra.
Broke well settling off the pace some 3L back in 5th on the rail, came to challenge under pressure inside final 400 metres approaching final turn, ran on well to miss narrowly.
Began fairly, held up in rear on the rail, inconvenienced behind runner 550 metres out, remained in similar position into straight, produced good late impression inside final 100 metres.
Settled in rear of midfield, went wide into home straight, fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Settled in 4th over 2L off the slow pace, came under pressure rounding home bend, soon weakened upon straight.
Up with early pace, raced keenly when steadied to obtain cover, tracked leaders into straight, soon no extra and dropped away passing 200M to finish last.
Taken across behind runners, reserved near last in a fast run race, moved closer from 600M, stayed on final stages to take 3rd near line.
Sat behind midfield 6Ls off leader, kept on well turning into straight, got up for 2nd close home but couldn't get near to the winner.
Obtained a spot ahead of midfield, travelled 3-wide no cover throughout, couldn't go on from 400M, soon out of contention.
Not far off from leaders early stages, drifted back to midfield 1500M, had every chance turning home, fought on steadily to the line, just missed out on a placing.
Dropped back from wide draw, settled in last in a fast run race, swung widest into straight, made moderate gains but never seriously threatened.
Slow to begin, settled behind midfield in a fast run race, shifted out 250M to obtain clear running, closed off mildly.
Settled down just ahead of midfield, travelled well in a fast run race, moved up strongly and challenged for the lead near 200M, drew clear late stages.
Rushed forward from draw 12, led at fast pace from 1400M, stayed in contention until 200M, weakened towards the finish.
Tracked leaders on inside in a fast run race, battled on fairly turning for home, swamped by rivals passing 200M. (Mucus.)
Held up towards the rear 8Ls away from leader, swung wide into straight, failed to make progress.
Lost cover from 1400M, moved up to chase leader in a fast run race, vied for lead early straight, no extra final 150M. (Jockey : not suited by the quick tempo early and middle stages.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced towards rear on the inside, 6 lengths or so back on turn, made very good progress in straight to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Began smartly from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, angled out after passing 400M, finished off well to take a place.
Commenced well, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Taken back from gate 11, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Made contact on jumping, positioned 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Bumped start, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, 5 lengths back on turn, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 100M, kept on well to hold off the challengers.
Inconvenienced at start, raced towards rear on the outside, 8 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, wider turning in, made some headway early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Made contact on jumping, raced slightly better than midfield but trapped wide, moved closer after passing 800M, 2nd in the middle stages, kept on well early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, not enough room early in straight, ran on evenly thereafter.
Away well, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened thereafter.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, one-paced in the run home.
Slowly into stride, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, ran on evenly thereafter.
Moderately away from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on strongly in straight, easily scored, impressive debut.
Away well, raced towards rear on the outside, a bit closer on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began fairly, raced towards rear, 2 wide, similar position on turn, unable to obtain clear run until approaching 200M, kept on evenly to the line.
Moderately away, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 200M.
Away with them, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader rail, saved ground throughout, closed off well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Began well, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide from 500M, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run approaching 200M, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)

Crowded at start, settled towards the rear on the rail and waited with, saved ground turning in and snuck up to joint 3rd some 2L back on straightening, fought on well without threatening leading pair. (Questioned)

Settled wide in last few without cover after beginning from a wide gate, gained closer to joint 8th in midfield passing the 1200 metres, remained wide in midfield into straight, ran on dourly under strong pressure to be nearest at finish.
Settled in last few and waited with, angled out for a run approaching home turn, inconvenienced 300 metres out, produced good late impression closing stages.

Settled in midfield, became 6th some 3L back when pace slackened at the 1300 metres, drifted further back in 8th over 4L back rounding home bend, did not find much room much of the way in the run to the line.
Taken back to last from the widest gate, trailed the field to home straight, saved ground and snuck up to about 3L off pace turning in, kept on without threatening closing stages.
Pressed forward from a wide gate, obtained lead on the rail after first 300 metres, steadied up the pace briefly at the 1300 metres, led until finding no extra inside final 150 metres.
Settled not far off the pace on the rail from the one gate, became 4th some 2L back from the 1000 metres, in similar position turning for home, one-paced under pressure.

Slowly away, recovered under reminders to 3L 6th midfield on the rail, hampered by slackened pace at the 1300 metres, renewed effort into straight, quickened under pressure final 250 metres to hit the front final strides.

Went forward to prominent 3-wide first bend, settled just over 2L back in 4th most of the way in back straight, drifted back to 5th some 3L back onto home bend, came under pressure but soon dropped out after straightening.
Settled well behind from a wide gate, attempted to switch out for a run entering straight but soon baulked, obtained a run between runners over 250 metres out and finished off the race well.

Niggled at early, travelled 3-wide in midfield round first bend, carried backward 900 metres out dropping towards the rear, widest runner turning home, kept on under pressure before weakening inside final 100 metres.(Blood in trachea)

Travelled wide without cover in midfield, made swift headway from the 1350 metres to join race leader briefly before restrained to 2nd 1000 metres out, hit the front under pressure over 150 metres out, pipped at post.
Broke well, crossed by race leader on top of first bend, travelled 2-wide in 2nd until the 1300 metres when became 3rd, kept on in straight until dropping out tamely inside final 250 metres.
At rear, 2 wide, ran on reasonably for 3rd.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, battled on to the line and just beaten by a short head.
Raced next to the leader, 2 wide, kept on going and finished well to the line.
Sent forward and took lead, weakened in the last 150M.
Raced in front of midfield, along the rail, only one paced to the line.
Raced in front of midfield, wide no cover after 900M, only one paced after 150M.
At rear, along the rail, made some ground in the early part of the Straight, found no extra for final 150M.
At rear, along the rail, did not feature.
Showed early speed to race second. Moved to narrow lead near 200m before being joined by the winner near the 50m mark. Held third on line.
Raced just behind the leading pair after the start. Battled on well in final furlong & was only beaten 2.5L in midfield without ever looking the winner.
Raced in midfield along stand side rail early before coming under pressure before half-way & soon relegated to last. Weakened to distant last.
Showed some speed to race handy to the speed when nearer to the center of the track. Was not far from the lead all the way until over-run by first two who closed well. Beaten under 2L on the line.
Raced just worse than midfield after the start. Only held deficit in the final furlong & was never a real factor.

Didn't have early speed & raced second last after start. Shifted towards stand side rail passing 250m before being badly held up, shifted back inwards at 125m & closed well in final stages when race was all over.
Raced in midfield in early & middle stages. Picked a path between runners in final 200m before closing strongly to steal lead at 50m & go on to win.

Didn't have the early speed of others & soon raced third from last when along the stand side rail. Was crowded & steadied away from heels near the 200m when continuing back & never recovered thereafter. See report.
Showed customary early speed to lead a gradually shifted across to stand side rail. Joined & headed at the 200m mark before weakening out late.

Showed some speed to race handy to the speed. Continued very close to the lead all the way until over-run by the first two who closed strongly in concluding stages. (Substantial blood in trachea post-race).

Not bustled at start & drifted back to race worse than midfield. Continued in second half of the field at the 300m before picking runs off between runners & closing strongly in late stages to move to second in final 25m.

Showed some speed to race in midfield in early stages when close to stand side rail. Wasn't far behind at 175m mark before being badly held up behind the tiring leader & having nowhere to go pretty much all the way to line.
Didn't have early speed & raced at the tail. Never really improved & was third last.
Raced in midfield throughout. Could make no further headway in the final 150m & only held 3.5L deficit to the line.
Made contact at start, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, similar position on turn, made some headway in straight.
Bumped start, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, made no progress thereafter.
Began smartly from a wide draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, a length or so back on turn, kept on well in straight to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Jumped with them, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, 5 lengths back on turn, made some headway early in straight, not clear run near 100M, one-paced thereafter.
Away with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 450M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Out with rest, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, there to turn, made some progress in straight without threatening. (Blood in trachea.)

Bumped on jumping, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, not enough room and made contact with the rail 200M, eased final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Blood in trachea.)
Commenced well from gate 1, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, same position on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Made contact at start, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide towards rear, 4 lengths or so back on turn, made some headway early in straight, no extra final furlong.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 5-1/2L back on turn, unable to obtain clear run until 150M, made some progress thereafter.
Made contact at start, trapped wide in midfield early, slightly taken back in the middle stages, 4 lengths or so back on turn, finished off very strongly in straight, won by 3 lengths.
Taken back from gate 12, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run in straight, not able to test properly.
Jumped with them, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, ran on evenly to the line. (Lost left hind plate.)
Bumped start, left wide early then im-proved to sit outside lead by 1200M, one paced and emptied last 100M.
Bumped start, in about midfield along the rail, lay in in the straight, ran on okay.
Gradually forward, sat one-out one-back, continued on only fairly.
In midfield, 2 wide, pressured from Home Turn, not competitive.
Bumped start, slowly forward to take box-seat, faded passing 300M.
Settled prominently, wide and no cover however, kept finding to the line, had to settle for 2nd in a tight finish.
Sent forward, keen in the lead, ran on only caught by first few in final strides.
Crowded at start, in about midfield, wide but with cover, one paced home.
Steadied after start, at rear and 2 wide, closed off strongly to the line for a close finish. (See Incident Report)
Bumped start, in worse than midfield, wide but with cover, continued on nicely and claimed the prize in the final stride.
In worse than midfield, along the rail, no dash in the straight.
Raced in worse than midfield, 2 wide, im-proved steadily in the straight.
Taken back, at rear, wide but with cover, saved no ground.
Crowded at start, across to rail and at the rear, no progress in straight.

Pressed forward from the widest gate to travel up with the pace without cover, gained position outside race leader in 2nd coming onto home bend, hit the front 400 metres out and just held on to the line.
Taken back to last from a wide gate, trailed the field until gaining closer on the rail rounding home bend, saved ground turning in, fought on dourly to be nearest at finish
With leaders early before shifting back to 2L 5th passing the 1100 metres, slightly further back rounding home bend, kept on steadily to be nearest at finish.

Broke well from a middle gate to share early pace, gradually shifted one back to 3rd approaching home bend becoming 2L 4th shortly after, renewed effort upon straightening and fought on well without threatening.
Settled in forward of midfield in 6th, became midfield in 7th 3-wide coming onto home bend, went wider into straight, one-paced under pressure.
Taken back from a wide gate for rails run towards the rear, snuck up on the rail to within 2L of pace early in straight, unable to sustain effort inside final 200 metres
Settled 3-wide without cover in midfield, dropped towards the rear 4-wide coming onto home bend and widest in last few into straight, fought on under pressure without threatening.
Settled just worse than midfield, dropped further back 3-wide passing the 1000 metres, did not find much room the length of home straight.
Amongst the leaders early, restrained backward to midfield but remained 4-wide without cover while travelling keenly, dropped further back to last rounding home bend, never recovered.
Slightly slow out, soon recovered to midfield along the rails, closer up in about 3L 6th into straight, weakened under pressure inside final 300 metres.
Improved steadily from moderate start to take up running narrowly, led the field until headed 400 metres out, kept on well under pressure and tightened close to home.

Broke well travelling up with the pace early, gradually shifted back to within 2L of the pace on the rail in 4th or 3rd, snuck up home turn to hold good chance the length of straight but unable to draw level throughout.
Never better than midfield, ran home one-paced.
Taken back from a wide gate, saved ground turning for home, obtained clear passage 300 metres out, fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Shifted across behind runners, settled towards the rear, driven out near 400M but failed to finish off under top weight.
Held up behind midfield, shifted out from rail 500M, ran on mildly over final 300M.
Never far off from leaders, had difficulty obtaining clear running early straight, closed off well final 250M, just missed 2nd. (Jockey dropped whip 300M.)
Obtained a midfield position along the inside, continued on mildly passing 300M, well held by leaders towards the finish.
From draw 11 ridden in a more forward position chasing leader, no extra and weakened from 300M. (Jockey fined for weighing in 3lbs over.)
Settled down 2-wide in midfield, stayed on moderately final 300M, not reached leaders.
Held up behind midfield along the 3-path, driven along 500M but never going the pace to challenge.
From draw 12 crossed to the lead 1300M, quickened up the pace 600M, opened up a 2L gap mid-straight, kept on strongly to the line, never in any danger.
Chased leaders, wide no cover from 1100M, moved up to 2nd near 300M but not able to challenge winner, held on for 2nd just at the line.
From draw 14 restrained after the start, over-raced from 1400M and travelled wide no cover, moved up to chase leaders home turn, battled on to 150M then weakened.
Chased leaders along the rail, not going the pace to challenge winner in the straight, kept on steadily and held 3rd until final few strides.
Restrained from wide draw, waited with at the rear, took time to get going, did best work final 200M down outside of track.
Drifted back to race towards the rear, failed to quicken in the straight, never involved.
Slow to begin, raced as the back-marker early stages before moving up 800M, very wide into straight, stayed on mildly towards the finish.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, moved closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, sat right behind the leader on rail, easy run to turn, hard ridden 300M, took the lead approaching 200M, ran on well to hold off the challengers.
Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out near 650M, bumped near 450M, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching 200M, made minor progress thereafter.
Average break, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out after passing 500M, made minor progress in straight.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, angled out after passing 650M, finished off evenly.
Taken back from gate 12, raced at tail, 8 lengths or so back, improved on turn, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to take a place, nearest on line.
Taken back from gate 13, raced at rear on the outside, moved closer on turn, very wide into straight, made minor progress in the run home.
Jumped with them, positioned in midfield on inner, 2 wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Away with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, commenced move 700M, very wide turning in, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Began smartly from the widest draw, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, same position on turn, peaked early in straight, kept on evenly to the line.
Slowly away, raced at rear on the inside, moved closer along the rail on turn, made some progress early in straight, not enough room near 100M, eased thereafter.
Moderately away from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed approaching 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move 650M, 4 wide turning in, bumped early in straight, closed off well to take 2nd, always held.
Away well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide after passing 600M, showed limited response early in straight, not clear run near 300M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Clean jump, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
Crowded on jumping, raced at rear on the outside, 6 lengths back on turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, angled out 450M, failed to close off in straight.
Taken back from gate 10, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, similar position on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Began very awkwardly, recovered to race slightly behind midfield on the inside, 4 lengths back, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to take a place.
Began well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, same position on turn, ridden after passing 300M, hit the front 50M, won by 1-1/4L.
Crowded on jumping, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off well without threatening.
Began well, raced in midfield on inner, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Commenced well, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, kept on evenly in straight.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Bumped start, taken back to race at tail, 7 lengths or so back, still last turning in, taken wide in straight and made good progress to be nearest on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide at rear, wider turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 2 wide better than midfield, angled out approaching 450M, finished off evenly.
Taken back ta race towards rear, 7 lengths or so back, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
Slowly away, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground to turn, bumped early in straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, no clear run early in straight, made very good progress final 200M to be nearest on line.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 2 wide in midfield, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight.
Clean jump, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, travelled comfortably throughout, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
Jumped well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, showed good response early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Away with them, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, dropped towards rear in the middle stages, 6 lengths or so back on turn, very wide into straight, one-paced in the run home.
Bumped start, positioned 5 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 7 lengths back on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 150M, made some progress thereafter.
Bumped start, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, a length back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from the widest draw, tracked leaders on the outside, very wide turning in, weakened early in straight, eased final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Hard ridden from second widest barrier to the take lead after first corner when racing wide. Was joined & shared the lead from 700m, regained outright lead at 300m, weakened last 150m after doing too much early. See report.
Raced wide in midfield around first bend before being steadied & racing two wide with cover from the 850m. Finished off steadily to midfield but was never a threat.

Crowded at start before drifting back and raced three wide and third last for the majority. Taken widest on cornering when still rearward and made no real headway, only maintaining deficit to the line.
Had a nice run in midfield away from rail. Moved up to take lead at passing the 200m mark & had enough in hand to win by a neck.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Stayed along the inside on straightening when about 3L behind before weakening a length in the run to the line.

Didn't have the speed of others & raced second last along the rail. Moved away from the rail just before straightening, shifted out wider into clear running near 200m before closing strongly late, only beaten half length.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Moved into clear running on straightening before closing strongly between runners in the final 150m to charge to fast finishing second late.

Hard ridden to challenge for lead but couldn't hold out rival. Maintained the rail & improved to share lead from 700m when racing very keenly. Was beaten on straightening & weakened badly, last. Rider questioned, see report.
Drifted back from widest gate & raced last. Came under hard ridding before the 400m mark & did nothing in the straight. Well beaten second last.
Got back to race third last when between runners. Shifted to be the second widest on straightening when still near the back before making some late ground down the outside to be fourth.
Began fast & had lead momentarily before being steadied at first bend & racing third behind two fast leaders. Was within a length of the lead at the 200m mark before being over-run by fast closers.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide after 650M, swung wide on Straightening, pretty one paced.
At rear, 2 wide, nothing in the Straight.
Raced behind the lead, along the rail, kept on going but just beaten by the winner a short head.
Lost significant ground at the start, at rear, did not feature. Barrier trial for barrier manners.
Raced next to the leader, 2 wide, weakened in the last 50M.
Sent forward, wide no cover, stayed on and closed off well to the line. (See incident report)
Raced in front of midfield, 2 wide, only made some ground in the last 100M.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, kept on going for 4th.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, lost ground in the Straight.
At rear, along the rail, showed strong dash in the last 200M, hampered passing 150M but still made ground and scored by a short head.

Didn't begin fast but made up some ground along the inside & raced in midfield in middle stages. Moved away from the rail just before cornering, was finishing off one paced before awkward near heels at 75m, even late.

Was trapped racing wide in midfield before being left without cover from the 800m. Entered last section 5.5L from the lead but could finish only one paced in last furlong after covering additional ground in middle stages.

Steadied from outside gate & taken back to a clear last. Stayed nearer to the inside on cornering when a long way from the lead before making up a few lengths but only passing a couple of tiring rivals. Never involved.

Steadied at first bend & raced just worse than midfield between runners. Eased wider entering last section when 6L from lead, second widest on straightening before finishing strongly to take lead inside final 50m & win softly.

Ridden forward early when very wide at first bend before being steadied & taken back to race worse than midfield from the 900m. Shunted wider passing 500m, was the widest on cornering before weakening out in final 150m.
Stumbled at the start but recovered to get nice run 1,1 in middle stages. Straightened in third position when about 4L from run-away leader but could only maintain deficit to the line.
Drifted back to race third last on the rail. Moved away from the rail just before cornering when 7.5L behind before passing a couple in the final stages when running onto midfield.

Showed customary early speed to lead. Set fast mid-race fractions, straightened with a 3L lead, held lead until over-run by winner inside final 50m. Very brave to hold second given speed set in front.
Raced in midfield between runners throughout. Entered last section 5.5L from lead before finishing off steadily to be fourth without threatening.
Raced forth along the rail in early & middle stages. Began yielding ground from the 450m mark before weakening badly in the straight to be distant last.
Got back to race second last away from rail. Eased wider just before cornering when just 8L from the lead before finishing strongly in final furlong to just miss second on the wire.

Pushed forward but couldn't go the early speed of the leader. Raced second, came under hard riding to hold position near the 500m, straightened in second when about 3L from the lead before weakening out quickly last 150m.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, wider turning in, finished off evenly.
