Made contact on jumping, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, same position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began awkwardly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, closed off well to take a place.
Made contact on jumping, raced at rear on the outside early, moved closer after passing 800M, 3 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Began well from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, easy run to turn, hit the front 150M, kept on very well to the line.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, dropped towards rear in the middle stages, failed to make any progress in straight.
Taken back from gate 11, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths or so back, 3 wide from 650M, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out 650M, very wide into straight, finished off well to be nearest on line.
Began awkwardly and bumped, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground throughout, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, enjoyed the easy lead to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, ran on evenly to take 2nd.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, saved ground on turn, made little progress in straight.
Jumped well, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, commenced move after passing 500M, kept on well in straight to make frame without threatening.
Prominent, wide and no cover from near 800M, stayed on one paced.
Slow out and lost ground, recovered in worse than midfield, on rail, dashed early before weakening passing 150M.
Jumped smartly before taken back, sat worse than midfield, wide but with cover, ran home okay.
Sent forward, took rail and led, weakened and headed approaching 100M.
Jumped okay, steadied to find cover in front of midfield but 3 wide, bumped near 250M, no progress in the straight.
Hard ridden, settled one-out one-back po-sition, was one paced in the straight.
Eased back, at rear 2 wide, made ground and ran home strongly to finish 2nd.
Began only fairly, settled midfield along the rail, kicked on before flattened inside final 100M.
Settled box-seat, about 1-1/2L off, kicked away near 125M, ran on to win by 3/4L.
Bumped start, sat worse than midfield, 2 wide, ran on without threatening.
Jumped well, prominent and wide until shifted to outside lead after 800M, didn't close off. (See Incident Report)
Bumped start, in about midfield, 2 wide, bumped 250M, ran on only one paced.

Quickly obtained rails run just worse than midfield after moderate start, saved ground on the rail turning for home, baulked for a run between 200 and 100 metres, made no further impression closing stages.

Jumped awkwardly losing ground, settled in midfield on the rail, closer to pace when tempo steadied inside the 800 metres, some 2L back rounding home bend and into straight, quickened well under pressure to hold every chance.

Began well from the one draw, gradually settled two back in 4th drifting further off the pace briefly when race leader pulled away early in back straight, some 2L back in 5th home bend and wider into straight, kept on same pace.

Soon took lead obtaining rails run passing the winning post the first time, travelled keenly in front with quick tempo until settling better from the 800 metres, led the field until headed over 200 metres out.
Travelled well back after beginning from the widest gate, saved ground turning for home, improving when baulked for a run between 200 and 100 metres, made no further impression stages.

Travelled forward in wide after beginning from a poor gate, obtained cover towards the rear coming onto first bend 1300 metres out, commenced move passing the 550 metres running widest into straight, finished off the race well.
Steadied at the start settling in last few on the rail, commenced move at the 400 metres but could only fight on steadily in straight without threatening.

Began nicely settling some 4L back in 5th in early quick tempo, closer when pace steadied 800 metres out, commenced move 3-wide around home bend, sustained effort from wider into straight and led over 200 metres out.

Settled in last few from a wide gate and waited with, commenced move 3-wide at the 450 metres, one of the widest at the back turning for home, made significant progress down the centre of the track and did best work late.

Crowded at start but pressed on to obtain prominent position just off the pace in 3rd on the rail despite minor interference, trailed the leader into straight and unable to sustain effort inside final 100 metres.
Broke well from a wide gate, settled 2-wide in midfield 7th before commenced move 3-wide home bend, wider into straight and fought on steadily without threatening.

Pressed forward from a wide gate as per alleged instruction obtaining one back 2-wide position coming onto first bend, gained slightly closer around home bend but dropped away quickly inside final 250 metres.
Driven forward and crossed to the rail, tracked leader from 900M, fought on passing 300M and stayed in contention until giving way closing stages.
Restrained to race towards the rear, 3-wide throughout, failed to pick up pace passing 400M, never dangerous.
Lost ground at the start, ridden forward to chase leader, weakened soon after straightening, dropped out to last.
Taken back to a rearward spot after the start, stayed on fairly over final 300M, never a threat to leaders.
Away quickly, sat behind leaders, raced keenly 600M, kept on same pace to the line, never able to challenge.
Never far off from leaders, taken wider and no cover after 700M, moved up to challenge top of straight, kept on over final 200M, lost 3rd near line.
Held up behind midfield along the 2-path, switched wide to challenge on straightening, stayed on without threatening leaders.
Ridden forward from draw 12, led from 900M, continued on well in the straight only to be caught by fast finishing winner late.
Restrained to race behind midfield, 3-wide throughout, ran on well down outside passing 300M, got 3rd close home.
From wide draw heavily restrained to last after the jump, 6-7Ls behind leader home turn, gave limited response final 300M. Never threatened.
Jumped on terms from draw 1, settled down midfield 4Ls back, couldn't go on passing 300M, weakened towards the finish.
Not hurried after the start, reserved towards the rear in a 3-wide spot, swung home widest, finished off strongly to lead close home.
Crowded start, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 450M, made no progress in straight.
Jumped well from gate 12, sent forward to take the lead, found rail near 1100M, led by 3/4L on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed approaching 150M, weakened thereafter.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, bumped early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield early, found rail near 900M, angled out 500M, kept on evenly in straight.

Out with rest, raced prominently on the outside early, slightly taken back after passing 1100M, found a 2 wide spot near 950M, 3 lengths back on turn, angled out after passing 500M, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Bumped on jumping, positioned 2 wide, 1-1/2L back, there to turn, bumped and peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back to race 2 wide at rear, wider after passing 500M, 7 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, peaked on turn, eased final 300M. (Bled.) (Minor abrasions inside the right hock.)
Slowly away, raced at tail, 9 lengths back, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, made some headway early in straight, blocked final 100M.

Jumped with them, unable to slot in, trapped very wide, a length or so back, moved a bit closer after passing 1150M, 2nd on turn, 2 wide, kept on well in straight to take a place, no threat to the winner.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, 8 lengths back on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, peaked on turn, weakened gradually in straight.
Began well, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, angled out approaching 500M, showed good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on strongly to the line, won by 3 lengths.
Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 6 lengths or so back on turn, showed some response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Chased leaders in a fast run race, moved up to challenge 300M, briefly led 100M out, caught by winner close home.
Settled ahead of midfield, caught wide no cover throughout from draw 13, kept on same pace early straight, never able to challenge leaders.
Not hurried after the start, taken across to race in midfield along the inside, took a while to get going in the straight, did best work final 200M, got up close home.
Reserved behind midfield, gave good response when driven out nearing 300M, just missed out on 2nd spot.
Settled down 3-wide in mid-division, ran on without posing much threat to leaders in the straight.
From draw 14 dropped back to last 8-9Ls off the pace, held up for clear running after 200M and again over final stages. Inconclusive run.
Began awkwardly, recovered to race in midfield, responded mildly early straight, flattened over final 150M.
Moved up to chase leader, battled on same pace turning for home, swamped by rivals over final 200M.
Chased leaders on inside, driven out 400M but not going the pace to challenge, faded final stages.
Restrained to race near last, responded fairly passing 400M, not reach leaders.
Held up behind midfield, swung wide 600M, stayed on only fairly from 400M, never troubled leaders.
Soon driven to lead, led at fast pace, caught near 100M, run ended and faded to 4th final stages.
Taken back to a rearward spot, raced keenly 1100M, switched widest 550M, made no progress on straightening.
Waited with near the rear, 6Ls to make up top of straight, stayed on mildly passing 300M, did best work late.
At rear, along the rail, bumped at 400M, one paced thereafter.
Raced in midfield, wide but with cover, pretty one paced. (See incident report)
At rear, 2 wide, made minor ground in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, nothing in the Straight.
Midfield initially, difficult to settle after the 1200M and sent forward, gave ground abruptly in the Straight. Finished tailed out. Must trial.
At rear, along the rail after 800M, saved ground but checked near 300M, closed off okay in the last 150M.
Sent forward, 2 wide, made ground steadily and just caught the lead and won by a neck.
Raced in front of midfield, wide but with cover, weakened after passing 200M. (Blood in trachea)
Raced in midfield, along the rail, raced tight after the 200M and unable to improve to the line.
Raced in the lead, wide no cover, swung widest on straightening, ran on nicely to the line.
At rear, 2 wide, nothing in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, saved ground and showed strong dash in the last 50M.
Taken back and at rear, 3 wide but with cover, only one paced to the line.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail after 1000M, stayed on to finish 2nd.

Hard ridden from the outside gate & worked very hard when racing wide in the first 400m until shifting to be two wide without cover in third place. Was hard ridden on straightening when about 3L behind before weakening out.
Raced just behind the leaders when away from the rail throughout. Raced tight & bumped at the 400m when 4L from the lead before weakening out poorly in the last section to beaten a big margin.

Raced just worse than midfield along the rail. Was ridden along when racing awkward around bend. Was hard ridden on straightening when over 6L from lead before shifting outwards mid-straight & making up a length to midfield.

Raced rearward & shared last place until passing the three hampered horses after 800m mark. Was last of the main bunch on straightening when 7.5L from lead before passing a few rivals when running onto midfield, no threat.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Raced tight entering last section when 4.5L from the lead before finishing off only steadily along the rail to midfield in final stages.

Showed good speed at the start & went through to lead after the first 75m. Continued in the lead, held 1L advantage on straightening before being passed by winner nearing 250m, battled on ok but caught for third on line.

Raced three deep in midfield throughout. Momentarily got some cover after the 800m but was again left without cover from the 700m. Entered last section 4L form the lead before finishing off steadily to hold third.

Pushed forward, raced outside the leader before racing on leaders back from 850m. Moved up to take lead near the 250m before continuing on to win with something in hand after being allowed to cruise to the line in final 50m.

Had no early speed & raced at the tail after start. Improved after the 800m when avoiding incident, was the widest on straightening when 6.5L behind before closing strongly down the outside to move to second inside last 75m.

Racing wide with cover, just worse than midfield. Pushed wider on the track near the 800m when racing incident occurred. Was about 6L behind on straightening before emptying out near 300m mark & weakening poorly thereafter.
Was racing third last away from the rail before being badly hampered & taken very wide on the track near the 800m & effectively taken out of the race. Complete forget run.
Was racing 4th from last away from the rail before being badly hampered & effectively taken out of the race near the 800m mark. Never in contention after the incident & complete forget run.
Was racing in midfield between runners before being badly checked, taken wide & losing significant ground just before the 800m mark. Lost all chances due to the incident & was a complete forget run.

Raced midfield away from the rail before hanging outwards across heels & being severely checked at the 900m & losing ground. Continued in midfield between runners after the incident before failing to finish off (must trial).
Shifted out at start and made contact, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead 350M, peaked and headed 150M, ran on evenly to take a place.
Taken back from gate 1, raced slightly behind midfield on the middle track, no clear run until passing 300M, weakened final furlong. (Rider dropped whip near 150M.)
Began smartly from gate 12, positioned a length behind the leader on the stands' rail, hard ridden after passing 300M, kept on well to make frame, always held.
Commenced well, positioned a length behind the leader, 2 away from the stands' rail, hard ridden after passing 250M, hit the front approaching 150M, kept on very well to the line and scored.
Moderately away, raced 2 to 3 lengths behind the leader on the middle track, hard ridden 300M, only showed limited response, weakened final 100M.
Away with them, raced in midfield, nearer to the middle track, moved a bit closer in the middle stages, peaked on run 300M, weakened gradually final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Clean jump, in touch in midfield on the middle track, hard ridden 350M, peaked 200M, weakened thereafter.
Inconvenienced at start, sent forward to take the lead, peaked and headed 350M, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the stands' side, unable to obtain clear run until approaching 200M, finished off well to take 2nd, always held.
Began awkwardly, raced towards rear on the stands' rail, failed to make any progress final 400M.
Reared as stalls opened and started very slowly, raced at rear throughout, never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced in midfield, 3 away from the stands' rail, unable to obtain clear run until 200M, finished off evenly.
Forward to lead, maintained advantage home to win by 3/4L.
Front of midfield, no cover, faded on straightening. Not competitive, must trial.
Lost ground at start, sat behind midfield, wide with cover, no progress.
Raced in midfield, along the rail, ran on nicely in the straight to finish 2nd.
Jumped okay, asked forward, took box-seat, held until 200M, ran on well thereafter.
Sat behind midfield, 2 wide, improved steadily.
Began awkwardly, at rear, wide with cover, im-proved and closed off okay.
At rear, made turns 2 wide, saved minor ground.
Bumped start, ridden forward to sit outside lead, emptied at 150M.
Bumped start, sat front of midfield, 2 wide, lost ground gradually.
Bumped start, only sat worse than midfield, on rail, ran on without threatening.

Shared lead at start, shifted back to third passing the 1400m. Raced 2L off the lead following a strong tempo nearing corner, renewed effort in straight despite tight run along rail, peaked 150m, found no extra last 100m.
Crowded at start, travelled just better than midfield in 5th or 4th, looked beaten when jostled between runners and dropped away early in straight.

Settled one from last from a wide gate some 6L off the pace on the rail, further away from lead when pace quickened from approaching home bend shifting 4-wide, ran on well from last into straight down the centre of the track.
Vied for lead out wide early stages hitting the front briefly passing the 1300 metres, came under pressure in 2nd into straight but folded up quickly inside final 200 metres.

Crowded at start settling just off the pace on the rail, further off the lead in the strong tempo from the 1300 metres, switched out off heels for a run 400 metres out and hit the front at the 300 metres, caught 100 metres out.

Driven to slender lead from the one draw, narrowly headed passing the 1500 metres before re-gaining advantage in strong pace at the 1200 metres, held lead until finding no extra inside final 300 metres.
Broke well from a wide gate and soon taken to last few, obtained clear passage upon straightening, ran on well under pressure near the centre of the track but just failed to get up on line.
Slowly away and taken across to the rail in the tail-end, commenced move from over 600 metres out, produced good impression on the inside from some 5L back into straight, did best work late.

Moderate start from a moderate gate, ridden forward to midfield in 6th, 3-wide rounding home bend and in similar position into straight, quickened under pressure to hold some chance early on but had no more to give 150m out.

Settled just worse than midfield on the rail, slightly further behind in the strong tempo from approaching home bend, snuck back up closer making final turn, quickened well between runners to prevail close to post.
Pressed forward from a wide gate, soon taken back for cover reaching 8th about 5L off the speed 3-wide without cover, similar rounding home bend and wider into straight, ran home one-paced.
Jumped best, tracked leader on inside, launched a strong challenge passing 250M, quickened up well under top weight to lead 50M out.
Held up in midfield along the fence, ran on mildly over final 300M without troubling first two, just missed out on 3rd spot.
Restrained in a position behind midfield, made good progress passing 400M to go 3rd mid-straight, run ended 100M out, lost 2 places near line.
In mid-division early stages, shuffled back to near last home turn, stayed on final 400M without threatening.
Began fairly, waited with at the rear, held up for clear running early straight, ran on well final 250M, got up 3rd close home.
Jumped on terms from draw 1, settled towards the rear along inside, held up 400M-200M but failed to make much progress over final stages.
Never far off from leaders, awkwardly placed behind two weakening rivals early straight, ran on fairly final 200M.
Settled down in midfield along the 3-path, failed to pick up speed when asked passing 400M, soon beaten.
Went forward tracking leader 2-wide, quickly beaten passing 350M, weakened towards the line.
Chased leaders, travelled 3-wide no cover during the race, gave ground from 300M, eased closing stages.
Driven forward, crossed to race along the fence nearing 800M, responded well on straightening, caught by winner 50M from home.
Began awkwardly, reserved near last, closed off moderately over final 300M, held ground late stages.
Slowly away, raced at tail, 10 lengths back, moved a bit closer on turn, made some headway in straight.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 500M, no daylight early in straight, one-paced thereafter.

Lifted front feet on jumping and away tardily, recovered to take the lead, led by 1/2L in the middle stages, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 50M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Commenced well, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back early, found rail near 800M, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside, 6 lengths or so back, 2 wide on turn, taken wide in straight and finished off strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Commenced well, raced prominently but trapped very wide early, slightly taken back 950M, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths back in the middle stages, hard ridden 300M, finished off strongly to score.
Moderately away, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, no cover throughout, weakened early in straight when hard run took toll.
Average to begin, raced in 2nd, 1/2L back, same position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Jumped well from the widest draw, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, wider turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame, not quite able to challenge.
Away with them, raced in midfield on the outside, similar position on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Crowded on jumping, raced towards rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back on turn, bumped 300M, made no progress thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, angled out after passing 700M, same margin back on turn, closed off well to take a place.

Bumped start, raced at rear on the outside, 9 lengths or so back, still 7 lengths back turning in, bumped early in straight, made good progress thereafter to be nearest on line, no threat to the first few.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 600M, very wide into straight, made very good progress to be nearest on line.

Bumped start, positioned in midfield on the outside, improved after passing 700M, took the lead 650M, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)

Jumped well, trapped very wide early, taken back after passing 1300M, raced 4 wide behind midfield in the middle stages, closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M. (Mucus in trachea.) (See Racing Incidents.)
Commenced well, unable to slot in, trapped 3 wide, 2 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Began only fairly, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, improved on turn, closed off well to take 2nd.
Away well, raced prominently but 3 wide, 2 wide from 1050M, a length back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.

Shifted in at start and bumped, raced prominently on the outside, took the lead 1150M, found rail approaching 900M, headed 650M, 2nd turning in, kept on well early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M. (Roarer.) (Mucus.)
Bumped start, raced at rear on the outside, a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Quickly away, took the early lead, headed and slightly taken back 1150M, 2-1/2L back in the middle stages, finished off well to take a place without threatening the first two.
Began well from gate 1, raced prominently on the inside early, found cover near 900M, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M. (Irregular heart rhythm.)
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, made no progress thereafter.
Taken back from gate 10, raced 2 wide at rear, angled out 600M, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, one-paced thereafter.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide from 600M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, made no progress thereafter.
Out with rest, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on rail, same position on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off evenly.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, commenced to travel keenly near 700M, hung out and dropped towards rear 600M, showed nothing in straight.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Moderately away, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, there to turn, angled out after passing 450M, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Began very awkwardly and made contact, raced 2 wide towards rear, badly hampered and carried wider near 650M, 9 lengths back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Began only fairly from gate 1, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, finished off evenly.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away, raced behind midfield on the outside, a bit closer on turn, made good progress in straight to take a place, nearest finish.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably in the middle stages, kept on very well in straight to hold off the challengers.
Slightly slow out, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 550M, 7 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight.
Made contact at start, raced better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths or so back on turn, finished off well to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Moderately away from the widest draw, raced in 2nd, a length back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped fairly, wide in midfield early before shifting back to race in last few, widest runner turning in and soon dropped out.

Travelled wide in first few after beginning from a wide gate, obtained 2-wide position in 2nd passing the 1100 metres, headed for 2nd into straight, one-paced under pressure when lost 3rd inside final 200 metres.

Pressed forward a wide gate settling 3-wide without cover 6th over 2L back in back straight, commenced move from 800 metres reaching 3rd on the bend and drawing level on straightening, gained upper hand close to home.
Soon dropped to last few despite ridden along, produced good late impression under pressure in the run to the line.
Broke well settling within striking distance in 5th or 4th, in similar position into straight, faded under pressure inside final 200 metres.
Broke well but soon taken back to wide in midfield, produced modest late impression under pressure inside final 250 metres.
Settled well behind and waited with, 4-wide rounding home bend and into straight, responded strongly inside final 250 metres but the post came too soon.
Driven forward to reach midfield at stables bend, renewed pressure passing 800 metres and given strong reminders rounding final bend, found nothing.
Prominent with rails run most of the way, faded inside final 200 metres.
Settled at the back from widest gate, made mid-race move from 950 metres to reach within 3L of pace in joint 4th 4-wide approaching final turn, unable to sustain and folded up quickly in straight.
Broke well and soon taken back to worse than midfield, came under pressure rounding final bend and weakened steadily into straight. (Tactic questioned)

Broke well on from low draw, settled some 2L back in 4th on the rail before dropping back in back straight, behind runners on the rail rounding home bend before coming under pressure, fought on steadily without threatening.
Moderate start, soon dropped to midfield despite niggled at early, drifted further back in back straight to last few onto home bend, made no further impression.
Ridden forward to lead from a wide gate, obtained rails run inside 1100 metres and steadied up pace around home bend, held lead under pressure until overhauled close to home.
Raced behind the lead, along the rail, weakened after passing 150M. (Blood in trachea)
Sent forward, 2 wide, lost ground after passing 250M.
Very slow to jump, at rear, made minor ground only.
Settled in midfield, along the rail, made some ground and ran on fairly for 4th.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, made ground steadily to the line.
Sent forward and took lead, along the rail, ran on and scored by 1-1/2L.
Raced behind the lead, 2 wide, made minor ground in the Straight.
Raced in behind midfield, wide but with cover, made no ground in the Straight.
At rear, 2 wide, never a factor.
At rear, along the rail, swung wide on Straightening, closed off strongly in the last 150M.
Raced in behind midfield, wide but with cover, did not feature. (Blood in trachea)
Raced behind the lead, wide no cover, stayed on and finished 3rd.
Pushed forward to lead. Joined & headed in the lead near the 700m, raced second, but only a head behind until digging deep to regain the lead inside the final 75m to hold neck advantage on line.
Taken back to the tail. Shared last place in middle stages before dropping away from the 550m mark. Weakened badly to be distant last.

Raced second last early before sharing last place from about half-way. Shifted to be the widest on cornering before making steady progress in final furlong to be in a bunch of horses in a line of 5 behind the first two.

Pushed forward & raced outside the leader before being headed & crossed near the 600m & racing third. Couldn't go with the first two who booted well clear soon after straightening, battled hard in final stages, just behind.

Steadied, shifted down to rail before making up ground along the inside to racing third on rail. Stayed along rail on straightening when under 3L from lead, just caught for third late, finished in a bunch just behind first 2.

Got position 1,1, but raced very keenly & shifted three wide near the 900m before improving position to take the lead near 700m. Held narrow lead on straightening, rejoined at the 75m & over-powered late to be beaten a neck.

Raced in midfield before improving position slightly when racing between runners passing half-way. Straightened about 3L behind, made continual steady ground, just getting his head out for 3rd in a bunch behind the first two.

Raced wide early before settling third last away from rail, slightly wide with cover back straight, had no cover from the 600m. Finished off steadily to be in a bunch behind first two & not beaten far despite 2nd last.
Shifted out at start and bumped, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, wider turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began fairly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, a bit closer on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 150M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Fast into stride, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back, very wide turning in, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away, raced prominently, 2 wide, carried wider after passing 600M, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Crowded start, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 450M, no clear run until approaching 200M, finished off evenly.
Commenced well from gate 1, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, easy run to turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 250M, finished off strongly to score by a nose.
Moderately away from a wide draw, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, very wide into straight, made no impression in the run home.
Moderately away from a tricky gate, raced in midfield on the outside, a bit closer on turn, peaked 450M, weakened final 250M.
Shifted in at start and bumped, positioned slightly behind midfield on the inside, 4 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, found rail near 700M, challenged by rivals turning in, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final 250M.

Away well, raced prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross near 700M, 2 wide from 600M, challenged the leader turning in, took the lead early in straight, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner on line.
Sat front of midfield, 2 wide, run ended approaching 200M.
Jumped awkward, consequently at rear, on rail, found nothing in the straight.
Taken back, raced close to rear, wide but with cover, ran on in the straight.
Settled in midfield, 2 wide, continued on okay to the line.
Sent forward, settled to race in box-seat, continued on nicely to win by 1-1/2L.
Lost ground at start, in worse than midfield, wide no cover from 700M, no dash.
In about midfield, along the rail, closed off well to finish 2nd. (See Incident Report)
Forward, raced 1-1/2L off and outside lead, ran on until weakened inside final 150M.
Bumped start, in worse than midfield, on rail, didn't close off.
In behind midfield, 2 wide, not competitive in the straight.
Forward, took rail and led after 800M, weakened and headed near 150M.
Soon took up running setting a standard pace, led until folded up quickly inside final 300 metres.
Improved steadily round first bend from a middle draw, settled one-out-one-back in 3rd in back straight, hit the front under pressure briefly 200 metres out, unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Settled in midfield on the rail after beginning from the one draw, commenced move entering home straight, angled out for a run 300 metres out, fought on steadily without threatening.

Pressed forward from a wide gate circling the field very wide round first bend, disputed lead in back straight and around home bend holding some chance early in straight, unable to sustain effort inside final 200 metres.
Always well behind and never seen with a chance.

Ridden positively from second widest gate, very wide rounding first bend before settling 5th. Continued wide into the back straight when having no cover, dropped out of contention soon after straightening. (Distressed).
Broke well, travelled just off the pace on the rail, baulked until switched out over 200 metres out, no further impression.
Travelled 3-wide just worse than midfield, widest runner into home straight when coming under pressure, fought on steadily without threatening.
Broke well but soon taken back, tightened at 1100 metres before niggling along in worse than midfield, switched wide into home straight, fought on steadily under pressure without threatening.

Settled towards the rear and waited with, travelled strongly in similar position in back straight, snuck up on rails rounding final turn, quickened inside 300 metres to assert authority shortly after.

Prominent after start before steadying to get position behind two leaders. Drifted a pair further back to midfield in middle stages when between horses. Came under pressure on straightening, weakened badly final furlong.
Always in last few and never seen with a chance.
Settled in rear from a wide gate, commenced move entering straight, made modest impression early but inconvenienced inside 200 metres, no further impression.
Chased leaders, 3-wide without cover throughout, fought on well in straight and stayed in contention until fading late stages.
Unable to slot in from draw 11, caught wide no cover throughout and taken wider home turn, soon beaten turning into straight.
Near the rear early stages, moved closer to midfield making the turn for home, ran on mildly final 300M but not posing much threat to leaders, tight for room final stages.
Sent forward and vied for lead on inside, kept on soundly from 400M, lost lead near 100M but managed to hold on for 2nd.
Tracked leaders on inside, travelled strongly into straight, had no clear run behind leader until 200M, quickened well when the gap came, won going away at the end.
Never far off from leaders, raced 3-wide throughout, challenged for the lead turning home, battled on to hold 3rd.
Dropped back to race near the rear, gave limited response passing 400M, not reach contention.
Driven forward, vied for lead on outside, fought on well early straight, holding his position until no extra final 150M.
Restrained to race at the rear after jumping from the widest draw, failed to make any progress in the straight. Soundly beaten.
Settled behind midfield along the 3-path, kept on fairly from 400M, not able to challenge leaders.
Jumped fairly, restrained in midfield, driven out 450M, ran on steadily to take 4th late.
Chased leaders 2-wide, came under pressure 700M, weakened top of the straight and didn't finish the race off. (Jockey : didn't appreciate racing amongst horses.)
Clean jump, tracked leaders on the outside early, took the lead 1200M, led by a length in the middle stages, challenged by rival turning in, kept on well in straight to hold off the challengers.
Began smartly from gate 1, took the early lead, headed 1200M, 2nd in the middle stages, challenged the leader turning in, peaked on run 300M, ran on evenly to take a place.
Moderately away, raced in 3rd, 2 wide, 2 lengths back on turn, finished off well to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Average break, raced 2 wide towards rear, 7 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Out with rest, raced towards rear on the outside, dropped to last 1000M, detached on turn, eased final 400M.
Taken back from gate 10, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, 8 lengths back on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Out in line, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 lengths back, there to turn, closed off well to make frame, nearest finish. (Lost left front plate shortly after the start.)
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the inside, crowded shortly after entering the back straight, saved ground on turn, showed no response in straight.
Away with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, commenced move 500M, made some headway in straight. (Lame left front leg.)
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced 3 wide in midfield, found a 2 wide spot after entering the back straight, 4 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, peaked early in straight, kept on evenly to 75M, eased thereafter.
Taken back from gate 12, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
Began well from the widest draw, raced in midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, weakened early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 350M, finished off evenly.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced behind midfield on the outside, hard ridden 400M, very wide into straight, made minor progress in the run home.
Slightly slow out, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths back, similar position on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide better than midfield, wider turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from gate 9, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, closed off well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Commenced well, positioned in midfield on the inside, angled out 400M, finished off evenly.
Clean jump, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on very well in straight, easily scored.
Jumped with them, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, peaked 400M, weakened early in straight.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 lengths back, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 100M. (Blood in trachea.)
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced towards rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made some headway in straight.
Raced in midfield between runner throughout. Closed steadily all the way to the line & was only beaten 2L.
Had a nice run 1,1. Closed well in final stages to fall only a head short on the line.

Steadied from outside gate & taken back to last. Shared last place from the 600m when racing along the rail. Was about 6L behind approaching corner before halving that margin despite finishing with only three rivals behind.

Raced very wide & without cover for first 300m before being steadied & taken right back to second last near 800m. Shared last place from 600m, swung widest on corner before making ground from last (Rider quest'd, see report).

Showed early speed to share the lead early before racing at the leaders quarters from the 850m. Dropped off the leader/winner on straightening before weakening out in the last furlong. Too keen with blinkers – rider.
Was trapped racing three wide without cover in midfield throughout. Was pushed 4 and 5 wide just before cornering before weakening out to be last after covering additional ground.

Drifted back, was third last away from the rail for the majority. Hampered & crowded making 600m turn. Shifted outwards for clear running approaching the 200m before finishing off well in concluding stages, only 2.5L behind.
Pushed forward to lead, shrugged off immediate challenger on straightening, was a length clear at the 100m & had just enough in hand to win by a head from closing rival.
Had a nice run third on the rail throughout. Stayed close to the rail in straight, battled on ok to not be beaten far in midfield.
Raced just worse than midfield away from the rail before moving three wide with cover around bend. Closed off well in the straight to move to third beaten under a length.
Got back to race worse than midfield along the rail throughout. Stayed along the rail approaching the corner when 5L behind, made no genuine headway & finishing third last.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Finished off only steadily in the straight & wasn't beaten far but never looked likely.
Sent forward, 2 wide, lost ground after passing 400M.
Rolled forward, 2 wide, weakened after passing the 200M.
Slow to begin and at rear, 2 wide, made no threats.
At rear, along the rail, showed strong dash and continued on to the line.
Raced in midfield, 2 wide, did not feature. (See incident report)
Raced in front of midfield, along the rail, one paced after passing 100M.
Midfield, along the rail, pretty one paced. (Blood in trachea)
At rear, along the rail, saved ground and closed off strongly, battled on to the line and won by a short head.
Worse than midfield, 2 wide, only showed some dash in the last 100M.
Settled in midfield, wide no cover, made ground steadily to the line only.
Slow to begin and raced behind midfield, along the rail, closed off strongly in the last 100M and battled on to the line.
Sent forward from a wide barrier and took lead, one paced after passing 150M. (See incident report)
Pushed forward to lead. Held a 2L advantage at half-way, straightened a similar margin in front, held off late closer to win by a short head.

Steadied form outside gate at the start & taken back to a clear last early. Passed the stopping rival near the 400m when 9.5L from the lead before halving margin but only passing one or two in the run to the line.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Improved to second on straightening when 2L behind, battled on well, probably holding deficit to the line when finishing 4th.

Drifted back & raced third last in early stages. Moved wider to avoid stopping horse near the 450m, continued near the back on cornering when a long way behind before making no headway & being eased down late, see report.

Pushed forward to race second. Began losing ground from the 700m before quickly dropping back through the field & finishing a distant last. (Substantial blood in traches & irregular heart rhythm, must trial).

Had a nice run in midfield away from the rail throughout. Eased wider entering last section when just over 3L behind, closed very strongly down the outside when hanging inwards in final stages & only missed by a SHd on line.
Raced just worse than midfield away from the rail. Hard ridden passing the 400m mark when over 6L from the lead before making some late ground in final stages to be beaten just under 4L in midfield.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Moved off the rail entering the last section when 3.5L from the lead, closed off well to be beaten just over a length.

Steadied after the start & taken back to race second last. Slightly hampered near the 500m by the tiring horse, shifted outwards after cornering before making up some ground to be beaten 4L in midfield.

Raced third on the rail soon after the start. Moved to second place near the 750m but still 2L behind the lead set by winner. Hung out when ridden along before straightening before weakening out poorly in the straight.

Had a nice run 1,1 before moving three wide to avoid stopping horse near the 700m. Continued in a group of three chasing leader on cornering when about 2L behind before peaking on effort at the 150m & weakening late.

Bounded & lost 2L at start before shifting behind runners to race just worse than midfield along the rail. Continued along rail when 5L behind on cornering, was making steady late ground before racing tight late, beaten 3L.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 lengths or so back on turn, kept on well in straight without threatening.
Crowded start, positioned behind midfield on the inside, 3 lengths or so back, finished off well to take 2nd.
Jumped well, raced prominently, 3 wide, allowed rival to cross approaching 500M, 1 to 2 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Jumped well, raced prominently but trapped 4 wide, lost a little ground by halfway, very wide into straight, closed off well to make frame, nearest on line.
Shifted out at start and made contact, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, kept on well early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Bumped start, positioned 2 wide, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, taken very wide in straight and made good progress to be nearest on line.
Commenced well from gate 1, raced prominently on the inside, took the lead 400M, kept on strongly to the line and scored.
Bumped start, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, a bit closer on turn, no clear run early in straight, ran on evenly thereafter.
Moderately away from a tricky draw, sent forward to take the lead but trapped very wide, headed 400M, weakened early in straight when hard run took toll.
Began only fairly, raced at rear, 6 lengths back on turn, showed limited response in straight.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 8 lengths back on turn, finished off very strongly to take a place, nearest on line.
Sat front of midfield, 2 wide, fairly one paced in the straight.
Sent forward, settled box-seat, ran on fairly to the line.
Taken back, at rear, 2 wide, improved slightly only
Forward and led, took rail near 550M, run ended passing 150M.
Bumped start, in worse than midfield, 2 wide, made nice ground to catch the front few, won by a short-head.
Ridden positively early, sat one-out one-back, ran home well to take 3rd.
Jumped well, sat in front of midfield, along the rail, no daylight until 100M, one paced thereafter.
In behind midfield, wide and no cover from 600M turn, held ground only.
Bumped start, sat towards the rear, on rail, showed dashes before turning one paced from 100M.
Began the best, raced midfield, along the rail, kept finding and ran home well to finish 2nd.
In about midfield, 2 wide, no dash in the straight.
Front of midfield and wide initially, forward to sit outside lead by 600M turn, emptied approaching 100M.

Jumped in the air at the start losing considerable ground, recovered steadily to join the back-markers travelling keenly in sedate pace in home straight the first time, only ran past well-beaten horses.

Ridden forward from moderate start to 5th on the rail some 3L back, held similar position but became 6th on stables bend, fought on well under pressure to hold place chance inside final 100 metres, hampered on the line.
Settled towards the rear near the rail, saved ground turning into the final stretch, responded well under pressure but unable to draw level throughout.

Shifted towards rear rounding home bend the first time for cover, headway 3-wide to forward of midfield on stables bend, remained without cover for headway final bend, made good late impression. (Tactic questioned)

Settled taken back from a wide gate, travelled keenly in slow tempo in home straight the first time, commenced move making final bend going widest into final stretch, made no impression down the centre of the track.
Inconvenienced shortly after start and drifted back to rear of midfield, commenced move entering final stretch responding strongly inside final 150 metres to miss narrowly.
Shared pace most of the way, unable to sustain effort inside final 150 metres.
Took up running after first 200 metres and soon steadied up the tempo after obtaining rails run, increased pace in back straight but headed when finding no extra inside final 200 metres.
Broke well, gradually taken one-out-one-back to 4th, remained similar but became 5th 700 metres out, kept on without quickening in straight and found no extra close to finish.
Track leader on the rail one back in 3rd, responded well to hit the front 200 metres out and hang on well to the line.
Steadied on jumping from wide draw, raced as the back-marker 700M then made a quick forward move to join leader, led 250M, couldn't hold off winner 150M, held out for 2nd.
Held up in midfield 2-wide, stumbled near 500M and shuffled back to near last, ran on fairly down outside of straight.
Restrained in a position behind midfield, commenced to race keenly after 1000M, made forward move 600M, briefly threatened early straight, flattened final 150M.
Caught wide no cover early stages, strode forward from 1300M to be tracking leader, came under pressure 500M, fought on same pace, swamped by pursuing rivals final 100M.
Chased leaders on inside, quickened up well passing 300M, led 150M from home, drew clear under hands and heels riding for his 8th win over course and distance.
Moved up tracking leader early stages before settling in 4th, niggled along 500M, kept on without threat in the straight.
Began only fairly, taken across to the fence 5Ls off the pace, held up for some distance passing 400M before running on mildly to claim 4th in a close finish for minor placings.
Soon led, set steady pace early and middle stages, proved difficult to ride when hung in under pressure in straight, responded only fairly, awkwardly placed final 100M.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, recovered to race in midfield, commenced to give ground turning for home, soon out of contention.
Reserved near last 6Ls off the pace, ran on well passing 300M to claim 3rd near line in a blanket finish for the minor placings.
Moderately away from gate 12, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, a length back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened 150M, eased final 100M.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide towards rear, similar position on turn, made some headway in straight.
Began well from a wide draw, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, closed off well to take 2nd, always held.
Began smartly, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Fast into stride, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened thereafter.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide better than midfield, wider turning in, finished off evenly.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, failed to close off in straight.
Commenced well, positioned 5 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Began only fairly, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Made contact at start, raced towards rear on the outside, 7 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home to be nearest on line.
Away with them, unable to slot in, trapped 3 wide, a length or so back, dropped to midfield on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, 3 lengths back, slightly improved along the rail on turn, hard ridden 300M, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line, won by 3/4L.
Taken back to race at tail, 9 lengths or so back on turn, made very good progress early in straight, no clear run final 100M, not able to be properly tested.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, one-paced in straight.
Bumped shortly after start, took the early lead, headed 950M, 1-3/4L back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Jumped with them, taken back to race towards rear on the inside, 8 lengths back on turn, made good progress early in straight, blocked near 200M, cleared 100M, finished off evenly.
Began smartly from gate 1, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 150M, ran on strongly to the line, easily scored.
Shifted in at start and made contact, positioned 2 wide, 5 lengths back, same margin back on turn, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.

Moderately away from the widest draw, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, took the lead near 950M, found rail 750M, led by 1-3/4L on turn, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Crowded on jumping, raced towards rear on the outside, 7 lengths back, same margin back on turn, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home without threatening the first few.
Made contact at start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, closed off well to take a place without threatening.
Moderately away from a wide draw, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, hit the front 200M, peaked and headed 150M, weakened gradually final 50M.
Bumped shortly after start, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began fairly from a wide draw, positioned 3 wide, 3 lengths or so back, no cover in the middle stages, weakened and eased early in straight when hard run took effect.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced behind midfield on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide towards rear, very wide into straight, made minor progress in the run home.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide, 3 lengths or so back, there to turn, finished off well to take a place, no threat to the winner. (See Racing Incidents.)
Commenced well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, same position on turn, took the lead 350M, peaked and headed 250M, weakened final 150M.
Began well from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, angled out 500M, hit the front 250M, kept on very well to the line, easily scored.
Jumped well from gate 10, raced better than midfield on the outside, 3 wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (Lost right hind plate near 800M.)
Shifted out on jumping and bumped, raced in midfield on the outside, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.

Began well from the widest draw, taken back to race behind midfield on the outside, 4 lengths or so back on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (Blood in trachea.)
Bumped start, raced at rear on the inside, 2 wide from 500M, made good progress in straight to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Away well, sat right behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Began very awkwardly and bumped, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final 250M.
From draw 9 dropped back to race towards the rear, plenty to do 500M, held up for clear running early straight, ran on well under top weight but too much to make up
Taken back to the rear, saved ground on inside, stayed on moderately turning for home, well held by leaders towards the finish.
Ridden forward, led to 900M, 3Ls behind runaway leader early straight, responded well under pressure but no match for winner final 150M, got up for 2nd close home.
Settled towards the rear 6-7Ls off the pace, closed off well to go 3rd just before line.
Raced keenly in midfield, lay out making the turn, switched wide 300M, stayed on fairly to the line.
Jumped well, raced keenly from 1000M when steadied to obtain cover, raced ahead of midfield mid-stages, fought on one paced until mid-straight before weakening.
Up with early pace, restrained to be racing ahead of midfield, lacked further response passing 200M, faded towards the line.
Caught wide down the back straight before dropping back to race at the back, failed to respond from 500M, never involved.
From wide draw moved up to track leader, kept on same pace turning in, weakened mid-straight.
Began well but soon restrained to a position towards the rear, 3-wide no cover from 700M, ran on only fairly, never a threat to leaders.
Reserved in midfield 5-6Ls off the good pace, switched away from fence 500M, swiftly moved through gears, closed off strongly to lead 100M from home.
Began fairly then lost ground when crowded for room, ridden forward and led the field nearing 800M, opened up a big lead turning home, caught 100M, faded to 4th.
Sat near the rear 2 off the stands' rail, ridden near the 500M, lay away from the stands' rail when hard ridden, closed off okay.
Broke nicely and sat mid-field near the stand's rail, struggled to pick up until shift to the centre after the 200M, closed off strongly to take third.
At rear, 3 off the stands' rail, ridden inside the 400M, only one paced.
Broke smartly, ridden along and move across to the stands' rail to lead, weaken inside the final 150M and finished fourth.
Raced in midfield, on centre-track, dropped off after passing 250M.
Raced at the rear, hard ridden inside the final 500M, closed off well in the centre of the track.
On stands' rail and sat behind the lead, weaken inside 300M.
Broke only fairly, ridden to be prominent 3 off the stands' rail, moved onto the rail inside the final 250M, did not quicken.
Broke well and showed good early speed to be in a prominent position 4 off the stands' rail, quicken well but just got caught near the line.
Sat mid-field 3 off the stands' rail, travelled nicely towards the final 300M but unable to obtain clear run after the 200M and race tight until the finish.
Ridden along throughout the race on the stands' rail, never a factor.
Began slowly, sat just worse than mid-field, on centre-track, hard ridden inside the 450M, make no progress, just one pace.
Broke well, sat in mid-pack 4 off from the stands' rail, closed off strongly and scored by a short head.
Drifted back after the first furlong & settled third last away from rail. Shared last place on straightening when 5.5L from lead before weakening poorly to be long last.
Began fast & strode forward to lead. Headed in the lead soon after cornering, weakened out in final 250m & was beaten just under 10L.

Was trapped racing three wide & then four wide without cover from the 750m. Was very wide around bend, straightened just under 4L from the lead before wide passage took its toll, weakening in last furlong.
Raced in midfield away from the rail throughout. Entered last section just over 2L from the lead, improved between runners near 200m mark, struck lead at 100m mark & held off the unlucky runner-up.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Moved off the rail on straightening when 2.25L from lead, peaked on run passing furlong marker & weakened a length late.

Raced in midfield between runners, checked away from heels when pace slowed passing 700m. Moved three wide soon after, straightened 3L from lead, raced tight passing 350m, closed off well in last furlong, only beaten 1L.

Pushed forward before being crossed & racing on the leaders back from the 900m. Straightened 1.5L from lead, shifted over leader's heels at 300m, closed off evenly nearer to the inside when beaten under 2L into midfield.

Trapped racing three deep in midfield before being left wide & without cover from 900m. Continued wide around bend, entered last section only 2L behind, continued close until hampered near 125m & giving a length or so late.

Missed start 4L & raced near the tail throughout. Entered last section 5L from lead, had no clear run for first half of the straight before closing strongly between rivals to be beaten only 2L in midfield after some excuse.
Outpaced after start & raced 4th last on the rail. Stayed along the inside on cornering when 5L behind before closing strongly all the way to the line to be beaten only 1.5L.

Taken back from widest gate, improved between runners & raced just worse than midfield. Held tight for room when no clear run passing 350m, had to steady & come around heels passing 200m before flying home for unlucky 2nd.
Had a nice run 1,1 throughout. Moved up to share lead at 300m, took narrow outright lead near 200m before over-run in concluding stages, beaten under a length when holding third.
Drifted back to race at the tail when tracking three wide. Was four wide but with cover when continuing rearward around bend. Shared last place on straightening, did little in straight.

Pushed forward, raced wide before improving position to come across & sit outside the leader from the 900m. Moved to narrow lead approaching 350m, shared lead passing 300m, peaked 150m, weakened in concluding stages.
Began fairly, raced at tail, commenced move approaching 500M, very wide into straight, finished off well to take a place, nearest finish.
Began well, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, easy run to turn, kept to inside after straightening, hit the front 300M, kept on strongly to the line, easily scored.
Bumped start, positioned 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 3 lengths back on turn, no clear run early in straight, kept on same pace thereafter.
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide slightly better than midfield, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide towards rear, 5 lengths back turning in, not enough room early in straight, made some progress thereafter.
Slightly slow out, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, passed some tired rivals in straight, never involved.
Shifted out at start and bumped, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Commenced well, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, challenged the leader 500M, peaked on run 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Taken back from gate 9, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, there to turn, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Began well from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with no cover, a length or so back, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, hampered approaching 200M, one-paced thereafter.
Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear on the outside, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, challenged 500M, peaked early in straight, headed 300M, weakened gradually inside final furlong. (Epiglottic entrapment.)
Settle near the rear one of the rail, move into the clear inside the 350M, closed off fairly.
Began only fairly, settled in midfield 2 wide, move to the center of the track in the straight, closed off nicely and won.
Broke well and ridden to take the lead from an outside gate, weakening inside final 100M, held fourth.
Settle at the rear, made little progress along the rail in the straight.
Settle behind the speed along the rail, faded quickly in the straight.
Raced in front of midfield 2 wide, hard ridden inside 500M, faded in the straight.
Raced in front of midfield along the rail, made no impression in the straight.
At rear, moved to the outside in the straight, made no threats.
Broke well and sat alongside the leader throughout, took the lead inside the 100M, just got passed near the line.
Sat midfield one of the rail, move into the clear near the 500M, made minor progress in the straight.
Broke slowly, sat just worse than midfield on the rail, hard ridden inside the 400M, and closed off strongly to take third.
Sat behind the speed 2 wide, made no progress in the straight, weaken inside the 200M.
Midfield along the rail, move into the clear inside the 500M, closed off okay to take fifth.
Moved across towards the rail after the start, settled at rear and never a threat.

Improved steadily from a poor draw to be up with the pace, awkward when taken one-out-one-back for cover 1300 metres out, quickened to hold every chance throughout final 350 metres, outlasted close to home.
Broke well from the widest draw but soon taken back, trailed the field most of the way to home bend, saved ground turning in, one-paced under pressure in the run to the line.
Slow to begin settling in rear of midfield in 7th on the rail, in similar position entering home straight, weakened noticeably inside final 250 metres.
Pressed forward from a wide gate to be up with the pace, gained 2nd outside race leader rounding home bend, kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Began well from a low draw, settled just over 2L back on the rail in 4th, slightly closer in 3rd rounding home bend, soon weakened under pressure after straightening. (Bled)
Taken back from a wide gate travelling wide without cover in midfield, faded gradually after straightening.
Slightly slow out settling in last few, switched wide for a run approaching final turn 500 metres out, fought on well under pressure down the centre of the straight.
Began awkwardly losing ground, settled one from last and becoming last coming onto home bend, switched wide turning into straight, made up good ground despite a difficult ride early on.
Travelled keenly in forward of midfield in 5th in back straight, shifted slightly backward to 6th rounding home bend, gained closer to 4th turning for home, kept on steadily without quickening.
Soon took up running on the rail setting a sound pace, challenged inside final 250 metres, fought on dourly to fend it off close to home.
Settled down midfield, came under pressure home turn, shifted out abruptly 500M, gave ground in the straight to finish tailed off. (Unacceptable Performance / Blood in trachea.)
Soon led, raced keenly when pressed by rival mid-stages, held on to the lead until 150M. (Jockey : would not relax when pressed by rival, race run at faster tempo than hoped.)
Dropped back to race near the rear, made some late gains final 250M but never reach contention.
From wide draw taken back to race in the rear, over 10Ls to make up top of straight, made limited progress only.
Crowded for room at start, held up behind midfield, responded fairly over final 300M, never seriously threatened.
Slow to begin, recovered to race in midfield, kept on one paced in the straight, never near to challenge.
Raced 3-wide in the pack chasing runaway leaders, had no cover until 700M, not quickened on straightening, laboured home to finish 8th.
Settled ahead of midfield 4-5Ls off the runaway leaders, responded strongly on straightening, led near 150M, drew clear towards the finish.
In 3rd place about 4Ls off the runaway pair, ran on mildly to claim 3rd nearing 50M, never able to challenge winner.
From wide draw steadied on jumping, raced near the rear 10Ls off the pace, made no real progress in the straight, never involved.
Pressed leader, first two went clear mid-stages, battled on early straight, faded to 4th late. (Jockey: raced keenly 1000M but reluctant to steady his mount to ensure it did not break its stride.)
Taken back from gate 11, raced at rear, 9 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight.
Began smartly, tracked leader on the outside, 1-1/2L back on turn, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Made contact at start, raced prominently, 2 wide, found rail near 900M, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on turn, peaked 400M, weakened final 250M.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 2 to 3 lengths back on turn, showed good response in straight, hit the front 100M, kept on well to hold off the challengers late.
Shifted out at start and made contact, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/2L on turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first few in the closing stages.
Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide towards rear, bumped near 900M, 6 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
Began awkwardly, raced towards rear on the inside, awkwardly placed and bumped near 900M, 9 lengths back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, 7 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Began well, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just narrowly beaten.
Began fairly from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, 5 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Bumped on jumping, raced behind midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, made minor progress in straight.

Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, badly hampered by rival early in straight, made good progress after passing 300M, no clear run final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared approaching 250M, finished off evenly.

Began well from a wide draw, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared near 250M, closed off well to take a place without threatening the first two.

Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on outer, commenced move 550M, very wide into straight, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (Rider dropped whip near 250M.)

Shifted out at start and made contact, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear running until final 100M, finished off strongly to make frame, nearest on line.
Taken back from gate 10, raced at tail, 4 lengths or so back on turn, made some progress in straight.

Moderately away from a wide draw, raced prominently but trapped wide in the early stages, slightly taken back after passing 1200M, settled in midfield on the outside, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Commenced well, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, easy run to turn, hard ridden approaching 300M, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, unable to obtain clear run until approaching 200M, one-paced thereafter.
Began fairly from a wide draw, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Moderately away from the widest draw, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, hard ridden 300M, kept on very well to hold off the challengers, good debut.
Bumped on jumping, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made good progress early in straight, peaked on run 150M, kept on same pace to the line.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 550M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 250M, finished off well to be nearest on line.
Hampered start, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 550M, no clear run early until approaching final 50M, made some progress thereafter.
Bumped on jumping, raced better than midfield on the outside, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Slightly slow out, raced towards rear on the inside, 6 lengths back, same margin back on turn, passed some tired rivals in straight.
Bumped shortly after start, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, 4 lengths or so back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Away well, raced prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross near 1150M, sat right behind the leader in the middle stages, angled out 400M, finished off evenly.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 8 to 9 lengths back, moved closer after passing 750M, 4 lengths back on turn, weakened 350M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L, challenged by rival 450M, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide, 5 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, one-paced in the run home.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, closed off well to take a place without threatening the first two.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Began well, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, commenced move 450M, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.

Made contact at start, raced prominently on the outside, challenged the leader 450M, took the lead early in straight, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Pressed forward from a poor gate, travelled keenly in 5th gaining within 2L of pace to 4th onto back straight, carried very wide making final turn, made headway early in straight but found no extra inside final 150 metres.
Pressed forward from a wide gate to vie for lead, obtained rails run in front in the slow tempo 1100 metres out rounding the first bend, led until finding no extra inside final 250 metres.

Shared early pace, ceded advantage 1100 metres out for one-back 3rd position rounding first bend, switched off the rail 600 metres for a 3-wide run around final bend, held some chance briefly 150 metres out but soon overhauled.

Jumped awkwardly but travelling up with the pace, crossed by race leader 1100 metres out before moving back up to 2nd position, hit the front narrowly approaching home straight and led until swamped inside final 130 metres.
Taken back to rear from a wide gate and refused to settle in the slow tempo around first bend and in back straight, made no impression in the final stretch.
Settled in midfield in 7th on the rail, commenced move under pressure rounding home bend, ran on well between runners to be nearest at finish.

Slow out settling in last few on the rail, travelled keenly around the first bend in the slow tempo, commenced move rounding home bend sneaking up to 3L 5th into straight, ran on strongly under pressure to just fail to get up on line.
Settled in last few from a wide gate, came under strong pressure home bend, ran on strongly down the centre of the straight, did best work late.
Broke well settling off the pace mainly in 5th some 3L back on the rail, commenced move over 400 metres out angling out for a run, ran on well to prevail by a narrow margin.
Taken back to midfield in 6th some 3L back, remained similar onto home bend swinging wider into straight, ran on well under pressure to narrowly miss the place-getters.
Never better than midfield in 8th, gained closer in home straight and never nearer.
Taken back to last from the widest draw, trailed the field to the 450 metres, snuck up on the rail entering home straight, sustained progress to be nearest at finish.
Raced at the rear, never a factor.
Sat midfield 2 wide, moved to 3 wide on the back straight, never threaten.
Raced at the rear, hard ridden inside the final 550M, closed off well in the centre of the track.
Settled near the rear in the early stage, made a mid-race move down the back straight and took the lead, kept on well to hold second.
Hard ridden after the start, sat near the lead 3 wide no cover throughout, and weakened at the 450M.
Sat midfield early, race near the rail throughout, only made some progress in the straight.
Broke smartly, sat right behind the speed on the rail, only one pace in the straight.
Broke well and led the race, weakened and faded quickly after the 350M.
Hard ridden early to take a position just in front of midfield, showed a great turn of foot in the straight and won nicely.
Began slowly, sat near the rear on the rail, hard ridden inside 450M, made minor progress.
Settle just worse than midfield, shifted to the center of the track inside 250M and stayed on well to take third.
Broke nicely, ridden to be prominent next to the leader, weakened inside final 150M.
Was trapped racing three wide without cover just forward of midfield throughout. Closed off only one paced in the straight & wasn't a bad run after coving additional ground throughout.

Steadied from outside gate & taken across behind runners to find the rail at first bend & race second last. Entered last section over 5L behind & could only hold similar deficit all the way to line & was second last.
Was trapped racing three wide but with cover in midfield throughout. Moved wider approaching the 400m when over 3L from the lead before peaking on effort mid-straight & weakening to 9th.
Showed speed & obtained lead early. Held a 1L advantage for much of the middle stages, continued to hold immediate challengers all the way & was clear of fast finisher on line.

Began fast before being crossed & racing third on the rail. Was about 2L from the lead on straightening when winner held 1L advantage before finishing off once paced until emptying in last 50m & weakening a length late.
Ridden forward after start, raced outside leader early before holding second when about a length from the lead in middle stages. Closed evenly all the way to line & was only beaten 1.5L.
Raced in midfield between runners throughout. Straightened 4L from the lead & could only maintain that deficit in the straight & was never a real threat.

Began ok & was in midfield early before being steadied & taken right back to last from the first bend. Continued a clear last in middle stages, was just under 7L from the lead approaching the corner but made no headway.
