Got a good position 1,1 after start. Was only 2.5L from lead entering last section but couldn't improve & weakened a length in the final 100m to be beaten 3L in midfield.

Raced worse than midfield before being hampered around first bend & taken back to second last. Taken 4 wide without cover from 800m, continued wide & inclined to lay inwards around bend before making no headway in straight.

Steadied after the start, shifted across behind runners to the rail before making ground along the inside to midfield. Stayed along the rail on cornering before closing well for third, only beaten a length.

Last into stride, made some ground at first bend before racing between runners in a line of three near the back. Moved closer after 500m mark, swung very wide on cornering before flying home to second in late stages.
Commenced well, raced in 3rd, 2 wide, 4 lengths back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter, eased final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 8 lengths back turning in, made very good progress in straight to take 2nd, nearest finish.
Bumped start, raced prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross near 700M, 2nd on turn, 4 lengths behind at 400M, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Taken back from gate 9, raced 2 wide towards rear, 9 lengths back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Began fairly, raced in midfield on the outside, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Jumped well from the widest draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 4 lengths turning in, kept on very well in straight, won by 3/4L.
Slightly slow out, raced at rear on the inside early, 2 wide in the middle stages, still 11 lengths back at 400M, made reasonable progress in straight.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide better than midfield, commenced move 400M, closed off well to take a place without threatening.
Average to begin, raced in midfield early, hampered approaching 800M, 10 lengths back on turn, made no progress in straight.
Began fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began well form a wide draw, raced towards rear of midfield on the outside, 8 lengths or so back on turn, very wide into straight, finished off well to make frame without threatening.
Broke fairly and ridden along in the early stage to take the lead, set a fast tempo, and weakened inside 150M.
Broke nicely, settled just in front of midfield, made some progress in the straight, and never threatened the top three.
Raced at the rear and detached from the field early after interference, ridden along inside 800M, stayed on well.
Settled near the rear in the early stage, was held up near the 350M, moved into the clear inside 300M, closed off well, always held.
Settle just worse than midfield, shifted to the center of the track and made good progress in the straight, took the lead inside the final 50M, but just got passed near the line.
Broke nicely, ridden to be prominent just behind the leader on the rail, never threaten.
Began well and sat next to the leader, did not quicken in the straight.
Sat near the rear early, move to the outside in the straight, showed a strong turn of foot and scored by a head.
Severely hampered near the 1400M, never tested.
Settled in midfield, only one pace in the straight.
Settle 2 wide behind the speed, hard ridden inside 400M and weakened in the straight.
Raced just worse than midfield, made no progress.
Ridden along 3-wide in midfield, hampered and lost position passing the 700 metres, towards rear into straight when jostled, one paced when tightened inside the 100 metres.
Trailed the field to straight, saved ground making home turn, kept on steadily without threatening
Slightly slow out from a poor gate travelling one from last, shifted 3-wide rounding home bend and widest into straight, responded well inside final 150 metres.
Worked hard from the widest gate sharing early pace 3-wide without cover, shifted one-out-one-back for cover approaching onto home bend, kept on under pressure before fading inside 50 metres.
Driven forward from the one gate to share the pace, drifted slightly backward to 2nd rounding home bend, folded up quickly inside final 280 metres.
Driven forward from a poor draw to vie for lead, travelled 2-wide alongside fellow race leader most of the way before gaining advantage rounding home bend, drew clear inside final 200 metres.
Settled mainly in forward of midfield in 5th, fought on under pressure to reach 2nd over 100 metres out, just held on for the placing late.
Broke well but soon taken back, remained wide without cover mostly in midfield in 7th to straight, produced good late impression inside final 200 metres.
Settled mainly in 4th some 3L off the pace, kept on without quickening in home straight.
Settled towards the rear, snuck up on the rail turning for home, fought on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Unable to slot in from draw 12, moved up to chase leader, kept on steadily turning home, well held by first two final stages.
In mid-division, 3-wide no cover from 600M, continued on fairly passing 300M, not reach contention.
Jumped on terms from inside draw, settled behind midfield 6Ls off the pace, failed to run on final 300M.
Held up towards the rear, 6Ls to make up top of straight, finished off well final 300M but too much to make up.
Chased leaders, made the home turn awkwardly, battled on same pace turning home, no threat from mid-straight.
Steadied early stages to obtain a position closer to the rail, no closer than 3-wide throughout, gave limited response turning in the straight, never troubled leaders.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, ended up in the rear 7-8Ls off leader, made limited progress over final 300M, never threatened.
Settled nicely in a position ahead of midfield, picked up strongly passing 300M, led near 100M, won going away.
Slow to begin, given a waiting ride at the rear, closed off final 400M fastest, left a good impression on its debut.
From draw 11 showed good speed to lead, led at good pace, kept on in the straight only caught by winner near 100M, held on well for 2nd.
Went forward as expected, tracked leader in a fast run race, fought hard early straight but couldn't find extra gear, run ended near 100M.
Settled down behind midfield, pushed along 500M, stayed on without threat after turning home.
Average to begin, unable to slot in, raced 3 wide with no cover in midfield, moved a bit closer on turn, finished off evenly.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail throughout, never a factor.
Commenced well, sent forward to take the lead, enjoyed the easy lead to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed approaching 50M, weakened gradually thereafter, finished 3rd.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, made some progress in straight.
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began smartly from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2-1/2L back, saved ground throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 50M.
Away well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, a bit closer on turn, finished off strongly to score by a nose.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide behind midfield, moved closer on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame, nearest on line.
Began fairly, raced at rear on the outside, 7 lengths back on turn, taken wide in straight and made some progress.
Clean jump, sent forward to race in 2nd, a length behind the leader, travelled comfortably to turn, finished off strongly, just beaten by a nose.
Began very awkwardly and unbalanced, raced towards rear, 6 to 7 lengths back, very wide turning in, finished off evenly.
Crowded on jumping, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 350M, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the outside, 9 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Bumped the outside gate of its stall on jumping, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-3/4L on turn, kicked clear early in straight, ran on very well to the line, easily scored, impressive debut.
Stumbled on jumping, raced 2 wide towards rear early, found rail near 800M, angled out 500M, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Bumped start, unable to slot in, raced in midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Shifted out at start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (Irregular heart rhythm.)
Shifted out on jumping and bumped, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 lengths back on turn, hard ridden approaching 250M, closed off well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Shifted out on jumping and bumped, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 3 wide from 600M, made no impression in straight.
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 450M, made some headway in straight to make frame without threatening.
Slightly slow out, raced 3 wide with cover at rear, 2 wide in the middle stages, still 10 lengths behind the leader at 400M, made no progress in the run home.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, made no impression in straight.
Moderately away, sent forward to take the early lead, headed near 950M, 2nd on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to take a place.
Crowded start, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Moderately away from the widest draw, taken back to race at rear on the outside, still well back on turn, passed some tired rivals in straight.
Bumped start, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.

Led after start before being headed & racing leaders back near 1400m before shifting to race 1,1 soon after. Moved three wide near the 650m mark, straightened only 2.5L from lead but peaked mid-straight & gave ground late.
Had no early speed & was ridden at start to hold position worse than midfield along rail. Hard ridden on straightening when continuing near the back & failed to run on in straight & was well beaten.
Drifted back to race worse than midfield away from the rail. Continued near the tail on cornering before shifting wider on cornering & finishing off steadily down the outside to just miss third.

Raced third last away from the rail after being steadied around first bend. Shared last place from the 1400m, straightened 6.5L from the lead, managed to pass a few tiring rivals when running onto midfield from the rear.

Raced wide in midfield after the start before improving position around first bend & racing outside the leader from the 1300m. Began yielding ground from the 700m mark & weakened very badly to be long last.

Raced just behind the leaders before a pair further back from 1200m. Improved passing the 700m to improve around the field, took a narrow lead on straightening, joined by winner at 225m, battled on to hold third narrowly.

Began awkwardly but made up ground & raced in midfield along the rail. Moved off the rail passing the 600m mark, had clear running on straightening when 4.5L from the lead before weakening a length in the run to line.

Steadied & taken back towards the rear when racing three wide. Commenced to improve position around field from 900m, improved to be forward of midfield on cornering before emptying early in straight & weakening quickly.

Raced prominently early, improved along the rail after the 1200m mark to race third in the middle stages. Continued along the rail on straightening when about 2L from the lead before giving a length in final stages.

Raced worse than midfield away from the rail early before moving into three wide line with cover from 750m. Pushed very wide on cornering, straightened 5.5L from lead before failing to improve in last section.

Drifted back & raced just worse than midfield along the rail. Moved closer to lead when improving along the rail after 800m, moved into clear running on straightening, dashed well to lead at 225m & drew away to win easily.

Drifted back to share last place in early & middle stages. Was last on cornering when just under 7L from lead, was held up for a run in early part of straight before getting clear but then doing nothing in final stages.

Raced in midfield away from the rail for the majority. Came under hard ridding near 700m when asked to improve, pushed second widest on straightening before making continual steady ground to move to second inside final 75m.
Raced outside the leader early before improving to lead near 1400m. Joined & headed on straightening, passed quickly by winner nearing the 200m but boxed on ok to narrowly miss third.
Settled midfield 3 wide, made minor progress in the straight.
Commenced smartly, settled in front of mid-field 3 wide, made good progress in the straight, and just took 3rd near the line.
Taken back near the rear of the field, race tight near 500M and made good progress between horses in the straight.
Taken to the rear from a wide barrier, always at the rear.
Sat just worse than midfield 2 wide between horses, showed some dash early in the straight and weakened.
Broke with the field and settled near midfield, weakened inside 300M.
Broke fairly well, ridden along early, raced inside the leader throughout, kept on okay to finish 4th. (Right front tendon injury)
Broke last, settled behind midfield near the rail, short of room near the 500M, made not much impression in the straight.
Broke fairly and settled midfield on the rail, never a threat.
Began well and ridden to lead in a 2 wide position, a bit green in the straight, but ran on and won comfortably.
Broke nicely and close to the pace early, just one pace in the straight.
Raced at the rear, move to the outside at the 500M, failed to make up much ground.
Away moderately from gate 1, took up a prominent position, race keenly throughout, closed off okay to take 2nd, never a threat to the winner.
Jumped with the field and soon taken back, held up early in the straight but stayed on well inside the 200M.
Had a nice run third on the rail throughout. Weakened badly in the straight to be long third last in a race that looked a stretch at his distance range.

Shifted behind runners & raced at the tail throughout. Straightened nearly 9L from the lead before finishing off strongly from a long way behind to half deficit in the straight. Trainer questions, see report.

Steadied at start & taken back to race second last away from rail. Moved wider on the track at the 600m when still well back, shifted to be the widest runner after straightening but never really improved, well beaten.

Raced just worse than midfield away from rail in early & middle stages. Moved three deep & commenced to improve from 800m, forced 4 wide from 600m, straightened 3L from lead before closing off well, caught for third late.
Raced in fourth place away from the rail throughout. Straightened 3L from the lead before weakening out quickly in final 300m to be well beaten in a race that looked to be too far.

Raced in midfield along the rail for the majority. Was ridden along before cornering, straightened 5L from the lead, was held up momentarily near 250m before shifting inwards, weakened a few lengths in last furlong.

Got back to race worse than midfield away from the rail. Moved wider on the track & commenced to improve passing 650m, shifted to be the widest runner on straightening before closing off steadily down the outside for third.
Raced wide around first bend when improving position to race outside the leader from the 1300m. Dropped off the leader just prior to straightening & weakened badly in the straight to be long last.
Ridden forward & obtained lead. Raced over 2L clear early in the straight, joined & passed by the winner near the 150m before weakening out quickly in late stages.

Steadied after start, shifted down to rail & raced just worse than midfield. Held up just before cornering & again near 300m before shifting outwards & closing strongly final furlong to move to fast finishing second late.

Raced in midfield along rail before coming off the rail in back straight. Moved wider & raced tight near 600m, was momentarily held up on cornering, dashed strongly 300m, moved to lead 150m & drew away to win easily.
Steadied after start & taken down to the rail & raced in midfield. Began losing ground passing the 600m & weakened out badly in the straight.

Raced in midfield away from the rail in early & middle stages. Was awkwardly placed close to heels passing the 650m, moved wider into clear running on straightening when 6.5L from lead before maintaining that deficit to line.
Steadied after start & taken back to race third last along rail. Was a long way back on straightening, passed a couple of tiring rivals in last furlong but was still 8L behind on line.
Bumped start, sent forward to race prominently, peaked on run 500M, ran on evenly to 100M, weakened thereafter.
Bumped start, raced 3 lengths behind the leader in the middle of the track, hard ridden approaching 400M, only showed limited response, weakened final furlong.
Shifted out on jumping and bumped, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader, 3 away from the stands' rail, kept on evenly final 400M.
Bumped shortly after start, raced in midfield, 2 away from the stands' rail, peaked in the middle stages, eased final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length in the middle stages, kept on well final 400M to hold off the challenger.
Bumped start, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the stands' rail, hard ridden after passing 400M, showed no response, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced towards rear, 3 away from the stands' rail, made good progress final 400M to make frame, nearest on line.
Moderately away, raced behind midfield, nearer to the middle track, peaked and dropped towards rear after passing 500M, weakened 300M, eased final 200M.
Jumped with them, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the middle track, hard ridden approaching 300M but only showed limited response, weakened final furlong.
Stumbled at start and bumped, positioned 2 to 3 lengths behind the leader on the stands' side, hard ridden after passing 400M but only showed limited response, ran on evenly to the line.
Slightly slow out, raced at rear, 4 lengths behind the leader at 400M, finished off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the middle track, unable to maintain position in the middle stages, hard ridden 300M, showed no response, weakened thereafter.
Began smartly, raced in 2nd, a length behind the leader, hard ridden approaching 300M, finished off strongly, just beaten by a neck.
Began fairly, raced behind midfield on the middle track, hard ridden after 400M, peaked 300M, weakened final furlong.
Asked to go forward, led along the rail, emptied at 350M. (See Incident Report)
Shifted across to rail after start, raced at the rear, showed nothing.
Inconvenienced at start, found rail and sat midfield, ran on okay in final fur-long.
Jumped smartly, then eased to race be-hind midfield, wide but with cover, failed to run on in the straight. (See In-cident Report)
Raced towards the rear, 2 wide, im-proved slightly in the run home.
Settled one-out one-back, peeled out from Home Turn, kept finding to the line to finish 2nd, 1/2L behind.
Worked forward gradually early, settled in front of midfield, on rail, closed off to the line fairly.
Bumped start, settled about midfield, 2 wide, crowded at 350M, one paced thereafter.
Forward, settled outside lead, pulled away 250M out, kicked on to win by 1/2L.
Bumped start, then taken back to be at rear, 2 wide, made ground in the straight and ran home fairly. (See Incident Re-port)
Niggled along, settled in behind mid-field only, 2-3 wide, continued on well to take 3rd.
Bumped start, settled to race in box-seat, one paced and flattened inside final 200M.
Jumped well but sat front of midfield only, wide throughout, faded gradually from 200M. (See Incident Report)
Crowded at start, then raced in behind midfield, on rail, never a threat.

Driven forward from moderate start to share the pace, travelled keenly pulling half a length ahead briefly onto home bend, narrowly headed into straight, had no more to give under pressure and swamped inside final 200 metres.
Settled well behind from a wide gate, commenced move 3-wide rounding home bend and widest of all into straight, found nothing under pressure.
Crowded at start settling well behind, snuck up on the rail entering home straight, tight behind runners early on, obtained clear passage inside the 100 metres, fought on well late.
Settled behind midfield in 6th, baulked for a run early in straight for about 100 metres, produced good late impression inside final 150 metres.
Broke well before settling in middle in 5th of the 9-horse field, some 4L off rounding home bend, quickened well to hit the front narrowly over 200 metres out only to be denied close home.

Ridden positively from the widest gate sharing pace for the first 250 metres, remained just outside race leader in 2nd before gaining slender advantage early in home straight, folded up quickly inside final 300 metres.
Travelled in last few in 7th of 9-ruuner field, tightened 450 metres out turning into straight, kept on same pace without quickening.
Began well, soon taken back to 4th becoming over 4L off the pace briefly approaching home bend, renewed effort to gain within 2L of lead into straight, sustained effort to gain upper hand close home.
Tracked the leaders in 3rd on the rail, baulked for a run in straight until the 250 metres, fought on under pressure to the nearest at finish. (Tactic questioned)
Began very awkwardly and lost ground, raced at the rear until passing 800M, moved up to 8th early straight, no extra early stages.
Chased the pace in 3rd, 7Ls behind runaway leader at 400M, not quickened under pressure, laboured home final 200M.
Held up behind mid-division, driven along 700M, ran past beaten horses in the straight only, never dangerous.
From wide draw steadied to obtain cover shortly after the start, settled down 8-9Ls off the fast pace, responded under pressure to go 2nd near 100M, no chance with winner but well clear from rest.
Close up in 4th early stages, 6-7Ls behind when leader quickened up home turn, ran on same pace to the line, never threatened.
Steadied to obtain cover from wide draw, settled near last over 10Ls off the runaway leader, made no real progress in the straight.
Raced behind mid-division, already under pressure before the home turn, dropped to last 500M, finished tailed out. (Unacceptable Performance.)
Moved up to chase the pace, 4Ls behind when leader drew clear home turn, held 2nd to near 100M, hung on for remote 3rd late.
Soon led under 10lb claimer, set fast pace up front, opened up a big lead home turn, continued on strongly for a wide margin victory in class record time.
Settled down 2-wide in midfield, plenty to make up on runaway leader 400M, gave limited response, no threat to first two.
From draw 1 obtained a midfield spot along the fence, kept on same pace turning for home, never able to challenge.
Always towards the rear, over 10Ls off the pace at 400M, never near to challenge.
Began well from a wide draw, taken back to race 3 wide with cover behind midfield, 4 lengths or so back, failed to close off in straight.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at tail, 6 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, made some headway in straight.
Inconvenienced at start, taken back to race behind midfield on the outside, 5 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home to be nearest on line.
Away well, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, wider turning in, hit the front 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Crowded on jumping, raced 2 wide towards rear, 4 lengths or so back, made some progress in straight.
Began well, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased final 100M.
Crowded on jumping, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, moved a bit closer on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off well to make frame without threatening the first few..
Jumped well, sent forward to race in 2nd, 3/4L back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Moderately away, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L on turn, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 100M.
Shifted out at start, unable to slot in, raced in midfield on the outside, 4 lengths or so back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Slow to begin, raced towards rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared approaching 250M, made some progress thereafter.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, easy run to turn, hard ridden after passing 300M, finished off well to take a place, always just held.
Moderately away from gate 10, raced 3 wide slightly better than midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Average to begin, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on rail, same position on turn, finished off very strongly to score by a neck.

Shifted in at start and made contact, raced in midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 600M, 2 lengths back turning in, made good progress early in straight, peaked 150M, kept on same pace to the line.
Slightly slow out, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight.

Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, dropped to midfield in the middle stages, 3 lengths or so back, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slow to begin, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground to turn, made some progress early in straight, no clear run 300M to 150M, finished off strongly to take 2nd. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 500M, finished off strongly to score.
Out with rest, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 500M, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly thereafter.

Average to begin, raced in midfield on the outside early, sent forward 1200M, positioned 1 out 1 back in the middle stages, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, ridden from 500M, made good progress in straight to make frame, nearest on line.
Jumped well from the widest draw, tracked leader on the outside, challenged the leader turning in, hit the front 450M, peaked and headed approaching 50M, finished 3rd.
Taken back from gate 12, raced towards rear on the outside, a bit closer in the middle stages, 3 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M. (Blood in trachea.)

Jumped well, sent forward to race prominently, found rail near 950M, allowed rival to cross 900M, sat right behind the leader on turn, no clear run early in straight, found daylight after passing 300M, kept on same pace thereafter.
Moderately away from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival turning in, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Crowded start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out after passing 550M, made good progress early in straight, peaked on run 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, angled out 500M, showed limited response early in straight, ran on same pace inside final furlong.
Average to begin, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, there to turn, made some progress in straight.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, finished off well to be nearest on line.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 2 wide at rear, 7 lengths back on turn, taken wide in straight and made good progress to be nearest on line.
Began smartly from gate 11, raced prominently on the outside, 3/4L back on turn, peaked early in straight, kept on evenly to the line.
Moderately away, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, 3 lengths back on turn, finished off strongly to score by a head.
Jumped with them, tracked leaders, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter, eased final 100M.
Out with rest, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead 800M, found rail near 600M, travelled well to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 50M, finished 3rd.
Away with them, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths back on turn, wide into straight, closed off well to make frame, nearest on line.
Slowly away, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 400M, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Out in line, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, similar position on turn, finished off evenly.

Jumped with them, took the early lead, headed approaching 800M, allowed rival to cross near 600M, sat right behind the leader on turn, showed good response in straight, hit the front 50M, but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Jumped well, restrained to race towards the rear, into clear 250M, closed off well and got up close home.
Driven forward, raced keenly outside the lead after 1000M, fought on early straight, couldn't go on final 150M.
Held up in midfield along the 2-path, had every chance from 300M, kept on steadily under pressure to go 3rd 50M out, just missed 2nd.
From wide draw shifted across behind runners early stages, raced as the back-marker on settling, responded well turning home, closed off final 200M fastest, nearest finish.
From draw 1 obtained a position behind midfield, saved ground on inside throughout, finished off well under top weight final 300M, held by winner towards the line.
Sent forward to lead, set good pace to straight, caught near 150M, weakened towards the line. (Roarer.)
Crowded for room at start, raced behind midfield 3-wide, wide into straight, ran on steadily to take 5th close home.
Taken back to near last, closed off the race well from 200M but was awkwardly placed final stages and not ridden out to the line.
Chased leaders in a 3-wide spot without cover, failed to finish off in the straight, soon beaten.
Tracked leaders along the fence, responded mildly on straightening, got out-finished final stages.
Chased leaders in a fast run race, loomed up 300M challenging for the lead, run ended 100M from home.
Didn't show early speed despite ridden, obtained a trailing spot 3-wide, travelled only fairly and couldn't finish off, eased when no chance. (Blood in trachea / Unacceptable Performance.)
Broke smartly but steadied to race near the rear, moved to the outside near 400M, just one pace.
Settled near the rear of the field on the rail, followed the winner's path in the straight, closed of well but never threaten.
Broke well from the inside draw and sat just behind the speed, weakened final furlong.
Ridden along early and sat 3 wide outside of the leaders, found nothing in the straight.
Broke with the field, ridden to take up a prominent position 2 wide between horses, quickened well in the straight and won comfortably.
Broke fairly well, hard ridden early and sat outside the leader, kept on okay until weakened near the 100M. (Lame left front)
Broke nicely and led, weakened early in the straight and finished last.
Settled 2 wide in midfield, race keenly, a bit green in the straight but stayed on okay.
Settled at the rear, never a factor, only passed weakened rivals.
Began nicely and settled midfield on the rail, closed off only fairly to take 3rd.
Settled near the rear, started to lose ground at the 500M, never a factor.

Steadied passing winning post first time but was trapped racing three wide without cover throughout. Began yielding ground from his midfield position before cornering & weakened out in straight to be well beaten.
Shifted across behind runners after start & raced worse than midfield along rail before being relegated to second last just after half-way. Was beaten before straightening.

Had no speed after start & was taken back to race at the tail. Continued at the rear approaching corner, was shifted wider on the track when still last on straightening but did nothing & was long second last.

Taken back after start before racing worse than midfield between runners. Swung to be the second widest on cornering before finishing very strongly down the outside in final stages to be beaten half length, just missed 2nd.

Raced second away from the rail for the majority. Dropped a couple of lengths from lead on straightening, hung inwards & raced tight with rival mid-straight but continued to try hard all the way to line only beaten 1-1/4 lengths.
Raced in midfield away from the rail throughout. Moved into clear running on straightening before making continual ground all the way to line to be beaten under 1L into 4th.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Stayed close to the inside on cornering, peaked on effort mid-straight & gave a length or so late to be midfield, just under 3L behind in bunched finish.

Raced on the leaders back for the majority. Raced tight with rival passing the 200m, continued to try very hard all the way to line & was beaten just over a length when over-run for minor placing late.

Slow to begin & had no early speed & raced near the tail. Shifted very wide without cover down back straight, continued wide when improving to midfield around bend, battled on well to be beaten only 2L after wide passage.

Obtained uncontested lead at start. Pretty much uncontested in front for all of middle stages, raced a couple of lengths clear on straightening, just had enough in the tank to win by narrow margin from fast closers.
Had a nice run 1.1 for the majority. Was ridden along prior to straightening before weakening out badly in last 250m to be long last.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Moved into clear running on cornering, closed strongly in the final stages to miss by a neck.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Began well from gate 9, sent forward to race in 2nd, 1/2L back on turn, kept on well in straight but always held, finished 2nd.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail early, moved a bit closer after passing 700M, 5 lengths back on turn, made minor progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away well, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made some headway in straight to make frame without threatening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 8, raced at rear on the inside, still well back on turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
Began awkwardly, positioned 1-3/4L behind the leader on rail, angled out 350M, kept on well in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Commenced well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L on turn, kept on very well in straight to hold off the challengers.
Away with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths back, bumped near 600M, same margin back on turn, showed some response early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter.
Began well from gate 11, raced in midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, finished off evenly.
Began fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, bumped near 600M, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Began awkwardly and bumped, positioned 2 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M. (Blood in trachea.)
Ridden along early and slotted into 2 wide just behind the leaders, did not quicken.
Settled 2 wide in midfield, travel nicely throughout, but showed little only when under pressure.
Sat worse than midfield, hard ridden inside 450M, never in contention. (Heart irregularity)
Settled near the rear, never a factor. (Bled)
Began nicely and sat outside of the lead, kept on okay and weakened last 100M.
Steadied towards the rear from an outside draw, started to improve near 450M, held up for room early in the straight and closed off strongly to take 2nd.
Settle worse than midfield 2 wide, made minor progress in the straight.
Broke fairly from the inside and settled midfield on the rail, just one pace.
Jumped with the field and hard ridden to lead on the rail, flatten out at 200M.
Broke on terms, settled on the rail in midfield, angle out for a clear run near 400M, respond very well in the straight and won nicely.
Broke smartly and sat behind the speed, weakened inside 200M.
Steadied after the start from a wide barrier to a 2 wide position near the rear, showed good response final 200M.

Began awkwardly losing ground, soon recovered towards the rear on the rail, snuck up closer turning for home, dropped out under pressure inside final 150 metres. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Close up early, became some 2L off the pace when tempo quickened from 750 metres out, fought on steadily from similar position into straight without threatening.
Began well but soon taken back to midfield, dropped further back towards rear passing the 650 metres, steadied for a run inside the 200 metres, did not find much room closing stages.
Began awkwardly losing ground, soon recovered 3-wide towards the rear, awkwardly placed rounding home bend swinging very wide into straight, found nothing.
Travelled in last few, taken extremely wide from the 450 metres into straight, kept on one pace. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Moderate start losing ground, soon recovered to 5th over 2L off the pace, obtained clear passage shortly after straightening, fought on well under pressure.
Settled just off the pace 3-wide early in back straight, improved to join the leaders rounding home bend, sustained effort to hit the front over 200 meters out, hung on well under pressure.
Ridden positively from the widest gate to take up running into back straight, soon crossed to the rails and attempted to make all, unable to sustain effort and headed over 200 metres out.
Led early from the 2 draw, steadied when crossed by race leader about 900 metres out, kept on steadily from similar position turning for home.
Soon dropped to tail-end, trialed the field until approaching final turn, saved ground turning for home, fought on steadily under pressure.
Close up early from a wide gate, taken back for wide run without cover in midfield, remained similar until approaching home turn, found nothing.
Travelled wide in midfield in 6th, similar position into home straight, produced some late impression closing stages.
Tracked leader 2-wide, fought on well turning home, stayed in contention until 50M, swamped by rivals closing stages.
Settled behind midfield, saved ground on inside, made good progress down the inside from 300M, just missed out on 3rd in a close finish.
Restrained to race near last, 7Ls off the pace middle stages, swung wide into straight, stayed on but always held by leaders in a close finish.
Slow to begin, reserved towards the rear 7Ls off the good pace, progressed steadily from 300M, nearest finish.

Settled behind midfield, shuffled back to near last home turn, responded well but no clear run late stages. (Jockey erred 600M in not shifting out which would have provided his horse with clear running in the straight.)
Led under 10lb claimer, set good pace upfront, headed inside 200M, faded towards the line.
From draw 2 moved up to chase leaders, vied for lead 200M to 100M, no extra late, lost many placings towards the line in a close finish.
Unable to slot in from draw 12, caught racing wide and no cover in midfield throughout, struggled 600M out, soon gave ground in the straight.
From wide draw steadied on jumping to obtain cover, raced in last on settling, moved closer passing 600M, wide into straight, ran on well to go 3rd near line.
Positioned ahead of midfield along the inside, kept on same pace in the straight, finished 11th but beaten about 2Ls only.
Held up 2-wide in midfield, pushed along 450M, did best work final 200M, got up near line.
Chased leaders in 4th, responded well to pressure in straight, briefly in front 50M out, caught by winner close home.
Made contact at start, raced prominently, 2 wide, peaked on turn, weakened final 350M.
Began smartly from gate 1, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, same position on turn, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Crowded on jumping, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on rail, shifted out and bumped near 500M, made good progress in straight to take 2nd.
Began awkwardly, raced 2 wide at rear, 7 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Shifted in at start and made contact, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress early in straight, no clear run final 200M, eased closing stages.
Away well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length on turn, peaked early in straight, headed and weakened final 200M.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, bumped near 500M, wider turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 200M, made minor progress thereafter.
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced 2 wide, 3 lengths or so back, commenced move after passing 500M, very wide into straight, closed off well to take a place, nearest on line.
Moderately away, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, made good progress early in straight, hit the front 200M, peaked and headed 150M, kept on evenly to the line.

Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, difficult to settle in the early stages, hard ridden after 450M, very wide turning in, made very good progress in straight to be nearest on line, just missed frame.
Slowly away, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground to turn, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, commenced move 450M, hit the front 150M, kept on well to hold off the challengers late.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at rear, 5 lengths or so back, a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, failed to make any progress in the run home.
Bumped start and unbalanced, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, challenged by rivals turning in, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final 300M.

Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide towards rear early, moved a bit closer after 1450M, positioned 3 wide in midfield on turn, angled out 600M, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Began awkwardly from gate 1, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, no clear run in straight, not able to be fully tested. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out after passing 550M, failed to close off in straight.

Moderately away from a wide draw, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, moved closer after passing 1500M, a length or so back in the middle stages, challenged the leader turning in, peaked 300M, weakened final furlong.
Jumped with them, raced towards rear on the outside, commenced move 700M, very wide turning in, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Fast into stride, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, no daylight early in straight, cleared near 250M, finished off evenly.
Out with rest, positioned 2 wide, 3 lengths or so back, commenced move after passing 550M, not enough room early in straight, cleared 300M, finished off well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Began well from a wide draw, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, travelled well to turn, took the lead early in straight, kept on strongly to the line, won by 2-1/4L.
Began smartly, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.

Broke well from the 1 gate before settling in forward of midfield in 7th, gained closer entering home straight, baulked for a run until barged his way onto the rail 150 metres out, unable to quicken to threaten.

Recovered quickly from awkward start before settling just over 2L back in 5th, held up between runners early in straight until the 300 metres, quickened well to assert authority inside final 150 meters.
Began well from a wide gate settling just some 4L back in 6th, became 7th passing the 600 metres, kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Driven forward from a wide gate, carried 3-wide approaching final turn, kept on same pace without quickening.
Prominent and wide without cover after beginning from a wide gate, obtained cover 3-wide 600 metes out, folded up quickly after straightening.
Slightly slow out, recovered under pressure to just worse than midfield in 10th, saved ground entering home straight, dropped quickly out of contention inside final 200 metres.
Settled towards the rear, ran on well down the centre of the straight to be nearest at finish. (Tactic questioned)
Settled in midfield in 8th, hampered between 400 and 300 metres in straight, fought on late under pressure.
Tracked the leader on the rail, switched 2-wide to challenge 600 metres out, hit the front inside the 300 metres only to be headed by the winner 150 metres out.
Soon taken back from the widest gate, fought on well down the centre of home straight.
Settled well behind, given reminders into straight, fought on well down the centre of home straight.
Hampered at start and soon dropped to tail-end after beginning from a wide gate, trailed the field most of the way, produced good late impression inside final 100 metres.
Settled just worse than midfield in 9th, went 3-wide for a run from the 550 metres, hung in a difficult ride in home straight.
Soon took up running and led until joined early in straight, under pressure when badly checked on the rail 150 metres out, never recovered.
Steadied after the start from an outside barrier, made minor progress in the straight, never a threat.
Settled midfield on the rail, held up early in the straight and found room on the rail near the 250M, ran on well and just lost 2nd near the line.
Broke well and settled midfield 2 wide, travel nicely and began to improve inside 650M, switch out in the straight and quickened well and won comfortably.
Broke only fairly, at near the rear between horses, showed good dash near the 250M but weakened in the last 75M.
Broke last and settled near the rear on the rail, moved to the outside and stayed on well, just got 2nd.
Broke with the field and ridden along to lead on the rail, weakened inside 100M.
Settled near the rear 3 wide, never a factor.
Ridden prominently from the outside draw, shared leader 2 wide, weakened inside 150M.
Travelled 3 wide no cover throughout the race, and weakened inside 200M.
Settled just behind the speed between horses, badly held up in the straight until the final 100M, and stayed on strongly.

Raced wide in midfield at start before drifting further back & being relegated to second last near 850m. Shifted to be the widest runner on cornering when about 6L behind before making some ground to midfield late.
Raced three wide with cover in midfield throughout. Eased wider on straightening when just over 4L from the lead before weakening poorly in final furlong.
Pushed forward to lead from widest gate before crossing to the rail just before the 900m bend. Joined & shared lead from 300m, tried very hard but couldn't go with winner in last 100m.

Got back to race just worse than midfield between runners. Was relegated to third last near the 600m, was 5.5L from the lead on straightening, was held up until the 200m mark before passing a few late.
Was trapped racing four wide without cover when just worse than midfield. Continued to cover additional ground around the bend when wide, weakened out quickly in last 250m after very wide passage.

Was trapped racing three wide no cover in midfield throughout. Continued to cover additional ground around the bend, entered last section just over 3L from the lead before weakening out quickly in final 250m after tough run.

Missed start by a length before racing worse than midfield. Raced keen & steadied away from heels near 800m, was held up for clear running in early part of straight & again near 150m but never really looked a challenger.

Bumped heavily & lost ground after the start and consequently raced at the rear. Continued at the back on cornering, straightened 4.5L from lead when continuing along rail but finished only one paced to midfield.
Missed the start by a length before mustering to race in midfield between runners. Was ridden along before straightening, made no impression in the run to the line & was no threat.
Had a soft run in midfield along the rail. Finished off one paced in the straight & held well beaten 4th on the line.

Taken back to share last place when racing away from rail. Continued last on straightening, was badly held up before being checked away from heels near 300m, shifted inwards passing 200m & flew home late for unlucky third.
Pushed forward, raced at the leaders quarters. Moved up to share the lead from 300m mark, overpowered immediate challenger in final 100m to win by just over 1L.

Pushed forward & held narrow lead fleetingly after start before racing third away from the rail. Entered last section only 2.5L from lead before emptying early in straight & giving ground in last 250m.

Shifted behind runners after start, was last early before improving position along the rail in middle stages to be in midfield by half-way. Stayed along the rail on straightening, moved to third at 200m before over-run late.
Began well, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide after passing 600M, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, angled out 300M, steadied off heels 200M, made no progress thereafter.
Crowded start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on evenly in straight. (Lost left hind plate near 500M.)
Bumped shortly after start, raced at rear on the inside, 6 lengths or so back on turn, angled out 450M, made no impression in straight.
Away with them, raced better than midfield on the outside, inconvenienced and dropped to midfield near 900M, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Commenced well, sent forward to take the early lead, 2 wide, headed near 900M, 3/4L back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.
Fast into stride, raced prominently on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Began fairly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, similar position on turn, finished off evenly.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide at rear, angled out approaching 500M, very wide into straight, failed to make any progress in the run home.
Shifted in at start and made contact, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Taken back from gate 9, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out 500M, made good progress in straight to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Shifted out at start and made contact, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground to turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, finished off very strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Crowded start, raced prominently on the inside, took the lead near 900M, led by 3/4L on turn, kept on well in straight to hold off the challengers late.
Broke smartly and settle just in front midfield 2 wide, travelled smoothly early in the straight, but just found one pace. (Lame right hind) (See Racing Incident Report)
Settled 2 wide near the rear, travel a bit keen throughout, took some time to respond, best stride inside 150M.
Broke on terms, ridden early and settled midfield 2 wide, angle out in the straight, quickened well and hit the front inside 100M, won nicely.
Steadied early from outside barrier, settled near the rear on the rail, save ground, and made good progress in the straight, took 3rd.
Broke only fairly but showed lots of early speed to lead, faded quickly in the straight.
Sat just in front of midfield on the rail, badly held up near 250M, and never tested.
Steadied to the rear from a wide draw, moved into the center in the straight, found not much.
Broke last and ridden early, settled just worse than midfield on the rail, responded only fairly in the straight.
Broke smoothly and sat midfield on the rail, navigated between horses early in the straight, closed off well when have clear room, but never threatened the winner.
Settled just behind midfield 2 wide, no respond in the straight, only pass weakened rivals. (Blood in trachea) (See Racing Incident Report)
Broke well and up with the pace, faded inside 300M.
Jumped with the field and settled near last 3 wide, hampered early in the straight, but never in contention.
Broke well and settle behind the speed, responded well early in the straight, hit the front near 250M but weakened inside 100M
Settled 3 wide behind the speed, dropped off in the straight.
Settled in 6th some 3L off archrival race leader, commenced move passing the 600 metres and 4-wide into straight, fought on dourly to gain upper hand inside final 50 metres.
Settled one back in 3rd on the rail, unable to quicken to threaten the length of home straight.
Began well to lead, kicked over 1L clear after straightening before eventual winner came to challenge inside final 250 metres, fought on gamely only to be denied narrowly.
Settled in 5th on the rail within 3L of pace, angled out for a run on straightening but unable to quicken to threaten.
Settled at the back of the 7-runner field, gained within 4L of pace rounding home bend, fought on steadily but could only run past well-beaten horses.
Held up in 4th some 2L back, kept on early in straight before fading inside final 300 metres.
Began well settling one back in 2nd 2-wide, folded up quickly shortly after straightening.
From draw 9 moved up to race in the 4th spot, travelled nicely in a fast run race, quickened to lead inside 300M, continued well and always in control towards the finish.
Settled in the rear, moved out to 3-wide near 800M, failed to make progress on rivals in the straight. (Jockey unable to explain for the disappointing run.)
In mid-division, did not settle and raced ungenerously in the middle stages, failed to quicken in the straight. (Jockey : may be better suited back in trip.)
Close up in 3rd, gave good response passing 400M, went 2nd 150M out but always held by winner final stages.
Tracked leader in a fast run race, kept battling to the line, lost 3rd late stages.
Settled down midfield, stayed on well from top of straight, did best work final 200M, got up for 3rd late.
Reserved near last about 7-8Ls off the pace, fought on same speed final 400M, never able to challenge.
Held up towards the rear, shuffled back to last 600M, couldn't go on in the straight, never involved.
Led at good pace, headed inside 300M, faded final stages.
Began smartly from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, 2 wide, found rail near 800M, led by a length on turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner on line.
Crowded on jumping, raced at rear, 5 lengths or so back on turn, very wide into straight, showed good response in straight, had chance to be placed when badly hampered by the faller close home.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, showed limited response in straight, badly hampered by the faller close home.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross near 800M, 2 wide on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began well, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out approaching 450M, finished off well to take a place.
Away well, raced 2 wide behind midfield, commenced move 550M, showed good response in straight, broke down and fell close home.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight.
Out with rest, raced towards rear on the inside, 2 wide from 600M, made some progress early in straight, not clear run and restrained final 75M. (Roarer.)
Stumbled and unseated rider leaving stalls.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide at rear, carried wider after passing 600M, 4 lengths or so back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame without threatening.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 1 to 2 lengths back on turn, hard ridden after passing 350M, finished off strongly to score by a narrow margin.
Bumped heavily on jumping, raced 2 wide in midfield, wider turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away well, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 75M.
Bumped start and unbalanced, sat right behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Shifted in at start and made contact, raced behind midfield on the inside, moved a bit closer after passing 700M, 3 wide turning in, no clear run early in straight, made minor progress thereafter.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide on turn, closed off well to make frame without threatening.
Jumped with them, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, 3 wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, weakened early in straight when hard run took toll.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, finished off strongly to take a place, nearest on line.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide at rear, angled out 500M, no clear running early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Out with rest, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover after 1000M, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter.
Away with them, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked 400M, weakened gradually final 300M.
Made contact at start, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 lengths back turning in, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 75M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Average to begin, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, unable to maintain position on turn, weakened early in straight. (Mucus.) (Minor abrasion to the left knee.)
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, travelled keenly after passing 800M, 3 lengths back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
Away well, positioned a length behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Crowded shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the outside, 5 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L on turn, kept on well in straight to hold off the challengers.
Began awkwardly, raced towards rear on the inside, 6 lengths or so back on turn, one-paced in straight.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 8 lengths back on turn, made little progress in straight.
Slightly inconvenienced at start, raced towards rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back on turn, passed some tired rivals in straight.
Began smartly from gate 11, raced prominently on the outside, 1/2L back on turn, finished off well to be nearest on line, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out after passing 400M, finished off evenly.
Away with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 2 lengths back on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame, not quite able to challenge.

Shifted in at start and made contact, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths or so back, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Pushed forward to race outside the leader. Was beaten off soon after cornering before weakening out poorly to be second last.
Raced in midfield away from the rail. Was hard ridden before the 500m mark, weakened poorly in the straight to be long last.

Got back to race in final trio after the start. Shared last place when racing away from the rail from 750m. Swung very wide on straightening before finishing off only moderately down the outside to be no threat in midfield.
Pushed forward to lead near 1300m, crossed to rail passing 1200m. Joined & passed by winner at 225m, battled on well to hold second.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Drifted slightly further back around the 650m bend, finished off one paced in the straight & was no threat in midfield.
Pushed forward, got good position 1,1 from about 1200m. Eased three wide before straightening, dashed to lead at 225m, pulled away to win well.

Shifted behind runners down to rail after start & shared last place in first half. Continued at the rear and along the rail on cornering, past a couple of tiring rivals when running onto non-threatening midfield finish.
Was trapped racing three wide without cover in midfield throughout. Improved position after the 650m bend, finished off only one paced to midfield in the dash to the line.
Had a nice run on the leaders back from the 1200m. Was ridden along from the 500m, weakened out in the straight to be beaten just under 5L.
Raced worse than midfield along the rail early before losing position & being relegated back to second last from the 500m. Did nothing in the straight & was well held.

Taken back to last from outside barrier. Raced in the three wide line & improved position after half-way to be in midfield from 650m. Very wide around bend, straightened widest before finishing off only steadily down outside.

Raced in midfield away from the rail. Shuffled further back near half-way, made the final bend three wide but with cover, held up momentarily on straightening before closing ok between runners to move to third in final 75m.
Broke smartly and ridden to be prominent, tracked the leader, quickened hit the front near 250M, weakened inside 150M.
Jumped with the field, settled in handy position just behind the leaders 2 wide, hard ridden inside 450M, got hampered near 250M and weakened.
Steadied after the start and settled at the rear, made no progress in the straight, never a threat.
Settled at the rear, a bit outpaced near the 600M, ridden along soon after and stayed on okay in the straight.
Broke cleanly, race keenly early when being steadied to find cover, settled behind midfield 2 wide, swing to the outside but made minor progress only.
Settle just worse than midfield on the rail, made good progress early in the straight, but only one pace after the 200M.
Broke well settled midfield 2 wide, angle out and ridden at 400M, lay in when under pressure, straightened up and responded well, won nicely.
Broke okay and settled midfield on the rail, angle to the center after 350M, closed off well but no threat to winner.
Settled just behind the speed on the rail, did not quickened well in the straight, only one pace.
Raced near midfield on the rail, found nothing in the straight, weakened inside 200M.
Ridden along in the early to cross and lead from a wide barrier, faded early in the straight. (Blood in trachea) (See Racing Incident Report)
Settled last and eased down at 600M.
Steadied from outside gate & taken back to share last place. Continued at the rear on cornering before making good late ground between runners in the final stages to just miss a minor placing.
Pushed forward to race outside the leader. Continued in second before emptying at the 175m mark & giving a couple of lengths in late stages to be beaten just over 3L in midfield.

Was trapped racing three wide without cover in midfield throughout. Cornered wide before closing off ok down the outside in late stages & only just missed second. Good effort considering wide passage throughout.
Pushed forward to lead. Joined & headed by winner near 175m, battled well to hold second narrowly.
Had a nice run on the leaders back after start. Stayed along the rail on straightening before shifting outwards noticeably mid-straight to get clear before weakening to be beaten over 4L.
Got a nice position 1,1. Raced a touch keenly near 650m bend, dashed to lead at 175m & drew away to win well.

Was the last into stride but made up some ground to race just worse than midfield along the rail. Shifted inwards near the 200m mark to get clear running before finishing off only fairly in the late stages. No threat.
Pushed forward to be prominent early before drifting back after the first bend to race in midfield away from the rail from the 900m mark. Gave ground in the final 150m & was well beaten.

Got back to race third last when coursing deep with cover. Shifted out & was the widest runner on cornering when continuing third last before making some late ground down the outside to only be 0.75L behind second on line.
Bumped at start before being steadied & taken back to last when racing along the rail. Weakened poorly in the straight & was a long last.
Slowly away, raced at rear on the inside, 7 lengths back, a bit closer on turn, 2 wide from 450M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 100M, closed off well to take a place without threatening.
Average to begin, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, same margin back on turn, hard ridden 300M, hit the front 150M, kept on strongly to the line and scored.
Began well from gate 1, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, same position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, no clear run inside final furlong.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced towards rear on the outside, 7 lengths back, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 400M, finished off strongly to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at tail, 9 lengths or so back, hard ridden 450M, very wide into straight, made no impression in the run home.

Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/4L, travelled comfortably to turn, showed limited response early in straight, headed 150M, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly thereafter. (Blood in trachea.) (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 2-1/2L back on turn, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Moderately away from a wide draw, unable to slot in, raced 3 wide with no cover, 2 lengths back, unable to maintain position from 600M, emptied and eased final 400M.
Bumped start, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 6 lengths back, commenced move approaching 450M, very wide into straight, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Broke smartly and sat outside the leader, quickened well and hit the front near 150M, got caught near the line. (Rider dropped his whip)
Settled behind the speed between horses, improved through the rail in the straight, a bit one paced and raced tight near the line.
Broke nicely, settle 3 wide midfield early, pushed to 4 wide near 700M, stayed on well and battled gamely in the straight and won by a neck.
Settled behind the leaders on the rail, found not much in the straight.
Settled just better than midfield 2 wide, soon 3 wide, no respond in the straight. (Mucus in trachea) (See Racing Incident Report)
Broke well and hard ridden to take the lead, weakened slightly near 150M, still held 4th.
Steadied to the rear from a wide draw, moved into the center in the straight, closed off fairly
Settled between horses near the rear, checked entering the straight and stayed on nicely.
Jumped with the field and settled near the rear, never a factor. (Bled)
Ridden but slightly outpace early, settled near the rear, unable to obtain clear running until 100M, ran on strongly to take third.
Travelled keenly in last few, pulled slightly forward rounding home bend, fought on steadily under pressure to reach 2nd closing stages.

Crowded early losing ground, picked up under pressure to better than midfield within 2L of pace over 700 metres out, one-out-one-back rounding home bend, weakened under pressure inside final 200 metres.
Settled in rear from the widest gate, travelled keenly throughout back straight and when 3-wide around home bend, badly checked past the 500 metres, finished off race well from widest into straight,.
Settled in midfield just over 2L on the rail, saved ground turning for home, kept on same pace without quickening.
Driven forward to join the leaders early stages, shifted one back 3-wide without cover in back straight, carried wider home turn and faded, inconvenienced 50 metres out.
Soon dropped to tail-end, remained well behind until commenced move on top of home bend and saved ground into straight, ran on under pressure without threatening.
Travelled wide in midfield, remained very wide without cover behind midfield most of the way in back straight, gave ground from final turn.
Wide in prominent position early, taken back for cover in vain before moving back up to join the leaders 600 metres out, found nothing in straight.
Soon gained narrow advantage after moderate start, obtained rails run over 700 metres out, joined rounding home bend before re-gained advantage into straight, soon driven clear.
Close up early, gave ground quickly in back straight, tailed-off from home bend. (Mucus)
Jumped well from the one draw, gradually restrained to one back position over 700 metres out, kept on at the one pace without quickening under pressure.
Towards the rear, switched to 3-wide entering back straight, stayed on well and did best work late final 200M, nearest finish.
Settled down in midfield along the inside, crept closer to leaders home turn, quickened to lead 150M, continued on well towards the line.
From wide draw taken across behind runners, raced at the rear 10Ls off the pace at one stage, came under pressure 600M, made limited progress in the straight.
Caught 3-wide no cover chasing leaders, struggled to keep up 600M, gave ground before reaching home straight. (Jockey questioned re riding tactics)
From draw 1 moved up to track leaders, fought on steadily final 300M, held by winner towards the finish. (Jockey dropped whip 200M.)
Dropped back from draw 12, waited with near the rear, driven wide into straight, stayed on without threat.
Began fairly and settled towards the rear, niggled along 600M, closed off only fairly before awkwardly placed final 50M. (Jockey unable to explain for the poor run / Blood in trachea.)
Tracked leader, hit the lead early straight, caught by winner 150M, no extra and faded towards the line.
Unable to slot in from draw 11, raced 3-wide in midfield, wide into straight, closed off mildly over final 300M.
Jumped on terms, up with early pace before dropping back to a midfield spot, under heavy pressure home turn, soon beaten. (Blood in trachea.)
Crossed to the lead nearing 1200M, came under pressure prior to home turn, headed top of straight, weakened noticeably. (Jockey : didn't travel comfortably in the race.)
Restrained behind midfield, badly held up for clear running rounding the home turn, ran on well final 300M, nearest finish.
Average to begin, raced towards rear, nearer to the middle track, 5 lengths back in the middle stages, made no impression final 400M.
Bumped start, raced towards rear, 5 lengths or so back at 400M, made no progress thereafter.
Jumped well from gate 1, raced prominently in the middle of the track, hard ridden from 400M but only showed limited response, kept on same pace to the line.
Slowly away, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Began well from gate 12, sent forward to take the lead on the stands' rail, shared the lead with rivals from 500M, peaked and headed 250M, kept on evenly to take a place.
Jumped with them, raced prominently on the middle track, peaked on run 500M, weakened quickly thereafter, eased final furlong.
Shifted in at start and bumped, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the stands' rail, hard ridden after passing 300M, only showed limited response, one-paced to the line.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced in midfield, nearer to the stands' side, hard ridden after passing 400M, peaked on run 200M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Began well, raced prominently on the stands' side, shared lead from 500M, peaked and headed 250M, ran on evenly to take 2nd.
Jumped well, raced in midfield on the stands' side, moved a bit closer after passing 500M, hit the front 250M, ran on strongly to the line, easily scored.
Made contact at start, raced prominently on the middle track, peaked 450M, weakened thereafter.
Began only fairly and bumped, raced behind midfield on the stands' side, 5 lengths back at 400M, hard ridden from 300M, only showed limited response, one-paced thereafter. (Bled.)
Slightly slow out, raced at rear on the stands' rail, 6 lengths back in the middle stages, failed to make any progress final 400M.
Reserved in midfield 3-wide, gave good response final 300M under top weight, went 2nd 150M out, nearest finish.
Niggled along early, raced along the fence in a rearward spot, responded fairly from 400M, never going the pace to challenge.
From wide draw shifted across behind runners early stages, raced as the back-marker on settling, failed to run on passing 400M, never got involved.
Vied for early lead before sitting back in 2nd, kept on steadily turning for home but not pace to challenge winner, lost 2nd 150M.
Held up 2-wide in midfield, lacked the needed response passing 400M, always held by leaders, no extra final 150M.
Had a ground saving trip from draw 1, settled ahead of midfield, not able to challenge winner, battled on to hold 4th
From wide draw taken back to the rear early stages, wide no cover passing 600M, widest into straight before making mild progress towards the finish.
Dueled for the lead early stages, took up running 900M, kicked on well inside 300M, continued on willingly late to hold off runner up.
Bustled along early stages, chased leaders in 3rd, stayed in contention until weakening 150M from home.
Began awkwardly, obtained a midfield spot along the 2-path, had some difficulty obtaining clear running early straight, did best work towards the line but never a serious threat.
Not hurried after the jump, raced towards the rear 7Ls off the pace, wide into straight, failed to pick up speed.
From wide draw shifted across behind runners early stages, settled down behind midfield, couldn't finish off turning home.
In mid-division racing along the inside, remained one-pace to the line, made no impression on leaders throughout the straight.
Chased leaders early stages, caught wide no cover from 1000M, came under pressure 500M, tried hard to stay in contention early straight before fading inside 200M.
Broke alertly but outpaced early on, ridden along throughout the race, hard ridden inside 600M, angle out and stayed on very well to take 3rd.
Broke well, failed to show early speed despite being ridden along, raced 4 wide throughout, and weakened inside 300M.
Ridden vigorously after the start to share the lead on the rail, ran on well and battled hard to finish 2nd.
Settled near the rear 2 wide, angled out at the 400M, and stayed on only fairly to pass weakened rivals. (See Racing Incident Report)
Broke well and showed good early speed to lead 2 wide, kept on okay early in the straight but weakened the inside 200M.
Broke well settled midfield 2 wide, angled out at the 450M, travelled on the bridle until 300M, quickened nicely when asked, always have the measure of the race.
Settled just in front of midfield 3 wide, made no progress in the straight.
Broke nicely and settled midfield 3 wide, never travelled well and faded in the straight. (See Racing Incident Report)
Ridden along early to race prominently, under pressure inside 450M and soon weakened.
Settled near the rear on the rail, continued to improve close to the rail throughout, angle out inside 150M made good progress.
Broke awkwardly and settled at the rear, lost touch with the field near 500M and dropped away. (Finished tailed out, must trial)
Broke with the field and sat behind the speed on the rail, only one paced in the straight, just lost 3rd on the line.
Pushed forward to lead. Continued in lead until being joined & passed by the winner at 150m before giving a few lengths in concluding stages.

Drifted back after start before racing third last between runners in middle stages. Was relegated to share last place near the 700m, was last & just under 6L from lead on straightening before weakening further to long last.
Had a nice run on leaders back throughout. Continued only 2L from lead at the furlong mark before emptying & weakening in last 100m. (Roarer again).

Shifted behind runners & down to rail in first furlong before racing third last along the inside. Moved off the rail on straightening when just over 4L from lead, shifted out, not much room at 200m before closing off ok late.

Slow to begin before being ridden along to be forward of midfield after first 200m. Continued in first half but was left three wide without cover from about 900m. Straightened 3L behind, battled on well until 150m, weakened late.

Came across from widest gate but left racing four wide without cover in midfield from 1200m. Continued very wide around bend in middle stages, was beaten before straightening & weakened to long second last.

Not much early speed but made ground along the rail to race in midfield. Straightened along the rail when 3L from lead, was held up & had no clear run until passing the 200m before closing strongly late for unlucky third.

Steadied & taken back to last from second widest gate. Moved wider on the track passing the 600m when continuing last. Was the widest runner on straightening when 4.5L behind before making some late ground to midfield.
