Raced in midfield, three wide with cover. Held up momentarily on straightening when shifting out for a run, got clear & asked for full effort at 300m mark, raced to lead at 150m & went on to win with something in hand.

Pushed forward, raced wide when disputing lead early before improving & shifting across to race outside the leader from the 950m. Continued in second until the 250m before emptying in last furlong & weakening late.

Pushed forward after start, raced outside leader early before being crossed & racing 1,1 from 900m. Eased three wide before 600m, entered last section under 2L from lead when 4th before peaking 200m & giving some late ground.

Had a nice spot 1,1 early before being shuffled a pair further back from 900m. Made ground between runners at 250m, moved to second at 125m, continued well all the way to line but couldn't match winner.

Raced in midfield between runners early before drifting slightly further back after the 850m bend. Continued to be shuffled further back approaching the home corner, straightened second last before doing nothing in straight.

Drifted back after the start & raced worse than midfield when three wide with cover. Entered last section 4L from lead, raced tight between runners at 200m mark before closing off ok late to not be beaten far in midfield.
Shifted in at start, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Began well from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on strongly in straight, easily scored.
Fast into stride, raced prominently on the outside, peaked 500M, hampered approaching 400M, weakened early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, trapped wide slightly behind midfield, hampered near 750M, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began well from a wide draw, unable to slot in, trapped very wide, a length or so back, made contact near 750M, struggled on turn, eased early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Hampered start, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, wider turning in, finished off evenly. (Rider dropped whip.)
Shifted out at start, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, there to turn, hard ridden after passing 400M, peaked on run 250M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began only fairly, positioned 3 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, commenced move approaching 500M, finished off evenly.
Crowded start, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, kept on well in straight to take 2nd without threatening.
Jumped with them, taken back to race at rear, 4 lengths back on turn, made some progress in straight.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced better than midfield but trapped very wide, unable to maintain position on turn, emptied early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly, showed no early speed, raced at rear, 7 lengths back, a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, passed some tired runners early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened thereafter.
Sat near the rear between horses, passed a few weakened rivals in the straight.
Settled near midfield 2 wide, made no progress in the straight and weakened inside 150M.
Broke slowly and settled near the rear on the rail, made good progress in the straight despite the slow pace.
Sat 4 wide at the rear without cover throughout, travelled keenly, and faded inside 250M.
Settled 3 wide near the rear, never a factor.
Settled just worse than midfield 2 wide, found nothing in the straight. (Roarer)
Broke well and sat just behind the speed on the rail, held up in the straight until the 150M, but only little response when have clear running. (Bled)
Settled midfield 3 wide no cover, only one pace in the straight.
Broke smartly and raced in a prominent position 2 wide, angled out into 3 wide at 550M, made good progress in the straight but never threatened the winner.
Settled just in front of midfield on the rail, stuck behind horses in the straight until near the 100M, but stayed on strongly.
Steadied on jumping from a wide barrier and settled at the rear on rail, saved ground and made some progress in the straight.
Broke alertly and led the race, kept on okay and weakened at 150M.
Broke awkwardly and settled midfield on the rail, no response in the straight and weakened.
Broke nicely, was midfield 5 wide early but soon ridden to sit outside the leader at the 900M, kept on well and won.
Jumped well but soon taken back to the rear, improved to 7th along the rail shortly after, angled out for a run 500 metres out, found nothing under pressure.

Settled in last few and wide without cover after beginning from a wide gate, dropped to last onto home bend and widest of all into straight, unable to quicken under pressure and dropped away closing stages.

Ridden along early before settling in 5th in midfield on the rail, in similar position turning for home, switched out for a run over 300 metres out, fought on steadily without quickening under pressure.

Restrained to last from a wide gate, trailed the field to the 950 metres, remained well behind in 9th rounding home bend, tight between runners upon straightening, obtained a run 300 metres out, ran on late.
Hampered twice in back straight dropping to one from last, 3rd last in 8th coming onto home bend, raced tight 500 metres out, ran home one-paced.

Pressed forward from the widest gate, disputed lead before settling just off the pace, became 3rd on the rail coming onto home bend, quickened to hit the front briefly over 250 metres, just held on for 2nd.

Began fast from a wide gate, pulled hard to lead on the rail 1350 metres out, held over 1L lead most of the way to home straight, came under pressure to maintain advantage but unable to sustain effort inside final 300 metres.
Moderate start, recovered to 6th some 5L off the pace, commenced move rounding home bend gaining to joint 5th some 3L back into straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
Broke well settling some 3L back in 3rd and becoming 4th shortly after, responded well inside final 350 metres to hit the front over 200 metres out and driven clear.

Moderate start, erratic in 4th passing the 1500 metres, gained steadily to reach 1L 2nd coming out of back straight, weakened under pressure inside final 300 metres. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Unhurried after the start, taken back to a rearward spot from draw 13, wide into straight, ran on evenly under top weight.
Dropped back from draw 11, waited with near the rear, badly held up 250-150M before closing off well final stages. (Jockey questioned re his riding.)
Jumped smoothly, soon moved up to the lead setting steady tempo, travelled strongly turning into straight, drew off to win with something in hand.
Tracked the pace while racing 2-wide, kept on same pace on straightening, always held by leaders.
From draw 12 moved forward to track leaders, wide no cover after 1000M, under pressure 500M, failed to threaten.
Chased leaders early stages, shuffled back to midfield making the home turn, fought on same pace in the straight and never going the pace to challenge.
Settled down 3-wide in mid-division, pushed along 500M, had nothing left 300M from home, weakened to last.
Dropped back from draw 14, raced in last 7-8Ls off leader, came wide into the straight, stayed on final 400M and gradually improved his position.
Dueled for the early lead on outside, driven top of straight but unable to go with the winner, fought on steadily holding 2nd spot until 100M.
Restrained in midfield along the 2-path, shuffled back to near the rear middle stages, found disappointingly little in the straight, never threatened.
Off a step slow, recovered to race behind mid-division, saved ground on inside, not going the pace to challenge leaders in straight, battled on to hold 5th.
Began only fairly, shifted across behind runners from draw 10 to be racing behind midfield, switched to 3-wide entering home turn, failed to run on.
Tracked the pace racing along the inside, finished off well in a steady effort, got up for 2nd near 100M, unable to trouble the runaway winner.
Held up in midfield along the fence, fought on same pace in the run to the line, always held by leaders.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at rear on the inside, 7 lengths or so back on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared near 250M, finished off strongly to take a place.
Out with rest, raced better than midfield on the inside, easy run to turn, hard ridden after passing 300M, hit the front 125M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner late.
Away well, raced prominently on the outside, peaked near 500M, weakened early in straight, eased final furlong.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced towards rear on the outside, 7 lengths or so back on turn, made some progress in straight.
Jumped well from gate 10, raced in midfield on the outside, 5 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly. (Lost right front plate near 800M.)
Jumped with them, tracked leaders, 2 wide, 3 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M, eased final 100M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, 8 lengths back turning in, taken wide in straight and finished off very strongly to score.

Bumped start and unbalanced, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/2L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked near 200M, headed 125M, weakened gradually final 50M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no impression in straight.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M, eased final 100M.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 6 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame.
Jumped well from the widest draw, raced in midfield on the outside, a bit closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.

Began well from a wide draw, tracked leaders on the outside, moved closer after passing 800M, shared lead on turn, ridden after passing 300M, showed very good response, kept on strongly to the line, won by a length.
Inconvenienced at start, taken back to race at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, passed some tired rivals in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, finished off evenly.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced behind midfield on rail, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening.
Out with rest, raced in midfield on the inside, 3 lengths back, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching 200M, closed off well to take a place.
Jumped with them, sent forward to take the lead, shared the lead with rival from 700M, peaked and headed 300M, weakened and eased final furlong. (Bled.)
Taken back from gate 6, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, moved a bit closer after passing 650M, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Slowly away, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 lengths or so back, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching 150M, steadied off heels 100M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Began awkwardly and bumped the inside of its gate on jumping, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 550M, very wide turning in, no clear run early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Bumped start, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, one-paced in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Commenced well, raced prominently on the outside, 3rd on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
Away with them, positioned a length behind the leader on the inside, there to turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared after passing 300M, finished off well to take 2nd, always held.
Made contact shortly after start, raced at rear, 7 lengths back on turn, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line, no threat to the first few.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, raced tight early in straight, failed to make any progress thereafter.
Made contact shortly after start, raced towards rear on the outside, 5 lengths back on turn, very wide turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.

Began only fairly from gate 1, positioned a length behind the leader on the inside, easy run to turn, hard ridden from 300M, showed very good response, hit the front 100M, kept on well to the line and scored.

Jumped well, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead near 750M, found rail 500M, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually final 50M. (Blood in trachea.)
Away well, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out after passing 500M, very wide turning in, raced tight early in straight, made no progress thereafter.
Bumped start, tracked leaders, 3 wide, found a 2 wide spot near 500M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began well from the widest draw, took the early lead but trapped wide, headed near 750M, 2nd on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Bumped start, raced prominently but trapped wide early, 2 wide on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, found rail near 400M, finished off strongly to take 2nd, nearest finish.
Bumped on jumping, raced at rear on the inside, 5 to 6 lengths back on turn, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Average to begin, positioned 2-1/2L behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, angled out 350M, finished off evenly.
Ridden to lead narrowly, maintained advantage most of the way to straight, faded inside final 150 metres.
Tailed-off throughout, never seen with a chance.
Travelled one back in 3rd on the rail, drifted pver 2L back to 4th 600 metres out, saved ground turning in, unable to sustain effort inside final 100 metres.
Crowed at start losing ground, remained in last few to home straight, fought on steadily under pressure.
Ridden along wide in first few, gradually drifted one-out-one-back to 4th, became 3rd rounding home bend, hit the front under pressure over 200 metres out, just lasted.
Pressed forward from a wide gate to join the leaders, travelled wide most of the way and hit the front briefly 550 metres out and again turning into straight, soon found no extra.
Soon taken back to rear from a wide gate, never seen with a chance.
Crowded at start losing ground, remained well behind to home straight, made up good ground.
Settled just worse than midfield, commenced move rounding home bend, responded well inside final 200 metres to just fail to get up on line.
Travelled wide in midfield from a wide gate, gained nearer the rail with cover in back straight, gained closer to 5th 700 metres out, wide into straight and fought on steadily without threatening.
Ridden along in first few on the rail settling over 2L back in 5th, became midfield in 6th 700 metres out and saved ground turning in, ran on steadily without threatening.
Travelled wide with cover in worse than midfield, lost cover 3-wide rounding home bend and widest into straight, finished off the race well.
Settled midfield on the rail, held up at near 350M and only one pace in the straight.
Settled at rear, only able to pass weakened rivals in the straight.
Settled near the rear 2 wide, moved to 3 wide to improve near 1000M, hard ridden at 800M, stayed on to grab 3rd.
Broke well and used the inside draw to lead, weakened at 650M.
Broke nicely and showed early speed, but was steadied to find cover and settled near the rear, made no progress in the straight.
Settled just behind midfield, got hampered at near 1700M, and hard ridden at 600M but no response.
Settled in front of midfield on the rail, moved to 2 wide at 800M to improve, and stayed on okay but no threat to the winner.
Settled behind the speed on the rail, got shuffled back to midfield at 500M, found not much in the straight.
Broke with the field and settled just behind the leaders 2 wide, hard ridden at 600M and kept on okay to held 4th.
Settled midfield 2 wide, made a midrace move at 800M, took the lead at 600M, kept on fairly early in the straight and weakened inside 100M. (See Racing Incident Report)
Slow to begin, ridden early to settle behind midfield on the rail, improved between horses inside 800M, angled out at 350M, quickened very well and won easily.
Track the leader throughout, started to give ground at 650M. (Bled)

Difficult to settle passing winning-post before racing midfield away from rail. Moved three wide with cover near 900m, ridden to improve near 500m, improved to third on straightening, finishes strongly in last 100m to win.

Restrained on jumping & taken back to race second last along rail. Continued near the back approaching corner, shifted wider on straightening before making some late headway to midfield from the back.

Pushed forward, raced second away from the rail. Looked to not be going as well as leader at 500m, cornered about a length behind, dug deep to move to narrow lead at 200m before over-run by winner in last 50m.
Shifted across behind runners & raced third last away from rail. Continued rearward on cornering before doing nothing in the straight & weakening badly to long second last.

Had no speed after the start & despite being ridden along drifted back to race worse than midfield along rail. Moved away from the rail at half-way, shifted wider on the track on straightening but made no noteworthy headway.

Shifted across behind runners after the start & raced at the tail. Continued rearward & a long way from the lead on straightening, made some late progress when halving margin in the straight to be beaten about 4L.
Raced third on the rail for the majority. Came under pressure before straightening & weakened badly in the final furlong to be well beaten third last.
Was trapped racing three wide without cover in midfield for the majority. Was hard ridden from 500m mark, fought on bravely in the straight to hold third, beaten only 2L.

Obtained a good position 1,1 after the start. Came under heavy pressure at the 800m & began losing ground & weakening back through the field. Failed to finish, bled & irregular heart rhythm, must trial.
Pushed forward to lead. Travelled well approaching corner, looked the winner on straightening when about 1L clear of nearest challenger, emptied at 200m, headed soon after, weakened to 4th.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Was 4L from the lead entering final section & could only hold that deficit in the straight. No threat.
Raced in midfield away from the rail throughout. Was hard ridden from before the 500m mark, forced the widest runner on straightening before doing little in the straight.
Commenced well from gate 1, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Average to begin, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/4L on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Out with rest, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off evenly.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, moved a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to make frame, nearest on line.
Slightly slow out, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to take 2nd without threatening the winner, useful debut.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 2 to 3 wide slightly behind midfield, travelled keenly after passing 700M, very wide on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly thereafter.
Away with them, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Began well, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, hampered 150M, weakened final 100M.

Began awkwardly and made contact, raced prominently but trapped very wide early, dropped towards rear after passing 1000M, 6 lengths back on turn, showed no response early in straight, eased final 200M. (Lame right front leg next day.)
Crowded on jumping, raced towards rear, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, finished off evenly.
Jumped with them, positioned 3 wide, a length or so back, 2 wide from 750M, commenced move 400M, hit the front 200M, kept on strongly to the line, won by 1-3/4L.
Broke last, ridden to be prominent, rounded the turn awkwardly, offered nothing in the straight.
Broke with the field and had no early speed, settled at rear, showed a strong turn of foot in the straight and won.
Broke nicely and sat just behind the speed, hit the front at 150M and kept on well, just got caught in the final stride.
Broke well and disputed the lead, kept on okay until 200M, weakened afterwards.
Settled midfield 3 wide, travelled nicely coming into the straight, but only one pace when asked.
Broke with the field, settled worse than midfield 3 wide and was kept wide throughout, stayed on okay in the straight.
Settled at the rear, passed only weakened rivals in the straight.
Settled midfield 2 wide, raced keenly, faded in the straight.
Steadied after the start, detached from the field, never in contention. (Performance unacceptable, must trial)
Settled midfield on the rail, kept improving on the rail throughout, made decent progress.
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide between horses, never a factor.
Broke smartly and led the race on the rail, weakened near 200M.
Pressed forward from the widest gate, disputed lead early in back straight, shifted 1L back 700 metres out, weakened upon straightening.
Settled in better than midfield in 5th, swung widest into straight, fought on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Began well settling just off the pace in 3rd on the rail, hit the front under pressure over 200 metres out only to be caught final few strides.
Crowded at start and soon dropped behind midfield on the rail, saved ground turning for home, kept on steadily without quickening.
Never better than 7th in midfield, ran home one-paced.

Well there early from the one gate settling some over 3L back in 6th turning into back straight, drifted further off coming onto home bend when pace quickened, quickened on well under pressure to snatch victory close to home.
Began well from a wide gate, obtained 2-wide position in 4th half-way down back straight, angled out for a run rounding final turn, kept on steadily under pressure without threatening
Soon taken back to tail-end from a wide gate, trailed the field into straight, tightened 150 metres out, no further impression.
Slowly away, remained in last few to straight, ran on past well-beaten horses.
Ridden forward from the middle gate to soon lead on the rail setting fast pace, unable to sustain effort and headed over 200 metres out.
Towards the rear most of the way, made no impression in home straight. (Blood in trachea)
Failed to muster from a wide gate and soon dropped to last few, came under pressure from the 600 metres and one of last few into straight, finished off the race strongly and did best work late.
Reserved behind midfield, made 3-wide move 700M, caught wider homme turn, ran on willingly on straightening to claim 2nd near line.
Crowded for room on jumping, restrained to race near the rear 6Ls off leader, 3-wide move from 700M getting closer to leaders, offered a mild response final 300M down outside of straight.
Settled just off the inside tracking in close range of the leader, moved out 500M to issue a challenge, fought on same pace to the line, held by leaders final 200M.
Held up behind mid-division, saved ground on the turns, shuffled back to the rear 600M, gave limited response in straight passing tired rivals only.
Steadied to race in last on jumping, remained patiently handled until reaching top of straight, responded strongly under confident riding, moved clear late to score 3rd win of the season.
From draw 4 obtained a midfield spot along the fence, held up for clear running rounding the home turn before closing off moderately in the straight, just missed 3rd.
Moved up to track the pace, pushed out to a 3-wide spot without cover from 800M, dropped away turning for home.

From draw 1 soon established the front and led steadily under 10lb claimer, back in 2nd spot from 1000M before regaining the lead 500M, kicked on well early straight, caught near 100M, lost 2nd close home.
Settled down in midfield, shuffled back to a rearward spot passing 700M, soon pushed along, made no headway to the finish.
Slow to begin as usual, held up towards the rear before making a quick forward move 700M, rallied 4-wide home turn, battled on to 100M, no extra late.
Chased leaders early before settling down ahead of midfield, held up for some distance nearing 400M but unable to make an impact in the run home. (Jockey questioned re riding tactics.)
In midfield early stages, improved to the lead 1100M after racing wide without cover, lost lead 500M, weakened rapidly to finish last.

Away with them, raced prominently on the inside, took the lead near 800M, led by 3/4L on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed near 200M, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Mucus.)
Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, headed near 800M, 2nd on turn, showed some response early in straight, peaked on run 200M, weakened gradually final 50M.
Began well from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made some headway in straight.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Out with rest, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths back on turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, eased final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, positioned slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved ground to turn, unable to obtain clear running early in straight, cleared near 150M, finished off well to take a place.
Began only fairly and made contact, raced in midfield on the outside, 2-1/2L behind the leader on turn, finished off very strongly, easily scored.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the inside, 5 to 6 lengths back, saved ground on turn, kept on same pace to the line.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 3 wide with cover at rear, 5 lengths or so back, very wide turning in, made no impression in straight.
Bumped start, tracked leaders on the outside, no cover throughout, 3/4L back on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked on run 150M, weakened gradually final 50M.
Moderately away, raced in midfield, 3 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Raced in midfield along the rail before improving to race leaders back after first bend. Straightened just over a length form the lead but did little in the straight & weakened to be beaten over 8L.

Had no early speed & raced 4th last. Made mid-race-move to sweep around the field & improve to be four wide without cover outside the leaders from 600m. Moved to narrow lead nearing 200m, over-power last 50m by winner.
Raced just worse than midfield between runners. Moved into three wide line with cover after 700m when improving to midfield, made steady late ground between runners in the straight to be beaten 3L.

Dipped at start but recovered to race in midfield away from rail. Straightened just over 3L from lead when surrounded by runners before finishing off only one paced to be beaten just over 4L into midfield on line.
Pushed forward to lead. Challenged & headed in lead passing the 1300m before regaining lead 1000m. Headed on straightening, battled on until the 250m before weakening out quickly in final stages.

Raced in midfield along the rail. Shuffled further back after 700m when runners improved out wide. Moved away from inside just before cornering, shifted wider again on straightening before making late ground down the outside.

Obtained a nice position 1,1 after the first bend. Raced tight between runners when moving three wide near 600m, continued to be awkwardly placed when only a length behind on straightening before finishing fairly late.

Slow to begin & consequently raced third last away from the rail. Relegated to second last near 1000m, moved wider on the track passing 600m, was very wide on cornering when 6.5L behind before weakening poorly in straight.

Pushed forward to race prominent, improved to narrow lead passing 1300m when away from the rail before racing outside the leader from the 1000m mark. Began losing ground before straightening, weakened badly to long last.
Had no early speed & raced rearward. Moved 4 wide with cover passing 800m, straightened 4L from the lead before closing strongly down the outside to steal lead in final 50m.
Drifted back at start, raced rearward before relegated to last near the 1200m. Continued near the tail & 5.5L from lead on straightening & never threatened in straight.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Stayed along the rail on straightening when just over 3L from the lead before weakening poorly in the straight to be well beaten into third last.

Raced in midfield away from the rail before making mid-race move from the 750m, improving to share the lead from the 500m. Continued to hold narrow lead until being joined by the runner-up just before the 200m, peaked late.

Was trapped racing three wide without cover in midfield for first half before getting some cover from 750m. Forced the widest runner when ridden to improve from 600m, very wide on straightening before weakening last furlong.
Began slowly, settled near the rear, stayed on well to grab 5th. (Barrier manners unacceptable, must stall test)
Settled worse than midfield 2 wide, hampered and taken wide at 600M when rounding the turn, never a threat.
Sat 3 wide no cover early in midfield, improved to be in 2 wide with cover at 600M, made only minor progress in the straight.
Broke well and ridden to lead, travelled a bit keen, and had a 5 lengths advantage entering the straight, weakened inside 200M, just held on by a neck.
Crossed from outside barrier to sit behind the speed, under pressure at 400M and soon faded.
Began okay and settled just in front midfield, made good process in the straight when under pressured, weakened slightly inside final 50M and finished 2nd.
Settled midfield on the rail, stayed on okay in the straight to grab 3rd, never a threat to the top 2.
Broke well and ridden to be prominent, just one paced in the straight.
Settled near the rear, was taken wide rounding the home turn at 600M, made no impression in the straight.
Began a bit slow, settled at the rear on the rail, and made some ground near the rail in the straight.
Broke only fairly and settled worse than midfield on the rail, only able to pass weakened rivals in the straight.
Settled midfield 2 wide, rounded the turn awkwardly and soon faded. (Mucus in trachea, performance unacceptable, must trial)

Was ridden at start to hold position when wide but with cover in midfield. Drifted slightly further back after the first bend, straightened just under 4L from lead & finished off only one paced in straight & never challenged.

Raced second before being hampered near 800m, was then third away from the rail before being forced three wide from 650m. Moved to narrow lead at 300m, passed quickly by winner at 100m, held second & was 2L clear of third.

Was last away & then crowded after start & consequently lost ground & shared last place when racing along the rail. Was last & 7.5L from lead on straightening but weakened badly in straight to be long last.

Wasn't the fastest to begin but mustered speed to race in midfield between runners. Shifted down to rail at first bend, straightened just under 3L from lead, shifted outwards at 300m but failed to finish off & was beaten 7L.

Shared last place when racing away from the rail. Shifted wider on the track at 600m bend, was the widest on straightening when over 6L from lead before rocketing home down the outside to move to lead at 100m & win drawing away.

Raced in midfield, three wide with cover early before two wide after first bend when continuing between horses. Was just over 2L behind on straightening before improving between horses in final stages to narrowly steal third late.

Was trapped racing four wide without cover in midfield before being three wide from the 700m. Got come cover after 650m mark, straightened only 1.5L from the lead before giving some ground in final stages (bled).

Raced in midfield along the rail in early & middles stages before improving to race on leaders back just before cornering. Stayed along the inside on straightening but failed to challenge in the straight.

Pushed forward to lead before crossing down to the rail (rider suspended) when leading just before first bend. Joined & headed by runner-up near the 300m, battled on well but was just caught for third late.

Didn't have the early speed of others & drifted back after start. Was third last between runners before being hampered near 600m. Was a long second last on cornering before making good late ground in concluding stages to 5th.

Improved after start to race second before being crossed & racing leaders back near 800m. Moved off the rail & raced outside leader after 650m mark, emptied mid-straight & weakened out quickly in late stages.

Raced worse than midfield when wide but with cover in early & middle stages. Had three runners behind on straightening when just under 6L from lead but did nothing in straight & weakened to long second last.
Began fairly, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, 5-1/2L back, wider on turn, made little progress in straight.
Shifted out at start and made contact, sat 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, angled out and bumped 600M, 2nd turning in, kept on well in straight to take a place, always just held.
Taken back from gate 13, raced towards rear on the inside, 2 wide in the middle stages, 5 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear, 8 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Crowded on jumping, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, failed to make any progress in straight.
Moderately away, positioned 2 wide, 4 to 5 lengths back, angled out after passing 600M, very wide turning in, made some headway in straight.
Inconvenienced at start, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, similar position on turn, peaked 400M, weakened final 200M.
Shifted in at start and made contact, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on very well in straight but unable to hold off the winner late.

Began fairly, unable to slot in, raced better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths or so back on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly to the line. (Lost left front plate in the middle stages.)
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced at rear on the outside, peaked on turn, emptied early in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, 6 lengths back turning in, finished off very strongly to score by a neck.
Began well from a wide draw, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, bumped and carried wider 600M, peaked 400M, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Began only fairly, positioned on rail in midfield, slightly improved along the rail on turn, made some progress in straight to make frame.
Began well, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back, commenced move 550M, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Sat midfield 5 wide from the stands' rail, switched out to the center at 450M, ran on nicely late to grab 3rd.
Badly hampered and checked inside 850M, never seriously tested.
Broke nicely, on pace early 2 off the stands' rail, kept on well when asked near 350M, shifted across towards the stands' rail inside 200M, and held on.
On stands' side at the rear, never a threat.
Settled close to the center just in front of midfield, never a factor.
Severely hampered near 850M, moved towards the center and never tested.
Settled midfield 3 off the stands' rail, made not much progress.
Broke smartly from gate 1, settled close to the rear near center-track, not much response until final 150M.
Broke with the field, sat just behind the leaders 4 off the stands' rail, responded well when asked to finished 2nd, always held.
Began very slowly, moved across and settled 4 wide on the stands' rail, stayed on well. (Barrier manners unacceptable, must trial)
Led on the stands' side, weakened inside 350M.
Sat 5 wide from the stand's rail, on pace early, just one paced when asked, held 4th.
Settled near the stands' rail, angled out towards to center at 350M, shifted back inside 200M, made minor progress only.
Sat behind the speed on the stands' rail, kept on okay and weakened inside 100M.

Pressed forward from a wide gate to circle the field early, led on the rail inside the 1300 metres kicking over 2.5L clear early in back straight, quickened up the pace again on home bend and 3L ahead turning in, caught close to home.
Never better than midfield, ridden from the 800 metres and given reminders approaching final turn, found nothing.
Settled in distant 4th early stages, ridden along in 5th rounding home bend when pace increased, one-paced in straight.
Jumped awkwardly losing ground, soon recovered to just worse than midfield on the rail in 10th, drifted backward to 12th when pace increased coming onto home bend, made no further impression.
Soon taken well back from the widest gate, never a factor.
Settled in last few, gradually drifted back to last into home straight, ran on well to be nearest at finish.

Pressed forward from a wide gate, restrained for one back position into back straight, drifted slightly further back in 4th when pace quickened on the bend, weakened out of contention shortly after straightening.
Settled in midfield on the rail, inconvenienced and lost position 700 metres out, renewed effort from 9th rounding home bend, ran on under pressure without threatening. (Lame next day)
Began well, gradually settled in forward of midfield in 6th or 7th, wide under pressure into home straight, found nothing.

Began well before settling better than midfield in 5th, drifted back to midfield in 7th onto home bend, obtained run 350 metres out, ran on well despite hanging in to snatch victory from tiring leader close to home.

Travelled 3-wide without cover most of the way, in midfield to half-way when allowed to make swift headway around the field passing the 900 metres reaching 3L 3rd on the bend, kept on same pace under pressure.
Settled well behind from a wide gate, finished off the race well inside final 250 metres.
Settled in last few, made no show.

Pressed forward to join the leaders from a wide gate, settling off the pace before pulling forward to 1L 2nd 950 metres out, drifted 2.5L off when race leader quickened up on the bend, no extra final 200 metres.
Held up behind mid-division, ran on moderately passing 400M, got up for 3rd 100M, not reach first two.
Up with early pace but not going fast enough to cross his rivals, caught wide no cover throughout, soon beaten turning home and gave ground from 350M.
Went forward to track leaders along the 2-path, moved up to 2nd spot 400M, couldn't find the needed late kick over final 200M.
Raced 3-wide in mid-division, went wider 500M, soon outpaced by leaders in straight.
From wide draw taken across behind runners, waited with near the rear, responded well to pressure, shifted further out 300M to obtain clear running, closed off final 200M fastest.
Never far off leaders, wide into straight, not quickened under pressure, soon out of contention.
From draw 12 moved forward and crossed to the lead, set steady pace, responded well passing 300M and was always doing enough to hold off the persistent 2nd.
Prominent behind leader, couldn't go on passing 400M, soon out of contention.
Caught wide and raced keenly early stages, dropped back to last further back than intended, ran on steadily final 400M but not reach leaders.
Shifted across behind runners, held up near the rear on inside, responded fairly early straight, never dangerous.
Slow to begin, raced keenly near the rear, came wide into the straight and was never a factor.
Settled down ahead of midfield, never far off the pace, issued his challenge down center of track, tried hard but was always held by winner.
Settled along inside in mid-division, tried hard on straightening but never going the pace to challenge leaders.
Unable to slot in, raced towards the rear, no closer than 3-wide throughout, found nothing when asked, never got involved.
Hampered start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened 300M.

Out with rest, sent forward to take the lead, found rail near 1000M, challenged by rival turning in, bumped early in straight, peaked and headed 300M, weakened gradually from 100M, hampered and snatched up 50M.
Began well, positioned 3 wide with no cover, a length or so back, 2 wide on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Moderately away, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, allowed rival to cross near 800M, peaked on run 500M, weakened early in straight, eased thereafter.
Shifted in at start and bumped, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, angled out after passing 500M, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.

Began only fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear running early in straight, cleared 250M, made good progress thereafter to be nearest on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 1, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, 2 wide from 550M, challenged the leader turning in, bumped 400M, took the lead 300M, peaked and headed 100M, soon weakened.
Began smartly from a wide draw, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, found a 2 wide spot approaching 800M, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Bumped start, raced at rear on the outside, 7 lengths back on turn, passed some tired rivals in straight.
Away with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths or so back, angled out 550M, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Out in line, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, very wide into straight, made no impression in the run home.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, similar position on turn, closed off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 7 lengths back turning in, passed some tired rivals in straight.
Moderately away, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Jumped with them, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, slightly hampered near 400M, one-paced in the run home.
Commenced well, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, steadied off heels near 700M, very wide into straight, made some progress in the run home.
Clean jump, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, angled out 450M, finished off very strongly to score.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 550M, finished off evenly. (Bled.)
Jumped well from gate 10, tracked leaders, 3 wide with no cover, there to turn, hard ridden from 300M, only showed limited response, weakened gradually final 100M.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider from 550M, 4 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Jumped well from gate 9, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, same position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Began only fairly, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Began awkwardly, raced towards rear on the inside, 4 lengths or so back, angled out approaching 450M, made good progress in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Bumped on jumping, raced at rear, 6 lengths or so back on turn, very wide into straight, made some progress in the run home.
Moderately away from the widest draw, raced in midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Away with them, raced 2 wide, 5 lengths back, a bit closer on turn, crowded early in straight, weakened and eased inside final furlong.
Taken back from the widest draw, bumped near 900M, raced at tail, 9 lengths back, a bit closer on turn, taken wide in straight and made good progress to be nearest on line.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 2 lengths, challenged by rival turning in, peaked and headed early in straight, hampered near 200M, weakened thereafter.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 2 lengths or so back on turn, showed good response in straight, took the lead 200M, peaked and headed 50M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 6-1/2L back, commenced move approaching 450M, very wide into straight, closed off well to make frame, not quite able to challenge.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on rail, saved ground on turn, short of room early in straight, cleared 200M, closed off well, just beaten by a neck.
Commenced well, raced in midfield on the inside, 3 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, angled out 350M, not enough room early in straight, cleared 250M, finished off strongly to score.
Slowly away, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide at rear, 8 lengths back, moved closer after passing 500M, 5 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight.
Began well from gate 1, positioned 2-1/2L behind the leader on rail, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, not enough room early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Jumped with them, raced towards rear on the outside, peaked on turn, weakened and eased early in straight.
Jumped well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, challenged the leader turning in, took the lead early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Sent forward from wide draw, tracked the pace on the outside, found no extra under top weight inside 300M, weakened towards the line.
Began awkwardly, moved up to track leaders on inside, hampered 200M losing momentum and got held up for clear running late. Inconclusive run. (Lame LF leg.)
Settled in midfield along the fence, shifted out to challenge top of straight, gave mild response, kept on for 3rd but no threat to winner.
Off a step slow, held up behind midfield 5Ls off the pace, kept on same speed turning into straight, never able to challenge.
Slowest into stride, settled at the rear 8-9Ls off leader, ran on steadily final 300M but never seriously threatened.
Up with early pace before being restrained to a position ahead of midfield, responded well from 300M, got up for 2nd 100M from home but not pace to challenge winner.
Sent forward, crossed to the lead 1200M taking them along slowly, bustled along 450M, caught by winner mid-straight then faded late stages, just held on for 4th.
Unhurried after the start, shifted across to the fence taking the inside route throughout, 6Ls to make up 400M, failed to threaten.
Crowded for room on jumping, shifted across behind runners to race at the rear, swung wide into straight, stayed on without threat
Urged along early to obtain a prominent spot behind leaders, quickened up well when asked top of straight, kicked clear passing 200M under strong handling.
From wide draw shifted across behind runners, settled down 2-wide towards the rear, driven wide into straight, pursued the leaders on outside, closed off mildly.
Restrained in midfield along the 2-path, pushed along 500M, made no impact over final 300M.
Sat midfield 3 wide, didn't quicken in the straight, only one pace.
Steadied on jumping from a wide barrier, settled at the rear, closed off well near the rail, best stride inside 100M.
Ridden along early to be prominent on the rail, only one pace early in the straight and weakened near 150M.
Broke nicely but steadied afterwards from the outside barrier to settle near the rear, swung out to the center and stayed on very well to grab 2nd .
Broke smartly and quickly assumed the lead, ridden along inside 400M, kept on fairly and weakened inside 100M.
Settled just behind midfield 2 wide, closed off okay, never a threat to the top 3.
Broke well and sat in a handy position 2 wide between horses, switched out in the straight and responded well when asked, won by a neck.
Settled worse than midfield on the rail, made no impression in the straight.
Settled midfield 2 wide, angled out for clear running at 300M, closed off well and lost 2nd just on the line.
Broke fairly and showed early speed, sat 3 wide no cover behind the lead, race keenly, faded in straight.
Settled near the rear on the rail, never a threat.
Broke okay and ridden along to sit outside the leader, pressed on at 450M, took the lead at 200M but weakened near 100M.

Began awkwardly before improving in first 100m & getting nice position 1,1. Raced keen from 800m, was awkwardly placed just before cornering before being passed by rivals in last furlong, weakening to be beaten 3L.

Bumped at start but improved quickly to race midfield between runners. Eased wider on the track near the 400m mark before closing off strongly in the final furlong to charge to fast finishing second late.
Pushed forward, raced outside the leader early before racing third from the 600m. Moved to the lead at the 75m mark & was too strong in final stages.
Taken back behind runners & raced a clear last throughout. Was nearly 8L from the lead approaching the home corner, stayed along the inside in the straight but had too much to do & was last.

Steadied after first 100m & raced with only three runners behind when galloping between rivals. Shifted outwards to be the widest runner soon after straightening before finishing strongly down the outside late for third.
Was trapped racing three wide in midfield but did have some cover around bend. Was under 3L from the lead on straightening but emptied at the 150m & weakened out late.
Showed early speed to lead. Headed by the winner near the 75m mark & was over-run late but still wasn't beaten far in midfield.
Ridden forward to race on leaders back after start. Stayed along the rail on straightening when 4th before peaking on run in last 100m & weakening out quickly late.

Pushed forward but was wide without cover before improving position to race outside the leader from 600m. Continued a touch wide on cornering, fought on well all the way to the line & was only over-run for 2nd in final 25m.

Didn't have early speed & raced just worse than midfield early before improving along the rail to midfield from 700m. Stayed near inside & had clear running on straightening before finishing off well late, close behind.
Steadied soon after the start & dragged back to race second last. Moved away from the inside on straightening before making up a few late lengths but still only beating three rivals home.

Raced wide but with cover in midfield early before drifting back to third last after 700m. Continued third last on straightening when well back before making up late ground down the outside to finish midfield from the rear.
Away well, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move 400M, finished off very strongly, led close home.
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide, 5 lengths or so back, there to turn, made good progress in straight, not quite able to challenge.
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
Jumped well from the widest draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from gate 8, raced towards rear on the outside, 8 lengths or so back, commenced move 450M, made some headway in straight.

Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, showed good response in straight, hit the front 100M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner close home.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made good progress in straight without threatening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Clean jump, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, same position to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked on run 100M, ran on evenly thereafter. (Bled.)
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 2 wide better than midfield, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Bumped start, raced at tail, 8 lengths back on turn, taken wide in straight and finished off very strongly to make frame, nearest on line.
Taken back to race towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, not enough room near 100M, one-paced thereafter.
Out with rest, positioned on rail in midfield, angled out 350M, finished off evenly.
Sat midfield 2 wide, weakened early in the straight.
Settled just behind the leader 2 wide, kept on okay in the straight.
Sat near the rear, never a factor.
Steadied to last from a wide barrier, went for a run towards to inside, and unable to obtain clear run for most of the straight but stayed on late.
Sat in a box seat position, only one pace in the straight.
Settled worse than midfield 2 wide, a bit one pace early in the straight, and quickened inside 100M to grab 3rd.
Steadied after the start and settled at the rear 2 wide, angled out to the center at 300M, stayed on well and won comfortably.
Settled midfield on the rail, made minor progress in the straight.
Sat just behind midfield on the rail, a bit short of room in the straight, never tested.
Tracked the leader 2 wide throughout, responded well when asked, took the lead at 250M, but can't hold off the winner.
Settled near the rear on the rail, unable to obtain clear running in the straight until final 100M, not tested. (See Incident Report)
Led the race and faded quickly in the straight.
Lost ground at start, hampered at 1300 metres, commenced move 3 wide at 600 metres going wider into straight, fought on steadily down the centre of the track.
Pressed forward from wide gate, settled mainly in 1L 2nd, came under pressure to hold place in straight, kept on.

Pressed forward from wide gate, went forward from wide in midfield to wide without cover in 4th, came under pressure rounding final bend, found no extra under pressure inside final 150 metres. (Tactic questioned)
Restrained back from widest gate, travelling keenly when bumped 1300 metres out, wide without cover in back straight, 4-wide rounding home bend and even wider into straight, never nearer.
Niggled along from middle draw to take up running on the rail 1250 metres out setting a steady pace, quickened up tempo over 700 metres out, led until headed under pressure 100 metres out.

Broke well, tightened while taken back passing winning post first time, drifted backward to 6th in midfield rounding first bend, further back behind midfield in 8th in back straight, snuck back up final turn, checked 200 metres
Held up in midfield, further back in 7th when tempo quickened passing 700 metres, forced to switch for a run twice at 200 and 100 metres, fought on well.
Settled in last few, gained closer up 3-wide in quickened tempo passing 700 metres, improved further under pressure around home bend and wide into straight, ran on under pressure.
Broke well, travelled keenly in slow pace over 2L back in 5th in back straight, similar turning for home, tightened between runners most of the way to 100 metres, fought on.
Began well, settled one back in 3rd on rail, in similar place when 4th turning in, hit the front under pressure 100 metres out.
Moderate start, gradually drifted backward along rail to worse than midfield in 8th, carried further back at 700 metres, snuck back up turning in, tight for a run on rail most of way in straight.
Settled in rear on rail, shifted 2 wide in back straight before checked at 500 metres, saved ground turning in, held up for a run majority of straight, never nearer.
Steadied on jumping from draw 12, raced very wide and no cover after 900M, struck heels of rival at 250M and stumbled, failed to finish off thereafter. (Wound to RF leg.)
Raced ahead of mid-division, pushed along 500M but responded fairly, soon outpaced by pursuing rivals.
Began awkwardly, shifted across behind runners to obtain cover, 4Ls off the pace in 10th at the 400M pole, stayed on moderately towards the line.
Restrained after the jump to race at the back, swung wide for home, closed well to be nearest at the line. Clear from rest.
Not hurried after the start, held up towards the rear, still last at 200M, ran past beaten horses only.
Always prominent, got its head up when steadied early stages, pressed leader home turn, led early straight, kept on gamely to line and narrowly prevailed under urging.
Ridden forward as customary, relinquished lead 700M but remained prominent, weakened rapidly final 300M. (Jockey: failed to close off the race as his horse raced too keenly in middle stages.)
Settled down in midfield, travelled well into straight, gave good response and did best work towards the line, just missed by a diminishing short head.
Settled down midfield, unbalanced after 500M when awkwardly placed close to a rival, gave limited response on straightening, never threatened.
Vied for early lead before emerging as leader 700M, headed top of straight, faded towards the line.
Unable to slot in form draw 10, raced wide no cover behind leaders, kept on steadily turning for home, not pace to challenge leaders.
From draw 1 took inside route throughout and never far off from leaders, gave no response turning for home, soon beaten. (Jockey unable to offer any reason for the horse's failure to finish off.)
Jumped with them, raced towards rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back, very wide turning in, made reasonable progress in straight.
Out with rest, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, a length or so back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Away with them, positioned 2 wide, 4 lengths back, similar position on turn, no clear run early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter.
Began awkwardly and made contact, raced at tail, 6 to 7 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score by a narrow margin.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/2L on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Taken back from gate 10, raced at rear, 5 lengths back on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 250M, finished off strongly to take a place, nearest on line.
Made contact at start, unable to slot in, trapped wide with no cover, 1-1/2L back, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the outside, commenced move 400M, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began well, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off well to make frame.

Made contact at start, positioned 2 wide, 4 lengths or so back, 3 wide after entering the back straight, commenced move 500M, very wide into straight, hit the front 150M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner on line.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, angled out approaching 400M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
Began well from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, saved ground to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Jumped well from gate 10, raced prominently, 2 wide, challenged the leader turning in, hit the front 400M, kept on well, seriously challenged in the closing stages, just prevailed in bobbing finish.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, found rail near 750M, 5 lengths back on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, made good progress thereafter to make frame.
Began awkwardly, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 3 wide on turn, commenced move 500M, very wide into straight, made good progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Began well, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Away well, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 250M.
Bumped start, raced at rear on the outside, found rail near 650M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, made good progress thereafter.
Began well from the widest draw, taken back to race behind midfield on the outside, 5 to 6 lengths back on turn, finished off very strongly, just denied in a ding-dong finish.
Bumped shortly after start, positioned 3 wide, 3 lengths or so back, wider 500M, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Slowly away, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out 550M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, finished off evenly.
Shifted out at start and bumped, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival turning in, peaked and headed 400M, weakened final 250M.
Began fairly, raced at rear on the inside, steadied near 850M, still well back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Bumped shortly after start, raced towards rear on the outside, 6 to 7 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, closed off well to be nearest on line.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 550M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong. (Bled.)
Taken well behind from the widest gate, fought on steadily without threatening inside final 250 metres.
Obtained rails run in forward of midfield shortly after start, switched off rail for a run entering straight, faded under pressure.
Taken back to last few after moderate start, wide rounding home bend and one of the widest into straight, dropped away quickly inside final 300 metres.
Travelled mainly one-out-one-back, came to join the leaders 3-wide into straight, unable to sustain effort inside final 300 metres.

Began well before taken back to midfield, remained wide with cover most of the way, gained closer rounding home bend to be one back into straight, fought on steadily under pressure to share joint 2nd.
Settled well behind from high draw and waited with, switched wide into home straight, ran on well under pressure inside final 300 metres.
Well there from a wide gate, improved 3-wide around the bend from 2L back to join the leaders 500 metres out, asserted authority inside 300 metres and soon drew clear.
Niggled along in forward of midfield, gained closer to pace approaching home turn, fought on under pressure inside final 200 metres to share joint 2nd.
Taken well behind from a wide gate, saved ground on the rail turning for home, unable to quicken under pressure.
Badly crowded at start losing ground, settled towards the rear, found nothing under pressure inside final 300 metres.
Hard ridden early, shared lead to 400 metres, folded up quickly.
Shared lead to 400 metres and faded.
Travelled ungenerously at times in rear of midfield, 3-wide rounding home bend and wider into straight, fought on under pressure to reach 2nd briefly 150 metres out, no extra late.
Well there early before settling over 2L back in 5th coming onto home bend, in similar position on the rail turning in, soon weakened after straightening.
Settled behind midfield 2 wide, angled out in the straight but made no impression.
Steadied after the start, settled 2 wide near the rear, never a threat.
Sat in front of midfield on the rail, angled out at 400M, ran on well to take 2nd, but no threat to the winner.
Broke last and settled near the rear on the rail, made only minor progress.
Broke well and settled just behind the speed 2 wide, only one pace when asked.
Broke alertly, sent to the front and led, travelled comfortably throughout, kept on well and won smartly.
Settled at the rear on the rail, stayed on fairly to grab 5th.
Travelled 3 wide without cover throughout near midfield, showed nothing in the straight.
Broke smartly and settled in a box-seat position, found nothing in the straight. (See Incident Report)
Settled in front of midfield between horses 2 wide, found not much when under pressure. (See Incident Report)
Broke with the field, settled near the rail in midfield position, had trouble obtaining clear running for most part of the straight, still closed off okay.
Settled midfield 3 wide with cover, switched out at 350M, stayed on well for 3rd.
Moved across from a wide barrier and sat 2 wide at the rear, never in contention.
Sat outside the leader, kept on okay early in the straight and weakened inside 100M.

Raced three wide without cover when third last before improving to midfield in the middle stages while continuing to cover additional ground. Was beaten on straightening & weakened to be over 6L behind.

Had a nice run on leaders back throughout. Continued to follow the leader on straightening when only 2L from the lead before weakening a few lengths to be beaten just under 4L into midfield, below expectation.

Raced last early before improving to midfield after shifting 4 wide without cover after the 1000m mark. Straightened just under 3L from the lead but couldn't go with rivals in final 300m, finishing one paced to midfield.
Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Moved away from the rail just before straightening, improved between runners near the 400m, finished off steadily all the way to the line to finish third.
Reared abruptly & refused to leave barrier stalls & took no part in the race.

Pushed forward, raced second away from the rail when just over a length behind the leader in middle stages. Moved up to take the lead passing the 300m before being passed by winner at 175m, held second.
Pushed forward to lead. Headed in the lead by the runner-up passing the 300m mark, before weakening in last furlong to be beaten 5.5L.

Shared last place when racing along the rail in middle stages. Was held up for clear running on straightening when continuing last, shifted inwards before closing off well all the way to the line to hold 4th.
Got a nice position 1,1 from the 1600m. Bumped on straightening when only just over 2L from the lead before peaking on run at the 300m mark & weakening out thereafter.

Raced in midfield early before drifting back to third last from the 1300m. Shifted outwards to be the widest runner passing the 500m, sprinted very quickly mid-straight to charge to lead 175m before drawing away impressively.
Shifted out at start, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, there to turn, ridden after passing 400M, showed very good response, hit the front 100M, kept on strongly to the line, won by 3/4L.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, 3 to 4 lengths back, very wide into straight, made minor progress in the run home.
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the outside, unbalanced near 900M, moved a bit closer on turn, kept on well in straight to make frame without threatening.
Average to begin, raced prominently on the outside, took the lead 800M, led by1/2L on turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 100M, finished 2nd.
Moderately away from the widest draw, trapped wide behind midfield early, sent forward after passing 1000M, raced 3 wide, 1/2L back on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with cover at rear, there to turn, finished off well to take a place, nearest on line.
Began only fairly, raced 2 wide towards rear, similar position on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Began well, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, raced tight near 900M, found rail 700M, no clear run in straight, not able to test properly.
Jumped with them, positioned 2 wide in midfield, 2-1/2L back, awkwardly placed near 900M, same margin back on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Began awkwardly, positioned 3 wide, a length or so back, 2 wide on turn, kept on well early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Away well, sent forward to take the early lead, headed 800M, 1/2L back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear on the inside, 5-1/2L back, same margin back on turn, made little progress in straight.
Ridden early to cross and lead from the outside barrier, kept on well to hold 3rd.
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, just one pace in the straight.
Settled midfield 2 wide, hard ridden at 600M but no response, faded and finished last. (Heart Irregularity)
Settled at the rear 2 wide, showed some dash early in the straight but weakened soon after.
At midfield on the rail, faded in the straight.
Settled in front of midfield on the rail, made no impression in the straight.
Sat 3 wide no cover throughout behind midfield, stayed on okay in the straight.
Broke with the field and showed good early speed to settle behind the speed, angled out at 500M, quickened up well when asked, won without being seriously tested.
Broke well and sat just behind the speed, kept on okay when asked, held 4th.
Sat between horses 2 wide near the rear, ridden along inside 600M, made minor progress in the straight. (Rider dropped his whip).
Settled midfield 2 wide, switched out at 450M, ran on well to grab 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Settled near the rear on the rail, never a threat.
Travelled behind midfield on the rail, no response when asked.
Reared at the start, sat last on the rail, stayed on fairly in the straight. (Barrier manners unacceptable, must stall test)

Settled in 4th some 2L back, awkwardly placed behind runner passing the 1000 metres and shuffled 3L back to 5th coming onto home bend, came under pressure to challenge inside the 350 metres and ran on gamely, unable to peg back the winner.
Jumped awkwardly losing ground, never seen with a chance despite running past well-beaten horses early in home straight.

Led on the rail in back straight, ceded lead passing the 800 metres, switched off rail to tackle race leader into straight and hit the front 300 metres out, hung on well to resist runner-up's strong late challenge.
Slightly slow out, soon recovered to 6th just over 3L back on the rail, gained slightly closer briefly coming onto home bend and soon faded.
Broke well from a wide gate settling 1L back in 2nd, shifted behind race leader for cover becoming 3L 4th on home bend, found no extra inside final 300 metres.
Wide in 5th early, rushed up from the 900 metres to lead off the rail 800 metres out, led until headed 300 metres out and weakened under pressure.

Pressed forward from the widest gate settling 3-wide without cover in 1L 3rd and then 2nd from 1100 metres, became 2-wide in 2L 3rd rounding home bend and similar into straight, fought on for 3rd but never threatening.
Soon dropped towards rear in 7th despite niggling along, given reminders passing 1000 metres and 600 metres, ran past well-beaten horses in straight.
Broke well but gradually taken back well behind, trailed the field most of the way to the line despite coming under pressure on home bend and early in straight.
Urged along to take lead entering first turn, took them along at good pace, lost lead 350M, weakened towards the finish.
Settled down near last, pushed along 600M from home, soon weakened to finish tailed out.
Began awkwardly, held up in mid-division, stayed on fairly over final 400M, never dangerous.
From draw 1 moved up to chase leader along inside, responded fairly top of straight, soon out of contention.
Raced keenly early stages before settling in 5th about 4Ls off leader, quickened up impressively early straight, led 300M then ran away to win by emphatic margin. Career best performance.
Settled ahead of midfield, gave limited response when shifted out to challenge early straight, out of contention 200M.
Dropped back to race towards the rear, came under pressure 600M, gave no response turning for home, never involved.
Reserved in midfield, peeled out 500M to challenge, kept on without threat.
Began only fairly, restrained to race behind midfield, ran on mildly passing 350M, got up for 2nd close home but never able to challenge the runaway winner.
From wide draw taken back to last about 10Ls off the pace, made his move 600M, stayed on moderately, never a threat to winner.
Driven forward to chase leader 2-wide, led briefly top of straight, run ended 200M out, faded towards the line.
Never far off from leaders, in 4th spot making home turn, moved up to challenge early straight but quickly beaten by winner 300M, held 2nd until 50M.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced at rear on the outside, 5 to 6 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to make frame, nearest on line, good debut.
Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, hard ridden after passing 250M, peaked and headed 75M, stayed on evenly to take a place.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside, there to turn, peaked on run 250M, weakened final 100M.
Began well, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, bumped and unbalanced near 1100M, angled out 500M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, bumped early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Bumped start, positioned 2-1/2L behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, kept on well until no extra final 150M.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Moderately away, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on the inside, angled out approaching 500M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide in midfield, made contact near 1100M, a bit closer on turn, shifted out and bumped 350M, finished off evenly.
Began only fairly, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 500M, one-paced in the run home.
Commenced well, sat right behind the leader on rail, easy run to turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 250M, finished off strongly, just beaten by a neck.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 8 lengths back, moved closer turning in, made good progress early in straight, not enough room 150M, cleared 50M, ran on evenly to the line.
Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, 2 lengths or so back on turn, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, finished off evenly.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, very wide into straight, closed off well to be nearest on line.
Bumped start, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off well to take 2nd.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear running early in straight, ran on evenly thereafter.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from gate 13, raced at tail, 9 lengths back, closer on turn, unable to obtain clear run until passing 150M, made good progress thereafter to make frame.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 500M, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 150M, kept on same pace to the line.
Away with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 500M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, made minor progress thereafter.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the outside, a bit closer on turn, hard ridden from 400M, showed very good response, hit the front 100M, kept on well to the line.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out 500M, no clear run early in straight, kept on evenly thereafter.
Bumped and unbalanced shortly after start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L on turn, peaked and headed 300M, weakened quickly final furlong.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home without threatening.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out after passing 550M, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Clean jump, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, finished off evenly.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, same position on turn, took the lead 300M, peaked and headed 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide, 4 lengths or so back, commenced move 450M, very wide into straight, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Moderately away, raced better than midfield on the inside, difficult to settle in the early stages, saved ground on turn, closed off well to take a place without threatening.
Bumped shortly after start, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Moderately away from gate 12, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, 4th on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, dropped towards rear of midfield in the middle stages, saved ground on turn, finished off very strongly to score by a neck.

Moderately away from a wide draw, taken back to race at tail, 10 lengths back, slightly improved on turn but still 8 lengths behind, very wide into straight, finished off well without threatening the first few.
Began smartly, tracked leaders on the inside, angled out 400M, hit the front approaching 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner close home.

Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 6 lengths back, sent forward after passing 1050M, took the lead 850M, headed 500M, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, peaked on turn, weakened gradually in straight, eased final 100M.
Moderately away from gate 10, sent forward to take the lead, headed 850M, regained the lead 500M, peaked and headed 200M, weakened thereafter.
