Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, dropped towards rear on turn, made no impression in straight.
Slightly slow out, raced towards rear, 7 lengths back turning in, made little progress early in straight, steadied near 100M, ran on evenly thereafter.

Steadied shortly after the start & raced 4th last away from the rail. Continued over 7L from the lead entering the final section before making no ground at all in the straight & finishing second last.

Had a nice run third on the rail throughout. Had clear running on straightening as first two raced a length clear, battled on ok but couldn't finish off as strongly as others & was 2.5L behind in midfield.
Had a soft run in midfield along the rail throughout. Was 4L behind entering last section, straightened along the rail before making continual steady ground under hard riding to only be beaten 1.5L.

Crowded & lost running in first 100m before moving three wide & improving position to race outside the leader from 1100m. Moved up to share lead at the 250m, continued close until over-run in final 100m & fading late (mucus).
Pushed forward to lead. Continued in lead until being joined near 250m mark, peaked soon after before weakening out quickly in last 75m.

Steadied after start & taken back top race third last on rail. Moved away from rail near the 400m when 6.5L from lead, shifted to be second widest on straightening before making late ground down the outside, only 2L behind.
Ridden forward at start before getting nice run 1,1 from the 1100m. Was only about 3L from the lead on straightening before weakening a length or so when finishing 9th.

Didn't begin fast & was then ridden to hold position in midfield after first bend. Came under hard ridding entering final section when 6L from lead, was the widest runner on straightening before weakening out poorly, last.

Shifted inwards soon after start before getting good position in midfield away from rail. Eased three wide to improve near 450m, moved to narrow lead fleetingly near 100m before over-run by first two in final stages.

Crowded & steadied soon after start before getting position in midfield along the rail. Travelled strongly & moved away from rail near 400m, closed strongly down the outside to steal lead at 50m mark & continued on to win.

Shifted behind runners from outside gate & raced at the tail. Continued last & just under 9L from lead approaching the corner, made up a few lengths in straight but couldn't make sufficient ground to challenge, third last.

Steadied after start & taken back to second last. Was 8L from the lead entering last section, dashed well between runners at 150m mark before closing strongly in late stages to move to second inside last 50m.
Settled behind midfield on the rail, moved to 2 wide near 750M, a bit one pace early in the straight then quickened in the final 150M.
Steadied after the start from a wide barrier, settled 2 wide near the rear, and stayed on fairly.
Settled near the rear, never a threat.
Settled midfield 2 wide between horses, just one pace when asked.
Broke well and sat in a handy position on the rail, angled out at 350M and responded well when asked, won smartly.
Broke last, settled worse than midfield 3 wide, never in contention.
Settled last, made only minor progress in the straight.
Broke nicely and sat 2 wide in midfield early, switched out to 3 wide at around 800M to improve, quickened fairly well in the straight, just no match for the winner.
Just outside the leader, pressed on at 400M, kept on okay early in the straight but weakened inside 200M.
Settled midfield on the rail, improve on the rail in the straight, only made minor headway.
Broke smartly and ridden to be prominent, caught 3 wide no cover throughout, found nothing in the straight.
Led from the inside barrier, got passed at 300M and soon weakened.

Raced in midfield along the rail. Was just under 4L from the lead entering last section, was awkwardly placed between runners before crowded when no room at 150m before shifting outwards & finishing ok late. Some excuse.
Raced rearward throughout. Was hard ridden entering last section when last & 9.5L from the lead before passing a few tiring runners late but still being beaten nearly 7L on the line.

Had a nice run on the leaders back early before racing 4th on the rail in middle stages. Was only 2L behind on straightening when continuing along rai; but weakened out poorly in last furlong & was well beaten.
Pushed forward to lead. Gave a nice kick on straightening & maintained margin all the way to line.

Wasn't bustled at the start but then improved after the first bend to race in midfield away from the rail. Swung to be the widest runner on straightening when about 5L behind but did little in the straight & weakened out.

Trapped racing three wide without cover when worse than midfield early before being relegated to third last near 700m. Continued wide around bend before making up a few late lengths but still being beaten over 5L in midfield.

Steadied after start & taken back towards the rear before relegated to last near 900m. Continued rearward, 7.5L from lead approaching the home corner before making some late ground when running onto midfield from the back.

Raced worse than midfield along the rail. Drifted further back in the field after the 650m bend, was virtually second last on straightening before weakening out poorly in the straight to be long last.

Raced 1,1 early before a pair further back from the 750m. Swung wider on straightening when about 3.5L behind before making good ground to improve to second near the 150m mark before holding third on line.

Pushed forward but was trapped three wide outside leaders before improving position & shifting to be 2 wide outside the leader from 750m. Dropped off the leader/winner on straightening before weakening out badly last furlong.

Showed customary early speed, raced outside the leader early before getting 1,1 from passing the 750m mark. Continued to race in third place on straightening but peaked on effort inside 200m & gave ground to midfield late.

Taken back after start, raced last before improving after first bend & racing worse than midfield between runners. Continued to improve position, entered last section 5L behind before closing strongly down the outside late.
Began smartly from gate 1, sat right behind the leader on rail, same position on turn, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Taken back from gate 10, raced at tail, 8 lengths back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside, 5 lengths back, saved ground to turn, closed off well without threatening.
Jumped well, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, finished off very strongly to score.
Bumped start, raced at rear on the outside, 7 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, made some progress in the run home.
Moderately away from a wide draw, trapped very wide in midfield early, sent forward after passing 1000M, positioned 2nd in the middle stages, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Fast into stride, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two close home.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced towards rear on the inside, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 5 lengths back on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Slightly slow out, raced behind midfield on the outside, 6 lengths or so back on turn, very wide into straight, failed to make any progress in the run home.
Bumped start, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.

Bumped start, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths or so back, no cover for the majority of the race, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect. (Blood in trachea.) (Lame left front leg next day.)
Travelled keenly early, settled midfield 2 wide, under pressured at 450M and made no impression.
Steadied and moved across from a wide barrier to sit near the rear on the rail, switched to 2 wide at 850M and angled out rounding the home turn, stayed on only fairly.
Settled 2 wide behind the speed, weakened at 250M.
Settled last after being steadied from a wide barrier, improved near the rail, made some ground.
Settled near the rear 2 wide, hard ridden at 500M and soon faded.
Ridden along early to assume the lead, kept on okay early in the straight but weakened inside 100M.
Got squeezed after the start, moved towards the rail and settled midfield, improved through the rail and stayed on well to grab 2nd.
Broke smartly from the inside barrier and sat behind the speed on the rail, angled out at 350M, kept on well but cannot threaten the top two. (Rider dropped his whip)
Settled near the rear 2 wide, moved to 3 wide to improve at 800M, only one pace in the straight.
Sat behind midfield 2 wide, ridden along at 700M but no response, never a threat.
Sat behind midfield near the rail, moved to 2 wide at 850M and was short of room when trying to improve, make only minor progress in the straight
Sat just behind the leader on the rail until angled out to 2 wide near 900M, pressed on at 500M and ran on well when under pressured, won comfortably
Settled some 2L back on the rail in 5th, slightly further off in 5th rounding home bend, forced to switch out for a run inside 200 metres, kept on same pace.
Driven forward a high draw to lead inside 800 metres, obtained rails run 550 metres out, found no extra and swamped inside final 150 metres.
Ridden along in first few from a high draw, held some chance under pressure early in straight until over 100 metres out.
Broke well and soon taken well back, ran on well past beaten horses down the centre of home straight. (Tactic questioned)
Settled just off the pace in 4th some 2L back, came wide into straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
Settled in forward of midfield in 6th 2-wide, improved well from 3-wide into straight to hold every chance until the 100 metres.
Settled in midfield in 7th on the rail, saved ground turning for home, snuck up under pressure along the rail to assert authority inside final 100 metres.

Held narrow lead for the first 200 metres, placed one back in 3rd on the rail behind race leader 600 metres out, renewed effort to hold every chance early in straight until the 200 metres when weakened.
Travelled wide behind midfield, kept on one pace in straight.
Began fairly, travelled behind midfield on the rail, hampered and lost position 550 metres out, never recovered.
Taken back to tail-end from a wide gate, never a danger.
Began fairly, travelled towards the rear in 9th, never nearer.
Began awkwardly from draw 2, settled down on inside ahead of midfield, couldn't go on passing 250M, eased final 100M when no chance.
Prominent, chased leaders along the 2-path, came under serious pressure 500M, soon gave ground and weakened to last.
Taken across to race in midfield, 5Ls off the pace home turn, kept on fairly passing 400M, never threatened.
Restrained to race towards the rear, 6Ls to make up 400M, wide into straight, closed off mildly over final 300M, not reach leaders.
Given a patient ride, settled near last throughout, cut the corner passing 400M, ran on to take 2nd but unable to challenge the runaway winner.

Caught wide early before crossing to the lead 1200M, pressed by rival mid-stages, sat in 2nd from 700M, ran home one-paced. (Jockey : didn't finish the race off due to amount of work his horse had to do early.)
Caught wide no cover after 1300M then strode forward to join leader, took over 700M, hung on to the lead until 200M, faded close home to finish 4th.
Restrained to a 2-wide spot ahead of mid-division, travelled fairly rounding home turn, checked top of straight and failed to finish off.
Settled down 2-wide in midfield, driven wide into straight, stayed on moderately to go 3rd close home. No threat to runaway winner.
Dropped back from wide draw, raced as the back-marker 5Ls off the pace, made limited progress on straightening, never a threat to leaders.
Up with early pace before taking cover behind leaders, peeled out to challenge 400M, quickened up smartly to lead mid-straight, moved well clear final stages to win comfortably.
Began well from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside, 3/4L back on turn, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Out with rest, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide after passing 500M, 4 lengths back turning in, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
Bumped start, raced at rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back on turn, taken wide in straight and made some progress.
Jumped with them, positioned 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths back, same margin back turning in, closed off well to take a place.
Bumped on jumping, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, easy run to turn, hit the front 200M, kept on strongly to the line, easily scored.
Began well from a wide draw, raced 2 wide, 4 lengths back, 3 wide from 550M, very wide into straight, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from gate 9, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, peaked and headed 200M, weakened gradually final 150M.
Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the outside, 4 lengths or so back on turn, made some progress in straight.
Began very awkwardly, recovered to race behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made some progress.
Away with them, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 6 to 7 lengths back on turn, ran on evenly in straight.
Bumped on jumping, raced in midfield on the inside, 3 lengths back, same position on turn, finished off evenly.
Bumped on jumping, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, short of room near 200M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the early lead, headed near 1100M, 2nd on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M.
Crowded start, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 550M, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, steadied off heels near 850M, 3 to 4 lengths back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Crowded start, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 550M, showed limited response in straight.

Bumped shortly after start, tracked leaders on the outside early, awkwardly placed near 1200M, dropped to midfield in the middle stages, 5 lengths back turning in, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.

Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out after passing 600M, very wide turning in, showed very good response in straight, hit the front near 150M, kept on strongly to the line.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, commenced move 550M, 5 lengths back turning in, made very good progress early in straight, no extra final 100M
Began well from a tricky draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, 3 lengths back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M. (Bled.)
Bumped start, raced at rear on the outside, commenced move 550M, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Bumped start, raced towards rear on the inside, 5 to 6 lengths back on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 200M, finished off well to make frame, nearest on line.
Shifted out at start and bumped, tracked leaders, 2 lengths or so back, similar position to turn, hard ridden 400M, showed good response early in straight, peaked 150M, one-paced thereafter.
Bumped on jumping, raced better than midfield on the inside early, travelled keenly from 1200M, took the lead 1100M, led by a length on turn, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 100M.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 10 lengths back, moved closer along the rail on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (Blood in trachea.)
Led fast under 10lb claimer, established 4Ls lead home turn, kept on well early straight, caught 50M, no extra and lost several places near line.
Moved up to race in 3rd about 5Ls behind runaway leader, couldn't go on passing 300M, weakened to last.
Restrained to race in a 2-wide position in midfield, 9Ls to make up on runaway leader top of straight, stayed on without reaching first few.
From wide draw shifted across behind runners, settled near last 10Ls in a fast run race, finished off final 400M quickest, got up for 4th close home, nearest finish.
Unable to slot in from draw 11, raced towards the rear and caught wide no cover from 800M, ran on strongly final 300M, held by diminishing neck at the line.
Jumped well from draw 1 before being restrained to a rearward spot, lost ground 800M when checked and ended up in detached last, made some progress in straight without troubling leaders.
Lacked early speed, soon ridden along from wide draw, moved up to 4th before home turn, not picked up speed when driven out 500M, plodded on at same pace.
In midfield along the fence 6-7Ls off the fast pace, responded well on straightening, led 50M out, held on well from fast finishing 2nd late for a pleasing debut victory.
Prominent, tracked runaway leader, came under pressure prior to 600M, held on for 2nd until nearing 150M, dropped away final stages. (Mucus in the horse's trachea)
Raced keenly early stages, restrained to race towards the rear, gave limited response early straight, no extra final 200M.
Settled down 2-wide in midfield, 7Ls to make up on runaway leader 400M, closed off well to claim 3rd at huge odds. Encouraging debut.
Unhurried after the start, settled down towards the rear 10Ls off the fast pace, ran on steadily to the line but never a serious threat to leaders.
Broke smartly from the stands' side, led the race on the rail, weakened inside 150M.
Sat in a prominent position 4 off the stands' rail, kept on okay and held 3rd, no threat to the top 2.
Settled 3 wide from the stands' rail, did not have clear running for the majority of the race, and stayed on well but not able to be seriously tested.
Sat one off the stands' rail and tracked the leader, just one pace when asked.
Settled midfield 5 off the stands' rail, never a threat.
Broke nicely and up with the pace 3 wide from the stands' rail, kept on well and just got passed on the line.
Settled midfield near center track, did not quickened when asked.
Settled near the rear 4 wide from the stands' rail, switched course to the center near 200M, stayed on okay to grab 5th.
Up with the pace early near center track, weakened at 550M.
Settled at the rear on the stands' rail, travelling decently until 200M, held up inside 150M, cannot be tested.
Sat just behind the leader on the stands' rail, held up near 100M, never properly tested, ran on late.
Began only fairly, settled 4 wide from the stands' rail in midfield, held up until the 250M, quickened well and won just on the line.
Shared the lead 6 off the stands' rail, weakened and faded midway.
Began very slowly, just cantered back. (See Incident Report) (Barrier Manners and Performance unacceptable, must trial)

Had no early speed & drifted back to race second last away from rail. Continued rearward & 5L from the lead on straightening before closing off strongly between runners in the final furlong to move to third in final 25m.

Raced in midfield, shifted away from the rail near the 1000m mark. Moved closer to lead when improving between runners after the 600m, had clear running on straightening, dashed to lead at 250m, continued on well to win.

Pushed forward to race outside the leader. Shared the lead entering final section, continued to be in front until joined & passed by the winner at the 250m mark, battled on gamely in late stages to hold 4th.

Allowed to drift back to last early & continued to race rearward throughout. Stayed along the rail on straightening when 4L from lead before passing a few tiring rivals when running onto non-threatening midfield finish.

Raced just behind the leaders when wide down back straight before being crowded near 800m & steadying to race just forward of midfield with cover. Was beaten on straightening, weakened badly in straight. Long last.

Raced wide in midfield early asked to improve & race 4 deep without cover outside leaders from 850m. Continued to improve, shared lead near 700m when very wide, beaten off at 400m, weakened badly after extremely poor passage.

Raced in midfield along the rail throughout. Continued long rail & entered final section just under 3L from the lead before finishing off only moderately & being no threat when finishing just over 4L behind in midfield.

Allowed to drift back from gate 9 & settled worse than midfield when three deep with cover. Continued to drift further back around 800m bend, was the widest runner on straightening before making some late ground to midfield.
Pushed forward to lead. Joined & shared lead on straightening until near the 250m mark before winner went by, battled on ok in final stages to just miss 4th.

Shared lead early before being crossed near the 1000m. Moved three wide when racing keen & was then caught without cover outside the leading pair from 800m. Continued close to lead until emptying 250m, weakening quickly late.

Had a nice run on the leaders back for the majority. Moved away from the rail soon after straightening when only 2L from the lead but peaked on effort passing the 300m mark & weakened poorly in final furlong.

Last to begin, cut across to rail, raced worse than midfield early before improving between runners after 800m bend. Eased wider just before straightening, under 3L behind at 400m, closed to second at 150m & held position.

Raced three wide with cover in midfield throughout. Shifted out wider at the 500m, entered last section just under 4L from the lead before doing little out wide in final 300m & weakening to be beaten 5L.

Ride wide early before drifting back after first furlong. Was relegated to last approaching 800m. Continued last on corner, shifted out to be widest runner when 6.5L behind on straightening before doing little in straight.
Began well, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared near 200M, failed to make any progress thereafter.
Moderately away, raced 3 wide with cover slightly behind midfield, angled out 550M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 250M. (Blood in trachea.) (Roarer.)
Away with them, raced 3 wide better than midfield, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 250M.
Slowly away, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 200M, made no progress thereafter.
Out with rest, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, slightly improved after passing 550M, took the lead early in straight, peaked and headed 300M, ran on evenly to the line.
Began well from gate 10, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked 300M, weakened thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, commenced move approaching 600M, very wide into straight, hit the front 300M, kept on very well to turn line, won comfortably.
Bumped and unbalanced at start, raced at rear on the outside, 8 lengths back, a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, made no impression in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)

Moderately away from gate 12, unable to slot in, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover in the middle stages, improved after passing 500M, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, 3 wide after passing 550M, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, closed off well to take 2nd, no impression on winner.
Slow to begin, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, moved a bit closer in the middle stages, not enough room early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off evenly.
Crowded on jumping, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.

Taken back from gate 9, raced behind midfield on the inside, 4 lengths or so back on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 200M, made minor progress thereafter to make frame without threatening.
Shifted out at start, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rivals turning in, peaked and headed 350M, weakened thereafter. (Bled.) (Roarer.)
Settled in front of midfield 3 wide with cover, hit the front at 150M and just got caught on the line.
Ridden early to lead 2 wide, weakened near 350M.
Settled midfield, quickened well early in the straight then just a bit one pace.
Settled worse than midfield on the rail, held up until 250M, stayed on well near the rail to grab 5th.
Settled near the rear, unable to quicken early in the straight, but showed some dash in the final 150M.
Sat one off the rail in midfield, only one pace.
Broke with the field and showed good early speed to share the lead, kept on well and slightly weakened near 100M, held 3rd.
Sat just behind the speed 2 wide between horses, did not quickened in the straight.
Steadied after the start from a wide barrier and settled near the rear 2 wide, angled out at 450M and responded well, won by a neck.
Settled at the rear after being steadied early, unable to obtain clear running until the final 200M, ran on fairly.
Settled in front of midfield on the rail, never a threat.
Sat with the pace 3 wide no cover, kept on well early in the straight and weakened inside 150M.
Settled just off the pace, two back in joint 4th coming out of back straight drifting further back around home bend, saved ground turning in but tightened over 200 metres out, one paced thereafter.
Prominent, improved to gain 2nd passing the 900 metres, disputed lead into straight, folded up quickly inside final 250 metres.

Began well from a wide gate to be up with the pace but gradually shifted back to wide without cover in midfield, in similar position rounding home bend, fought on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.

Broke well from a wide gate but failed to muster, drifted back to last few remaining wide without cover throughout, widest runner turning for home, ran on past beaten horses down the centre of the track.
Ridden along to vie for early lead, obtained rails run in front 900 metres out, kicked over 1L clear after straightening only to be swamped closing stages.
Never better than midfield, came under pressure after straightening, folded up quickly inside final 100 metres. (Bled)
Broke well before taking back to rear of midfield on rail, saved ground turning for home, made no impression under pressure in the run to the line.
Settled in joint 4th 2-wide just over 2L off the pace, in similar position turning for home, ran on under pressure to hit the front narrowly over 150 metres out only to be caught close to home.

Ridden along from wide gate in first few early stages, gradually shifted back to wide with cover in midfield, drifted slightly further back home bend, fought on steadily under pressure from towards rear into straight.
Began well to be up with the pace, taken one back for cover coming onto home bend, kept on for place chance until weakened inside final 200 metres.

Settled towards the rear from a wide gate travelling 3-wide with cover, pulled keenly rounding home bend and did not find much room early in straight, quickened well once into the clear inside 200 metres to snatch victory final strides.
Taken well behind from the widest gate, trailed the field to 550 metres, shifting wide for a run into straight and ran on well under pressure down the centre of the track.
Unhurried after the start, settled towards the rear, waited with until 300M, ran on well but had to be steadied close home when rival shifted ground. (Jockey questioned.)
Began only fairly, held up near last, brought out 500M to center of track, responded fairly under pressure, never dangerous.
In mid-division, shifted outwards to challenge 500M, ran on well to the line, just held by stable companion towards the finish.
Tracked leaders, responded well passing 400M, held by first 2 final stages.
Sent forward under 10lb claimer, vied for lead early stages, broke away 350M, caught 150M, weakened to 4th late.
Settled midfield, switched out to center of track passing 550M, failed to pick up speed. (Blood in trachea.)
Up with early pace, came under pressure halfway, gave ground quickly.
Began awkwardly, raced at the rear, had to be ridden along throughout, soon outpaced passing 500M.
Contested the early pace, couldn't go on passing 400M, weakened away.
Travelled well just off the pace, loomed behind leader 300M, quickened to lead near 150M and always doing enough to hold off runner up late.
Raced near the rear, bustled along from 600M, not going the pace to challenge, ran past beaten horses only.
Slowly away, raced at tail, 9 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made some progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, 5 lengths back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced towards rear on the outside, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield early, gradually shifted back towards rear on turn, 4 lengths back turning in, finished off strongly to take a place, nearest finish.
Began well from a wide draw, raced prominently but trapped wide, no cover throughout, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Bumped start, raced 3 wide, a length or so back, 2 wide on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Clean jump, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed approaching 100M, weakened thereafter.
Bumped start, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 250M, hit the front 100M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, 4 lengths back, gradually improved along the rail on turn, unable to obtain clear run until final 100M, closed off well to make frame.

Bumped start, raced 3 wide with cover, 2 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, ran on evenly thereafter. (Lost Right Front Plate.) (Sustained an overreach injury to the right front heel.)
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, 3 lengths back, similar position on turn, finished off strongly to score.
Began well, positioned 2 wide, a length back, dropped to midfield on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced 2 wide at rear, wider turning in, made no progress in straight.
Taken back from gate 13, raced at tail, 8 lengths or so back, gradually improved on turn, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to make frame, nearest finish.
Bumped start, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.

Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the outside, 5Ls back, improved on turn, wide into straight, showed limited response early in straights weakened gradually 200M, eased final 100M. (Lame left front leg.) (See Racing Incidents.)
Began only fairly, positioned 2 wide slightly behind midfield, angled out after passing 650M, 2-1/2L turning in, finished off strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, similar position on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching 150M, finished off evenly.
Bumped shortly after start, raced towards rear on the outside, improved on turn, very wide into straight, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Began fairly, raced in midfield on the outside, 4 wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Bumped start, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, 4 lengths back, saved ground on turn, no clear running early in straight, found daylight 250M, made minor progress thereafter.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out after passing 650M, very wide into straight, made some progress in the run home.
Bumped start, tracked leaders, 2 wide, angled out after passing 600M, 3 wide turning in, kept on well in straight to take a place, always held.
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well in straight to hold off the challengers.

Taken back from the widest draw, positioned 6 lengths behind the leader on the inside, moved a bit closer in the middle stages, 2 wide from 600M, no clear run early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Average to begin, raced 3 wide in midfield, 5 lengths or so back on turn, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
Away well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, commenced move after passing 400M, finished off well to take a place.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at rear, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, taken wide in straight and finished off strongly to make frame, nearest on line.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 8 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home, nearest finish.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced towards rear on the outside, 6 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, one-paced in the run home.

Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, saved ground to turn, showed good response in straight, hit the front 100M, kept on well, just able to hold off the challengers late.
Began smartly, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, 2 lengths or so back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened 200M, eased final 100M.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, similar position on turn, finished off strongly, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Began fairly from a wide draw, sent forward to race in 2nd, a length back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened thereafter.
Slow to begin, raced towards rear on the inside, 5 lengths back, saved ground on turn, stumbled 350M, one-paced in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Travelled wide without cover in midfield from start to final bend, folded up quickly after a tough trip.
Soon took up running setting a sound pace, led until finding no extra 400 metres out, weakened under pressure in straight.
Waited with in rear of field, switched wide to challenge entering straight, ran on well down the centre of the track, did best work late. (Tactic questioned)

Pressed forward from a wide gate before settling 2-wide without cover in 1L 2nd, gained slightly closer passing 900 metres and shared lead under pressure 400 metres out, unable to sustain effort inside final 150 metres.

Slowly away, trailed the small field to first bend, gained closer to 5L 7th on rail, further closer in 4L 6th rounding final bend, came under pressure approaching final stretch, found nothing. (Epiglottic entrapment)

Settled wide in last few dropping to joint last making first bend, remained well behind to 400 metres, snuck up to within 2L of pace on rail entering home straight, faded under pressure inside final 100 metres
Settled worse than midfield after moderate start, commenced move at 500 metres rounding final bend, wide under pressure into straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
Settled just off the pace after moderate start, came under pressure to hold place rounding home bend, weakened after straightening.
Settled just over 2L back in 4th, commenced move 520 metres out hanging very wide into straight, hit the front under pressure over 200 metres out, won readily.
Broke slowly and settled near the tail on the rail, made no progress in the straight. (Roarer)
Steadied early to cross onto the rail and sat last, only able to pass weakened rivals.
Settled near last 2 wide, hard ridden at 500M, never a factor.
Settled in front of midfield on the rail, responded well in the straight and got 2nd on the line, no threat to the winner.
Broke well and ridden along to be prominent, settled just behind the leader on the rail, travelled very nicely throughout, angled out at 400M and won easily.
Sat near midfield 2 wide, did not quicken in the straight.
Settled worse than midfield 2 wide, stayed on fairly.
Settled worse than midfield on the rail, made no impression.
Broke with the field and hard ridden early to take the lead, slightly weakened inside 200M, held 3rd.
Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, just one pace in the straight.
Settled midfield on the rail, improved nicely near the rail, a bit awkward near 75M when changing course, ran on well.
Settled midfield 2 wide, travelled keenly on the back straight, found nothing in the straight.
Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, took the lead after entering the back straight, 2 wide on turn, peaked and headed 250M, weakened final furlong.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, closed off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Began well, took the early lead, headed after entering the back straight, 2nd on turn, weakened early in straight, eased inside final furlong.
Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, bumped near 300M, not enough room early in straight, cleared 150M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, angled out 350M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide slightly better than midfield, commenced move 450M, very wide turning in, hit the front 200M, kept on strongly to the line.
Began smartly, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, found rail near 750M, angled out after passing 450M, took the lead early in straight, outpaced and headed 200M, ran on evenly to take 2nd.
Slightly slow out, raced towards rear, 5 lengths or so back, there to turn, bumped near 300M, showed some response early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter.
Crowded start, raced at tail, 6 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Bumped start, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 200M, made no impression thereafter.
Jumped with them, tracked leaders but 3 wide, found a 2 wide spot near 750M, carried wider after passing 450M, weakened early in straight. (Blood in trachea.)
Shifted in at start and bumped, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, carried wider after passing 450M, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Began well, positioned 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Slowly away, raced at rear on the inside, 5 lengths or so back, saved ground throughout, finished off evenly.
Shifted out at start and bumped, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
Moderately away, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Crowded on jumping, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground to turn, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Crowded start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 length back, there to turn, made minor progress in straight.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.

Began well from the widest draw, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside early, sent forward after passing 750M, took the lead 650M, headed 400M, weakened gradually in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from a wide draw, raced 3 wide, a length or so back, no cover on turn, peaked early in straight, one-paced thereafter.
Away with them, sent forward to take the early lead, headed 700M, positioned 1 out 1 back on turn, finished off evenly.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Bumped start, sent forward to race prominently, travelled well to turn, took the lead 400M, kept on well to the line and scored.
Sat midfield on the rail, made no ground in the straight.
Sat last 2 wide, under the whip at 450M and offered nothing.
Broke a bit slow and moved towards the rail to be behind midfield on the rail, moved to 2 wide to improve near 450M, just one pace in the straight.
Sat 3 wide without cover in front of midfield throughout, weakened at 500M.
Settled near last on the rail, never a threat.
Broke nicely and led the race, kept on fairly to held 4th.
Settled behind the speed on the rail, did not quicken in the straight. (See Incident Report)
Broke with the field and showed early speed to sit outside the leader, lay out slightly rounding the home run, kept on well for 3rd.
Settled just behind the leaders 2 wide, moved to 2 wide near 600M, and made little impression. (See Incident Report)
Settled just worse than midfield 2 wide, began to improve between horses near 600M, angled out at 250M, and finished off well to take 2nd.
Steadied after the start and settled near the rear 2 wide, stayed on okay to grab 5th.
Broke nicely and sat midfield 2 wide between horses, started to improve its position near 700M, found a gap between horses near 400M, ran on well and won by a neck.
Never better than midfield, wide into straight, found nothing. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Prominent to about 600 metres out, dropped away quickly. (Tactic questioned)

Soon dropped towards rear in 9th despite ridden along, commenced move 520 metres out gaining 4th over 5L back into straight, sustained progress to reach 2nd inside the 100 metres but never able to threaten.

Pressed forward after moderate start from a wide draw, travelled some 4L back wide without cover in 5th, inconvenienced approaching home bend and extremely wide into straight, made no further impression.
One of best jumping out, soon taken back to just better than midfield in 6th on the rail, gained closer to 3rd round over 4L back over 400 metres out, found nothing in straight.
Settled well behind from a wide draw, saved ground turning for home, ran on well under pressure down the inside of home striaght.
Broke well settling over 2L back in 4th, became further off the pace in fast tempo coming onto home bend, made no impression from wide into straight. (Mucus)
Jumped fairly, settled one back in 2nd on the rail, took up running from from tiring leader 200 metres out, soon drew clear.
Settled in last from the widest draw, saved ground turning for home, ran on steadily past well-beaten horses.
Attempted to make all setting a sound pace, overhauled inside final 200 metres when no more to give.
Settled in midfield mainly in 7th , inconvenienced passing the 400 metres, kept on steadily in straight without threatening.
Settled in last few from a wide draw, ridden between 800 and 600 metres, saved ground on rail turning for home, kept on steadily without quickening under pressure.
Never far off the pace in 5th spot, ran on well to the line under top weight for a creditable 4th, beaten less than a length.
Restrained from draw 11 and shifted across behind runners early stages, last turning into straight and didn't respond to riding, never in the picture.
Moved up to chase leaders in a 3-wide spot without cover, came under pressure 500M, run ended mid-straight, weakened towards the line.
Unhurried after the start, raced towards the rear 6Ls off the pace, failed to pick up on straightening, never dangerous.
Reserved in midfield along the fence 4Ls off the pace, chased on well passing 300M, held by first few late stages.
From draw 12 taken back to a 3-wide spot at the rear, 6Ls to make up top of straight, stayed on without threat. (Jockey: obliged to go back from wide draw, difficult to make ground in the straight.)
Bustled along early to be prompting the pace on outside, couldn't' go on passing 300M, tightened for room 150M when already beaten, eased.
Broke sharply, soon crossed to the lead, kept on soundly over final 300M, was seriously challenged by rivals late but managed to hold on by a nose.
Settled behind midfield, checked on straightening and again 250M, charged home late, just missed by a nose. Unlucky not to have won.
Slow to begin, ended up racing at the rear, saved ground home turn, ran home mildly, not reach contention.
Away with them, always prominent behind leaders, kept on steadily early straight, outsprinted by rivals final 150M
Held up 2-wide in mid-division, responded well from 300M, challenged strongly for the lead late, nearest finish.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide towards rear, 8 lengths back, same margin back on turn, finished off very strongly to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 7 lengths back on turn, passed some tired rivals in straight.

Jumped well, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, found rail near 750M, same margin back on turn, angled out 450M, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on strongly to the line.
Taken back from gate 10, raced at rear, 9 lengths or so back, still well back on turn, made very good progress in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
Began well from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside, took the lead 950M, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed 200M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 lengths or so back, commenced move 450M, very wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M,
Taken back from gate 9, raced behind midfield on the inside, raced in restricted room and unbalanced near 600M, made some progress in straight.
Away with them, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed no response early in straight, weakened and eased final furlong.
Slowly away, raced at rear on the inside, 9 lengths back, still well back on turn, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
Began awkwardly, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong, eased final 100M.
Began well, sent forward to take the early lead, headed near 950M, 1/2L back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths or so back, there to turn, made some headway in straight to make frame.
Bumped start, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.

Moderately away from the widest draw, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, commenced move approaching 600M, very wide turning in, made some progress early in straight, no extra final furlong.
Began smartly from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside, 3/4L back turning in, hit the front 250M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 75M.
Made contact at start, raced at rear on the outside, travelled keenly for the majority of the race, closer on turn, weakened early in straight.
Began well, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M.
Began awkwardly and bumped, sent forward to take the lead, found rail approaching 900M, led by 3/4L turning in, peaked early in straight, headed near 250M, ran on evenly to take a place.
Began fairly, raced 2 wide in midfield, wider turning in, finished off evenly.
Began awkwardly and bumped, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, angled out 500M, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, angled out 550M, 4 lengths back turning in, one-paced in the run home.
Began awkwardly, taken back to race at tail, 9 lengths back, slightly improved on turn, very wide into straight, failed to make any progress in straight.
Away well, trapped wide in midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 1000M, raced 2 wide better than midfield on turn, angled out 500M, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
Made contact at start, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off strongly to score, good debut.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 500M, one-paced in straight.
Slowly away, raced at rear on the inside, 6 lengths or so back on turn, made good progress in straight without threatening the first few.
Began only fairly from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, 6 lengths or so back, angled out 500M, no clear run early in straight, made little progress inside final furlong.
Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, made very good progress in straight to take a place, nearest on line.
Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, moved a bit closer after passing 1000M, 2 lengths or so back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened 300M, eased final 150M.
Clean jump, raced prominently on the outside, took the lead approaching 1100M, found rail near 850M, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well in straight to hold off the challengers.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, no cover throughout, moved a bit closer on turn, made some progress in straight.
Slightly slow out, raced in midfield on the inside early, 2 wide after passing 1000M, commenced move 500M, finished off well to take 2nd, always just held.
Quickly into stride, took the early lead, headed approaching 1100M, allowed rival to cross near 850M, sat right behind the leader on turn, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 100M.

Moderately away from gate 12, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths or so back, wider turning in, made good progress early in straight, not clear run and snatched up near 200M, cleared approaching 100M, made some progress thereafter.
Moderately away, raced towards rear on the inside, 7 to 8 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made very good progress in straight to make frame, nearest finish.
Slightly slow out, raced 2 wide at rear, 7 to 8 lengths back, very wide into straight, made very good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
Jumped well, raced in midfield on rail, saved ground throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
Away well, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, one-paced in the run home.

Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 7 to 8 lengths back on turn, made very good progress early in straight, no clear run and slightly hampered approaching 150M, made no further impression.
Jumped with them, tracked leaders on the outside, challenged the leader turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened and eased final 100M.
Broke well and was hard ridden to be prominent, sat behind the speed, switched out at 450M, closed off well early in the straight, but a bit one pace afterwards.
Settled near the rear on the rail, never a threat.
Settled worse than midfield 2 wide between horses, travelled a bit awkwardly rounding the home turn, ran on decently, best stride late.
Steadied after the start from a wide barrier, settled at the rear, stayed on well to grab 4th.
Settled 2 wide near the rear, stayed on fairly.
Settled just in front of midfield, angled out at 350M, responded well and won on the line by a neck.
Broke well from the rail and led the race on the rail, weakened at 300M.
Settled 2 wide just behind the speed, weakened at 300M and soon faded. (Mucus in trachea) (See Incident Report)
Settled just behind the leaders, did not quickened in the straight.
Sat midfield on the rail, ridden along at 500M, made only minor progress.
Broke nicely, ridden along early and shared the lead in a 2 wide position, kept on well, and just got passed on the line.
Broke near last, ridden early to be midfield 2 wide, offered nothing in the straight.
3 wide no cover near the rear throughout, never a factor.
Sat last on the rail, held up early in the straight, got hampered at 150M, and not seriously tested.

Made contact at start, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, hit the front 150M, kept on strongly to the line and scored.
Average to begin, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out and bumped early in straight, finished off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
Crowded shortly after start, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, difficult to settle in the early and middle stages, 2 wide from 800M, 5 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
Began smartly, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, angled out approaching 500M, closed off well to take a place, not quite able to challenge.
Jumped awkwardly, raced at rear, 7 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made no impression in straight.
Bumped start, raced in midfield on the outside, similar position on turn, made some progress in straight.
Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, raced tight and steadied near 900M, found rail 700M, saved ground on turn, weakened early in straight, eased final 300M. (Bled.)
Commenced well from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, 5 lengths or so back on turn, one-paced in the run home.

Began awkwardly and bumped, raced better than midfield on the outside, sent forward after passing 950M, 2nd on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear on the outside, 7 lengths or so back, commenced move 500M, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home to be nearest on line.
Crowded shortly after start, raced towards rear on the outside, 6 to 7 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, made some progress in the run home.
Jumped with them, raced prominently, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross near 800M, 1 to 2 lengths back on turn, bumped early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.
Clean jump, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Began very awkwardly, raced behind midfield on the inside, unable to maintain position on turn, last into straight, weakened and eased early in straight, unacceptable performance.
Settled near the rear 2 wide, switched out into 3 wide at 900M to improve outside of horses, made good progress from 600M to 150M, then weakened slightly.
Sat behind the leaders 2 wide, weakened inside 300M.
Broke slowly, settled behind midfield on the rail, showed some dash in the straight until weakened inside 200M.
Settled behind the speed on the rail, caught in traffic near the 350M, but offered little.
Broke awkwardly, sat last 2 wide, ridden along at 700M, under the whip at 600M, stayed on well to grab 3rd (Rider dropped his whip)
Led the race and weakened near 600M and faded. (Performance unacceptable, must trial)
Settled midfield 2 wide, made little progress when asked.
Settled in front of midfield, started to lose ground at the back straight, never in contention. (Blood in Trachea) (Performance unacceptable, must trial)
Settled midfield on the rail, angled out at 600M into the clear, travelled on the bridle until being asked inside 300M, responded well and won very comfortably.
Settled 2 wide in front of midfield, travelled nicely up until the straight, but found nothing when asked. (See Incident Report)
Settled worse than midfield 2 wide, only one pace in the early part of the straight, then made some progress.
At the rear on the rail early, improved near the rail, stayed on fairly.
Ridden along early to be prominent, and shared the lead near 1500M, weakened near 350M.
Settled near the rear on the rail, held up near 500M and early part of the straight, ran on well, but no threat to the winner.
Taken back to last from the wideset gate and waited with on the rail, saved ground turning for home, obtained run on the inside and weaved his way through runners to snatch victory final strides.
Niggled along in 5th just some 3L off the pace, in similar position turning for home, kept on steadily without threatening.
Settled one back on rail in joint 3rd, saved ground turning for home, came under pressure to challenge after straightening but unable to quicken to threaten, inconvenienced about 70 metres out.
Settled in midfield, niggled along in midfield rounding home bend, quickened well inside final 150 metres, did best work late.
Settled in last few, responding well when checked 100 metres out, no clear run thereafter.
Began awkwardly, travelled wide without cover in midfield from a poor draw, in similar position entering home straight, kept on same pace under pressure without quickening.

Ridden forward to vie for lead early, settled one out one back in joint 3rd and slightly further back in 4th into straight, quickened well to hit the front 100 metres out only to be caught close home.
Broke well from a wide draw and remained without cover throughout, soon dropped to last few, lost further ground shortly after straightening. (Blood in trachea)
Ridden to forward of midfield in 6th after moderate start, saved ground turning for home, kept on same pace under pressure before producing good late impression inside final 100 metres.
Pressed forward from a wide draw to soon lead on the rail, kicked some 1.5L clear after straightening but flattered, swamped inside final 100 metres.
Settled well behind, making ground when baulked behind runners from 200 metres, sustained good progress once into the clear inside 50 metres.
Soon dropped to last few, gained slightly closer passing the 750 metres, wide into straight, fought on steadily under pressure near the centre of the track.
Pressed forward from a wide draw, moved up to join race leader over 800 metres out, chased him into straight, faded under pressure inside final 200 metres.
Slow to begin and then hampered, travelled in last few on the rail, saved ground turning for home, soon weakened after straightening.
Reserved in midfield along the 2-path, waited with till passing 400M, ran on mildly under top weight, not reach leaders.
From wide draw shifted across behind runners, raced at the rear 10Ls off the pace, gave no response on straightening. Never a factor.
Quickly into stride, over-raced when crossed by rival 1100M, not far off leaders turning for home, switched out to challenge and ran home moderately, just missed 3rd.
Jumped well, always prominent, travelled well in 4th place turning home, moved up swiftly to challenge leader, led 150M, won going away at the line.
Obtained a 2-wide spot ahead of midfield, driven along 550M, held by leaders in the straight, never going the pace to challenge.
Restrained to race behind midfield 7Ls off the pace middle stages, inclined to lay in in the straight, kept on steadily final 200M, never seriously threatened.
Raced keenly down the back-straight, restrained to race in mid-division, kept on fairly passing 400M, never dangerous.
Caught wide no cover back straight, moved up to race outside leader entering home turn, hit lead 350M out, couldn't hold off winner final 150M. Finished clear 2nd.
Moved up and crossed to the fence passing 1100M, in 3rd spot making home turn, battled on well in the straight, not pace of first two final stages, held on for 3rd just.
Settled down behind midfield, saved ground on inside, kept on same pace final 400M, never able to challenge.
Rushed forward, emerged as leader 1100M, headed inside 350M, no extra mid-straight, weakened to finish 8th.
From draw 14 taken back to race at the rear, plenty to do turning home, switched to widest for clear running, gave limited response only.
From draw 12 steadied to find cover, slotted into a 2-wide spot towards the rear passing 1000M, lay in under pressure 300M, did best work late but no threat to first few.
Dropped back from wide draw, settled towards the rear, 7Ls off the pace at 400M, not quickened on straightening. Never involved.
Clean jump, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead 1250M, headed 650M, retook the lead 450M, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 150M, finished 2nd.
Away well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, moved closer in the middle stages, peaked 400M, weakened early in straight.

Jumped well, sent forward to take the early lead, headed 1250M, positioned 1-3/4L behind the leader in the middle stages, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching 200M, weakened gradually final 150M.
Began awkwardly, raced behind midfield on the outside, 5 lengths or so back, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight.
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide towards rear of midfield, angled out 500M, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home to make frame, no threat to the first few.
Began well, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move after passing 700M, 3rd on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Slightly slow out, raced towards rear on the inside, 2 wide from 600M, made some progress early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, still 8 lengths back on turn, no clear run early in straight, angled out approaching 250M, passed some tired runners inside final furlong.
Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 700M, commenced move after passing 550M, finished off very strongly to score.
Slowly away, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, weakened early in straight.
Crowded shortly after start, raced 2 wide at rear, 3 wide on turn, 7 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight. (Had a small cut to the outside of the left front pastern.)
Made contact at start, raced 2 wide behind midfield early, moved a bit closer in the middle stages, commenced move after passing 600M, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.

Moderately away from a wide draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, commenced move after passing 800M, took the lead 650M, headed 450M, peaked early in straight, weakened final 200M.
Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out 500M, finished off well to take a place without threatening the first two.
Slowly away, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run until final 100M, finished off evenly.
Commenced well from gate 1, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground throughout, angled out early in straight, finished off strongly to score.
Taken back from gate 10, raced at tail, 6 lengths back turning in, made minor progress early in straight, peaked on run 200M, one-paced thereafter.
Moderately away from the widest draw, raced 3 wide with no cover in midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, one-paced thereafter.
Awkward leaving stalls and started very slowly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 6 lengths or so back, angled out 500M, made minor progress in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, commenced move 600M, very wide turning in, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 150M.
Away with them, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, carried wider 500M, failed to close off in straight.
Began well from a wide draw, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, same position on turn, hit the front 200M, peaked and headed 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 lengths or so back, moved a bit closer on turn, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
Out with rest, raced towards rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made no progress in straight.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
Bumped start, positioned on rail in midfield, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Jumped with them, positioned 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths or so back, a bit closer on turn, one-paced in the run home.
Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground to turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching 200M, finished off well without threatening the first few.
Moderately away, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score.
Out with rest, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress early in straight, no extra final 75M.

Jumped well from the widest draw, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 500M, very wide turning in, showed good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 75M. (Blood in trachea.)
Average to begin, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length on turn, peaked early in straight, headed 200M, weakened 150M, eased final 75M.

Jumped with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, commenced move approaching 450M, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 150M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame left front leg next day.)
Away with them, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, a length back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, 2 wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
Out in line, raced better than midfield on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Commenced well, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 500M, taken wide in straight and finished off evenly.

Taken back from gate 11, raced 2 wide at rear, 6 lengths back on turn, no clear run early in straight, made some progress after passing 200M, inconvenienced approaching 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
Jumped with them, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, commenced move 450M, not enough room early in straight, cleared 250M, finished off well to take a place.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Held up towards the rear, saved ground on the turns, moved up to 3rd top of straight, ran on well under top weight but was always held by winner final stages.

Settled down in 4th, always in touch, gave limited response when urged 500M, made no impression thereafter. (Jockey : first time at Happy Valley, inclined to lay out during race particularly rounding home turn and in the straight.)
Unhurried after the start, settled near last, held up for clear running rounding home turn, stayed on mildly towards the line.
Reserved at the rear, ran on well passing 300M, shifted ground 200M to continues his challenge, nearest finish.
Held up behind midfield, swung wide into straight, couldn't go on final 300M. (Jockey : didn't see out 2200M at its first time of asking.)
Led slowly early and middle stages before quickening up 600M, couldn't hold off rivals mid-straight, faded late to finish 5th.
Tracked leaders, quickened up to lead 200M, batted on well to hold off the persistent 2nd final stages.
Tracked leader, came under serious pressure 600M and gave ground prior to straightening. Might not see out the distance.
Settled near last on the rail, switched out towards the stands' rail and stayed on only fairly.
Broke alertly and shared the lead on the rail, kept on okay.
Settled near the rear 2 wide, only able to pass weakened rivals.
Settled near midfield 2 wide, weakened 350M. (lame right front)
Steadied after the start from a wide barrier, sat at the rear 2 wide, made decent progress.
Settled in a midfield position 3 wide with cover, vigorously ridden from 1100M to 950M but unable to hold its position, under pressured near 500M, just one pace. (See Incident Report)
Settled midfield 2 wide, made no progress.
Broke slowly and settled worse than midfield on the rail, stayed on well.
Up with the pace 3 wide no cover throughout, faded in the straight.
Broke well and ridden along early to sit just behind the speed on the rail, improved along the rail throughout, responded well despite laying in when under pressure, won by a neck.
Broke nicely and pushed along early, settled just outside the leader, kept on well for 2nd.
Settled midfield on the rail, angled out at 250M to obtain clear running, ran on well, closest at finish.
Commenced well, raced 3 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths back on turn, finished off very strongly to score by a neck.
Began well from a wide draw, unable to slot in, trapped very wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, dropped towards rear in the middle stages, 6 lengths back on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Average to begin, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, made some progress in straight, slightly inconvenienced close home.
Taken back from gate 7, raced at tail, 7 lengths back on turn, taken wide in straight and finished off strongly to be nearest on line.
Quickly into stride, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened close home.
Out with rest, unable to slot in, trapped wide in midfield, similar position on turn, one-paced in the run home.
Away with them, raced prominently, 3 wide, peaked on turn, weakened final 400M.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths back on turn, failed to close off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.) (Roarer.)
Slightly slow out, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress in straight, inconvenienced close home.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 2 wide at rear, 6 lengths back turning in, made good progress early in straight, not enough room near 150M, ran on evenly thereafter.
Jumped with them, raced in 2nd, a length back on turn, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 100M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner late.
Bumped start and unbalanced, sent forward to take the early lead, headed near 1200M, positioned 4th in the middle stages, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced at rear on the outside, 5-1/2L back, very wide turning in, finished off very strongly to score by a narrow margin.
Out in line, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, a bit closer on turn, taken wide 350M, made some progress in straight.
Slightly inconvenienced shortly after start, raced towards rear on the inside, 7 lengths back on turn, made some progress in straight.
Began well, raced in midfield on the outside, dropped towards rear on turn, one-paced in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away from a tricky draw, positioned 2 wide, 1-1/2L back, there to turn, hit the front 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner on line.
Began well from gate 1, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on rail, 2 wide from 650M, 3 wide on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
Shifted in at start, raced 2 wide towards rear early, sent forward after entering the back straight, took the lead 750M, led by 1-1/2L on turn, peaked and headed 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
Taken back from gate 11, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Moderately away from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead near 1200M, headed 750M, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight, eased final 150M.

Jumped with them, positioned on rail slightly behind midfield, 5 lengths or so back, saved ground throughout, closed off well to take a place without threatening the first two. (See Racing Incidents.)
Sat outside the leader, weakened inside 150M.
Steadied to obtain cover early, settled at the rear 2 wide, and made little impression.
Settled at the rear on the rail, showed some dash late.
Broke well and showed good early speed to assume the lead, kept on well for 4th.
Settled behind the speed on the rail, responded well when asked, got passed in the final 50M.
Sat 2 wide near the rear early, switched out to 3 wide trailing position in the back straight, angled out at 350M, a bit one pace early and quickened inside final 100M.
Raced 3 wide no cover throughout, weakened at 400M and faded. (Blood in Trachea)
Immediately moved onto the rail after the start, settled near the rear on the rail, held up near 600M, and improved close to the rail in the straight, stayed on well to win.
Sat worse than midfield 2 wide between horses, made no progress.
Settled midfield on the rail, held up early in the straight until switched out into the clear at 250M, stayed on late. (See Incident Report)
Sat behind the leaders 2 wide, just one pace in the straight.
Settled midfield 2 wide, raced tight at 550M and weakened.
Settled towards rear, saved ground turning for home, ran on to be nearest at finish.
Pressed forward from a poor draw to share pace into back straight, shifted 1L back 700 metres out, came under pressure rounding home bend and soon faded in straight.
Shared pace on the rail, kicked over half a length in front 850 metres out and 1L clear 700 metres out, headed by eventual winner inside 200 metres and soon faded.
Close up early, drifted some 2L back in 4th or 5th early in back straight, came under pressure rounding home bend, fought nothing.
Soon dropped to midfield in 7th on the rail, gained slightly closer in 6th passing 600 metres and sustained headway rounding home bend, ran on steadily from 2L 4th into straight.
Stumbled at start, settled one back on rail, hit the front under pressure inside 200 metres, hung on well from runner-up's late challenge.
Soon dropped to tail end, never seen with a chance.
Taken back from the widest draw, niggled along one from last, found nothing in straight.
Taken back towards rear from a wide draw, went very wide into straight, ran on steadily under pressure down the centre of straight.
Driven forward from a poor draw to vie for lead early, travelled prominently 3-wide without cover in 3rd or 4th, weakened under pressure in straight.
Prominent briefly, settled mainly in midfield in 6th or 7th, wide into straight, finished off the race well under pressure inside final 150 metres.
Travelled in rear of midfield, came under pressure rounding home bend and saved ground into straight, ran on steadily without threatening.

Unable to find cover from draw 6, caught 3-wide outside leaders, found disappointingly little on straightening, soon out of contention. (Jockey : failed to finish off after racing wide without cover.)
Unable to slot in, caught racing 3-wide in midfield, wider home turn, came up empty on straightening.
Restrained behind leaders in a slow run race, loomed early straight, hampered near 200M, inside 100M and close home, beaten a short head. Promoted to 1st after enquiry.
Dropped back to race towards the rear, driven along 450M, ran on mildly over final 300M, failed to threaten between horses.
Restrained in midfield along the 2-path, moved out to challenge 400M, responded fairly under top weight, never going the pace to challenge.
Moved up to race outside the lead, took over passing 300M, shifted out under pressure causing interference to a rival, held on just at the line. Demoted to 2nd after enquiry.
Tracked along the inside, had every chance on straightening, not finishing pace of first two final 200M, lost 3rd close home.
Eased back from wide draw, settled near last, gave limited response passing 300M, never reach contention.
Soon taken across to the fence, raced in midfield 3Ls off leaders, awkward placed 300M when attempting a run on inside, stayed on fairly final stages.
From widest draw eased back to the rear for cover, 5Ls to make up 400M, stayed on willingly to reach 3rd close home. Clocked fastest 400M of the night.
Jumped well, set slow pace in the lead, soon headed on straightening, weakened away final 250M.
Out in line, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide after passing 550M, very wide into straight, finished off evenly.
Began smartly from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.

Out with rest, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside early, moved closer after passing 1100M, took the lead 900M, led by 1-3/4L on turn, kept on very well in straight to hold off the challengers late.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, commenced move 450M, very wide into straight, finished off strongly to take a place.
Away well, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame without threatening.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Shifted out on jumping and bumped, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 6 lengths back, same margin back on turn, taken very wide in straight and finished off strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.
Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, very wide into straight, kept on same pace to the line.

Taken back from gate 8, raced towards rear on the inside, 7 to 8 lengths back on turn, made good progress early in straight, not enough room approaching 100M, cleared 50M, made some headway thereafter.
Began well from a wide draw, raced prominently, 2 wide, allowed the rival to cross near 800M, 2 lengths or so back on turn, finished off evenly.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, headed near 900M, 2nd on turn, 1 to 2 lengths back, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Roarer.)
Jumped with them, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
